text: Sir, dekho na, woh aadmi jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, jiske khilaaf case chal raha hai, ab woh phir se court mein chala gaya hai. Bolte hain kuch 'writ application' kiya hai. Matlab woh apni saza se bachna chahta hai kya? Hum garib log hain, itni mushkil se toh case lada. Ab phir se yeh sab shuru ho gaya. Saab, woh 'accused' hai, usne jurm kiya hai, yeh toh sabko pata hai. Ab yeh Article 226, pata nahi kya hai, iske zariye woh bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Kya mera case phir se latak jayega? Bahut pareshaan ho gaya hoon main is sab se. Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main ek bahut zaroori complain leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai is ek galat order ki wajah se. Pata nahi kisne aur kyun, par 28.01.2022 ko ek order pass hua hai (woh Annexure P-13 wala), woh bilkul galat hai! Uss order ne meri saari umeedon pe paani pher diya hai. Meri toh raat ki neend udd gayi hai. Maine ek advocate, Ms. Amrita Garg ji ko kiya hai. Unhone yeh galat order challenge karne ke liye court mein petition file ki hai. Judge sahab log case dekh rahe hain, par mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai aur main bahut pareshaan hoon. Aap meri suno sir, please is mamle mein meri madad karo, yeh order cancel hona chahiye. Meri koi galti nahi hai, par mujhe saja mil rahi hai.

Sir, meri suno na! Ye kya ho raha hai desh mein? Woh Gurmit Ram Rahim, jisko jail mein hona chahiye tha, usko release kar diya gaya hai. Pata hai kitne cases hain uspar, kitne logo ki zindagi barbaad ki hai usne? Aur ye sab Punjab elections ke exact time par hua, jab 20 February ko chunaav chal rahe the. Sarkar ne ya kisne ye order pass kiya hai, mujhe nahi pata, par yeh bilkul galat hai! Hum jaise aam log toh dar ke maare ji rahe hain. Meri family darti hai, main darta hoon. Aap please kuch karo sir, is order ko cancel karwao. Hamari safety ka kya hoga? Ye kaisa insaaf hai?

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai. Woh log, unhone mujhse zabardasti paise maange hain. Kehte hain agar nahi diye toh poora parivaar khatre mein pad jayega. Sir, yeh koi chhote-mote chor nahi hain, yeh toh bade gunde hain, pura syndicate chalate hain. Mujhe pata hai ki inke khilaaf pehle bhi kitne cases chal rahe hain, police file mein inke naam par ek se zyada baar chargesheet lagi hui hai. Inse sab darte hain. Sir, mujhe itna kanoon ka gyan nahi, par inpar toh wohi sakht se sakht kanoon lagna chahiye jo bade-bade organised crime ke gangs par lagta hai. Meri jaan ko khatra hai, sir. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Wahid Ahmed aur Mazhar-Ul-Islam ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2010 mein unko saza hui thi, Sessions Case No. 38/2009 mein, Karkardooma court ke ASJ sahib ne 9 September 2010 ko unhe convict kiya tha. Kitni mushkil se toh humein insaaf mila tha, sir! Maine socha tha ab meri jaan mein jaan aayi hai. Aur ab, mujhe pata chala hai ki yeh Wahid Ahmed phir se koi petition laga raha hai, Article 226 aur CrPC 482 ke under, ki uski saza khatam ho jaaye ya kam ho jaaye. Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha mere saath dhokha hai! Main bahut darr gaya hoon. Agar uski saza maaf ho gayi toh meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jaayegi. Please sir, kuch kariye, humein bachaiye. Meri jaan ko ab bhi khatra hai, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi thi jab us katil Umesh ne mere apne ko maara tha. Hamara poora Hamirpur district, Muskura thana, Case Crime No. 167 of 2004, sab jaante hain uske gunah ko. Judge Yogesh Kumar ji ne Sessions Trial No. 246 of 2004 mein usko Section 302 IPC ke तहत life imprisonment di thi. Humne socha chalo, insaaf mil gaya, thoda sukoon aaya. Par ab pata chala hai Sir, ki usne phir appeal daal di hai, Criminal Appeal No. 4773 of 2005 ke naam se. Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya toh hum kaise jeeyenge? Meri aur mere parivaar ki jaan ko khatra hai. Usne mere apne ko maara hai! Hum darr rahe hain, Sir. Please, kuch kijiye. Meri madad kijiye, use dobara bahar mat aane dijiye.

Sir, main Baljit Singh hoon. Meri suniye, sir! Humari toh zindagi kharab ho gayi hai. Hum pehle bhi court mein gaye the, Sonepat mein. Wahan 6 May 2008 ko ek faisla aaya tha, ek order tha, usko hum hatwana chahte hain. Yeh Rajbir aur Haryana Sarkar ke khilaaf hai, sir. Humne toh bas itna maanga tha ki jo gawah the na, unhe dobara bulaya jaye. Hum unse aur sawaal poochhna chahte the, kuch zaroori baatein thi. Lekin sir, hamari woh application hi kharij kar di! Mera toh pura case bigad jayega aise. Aap hi bataiye, main kya karoon? Humare saath bahut galat ho raha hai, sir. Gawahon ko dobara bulana bahut zaroori hai mere liye.

Sir, meri Chhoti Devi, meri patni ke saath bohot bada haadsa ho gaya hai. Main Amarjeet, uska pati hoon. Aap please meri baat suniye. Aaj 12.05.2011 ki baat hai, humein SGM Hospital se khabar mili. Jab hum wahaan bhage-bhage pahunche, toh pata chala ki meri biwi Chhoti Devi ko unconscious condition mein laaya gaya tha. Uske poore body par chotein thi, Sir. Aap sochiye, kitni buri tarah maara hoga usko! Aur phir, doctor ne toh seedha bol diya 'brought dead'. Meri Chhoti ab nahi rahi, Sir! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha. Meri patni ke saath jisne bhi yeh kiya hai, usko saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir, meri biwi ke liye.

Sir, main Hasiba, Majhar Hussain ki patni, Gali No. 7, Vijay Park, Delhi se aayi hoon. Mera dil dooba ja raha hai. Kal, 2 September 2005 ko, mere pati ko kuchh anjaan logon ne maar diya tha. Unko kisi ne bhi nahi chhoda! Aaj, 3 September ko, main Bhajan Pura PS mein yeh FIR darj karwa rahi hoon. FIR number 368/05 hai. Sir, yeh 302 IPC ka case hai, mere pati ka qatl hua hai. Mujhe bas mere pati ke kaatilo ko saza dilwani hai. Aap please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Un anjaan logon ko pakdo aur unhe saza dilwao.

Sir, main Madhu Devi. Mera naam Madhu Devi hai. Aaj subah, 11 June 2006 ko, kareeb 6:05 baje... mere chhote se bete ko, sir, sirf 2-2.5 saal ka tha woh... mere padosi ne maar diya hai! Mera to sab kuch lut gaya, sir. Hum Prem Nagar-III, Block E-2, Shani Bazar Road, Subhash STD ke paas rehte hain. Maine abhi-abhi PCR ko call kiya tha, usi ki information aapke paas bhi aayi hogi. Mera beta... wo ab nahi raha, sir. Padosi ne itni berahmi se usko... please sir, meri madad karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Mere pati Ganesh Shah bhi mere saath hain. Us bereham ko saza milni chahiye. Mera baccha toh gaya, par usko uske kiye ki saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Delhi mein rehta hoon, aur hum tuition dekar apna ghar chalate hain. Gareeb log hain, bas do waqt ki roti kamaate hain. Ab aap socho, pehle toh mere bhai ko 3 September 2001 ko kuch logon ne maar diya. Us waqt uske khilaaf FIR bhi hui thi Section 302/324/34 IPC mein. Ek toh yeh gham, upar se us dushman (defendant) ne, pata nahi kyun, hum par jhootha case chala diya. Maliciously prosecute kiya humein! Hum toh bas insaaf chahte hain apne bhai ke liye aur upar se humein hi court ke chakkar lagwa diye. Meri zindagi barbad ho gayi hai iss sab mein, Sir. Humara naam badnaam ho gaya. Mujhe iss galat prosecution aur badnaami ke liye compensation chahiye. Humara kya kasoor tha?

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... mera toh dil hi baitha jaa raha hai. Meri behen ko maar diya gaya hai, sir! 28 January 2004 ki raat ko, kareeb 10 baje ke aas-paas, humein khabar mili ki uski laash mili hai. Koi zaalim usko maar ke chala gaya. Hum toh tab se ro hi rahe hain, sir. Agle din, 29 January ko, Seema Puri police station mein uski FIR register hui hai, number 29/04. IPC ka section 302 laga hai, matlab seedha murder ka case hai. Humein toh bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Humari toh duniya ujad gayi. SI Sanjay Kumar ji ko is case ka investigation assign kiya gaya hai. Bas aap se yahi request hai ki jaldi se jaldi unko pakdo jinhone yeh kiya hai. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko nyay dilao.

Daroga ji, main badi mushkil mein hoon, aapki madad chahiye. Woh Ramu jisko mere case mein saza hui thi, bahut bada apradhi hai woh, 'hardcore prisoner' bolte hain usko. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki usko parole ya furlough mil rahi hai, woh bahar aa raha hai! Sir, meri jaan ko khatra hai, mere bachche darr rahe hain. Ye Haryana ka kanoon kaisa hai jahan itne khatarnak logon ko bhi chhutti mil jaati hai? Lagta hai ye 'hardcore prisoner' ki definition hi galat hai, tabhi aise log bahar aate hain. Humari family ko insaaf nahi mil raha. Please kuch kijiye, usko bahar mat aane dijiye!

Sir, main yahan apni case ki update dene aaya hoon. Meri jo petition thi na, uske jawab mein ab State ke vakeel ne reply file kar diya hai. Woh reply Mr. Sher Singh ka hai, jo Karnal District Prison ke Superintendent hain. Court ne woh reply record par le liya hai, matlab unhone accept kar liya hai. Aur meri taraf se bhi aur State ki taraf se bhi, dono vakeelon ko judge saahab ne sun liya hai. Ab pata nahi aage kya hoga, sir. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye. Bohut pareshaan hoon main is sab se.

Sir, main Randhir Singh, Delhi Police mein Head Constable hoon. Meri baat suniye, sir, bohot saal ho gaye hain. Mujhe na out of turn promotion milni thi, maine uske liye application di thi. Lekin pata nahi kyun, 29 December 2006 ko ek order aaya aur meri request reject kar di gayi. Sir, itni mehnat ki hai maine, kitni services di hain department ko, par meri promotion rok di gayi. Ye mere saath bohot galat hua hai, sir. Mera haq mara gaya hai. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki woh purana order cancel kiya jaaye aur jo meri promotion baki hai, woh mujhe mile. Aap hi bataiye, sir, insaaf milega ya nahi?

Sir, main yahan aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh Ravinder, Chandra Shekhar Giri ka beta, usne... usne mere apne ko maar diya! Sir, Anand Parbat police station mein 2016 mein ek FIR number 525/2016 darj hui thi. Poori investigation ho chuki hai, Cr.P.C. Section 173 ke तहत report bhi submit ho gayi hai. Yeh IPC Section 302 ka case hai, seedha-seedha khoon ka mamla hai. Ab court mein trial chal raha hai, aur humein bas yahi umeed hai ki us Ravinder ko uske kiye ki saza mile. Meri family bahut pareshan hai, sir. Usne meri duniya ujaad di hai. Please, humari madad kijiye, use saza milni hi chahiye.

Sir, main Mustaq, Niyaz ka abba bol raha hoon. Mera beta Niyaz, jo bas 22 saal ka tha, usey Akbar @ Ganja ne maar daala hai, Sir! Woh Sabir ka beta hai. Meri poori duniya ujad gayi hai, Sir. Mera Niyaz chala gaya! Moti Nagar police station mein 2017 mein FIR number 319/2017 darj hui thi. Police ne investigation complete karke 24.11.2017 ko charge sheet bhi file kar di thi, Section 173 Cr.P.C. ke under. IPC ke Section 302/34 ke तहत murder ka case bana tha uspar. Ab mujhe bas mere bete ke liye insaaf chahiye, Sir. Woh killer Akbar abhi tak bahar ghoom raha hai. Mera Niyaz toh ab wapas nahi aa sakta, lekin uss Akbar ko uske gunaah ki saza zaroor milni chahiye. Please, Sir, meri help kijiye, mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai.

Sir, meri behan Mamta Thakur ke saath jo hua, woh soch kar bhi rooh kaanp jaati hai. Jaise hi yeh sab hua, humne turant police ko bulaya. Aap log aaye, sir, poori crime team bhi aayi thi, dog squad bhi tha. Aapne poora spot check kiya, photographs bhi khinchi gayi. Meri bechari Mamta ki dead body ko fir BJRM Hospital ke mortuary le gaye aap log. Inspector Sudhir Kumar sir, jo us waqt SHO the, unhone meri statement li thi, Ex.PW1/A, aur ussi ke base par FIR bhi register hui. Magar sir, jab check kiya toh pata chala ki wahan se cash gayab hai. Meri behan toh chali gayi, ab yeh loot bhi ho gayi. Humein insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, suniye na meri baat! Mera toh dil baitha ja raha hai yeh sab sunke. Woh Koli aur Pandher hain na, Gautam Buddh Nagar wale... jinhone mere bachhe ko... pata nahi kitno ko maar dala. Sir, unhone khud kaboola hai ki 15-15 insaani khopdiyaan aur haddiyaan unke bataye hue jagah se mili hain! Magistrate sahab ne unhe ab do din ke liye police remand pe bheja hai. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai Sir. Inko toh seedha phaansi honi chahiye. Hum gareeb log hain, humein bas insaaf chahiye. Meri beti ab tak nahi mili Sir. Inko chhodna mat, please Sir!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Mera ek case chal raha tha, Assam mein, uski sunwai 5 August 2023 ko hui aur judgment bhi aa gaya. Par Sir, mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha hai. Bade bade vakil the, Mr. N. Uddin aur Madam B. Bhuyan, aur do Honorable Judges Sir, Justice Jamir aur Justice Ete. Itne saare kanoon, itne judgments, par meri toh kuch suni hi nahi gayi lagta hai. Main toh ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Main itne saalon se jail mein hoon, Sir, life imprisonment kaat raha hoon. Maine socha tha thodi der ke liye bahar aaunga, parole ke liye application di thi Haryana Act ke Section 12(3) ke तहत. Par Bhiwani Jail ke Superintendent sahab ne meri application reject kar di. Bolte hain main eligible hi nahi hoon, abhi parole ya furlough ke liye. Yeh pichhle saal 16 December 2023 ka order hai. Meri toh samajh nahi aa raha, kya mera koi haq nahi hai? Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai, Sir. Main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon ki aap meri madad karein. Main toh bechara phas gaya hoon.

Sir, main Sanjeev Kumar bol raha hoon. Meri ek bahut badi mushkil hai, sir. Meri behen ki beti, meri bhanji Neha ki shaadi hai 15/16 February ko. Woh meri apni beti jaisi hai, sir. Mujhe Kurukshetra court ne umar kaid di hai, main jail mein hoon, lekin mujhe uski shaadi mein jaana hai! Maine pehle bhi Article 226/227 ke तहत parole ki request ki hai ki mujhe char hafte ki chutti mil jaaye. Meri behen ki izzat ka sawaal hai, Neha ka future hai. Agar main nahi jaunga toh log kya kahenge? Sir, please kuch kijiye, mujhe meri bhanji ki shaadi mein pahunchna hai. Bas char hafte ki parole dila do, main wapas aa jaunga. Meri suno, sir.

Sir, main High Court tak gaya hoon, ek petition daali hai. Meri bas itni si guzarish hai ki mujhe thode dino ke liye riha kar do, please. Sirf 4 se 6 hafto ke liye chahiye, zyada nahi. Mera ghar na, bahut puraana ho gaya hai, bilkul tootne ki haalat mein hai. Baarish mein chhat tapakti hai, deewarein kamzor ho gayi hain, kabhi bhi gir sakta hai. Mujhe bas uski marammat karani hai, sir. Maine Haryana ke kanoon ke hisaab se hi maanga hai, woh Good Conduct Prisoners Act hai na, uske section 3 (1) (d) mein likha hai. Meri sunwai nahi ho rahi, sir. Kaise karun main apne ghar ki marammat agar mujhe bahar hi nahi aane denge?

Sir, meri baat suniye na, main kitni mushkil mein hoon. Mera ghar na, bilkul kharab ho gaya hai, toot-phoot gaya hai. Uski repair karwana bahut zaroori hai, warna rehna mushkil hai. Isi liye maine parole ke liye application di thi, ki thode din ke liye bahar aa kar apna ghar theek karwa loon. Lekin sir, unhone mera application reject kar diya, woh bhi 3 January 2020 ko! Ye toh galat baat hai na. Haryana ke kanoon (Haryana Good Conduct Prisoners Act) ke Section 3(1)(d) ke hisaab se toh mujhe parole milni chahiye. Mujhe bas chaar हफ्ते ki parole chahiye, sir. Aap hi batao, agar main bahar nahi jaunga toh mera ghar aise hi pada rahega kya? Main toh ab High Court tak gaya hoon, us order ko hatwane ke liye. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyuki mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai. Main jail mein hoon, theek hai, apni saza kaat raha hoon. Par sir, mera hak banta hai ki mujhe chutti mile, parole mile. Maine application di thi 4 hafte ki chutti ke liye, ghar jana tha mujhe, par un logon ne meri request reject kar di. 10 February 2020 ka order hai unka. Ab aap hi batao sir, main ek achha kaidi hoon, mera good conduct hai, sab records hain. Kaanoon ke hisaab se mujhe parole milna chahiye tha. Par ye log meri sun hi nahi rahe. Meri family wait kar rahi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir. Bahut zaroorat hai mujhe us chutti ki.

Sir, main Gurgaon jail mein band hoon, umar-qaid ka qaidi hoon. Mere bachchon ka school mein admission karwana hai, sir. Ek paanchvi kaksha mein hai aur doosra aathvi mein. Unka dakhila karwane ke liye koi nahi hai ghar par, main hi unka sab kuch hoon. Agar abhi admission nahi hua toh unka poora saal kharab ho jayega. Isliye, sir, mainne emergency parole ke liye arzi di hai, chaar hafte ki chhutti maangi hai. Jo jail ke kanoon hain, uske hisaab se hi maang raha hoon. Bas yahi guzaarish hai, sir, ki mujhe mauka mil jaye ki main apne bachchon ka bhala kar sakun. Unka future daanv par hai, sir.

Sir, main Yamuna Nagar jail mein band ek kaidi hoon. Meri life imprisonment chal rahi hai, par sir, mere bachchon ka kya hoga? Unko school mein admission dilana hai, unka future daav par hai. Maine bas chaar hafte ki parole maangi thi, taaki main bahar jaakar unke school ke arrangements kar sakoon. Jo woh Haryana Good Conduct Prisoners Act hai na, uska Section 3(i)(d), uske तहत proper application bhi di thi maine. Par sir, pata nahi kaisa system hai, meri woh application abhi tak pending hai, uski koi sunwai nahi ho rahi. Mere bachchon ka saal barbaad ho jayega. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe woh parole dilwa dijiye taaki main apne bachchon ka bhala kar sakoon.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, meri zindagi ka case hai ye. Kitne saal ho gaye, ab tak insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Woh Vijay Pal Singh, Sodan Singh ka beta, usne mera jeena haram kar diya tha. Yaar, 1989 ki baat hai, Trilok Puri PS mein FIR hui thi uska number tha 564/89. Kitni mushkil se case chala, woh Sessions Court mein, Karkardooma mein. Judge sahab ne usko pakda, 15 November 2000 ko uske khilaaf judgment aaya tha, aur sentence bhi sunaya 17 November ko. Maine socha ab jaake chain milega. Par nahi, woh kameena, ab Criminal Appeal daal ke baitha hai, case number 735/2000. Kehta hai usko judgment galat laga. Sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Itne saalon baad bhi insaaf nahi milega kya? Meri kya galti hai? Please, kuch karo Sir. Woh bahar aaya toh humara kya hoga?

Sir, main *jail* mein hoon, *life imprisonment* kaat raha hoon. Panipat *court* ne 2018 mein mujhe *saza* di thi, *FIR* No. 65 mein. Ab main Karnal *jail* mein hoon, *Superintendent* sahab ke under. Sir, maine ek *application* di thi ki mujhe thode din ke liye *temporary release* mil jaaye, apne parivaar se milne. Bahut zaroori kaam tha ghar pe. Lekin Karnal *jail* ke *Superintendent* sahab ne meri woh *application* reject kar di hai, 6 September 2021 ko unka *order* aaya hai. Yeh toh sarasar galat hai sir! Meri *relief* ki *application* reject kar di gayi, jabki mera *right* banta hai. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe iss *order* ke khilaaf kuch karna hai. Kya main ab ghar bhi nahi ja sakta kuch din ke liye?

Sahab, main Chander Bhan Singh bol raha hoon. Meri suniye na, kitna pareshaan hoon! Mera case tha Statish Rana aur unke khilaaf. Supreme Court tak gaye the hum, 23 January 2012 ko unhone order bhi diya tha ki jaldi sunwai ho. Socha ab toh insaaf milega, par nahi! Aap soch rahe ho kya hua? Unhone toh meri 'cognizance' hi refuse kar di. Matlab itna sab karne ke baad bhi, meri baat sunne ko bhi taiyaar nahi hain? Pata nahi kya chal raha hai. Yeh Vinay Tyagi aur inke jaise log... CBI tak ka case hai inpe, toh hum jaise aam aadmi ka kya hoga? Bas ghoomte raho court-kachehri ke chakkar, aur insaaf mile na mile, bhagwan jaane! Meri file dekho na ek baar, saari mehnat barbaad ho gayi.

Sir, main Ram Singh, meri beti Poonam ke maamle mein yahan aaya hoon. Un zalimon ne meri beti ko maar dala, Sir! Wo Baljeet Singh, uski maa Nirmala, aur wo Sanjeet, Rajesh, Meena, yeh sab milkar meri beti ko dahej ke liye bohot tang karte the. Roz usko maarte-peette the, zaleel karte the. 29 October 2008 ko unhone meri bachchi ki jaan le li. Humne tab bhi FIR karayi thi, wo Nangloi PS ki 642/08 wali. Ab case court mein gaya hai, par mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Meri beti ne kitna kuch saha tha. Sir, please, un sabko saza milni chahiye. Meri Poonam ko justice milna chahiye.

Sahab, main Mohd. Iqbal bol raha hu. Meri ek bahut badi pareshani hai. Mera beta, Mohd. Idrish, na, woh chabees June ki shaam ko, kareeb aath baje, ghar se gayab ho gaya. Pata hi nahi chala kidhar gaya. Humne usi din Gokul Puri police station mein uski missing report bhi karwai thi, woh DD number 27A tha. Char din tak koi khabar nahi mili, hum to mar gaye the tension mein. Phir tees June ko, mere statement par, yahi Gokul Puri PS mein Section 365 IPC ke तहत ek FIR darj hui, jiska number hai 484/07. Lekin sahab, ab tak mera beta mila nahi hai. Aap kuch kijiye, please, use dhundhne mein meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mera toh sab kuch lut gaya hai. Woh Darshan Singh s/o Bana Singh, jiski umar 46 saal hai, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Usne mere pati ko maar dala, uski cheezein bhi loot li! Poore ek saal se zyaada ho gaya hai, 2012 ki baat hai yeh. Rajouri Garden police station mein FIR bhi hui thi, number 456/2012. Police ne report bhi banayi thi 2013 mein, Section 173 Cr.P.C. ke under. Murder (302), saboot mitana (201), loot (392) aur chori ka maal rakhna (411) — itne saare sangheen jurm kiye hain usne. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, usko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main Rakesh Kumar Gupta, meri baat suno please. Meri jaan pe ban aayi thi! Wo din tha 12.01.2005, meri dukaan M/s R.K. Property Dealers C-1/218, New Kondli, Delhi par, ek aadmi ne mujh par goli chala di! Seedha nishaana! Main toh darr ke maare chillaya. Woh badmash toh mujhe goli maar kar bhag gaya, apni woh deshi pistol bhi wahin chhod gaya. Mere chair ke paas pura khoon fail gaya tha, Sir. Meri toh kismat acchi thi ki main bach gaya, par abhi bhi darr lagta hai. Usne toh jaan lene ki koshish ki thi meri! Aap please usko jald se jald pakadiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, aur meri family bhi bahut darr gayi hai.

Sir, main Rithala gaon se aaya hoon. Mere bade bhai ko bahut buri tarah maara hai. Wahan Talab Wala Park mein, jo Gumti hai na, uske andar bench pe aur bahar Chabutra pe khoon hi khoon pada tha. Itna khoon dekh ke meri toh saansein hi ruk gayi thi! Mera bhai aise zakhmi kaise ho sakta hai? Pata chala usko BSA hospital le gaye hain, haalat bahut serious hai. Kiran Pal ji sabse pehle aaye the, phir Inspector Sameer Sir aur Mahavir Sir bhi pahunche the. Sir, abhi bhi wahi darr ka mahaul hai. Please, un kameenon ko pakdo jinhone mere bhai par hamla kiya. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi foot gayi us din. Main toh bas ek shaadi mein gaya tha, woh Carnival Farm House, GTK Road, Alipur mein. Tareekh thi 9 March 2008 ki. Sab kitne khush the, dancers the, gaane baj rahe the. Achanak se pata nahi kya hua, ek goli chal gayi! Seedha mujhe lag gayi, main wahin gir gaya. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us din, laga ab main bachunga nahi. Pata nahi kisne kiya, kyu kiya. Abhi tak woh scene meri aankhon ke saamne aata hai toh rooh kaanp jaati hai. Mujhe bahut dard hua, hospital mein kitne din raha. Police ko PCR se information mili thi, shayad phone number 9213729883 se. DD No.3B bhi bana tha aur SI Krishan Kumar ji ko assign kiya tha case. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile, us goli chalane wale ko saza mile. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di unhone. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, aaj 14.05.14, dopahar 12.30 baje aap logon ne us Chanchal Paul ko pakda hai na? Yahi woh aadmi hai jo E-42, Rani Garden, Shastri Nagar mein apni biwi Suchitra Paul ke saath rehta hai, aur meri zindagi barbaad kar rakhi hai. Usne jo woh Bangla mein letter likha hai, Sir, usmein pata nahi kya-kya dhamkiyan di hain. Main usse bahut darti hoon. Meri to neend ud gayi hai uski wajah se. Aap logon ne ab usse poora sach ugalwana hai. Usne jo kuch bhi Bangla mein likha hai, uski achhe se jaanch karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Usne meri family ko bhi bahut tang kiya hai. Please, is baar usko chhodna mat, DD no.10A mein jo report hai, uspe kadi karwai ho.

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad lekar aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai, saab. Woh Manish Kumar, jo Rattan Singh ka beta hai, aur Pintoo, Babu Singh ka beta – in dono ne milkar mere saath bahut zulm kiya hai. Inhone mere apno ko *maara* aur *gayab* kar diya, Sir. Meri FIR No. 557/2016, Nihal Vihar PS mein darj hui thi. Police ne poori jaanch (investigation) complete kar di hai, aur ab Section 173 Cr.P.C ke तहत case trial ke liye jaa raha hai. In par IPC ke Section 302, 364, 201, 506, 120-B, 34 jaise gambhir aarop hain. Inhone jaan li, kidnap kiya, saboot mitaye, dhamkiyan bhi di. Meri family aaj bhi darr ke saaye mein jee rahi hai. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki inko kadi se kadi saza mile, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki aaj, 20.01.2014 ko, dopahar ke time, kareeb 3 baje se 3:30 baje ke beech, Laxmi Dairy ke bilkul paas ek bahut bada jhagda hua. Main wahi tha, aur un logon ne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya. Gaali galauj bhi kari aur dhakke mukke bhi mare. Main bohot darr gaya hoon, sir. Meri taraf se ya kisi padosi ne 8059130233 number se police ko call bhi kiya tha. Tabhi se mera BP high ho rakha hai. Please un logon ke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri jaan ko khatra hai unse. Meri complaint likhiye, please.

Sir, main Vinay Kumar Gupta hoon. Meri toh haalat kharab hai, sir! Aaj subah-subah main apne property pe gaya tha Holambi Kalan mein, Dal Mill Road pe, K.No. 96/72. Wahan mera ek kirayedaar rehta hai, Devender Dass naam ka. Sir, usne... usne apni biwi ka murder kar diya hai! Meri aankhon ke saamne... pura ghar khoon se sana hua hai. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Main turant aapke paas Metro Vihar police station aaya hoon, sir. Yeh aaj, 1st November 2012 ki subah ki baat hai, lagbhag 6:50 baje. Bahut bada haadsa ho gaya hai, sir. Please jaldi se jaldi wahan jao, dekho aur action lo. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sahab, meri ek complaint hai. Yeh kal, matlab 05.07.08 ki subah ki baat hai. Mera ghar H-5, Ashok Vihar, Phase I, Delhi mein hai. Meri ek kaamwali thi, Pinky. Woh raat ko ek kamre mein soyi thi. Subah jab humne use uthaya, toh usne door hi nahi khola. Humne kitna awaz lagaya, knock kiya, par koi response nahi aaya. Mujhe laga kuch gadbad hai. Pura din ho gaya, usne door nahi khola. Sir, bahut darr lag raha hai. Pata nahi andar kya ho gaya hai uske saath. Meri toh jaan nikal rahi hai soch kar. Aap please jald se jald aakar dekhiye na. Mujhe lagta hai kuch bahut bura hua hai. Please help kijiye.

Sir, main Shastri Park se aayi hoon. Meri beti... (uska naam nahi bataungi, uski safety ke liye). Raat 24 aur 25 April 2010 ki baat hai, meri beti gayab ho gayi thi. Uss raat, 24 April ko, kareeb 9:30 baje, main apni beti ke saath hi thi. Pata nahi kya hua, kaun use utha le gaya. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir. Aap log aaye the na, SI Suresh Chand sahib aur Constable Bachchu Singh ji? DD No. 47A par maine tabhi complaint likhwai thi. Jab se woh gayab hui hai, mera toh jeena haram ho gaya hai. Meri aap se hath jod ke request hai, meri beti ko dhoond do. Woh meri akeli hai, sir. Mera dil baitha ja raha hai. Please, kuch karo.

Sir, main Rohit, aapke paas complaint karne aaya hoon. Main aapko batana chahta hoon ki 6 July 2006 ko, us din na, Anil aur uske saath kuch aur logon ne mujhe aur mere dost Avinash ko buri tarah maara. Itna maara ki humein Dr. BSA Hospital mein admit hona pada. Sir, meri halat toh bohot critical thi, Avinash ko bhi kaafi chotein aayi hain. Humare poore body pe chot ke nishaan hain, abhi bhi dard ho raha hai. Woh log bohot gunde hain, sir. Bina kisi wajah ke humein maara, aur abhi tak khule ghoom rahe hain. Main darr raha hoon, sir, ki woh dobara humare saath kuch galat na karein. Aap please unke khilaaf sakht action lo aur humein insaaf dilao. Humari jaan ko khatra hai unse.

Sahab, main Raju ki biwi hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi, sahab! Kal, 10 March 2007 ko... mera pati, Raju, kaam pe gaya tha, par wapas nahi aaya. Hum raat bhar pareshaan the. Subah jab Zero Pusta main road pe, woh Engineering College ke bilkul saamne, ek laash mili hone ki khabar aayi, toh mera dil baith gaya. Main bhaag ke gayi wahan, aur sahab... woh mera Raju tha! Mere pati ko kisi ne maar dala! Kaise kar sakte hain log aisa? Meri choti choti bacchiyaan hain, ab unka kya hoga? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Jisne bhi mere pati ke saath yeh kiya hai, usko pakdo, use saza do. Hamari FIR toh ho gayi hogi na, 86/07 number? Please, sahab, madad karo.

Sir, main B-5, Sector-2, Industrial Area, Bawana se bol raha hoon. Meri duniya ujaad di hai sir! Ranjit Mukhiya ne mere bete ko maar diya hai. Yeh ghanauni harkat aaj hi (ya kal) 31 August 2015 ko hui hai. Humne turant police ko khabar di thi, jiski DD No. 12PP bhi aapke paas hogi. SI Jitender Joshi sahab, HC Vinod aur Ct. Satpal bhi aaye the spot par, unhone dekha tha sab kuch. Sir, mera beta chala gaya. Meri family bikhar gayi hai. Woh Ranjit Mukhiya bahut kharab aadmi hai. Usne jaan-boojhkar mere bete ki jaan li hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Please, meri madad karo!

Sir, main Sajjan Kumar bol raha hoon. Aaj subah, 26 March 2015 ko, mere ghar, H. No. 9, Ashram Road, Alipur mein ek bahut bada haadsa ho gaya hai. Woh Aashu... usne mere apne ko maar diya hai, Sir! Meri aankhon ke saamne mera sab kuch ujad gaya. Woh aadmi itna zalim hai, usne bina wajah mere ghar ke sadasya ka khoon kar diya. Maine turant police ko phone kiya tha, woh DD no. 65B pe gayi hogi khabar. Thodi der mein SI Devender Sir aur Constable Sohan Pal ji spot pe pahunche bhi the. Sir, ye Section 302 IPC ka case hai. Aap please Aashu ke khilaaf kadi se kadi karwayi kijiye. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Mera poora parivaar toot gaya hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... subah-subah ka waqya hai, 12 June 2015 ki baat hai. Kareeb 8 baje, maine khud PCR ko call kiya tha, apne phone number 9813770930 se. Sir, hamaare ghar, Vijay Vihar mein, H. No. 88, Gali No. 7 mein, khoon ho gaya hai! Meri aankhon ke saamne ye sab hua, sir. Meri toh poori duniya ujad gayi. Vijay Vihar police station se SI G. R. Tanwar sahab bhi aaye the, unhone sab dekha tha. Main bas yahi kehne aaya hoon ki mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unko saza milni chahiye, jinhone mere saath aisa kiya hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi! Subah 4 May 2011 ko, 6:35 baje ka time tha. Kisi ne mujhe bataya ki Sewing Centre ke paas, C-9 Sultanpuri mein, kuch bahut bura hua hai. Main bhaagta hua wahan pahuncha, toh dekha... mera bhai... uska khoon kar diya tha. Uski body charpai par padi thi, aur sir ke neeche zameen par itna khoon tha ki poori jagah laal thi. Uska chehra bhi khoon se sana hua tha, pehchanna mushkil tha. Aur wahan paas mein hi ek bada sa patthar bhi mila, uspar baal bhi chipke the. Ye sab dekh kar toh meri rooh kaanp gayi, sir. Please, aap kuch karo, mere bhai ko insaaf dilao!

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon. Woh jo Parliament pe ghinona humla hua tha na, saalon pehle? Us incident ko sochkar hi aaj bhi meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Woh Afzal, Shaukat aur Gilani... jinke naam sunte hi gussa aata hai. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki unke cases ki appeals chal rahi hain. Yeh sunke na, sir, bahut darr lagta hai. Hum aam log hain, humare liye toh bas yeh desh, yeh suraksha hi sab kuch hai. Aise logon ko itni der tak kyon legal relief milta rehta hai? Humein toh bas insaaf chahiye. Aise logon ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye, taaki future mein koi aisi galti karne ki soche bhi na. Meri yahi request hai, sir. Hum bahut pareshaan hain.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai in sarkari babuon aur police walon ki wajah se. T.T. Antony, woh Deputy Collector aur unke 14 police constables, inhone mujhe itna pareshan kiya tha, Sir. Maine himmat karke court mein case lada, saalon tak ladta raha. Finally, Kerala High Court ne February 29, 2000 ko mere haq mein judgment diya tha. Mujhe laga tha ki ab insaaf mil gaya, chain se jee paunga. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh sab phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Meri jeet ko palatne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, itni mushkil se mila insaaf, kya woh phir chhin jayega? Main bahut dar gaya hoon, Sir. Meri madad kijiye, please.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon, yeh mere saath bahut badi na-insafi ho gayi hai. Woh apradhi, jiske khilaaf maine itne mushkil se FIR karwayi thi aur case lada tha, usko toh High Court ne bail de di hai! Jaipur High Court ka order hai 7 May 2020 ka. Unhone S.B. Criminal Miscellaneous Bail Application No. 3601/2020 mein usko chhod diya hai. Main toh yeh sunke hil gayi hoon. Ab woh bahar aa gaya hai, Sir! Mujhe toh darr lag raha hai ki ab woh phir se mujhe aur mere parivaar ko tang karega. Main is order ke khilaaf appeal karna chahti hoon. Aap meri madad kijiye, please. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Saab, aise toh main kaise jiyungi?

Sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri baat suno. Patna High Court ne jo do faisle diye the na, ek 22 July 2021 ko aur doosra 13 September 2021 ko, unse main bilkul khush nahi hoon. Main toh wohi aadmi hoon jisne pehle bhi complaint ki thi, aur ab jab wahan se insaaf nahi mila toh main upar appeal lekar gaya hoon. Meri samajh mein nahi aata ki itna sab kuch hone ke baad bhi mujhe justice kyon nahi mil raha. Woh jo mere Criminal Miscellaneous cases the, jinke number 11683 of 2021 aur 26463 of 2021 the, unmein mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Ab toh meri bas yahi appeal hai ki meri suni jaye, aur mujhe umeed hai ki ab toh mujhe insaaf zaroor milega. Bahut mushkil hai sahab, ye kanooni daav-pech hum jaise aam aadmi ke liye.

Sahab, suniye toh meri baat. Mera toh sab kuch lut gaya hai. Woh jo Bundi mein mere bhai ka khoon hua tha na, uska case... kitne saal ho gaye, abhi tak chal hi raha hai. Sessions Court ne usko 302 IPC mein fasi ki saza sunayi thi 1989 mein. Pura ek saal baad, High Court ne bhi us saza ko barkaraar rakha, 1990 mein. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par nahi Sahib, woh kameena abhi bhi appeal pe appeal kar raha hai. Main toh bas thak gaya hoon, darr gaya hoon. Kya woh phir se bach jayega? Hum garib log kahan tak aur kitna ladenge? Meri toh jaan sukh gayi hai yeh sun-sun ke. Bas, aap kuch karo, woh mujrim ab apni saza kaate.

Sirji, Ram Ram! Main bahut dukhi hoon, meri baat suniye. Meri ek appeal chal rahi thi, High Court mein, jo 23 July 2019 ko suni jaani thi. Usmein meri taraf se, nahi, actually State ne mere case ke liye kuch 'applications' dali thi. Matlab, sarkar bhi meri madad karna chahti thi. Lekin Sirji, High Court ne woh 'applications' sunne se hi mana kar diya! Bolte hain 'entertain' nahi karenge. Kya matlab hai iska? Meri sunwai hi nahi hui sahi se. Main toh bahut umeed lagaye baitha tha ki ab High Court se kuch relief milega, par unhone toh meri baat suni hi nahi. Kya hoga mera? Mera pura future is case pe depend karta hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, please kuch kijiye.

Sahab, meri baat suno please. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere pati, Yumman Somendro, jinko log Somo ya Tiken bhi bulate hain, unhe galat tareeke se pakad liya gaya hai. Yeh Imphal West District ke District Magistrate sahab ne 31 January 2011 ko ek order (Cril/NSA/No.10 of 2011) nikala tha, aur usmein mere pati ko National Security Act ke तहत detain kar liya. Pata nahi kyon, unhone aisa kya kiya. Governor sahab ne bhi 7 February ko us order ko approve kar diya. Mera pati beqasoor hai, Sahab. Hamari zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Please, meri madad karo, unhe chudwao. Main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh suni hi nahi jaa rahi. Court mein bolte hain ki unko jo *defendant* hai na, uski guilt par doubts hain. Matlab, unko pakka nahi pata ki woh guilty hai ya nahi. Par sir, yeh doubts meri character, mere record, ya mere saath jo hua uski *circumstances of the offense* par bilkul nahi hain. Yeh sirf uss aadmi ke baare mein hain. Aur sabse badi baat, woh kehte hain ki unke paas koi *constitutional right* nahi hai ki in doubts ko *mitigating factor* ki tarah consider karein. Yaani, agar unko shaq bhi hai na, tab bhi usko koi faayda nahi milega. Yeh toh seedha-seedha mere saath anayay hai, sir. Mera case itna strong hai, phir bhi aisi baatein? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai mere saath? Meri family ke saath kitna bada dhokha hua hai. Kuntala Mishra ne mere apne ko maara tha. Sambalpur ke judge sahab ne toh usko Section 302 IPC mein umar qaid ki saza bhi di thi, 1984 mein. Humein laga tha chalo, insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab, 1996 mein Orissa High Court ne usko bari kar diya! Woh kaise chhoot sakti hai, Sir? Itne saal humne intezaar kiya, ladai ladi, aur ab yeh? Pehle toh bolte hain woh mujrim hai, saza do, aur ab kehte hain begunah hai? Hum garib log kahan jayenge, kahan se insaaf payenge? Mujhe toh ab darr lag raha hai. Meri suniye na, Sir, please.

Sahab, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab thi. Woh ghatna, woh 9 December 1991 ki baat hai, jab us shaitan ne mere saath kitna bura kiya tha. Us din ke baad se meri toh neendein ud gayi thi, sahab. Kitne saal main court ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke thak gaya tha. Par shukr hai Bhagwan ka, 9 April 1997 ko Kuthuparamba ke Magistrate sahab ne usko doshi mana, haan, usko guilty thehraya aur jail bhej diya. Meri zindagi ke itne saal waste ho gaye is sab mein, par chalo, thoda toh insaaf mila mujhe.

Sir, main K. Prabhakaran hoon. Main aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Jo 2001 mein election hua tha, Kuthuparamba Assembly Constituency se, usmein main bhi candidate tha. Lekin mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Jo results aaye, woh theek nahi the, mujhe lagta hai poori dhaandli hui hai. Main tab se insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon, sir. Court gaya, appeal bhi ki, aur ab toh saalon ho gaye hain. Ye Nafe Singh aur unke logon ne saara game kharab kar diya. Meri jeet ko cheen liya gaya, meri mehnat barbaad ho gayi. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki mujhe nyay mile. Aap meri help kijiye, bahut pareshaan hoon main.

Sir, main apni takleef kisko bataun? Mera jo case hai, woh court mein pata nahi kitne aur cases ke saath jod diya gaya hai. Judge saab bol rahe hain ki sab 'inter-related' hain aur 'common arguments' chal rahe hain. Mujhe lagta hai meri particular problem toh koi sun hi nahi raha. Woh bas ek 'common order' pass kar denge sabke liye. Meri toh zindagi ka mamla hai, sir! Yeh log itne saare 'judgments aur laws' ki baatein karte hain, char crore se bhi zyada judgments, mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Bas ghoom phir ke ek hi order de denge. Meri toh sun lo sir, main bohot pareshaan hoon.

Sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai in kachehri ke chakkar mein. Basti mein mera ek case chal raha hai, Sessions Trial No. 207/07. Usmein Additional Sessions Judge sahib ne 1 September 2007 ko ek order paas kiya tha, jo bilkul galat tha aur mere khilaaf tha. Maine us order ko quash karwane ke liye, Section 482 Cr.P.C. ke तहत Allahabad High Court mein application di thi, Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. 26878 of 2007. Par, Sir, High Court ne bhi meri suni nahi. Unhone 11th December, 2007 ko meri woh application bhi dismiss kar di. Main toh be-kasoor hoon, phir bhi mujhe har jagah dhakke mil rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sahab, please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai iss case ki wajah se. Pata nahi kitne saal ho gaye, 2008 ki baat hai jab High Court ne ek faisla sunaya tha, aur ab tak yeh chalta hi jaa raha hai. Ussi ek galti ki wajah se, ussi ek ghatna ki wajah se, kitne log iss mein phanse hue hain. Meri suno sir, ek hi incident tha, lekin iske upar itne saare appeals, itne saare cases chal rahe hain. Har jagah alag-alag baat ho rahi hai. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon. Aur kitna intezaar karun? Bas karke do sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Rahul Sharma ne mere aadmi ka khoon kiya tha. Pata nahi kitni mushkil se uske khilaaf Section 302 ka case bana, fir jaake kahin 19.9.2016 ko usko summon karne ka order hua tha. Mujhe laga ab insaaf milega. Lekin sir, fir 1.2.2020 ko Aligarh court se ek aur order aaya, Criminal Revision mein. Aur ab to sun raha hoon, woh upar High Court mein application laga raha hai, ye sab order hatwane ke liye. Sir, kya humein insaaf nahi milega? Kya woh itni aasani se bach jayega? Usne mera ghar ujad diya hai. Meri aapse guzaarish hai, please isko dekhiye, usko bachne mat dijiye. Hamein bas insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas bohot pareshaani mein aaya hoon. Yeh Nathu Singh, Vir Pal Singh, Arvind aur Narendra Singh, in chaaron ne milkar hamari zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pichle dino inhone poore gaon mein itna danga machaya tha, sir. Hamare ghar pe pathrav kiya, logon ko maara-peeta, bilkul gunda-gardi thi. Meri family ko itna darr lagta hai ki hum ghar se bahar nikalne se bhi ghabrate hain. Unhone jo kiya uski wajah se humein aaj tak takleef ho rahi hai. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, in logon ke khilaaf kadi se kadi karwayi ki jaaye. Hum gareeb log hain, sir, humein bas insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Ramvati Devi. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye. Bade mushkil se, 2006 mein, Damoh court ne Special Case No. 98/2002 mein, Rituraj Singh ko mere pati ke qatl (Section 302 IPC) ka doshi thehraya tha. 14 November 2006 ko usko saza mili thi, tab jaake thodi shanti mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh zaalim Rituraj Singh, us saza ke khilaaf Section 374(2) CrPC ke तहत appeal file kar chuka hai. Sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Itne saalon baad phir se wahi takleef? Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh humara kya hoga? Meri family ko dobara khatra hai. Please sir, kuch kijiye, hum gareeb log hain, kahan jayenge?

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh rooh kaanp jaati hai sochkar. Wo Abu Salem aur uske jaise logon ne December 1992 se April 1993 tak na, ek bahut gandi saazish rachi thi. Unka maksaad tha poore India mein tabahi machana, bomb dhamake karna, masoom logon ko maarna aur ghar-baar barbaad karna. Humari zindagi unhone nark bana di thi. Aur is sabke liye na, wo log bahar se AK-56 jaise bade-bade hathyar, pistol, grenade aur RDX jaisa khatarnak samaan chori-chhipe desh mein laaye the. Sir, aise logon ko toh kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Humein insaaf chahiye!

Sahab, main kya bataun? Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Us din, 5 December 1994 ko, raat ke das baje ke baad, Muzaffarpur Sadar police station mein, Deputy SP Mohan Rajak sahab ne ek report likhi thi. Woh report mere bete ke baare mein thi, jise bewajah maara gaya tha. Mera beta... uski koi galti nahi thi. Aaj tak mujhe insaaf nahi mila hai. Court mein case chal raha hai, appeals, sab kuch. Lekin hum garib log, kab tak bhatkenge? Sir, meri bas yahi appeal hai ki mujhe mera insaaf dilwa do. Woh log bade log hain, power waale hain, isiliye case ko itna lamba kheench rahe hain. Humne toh apne aankhon se dekha tha sab kuch. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main Akbar. Mujhe 19 March 2003 ko GTB Hospital mein admit kiya gaya tha. Meri haalat bahut kharab thi, sir. Saans lene mein itni takleef ho rahi thi, jaise mera dum ghut raha ho. Doctors ne kaha ki mujhe koi pulmonary-cum-respiratory disorder hai, bahut acute problem hai. Unhone yeh bhi record kiya ki main pehle smoker aur alcoholic raha hoon. Par sir, yeh jo takleef hai, yeh bahut zyada badh gayi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon. Bas yahi batana tha ki main hospital mein hoon aur meri condition bilkul theek nahi hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, Satna mein Sessions Trial number 257 chal raha tha mera case, bas tarikh pe tarikh. Mujhe laga High Court se insaaf milega, Jabalpur mein Criminal Appeal number 2246 tha. Par nahi sir, 16 January 2012 ko High Court ne bhi wahi purana judgment confirm kar diya. Matlab, jo faisla pehle aaya tha, wahi final ho gaya. Meri toh koi sunwai hi nahi hui. Itne saare judgments aur laws ki baat karte hain, par hum jaise gareebon ko toh bas dhakke hi milte hain. Kya main ab kabhi insaaf nahi paunga? Sir, please kuch toh help kijiye.

Sir, dekhiye, hum kitne saalon se pareshaan hain. Ye Sunita Tiwari aur uske gharwale, inki family se hamari dushmani bahut purani hai. Sir, baat 1994 ki hai, mere bhai, Ram Asre, ko inhone brutally maara tha, unko maar hi daala tha. Kya galti thi mere bhai ki? Sunita Tiwari ka jo husband hai na, Pintu@Pradyum Tiwari, usne aur uske baaki gharwalo ne milkar mere bhai ko maara tha. Ek FIR bhi lodge hui thi tab Ram Das Pathak ne ki thi, Case Crime No. 444 of 1994 tha. Usmein clearly likha tha ki Pintu Tiwari ne hi mere bhai ko assault kiya tha. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, hum gareeb logon ko insaaf kab milega? Meri family bahut suffering mein hai. Please kuch karo sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Jin Haryana Police walon par bharosa kiya tha, unhone toh ulta us gunehgar ki madad ki, jisne meri zindagi tabah kar di. Meri toh sunte hi nahi the woh log! Ab jab unko naukri se nikala gaya hai, toh woh keh rahe hain ki unka nikalna galat hai. Koi 'technical ground' bata rahe hain. Sir, ye kaise ho sakta hai? Kya technicalities dekhoge ya us gunehgar ko bachane ki saza? Mujhe insaaf chahiye un police walon se, jinhone mera bharosa toda aur galat aadmi ka saath diya. Unko dobara job nahi milni chahiye, unko toh punishment milni chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere bete Dheeraj Singh ka qatl hua tha 25 August 1999 ko. Agle hi din, 26 August 1999 ko, maine Ghanaur PS, District Patiala mein FIR darj karwai thi, jiska number 66 hai aur Section 302 IPC laga hai. Lekin sir, yeh local police theek se investigation nahi kar rahi. Mujhe lagta hai woh theek se jaanch nahi kar rahe hain. Main chahta hoon ki yeh case yahan ki police se lekar CBI ya Punjab Police ki Crime Branch ko de diya jaaye. Maine iske liye court mein bhi appeal ki hai. Mujhe apne bete ke liye insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main Santan Rai, jisko Pappu Rai bhi kehte hain, aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri aur Mithlesh Rai ki ek petition thi court mein, jo humne samvidhan ke Article 226/227 ke तहत dali thi. Usmein humne kuch relief maange the, kuch madad maangi thi, lekin pichhle saal 17 May 2012 ko, Single Bench ke judge saahab ne hamari woh arzi kharij kar di. Sir, humein bahut dukh hua hai, bahut pareshan hain hum is faisle se. Meri to samajh mein nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Hamari itni mehnat, itna paisa sab barbaad ho gaya. Aap hi batao, ab hum kahan jayenge? Hamein nyay chahiye, sir. Yeh toh galat hua hai hamare saath.

Sir, meri suniye na! Mujhe Mohar Singh kehte hain, Jag Mohan bhi. Yeh Connaught Place PS ki FIR No. 521/05, jo 13.9.2005 ki hai, usne meri poori zindagi ulta-pulta kar di hai. Meri samajh nahi aa raha mujhe kyun aise fasaya ja raha hai. Mujhe MCOCA ke tehat detain kar liya hai, Sir! Maharashtra Control of Organized Crime Act, mere pe laga diya hai! Main toh ek aam aadmi hoon. Yeh kya organised crime? Meri custody galat hai, Sir. Maine toh court mein petition bhi daali hai, writ of habeas corpus ke liye, ki mujhe galat tareeke se pakda gaya hai. Aur yeh jo saari proceedings mere khilaaf chal rahi hain, unhe bhi quash karwana hai. Meri madad karo, Sir, please. Main bahot pareshan hoon.

Sir, main bahut dukhi aur pareshan hoon. Pata nahi ye mera case kitne saal aur chalega. Mere saath jo kuch bhi hua, ya mere apne ko jo mara gaya, uske liye pehle thodi ummeed lagi thi, par phir July 22, 1975 ko Punjab aur Haryana High Court ne ek aisa faisla de diya jisse lag raha tha ki saara insaaf khatam ho gaya. Jin logon ne ye jurm kiya tha, unhe High Court ne chhod diya tha, Sir! Mera toh dil toot gaya tha. Ab pata chala hai ki Punjab Sarkar ne High Court ke us judgement ke khilaaf appeal ki hai. Mere vakil, R.K. Kohli aur R.C. Kohli sahab bhi ismein poori koshish kar rahe hain. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki mujhe aur mere parivaar ko ab final insaaf mile. Aur kitna intezar karna padega, Sir?

Sir, main Parveen @ Sunil ki maa bol rahi hoon. Mera beta bechaara, usko bewajah 'most wanted criminal' bana rakha hai. Yeh Bawal Police Station ke Ram Sarup sahab aur unke saathi, pata nahi kyun mere bete ke peeche pade hain. Kehte hain Narnaul Bus Stand pe unhe koi secret information mili hai raat ke 12 baje ki mera beta koi bada gunda hai. Hum Jamalpur, Narnaul ke seedhe-saade log hain. Pehle bhi uske khilaaf ek FIR 52 mein naam daal rakha hai. Mera beta koi criminal nahi hai sir. Woh toh apna kaam karta hai. Har din humein tension rehti hai ki police use utha legi. Aap please kuch karo sir, humein bahut pareshaan kar rahe hain.

Sir, main Shyam Narain hoon. Woh log, woh sab milkar pehle toh mujhe aur mere bete Narain Dutt ko bhar-bhar ke gaali dene lage. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Phir, yeh Swami Nath, isne toh mujh par kudal se hamla kar diya! Kismat achhi thi ki main peeche hatt gaya, warna seedha mere sar mein lagta. Jab hum dono (main aur mera beta) jaan bachakar gaon ki taraf bhaagne lage, toh un sab ne mere bete Narain Dutt ko gher liya. Badri Narain ne toh seedha uske upar bhaale se vaar kiya, aur baaki teen lathiyon se usko maarte rahe. Sir, unhone mere masoom bete ko khoob peeta, aur mujhe bhi lathiyon se maara. Meri madad kijiye Sir, inko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, dekhiye na, humara kya haal kar diya hai un logon ne. Pehle bhi, 22 April 1997 ko, court ne unko pakda tha aur saza di thi. Section 302 aur 324 IPC ke तहत, meri family ke ek member ka qatl kiya tha unhone. Poora jhund bankar aaye the, Section 149 bhi laga tha unpar. Judge sahib ne unko umar-qaid di thi, aur ek-ek hazaar rupaye ka jurmana bhi lagaya tha. Sochिए Sir, murder ka case tha, itni badi saza mili thi! Ab yeh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Mujhe darr hai, kahin meri mehnat aur insaaf barbaad na ho jaaye. Sir, humein wahi insaaf chahiye jo pehle mila tha. Woh log bahut khatarnak hain, unhe chhodna nahi chahiye.

Sirji, main Mandeep ke khilaaf aapko batane aaya hoon. Usne meri family ki zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Karnal mein usne mere apne ko Section 364 IPC ke तहत kidnap kiya tha, jaan se marne ke irade se. 2009 ka case tha wo, kitne saal ho gaye ladte ladte. Humne bahut mushkil se insaaf ki umeed rakhi thi. Sessions Judge ne usko convict toh kiya, saza bhi sunai. Par abhi bhi chain nahi hai, sir. Pata chala hai 2010 se uski appeal chal rahi hai ya koi revision ka case hai. Humein dar lagta hai, pata nahi kya hoga. Humne itna suffer kiya hai, ab toh usko poori saza milni chahiye na? Humein poora insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, yeh Dharampal Singh aur Jai Vir Singh ki baat hai. Aapko pata hai na, un logon ne mere ghar mein ghuske, mere apne ko maar daala tha! Khetri ke judge sahab ne 27 August 1994 ko apna judgment sunaya tha. Unko life imprisonment mili thi, poori zindagi jail mein rehte. Saath mein 2000 rupaye ka fine bhi laga tha, agar nahi dete toh ek saal aur jail. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi thi us din, Sir. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki unko unke kiye ki saza poori mile, unko kabhi bail na mile. Woh jo din tha, main kabhi nahi bhool sakta. Mera kya kasoor tha, Sir?

Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Meri toh duniya ujad gayi un logon ki wajah se. High Court ne toh unhe maut ki saza sunayi thi, aur wahi sahi tha! Unhone jo kiya tha, uski saza toh maut hi banti hai. Ab yeh upar ki adalat (court) keh rahi hai ki unko life sentence do? Sir, yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Mera toh dil baitha jaa raha hai yeh sunke. Woh log itne bade jurm ke baad bhi bach jayenge? Kya matlab laws ka, kya matlab CrPC ka? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, Sir! Meri takleef ka koi mol nahi? Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi, aur woh ab bhi saans lenge? Nahi, Sir, aisa nahi ho sakta. Unhe poori saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main Ramu Lal, Bhopal, Lal Ghati se bol raha hoon. Meri suniye please, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi ye Mohit aur uske bande kya chahte hain mujhse. Pichle mahine se meri choti si kirana dukaan ke saamne roz kachra phenkte hain. Jab main protest karta hoon, toh gaali dete hain aur dhamki dete hain. Kal toh unhone meri dukaan ka shutter bhi tod diya aur mujhe maarne ki koshish ki. Mere sir pe chot lagi hai. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, sir. Meri biwi aur bacche bhi khauf mein hain. Maine suna tha ki pehle bhi inke khilaaf ek case hua tha, MP High Court mein 1974 mein, lekin kuch nahi hua. Woh log abhi bhi mujhe tang kar rahe hain. Meri jaan ko khatra hai. Meri property par bhi illegally kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Please, meri madad kijiye, sir. Unke khilaaf sakht action lijiye.

Sahab, main Vinod Tomar. Aaj dopahar 2 baje ke aas-paas ki baat hai. Main Hazira chowki ke paas se hi nikal raha tha, tabhi woh Rahul aur uske do-teen aadmi aaye. Unhone mujhe bina wajah galiyaan deni shuru kar di aur meri dukaan par kabza karne ki dhamki de rahe the. Us Rahul ne toh apni kamar se ek desi katta nikal kar meri taraf taan diya, bol raha tha jaan se maar dega. Main toh bohot darr gaya, sahab! Meri family ko bhi threat de rahe the. Bohot hi gundagardi kar rahe the, pura mahol kharab kar diya. Please, sahab, meri madad karo. Mujhe unse bohot khatra hai. Woh log kabhi bhi kuch bhi kar sakte hain. Meri jaan ko khatra hai.

Sir, main kya bataun? Hamare gaon mein na, yeh rajneeti ki dushmani ne meri poori zindagi ujaad di hai. Pehle bhi do logon ko maara gaya tha, aur ab toh un logon ne mere apnon ko bhi nahi chhoda. Double murder kar diya saab! Meri family tabah ho gayi. Total 15 log the jinpar case chala tha, IPC ki 302, 307, 149, 148 aur 341 dharaon mein. Socho, kitne bade jurm the! Lekin trial court ne kya kiya? Sirf 11 ko doshi maana aur 2 ko toh seedha chhod diya. Aur do toh case ke dauran hi mar gaye. Yeh kya insaaf hai, saab? Mujhe mere parivaar ke liye insaaf chahiye, unke khoon ka badla chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon... meri kya galti thi, jo meri zindagi mein itna dukh hai? Woh jo mamla tha na 19 October 2011 ka, jisme usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Durg mein Sessions Judge ne usko maut ki saza sunai thi 2013 mein, aur High Court ne bhi 2014 mein pakka kar diya tha. Mujhe laga tha ki ab jaake insaaf mila hai, thodi shanti mili thi. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se us saza ko challenge kar raha hai. Ab kya hoga? Phir se wohi sab shuru ho jayega? Meri toh saansein atak gayi hain yeh sunke. Hum gareeb log hain, Sir. Itna sab jhelte jhelte thak gaye hain. Bas insaaf chahiye mujhe, Sir. Woh kaise bach sakta hai?

Sir, dekho na, mera case dobara review ho raha hai, badi mushkil se. Woh Barendra Kumar Ghosh, jisne meri zindagi barbaad ki, uski sunwai abhi 16 aur 17 August ko hui thi. Justice Page saheb aur Special Jury ne usko suna. Us par Section 302 (khoon) aur Section 394 (chori aur maar-peet) ke charges lage the, sir. Socho, usne khoon ke liye toh 'not guilty' bola, inkaar kar diya, par chori aur maar-peet ke liye 'guilty' maan liya. Ab ye dobara review ho raha hai, Advocate-General ki taraf se. Jury ne bhi apna faisla de diya... Main bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Meri suno na, mujhe justice chahiye.

Sir, main aapko yeh batane aaya hoon. Woh Umesh Singh hai na, jisne Bhind mein murder kiya tha... mere (family member ka naam, ya bas 'ek insaan ka'). Usko pehle court ne saza suna di thi. Haan, 22-12-2009 ko, jo 6th Additional Sessions Judge Bhind ne di thi. Section 302 IPC mein life imprisonment aur 5,000 rupaye fine. Aur Section 148 IPC mein bhi ek saal ki jail aur 1,000 rupaye fine. Humne socha tha chalo, ab toh insaaf mila. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh apni is saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Yeh Criminal Appeal No.99/2010 hai. Hum toh bohot darr gaye hain. Kahi usko chhod na dein! Itni mushkil se toh woh pakda gaya aur saza mili thi. Meri aap se bas itni guzarish hai ki humein insaaf milta rahe, usko chhoot na mile. Kripya is par dhyan dijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Police ne bina kisi wajah ke, be-matlab mere upar rowdy sheet khol di hai. Mera H.S. No. 837 hai. Pata nahi kyun, ye log mujhe galat tareeke se fasa rahe hain. Main koi badmaash nahi hoon, na hi maine kuch galat kiya hai. Ye toh seedha seedha rules ke khilaaf hai, jo Police Manual ke Order 601 mein saaf saaf likha hai. Maine toh court mein bhi iske khilaaf appeal daali hai, ki ye sab illegal hai. Meri suno sir, please, meri ye rowdy sheet band karwa do. Mujhe har jagah pareshaani ho rahi hai iski wajah se. Main aam aadmi hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Rajesh/Rani bol rahi hoon. Meri baat suniye please, meri jaan khatre mein hai! Woh log, Santoshanand Avadhoot, Sudevanand Avadhoot aur Ram Janam Dwivedi, in teeno ne milkar mere khilaaf ek badi saazish rachi hai. Pata hai Sir, woh Santoshanand aur Sudevanand, in dono ne toh mujhe jaan se maarne ki poori koshish ki hai! Jaise-taise main unke changul se bach ke yahan tak pahunchi hoon. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. In logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Aap meri madad kijiye, in sabko jaldi se pakadiye. Yeh bahut khatarnak log hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sahab, woh jo mera case tha na, Section 307 aur Section 392 IPC wala, Gangtok ke Sessions Judge Sahab ne usko pakka mujrim maan liya hai. Usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi aur sab kuch loot liya tha. 17 gawahon ne bhi sach bataya. Par ab woh appeal kar raha hai, Sir. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai. Kahi woh phir se bahar na aa jaaye aur mujhe ya mere parivar ko nuksan na pahuncha de. Meri zindagi toh pehle hi mushkil ho gayi hai, ab ye appeal sun kar aur tension ho rahi hai. Aap hi kuch kijiye, Sir. Meri madad karo.

Sahab, main bohot pareshan hoon, meri life barbaad kar di un logon ne. Pata nahi main kahan jaaun ab. Last week ki baat hai, woh sab milkar aaye the, puri gang thi unki. Mujh par jaanleva attack kiya hai, Sahab! Maara peeta hai, mere head pe bohot deep injury lagi hai, pura blood hi blood tha. Unhone toh literally mujhe maarne ki poori koshish ki. Saath mein threaten bhi kiya hai ki agar police mein complain ki toh mujhse badla lenge, mere family ko harm pahunchayenge. Main bohot scared hoon, meri jaan ko danger hai. Woh log bohot dangerous hain. Please meri help kijiye, un goons ko catch kijiye aur mujhe justice dilwaiye.

Sir, meri baat suno na. Court mein sab proof ho gaya hai ki us zalim ne hi mujh par acid phenka tha. Mere poore shareer par itne bure zakhm hain, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Lekin, sir, judge sahab keh rahe hain ki ye 307 IPC ka case nahi banta. Pata hai kyun? Kyunki mera doctor gawah dene nahi aa paya! Usne jo meri MLC banayi thi, use theek se consider hi nahi kiya gaya. Aur sabse badi baat, wo bol rahe hain ki uska irada mujhe maarne ka nahi tha, bas chot pahunchane ka tha. Acid phenkne ka matlab sirf chot pahunchana hota hai kya, sir? Main toh marr hi jaati us din! Mujhe insaaf chahiye, ye kya nainsaafi hai? Kya meri takleef ka koi mol nahi?

Sir, main Rekhchand Verma hoon. Mujhe un badmashon ne lathiyon aur ghusson se itna buri tarah maara tha ki meri jaan nikalne wali thi. Meri haalat itni naazuk thi, hospital mein main bilkul marne ki kagaar par tha, Sir. Us waqt maine doctors ko sab bata diya tha, sabke naam liye the ki kisne mujhe maara. Maine ek likhit bayan bhi diya tha, Sir, sab unke naam the jinhone mujhe aise maara. Sir, main 9 mahine tak toh kisi tarah zinda raha, par un zakhmon ki wajah se main phir nahi bach paya. Meri jaan chali gayi, Sir. Please, mujhe insaaf chahiye, un sabko saza milni chahiye jinhone mujhe aise maara aur meri jaan le li.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Aaj court mein bulaya tha mujhe. Woh doctor Sanjeev Kumar, jo Emergency wale the, aur woh pharmacist Ram Pratap Singh bhi aaye the Barabanki District Hospital se. Bolte hain saare records leke aaye hain. Par Sir, jab judge sahab ne us Ram Pratap Singh se poocha ki bhai tu hospital se kyun aaya hai, toh pata hai usne kya bola? Kehta hai wahan koi staff hi nahi tha! Aur ab woh CMO office mein record sambhal raha hai, isliye woh court aa gaya. Socho Sir, hospital mein staff nahi hai, log mar rahe honge, aur yahan record ke liye pharmacist ko bula rahe hain. Meri file ka kya hoga? Koi sunwai nahi ho rahi meri. Yeh log bas dikhawe ke liye records leke aa jaate hain, par asli kaam toh koi kar hi nahi raha. Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath insaaf hoga hi nahi, jab inke apne department mein hi itna jhol hai. Sir, aap hi kuch kijiye, mujhe toh darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera case court mein chal raha hai, aur pata nahi kab insaaf milega. Aaj court mein sunwai thi. Meri taraf se mere vakil Sahab, Purnendu Chakravarty ji aur Himanshu Suryavanshi ji the. Unhone meri poori baat rakhi, saare zaroori documents dikhaye. Par woh jo doosri party hai na, opposite party no.2, unhone bhi apna naya advocate, Ashish Raman Mishra ji ko khada kar diya hai. Unhone bhi apna vakalatnama court mein de diya hai. Government ke vakil bhi the wahan. Sabki arguments suni gayi hain, aur judge Sahab ne saare papers bhi check kiye hain. Sir, mujhe bas yahi darr hai ki yeh log aise hi aur kitna time kharab karenge. Meri bas yahi request hai ki mujhe jaldi insaaf mile.

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Meri ek complaint hai. Kal raat ki baat hai, Sangram Singh, Kutaria aur Kaptan, inn teenon ne milkar mujhe aur mere bhai ko bahut maara hai. Dekhiye, meri peeth par kitni chot lagi hai, khoon bhi nikal raha tha. Bina kisi baat ke hum par attack kar diya. Woh log bohot badmash hain, sir. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko unse bahut khatra hai. Meri aapse request hai, please unke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lijiye. Humare saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Mujhe aur mere bhai ko turant medical help bhi chahiye, bahut dard ho raha hai.

Sir, main Kalyan Singh. Meri baat suniye, humein maarne ki koshish ki hai in logon ne! Woh Barelal hai na, usne toh seedha mere sir pe kulhadi se waar kiya! Aur woh Karua, usne farsa maara mujhe. Sir, unhone toh meri jaan hi le leni thi! Ramnaresh ne ballam se Jyoti ko maara, bechari ghaayal hai. Aur woh Mahaveer aur Karua, un dono ne milke mere bete Sonpal ke sir pe farsa maara hai. Uska sir phat gaya hai, sir! Hum sab toh ek doosre ko jaante the, yeh kaisi dushmani nikaal rahe hain! Sir, meri madad karo, in logon ko saza milni chahiye. Hum bahut darr gaye hain.

Sir, main Ramu ka baap hoon. Meri to duniya hi ujad gayi hai, Sir. Us zalim ne mere bete Ramu ko aise maara ki woh bach hi nahi paya. Pehle Raiganj hospital le gaye, phir 2 December ko Kadamtala BSF hospital, aur uske baad 3 December ko Siliguri ke Anandlok hospital mein admit karwaya. Pure das din, 13 December tak, woh wahi hospital mein zindagi aur maut se ladta raha, par chala gaya, Sir. Mera jigar ka tukda chala gaya. Usne seedhe-seedhe mere bete ka murder kiya hai, Section 302 ka case banta hai. Meri FIR us din hi, 2 December ko, Kushmandi thane mein darj hui thi, GDE No. 85. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Us gunehgar ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye!

Sir, meri ek urgent baat suniye. Bahut saal ho gaye, 1996 mein Deoghar mein, un logon ne mere apne ko maar diya tha, 302 ka case tha. Aur mujhe bhi marne ki koshish ki thi, 307 laga tha unpar. Kitni mushkil se toh Sessions Court ne unhe life imprisonment ki saza sunai thi, Sir! Mujhe laga tha ab finally insaaf mila hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain. Phir se case khul raha hai. Sir, main bahut darr gaya hoon. Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh meri aur family ki jaan ko khatra hai. Itne saal baad bhi mujhe yeh sab sehna padega? Please kuch kijiye, Sir. Unhe bahar mat aane dijiye, humari madad kijiye!

Sir, main Margherita PS Case no. 300/2015 ki original complainant hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2015 mein jo mere saath hua tha. Kitni mushkil se woh case chala tha, Sessions Case no. 10[M] of 2016. Aur phir jaa ke 2019 mein, Additional Sessions Judge Sahab ne apna order diya tha. Mujhe laga tha, chalo, ab toh justice mil gayi. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar, jisko jail hui thi, woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Section 383 CrPC mein, seedha jail se! Sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Kya humein kabhi shanti nahi milegi? Kya baar-baar humein court ke chakkar kaatne padenge? Meri to poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur woh phir se azaad hone ki koshish kar raha hai. Kuch kijiye Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main Ramu, deceased (mere bachche) ka pita hoon. Yeh December 2, 2010 ki baat hai, us din mere bete ke saath ek hadsa hua tha. Use itna maara gaya tha ki pehle toh use Raiganj ke hospital le gaye. Wahan se use Kadamtala BSF hospital bheja, aur phir 3 tareekh ko Siliguri ke Anandlok hospital. Sir, mera beta wahan 13 December tak admit raha, kitni takleef mein tha woh! Lekin use bachaya nahi ja saka. Jisne yeh sab kiya, usne mere bete ki jaan le li. Sir, woh aadmi mere bachche ka kaatil hai! Usne Section 302 IPC ke तहत murder kiya hai. Maine uske khilaf complaint (FIR) darj karwai thi, Kushmandi Police Station mein GDE No. 85 dated 02.12.2010. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Mere bete ko maara gaya hai, usko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, mere saath jo hua hai na, wo sirf mere upar nahi, poore samaaj ke khilaaf ek crime hai. Mera dil ghabra raha hai, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Us gunehgaar ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye, chaahe jail ho ya bhaari fine lage. Maine suna hai ki hum victims ke paas toh itni power nahi hoti, aap police walon ke paas hi power hai ki aap investigation karo aur usko pakad kar court tak le jao. Aap hi toh neutral ho na, jo sach saamne laa sakte ho. Main ek aam insaan hoon, main khud kaise ladunga? Please meri suno aur meri madad karo, sir.

Sir, main Mohd. Qayyum ka rishtedar bol raha hoon. Aapko yaad hai na, Shamshad Ahmad aur Ibban Ali ne mere Mohd. Qayyum aur Mohd. Furkan ko maar diya tha? Kitna waqt laga, Sir, humein insaaf milne mein. Meri toh poori duniya hi ujad gayi thi un dino. Ab jaake finally court ne unko convict kiya hai. Shamshad aur Ibban dono ko murder ke liye life imprisonment mili hai. Aur Rs. 2000 ka fine bhi lagaya hai, agar nahi bhara toh 3 mahine aur jail. Thodi shanti mili hai, Sir, par mere bhai toh waapas nahi aayenge na. Bas yahi chahta tha ki yeh record pe rahe ki un gunahgaron ko saza mili hai.

Sir, main Shahrukh Khan. Meri baat suniye, sir, please. Jo FIR hui thi na, Case Crime No. 140 of 2020, woh un logon ke khilaaf thi jinhone meri zindagi tabah kar di. Woh sab log ek saath aaye the, ekdum bheed bankar. Unhone mujhe bahut maara, galiyan di, aur jaan se maarne ki koshish bhi ki! Main toh bas kisi tarah bach gaya, sir. Lekin unhone... unhone mere ek kareebi ko toh maar hi dala. Ab bhi woh log mujhe dhamkiyan dete hain, sir. Mera pura parivaar darr ke saaye mein jee raha hai. Yeh mamla ab Sessions Court mein hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Unko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, please.

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab ho gayi, Sir. Pichli 15-16 January ki raat ko, mere ghar se meri do bhains chori ho gayi hain. Subah utha toh dekha, rassi kati hui thi aur bhains gaayab. Mera toh saara guzara unhi se chalta tha, Sir. Kitni mehnat se paala tha unko. Mujhe poora shaq hai Sir, ye mewati gang waalon ka hi kaam hai. Inhone pehle bhi bahut logon ko pareshaan kiya hai hamare ilake mein. Maine pehle bhi report karwai thi is mamle mein, lekin abhi tak kuch nahi hua. Ab main kya karoon? Meri toh barbaadi ho gayi, Sir. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir. Un choron ko pakdiye aur meri bhains wapas dilwaiye.

Sir, main Prem Kumar ki patni hoon. Aaj subah, kareeb 11 baje, main aur mere pati yahan complaint karne aaye hain. Humara Radhakishan se, jo mere pati ka bhai hai, property ka bohot bada jhagda chal raha hai. Sir, in property disputes ki wajah se unhone humari zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Pehle se hi bohot saare civil aur criminal cases chal rahe hain, par woh aur unka parivaar humein chain se jeene nahi de rahe. Roz koi na koi nayi mushkil khadi karte hain. Kripya humari madad kijiye, sir. Hum bohot pareshan hain.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Woh 1984 ke dange... us din se jo dukh dekha hai, aaj tak nahi bhula. Kitne saalon baad, Patiala House Court se thodi umeed mili thi. Woh Naresh Sehrawat, jisko saza mili thi, usne phir se appeal file kar di hai. Uska judgment toh 14 November, 2018 ko aaya tha aur sentence bhi ho gayi thi 20 November, 2018 ko. Mujhe laga tha ab shaanti milegi, par ab ye phir se... Sir, humein toh bas insaaf chahiye. Woh phir se free ho jayega toh humara kya hoga? Meri family toh puri tabah ho gayi thi. Kripya karke kuch kariye Sir, humara sahaara baniye.

Sir, meri baat suno please. Meri beti ke saath bohot bura hua hai. Woh abhi sirf 12 saal ki hai, 5th class mein padhti hai. 7 February 2021 ko, us darinde ne meri masoom beti ke saath galat kaam kiya. Usko maara bhi aur dhamki di ki agar usne kisi ko bataya toh uski jaan le lega. Meri beti tab se sehme hui hai, khana nahi khati, baat nahi karti. Humara toh sab kuch lut gaya Sir. Please usko saza dilao. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye meri beti ke liye. Woh abhi bhi darr se kaanpti rehti hai. Humara jeena haram ho gaya hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Court ne mujhe convicted kar diya hai, woh bhi Section 307 aur 353 IPC ke under. Mujhe toh vishwas hi nahi ho raha, main toh beqasoor hoon, sir, mujhe galat phansaya gaya hai. Iss faisle se main bilkul bhi satisfied nahi hoon. Mujhe do saal ki kadi kaid suna di hai, aur 7,000 rupaye ka fine alag se. Bol rahe hain agar fine nahi de paya toh 6 mahine ki simple kaid aur jhelunga. Aur suniye, ek saal ki rigorous imprisonment aur hai mere liye, uske upar 2,000 rupaye fine. Woh nahi bhara toh 3 mahine ki simple kaid extra. Sir, yeh meri zindagi barbaad karne jaisa hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, ye kya ho raha hai mere saath?

Sir, main apni purani complaint ke bare mein aapko batane aaya hoon. Meri FIR No. 18 of 2017 Kadapa II Town police station mein 7 December 2017 ko register hui thi. Un logon ne mujhe buri tarah maara (IPC 324), jaan se maarne ki dhamki di (IPC 506), aur sabne milkar ye crime kiya tha (IPC 34). Hamari police ne investigation bhi ki aur charge sheet bhi file kar di thi, jisme saaf-saaf likha hai ki crime hua tha. Ab Sir, woh accused log upar ki court mein chale gaye hain (CrPC sections 397(1) and 401). Woh chahte hain ki unko case se discharge kar diya jaaye, jabki unhone toh mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi (IPC 307)! Trial court ne bhi unko discharge nahi kiya tha. Mujhe darr lag raha hai, Sir. Kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega? Please dekhiye, woh log bachna chahte hain.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to jaan pe ban aayi thi us din. Woh log itne zaalim hain ki unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi. Us din ki FIR, jo Kadapa police ne 2017 mein ki thi, uska number 18 hai. Police ne investigation ki, chargesheet bhi file ki thi. Court ne bhi pehle unhe discharge nahi kiya, matlab unko lagta hai case serious hai, Section 307 ka mamla hai. Ab woh upar ki court mein chale gaye hain ki unhe 307 IPC se chhod diya jaaye. Sir, unhone meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi, kya woh aise hi bach jayenge? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir! Unhe kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, mera case tha Sessions Case No. 96 of 1995, Ahmedabad court mein. Usme, August 27, 1996 ko, uss aadmi ko jo accused tha, usko judge sahab ne Section 302, 307 aur 304 IPC ke तहत दोषी ठहराaya tha. Usko umar kaid hui thi, saath mein ₹2000 ka fine bhi laga tha. Humne socha tha chalo, insaaf mil gaya. Mere parivaar ke saath jo kiya tha usne, kitna bada jurm tha, murder attempt aur murder tak ke charges lage the. Abhi pata chala hai ki usne appeal file kar di hai. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, ab phir se yeh sab shuru ho raha hai? Mujhe darr lag raha hai, kya ab phir se mujhe case ke liye bhagna padega? Meri saari ummeed toot rahi hai, sahab. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri zindagi ka sabse bada mamla hai yeh, 1982 ka. Shahjahanpur ke II Additional District and Sessions Judge sahab ne tab un logon ko conviction di thi, Sessions Trial No. 9/1982 mein. Maine hi Tilhar police station mein report likhwai thi us waqt, jab mere saath galat hua tha. Kitni mushkil se insaaf mila tha, aapko kya bataun! Aur ab sun raha hoon ki woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Itne saal ho gaye, meri to umra ho gayi hai ab, phir se mujhe court-kachehri ke chakkar lagane padenge? Mujhe darr lag raha hai Daroga ji, kahin phir se woh bach na jaayen aur meri mehnat barbaad na ho jaaye. Meri madad kijiye, please kuch kijiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... Meri toh puri life kharab ho gayi hai. Maine toh pehle din hi FIR karayi thi, sab bataya tha kaise mujhe maara gaya. Police ne investigation bhi ki, charge sheet bhi file ho gayi. Par ab court mein, woh Satish, jisne meri aankhon ke saamne sab dekha tha aur bola tha ki woh sach bolega, woh toh palat gaya! Usko hostile declare kar diya hai! Sochye, sir, jiske bharose the, woh hi ab jhooth bol raha hai. Par sir, uska palatna yeh toh nahi badal sakta ki un do logon ne mujhe buri tarah maara tha, mujhe gehre zakhm diye the! Meri chot toh asli hai na! Abhi bol rahe hain ki koi hatiyaar nahi mila toh kaise maanein? Arre sir, haath-pair se bhi toh maara ja sakta hai. Kya sirf chaku ya danda ho tabhi chot lagti hai? Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Yaad hai, 2015 mein us Ramu ne meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi? Uski wajah se main kitne din maut ke muh se wapas aaya hoon. Meri family kitni pareshan hui. Court ne usko 22 June 2015 ko doshi maana tha aur phir 29 June ko 10 saal ki kadi saza aur 5,000 ka jurmana bhi lagaya tha. Humne socha tha chalo ab thoda sukoon milega, insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya na, toh meri jaan ko phir se khatra hai. Woh aadmi bahut khatarnak hai. Meri aapse haath jodkar guzaarish hai, please, usko dobaara riha mat hone dena. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai.

Sir, main kya bataun? Mere pati, ASI Naresh Sharma, unko itni buri tarah se chot lagi thi... itni gehri chot thi ki hum unhe bacha hi nahi paaye. Hospital mein treatment chal raha tha, par woh humein chhod ke chale gaye, Sir. Mera toh sab kuch lut gaya. Pehle toh sirf Section 307 (attempt to murder) ka case hua tha, par jab woh nahi rahe, toh phir Section 302 (murder) aur gaadi-waadi ke laws bhi lagaye gaye hain. Police ne puri investigation ki hai, gaadi bhi pakdi hai, sabke bayan bhi liye hain, forensic report bhi aayi hai. Ab toh charge sheet bhi file ho gayi hai. Bas, Sir, mujhe mere pati ke liye insaaf chahiye. Woh aise kaise chale gaye?

Sir, 2004 mein Gwalior mein mere saath jo hua tha, woh bahut bura tha. Us aadmi ne meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi, Section 307 IPC ke तहत उसपे case chala tha. Court ne usko guilty bhi mana tha aur saza bhi sunai thi, 18 October 2004 ko uska conviction hua tha. Magar ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Usne robbery bhi ki thi, par usko Section 394 aur 397 IPC se pehle hi chhod diya gaya tha. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, ab woh fir se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, please mujhe insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main Shyamal Sen, Halisahar, Subhasnagar se aaya hoon. Mujhe aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batani hai. Aapko yaad hoga, 2007 mein mere upar attack hua tha, jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi unhone. Section 307/34 IPC ke तहत FIR hui thi. Bahut mushkil se, 2008 mein Barrackpore Fast Track Court ne un sabko convict kiya tha. Mujhe thoda sukoon mila tha ki chalo insaaf mila. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log appeal file kar rahe hain! Woh log phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sahab, mujhe phir se dar lag raha hai. Itne saal baad, kya phir se case chalega? Meri family bhi bahut pareshaan hai. Aap please kuch kijiye. Unhe saza mili thi, ab woh bachne nahi chahiye. Hum garib log hain, itni baar court ke chakkar nahi kaat sakte. Meri sunwai ho, please.

Sir ji, main Paras Kumar hoon. Meri suno please. Woh Karambir, jisne meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi aur mujhe bandh kar rakha tha (Section 307 aur 342 IPC ka case tha), usko Kaithal ke Sessions Judge ne 01.04.2014 ko 'bari' kar diya hai. Matlab acquittal de diya! Ye toh bahut galat baat hai na sir? Mere papa, Sultan Singh, aur main toh soch bhi nahi sakte the ki aisa ho sakta hai. Hamare saath toh dhokha hua hai, insaaf nahi mila. Papa ne toh ab uss judgment ke khilaaf appeal file kar di hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, itna sab hone ke baad bhi woh kaise bach gaya? Humein ab bhi darr lagta hai, sir. Aap police wale ho, please dekho na is mamle ko, humein help chahiye.

Sir, woh Maan @ Madhesh ka case, jisme usko chaku laga tha, us din toh meri jaan hi nikal gayi thi. Lekin phir Rathnakumar saab, apne Inspector saab, unhone hi mera case personally dekha. Woh khud spot par gaye the, wahaan ki poori situation dekhi, ek rough sketch bhi banaya tha. Aur uske baad observation mahazar bhi prepare kiya. Sir, aapko pata hai, police ne us Murugan ko pakad liya! Usne apna gunaah kabool bhi kar liya hai, uska statement bhi record hua hai. Aur woh chaku jisse usne Maan ko mara tha, woh aur uske khoon se sane kapde – uski shirt aur banian – sab gawahon ke saamne police ne Murugan se recover kiye hain. Ab toh lagta hai humein insaaf mil hi jayega, sir.

Sir, suniye na meri baat, mujhe Kunal naam ke aadmi se bahut darr lagta hai. Pata nahi kab kiski gaadi utha le ya kisko loot le. Maine suna hai yeh bade bade luxury cars chori karta hai, aur robberies mein bhi involved hai. Sir, yeh toh police pe bhi goli chala chuka hai pehle! Hamesha apne saath chori ki gaadiyan aur hathiyar rakhta hai, bahut khatarnak aadmi hai. Hum jaise aam log toh isse bahut dare hue rehte hain. Mujhe abhi abhi kisi ne bataya hai ki aaj, 14 September 2013 ko, shaam 6:45 ya 7 baje ke kareeb, yeh G-block, Sriniwaspuri aane wala hai. Sir, please isko pakad lo. Hum sab isse bahut pareshan hain.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera poora parivaar barbaad ho gaya hai. Woh Girish Chand Sharma, Satish Sharma aur Vandana Sharma, in teeno ne meri zindagi narak bana di hai. 21 May 2019 ka din tha, main kabhi nahi bhool sakta. Siddarth Nagar mein, Shiv Mandir ke paas, C-13 pe, inhone mere upar jaanleva hamla kiya. Mujhe maara-peeta, itna buri tarah se ki main marte-marte bacha. Aur sir, sabse badi baat, inhone mujhe meri jaati ke naam par gaaliyaan di, zaleel kiya. Mera koi kasoor nahi tha. Police bhi aayi thi, HC Yogender Kumar aur Ct. Himmat ji aaye the us din. Main chahta hoon inko sakht se sakht saza mile. Yeh log bahar ghoom rahe hain, meri jaan ko khatra hai. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir, main I-1957, Jahangir Puri se bol raha hoon. Abhi-abhi yahan bahut bada jhagda hua hai, Sir. Woh log... kuch gunde, ek desi katta leke aaye the aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki de rahe the. Pura mahol itna kharab kar diya hai. Sadak pe dekho toh khoon pada hai, patthar, tooti hui lathi aur meri tooti chappal bhi wahin padi hai. Sab kuch बिखरा हुआ पड़ा hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Meri family ko bhi khatra hai unse. Please in logon pe action lo, jaldi kuch karo. Meri complaint likho, Sir, nahi toh woh log kuch bhi kar sakte hain.

Sahab, main Arjun, Moti ka beta hoon. Woh Kiran Bahadur hai na, usne meri jaan lene ki koshish ki! Woh din mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai, 12 May 2015 ki raat, kareeb 11 baje ka time tha. Hamari jhuggi ke bilkul saamne, C-194-195, Railway Colony, Shakur Basti mein hi usne mujh par hamla kiya. Usne mujhe itni buri tarah maara, sir, meri toh jaan nikal jaati. Agar main wahan se bhaagta nahi toh shayad aaj main zinda nahi hota. Usne mujhe maarna chaha tha. Please, us par sakht se sakht action lo, mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai. Woh gunda hai, Sahab!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut mushkil mein aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai, Sir. Ye baat hai 31 October 2014 ki shaam ki, kareeb 6:13 PM ka time tha. Humari Gali No. 9, Jain Nagar, Karala mein, jo Nag Mandir ke bilkul saamne hai Rohini mein, wahan ek bhayankar jhagda hua tha. Us jhagde mein, Sir, Manoj aur uske ek aur saathi ne milkar mere pati ka khoon kar diya. Meri aankhon ke saamne mere pati ko maar diya, Sir!
