Begum Pur thane mein FIR 1210/14 darj hai, sections 302/34 IPC lagaye hain. Sessions Case 52403/16 chal raha hai, par mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Main bas yahi chahti hoon ki unko unke gunah ki saza mile. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, meri suniye na, main kitna pareshan hoon. Ye saare log... Sir, baat hai 24-25 September 2012 ki raat ki, lagbhag 12:30 baje ka time tha. Main Shamshan Ghat road pe, Hari Nagar, Tihar Gaon mein, woh VIP Ghori Baggi Wala ke saamne khada tha. Tabhi, ek Santro car mein Salman Tyagi, Mansoor Tyagi, Mani Nasa (jo ab nahi raha), Saddam Gauri, Deepu @ Bunda aur woh Sahil @ Chhota Roshan, yeh sab log aaye. Unke haath mein bandookein thi, talwar thi, aur lohe ke mote-mote rod the. Mansoor Tyagi aur Sahil toh car mein hi baithe rahe, par Mani Nasa, Saddam Gauri aur Deepu, yeh sab car se utar kar seedhe meri taraf badhe, mujhe dhamkane lage. Meri jaan ko khatra tha, Sir! Woh mujhe maarne aaye the, mujhe bahut darr laga.

Sir, main Ramu hoon. Mujhe complaint karni hai. Kal raat ki baat hai, main apne ghar ja raha tha, tabhi Kallu ne mujhe raste mein rok liya. Bina kisi baat ke, usne mujh par hamla kar diya. Usne mujhe bahut maara, mere sar par chot lagi hai aur haath bhi zakhmi ho gaya hai. Mujhe bahut dard ho raha hai, abhi-abhi hospital se aaya hoon treatment karwa ke. SI Ravi Poonia Sir ne meri statement tabhi record ki thi. Sir, ye Kallu bahut badmash hai, usne pehle bhi logon ko pareshan kiya hai. Please, uske khilaaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Mohammad Arif, July 2020 ki baat hai, main apne dost ke ghar Hari Nagar, New Friends Colony, Delhi mein aaya hua tha. Us din, mujhe achanak ek phone call aaya. Phone pe bola gaya ki meri gaadi (BMW UP 16AD 5454) parking mein raasta block kar rahi hai, use hata do. Main turant parking area mein gaya aur apni gaadi wahan se hatayi. Ek aur gaadi bhi wahan se nikli. Jab woh gaadi chali gayi, toh maine socha chalo theek hai, main apni gaadi wapas park kar deta hoon. Jaise hi maine gaadi dobara park ki, mujhe fir se ek anjaan number se phone aaya. Yeh sab bahut ajeeb lag raha tha, sir. Pehle gaadi hatwane ke liye call, fir dobara park karne ke baad anjaan number se call... mujhe kuch theek nahi laga. Bahut ghabrahat ho rahi thi.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh Sandeep Mann aur uske saath Dheeraj, jinke khilaf maine pehle bhi FIR 554/2014 karwai thi, woh ab tak mujhe chain se jeene nahi de rahe. Unka ghar Moti Nagar mein hai, H. No. 18/18A, first floor par. Wahan se hi sab golmaal chal raha hai. Sir, Supreme Court tak case gaya hai, SC No. 56718-2016, State Vs. Sandeep Mann ke naam se chal raha hai, itna sab hone ke baad bhi ye log baaz nahi aa rahe. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath annyay ho raha hai. Roz dar ke saaye mein jeeti hoon. Meri toh raat ki neend udd gayi hai. Aap hi kuch karo, Sir. Meri madad karo, please. Inhe kaho mujhe akela chhod dein, ya kuch strict action lo.

Sir, main Sumit hoon. Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai aur main pareshan hoon, please meri madad kijiye. Yeh baat hai 31st December 2015 ki. Us din raat ko kareeb 9:30 baje honge, main Shakurpur ke I Block mein ek dukaan se kuch samaan kharid kar apne ghar wapas jaa raha tha. Jaise hi main I-Block Dispensary ke paas pahuncha, wahan do log, jinhe main pehle se jaanta tha, woh achanak mere saamne aa gaye. Unhone mujhe raste mein roka aur gusse mein bolne lage. Sir, main unse bachne ki koshish kar raha tha, par woh peecha nahi chhod rahe the aur mujhe dhamki dene lage ki...

Sir, main Anil Raj hoon. Baat 2018 ki hai, jab main aur mera dost Rakesh, hum Tihar Jail ke Barrack No. 5, Ward No. 2 mein the. Hamare saath wahi par Ataul Rehman naam ka ek qaid bhi tha. Sir, uske paas jail ke andar mobile phone hota tha. Aur woh apna phone humare beds ke bilkul paas charge karta tha. Aap samajh rahe ho na, jail mein phone rakhna kitna galat hai, aur woh bhi humare sar ke paas charge karna? Humne usko kitni baar mana kiya, samjhaya ki bhai, mat kar aisa, par woh Ataul manta hi nahi tha. Bas issi baat pe humari usse roz jhagde hote the, baatein gaali-galoch tak pahunch jaati thi. Sir, humein usse bahut pareshani thi. Kripya kuch kijiye is mamle mein.

Sir, woh Sagar alias Rinku, jo wanted criminal hai, uski toh mujhe bohot darr lagta hai. Pata chala 14 July 2020 ko raat 9 baje woh hamare Khyala area mein Apache bike pe ghoom raha tha. Sir, woh wanted tha na, toh aise khuleaam kaise ghoom sakta hai? Meri toh jaan atki rehti hai. Jab police officers usko pakadne gaye, toh usne unpe attack kiya, goli chalane ki koshish ki, Arms Act ke cases bhi hain us pe. Socho, agar police wale na hote, toh woh hum jaise aam logon ka kya haal karta? Meri aap se request hai Sir, aise khatarnak mujrim ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Humari family ki safety ke liye please kuch kijiye.

Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Meri jaan lene ki koshish ki hai Azharuddin ne. Main Mohd. Irshad hoon. Sir, 9 March 2020 ki baat hai. Us din, apne ghar par, mera mere bhai se jhagda ho gaya tha. Lekin sir, us Azharuddin ne toh hadd hi kar di. Usne gusse mein aakar, mere pet mein dahini taraf chaku ghusaa diya, sir! Mujhe laga main marr hi jaunga. Turant Holy Family Hospital le jaaya gaya. Meri haalat bahut serious thi, doctors ne bataya ‘stab wound’ hai. Sir, yeh seedha-seedha jaan se maarne ki koshish thi. Section 307 IPC ka mamla hai. Please, us par sakht se sakht action lo, sir. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai.

Daroga Ji, main Dilshad. Ek bohot zaroori baat batani hai aapko. Ye 21 July 2020 ki shaam ki baat hai, kareeb 8:30 baje. Us aadmi ne mujhe phone kiya aur uski biwi Shanti ke wages (tankhwa) ko lekar mujhse jhagda karne laga. Uski biwi ne mere yahan thoda kaam kiya tha, aur woh keh raha tha maine usko paise nahi diye. Main apne dosto, Mohd. Deen aur Shahid ke saath, uske ghar gaya — RZ-13, Gali No. 2, Nursing Garden, Khyala, Delhi mein, 4th Floor par. Wahan jaate hi usne to poora tamasha khada kar diya, Sir! Itna gusse mein tha woh, bas payment ki baat pe mujhse bhid gaya. Bina baat ke jhagda kar raha tha aur bohot gusse mein aa gaya tha. Meri to koi galti hi nahi thi, Sir.

Sir, main Shekhar Kumar, Ranjit Nagar ka rehne wala hoon. Meri Hyundai Accent car hai, number DL 10 CD 0881. Pichli 20 May 2022 ko, raat kareeb 8 baje ka time hoga, main apne ghar ja raha tha. Jab main Satyam T-point ke paas, Madhav Setu Road, Ranjit Nagar pahuncha, toh char ladke... pata nahi kahan se aa gaye. Road par chal rahe the, unhone meri gaadi rukwa li. Hath dikha ke roka, aur zor se chillane lage, "tujhe dikhai nahin deta? Gaadi dekh kar chala kar!" Aur mujhe gaadi se bahar nikalne ko kaha. Main toh ekdum ghabra gaya, Sir. Aise beech road pe meri gaadi rok ke dhamkane lage. Meri kya galti thi isme? Main toh apni gaadi theek se chala raha tha.

Sir, meri pehle ki complaint ka matter hai. Aapko yaad hoga, maine ek FIR karwai thi Suraj Kumar @ Muthu aur Jatin @ Sonu ke khilaf. Unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, itni buri tarah maara tha hathiyaar se ki mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi thi. Meri jaan le lete woh log! Police ne poori investigation ki, gawaahon ke statements bhi record kiye aur phir charge-sheet bhi file ki thi unpe 307, 326 jaise bade sections mein, Arms Act bhi laga tha. Abhi 12 October 2021 ko court mein unpe charges frame hue hain, par dekho Sir, un dono ne toh bol diya ki woh guilty nahi hain, bolte hain unhone kuch kiya hi nahi aur trial chahte hain. Yeh toh sarasar dhokha hai, Sir! Meri aankhon ke saamne unhone mujhe maara tha, aur ab woh mukar rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bahut dar lag raha hai.

Sahab, main Krishna bol rahi hoon, House No. A-32 se. Ye pichle saal 9 January 2018 ki baat hai, shaam ke kareeb 5 baje the. Ek ladka tha, uska naam Dilshad hai, usne mere ghar mein ghusne ki koshish ki. Wo mere sone ke kaan ke baaliyan churaane aaya tha, mujhe lootne ki koshish ki. Sahab, usne mujhe ek bade se chaku se dhamkaya! Main itni darr gayi thi. Usne meri gardan bhi pakad li aur chaku se mujhe bahut gehra zakhm de diya. Mujhe bahut dard hua, Sahab. Meri jaan ko khatra tha. Kripya us Dilshad ke khilaaf kadi kaarwai karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sahab.

Sir, main Kunal Mehta, jise sab Mitthu bhi kehte hain. Meri jaan lene ki koshish ki gayi hai! Pata hai kisne? Murgesh urf Aliya aur Harry Massey urf Happy ne. In logon ne mujhe buri tarah maara hai, sir. Us din, 04.09.2021 ko, mujhe Safdarjung Hospital mein admit kiya gaya tha, MLC No. 249452 ke saath. Mere poore body par chotein aayi hain. SI Satpal ji ne hospital mein hi meri statement record ki thi. Sir, in logon par Section 307/34 IPC ke तहत case chal raha hai, lekin mujhe abhi bhi darr lagta hai. Inki wajah se meri life risk mein hai. Please, inko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri family bahut pareshan hai.

Sir, main Constable Suraj Bhan baat kar raha hoon. Meri suniye Sahab, 23 June 2013 ki raat thi, kareeb 12:15 baje. Hum apni duty par the, HC Balwan Singh ji ke saath, C-39, Vikas Nagar, Delhi mein. Wahan Mohit Sharma, Rahul Sharma, Rohit Sharma aur Neeraj... in charo ne milkar, jaan-boojhkar humein roka. Hum apna sarkari kaam kar rahe the, aur inhone humein function discharge karne se roka. Sir, inhone humein maara bhi hai, humein chot pahunchai hai. Dekhiye na, hum police wale hain aur humein hi maar rahe hain! Bohut himmat ho gayi hai inki. Please Sahab, in sab ke khilaaf kadi se kadi karwayi karo, humein nyay chahiye. Meri yeh complaint likho Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us din! Woh Luxmi Narayan aur Suman, unhone mujh par hamla kiya tha. Unhone mujhe chaaku maara tha, Sir, seedha jaan se maarne ki koshish thi meri! Aaj bhi woh din yaad aata hai toh kaanp jaata hoon, 05.08.2011 ki baat hai. Bade mushkil se jaan bachi meri. Ussi waqt FIR bhi hui thi, BHD Nagar PS mein, number hai 128/13. Poore sections lagaye the un par – 307, 324, 34 IPC ke under. Ab unka case chal raha hai, trial chal raha hai. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile, Sir. Unhe kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye taaki aage se koi aisi himmat na kare!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Jab ye haadsa hua, toh pehle toh police ne in logon par chhoti-moti धाराएं lagayi thi, jaise ki bas laparwahi se kuch ho gaya ho, chot lag gayi ho. Sections 285, 336, 337, aise kuch the. Meri family ke saath itna bada zulm hua, aur pehle laga ki insaaf nahi milega. Par phir, achha hua, jab sarkar ne application di U/s 323 Cr.P.C., toh case session court mein gaya. Tab jaake in par asli galti ki धाराएं lagi hain, Sir! Ab ye log khoon (302 IPC) aur jaan se maarne ki koshish (307 IPC) ke charges par trial face kar rahe hain. Yahi toh sach hai, Sir. Inhone jaan-boojh kar kiya tha. Meri bas itni guzaarish hai ki ab inko sahi saza mile.

Sir, main Shyam Sunder hoon. Meri suniye please, bohot pareshan hoon. Yeh Raju Kashyap, jo hamare mohalle ka hi hai, isne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata nahi kitni baar usne mujhe phone kiya hai milne ke liye. Main usse achhe se jaanta tha, pehle koi dikkat nahi thi. Par sir, 23 February 2018 ki subah, usne fir phone kiya tha mujhe. Uske baad jo hua, woh... Usne aur Manoj Kumar @ Raju ko chot pahunchayi hai. Humein toh samajh nahi aa raha ki hum kya karein. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai aur hum dono ko chot bhi lagi hai. Aap please is mamle ko dekhiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Akshay bol raha hoon. Meri complaint hai Chetan alias Kukki aur Tushar ke khilaaf. 25 January 2022 ko, dopahar ke kareeb 3:30 baje, main aur mera dost Ritik Durga Chowk, Baljit Nagar mein the. Sir, tabhi yeh dono apne do aur saathi, S aur R, ke saath aaye. Bina kisi baat ke, unhone hum par attack kar diya. Chetan aur Tushar ne button actuated knife se humein baar-baar chaku maare. Sir, humein itni gehri chot lagi hai ki jaan bachana mushkil ho gaya tha. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi murder ki koshish thi! Tushar ke paas toh dangerous weapon bhi tha. Sir, please in par sakht action lijiye, inhe pakdiye, warna yeh kisi aur ko bhi nuksaan pahucha sakte hain.

Sir, main Parveen bol raha hoon. Meri suniye, sir. 24 August 2013 ki baat hai, subah ke lagbhag 6:30 baje honge. Main Tihar Jail number 7 mein, Chakki No. 15, Block A, Ward 3 mein tha, tabhi mere saath bohot bura hua. Yeh Ajay Mahadahiya, Veerpal Singh @ Chhotu, Ajay @ Lalwa, aur inke saath aur bhi kai log the — Mukesh, Vishal, Akash, Gaurav — pata nahi kitne the, sab milke aaye the. Unn sab ne mujhe gher liya, sir. Unke paas tez hathiyar the, pata nahi kaise laaye the andar. Unn sab ne mujhe buri tarah maara, hathiyaaron se chot pahunchai. Meri halat bohot kharab ho gayi thi. Jail ke andar bhi koi surakshit nahi hai kya? Sir, please mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Unn sab ko saza milni chahiye. Mera kya kasoor tha?

Sir, main Dheeraj bol raha hoon. Woh din, 22 July 2012, mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai. Sunil @ Lindi ne seedhe mujh pe goli chala di thi. Uske paas ek desi katta tha, bilkul bina license ke, aur ek zinda kartoos bhi tha. Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi Sir! Mere kandhe pe lagi goli, khoon nikalne laga aur main wahin gir gaya. Logon ne mujhe uthaya aur Sonia hospital pahunchaya. Police ne us waqt Sunil aur Jagat @ Ballu dono pe 307/34 IPC aur Arms Act ke तहत case lagaya tha. Lekin Sir, Jagat @ Ballu toh beech mein hi mar gaya, uska case toh 23 September 2015 ko hi khatam ho gaya. Ab toh sirf Sunil hi bacha hai. Mujhe ab tak woh dard yaad hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye Sir.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske saath woh hadsa hua tha, yaad hai na? Meri statement bhi record hui thi us waqt. Pehle toh aap logon ne bas mamuli si dhara lagayi thi, 324 IPC ki. Lekin meri chot kitni gehri thi, meri toh jaan par ban aayi thi! Jab doctor ki report aayi MLC mein, usne clearly likha tha ki injury bahut grievous hai. Tab jaake aapne section badla aur 326 IPC lagaya. Aur phir, jab bade afsaron se baat hui, tab jaake woh 307 IPC laga! Us harami ne toh mujhe jaan se maarne ki poori koshish ki thi, Sir! Woh mujhe yaad hai, use 5 November 2015 ko pakda tha aap logon ne. Ab investigation puri ho gayi hai aur charge-sheet bhi file ho gayi hai. Sir, bas mujhe ab insaaf chahiye!

Sahab, main aapko bas itna batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Meri jaan lene ki koshish ki gayi hai, sahab! Yeh baat hai 10 June 2023 ki, shaam ke theek 7 baje. Unhone mujh par jaanleva hamla kiya tha. Main aaj zinda hoon toh bas rab ka shukr hai. Kishan Garh police station mein meri FIR bhi darj hui thi, jiska number 218/2023 hai. Unhone toh Section 307 IPC lagaya hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sahab. Main chahta hoon ki un logo ko kadi se kadi saza mile jinhone meri zindagi barbaad karne ki koshish ki. Mujhe abhi bhi darr lagta hai. Aap meri madad kijiye, sahab.

Sir, main yahan apni purani FIR 1013/04, Uttam Nagar PS wali, ke baare mein baat karne aaya hoon. Pata hai kitne saal ho gaye? 2004 se ye case chal raha hai, meri toh zindagi nikal gayi! Ab jaake kahin Yamin aur Kamlesh @ Baby ka faisla aane wala hai. Par sir, Ram Prashad? Woh toh abhi tak ghoomega, use toh proclaimed offender declare kar diya, pakda hi nahi. Aur woh Arvind? Woh toh trial ke beech mein hi mar gaya. Matlab, adha insaaf bhi nahi mila mujhe. Meri toh saari umeed bas ab Yamin aur Kamlesh ki saza par tiki hai. Sir, bas ab jaldi se judgement aaye aur mujhe thodi shanti mile.

Sahab, main Nasiruddin. Mujhe 7 November 2004 ko, Gali No. 72B, Rajiv Nagar mein maara gaya tha. Pata nahi kisne kiya, bas achanak se attack hua. Main wahi behosh ho gaya tha. Mujhe PCR wale GTB Hospital le gaye. Meri haalat bahut kharab thi, sahab. Abhi bhi mujhe dard hota hai. Meri MLC report bhi hai, number 3767/05. Aap please dekho na kisne kiya mere saath aisa. Main toh bas apne ghar ja raha tha. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Bohot darr lagta hai ab toh.

Sahab, main Ajmat hoon. Meri baat suno please. Ye 30 May 2015 ki dopahar ki baat hai, kareeb 3:45 baje. Main apni factory ke saamne tha, Guru Nanak Nagar, New Ranjeet Nagar, Delhi mein. Wahi pe woh Mohd. Aslam aaya. Usne ek dum se ek desi katta (pistol) nikaala aur seedha mujhpe fire kar diya. Sahab, usne mujhe zakhmi kar diya, goli maari! Uska poora iraada toh mujhe jaan se maarne ka hi tha. Main toh bas kismat se bach gaya. Agar us din main mar jaata na, toh woh seedha murder ka case banta. Usne toh mujhe khatam hi karna chaaha tha. Aap please uske khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo, mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai.

Sir, main Atul Kumar, meri suniye please! Pata hai kya hua mere saath? Woh 20 January 2018 ki raat thi, kareeb 10:30 baje honge. Main aur mera dost Vishal, Madipur Bus Stand pe the, Madipur Metro Station ke paas hi. Wahan se jaa rahe the hum... tabhi woh chaar log aa gaye, unmein se ek ka naam Manish tha. Sir, un sabne milke humein gher liya, humara phone chheen liya. Mera Lava phone aur Vishal ka OPPO 6 phone, aur mere Rs. 1200/- bhi le gaye. Aur sir, unhone humein maara bhi! Uss Manish ne toh chaku nikal ke meri taraf kar diya tha, meri gardan pe lagane wala tha. Bohut dar gaya tha main. Sir, meri madad kijiye, unko pakdiye please. Yeh toh hadd ho gayi!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri beti ka khoon hua tha, un zalimon ne usko maar diya. Pehle toh trial court ne un sabko chhod diya tha, bilkul bari kar diya tha! Mujhe laga meri saari umar ka insaaf khatam ho gaya. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi thi. Phir kahin jaake, High Court ne, Allahabad High Court ne, 2005 mein unko doshi thehraya. Bola ki wohi asli mujrim hain! Tab thodi himmat aayi thi. Ab pata chala hai ki woh log phir se High Court ke us faisle ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, please, unko dobara chhutne mat dena. Kitni mushkil se toh insaaf ki roshni dikhi hai. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Yeh 1984 ki baat hai, jab Allahabad High Court mein mera case chala tha. Criminal Appeal numbers 1925, 1808... Sir, itne saal ho gaye, itne bade-bade vakil the, R.K. Garg, U.R. Lalit jaise log, sab the. Par mujhe aaj tak insaaf nahi mila. Kitne kanoon hain, kitne judgements hain desh mein, par ek gareeb aadmi ko nyay milne mein itna time lagta hai? Meri toh umar nikal gayi bas isi intezaar mein. Ab toh himmat bhi jawab de gayi hai. Sir, bas meri sunwaai karwa dijiye.

Sir, main Jayeshbhai hoon, log mujhe Panchabhai bhi kehte hain. Sir, mera ek bahut purana mamla chal raha hai, saalon se. Yeh Jayrajsinh Temubha Jadeja ne meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Pehle toh lower court mein jeeta, phir yeh log upar wali adalat mein chale gaye, aur ab toh baat Supreme Court tak pahunch gayi hai! Pata nahi kab khatam hoga yeh sab. 2005-06 se yeh case chal raha hai, meri saari mehnat, saara paisa ismein lag gaya. Bas insaaf chahiye mujhe, Sir. Woh log abhi bhi pareshaan kar rahe hain. Meri complaint likho, Sir, mujhe bas mukti chahiye is mamle se.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai. Manmeetsingh aur uske saathiyon ne mere saath jo kiya tha, uski FIR number 88/2017 Hauz Khas PS mein darj hai. Unhone mere saath 376, 377, 354, 506, 509, 323, 341 jaise sangheen dharaon mein jurm kiye the. Aur ab, Sir, woh log meri FIR ko court se quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain! Bolte hain ki 13.09.2018 ko koi settlement ho gaya hai. Main toh yeh sab jaanti hi nahi thi! Aaj 15.11.2018 ko toh court mein sunwai bhi hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri marzi ke bina koi settlement kaise ho gaya? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye tha. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mera case band mat hone dijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya hoga mere case ka. Mere saath robbery hui thi, aur inhone mujhe kuch zehreela cheez khila diya tha. Krishan Lal Sharma aur uska saathi – in dono ke khilaf case chal raha tha court mein. Humne, aur mere jaise 12 aur logon ne apni gawahi di thi. Socha tha ab insaaf milega. Lekin Sir, inko bail mil gayi thi, aur ab woh doosra wala accused, Krishan ka saathi, woh court se bhag gaya hai! Judge Saab ne usko 'proclaimed offender' tak ghoshit kar diya hai. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Jab woh bahar ghoom raha hai, toh mujhe kaise insaaf milega? Please Sir, use pakado aur mujhe insaaf dilao.

Sir, main Ravinder Kumar hoon, Chhotu Ram ka sagga bhai. Aapko toh sab pata hi hoga. Mera bhai, Lal Bahadur, usko maar diya gaya tha, 17 June 1999 ki raat, subah ke lagbhag 3:30 baje. Woh din meri aankhon se jaata hi nahi hai. Sir, itne saal ho gaye us baat ko, humein ab tak poora insaaf nahi mila. Pehle Sirsa mein Sessions Court mein case chala, 2004 mein faisla aaya, phir Punjab & Haryana High Court mein bhi sunwai hui 2006 mein. Hum toh bas court ke chakkar hi kaat rahe hain, Sir. Mera bhai toh chala gaya, aur humein ab tak uske liye ladna pad raha hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai hamare saath? Humein kab milegi shanti?

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aaya hoon ki mere apne ke case mein ab kya hoga? Unka post mortem ho gaya hai, report bhi aa gayi hai. Jo wahan maujood the log, sabke bayaan bhi record kiye hain police ne. Sab panchnama bhi banaye gaye hain. Itni investigation ke baad, thankfully, police ne un aaropiyon ke khilaaf murder aur dusre offenses ki charge sheet file kar di hai. Par Sir, post mortem report mein toh 'cardio respiratory failure' likha hai, jo mujhe samajh nahi aata. Meri toh ek hi baat hai, ye normal maut nahi thi, un gunehgaron ne hi maara hai mere apne ko. Mujhe unke liye kadi se kadi saza chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mere bete ko un logon ne jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, Sir! Sirf chot nahi pahunchayi thi, pura plan tha use khatam karne ka. Uska haal dekha tha aapne? Hospital mein woh marte-marte bacha. Ab mujhe pata chal raha hai ki yeh log keh rahe hain ki yeh toh bas maamooli chot thi, Section 322/325 ya 326 IPC ka case bana denge? Yeh toh galat hai, Sir! Unhone toh seedha Section 300/302 IPC wala kaam kiya tha, dangerous weapons se attack kiya tha. Kaise itni badi baat ko choti chot mein badal sakte hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Unko murder attempt ki hi saza milni chahiye, poori.

Sir, main Raghuveer Singh, yahan complain karne aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi, sir! Jinhone Priyanka ke papa ko, mere jija ji ko, maara hai, unko saza milni chahiye. Humne kitni mushkil se sab evidence ikatthe kiye hain. Balveer, Havaldar, Sunil, Chatur, sab gawah hain. SHO saheb DS Sengar, Head Constable Devendra, Patwari Kalicharan aur Dr. Mevafarosh ne bhi sab check kiya hai. Mere paas saare saboot hain, sir. Woh log toh apna koi gawah tak nahi laa paye court mein, unke paas kuch bolne ko hai hi nahi. Bas aapse yahi darkhwast hai, humein insaaf dilwaiye, sir. Meri bhatiji Priyanka ko uska haq milna chahiye. Woh abhi bhi apne papa ko dhundhti hai, sir.

Saab, namaste. Main Virendra ki biwi hoon. Meri suno na, Saab. Woh Ramji, Laxmi Narayan aur Govind Das, in teeno ne milkar mere pati ko maar dala, Saab. Bahut buri tarah se maara hai. Lathi aur lohangi se itna peeta ki unhone meri aankhon ke saamne mere pati ko khatam kar diya. Kya kasoor tha mere pati ka? Kya galti thi uski? Yeh sab Datia zila ke Seondha mein hua hai, Saab. Mujhe bas un teeno ke liye insaaf chahiye, kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye unko. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Aap please meri report likho aur un gunehgaron ko pakdo, Saab.

Sir, main ek dukhi insaan hoon. Mujhe aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batani hai. Bohut saal pehle, 1996 mein, mere apne ko un logon ne maara tha. Bhopal Sessions Court ne, 1997 mein, un sabko Section 302/34 IPC ke तहत umar qaid ki saza di thi. Humne kitni mushkil se insaaf paaya tha, Sir. Meri toh poori zindagi tabah ho gayi thi us din. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log us saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, itne saalon baad, agar woh bahar aa gaye toh humara kya hoga? Meri jaan ko bhi khatra ho sakta hai. Meri bas itni request hai, please, humare insaaf ko bachaiye. Unhe bahar mat aane dijiye. Main bahut darr rahi hoon.

Sir, woh court mein case chal raha tha na, uska trial abhi khatam hua hai. Court ne charges toh laga diye the un logon pe, par woh sab toh bolte rahe ki unhone kuch kiya hi nahi, sab beqasoor hain. Meri taraf se, prosecution ne pure 15 gawah bulaye the, sabne sach bataya. Unki taraf se bhi chaar gawah aaye the, pata nahi kya jhoot bola hoga. Ab sab evidence aur documents dekh liye gaye hain. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile, sir. Itna kuch hua hai mere saath, ab bas sahi faisla ho jaye.

Sir, main Lakshman bol raha hoon. Mere saath kal raat bahut bura hua hai. Shaukat Ali alias Badka aur Jameel alias Chonch ne mujhe gher liya tha. Unhone mujhe ghusson aur laaton se khoob maara, sir. Aur unme se ek ne toh mere left pichhwade par ek tez dhaar wale hathiyar se chaaku bhi maar diya. Main bahut dard mein hoon. Uske baad maine turant apne phone number 9910276881 se PCR ko call kiya. Constable Meenakshi Madam ne meri puri baat suni aur report likhi thi. Phir raat kareeb 11:45 baje PS Ashok Vihar ko bhi inform kiya gaya aur meri complaint record hui thi. Sir, mujhe un logon se insaaf chahiye. Aise kaise koi kisi ko maar kar chala jayega?

Sir, main... mera naam Ramu Lal hai. Aapki madad chahiye mujhe. Woh Raghuveer Savita aur Shailendra Sharma, jisko Sonu bhi bolte hain... sir, inhone milkar mere ghar pe dakaiti daali thi. Pura ghar loot liya, sab kuch le gaye the mera. Aur sirf yeh nahi, sir, inhone toh mere bacche ko bhi utha liya tha, kidnap kar liya tha paise ke liye. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us din. Pura parivar darr ke maare kaanp raha tha. Sir, badi mushkil se insaaf mila hai, ab yeh log appeal kar rahe hain. Please, inko dobara jail se bahar mat nikalne dena. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi inhone. Bahut pareshaan hoon main, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere pati ko maar diya gaya hai! Sirf ek chot lagi thi, par woh itni gehri thi ki unhone wahin dum tod diya. Meri toh poori duniya ujad gayi, Sir! Abhi court mein case chal raha hai, aur mujhe pata chala hai ki High Court mein Judge sahab bol rahe hain ki ek hi chot lagi thi toh shayad murder nahi hai, bas culpable homicide hai. Yeh kya insaaf hai, Sir? Mera aadmi mar gaya hai! Ek chot se mare ya das se, maut toh maut hi hai na? Woh jaan-boojh kar maara gaya hai, main kasam se bol rahi hoon. Usne sab kuch cheen liya mera. Main chahti hoon ki usko murder ki hi saza mile, Section 302 ke तहत. Usko kam saza nahi milni chahiye. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Gwalior se aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi thi. Woh jo darinda tha na, usne mere chhote bachche ko utha liya tha, uske saath itni gandi harkat ki aur phir use maar bhi dala. Uski body tak chhipane ki koshish ki thi, socha tha koi proof nahi milega. Par Bhagwan ne dekha, aur Court ne bhi. Gwalior mein, jo Special Judge hain POCSO Act ke liye, unhone sunwai ki thi. 16 September 2020 ko unhone us aaropi ko doshi thehraya. Sections 363, 377, 302, 201 IPC aur POCSO Act ke under bhi usko guilty paya gaya hai, Sir. Mera bachcha toh wapas nahi aayega, par kam se kam use uske kiye ki saza toh mil rahi hai. Thoda sa sukoon mila hai mujhe, Sir. Bas yehi batane aaya tha.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyad lekar aaya hoon. Aapko pata hai, mere saath jo hadsa hua tha, woh toh ek hi tha, lekin uske liye do-do case chal rahe the court mein. CRA No. 1025 of 2010 aur CRA No. 1030 of 2010. Kya bataun, kitna pareshaan hua main, ek hi baat ke liye baar-baar gawahiyan, date pe date! Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi is chakkar mein. Pata nahi kyun do alag trial kiye the Session Court mein, ek 167 of 2010 aur dusra 55 of 2010. Par ab Bhagwan ka shukr hai, itne saalon baad, finally 25 March 2022 ko ek common judgment aaya hai. Judge sahab ne bhi maan liya ki incident toh ek hi tha. Bas ab mujhe insaaf mil jaye, yahi meri aapse request hai. Bahut intezaar kiya hai, Sir.

Sir, main aapko apni pareshani batane aaya hoon. Woh Hariram aur Veer Singh, jinhe Mungawali court ne 30 March 2012 ko saza sunai thi, ab phir se appeal kar rahe hain! Meri toh poori duniya ujad gayi thi us din, aur ab yeh log phir se case khulwa rahe hain. Veer Singh ne toh seedha Section 302 IPC ke तहत murder kiya tha, aur Hariram bhi uske saath mila hua tha (Section 302/34). Court ne unhe sahi saza di thi, ST No.45 of 2011 mein. Ab mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai ki kahin inki saza kam na ho jaaye, Sir. Meri family ne itna kuch saha hai, aur ab phir se yeh sab! Kripya karke aap meri madad kijiye, Sir. Inhe apni kiye ki saza milni hi chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Pappu alias Jitendra Rajawat aur Raju alias Ravindra Rajawat ne jo kiya tha, uski saza toh unhe mili thi. Bhind mein Special Judge sahab ne unhe Sessions Trial No. 92/2007 mein doshi thehraya tha. 6 May 2010 ko Pappu ko toh Section 302 aur 34 IPC ke तहत umar kaid ki saza mili thi, Sir. Hamein thodi tasalli mili thi ki chalo, insaaf toh hua. Par ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain, Criminal Appeal No. 390 of 2010. Sir, please dekhiye, humein aur pareshaan na kiya jaaye. Meri aapse request hai, unko aur chance na mile, unki appeal reject ho. Hum gareeb log hain, kahan tak ladenge? Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, badi mushkil se aaya hoon main. Mera gaon Kurra hai, Badoni thane ke paas, Datia district mein. Aapko toh pata hi hoga, yeh pura ilaka dakuon wala hai, Sarkar ne bhi 2000 se *dacoity-affected area* declare kar rakha hai. Pehle woh Mohan Singh tha, usko toh police ne *encounter* mein nipta diya tha. Aur Madho Singh Rawat aur Gulab Singh ko bhi *court* ne saza sunayi hai, woh toh *convict* ho chuke hain. Par sir, ab woh Madho Singh Rawat ka saga bhai Kamal Singh Rawat phir se aa gaya hai. Hamein bahut darr lag raha hai usse. Pura parivaar ghabraya hua hai. Kahi woh phir se koi musibat na khadi kar de. Meri aapse vinti hai, please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Aruna Devi, HMD Colony, Shahdara se aayi hoon. Meri baat suniye please. Mere pati ko guzre hue do saal ho gaye hain, main apne do chhote bachchon ke saath akeli rehti hoon. Ek aadmi hai, woh mere ghar mein bahut zyada aata-jaata hai. Pehle toh laga shareef hai, par ab uski niyat theek nahi lagti. Mere bachchon se bhi zyada ghul-mil raha hai. Main use mana karti hoon, par woh sunta hi nahi. Mujhe bahut uncomfortable feel hota hai. Aaj 17th May ki raat hai, aur mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai usse. Pata nahi kya chahta hai woh. Meri privacy khatam ho gayi hai. Sir, please meri help kijiye, mujhe aur mere bachchon ko us aadmi se bachao. Mujhe usse bahut khatra lagta hai.

Sir, main Jessy hoon. Meri shaadi 31.8.1997 ko hui thi, par meri kismat hi kharab hai. Shaadi ke baad se hi mere pati aur meri saas ne meri zindagi hell bana di hai. Roz physical aur mental torture karte hain, sir. Kabhi maarte hain, kabhi gaaliyan dete hain, kabhi taane sunate hain. Main andar se puri toot chuki hoon. Kal, 11.10.1998 ko toh hadd ho gayi. Meri saas ne ghar mein itna bada scene create kiya ki main darr gayi. Unka harassment itna badh gaya tha ki main ghar mein ruk hi nahi paayi. Socha, pati ko dhoondhu, shayad unse baat karke kuch hal nikle. Rote-rote unhe dhoondhne nikli, aur jab dekha toh woh apne dosto ke saath baith kar aaraam se sharab pee rahe the. Meri taraf unhone dekha bhi nahi. Sir, ab bas. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main aur nahi seh sakti yeh sab.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki jo pichli baar court ka order aaya tha na, 25.4.2005 ko, mujhe us par bohot aitraaz hai! Pehle toh us aadmi ko, jisne meri zindagi tabah kar di, use 304A aur 308 IPC ke charges se discharge kar diya tha. Sochiye sir, mere saath itna bada haadsa hua aur usko yun hi jaane de rahe the? Meri toh saari ummeed hi toot gayi thi. Par ab, finally, yeh saamne aaya hai ki uske khilaaf 304 Part II aur 308 IPC ke तहत *prima facie* ek case banta hai. Matlab, usne jo kiya hai, woh bohot bada jurm hai, aur ab toh saboot bhi hain! Sir, please mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Us mujrim ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki woh apni kiye ki saza bhugte.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko pata hai na, mera case chal raha tha. Woh Ravi, Santosh aur Ashish, Ramprakash... in sab ne jo kiya tha, uski saza inko mili thi. 16 December 2021 ko Special Judge ne inko convict kiya tha. Kitni mushkil se toh yeh judgment aaya tha. Main socha tha ab mujhe insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab yeh log na, appeal kar rahe hain. Woh case number 102/2012 aur 160/2012... in sab ki ek hi baat hai. Ek hi waqia tha Sir, aur ab yeh sab milkar phir se case chala rahe hain. Mujhe bohot tension ho rahi hai Sir, lagta hai phir se bach jayenge. Meri suno Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sahab, meri baat suniye, humare saath bohot bada dhokha hua hai. Jo Murarilal ji the, mere bade, woh toh insaaf ke liye ladte-ladte hi guzar gaye. Appeal chal rahi thi, aur usi dauran unki death ho gayi, toh unka naam tak case se hata diya hai. Ye kaisa insaaf hai? Jin Subhash aur Ramavtar ne khoon kiya tha, unpar Section 148 aur 302 jaise bade charges the. Par Sahab, neeche ki adalat ne unhe bari kar diya! Sochiye, murder ka case aur unhe chhod diya gaya. Humara to poora parivaar toot gaya hai. Mere Murarilal ji isi dukh mein the, ki unhe justice nahi mil raha. Ab to woh bhi nahi rahe, par hum kya karein? Humein bas itna chahiye ki un logon ko saza mile. Unhe dand milna chahiye, Sahab, please humari madad kijiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Jagdish, Santosh, Dalel, Hakim, Atar Singh, in paanchon ne milkar mere bhai ko maar diya tha aur mujhe bhi jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, Sir. Poore gaon ke saamne, lathi-dande leke aaye the, ekdum jungle raj tha. Bhind court ne 2007 mein unhe saza bhi sunayi thi, do saal ki jail aur Rs. 2000 ka jurmana. Par Sir, ab suna hai woh phir se appeal kar rahe hain! Itne bade gunah ke liye itni kam saza, aur ab woh bhi hatwana chahte hain? Meri family bahut darr mein hai. Humne kitna kuch saha hai. Sir, meri bas ek hi darkhwast hai, humein insaaf chahiye, un gundo ko phir se kadi saza milni chahiye. Kahi woh log choot na jaayein.

Sir, main Ramu ki behen bol rahi hoon. Kitne saal ho gaye us baat ko, jab mere bhai ko maar diya gaya tha. Woh 2010 ka case tha, Sessions Trial No. 127/2010. Pata hai kitni mushkil se humne justice ke liye lada? Judge sahab ne finally usko pakda, woh jo qaatil tha. Datia ke Additional Sessions Judge ne usko convict kiya tha 4 December 2014 ko, Section 302 IPC ke under. Life imprisonment mili hai usko, sir, umar qaid! Par Sir, hazaar rupay ka fine? Mere bhai ki jaan ki kimat sirf ek hazaar rupay? Aur ab suna hai woh appeal kar raha hai? Matlab, itni mushkil se justice mila hai, aur ab woh phir se bachne ki koshish karega? Hum garib log kahan tak ladenge, Sir? Aap please dekhiye, yeh log phir se hamari zindagi mein pareshani na khadi karein.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha tha, jismein Magistrate ne ek faisla sunaya tha. Ab pata chala hai ki sarkaar ne khud High Court ko letter likh kar poocha hai ki kya woh Magistrate ka judgment sahi tha ya nahin, legal tha ya nahin. Sir, iska matlab toh yahi hua na ki mere saath galat hua tha? Main tabse keh raha tha ki woh faisla theek nahin hai, meri suni nahin gayi. Ab High Court ne bhi isko seriously liya hai, aur khud is case ko dekh rahi hai. Mujhe pura bharosa hai ki ab mujhe insaaf milega. Bas aap meri baat sun lo, main bahut takleef mein hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas aaya hoon, bahut pareshaan hoon. Pata nahi kya hoga, mera dil baitha ja raha hai. Pichhle saal, 28 August ko mere apne ki jaan gayi thi, woh sab illegal mining ki wajah se hua tha. Un logon ne milkar saazish ki thi. FIR bhi hui thi, aur Tonk mein judge saab ne 28 November ko un sab pe charges bhi laga diye the, 304 aur 120B IPC ke तहत, aur mining wale kanoon ke under bhi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf milega. Par ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh mujrim log upar ki adalat mein chale gaye hain, in charges se bachne ke liye! Sir, aise kaise chalega? Meri duniya ujad gayi, aur woh log aazad ho jayenge? Meri aapse request hai, please unko mat chhodna. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main Saji Joseph bol raha hoon. Meri baat suniye, Sir. Raat ko kareeb 10:45 baje ki baat hai. Hum log car se wapas aa rahe the, Veyilukanampara Junction ke paas. Pehle, din mein bhi Ajmal aur uske saath Razee ne humari gaadi ko rasta nahi diya tha, tab thodi verbal arguments hui thi. Humne socha chalo, chhod do. Par Sir, jab hum junction pe pahunche, toh Sabeer wahan pehle se wait kar raha tha. Aur dekhte hi dekhte, uske saath 9-10 aur log bikes pe aa gaye. Sabke chehre pe gussa tha, Sir. Un logon ne humari gaadi ko gher liya aur humla kar diya, Sir. Hum toh bas wapas aa rahe the, aur Ajmal ne apne gang ke saath pura plan karke humein roka. Humari jaan ko khatra hai, Sir. Humare ek dost ko bhi chot lagi hai. Please aap in sab ke khilaaf sakht action lo. Meri madad karo, Sir!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mera toh dimag ghoom gaya hai yeh sab sunke. Woh Pandi, jiske khilaaf mera case chal raha hai na, J.C. No. 264 of 1972, jo Juvenile Court mein tha... ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki Sessions Judge saab ne usko bade court mein transfer karne ki baat ki hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai, saab? Pehle hi woh chhota bachcha tha, uski harkatein bade logon jaisi thi. Aur ab case bhi ghumaya ja raha hai. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin yeh case aur lamba na khinch jaye ya use chhod na dein. Meri toh jaan nikli hui hai us din se. Mujhe justice chahiye, sir. Yeh sab ghuma-firake kab tak chalega? Hum gareeb log hain, kitne chakkar kaatenge?

Sir, main Chatur Singh Yadav hoon. Mera bhai, Satendra Yadav, kal se lapata tha. Hum sab gharwalo ne, aur Satendra ke baki parivar walon ne usko bohot dhoondha, Sir. Poora din hum pareshan rahe, idhar-udhar bhatakte rahe. Shaam ko, Satendra ke bhai Jitendra ne bataya ki usne Satish ko Sonu Yadav ke saath lagbhag 4 baje dekha tha, baat karte hue. Humne socha, chalo, mil jayega. Par jab raat mein aur gehri talaash ki, toh haal behaal ho gaya, Sir. Satendra ki body Gwalior Fort pe mili, jhaadiyon mein padi hui thi, mara hua tha woh! Yeh sab sunn ke mera dil baith gaya. Mujhe poora shaq hai ki yeh Satish aur Sonu Yadav ne hi kuch kiya hai. Meri madad karo, Sir, Satendra ke saath insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshaan hokar aaya hoon. Yaad hai, Vidisha mein, 2010 mein jo mere rishtedar ka murder hua tha? Uske case mein, Sessions Judge ne 30-11-2011 ko us gunehgar ko Section 302 IPC ke तहत *convict* kiya tha. Use umar qaid ki saza mili thi aur 1000 rupaye ka *fine* bhi laga tha. Humne socha tha chalo, insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh *appellant* us *judgment* ko *challenge* kar raha hai. Woh apni saza ko palatne ki koshish kar raha hai! Sir, itni mushkil se toh nyay mila tha. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki uski appeal kharij ho aur usko uske kiye ki puri saza mile. Humein aur dukh mat do, please.

Sir, main Pooran Ahirwar ki biwi hoon. Hamara poora ghar ujad gaya, Sir! Main Vidisha ke Mohangiri Mohalla mein rehti hoon. October 1, 2007 ki raat ko, hum sab ghar mein so rahe the. Main, mere pati Pooran, aur mere bhaiyya – sab ek saath. Kuchh log ghar mein ghuse aur mere pati ko bedardi se maar dala, Sir! Woh log Thakur caste ke hain, aur hum Ahirwar, hum Scheduled Caste se hain. Unhone jaan boojhkar kiya hai yeh sab, humein pata hai. Hum gareeb hain, Sir, isliye humein dabaya ja raha hai. Mera sab kuch chhin gaya. Kripya humein insaaf dilwaiye, unko pakadiye. Meri madad karo, Sir!

Sahab, main Atar Singh hoon. Meri maa Brijrani aur meri bhatiji Chandni ab is duniya mein nahi hain. Sahab, yeh 28 October 2000 ki baat hai, maine Godan Police Station mein report likhwai thi. Mera hi bhai, mera apna saga bhai, usne... usne meri maa aur meri bhatiji ko maar diya. Sahab, kya bataun, mera pura parivaar ujad gaya. Mainne abhi Santram Jatav se Taidot gaon mein ek ghar kharida tha 12,000 rupaye mein. Pata nahi kis baat pe usne aisa kiya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sahab! Mere bhai ne meri maa aur meri bhatiji ko maara hai. Main apna naya ghar bhi nahi dekh paya theek se. Us darinde ko saza milni chahiye. Meri maa aur Chandni ko insaaf dilaiye, Sahab.

Sir, meri suniye, meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Seema Verma, jisne mere rishtedar ko itni buri tarah maara tha, uski wajah se meri family ne apna sab kuch kho diya. Kalyanpur thane mein humne report likhwai thi, Case Crime No. 311 tha woh, 2016 ki baat hai. Court ne usko doshi maana tha, Sections 304 aur 323 IPC ke तहत Kanpur Nagar ke Sessions Judge sahab ne usko saza bhi sunai thi. Humne socha tha chalo ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab suna hai woh phir se appeal kar rahi hai, Section 374 Cr.P.C. mein. Sir, itni mushkil se toh thodi shanti mili thi, ab phir se woh sab shuru ho gaya. Meri family ko insaaf milna chahiye, usko uske gunah ki poori saza milni chahiye. Sir, please kuch kijiye, meri to jaan nikal rahi hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera dil phat raha hai! Pichle saal, 26 February 2021 ki baat hai. Mera bachcha Kothamangalam ke paas picnic par gaya tha. School ke 100 se zyada bachche aur unke teachers the saath mein. Poore din khoob ghoome-phire, bade khush the sab. Shaam ho rahi thi toh socha ki Thattekkadu ke paas Periyar nadi mein ek chhoti si boat ride kar lenge. Sir, woh boat ride... woh ride toh khatam hi nahi hui! Mera bachcha... mere masoom bachche ko... woh wapas hi nahi aaya. Pata nahi kya hua us boat ko, kaise doobi. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi sir! Mere bachche ka kya kasoor tha? Kaisa intezaam tha wahan? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, mere bachche ke liye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi. Woh Deepak Kumar, mera hi pati... usne mere 40 din ke masoom laal ko maar dala. Sir, abhi toh theek se aankh kholi bhi nahi thi usne. Moti Nagar thane mein FIR hui thi, case chala, aur use saza bhi mili hai, umar kaid ki. Par ab pata chal raha hai ki woh appeal kar raha hai. Sir, ek toh usne mera baccha chheen liya, aur ab woh jail se bahar aana chahta hai? Aur woh bhi sirf 2000 rupay ka fine? Kya ek jaan ki keemat bas itni si hai? Sir, mujhe mere bacche ke liye insaaf chahiye. Woh bahar na aaye, please dekhiye. Usne bahut bada gunaah kiya hai. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Yeh jo Laxman Singh Jatav hai na, isne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Kitne saalon se iska case chal raha tha (Sessions Trial No. 293 of 2007, Dabra mein). Mujhe laga tha finally 5th February, 2011 ko jab usko saza mili, conviction hua, toh insaaf mil gaya. Par ab sun raha hoon ki usne appeal file kar di hai (Criminal Appeal No. 799/2011). Kya matlab hai iska? Kya mujhe phir se court ke chakkar kaatne padenge? Aur uske sath uska jo surety tha, woh Satish alias Vikram Singh Jatav, uske khilaaf bhi kuch hua hai (MCRC No. 709/2014). Sir, mera kya hoga? Main toh bas itna chahta hoon ki usko jo saza mili hai, woh barkarar rahe. Please meri suniye, main bahut dara hua hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Badi mushkil se, kitne saalon ki ladai ke baad, humne Arvind alias Lalla ko saza dilwai thi. Datia ke Special Judge aur Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne usko 29 March 2011 ko convicted kiya tha, tab jaake humein thodi shanti mili thi. Humne socha tha ki ab justice mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh upar appeal kar raha hai, usne criminal appeal daal di hai. Sir, humein bahut darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh phir se na bach jaaye. Meri saari mehnat, mera itna kharcha, sab bekar ho jayega agar woh chhoot gaya. Meri family bhi bahut tension mein hai. Uski wajah se humari zindagi pehle hi barbaad ho chuki hai. Please, sir, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Kailashi ka beta hoon, Bhind se. Sir, 2010 ki baat hai, 30 July ko, Bhind ke Sessions Judge sahab ne hamare liye insaaf kiya tha. Mere papa Kailashi aur Garsingh ka murder hua tha. Indal Singh ne doosron ke saath milkar unka katal kiya tha. Usko Section 302 IPC mein do baar saja mili thi, aur Subodh Singh aur Dhaniram ko bhi Section 302 r/w 34 mein convict kiya gaya tha. Sessions Trial No. 83/2008 mein yeh judgment aaya tha. Humein laga tha ki ab sab theek ho gaya, insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log, Indal aur uske saathi, appeal kar rahe hain u/S 374 CrPC. Sir, humein bahut darr lag raha hai. Itne saal baad phir se woh log case khol rahe hain. Meri aapse request hai, please hamari madad kijiye, taaki hamara insaaf barkaraar rahe aur unko chhoot na mile.

Sahab, main kya bataun aapko... mera toh sab kuch ujad gaya hai! Mere pati, Lallu, unke saath kitni badi zyadti hui hai. Humne un logon se zameen lease par li thi, badi mushkil se, aur us par mere pati ne apni jaan laga kar fasal boi thi. Woh hamari rozi roti thi, sahab! 8 March 2009 ko, dopahar ke theek 12 baje, woh zalim log, hamari fasal ko barbarbad kar rahe the. Mere pati ne bas unhe roka, unse hath jod kar binti ki, ki 'aisa mat karo, yeh hamari fasal hai'. Bas itna kehna tha, aur unhone mere pati ke saath jo kiya... main toh bas insaaf chahti hoon sahab! Un logon ko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Ajeem Khan hoon. Meri baat suniye, Sir. Ye 28 August 2008 ki baat hai, dopahar ke lagbhag 12:30 baje honge. Main aur mera bada bhai Chanda Khan, hum log Kallu Batham ke hotel mein baithe the, Jail Road Bhind par. Hamare pitaji, Imam Khan, jinko log Immy Musalman ke naam se jaante hain, woh hamare ek aur bade bhai Shahjad se milkar wapas aa rahe the. Jaise hi woh Kallu Batham hotel ke saamne pahuche, Sir, wahan woh Ghambheer Si... woh log the. Unhone mere pitaji ko... Sir, mere pitaji ke saath unhone kuch kiya hai. Meri madad kijiye, Sir. Ye bahut purani baat hai, lekin main aaj bhi uska insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, bas pareshan ho gaya hoon. Woh Ramawtar aur Raghunath wala case hai na, jismein pehle court ne unko doshi thehraya tha aur 17 March 2001 ko saza bhi sunayi thi? Usi case ka main victim hoon. Ab sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki un logon ne appeal kar di hai. Aur yeh sirf meri baat nahi hai, mere jaise do aur case hain, Criminal Appeal No. 201/2001 aur 261/2001. Sir, hum sabka mamla ek hi common judgement se nikla hai. Jab pehle itni mushkil se insaaf mila tha, ab yeh phir se appeals chal rahi hain. Kya hum gareebon ko kabhi shanti se jeene nahi denge? Sir, mujhe bas woh pehle wala hi faisla chahiye, in appeals se mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh log bach na jaayen.

Sahab, main aapko kya bataun... meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mujhe Second Additional Sessions Judge, Dabra ne galat tareeke se convict kar diya hai. Main toh beqasoor hoon, sahab! Ye 3 December 2011 ki baat hai, jab mujhe us case mein saja sunai gayi, Sessions Trial No. 283 of 2009. Mujhe yaad hai, woh 2 June 2009 ka din tha jab pehli baar mujhpar ilzam laga tha. Gwalior ke Dabra mein yeh sab hua. Main us din bhi keh raha tha ki maine kuch nahi kiya, aur aaj bhi keh raha hoon. Ab is faisle se main bilkul khush nahi hoon, mera poora parivaar pareshan hai. Humne toh appeal bhi file ki hai, kyunki mujhe insaaf chahiye. Bas aap meri madad karo, sahib, main beqasoor hoon.

Sir, main wohi case ke baare mein baat kar raha hoon, Sessions Case No. 185/2001. Meri FIR No. 301/2000, Patel Nagar PS mein jo darj hui thi. Us din usne mera ghar ujad diya tha, Sir. Kitna pareshaan hua tha main us time. Poora parivaar toot gaya tha uske baad. Badi mushkil se, lambi ladai ke baad, 21.4.2003 ko usko Section 302 IPC ke तहत saza hui thi. Court ne usko guilty maana tha. Phir 22.4.2003 ko usko umar kaid ki rigorous imprisonment mili thi, Sir. 5,000 rupaye ka fine bhi laga tha. Agar fine nahi bharta toh aur jail hoti usko. Sir, ab suna hai ki woh appeal kar raha hai, usko conviction ko challenge kar raha hai. Itni mushkil se insaaf mila tha, ab phir se wohi sab shuru ho raha hai. Hum log bahut darr rahe hain, Sir. Kahi usko riha na kar dein. Meri bas yahi request hai, please isko dekhiye.

Sahab, main Ramu ki behen bol rahi hoon. Woh Shyam Lal, Bijai, Kallu, Udal, Awadhraj, Girdhari aur Sudama Prasad ne milkar mere bhai ko maara tha. Pura gaon jaanta hai, pura jhund banake aaye the woh log, Section 147 lagaya tha unpar. Kitne saal ho gaye iss baat ko, 2004 ki baat hai yeh, jab Case Crime No. 162 of 2004 mein unko saja mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai. Itni mushkil se toh unko 304/149 aur 323/149 IPC mein conviction mila tha. Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh hamari family ko aur pareshaan karenge. Please, Sahab, unko chhutne mat dena. Unko unke kiye ki saza milni chahiye. Bas yahi request hai meri.

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon. Mera woh case tha na, Sessions Case No. 135/2011, Osmanabad court mein chala tha. Kitne saal ho gaye, main 2011 se ghum rahi hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi uss incident ki wajah se. Jaise taise karke, itne saalon baad ek judgement aaya tha, mere haq mein. Mujhe laga tha ab toh sukoon milega, insaaf mil gaya. Par nahi Sahab! Abhi pata chala hai, woh saamne waale ne appeal kar di hai uss judgement ke khilaaf. Matlab dobara se wohi sab shuru ho gaya? Dobara court ke chakkar? Mujhe ab aur himmat nahi hai Sahab. Meri toh saari ummeed toot gayi hai. Kya meri pareshaniyan kabhi khatam nahi hongi? Aap hi batao, main kya karoon?

Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe laga tha ki ab insaaf milega. Jin logon ne mere saath galat kiya, unko Sessions Judge ne *chhod diya*! Mera toh dil toot gaya. Main toh bas yehi chahta tha ki unko saza mile, isliye main High Court gaya, ki 'Lord, yeh galat faisla hai, unko phir se dekho'. Lekin wahan jaake aur tension ho gayi, Sir. Kehte hain meri appeal 'chalegi hi nahi'! Bolte hain High Court ne toh pehle hi unki (accused ki) appeal sun li thi, jab woh apni saza ke khilaaf aaye the. Ab meri sunwai kaise hogi? Sir, iska matlab kya hai? Meri toh sunega hi nahi koi? Woh log bahar ghoom rahe hain, aur mujhe insaaf ke liye ro bhi nahi sakta? Mera toh case shuru hone se pehle hi khatam ho gaya. Please Sir, meri madad karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye bas.

Sir, main Balraj bol raha hoon. Meri suno please, bohot bura hua hai mere saath. 9 March 1994 ki raat thi, kareeb 11 baje honge. Main, mera saala Mahipal aur Madan, hum teeno mere ghar ke saamne hi khade the, DDA Market, Khyala ke paas. Tabhi kuch ladke wahaan se nikle, unmein Jarnail Singh bhi tha. Woh sab school ki taraf chale gaye. Phir kya hua Sir, Jarnail Singh akela wapas palat ke aaya... aur usne... mere saale Mahipal ko... usko maara hai Sir. Saahab, Mahipal ab nahi raha. Usko maar diya hai. Meri madad karo Sir, un logon ko pakdo!

Sir, main Annamma hoon. Meri chhoti si beti thi, Sinimol, sirf 4 saal ki. Meri gudiya ko us zalim ne maar diya, Sir! Christmas ka din tha, sab khushiyan mana rahe the, aur meri beti ko usne apne khooni chaku se kaat dala. Meri duniya ujaad di, Sir. Ab mere liye Christmas ka din Jesus ka janamdin nahi, meri Sinimol ki maut ki barsi ban gaya hai. Sessions Judge ne usko IPC 302 aur 324 ke तहत दोषी toh thehraya hai, par mera dard kaise kam hoga? Usne meri jaan le li, Sir. Mujhe bas pura insaaf chahiye, use uske kiye ki kadi se kadi saja milni chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, thak gaya hoon in adalat ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke. 1998 se, haan Sir, 1998 se mera ek case chal raha hai Kottayam mein, Sessions Case No. 86/1998. Mujhe usmein galat tareeke se doshi thehra diya aur saza bhi suna di gayi. Sir, main toh begunah tha, par meri kisne suni? Maine appeal bhi ki thi 2002 mein, Additional Sessions Judge ke paas (Crl.A.No.58/2002), par wahan bhi meri baat nahi mani gayi. Pehle wala hi फैसला barkarar rakha gaya. Meri toh poori zindagi isi sab mein nikal gayi. Mujhe lagta hai Sir, jo shuru mein trial court aur baad mein appellate court ne फैसला diya, usmein zaroor koi kanooni galti hui hai. Meri bas itni guzaarish hai, mujhe insaaf dilwa do. Bahut na-insaafi hui hai mere saath.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere apno ke saath jo hadsa hua, uski maine turant dehatinalishi di thi (Ex-P/7), aur uske basis par FIR bhi register hui thi (Ex-P/8). Meri aankhon ke saamne mere do apno ki dead bodies ka panchayatnama banaya gaya (Ex-P/1, Ex-P/2) aur unhe postmortem ke liye bheja gaya (Ex-P/10). Police ne spot map bhi banaya tha (Ex-P/13). Investigation poori hone ke baad, police ne Ashok aur Raghuveer Singh ke khilaf court mein charge sheet file kar di hai. Par Sir, woh teesra gunehgar Gudda abhi tak court mein appear nahi hua hai, aur uske khilaf challan file nahi ho paya. Mujhe us Gudda ke liye bhi insaaf chahiye! Woh aise kaise bach sakta hai? Main apne apno ke liye poora insaaf chahti hoon, please usko bhi pakado.

Sir, mera naam Satya Narayan Thakur hai. Mujhe mere left ghutne par aur uske thoda upar bahut dard hai aur sujan bhi hai. Kisi ne mujhe kisi hard aur blunt cheez se mara hai. Yeh chot lagbhag 4 se 6 ghante pehle lagi thi. Doctor ne bola hai ki X-ray karwana padega mere left ghutne ka. Par, sir, woh X-ray plate abhi tak mili nahi hai, isliye doctor bhi nahi bata pa rahe ki chot kitni gehri hai ya kitni serious hai. Main bahut takleef mein hoon, chalna bhi mushkil ho raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye, sir. Usne mujhe bahut buri tarah mara hai.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon. Woh jo gunehgar hai na, jisne hamare ghar ke aadmi ko maara tha, usko Mandya court ne saza sunayi thi. Special Case No. 47/2013 mein, 7 June 2014 ko, Section 302 IPC ke तहत usko conviction mila tha. Poori umar kaid mili thi aur 10,000 ka fine bhi. Humne socha tha chalo, ab insaaf toh mila. Woh abhi judicial custody mein hai. Lekin Sir, ab pata chala hai woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Meri family toh darr gayi hai. Itni mushkil se toh woh jail gaya tha, ab phir se usko bahar aane ka mauka mil jayega kya? Hum bahut pareshaan hain, Sir. Usko bahar mat aane dena, please.

Sir, main Satya Narayan Thakur hoon. Mujhe bahut takleef ho rahi hai. Meri left knee par aur uske upar bahut zyada sujan (swelling) hai aur dard se mera bura haal hai. Kisi ne mujhe ek hard aur blunt cheez se mara hai, sir. Ye sab pichhle 4 se 6 ghante ke andar hua hai, abhi taaza maamla hai. Doctor ne ghutne ka X-ray karwane ko bola hai. Lekin abhi tak X-ray ki plate nahi mili, isliye ye nahi pata chal pa raha ki chot kitni gehri hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe bahut dard ho raha hai aur main insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main Sitaram Kuchhbedia bol raha hoon. Aaj main bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Mere bhai ke saath kuch ho gaya hai. Woh mera chhota bhai hai, Bhaggu, jiska doosra naam Bhag Chand bhi hai. Aaj, 11th July 2003 ki shaam ko, kareeb 8 baje ke aas-paas, woh Bhat gaya tha Gadarwada se. Aur abhi mujhe khabar mili hai ki uske saath kuch gadbad ho gayi hai. Mujhe theek se pata nahi kya hua hai, bas itna hi sunne ko mila hai. Main turant yahan Gadarwada hospital aaya hoon, takreeban raat ke 9 baje hain ab. Meri suniye Sir, SHO Pathak sahab, Paloha Bada police station. Please help kijiye, mera bhai kahaan hai, kaisa hai, kuch pata nahi chal raha. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai uske liye. Meri complaint likh lo Sir. Uske saath kuch bura na hua ho.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, kitna ghum hua hai mujhe is pure mamle mein. Jisne mere saath galat kiya tha na, usko Trial Court ne toh doshi maan liya tha. Bola tha 10,000 ka jurmana aur ek saal ki jail hogi. Par sir, uske papa ko toh court ne chhod diya tha, woh toh bach gaye! Mujhe laga, ye kya baat hui? Aur phir woh main wala accused, usko apni saza pasand nahi aayi, toh woh High Court chala gaya appeal karne. Meri toh saansein atak gayi thi, laga ab woh fir se bahar aa jayega. Kitni mushkil se ye case jeeta tha. Par khuda ka shukr hai, High Court ne bhi uski appeal reject kar di. Meri jeet ko barkarar rakha hai. Ab uski saza pakki hai. Bas sir, ab thoda sukoon mila hai, par dekhiye na kaise ye log insaaf se bhagne ki koshish karte hain.

Sir, main Alirajpur Tehsil se aaya hoon. Hum adivasi log hain, aur humari ek organization hai, ‘Khedut Mazdoor Chetna Sangath’. Humne bahut mushkil se court mein ek case kiya tha, ek Writ Petition (No. 239 of 1993) MP Sarkar ke khilaaf. Pichle saal, 4 June ko, court ne ek bada order pass kiya tha humare haq mein. Hum socha tha ab sab theek ho jayega, humari suni jayegi. Lekin Sahab, kisi ne us order ki value hi nahi samjhi. Un afsaron ne court ki baat nahi maani, humara mazak banaya. Ab phir se yeh contempt proceedings chal rahi hain kyunki unhone court ka hukm toda hai. Kitna zulm hai Sir! Hum kab tak aise hi pareshaan hote rahenge? Kripya kuch kijiye, humari madad kijiye.

Sir, please meri baat suno. Yeh Major Singh, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, usne phir se High Court mein appeal daal di hai. Kya bataun sir, 2002 se yeh case chal raha hai, itne saal ho gaye! Pehle hum jeete the, mujhe thodi rahat mili thi, par ab woh phir se nikalne ki koshish kar raha hai. 2014 mein High Court ne bhi ek decision diya tha, par ab woh uske khilaaf phir se lad raha hai. Main toh bas insaaf chahti hoon, sir. Yeh aadmi mujhe phir se pareshaan karega, mujhe darr lag raha hai. Kya garib ko kabhi sachcha insaaf nahi milta? Aap please kuch kijiye, sir, usko rokiye. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai.

Sir ji, main Kishore Mahto hoon. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, mera bada bhai Adalat Mahto na, 11.05.2013 ko shaam ke lagbhag 3:45 baje, Prahlad aur Nandu ke saath humare Kotwa Kapardhika gaon ke pashchim mein jo aam ka bagicha hai, wahan gaya tha. Vo log stool banane ke liye aam ke ped ki daali kaat rahe the. Pata nahi kya hua, wahan kuch logon ne mere bhai ko buri tarah se maara hai! Uski haalat theek nahi hai Daroga ji. Abhi Adalat ko Bagaha Sub-divisional Hospital ke Emergency Ward mein bharti karwaya hai. Maine khud uski haalat dekhi hai, usko bohot chot lagi hai. Meri madad kijiye, un logon ko pakadiye jinhone mere bhai par hamla kiya hai.

Sir, Ram Ram! Main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri suniye please. Woh Mathura waala case yaad hai? S.T. No. 129 of 1989, jismein Radhey Shyam, Om Prakash, Ram Dass, Nirottam aur Shanker ko saza hui thi. Pata chala hai ki woh log ab appeal kar rahe hain! Sir, itni mushkil se toh humein insaaf mila tha, Shri H.S. Sharma Judge sahab ne faisla sunaya tha 1991 mein. Ab yeh kya naya chakkar hai? Mujhe toh darr lag raha hai ki kahin unhe chhod na dein. Meri family ne kitna suffer kiya hai, aur ab woh phir se case khol rahe hain. Sir, please dekhiye, mujhe toh lag raha hai meri zindagi phir se mushkil mein pad jaayegi. Meri request hai, kuch karo na sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Jin logon pe maine itni mushkil se complaint darj karwai thi, ab woh log bade-bade vakeel le aaye hain. Unhone toh seedha court mein application daal di hai ki mera poora case hi khatam karwa do! Jo charge-sheet bani thi na, wo number 593, 2023 ki, 25 August wali... woh bhi hatwana chahte hain. Aur jo judge sahab ne meri baat sunke notice liya tha, usko bhi band karwana chahte hain. Sir, itni mehnat se jo case bana, kya woh sab aise hi barbaad ho jayega? Agar unhone ye sab karwa liya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Itne saalon se hum bas insaaf ka intezaar kar rahe hain. Woh jo do gunehgar the na, jinhone woh sab kiya tha, unka case ab jaake thoda aage badha hai. Pehle chote judge sahab ne saare papers wagera diye aur bola ki ye mamla toh bohot serious hai, isko bade judge ke paas bhejna padega. Phir Dhemaji ke bade judge sahab ne 2 April 2015 ko un dono accused ko bulaya, unke aur hamare vakil ki baatein suni aur unpar charges laga diye. Sir, unpar murder (302), kidnapping (364), chori (379) aur sabne milkar kiya (34) ka ilzaam laga hai. Jab yeh charges unhe padhkar sunaye gaye, tab bhi unke chehre par koi sharam nahi thi. Meri bas yahi guzaarish hai ki ab jaldi se unko saza mile, Sir.

Sir, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Main aapko batane aaya hoon ki jo mera case tha na, woh Dhemaji ke Judicial Magistrate sahib ne, saare kaagaz dekhne ke baad (Section 207 Cr.P.C. ke hisaab se), ab bade Sessions Judge sahib ke paas bhej diya hai, kyuki unko laga yeh maamla bahut gambhir hai. 02.04.2015 ko unhone order kiya tha. Aaj jab woh dono gunehgar, jinhone meri zindagi barbaad ki hai, Judge sahib ke saamne aaye aur dono taraf ke vakeelon ne apni baat rakhi, toh unpe charges frame ho gaye hain, sir! Mere bachche ko uthane (364 IPC), maarne (302 IPC), aur chori (379 IPC) karne ke, sab milkar (34 IPC) kiya unhone. Judge sahib ne unhe sab ilzaam padhkar samjhaye hain. Ab bas aap logon se hi insaaf ki aas hai, sir.

Sir, main bahut dukhi man se aapke paas aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai na, bahut saalon se. Jo do logon pe maine complain ki thi, unki appeal chal rahi thi court mein. Abhi pichle mahine, mujhe pata chala ki unmein se ek accused, Sheo Shanker Misra, woh toh mar gaya! Aur uski appeal bhi khatam ho gayi hai, order bhi aa gaya hai 30 August 2018 ka. Meri toh umeed hi toot gayi hai, sir. Itne saalon se main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, court mein bas sunwai chalti rehti hai, bade bade vakeel aate hain. Ab jab ek mar gaya toh kya mere case ka kya hoga? Ab toh bas ek hi accused bacha hai. Aap hi batao, kya mujhe kabhi justice milega ya nahi? Main bahut pareshaan hoon, sir. Please, kuch help karo meri.

Sahab, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aayi hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai jail mein. Maine High Court mein bhi petition daali hai, kyunki mujhe ab apni premature release chahiye. Kitne saal ho gaye hain, sir! Maine 16.5 saal se bhi zyada, ab toh 17 saal se bhi zyada apni saza kaat li hai. Sarkar ki policy mein clear hai ki mujhe ab chhod dena chahiye. Jitna time required hota hai na, usse toh main kahi zyada jail mein guzaar chuki hoon. Phir bhi pata nahi kyun, mujhe abhi tak riha nahi kar rahe. Meri bas yahi ek appeal hai, please meri suniye aur meri madad kijiye. Mujhe meri azaadi wapas chahiye, main aur wait nahi kar sakti.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai. Court ne humein, mujhe aur Hemant ko, convict kar diya hai. Woh keh rahe hain ki humne tez dhaar hathiyar (sharp-edged weapon) se chot pahunchayi thi, par sir, yeh toh pura jhooth hai! Kisi ko bhi sharp weapon se ek bhi chot nahi lagi hai. Medical report mein saaf-saaf likha hai ki jitni bhi injuries hain, woh sab moti ya bhari cheez (hard and blunt object) se lagi hain. Koi sharp-edged weapon ka nishan tak nahi hai. Phir bhi humein aise case mein phasaya ja raha hai. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi sir. Please kuch toh karo, yeh toh seedhi-seedhi nainsafi hai hamare saath.

Sir, main Ganeshram ke liye aaya hoon. Aapko pata hai, 2010 mein Vidisha court mein jo case chala tha, Sessions Trial No. 02, usmein woh log jinhone mere Ganeshram ko maara tha, unko 2011 mein conviction hua tha. Second Additional Sessions Judge (Fast Track Court) ne unko Section 302/149 IPC ke तहत life imprisonment aur 1000 rupaye fine ki saza di thi. Woh toh Ganeshram ka murder aur attempted murder (Section 307/149) mein bhi involved the. Ab sun rahe hain ki woh log appeal file kar rahe hain Section 374(2) CrPC mein, apni saza ko challenge kar rahe hain. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, abhi tak hum us gham se bahar nahi nikle hain, aur ab yeh log phir se hamari takleefein badha rahe hain. Hamari family ko phir se darr lag raha hai. Hum chahte hain ki unki saza barkaraar rahe. Humare liye insaaf bahut zaroori hai, Sir.

Sir, main Firoj Ulla, bahut mushkil se bol pa raha hoon. Mujhe bahut buri tarah se maara gaya hai. Dr. Dwivedi ne bhi dekha tha meri body pe kitni chot lagi thi, bahut injuries thi. Meri aur Amjad bhai ki haalat itni serious thi ki humein turant Suyash Hospital, Indore bheja gaya. Wahan Dr. Ashish Agrawal (PW17) ne mera operation kiya, mere pet mein itni bleeding ho rahi thi ki jaan pe ban aayi thi. Abhi bhi main ICU mein hoon, Sir. Dard se mera bura haal hai, ek pal bhi chain nahi. Meri life danger mein thi, Sir. Please, jinhone bhi yeh kiya hai, unko pakdo aur saza dilao. Mujhe justice chahiye.

Sahab, meri beti Vidyabai ko unke pati Ghanshyam ne maar daala. Sabko pata hai yeh baat. Par police ne kya kiya? Jo meri beti ki saas thi, Shantibai, woh bhi is case mein accused thi, par usko toh court ne 30.11.2004 ko hi chhod diya! Jabki sabko pata hai, meri beti Vidyabai, us Ghanshyam ki biwi thi aur yeh Shantibai uski maa hai. Meri chhoti poti, Sonali, jise hum Guddi bulate hain, woh toh sabse chhoti gawah hai is case ki. Usne apni aankhon se dekha hai sab kuch! Uski maa ko maar diya, aur saas ko chhod diya? Yeh kaisa insaaf hai, Sahab? Humein insaaf chahiye, meri beti ke liye!

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Woh Phoolabai, Kalyan Singh aur Halke hain na, jinpe humne case kiya tha, ab unki appeal chal rahi hai. Lekin, sir, aapko pata hai? Ab yeh Kalyan Singh aur Halke bol rahe hain ki jab unhone humare saath woh haadsa kiya tha, tab woh *chote* the, matlab juvenile the! Aise kaise ho sakta hai, sir? Itna bada zulm kiya, aur ab bachne ke liye age ka bahana bana rahe hain. Mujhe to lagta hai yeh sab jhoot hai, sir. Bas case ko lamba kheenchne aur humein pareshan karne ki koshish hai. Juvenile Justice Board bhi ab inki umar ki jaanch kar raha hai. Hum gareeb log kab tak insaaf ke liye bhatakte rahenge? Meri aap se guzarish hai, please iski theek se jaanch karwaiye, sir. Humara poora future daav pe laga hai.

Daroga ji, main R.R.Venkatapuram ka rehne waala hoon. Woh 6 aur 7 May 2020 ki raat thi na, Visakhapatnam ke paas, humare Gopalapatnam Mandal mein... woh LG Polymers company se kuch gas leak ho gayi thi. Styrene vapour thi woh, unke M6 tank se nikal kar poori hawa mein phail gayi thi. Sir, woh raat humare liye qayamat se kam nahi thi. Meri family, mere bacche, sab darr gaye the. Saans lena mushkil ho gaya tha. Log behosh ho rahe the, idhar-udhar bhaag rahe the. Pure R.R.Venkatapuram aur aas-paas ke areas mein darr ka mahol tha. Humare saath bahut bura hua hai, sir, us raat humari zindagi tabah ho gayi thi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, please meri baat suniye. Main Vimlabai hoon, mere pati Ramesh ab nahi rahe. Woh deceased hain. Gorelal unke apne pita hain, aur Shivcharan unka saga bhai hai. Sir, yeh Gorelal aur Shivcharan hi Ramesh ke accused hain! Hum teen bhai the, Ramesh sabse bade the. Surendra toh alag rehta hai, par Shivcharan, woh Gorelal ke saath hi Kamlapur gaon mein rehta hai. Haan, woh alag ghar mein rehta tha, par papa Gorelal ke saath hi. Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai, sahab. Inhi logon ki wajah se mere pati... Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main yahan Gadaganj thane mein isliye aayi hoon... aapko yaad hoga, 1998 ka case tha, crime no. 114/98. Ram Manohar ne mere pati ko maara tha, unka khoon kiya tha. Kitne saal lage, kitni mushkil se court ne usko saza sunayi thi. Raebareli ke Additional Sessions Judge ne 2007 mein, Section 302 IPC ke tahat, usko umarqaid di thi. Humne socha tha chalo, ab toh insaaf mil gaya, woh jail mein rahega. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Jisne mere suhaag ko ujada, woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai? Meri aapse request hai, please kuch kijiye. Hum gareeb log hain, humara insaaf mat chhino. Woh bahar aaya toh humein bhi dar hai. Please, Ram Manohar ko jail mein hi rakhiye, humein insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main wohi case ka victim hoon jo Dharmabad Police Station mein 20.7.2010 ko register hua tha, Crime No. 67/2010. Nanded District ka मामला hai. Yaad hai na, woh do gunde log jinhone mujhe maara tha, gaaliyan di thin aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi? Unhone mujhe bahut buri tarah se chot pahunchai thi. Maine badi mushkil se complain ki thi us waqt. Ab mujhe sunne mein aaya hai ki woh log apna case khatam karana chahte hain, quash karana chahte hain. Saab, itne saalon baad, agar woh aise hi chhoot gaye toh humari zindagi dobara mushkil ho jayegi. Mujhe aur meri family ko unse ab bhi darr lagta hai. Please, humein insaaf chahiye, woh log azaad nahi hone chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Dharmabad police station mein, mera ek case file hua tha, Crime No. 67/2010, 20 July 2010 ko. Woh Accused No. 1 aur Accused No. 16 ne mujhe kitna pareshan kiya tha, maara-peeta, dhamkaya tha. Meri jaan ko bhi khatra tha. Unpar 353, 324, 332, 336, 337, 504, 506 jaise bade sections lage the. Aur ab, Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein appeal kar rahe hain ki yeh poora case hi band kar do, charge-sheet bhi hata do. Itni mushkil se toh yeh sab hua tha, aur ab woh log bachna chahte hain. Aise kaise hoga Sir? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh log aise hi chhoot gaye toh log humesha darte rahenge. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main yahan Wazirganj Police Station ke Case Crime No. 219 of 2011 ki peedit hoon. Yaad hai na aapko? Rahul naam ka woh shaks, jisne mere saath kya-kya kiya tha. Woh mere ghar mein ghusa tha, meri izzat pe haath daala tha, mujhe maarne ki koshish ki thi, aur to aur... usne ek murder tak kiya tha! Uske khilaaf Lucknow Sessions Judge ne 30.04.2019 ko order paas kiya tha, jo Sessions Trial No. 215 of 2012 mein tha. Humne socha tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Mera toh dil baitha jaa raha hai. Itne saal baad bhi mujhe chain nahi. Usse saza mili thi, ab woh phir bahar aane ki koshish karega toh hamari jaan ko khatra hai. Please kuch kijiye, sir, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Ludhiana se aaya hoon, aapke paas apni fariyaad leke. Meri family ke saath jo haadsa hua tha 2017 mein, uski FIR No. 252, Police Station Division No.2 mein darj hui thi. Itne saal ho gaye, aur hum insaaf ke liye bhatak rahe hain. 2018 mein, 12 October ko jo Additional Sessions Judge sahib ne order diya, usmein sirf Section 304 IPC aur Section 92 Factories Act ke charges frame hue. Sir, yeh toh bahut kam hai us nuksaan ke aage jo humne jhela hai! Mera toh dil toot gaya hai, itne saal ho gaye, aur abhi tak hum bas court ke chakkar laga rahe hain. Ab humari taraf se jo yeh 'revision petition' jaisa kuch laga hai, usmein bas humari yahi guzaarish hai ki humein poora insaaf mile. Meri suniye, Sir, please.

Sahab, meri baat suniye. Mere pati, Pem Tshering Lepcha, ek accident mein guzar gaye. Main aur meri chhoti beti, hum bilkul akeli ho gaye hain, sir. Humne toh Motor Accident Claims Tribunal mein compensation ke liye case kiya tha. Woh jo gadi ka malik tha aur uski insurance company (jo opposite party thi), unhone hi ab phir se appeal kar di hai. Pehle hi kitni mushkil se woh sab face kiya tha, ab yeh insurance company humein aur meri chhoti beti ko phir se court mein ghasit rahi hai. Humara kya kasoor hai, sir? Mere pati toh chale gaye, aur ab yeh log humein insaaf milne se rok rahe hain. Please kuchh kariye, sir, hum bahut pareshaan hain!

Sir, main aapke paas apni ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, S.C.No.1164/2010. Pata nahi kitne saalon se bas tareekh pe tareekh mil rahi hai. Aur ab, Sir, jisko accused No.2 banaya tha na, wo court mein application de raha hai ki ye saari proceedings hi band kar do! MATLAB kya? Hum gareeb log aise hi marte rahein kya? Insaaf ke liye itna lamba intezaar karein aur ye log case hi khatam karwana chahte hain? Sir, wo 19 aur logon ke saath tha, sabne milke mera nuksaan kiya tha. Ab ek-ek karke sab nikalna chahte hain. Bengaluru mein chal raha hai ye case, main itni mushkil se jaata hoon. Meri sunwai toh hone dijiye, Sir. Agar ye case band ho gaya, toh mujhe kabhi insaaf nahi milega. Meri saari umeed toot jaayegi.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon, 9 July 2009 ki raat thi, kareeb 9:40 baje honge. Main apni motorcycle pe Maujpur mein, Darbar Restaurant ke saamne, Jafrabad 66 Ft. Road se nikal raha tha. Sir, tabhi ek bus, jiska number DL-1PA-7653 tha, uska driver Ashok Kumar, bilkul laparwahi se, paagalon ki tarah chala raha tha. Usne meri bike ko itni zor se takkar maari ki main udhar hi gir gaya. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi Sir! Meri motorcycle bhi puri damage ho gayi. Mujhe bohot gehri chot lagi hai. Uski galti thi Sir, usne rash drive kiya. Please Sir, uske khilaaf sakht action lo, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Shivam Pathak. Meri ek complaint hai. 29 May 2014 ki baat hai, raat ke kareeb 10:20 baje the. Main Ramprastha Red Light, Road no. 56, Vivek Vihar pe apni Atlas cycle pe jaa raha tha. Tabhi ek DTC bus, jiska number DL-1PC-8253 tha, uska driver Nand Lal itni laaparwahi aur tezi se chala raha tha ki usne sidhe meri cycle ko takkar maar di. Maine socha aaj meri jaan pakka chali jayegi. Usne meri cycle ko hit kiya aur main gir gaya. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, Sir. Uss driver ne meri jaan khatre mein daal di thi. Aap please us driver Nand Lal ke khilaaf action lo. Aise logon ki wajah se aur bhi kitne log marte hain road pe. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad karo.

Sahab, main Silvanus Tirki ki biwi hoon. Mera pati... bechara, 10 December 2013 ko humein chhod ke chala gaya. Woh M/s Salasar Steel & Power Ltd., Gerwani, Raigarh mein kaam karta tha. Sir, woh wahan broiler ke Drakchain Feeder ki safai kar raha tha. Uski duty subah 9:30 baje shuru hoti thi. Us din, dopahar ke kareeb 12 baje, woh kahin pani peeke wapas aa raha tha, aur phir... phir woh zinda nahi bacha. Kya hua, kaise hua, humein kuch nahi pata. Sirf itna jaante hain ki mera aadmi kaam pe gaya aur wapas nahi aaya. Humein insaaf chahiye, Sahab. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi. Us company ki galti hai, unhone mere pati ko maar diya. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Kanwarjeet Singh Batth. Meri baat suniye, sir. Main bahut dukhi hoon. Woh jo ACMM saab ka order aaya hai na, 25 February ko, usne toh meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pura galat order hai woh! Meri toh koi galti nahi hai, aur mujhe bekaar mein fansaya ja raha hai ismein. Us order ki wajah se mujhe kitni takleef ho rahi hai, main bata nahi sakta. Maine toh apni taraf se High Court tak petition daali hai ki is order ko cancel kiya jaaye, isko hatao yahan se. Par abhi tak kuch hua nahi hai. Aap hi batao, main kahan jaaun? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri madad kijiye, please.

Sir, main kya bataun? Mere pati ko maara gaya tha. Jo accused tha, usko court ne saza toh di, par Section 304 Part II IPC ke तहत. Humein lagta hai ki usko aur kadi saza milni chahiye thi, kyunki mere pati ki jaan gayi hai. Aur jo muawaza (compensation) humein mila hai na, woh bhi itna kam hai ki hamara guzara kaise hoga, sir? Mera aur mere bete ka kya hoga? Upar se, ab woh criminal Court of Session, Kozhikode mein apni saza ke khilaaf appeal bhi kar raha hai! Usne toh saaf-saaf galti ki thi, phir bhi woh chahta hai ki usko kuch na ho. Yeh bahut galat hai sir. Humein insaaf chahiye aur sahi muawaza bhi. Please hamari madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko bas yahi batane aaya hoon. Malviya Nagar Police Lines mein jo 7th Battalion hai na, wahan ek constable hai, Delhi Police ka. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Woh log Rapid Interception Squad (RIS) mein hain, jinki teen ghante ki duty hoti hai. Sir, main apne kaam se jaa raha tha, usne mujhe bina wajah roka. Uske saath aur bhi the, jaise ek Kalu Ram tha, aur Udham Singh type ke naam bhi sune maine. Un sabne milkar mujhe pareshan kiya, bina kisi baat ke. Ek toh Dinesh naam ka bhi tha, jo ab nahi hai. Sir, yeh log police wale hain aur aam janata ko aise satate hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main bahut pareshaan hoon, sir.

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitna pareshan hoon. Kitne din se main court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. Meri jo complaint thi, uspar ek 'Application No. 2160/2025' lagi thi. Socha tha ab kuch hoga, mujhe insaaf milega. Par aaj pata chala ki meri 'Criminal Application disposed of' ho gayi hai. Matlab kya hua, sir? Mera lawyer toh bola tha ki P.P. (Public Prosecutor) ko assist karne ki application allow ho gayi hai, par meri main application ka kya? Judge sahab ne sabki suni, 'applicant' ke lawyer ki, 'State' ke 'APP' ki, sabki. Magar mujhe lag raha hai meri baat theek se kisi tak pahunchi hi nahi. Ye itne saare judgments aur laws hain na, 4 crore hon ya 400, mera toh sar ghoom gaya hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai.

Sir, main wohi Suman (ya Ramu) hoon, jiska woh case chal raha hai. Aaj court mein sunwai thi meri. Mera wahan zyada kuch samajh toh nahi aata, par maine suna ki P.P. (Public Prosecutor) ko help karne ke liye jo ek application thi na, woh manzoor ho gayi hai. Matlab, ab koi hamari taraf se aur madad karega kya, Sir? Mera jo vakil hai, woh bhi bola, aur sarkari vakil saab bhi wahan the. Yeh Application No.2160/2025 kya hai, aur 'disposed of' ka kya matlab hai, mujhe theek se samajh nahi aaya. Bas itna pata chala ki kuch toh ho gaya hai. Sir, ab mera case aage kaise badhega? Kya ab mujhe insaaf jaldi milega? Bohut din ho gaye hain, main bohut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Dekhiye na, mere saath kitna bada haadsa ho gaya. Woh jo construction site pe incident hua tha na, jismein ek jaan chali gayi aur kitne log zakhmi hue the... usmein ab yeh log case ko dabane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Woh jo Accused No. 3 hai, woh architect hai, uski galti thi sab. Uski laaparwahi ki wajah se hi toh yeh sab hua. Humara kitna nuksaan hua hai, meri family ne kya-kya nahi dekha. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur ab yeh log bol rahe hain ki unka koi kasoor nahi. Unhone logon ki jaan khatre mein daali, chot pahunchayi, aur ab toh woh maut ke zimmedar hain. Aap please help kijiye sir. Mujh jaise gareeb ko insaaf dilwaiye. Unki wajah se mujhe itna dard mila hai, unko saza milni chahiye. Mera case, woh C.C. No. 1937/2022, usmein sahi se inquiry honi chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera ek court case chal raha hai. Opponent party ne toh itne saare lawyers rakhe hain – Mr. Chandel hain, Mr. Thakur hain, Mr. Oraon bhi hain. Aur mere liye bas Mr. Kashif Shakeel hain. Hamare Judge sahab, Hon'ble Mr. Justice Parth Prateem Sahu hain. Sir, pehle ek order aaya tha, uski wajah se mujhe bahut takleef ho rahi hai. Ab hum usi order ko challenge kar rahe hain, yeh criminal revision ka case hai. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, Sir. Woh order galat tha, meri toh zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Aap kuch madad karo, please.

Sir, meri baat suno please. Hum gareeb log hain, badi mushkil se insaaf mila tha. 1996 ki baat hai, Cuttack mein mere bhai ko usne maar diya tha, aur mere papa ko bhi maarne ki koshish ki thi. Case chala tha, S.T. Case No.78 tha woh. Court ne usko Section 302 aur 307 IPC ke under life imprisonment di thi. Abhi suna hai woh appeal kar raha hai, phir se case chalega? Sir, hum toh darr rahe hain. Itne saal baad, kya phir woh baahar aa jayega? Meri bas yahi request hai, usko jo saza mili hai, woh barkaraar rahe. Humein apna insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon, meri madad kijiye. Ye log phir se wahi harkatein kar rahe hain jo Court ne pehle hi mana kiya tha. Mera vakil bhi bol raha hai ki hamara yeh case toh already ek purane judgment se cover ho chuka hai, jo 28 November 2022 ko aaya tha. Usmein saaf saaf likha hai ki aisa nahi ho sakta. Phir bhi ye log mujhe tang kar rahe hain, meri baat sunne ko taiyar nahi. Main kitni baar Court ke chakkar lagaoon, sir? Ek aam aadmi hoon, mera sab kaam ruka hua hai. Aap hi bataiye main kya karoon? Mujhe insaaf dilwaiye, sir. Meri file mein bhi sab documents hain, jo court ne dekhe the.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh saari ummeed hi toot gayi hai. Aapko yaad hai, woh Crime No. 69 of 2010 wala case? Jiski wajah se S.C.No.1164 of 2010 court mein chal raha tha, Bengaluru ke 69th Additional City Civil and Sessions Judge ke paas. Kitne saal se main bas isi din ka intezaar kar raha tha ki mujhe insaaf milega. Aaj pata chala hai ki woh proceedings hi quash ho gayi hain! Matlab, sab khatam? Meri itni mehnat, itna paisa, itne chakkar kaatne ka koi matlab nahi? Sir, yeh toh bahut badi na-insaafi hai mere saath. Ab main kya karoon? Mujhe toh kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mera toh sab kuch lut gaya hai. Woh log, jin logon ne mere bete ko maara, unhone abhi court mein case file kiya hai. S.C. No. 1164/2010 hai uska number, jismein mere bete ki jaan gayi thi aur meri biwi ko bhi bahut gehri chot lagi thi. Sections 304, 338 aur 34 ke तहत un par case chal raha hai.
