Ab woh log chahte hain ki yeh proceedings khatam ho jayein, bachna chahte hain. Kempe Gowda naam ka wajeel unki taraf se aaya hai. Daroga ji, woh mere bete ke kaatil hain! Unhone jaan le li mere laal ki, aur meri biwi ko bhi hospital mein bharti karaya tha. Insaaf kab milega? Main hath jodkar kehta hoon, unhe bachne mat do. Hum gareeb hain toh kya hua, humein bhi insaaf ka haq hai. Unko saza milni chahiye, warna aisi cheezein hoti rahengi.

Sir, main apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Mera ek bahut purana case chal raha hai, S.C.No.1164/2010. Usme un logo ne mere apne ko bahut buri tarah se chot pahunchayi thi, jaan tak le li thi, Section 304, 338 aur 34 IPC ke तहत मामला दर्ज hua tha. Ab, sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log Court mein jaake, is proceedings ko challenge kar rahe hain. Matlab, kya unko koi saza nahi milegi? Kya meri family ko kabhi insaaf nahi milega? Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai us incident ke baad. Aap please kuch kijiye sir. Meri suno aur unko unke kiye ki saza dilwao. Hum gareeb log hain, humara kaun hai.

Sir, suniye na, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera woh case tha na, S.C. No.1164/2010, jisme mere bete ko unhone itni buri tarah chot pahunchai thi, aur uski jaan tak chali gayi thi. Woh 338 aur 304, Section 34 IPC ka mamla tha, jiski wajah se mere ghar mein sab kuch tabah ho gaya. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein apne khilaf chal rahe proceedings ko challenge kar rahe hain. Kehte hain ki baaki accused ko toh pehle hi relief mil gayi hai, toh unko bhi milni chahiye. Yeh kya mazak hai Sir? Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi, aur woh log aise hi bach jayenge? Unki wajah se mujhe itna dukh mila hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir. Woh log zimmedaar hain, please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, S.C.No.1164/2010, jismein un logon ne mere apne ko bahut buri tarah maara tha, itna gehra chot pahunchaya ki jaan pe ban aayi. Isi liye unpar IPC ke section 304, 338 aur 34 ke तहत case darj hua tha. Par ab Sir, woh log court mein jaakar keh rahe hain ki yeh proceedings galat hain, is case ko hi challenge kar rahe hain! Kya aisa ho sakta hai? Hamare saath itna bada zulm hua hai, aur woh ab bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain? Mujhe nyay chahiye Sir, unhe saza milni chahiye. Meri family bahut pareshan hai.

Sir, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Pata nahi kya hoga mere case ka. Woh jo LXIX Additional City Civil and Sessions Judge, Bengaluru mein chal raha hai na, Crime No.69/2010 (S.C.No.1164/2010)... Usmein, mera beta tha, jise un zalimon ne milkar itna maara ki pehle toh serious injury hui (Section 338 IPC), aur phir woh bach nahi paya (Section 304 IPC). Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log, jinhone yeh sab kiya, woh case hi khatam karwana chahte hain, quash karwana chahte hain proceedings. Sir, agar aisa ho gaya toh humein kya insaaf milega? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Meri family ka kya hoga? Please Sir, un logon ko saza milni hi chahiye. Insaaf chahiye mujhe!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon. Woh log... jinhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di, jinhone mere apne ko itna takleef di, unke khilaaf jo case chal raha hai na, S.C.No.1164/2010, usko ab woh challenge kar rahe hain court mein. Yeh Section 304, 338 IPC ke तहत मामला hai, Sir, kya unhe saza nahi milegi? Woh jaan-bujhkar humein takleef dete hain aur ab woh chahte hain ki yeh case hi khatam ho jaaye. Unko kaise chhod sakte hain? Pehle hi humne itna kuch saha hai, aur ab woh log nikalna chahte hain. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh log aise bachkar nahi nikalne chahiye, unko unke kiye ki saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main wahi insaan hoon jiske apne ki jaan chali gayi thi us haadse mein. Bade mushkil se toh police ne case banaya aur court mein charge-sheet file hui thi Section 304 IPC ke under. Aur fir, jab 15.09.2022 ko us gunehgar pe charge frame hua, toh laga ki ab insaaf milega, meri rooh ko thoda sukoon aayega. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh kameena, woh accused, us order ko challenge kar raha hai! Kya matlab hai iska? Kya woh phir se bach jayega? Humari toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur woh abhi bhi law ke chakkar mein ghoom raha hai. Please Sir, aap kuch kijiye. Woh Section 304 ka charge bilkul sahi hai. Humein insaaf dilaiye, usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aaj bahut pareshan hoon, isliye aapke paas aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai na, woh mera case SC No. 1164/2010? Jisme un logon ne mera sab kuch cheen liya tha, meri toh poori duniya ujad di thi. Unpe Section 304 aur 338 IPC laga tha, itna bada gunaah kiya tha unhone. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh log court mein jaakar is case ki proceedings ko hi challenge kar rahe hain! Matlab, unko lagta hai ki woh aise hi bach jayenge? Maine itna dard saha hai, mere ghar mein sab barbaad ho gaya hai, aur woh log abhi bhi apni chaal chal rahe hain. Please Daroga ji, meri madad kijiye. Unke paas bade-bade vakeel hain, woh case ko kamzor karna chahte hain. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, woh jo bhi hain, unhe saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai is case mein. Bengaluru ke XLI Additional Chief Metropolitan Magistrate court mein mera ek case chal raha hai, C.C.No.6755/2020. Sir, humne is proceedings ko challenge kiya hai kyunki humein lagta hai ki yeh sab galat ho raha hai, humare saath insaaf nahi ho raha. Humara vakeel, Murthy D. Naik saab, ne bhi court mein apni baat rakhi hai. Aur jo doosri party hai, unke sarkari vakeel, Shankar H.S. HCGP, unhone bhi apni side boli hai. Par sir, sach bataun toh, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki yeh sab kab khatam hoga. Main bas chahta hoon ki mujhe jaldi se jaldi nyay mile aur yeh proceedings band ho jaayen. Meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai Bengaluru court mein, S.C. No. 1164/2010, jiska Crime No. 69/2010 hai. Usmein mere bete ko galti se takkar maari thi, aur uski death ho gayi thi. Ab itne saalon baad bhi, jinhone yeh kiya, woh log court mein is case ko challenge kar rahe hain. Meri suno sir, humne kitna dukkh jhela hai. IPC ke Section 338 aur 304, Section 34 ke तहत un par case bana hai. Woh log chahte hain ki yeh case band ho jaaye. Main justice chahta hoon, sir. Please, unko bhaagne mat do. Meri family ko insaaf dilao.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, isliye aapke paas aaya hoon. Meri ek court case chal rahi thi, aur usme sab ne bola ki pehle jo Crl.P.No.4726/2012 ka faisla aaya tha 21 October 2021 ko, usse hi mera issue solve ho jayega. Sab ko laga tha ab sab theek ho jayega. Lekin, Sir, ye sab hone ke baad bhi, police ne jo charge sheet file ki hai, usme mujhe hi Accused No. 18 bana diya! Main to is case mein petitioner tha, mujhe kaise accused bana sakte hain? Ye toh bohot galat hai, Sir. Aur ek Suresh Kumar ke khilaaf alag se additional charge sheet bhi file hui hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, mere saath ye kya ho raha hai. Main to nyay chahta tha, aur ab main hi phans gaya. Meri madad kijiye, please!

Sir, main aaj aapke paas bahut dukhi hoke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Aapko yaad hoga, 13 February 2016 ko Bengaluru mein ek road accident hua tha, dopahar 3 baje ke aas-paas. Usmein mera eklaauta beta chala gaya tha. Woh driver, jisne itni tezi se gaadi chalayi aur mere bete ko takkar maarke bhaag gaya tha, uske khilaaf police ne case kiya tha. IPC 279 (rash driving) aur 304A (death by negligence) jaise sections lage the us par, aur Motor Vehicles Act ke bhi. Ab pata chala hai ki woh accused No.2, jisne mera beta maara, court mein case khatam karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Usne meri poori duniya cheen li aur ab woh saza se bachna chahta hai? Hum gareeb log hain, kahan jaayenge insaaf ke liye? Meri aapse hath jodkar request hai, please usko bachne mat dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Bas insaaf.

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Udaipur mein mere saath jo hua na, woh police ne toh ignore hi kar diya. Unhone toh bas negative Final Report de di, bolte hain kuch hua hi nahi! Meri suni hi nahi. Maine toh 10.11.1998 ko Magistrate sahib ke paas protest petition bhi daali thi, ki police galat report de rahi hai. Lekin unhone meri appeal reject kar di aur police ki baat maan li. Socho, main kitna dukhi hua. Phir main Sessions Judge ke paas gaya, socha wahan se toh insaaf milega. Lekin unhone bhi meri revision petition 16.4.1999 ko dismiss kar di. Sir, ab main kya karoon? Kahan jaaun? Meri toh koi sunta hi nahi. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap hi batao, ab kya hoga?

Sahab, main Jaan Mohammad, Kalyani Steel mein ek Senior Technician tha. Meri suniye, 7 March 2020 ki raat, theek 12 baje, main factory mein kaam kar raha tha. Wahan jo Rolling Mill hai na, uski machine chal rahi thi aur main usi ke bilkul paas khada tha. Pata nahi kaise, mera dhyan hata, aur mera ulta haath us chalte hue machine mein ghus gaya. Itni buri tarah se laga... dard se meri cheekh nikal gayi, sahab! Meri haddiyan chur-chur ho gayin, itni gehrai se chot lagi hai. Uske baad mujhe turant hospital le gaye, bahut ilaaj bhi chala, par koi fayda nahi hua. Ab toh meri zindagi khatam hai, sahab. Main ab aur nahi jhel paunga. Meri family ka kya hoga?

Sahab, main aapko meri takleef batane aaya hoon. Baat hai 17 August 2014 ki, raat ke kareeb 10 baje. Ring Road par, Nigam Bodh Ghat ke paas, Kashmere Gate area mein. Woh Rishi Kumar tha, ek Mahindra Quanto (DL-7CM-1368) chala raha tha. Usne meri puri duniya ujaad di, sahab! Woh itna tezi se aur laprwahi se gaadi chala raha tha, pakka drunk tha. Usne mere apne ko itni buri tarah takkar maari ki meri zindagi hi palat gayi. Mujhe abhi bhi woh din yaad aata hai toh rooh kaanp jaati hai. Usko IPC 304/308 aur Motor Vehicle Act 185 ke तहत saza milni hi chahiye. Please, mujhe insaaf dilao, sahab. Mera toh sab kuch chala gaya us din.

Sir, mujhe aapki madad chahiye, meri toh zindagi hi mushkil mein aa gayi hai. Aaj subah kareeb 10 baje ki baat hai, 20 August 2012. Main GTK Road par, Khad Plant Office ke paas, Khatta Bhalswa mein tha. Achha bhala ja raha tha ki ekdum se ek tezz gaadi ne mujhe takkar maar di. Main toh gir gaya, sir. Bahut chot lagi hai mujhe, mera pair ghum gaya hai lagta hai. Dard se bura haal hai mera. Woh driver dekhta tak nahi ruka, seedha bhaag gaya. Main uski gaadi ka number theek se nahi dekh paaya. Please sir, usko dhoondho aur saza dilao. Meri family kitni pareshan hogi ab. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Krishan Mohan Pathak ki biwi bol rahi hoon. Meri suniye, sir! Woh din, Narela mein... ek tempo wala, uska number tha HR-69-3382, pata nahi kaise chala raha tha! Itni tezi se, itni laparwahi se ki mera aadmi, Krishan Mohan, road pe chal raha tha aur usko takkar maar di. Mera pati wahin spot pe khatam ho gaya, sir! Woh tempo wala, Ajay naam hai uska, usne ek khade truck (HR-46B-1352) ko bhi maara. Uske helper Jasbir ko bhi bahut chot lagi hai. Sir, mera to ghar ujad gaya. Woh mera sahara tha. Us tempo driver ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Kripya karke usko saza dilwaiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri suniye, please.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kya ho gaya. Kal, 17 June 2011 ko, raat ke 10:15 baje the, main Alipur se By Pass ki taraf ja raha tha apni bike pe, DL-8SAF-160 number hai meri bike ka. Ek Punjab Roadways ki bus, jiska number PB-08BR-9321 tha, woh itni tezi aur lapravahi se aa rahi thi, jaise road uske baap ki ho. Us driver ne bilkul bhi parwah nahi ki kisi ki jaan ki. Usne seedhe meri bike ko takkar maar di, Sir. Main sadak pe gir gaya, meri jaan nikalte nikalte bachi. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, bahut dard ho raha hai. Woh bus wala mujhe kuchalta hua nikal gaya hota toh? Kripya us driver ke khilaaf kadi se kadi kaarvayi karein. Meri bike bhi toot gayi hai, Sir. Mera kya hoga?

Sir, main bohot pareshaan hoon, isliye yahan aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai! 16 January 2014 ki baat hai, shaam ke 6:45 PM the. Main Bhorgarh main Road pe Singhla market ke paas apne gaon Bhorgarh mein hi tha. Achanak se ek tractor (DL-1E-2175) aaya aur usne itni gandi tarah se meri bike ko hit kiya. Woh tractor wala itni rash aur negligent tarike se chala raha tha ki meri jaan hi ja sakti thi. Mujhe bohot chot lagi hai, Sir. Aur uski toh insurance bhi nahi thi! Aise log bina insurance ke, bina kisi darr ke road pe chalte hain aur logon ki jaan lete hain. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe un logon se insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main Ram Sanjivan. Meri family ke saath ek bahut bura haadsa hua hai. Baat hai 30 April 2017 ki, shaam ko saade 6 baje ke kareeb. Hum log 80 foota road pe, SRHC hospital ke paas red light pe the. Meri biwi Sundra aur hamara bachcha Mukesh bhi cycle par the. Ek Santro car, silver colour ki, jiska number DL 11 CA 0278 tha, woh itni tez aur laaparwahi se chala raha tha driver, ki usne meri cycle ko takkar maar di. Takkar itni zor se lagi ki humari cycle footpath se takra gayi. Hum teeno ko bahut chot lagi hai, Sir. Kripya karke us driver ke khilaaf action lo Sir. Humein insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera to sab kuch barbaad ho gaya. Yeh baat hai 5 October 2015 ki, shaam ke kareeb 3:40 baje the. Hum Gangwal hospital ke saamne, Singhu Border se Narela waali road pe khade the. Achanak se ek safed rang ki Bolero gaadi, jiska number DL 8C AK 8129 tha, bilkul paagalpan se chala raha tha uska driver. Sir, usne itni tez aur laparwahi se chalaya ki meri aankhon ke saamne mere Tasmeer ko takkar maar di. Bechara Tasmeer! Usse itni gehri chot lagi ki woh usi waqt... woh zakhmon se ladte ladte apni jaan de baitha. Meri to duniya hi ujaad gayi, sir. Aap insaaf dilwaaiye mujhe, please.

Sir, main Ramesh Chand ki patni hoon. Main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere pati Ramesh Chand ke saath kya hua. Gyarah December, do hazaar nau ko subah das bees baje ki baat hai. Woh Narela mein Bhorgarh ke main market mein, Shiv mandir ke paas, apni bike (DL 8SAD 5278) par jaa rahe the. Tabhi ek tempo (HR 38K 7293) wala itni tezi aur laparwahi se aaya ki usne unhe takkar maar di. Meri aankhon ke saamne unko chot lagi, Sir, aur woh wahin mar gaye. Mera sab kuch chhin gaya hai. Us tempo wale ki galti ki wajah se aaj mera suhaag ujad gaya. Please, us driver ke khilaaf action lo aur mujhe insaaf dilao.

Daroga Ji, meri baat suniye. Main Uday Shankar Pandey. Sir, woh 10 June 2014 ki raat thi, kareeb 10 baje. Main Narela mein Railway Fatak ke paas, FCA Godown ke saamne se jaa raha tha, bilkul theek chal raha tha main. Aur ek motorcycle wala, uska number tha DL-SE-5033, woh itni tez aur laparwahi se chala raha tha ki usne seedha aakar mujhe takkar maar di! Mujhe itni buri tarah lagi hai, bahut chot aayi hai mere shareer par. Uski galti thi, Sir, woh bilkul galti se chala raha tha. Meri koi galti nahi thi. Usko pakdo Daroga Ji, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi. Aaj se theek 23 April 2012 ki baat hai, subah ke lagbhag 10 baje. Mera chhota beta Mazir... woh Bhalswa Dairy mein, janwaro ke hospital ke paas tha. Sir, ek tempo wala, uska number DL 1LE 8716 tha, itni tezi aur laparwahi se chala raha tha ki usne mere bacche ko takkar maar di. Mazir wahin gir gaya, usko bahut gehre zakhm aaye. Humne bahut koshish ki, par wo bach nahi paya, Sir... mera beta mar gaya. Us tempo waale ne meri khushiyan cheen li. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, usko saza milni chahiye, warna aisi galti koi aur karega. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh zindagi kharab ho gayi hai is chakkar mein. Woh jo Ashok Pandey tha, jiske paas license wala hathiyar tha, use SI Zora Singh ne pakda bhi tha aur license Gorakhpur se verify bhi hua tha. Meri aankhon ke saamne hua sab! Phir mera jo saara saboot tha, woh Constable Rambir 6 April 2011 ko FSL Rohini le gaya tha. Itna time ho gaya, ab tak kya hua us report ka? HC Phool Singh ne bhi toh register mein dikhaya tha ki malkhane mein jama hua tha sab, phir FSL gaya. Itna paperwork, itni police ki kaarwai, Sir! Aur meri FIR toh Constable Jitender Kumar ne 26 January 2011 ko hi computer pe type karke de di thi mujhe. Saalon ho gaye Sir, par mujhe ab tak insaaf nahi mila. Bas yahi sab sunne ko milta hai, "ho raha hai, ho jayega". Kab tak, Sir? Kab tak?

Sir, main Deepankar Kumar ki shikayat lekar phir aaya hoon. Meri zindagi usne tabah kar di hai. Meri pehle bhi complaint hai, woh FIR No. 70/13 hai jiska. Woh meri dukaan pe kabza karke baitha hai, jahan se mera poora ghar chalta hai. Jab woh sab hua tha, police ne aake poora site plan banaya tha, har cheez note ki thi. Mere paas meri dukaan ke saare original papers hain, registration certificate bhi hai sab kuch clear hai. Phir bhi woh Deepankar Kumar meri sunta nahi. Sir, aap kuch kijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye, mujhe mera haq wapas dilwa dijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut dukhi baat batane aaya hoon. Please meri suniye. Meri family barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Baat 3 October 2013 ki raat ki hai, kareeb 10 baje. Tughlakabad mein, ICO Depot ke paas, ek truck driver tha, Mahfooz Ahmad uska naam. Usne apni HR-55Q-3244 number ki truck itni rashly aur negligently chalayi ki usne mere pitaji, Mohd. Shamim ko takkar maar di. Sir, mere pitaji wahin spot par hi guzar gaye. Woh humein chhod kar chale gaye, Sir! Woh rash driver mere pitaji ki maut ka zimmedaar hai. Usne humari khushiyan chheen li. Uske khilaaf sakht se sakht action hona chahiye. Mujhe aur meri family ko insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please usko saza dilwaiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri suno, please! Yeh 15 January 2004 ki baat hai, subah ke kareeb saade saat baje the. Hum Jyonti gaon, Delhi mein the. Ek Nand Lal naam ka aadmi tha, woh DL-1GB-2576 number ka tractor itni rashly aur itni negligent tareeke se chala raha tha ki kya bataun! Usne... usne mere bachche Paras ko maar diya, Sir! Woh mar gaya meri aankhon ke saamne. Aur mere Aarif ko bhi bahut simple injuries aayi hain, usko bhi chot lagi hai. Uski galti ki wajah se mera ghar ujad gaya, mera bachcha chala gaya. Aap please usko saza dilwao, Sir. Us Nand Lal ko arrest toh kar liya hai, par mujhe insaaf chahiye mere bachchon ke liye. Meri madad karo, Sir.

Sahab, main aapke paas bahut takleef mein aaya hoon. Mujhe woh din aaj bhi yaad hai, 12 November 2006 ki subah thi, kareeb 3:45 se 4 baje ke beech ka samay. Hum Bandra mein Carter Road par the, South-North Road par. Achank ek gaadi aayi aur footpath par chadh gayi. Sahab, us din meri toh duniya hi khatam ho gayi thi. Meri aankhon ke saamne 7 log mar gaye aur 8 ko itni chot lagi ki aaj bhi dard hai. Woh driver tha Alister Anthony Pareira. Uski wajah se kitne ghar barbaad ho gaye. Ab High Court ne use doshi bhi maan liya hai, lekin humein kab poora insaaf milega? Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki usko uske kiye ki saza mile aur humein thoda chain mil sake.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon, kyunki meri family ke saath jo hua hai, uske liye insaaf nahi mil raha. Mere apne ki jaan gayi hai, aur ab court mein log keh rahe hain ki accused par sirf Section 304A IPC lagega. Sir, ye sirf negligence nahi thi! Jis tarah se unhone mere apne ko maara hai, wo toh seedha-seedha Section 304 Part II IPC ka case banta hai. Ye kya mazaak hai? 2010 se ye case chal raha hai, aur ab tak sirf tareekh pe tareekh mil rahi hai. Meri request hai, please, dekhiye is matter ko. Us aadmi ko uske gunah ki proper saza milni chahiye, usko Section 304A laga kar bachaya nahi ja sakta. Hum gareeb log hain, humein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas ek bohot badi shikayat leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi ka sawal hai, sir. Main woh Delhi Judicial Service ka exam diya tha, yaad hai? 18 December 2011 ko jo prelims exam hua tha. Uska jab result aaya toh High Court ne 276 candidates ko short-list kiya tha. Par sir, mujhe toh lagta hai ki yeh pura process hi galat tha, ismein bohot gadbad hui hai. Maine kitni mehnat ki thi, din-raat ek kar diye the padhai mein. Par mera number hi nahi aaya. Ab pata chal raha hai ki woh High Court ka notice hi galat tha, usko quash karne ki baat chal rahi hai court mein. Agar woh notice hi galat tha, toh meri mehnat ka kya? Mere jaise kitne baccho ka future daav par lag gaya, sir. Please, meri complaint likh lijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye bas.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera toh sab kuch chhin gaya hai uss doctor ki wajah se. Meri jaan chali gayi uski galti se. Mere pati gaye the bas naak theek karwane. Ek chhota sa operation tha, 18 April 1994 ko. Sir, kaun jaanta tha ki woh wapas hi nahi aayenge! Woh Plastic Surgeon tha, bade bade vaade kiye the usne. Par uski laparwahi ne meri duniya ujad di. Usne mere pati ki jaan le li, Sir. Suna hai uska jo saathi doctor tha, woh toh case ke beech mein hi mar gaya. Par yeh main doctor, yeh toh zinda hai na? Ise saza milni chahiye, Sir! Meri family barbaad ho gayi hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, mera toh sab kuch ujad gaya hai. Woh jo mujrim hai, ab court mein jhooth bol raha hai ki usne toh galti se goli chala di, scuffle ho gaya tha! Arre sir, koi scuffle nahi hua tha! Usne toh seedha nishana lagaya tha mere pati par. Woh Sadhu Singh wale case ki baat karte hain, jahan goli shayad aise hi lag gayi hogi, par yahan toh seedha-seedha qatal hai. Hamare gawahon ne bhi wahi bataya hai, PW2 aur PW3 ne saaf-saaf kaha hai ki koi jhagda-jhagdi nahi hui thi. Woh bas bachne ke liye naye-naye bahane bana rahe hain. Yeh toh Section 302 IPC ka hi mamla hai, sir. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, please, unko sahi saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main woh Sangrur Sadar PS mein jo FIR No. 173, dated 11.12.2013 darj hui thi, uske baare mein baat karne aaya hoon. Us din meri poori duniya ulat-pulat ho gayi thi, jab meri apni jaan chali gayi thi us rash driving aur accident mein. Bahut takleef uthai hai humne, Sir. Gaadi ne takkar maari thi, sab damage ho gaya tha aur sabse bada nuksaan toh mere apne ka hua. Itne saal ho gaye hain case chalte chalte, ab court ke chakkar kaat kaat ke hum thak gaye hain. Jo accused party hai na, unse ab finally hamari baat ho gayi hai. Humne aapas mein ek settlement kar liya hai, Sir. Meri family ab aur nahi ladna chahti. Meri request hai ki please ab is FIR ko quash kar do ya jo bhi proceedings chal rahi hain, unko khatam kar do. Bas, ab humein peace chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere saath jo haadsa hua tha, usmein meri poori life disturb ho gayi hai. Woh jo gaadi wala tha, jisne mujhe takkar maari, uske khilaaf police ne pehle IPC mein case banaya tha. Ab sun raha hoon ki court mein yeh baat chal rahi hai ki nahi, IPC galat hai, uspar toh Motor Vehicle Act lagna chahiye tha. Mera dimag ghoom gaya hai yeh sunkar. Main ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe yeh IPC, MV Act, judgments — yeh sab samajh nahi aata. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye. Agar woh galat kanoon laga diya toh kya woh mujrim bach jayega? Sir, aise mein hum jaise logon ka kya hoga? Please kuch kijiye, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, mera ek puraana case tha, woh Criminal Case No. 752 jo 1988 mein file hua tha. Hum kitni mushkil se woh case jeete the, Sir! Bhachau ke judge saab ne 1991 mein us accused ko pakda tha, uske khilaaf judgment (Ex.29) diya tha 22 February, 1991 ko. Mujhe laga tha ab meri mushkilein khatam ho gayin, finally insaaf mila hai. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai woh *accused* phir se court chala gaya hai! Kehta hai usko woh *judgment* pasand nahi aaya. Itne saalon baad, 1991 se aaj tak, humein laga tha sab settle ho gaya. Yeh kya mazak hai, Sir? Hum gareeb log hain, kitni baar aur court ke chakkar kaaten? Meri toh poori zindagi isi mein nikal gayi hai. Please, Sir, kuch kijiye, woh accused humein phir se pareshaan kar raha hai.

Sir, woh jo mera apna... usko maara tha usne, uska case chal raha hai. Judge saahab ne bhi bola ki uspar 302 ka charge lagta hai, murder ka. Par woh kameena abhi bhi mana kar raha hai, keh raha hai usne kuch nahi kiya, use phansaya gaya hai. Arre, jhooth bol raha hai woh! Humne 15-15 gawah pesh kiye hain, kitne saare kaagaz bhi dikhaye hain. Aur woh bolta hai use khet ka pata hi nahi tha, woh wahan nahi tha. Sab jhooth hai uska, sir. Woh gawah jo the na, woh mere rishtedaar the, toh kya hua? Unhone apni aankhon se dekha tha, sach bola tha. Mujhe bas usko saza milni chahiye, sir. Mera dil jal raha hai.

Daroga ji, main ek complaint likhwane aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Pichle hafte jo haadsa hua, usme mera beta ab is duniya mein nahi raha. Us gaadi wale ne jaan-boojh ke mere bete ko takkar nahi maari hogi, mujhe pata hai. Par sir, uski laparwahi... uski rash driving ki wajah se hi toh yeh sab hua hai. Usne bilkul dhyaan nahi diya, itni tezi se chala raha tha. Usne shayad socha bhi nahi hoga ki kisi ki jaan chali jayegi, par uski carelessness ne meri jaan le li. Yeh murder toh nahi tha, par uski galti se mera beta mar gaya. Please, mujhe uske liye insaaf chahiye. Meri toh bas yahi fariyad hai aapse.

Sir, main kya kahoon... meri toh saari umeed toot gayi hai. Kitni mushkil se maine 6-6 gawah ikkatthe kiye the, un sab ne meri taraf se sach bola, pura evidence diya. Aur woh jo apradhi hai na, usne toh bas saaf mana kar diya, bola usko galat phansaya gaya hai. Khud toh usne koi saboot bhi nahi diya apni safai mein! Pehle toh usko saja mili thi, conviction order aaya tha. Par ab sunne mein aaya hai ki Judge sahab ne woh order hi *set aside* kar diya. Matlab, meri mehnat, mere aansu, sab bekar ho gaye? Mujhe toh aisa lag raha hai jaise mere saath dobara zulm hua hai. Aap hi batao sir, main ab kis se insaaf maangoo?

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Main yahan aaya hoon apni problem lekar, aur sunta hoon ki yeh jo kanoon ka system hai na, ismein toh 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments aur laws jude hain. Chaar crore! Mujhe toh sunke hi chakkar aa gaya, Sir. Yeh sab toh bade bade lawyers, professors aur students ke liye bana hai, jo samajhdar log hain. Hum jaise gareeb aur anpadh logon ko toh kuch samajh hi nahi aata, Sir. Meri toh choti si problem hai, aur itna bada jaal dekh ke lagta hai ki insaaf milega bhi ya nahi. Yeh sab itna complicated kyun hai mere liye? Mujhe toh bas seedha-saadha insaaf chahiye. Meri suniye, Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut important baat batane aaya hoon. Mera ek case hai, Peenya Police ne register kiya tha 2000 mein, Crime No. 152/2000. Bangalore ke VII Additional CMM court mein bhi chal raha hai, C.C. No. 16443/2001. Pata hai Sir, woh jo teen accused hain na, 1, 2 aur 3, jinki wajah se woh hadsa hua tha, jinhone meri zindagi kharab kar di thi, woh ab Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga ke case ko quash karwana chahte hain! Matlab, poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain, charge-sheet bhi. Itne saalon se main insaaf ke liye ghoom raha hoon, aur ab yeh log poora mamla hi band karwa denge? Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Accused No. 1 toh bade officer hain, unka influence hai. Agar aisa hua toh mujhe insaaf kabhi nahi milega. Meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main Devidutt ki biwi hoon. Mere pati, Vishwa Karma Engineering Works mein watchman the. Kareeb 20 saal pehle, 14 June 2001 ko, unko factory mein current lag gaya aur woh wahin mar gaye. Unki death factory ke malik ki laparwahi ki wajah se hui thi, yeh sabko pata hai. Par ab woh malik, jinka naam main lena bhi nahi chahti, court mein keh rahe hain ki unki koi galti nahi thi. Unpar jo case bana tha, woh use hatwana chahte hain. Sir, mere pati ki jaan chali gayi, aur ab woh aise nikalna chahte hain? Humein insaaf chahiye. Meri toh duniya ujad gayi. Aap please meri help kijiye. Unko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera ek case hai, Alipore Court mein chal raha tha. 19 March 2016 ko na, Judge sahab ne ek order diya tha. Usme, jo doshi hai, uski discharge ki application reject kar di thi. Matlab, usko case se chhodne se mana kar diya tha. Aur us par bade-bade charges bhi lagaye the, jaise jaan lene ki koshish (304 Part II, 308 IPC) aur fire safety ke mamle bhi. Ab Sir, woh phir se usi order ko challenge kar raha hai. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh insaaf se bach na jaye. Aap meri madad kijiye Sir, main chahta hoon ki yeh mamla jaldi solve ho aur mujhe insaaf mile.

Sir, main kya bataun, woh 25 December 2015 ka din... meri zindagi tabah ho gayi thi. New Friends Colony mein D-1093 plot pe jo construction chal raha tha na, wahan ek bhayanak haadsa hua tha. Meri family ke ek member ki usme jaan chali gayi thi, Sir. Un contractor ki laparwahi thi, yeh toh sab jante hain. Humne tab PS New Friends Colony mein FIR bhi karwai thi, number 619/2015. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh contractor, jiske khilaf case chal raha hai, woh us FIR ko radd karwane ki koshish kar raha hai. Hum garib log kahan jayenge, Sir? Hamari family ko insaaf kaise milega? Meri aapse request hai, please, is case ko band mat hone dijiye. Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Jo Alwar mein Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne faisla sunaya tha na, Section 304A, I.P.C. ke तहत, uske khilaaf humne appeal daali thi, revision petition, jo bhi kehte hain usko. Ab uski sunwai hui hai, sir. Woh jo Judge Sahiba hain, Mrs. Kapur, unhone kaha ki case ki 'merits' mein toh kuch badlav nahi hoga. Matlab, jinhone mere saath galat kiya, unki galti toh pakki hai, yeh toh achhi baat hai. Lekin sir, unhone aage kaha ki 'saza' ke maamle mein shayad kuch ho sakta hai. Koi 'Amar Lal' case ki bhi baat kar rahi thi woh. Sir, meri toh bas yahi guzaarish hai, itna bada nuksan hua hai mera, toh unko poori saza milni chahiye. Aise aadhe-adhure faisle se kya hoga? Meri toh neend ud gayi hai, sir.

Sir, main Jagjeet Singh hoon. Meri suniye, sir! Yeh jo bade bade log hain, itne powerful vakeel leke aaye hain, mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai, sab kuch chhin gaya hai. Main toh bas ek aam aadmi hoon. Achha hua ki mere liye bhi Amarjeet Singh Rakhra ji hain, aur Shashank Singh, Vivek Rai, Anumita Chandra ji jaise log hain jo meri taraf se lad rahe hain. Inhi logon ne mujhe thodi himmat di hai. Court mein itni baatein hoti hain, conferencing, judgments... main toh bas ab insaaf chahta hoon. Bas itna bata do sir, ki mujhe justice kab milega? Aur kitne chakkar kaatne padenge? Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, meri ek complaint hai, please suniye. Bohot takleef ho rahi hai mujhe. Ye "Trial by Fire" naam ki ek web series aane wali hai 13 January ko, digital platforms par. Saab, uss hadse ki yaad hum aaj tak bhula nahi paaye hain, aur ab ye log us par series bana kar hamare zakhmo ko phir se kholna chahte hain. Kya guzarti hogi hum par jab hum ye sab dekhenge? Hum victims hain, hamare parivaaron ne kya kya nahi saha. Meri aapse request hai, please is series ko release hone se rokiye. Hamari feelings ka koi khayal nahi hai inko. Aap hi kuch kar sakte hain. Please isko band karwaiye, sir.

Sir, meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai, aap suniye toh sahi! Yeh jo doctor hain na, jinpe court mein itna bada case chal raha hai... bade qualified hain ji, MBBS hain 1987 se Kolkata Medical College se, 1992 mein DCH bhi kar liya Chittara se. Par inki laparwahi ki wajah se mera haal aisa ho gaya hai. Judge sahab bhi keh rahe hain ki unki sister Amrita Sinha ne draft judgment banaya hai, aur unhe bhi alag se likhna hai kyunki matter important hai. Unke liye matter important hai, mere liye toh meri zindagi hai na! Yeh 4 crore judgments aur laws ka system, pata nahi kab mujhe insaaf dega. Main toh bas justice chahti hoon, sir. Meri toh saari ummeed inhi pe lagi hai.

Sir, woh jo aadmi hai na, jiske khilaaf maine Umra Police Station mein complaint (C.R. No. I-151/2014) file ki thi, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Maine socha tha ab insaaf milega, mera criminal case (No. 58594/14) Surat ke Chief Judicial Magistrate ke paas chal raha hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh accused banda Court mein gaya hai! Bol raha hai ki uske khilaaf jo case chal raha hai, usko band karwa do, usko quash karwa do. Sir, yeh toh galat baat hai na? Maine itni mushkil se himmat karke case kiya tha. Agar mera case hi band ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Uski galti ki saza milni chahiye. Please Sir, mera case band mat hone dijiye. Mujhe justice chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas bohot mushkil mein aaya hoon. Meri zameen... woh teeno log, jinke naam accused number 1, 2 aur 3 hain, inhone meri zameen chura li hai. 13 May, 2014 ko inhone dikhaya ki zameen khareedi hai, par yeh sab jhooth hai, dhokha hai mere saath! Meri toh saari zindagi ki kamai thi woh zameen, mere dada-pardada ki nishani. Ab main kahan jaunga? Meri toh saari ummeed khatam ho gayi hai. Woh log bohot bade aur taqatwar hain, sir. Main unka saamna kaise karunga? Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sahab, main kya bataun aapko meri takleef. Sehore court mein jo case chal raha tha na, usmein woh jo gunehgar hai, usne mere paanch apne logon ki jaan le li thi. Meri family ke paanch members uski wajah se... chale gaye duniya se. Judge sahab ne usko sirf 5 saal ki saza sunayi thi aur har ek jaan ke liye Rs. 5,000 ka fine. Mujhe tab bhi laga tha ki itni kam saza. Aur ab sun raha hoon ki usne high court mein appeal daal di hai. Woh chahta hai ki usko saza na mile ya aur kam ho jaye. Meri toh neendein udd gayi hain, sahab. Humne apne paanch logon ko khoya hai, aur ab usko chhod denge? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab, please kuch kijiye. Hum garib log kahan jayenge?

Sahab, main Arun Kumar ki family se hoon. Mera jo bhai tha Arun, woh police mein constable tha. Uski jaan chali gayi, us Raj Karan Singh ki laparwahi ki wajah se. Woh bhi duty pe tha, sir. Aur uske saath ek aur constable, Narendra Kumar ji, unko bhi us din kitni chot lagi thi! Sir, us Raj Karan Singh ko toh bas dedh saal ki hi saza mili. Kya yehi insaaf hai ek jaan ke badle? Humara ghar ujad gaya, aur usko itni kam saza? Hum tab se bas yahi soch rahe hain, kya humein kabhi poora insaaf milega ya nahi? Mujhe lagta hai, usko aur kadi saza milni chahiye thi, sir.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai iss case ke chakkar mein. Ye Criminal Case No. 60/2008 hai, Tilda ki court mein chal raha hai, aur pata nahi kitne saal ho gaye, 2008 se latka hua hai. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh jo mujrim hai, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, woh phir se court gaya hai, keh raha hai ki mera case hi band kar do! Sir, woh bachna chahta hai, insaaf se bhagna chahta hai! Pehle bhi usne koshish ki thi ki case se chhutkara mil jaye, application di thi, lekin Judge sahab ne 31-7-2008 ko uski application dismiss kar di thi. Aur ab woh Special Judge ke paas bhi gaya hai. Sir, main ek aam aadmi hoon, itne saalon se insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Please, mera mukadma band mat hone dena, usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera chhota Mayank... woh HR-55B-8102 gaadi ki takkar se road pe mara pada tha. Uska sar buri tarah kat gaya tha, sir. Soch bhi nahi sakta ki uski kya halat hui hogi. Us din aur bhi kayi bachche zakhmi hue the, unhe toh log jaldi se hospital le gaye the, par mera Mayank... woh wahin par... khatam ho gaya. Meri duniya ujad gayi hai, sir. Aapne is case mein jo bhi action liya hai, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye jinki laparwahi se mera bachcha mujhse chhin gaya.

Sir, main Jitendra Bhimraj Bijjaya. Meri baat suniye, main toh pura toot chuka hoon. Pata nahi kya karoon. Neeche wali court (subordinate court) se mujhe bilkul insaaf nahi mila. Unhone jo order diya, woh toh saara ulta-pulta tha. Matlab, mere saath galat hua aur woh log bach gaye! Ab aap hi batao, main kahan jaata? Iss liye Gujarat High Court, Ahmedabad tak aana pada hai. Maine Criminal Revision Application daali hai, taaki mujhe nyay mil sake. Itna lamba case chal raha hai, itna paisa aur waqt barbaad ho gaya. Bas itna chahta hoon ki jo mere saath galat kiya hai, unko saza mile. Sir, yeh meri aakhri umeed hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, meri toh neend udd gayi hai. Woh jo mujrim hai na, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, usne ab phir se kuch kar diya hai. Meri toh Criminal Case No. 58594/14 chal rahi hai Chief Judge saab ki adalat mein, usme usko saza milni chahiye. Par ab pata chala hai ki usne ek aur application laga di hai, Section 482 ka kuch bol rahe hain, ki mera case hi band karwa de! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Itni mushkil se toh case shuru hua hai, aur ab woh chahta hai ki poora case hi khatam ho jaaye? Meri toh saari mehnat, mera paisa, mera time sab barbaad ho jayega agar aisa ho gaya toh. Sarkar ka vakeel bhi wahin tha, Mr. J.K.Shah ji, unko bhi pata hai. Please sir, meri madad kijiye, usko case band karne se rokiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main na aaj Samad Hospital ki shikayat karne aaya hoon. Meri maa ka wahan ilaaj chal raha tha, aur un logon ne hamari zindagi barbaad kar di. Woh jo Gynaecologist doctor madam hain na, wohi hospital ki owner hain Attingal mein. Unke husband bhi wahi pe kaam karte hain, anaesthesiologist hain, government job se chhutti leke pura hospital chalate hain. Pehle ek aur Gynaecologist madam thi wahan, ab woh Cosmopolitan mein hain. In sab logon ne milke humein bas loota hai, sir. Na theek se ilaaj kiya, na sahi information di. Meri maa ki haalat inki laparwahi ki wajah se aur kharab ho gayi. Ab mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kahan jaun. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye in logon se, sir.

Sir, main yahan apni dukhi kahani sunane aaya hoon. Meri patni hospital mein admit thi, us doctor ke paas treatment ke liye. Humne socha tha woh theek ho jayegi, usne promises bhi kiye the. Bohut paisa bhi lagaya. Lekin, us doctor ne kya treat kiya, meri patni toh theek hone ki bajaye, mar hi gayi! Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi, Sir. Mujhe pakka lagta hai us doctor ki negligence thi. Usne theek se ilaaj nahi kiya. Koi doctor treat kare aur patient aise hi mar jaye toh yeh uski galti nahi? Kya yeh seedha-seedha laparwahi se maut ka mamla nahi hai? Please, us doctor ke khilaaf action lijiye, Sir. Meri patni ki maut ka hisaab chahiye mujhe.

Sir, main aapke paas ek complain leke aaya hoon. Meri suniye please. Baat 10 October 2010 ki hai, shaam ke kareeb 4:10 baje the. Main New Rohtak Road par, BSES Office ke bilkul saamne, Than Singh Nagar mein khada tha. Tabhi achanak se ek bike wala itni tezi se aaya, jaise usko kuch dikh hi nahi raha tha. Usne mujhe seedha takkar maar di, Sir! Main gir gaya zameen par, poori tarah se. Mere haath-paon mein bahut chot lagi hai, abhi tak dard ho raha hai. Usne meri parwah tak nahi ki aur apni bike bhaga ke chala gaya. Woh aadmi bahut laparwahi se drive kar raha tha. Mujhe uske khilaaf action chahiye, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon. Mera ek puraana case tha na, Karkardooma Court mein, woh Sessions Case No. 88/2011 waala. Usmein woh jo aadmi tha, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, usko court ne 2016 mein saza sunayi thi. Judge sahab ne 10 February 2016 ko faisla diya tha aur 12 February ko usko punishment bhi mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Cr.PC ke Section 374 ke tehat, woh us judgement aur saza ko challenge kar raha hai. Sir, itni mushkil se toh insaaf mila tha, itne saal lage the. Ab woh phir se sab kuch palatne ki koshish kar raha hai. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai. Kripya dekhiye, sir!

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri ek appeal chal rahi hai court mein. Judge sahab Rahul Chaturvedi, J., ne bola ki unke paas 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments aur laws hain, sab kuch 'integrated' hai. Par sir, yeh sab to bade-bade lawyers, colleges aur 'institutions' ke liye hai na? Hum jaise gareeb aadmi ke liye yeh sab samajhna kitna mushkil hai. Wahan court mein mere lawyer ne bataya ki judge sahab ne sab 'counsels' aur sarkari vakil ko suna hai. Meri baat kaun sunega? Aur pata hai sir, meri appeal ke saath, meri jaisi aur bhi bahut saari appeals ko 'club' kar diya hai. Kehte hain sab mein ek jaisi hi 'kami' hai, aur ek hi 'common judgment' denge. Matlab meri alag se sunwai hogi ya nahi, pata hi nahi chal raha. Sir, mujhe lagta hai mera case kahin dab na jaye, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye apni takleef ka.

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Bahut pareshan hoon, sir. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Main jail mein hoon, sir, bilkul beqasoor. Mujhe galat tareeke se yahan phansaya gaya hai. Meri appeal chal rahi hai higher court mein. Abhi pichle mahine, 2 May 2024 ko, meri sunwai hui thi bade judges ke saamne – Justice Manish Choudhury aur Justice Robin Phukan saheb the. Meri vakil Ms. M. Chakraborty ne bhi bahut koshish ki hai. Par pata nahi kya hoga, sir. Mujhe dar lag raha hai. Main toh ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe kanoon ki itni samajh nahi. Par mujhe lagta hai mere saath dhokha hua hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe iss jail se nikalna hai. Main beqasoor hoon, sir, kasam se!

Sir, main Anjana ka pita hoon. Meri beti Anjana, Navneet Singh ki patni, uske saath bahut galat hua hai. 14 August 2010 ko subah, humein khabar mili ki Wazirpur, J.J. Colony mein uske ghar J-III/357 mein, Anjana ne ceiling fan se latak kar jaan de di hai. Padosi aur uske sasur use Sunder Lal Jain Hospital le gaye the. Sir, meri beti Anjana bahut seedhi thi, wo kabhi aisa kadam nahi utha sakti thi. Mujhe pura yakeen hai ki Navneet aur uske parivaar ne use itna tang kiya hoga ki usne majboori mein yeh kiya. Meri aap se hath jod kar vinti hai, please is case ki achhe se jaanch kijiye. Meri beti ko insaaf milna chahiye, sir.

Sir, main yahaan apni behen ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Meri behen ko uske pati Shashi Mehto aur uske poore parivaar ne – Baiju, Sushila Devi, Nabeen aur Seema Devi ne – milkar maar daala hai. Woh log meri behen ko dahej ke liye bahut pareshaan karte the, roz taane maarte the, maarte peette the. Humein kya pata tha woh use jaan se hi maar denge! Sir, police ne body dekhi hai, uske gale par nishaan the, usko gala ghot kar maara gaya hai. Shashi ne meri behen ko maara hai Sir, aur baaki sab uske saath the. Mujhe in sabko saza dilwani hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bohot pareshan hokar yahan aayi hoon. Mere pati aur unke gharwale, sab milkar mujhe roz tang karte hain. Gali-galoch karte hain, aur maarpeet bhi karte hain. Din-raat bas taane sunati hoon. Main ek aurat hoon na, isliye sab sochte hain ki main weak hoon, kuch bol nahi sakti, kuch kar nahi sakti. Is gaon mein toh aur bhi mushkil hai. Koi support nahi milta. Bahut zulm ho raha hai mujhpe, aur ab meri himmat bhi toot gayi hai. Sach mein, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon, kahan jaun. Lagta hai jaise koi rasta hi nahi bacha. Please meri help kijiye. Main bohot darr gayi hoon, aur ab aur nahi seh sakti.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri to duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Woh log... unhone mere bhai ko maara hai! Aur ab ye log appeal kar rahe hain ki inpe Section 302 ka case na chale? Mere bhai ki hatya hui hai, Sir! Trial Court ne bhi mana tha, High Court ne bhi kaha tha ki inpe murder ka case chalega. Ab yeh log petition daal ke bachna chahte hain? Inki himmat kaise hui? Sir, meri bas yahi request hai aapse, unhe saza milni chahiye. Jo charge unpe laga hai, woh bilkul sahi hai. Please, humein insaaf chahiye, Sir. Hum gareeb log hain, kahan jayenge agar ye bhi bach gaye to?

Sahab, meri beti Amriko ko uske pati ne maar dala! Kya gunah tha meri bachchi ka? Hum gareeb log hain sahab, bahut gareeb. Meri kismat hi aisi ki main Jaura Kothi mein sirf Mate ka kaam karta hoon Canal Department mein. Hamare paas itna paisa nahi tha ki apni beti ko dhang ka dahej de paate. Uski shaadi 1983 mein hui thi, woh fauj mein Naik tha, mera daamad. Shaadi mein bhi hum bas thoda bahut hi de paaye the jo hamari aukat thi. Isi dahej ke chakkar mein unhone meri Amriko ko maara hai sahab! Mujhse sab chhin gaya, meri beti chali gayi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Us qaatil ko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bas aapko yeh batane aaya hoon ki meri beti ko jo un logon ne dahej ke liye maara tha, uske liye finally unko saza mil gayi hai. Nagapattinam ke judge sahab ne pehle hi unhe Section 304B aur Section 498A mein doshi thehraya tha. Par woh harami log Madras High Court chale gaye the, socha tha bach jaayenge. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi ki kahin insaaf milte milte reh na jaaye. Par Bhagwan ne sun li, Sir. High Court ne bhi unki appeal reject kar di hai. Ab unhe apni karoot ka phal milega. Meri beti toh wapas nahi aayegi, par aaj jaakar thoda dil ko sukoon mila hai ki justice hui hai. Itne saalon ki ladai ke baad, meri beti ko insaaf mila.

Sir ji, main apni beti ke case ke baare mein baat karne aayi hoon. Uska kya haal kiya tha un logon ne, aap toh jante hi hain. Dahej ke liye meri bacchi ko maar diya. Kitne saal ho gaye, 1999 se chal raha hai yeh case High Court mein. Finally, 11 August 2010 ko Punjab aur Haryana High Court ka judgment aaya hai. Usmein, Baljinder Kaur, jo uski nanad thi, aur uska pati Pritam Singh, in dono ko Section 304B IPC mein doshi mana gaya hai. Unko 7 saal ki rigorous imprisonment mili hai. Yeh sunkar thodi himmat mili hai, sir. Par, uske saas-sasur toh acquittal ho gaye, unko chhodd diya gaya. Yeh bhi toh galat hai, sir! Unhone bhi toh meri beti ko bahut tang kiya tha. Main poora insaaf chahti hoon.

Sir ji, main Asha Devi ki maa hoon. Meri beti... meri beti mar gayi hai, Sir! Uske pati ne, uske sasural walon ne usko maar dala hai! Meri beti ki shaadi ko abhi itne saal bhi nahi hue the... abhi toh bas shuruat hi thi uski nayi zindagi ki. Woh usko bahut pareshaan karte the, Sir, dahej ke liye tang karte the. Roz-roz ladai karte the uske saath. Aur ab... ab woh humein mari hui mili hai! Sir, please, meri beti ko insaaf dilaiye. Unhone meri beti ko maar diya hai, unko saza milni chahiye. Main apni beti ke liye justice chahti hoon, Sir. Hum gareeb log hain, humara koi nahi hai, aap hi hamari madad karo.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Ye Narayanamurthy hai na, A-1, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pata nahi kitne saal ho gaye, ab toh tareekh pe tareekh mil rahi hai bas. Pehle Sessions Court ne 2000 mein ek faisla diya tha, jo humein bilkul theek nahi laga tha. Phir sarkar ne uske khilaaf appeal ki thi High Court mein. High Court ne 2006 mein jaake kuch toh humare haq mein bola tha, thodi umeed bandhi thi. Par ab us Narayanamurthy ne phir se appeal kar di hai, us High Court ke order ke khilaaf! Sir, ab kitna aur intezaar karein hum? Saalon se case chal raha hai, aur ye aadmi baar-baar appeal kar ke bachne ki koshish kar raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bas insaaf!

Sir, meri beti Vandana ko mare hue kitne saal ho gaye. Uski body ka post-mortem bhi hua tha, Dr. Bansal ne hi kiya tha, sab reports hain. Police ne investigation bhi ki, charge-sheet bhi dali thi un logon ke khilaaf. Par dekho na Sir, saalon se yeh case chal raha hai. Pehle High Court mein chala, 1992 ka case tha woh, usme bhi faisla nahi aaya theek se. Ab yeh dobara appeal ho gayi hai, woh 2004 wale judgement ke khilaaf. Meri beti ko toh insaaf mila hi nahi. Woh log abhi bhi aazad ghoom rahe hain. Sir, aap hi batao, ek gareeb aadmi kitna bhagega courts ke chakkar? Mujhe bas meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye, bas yahi darkhwast hai.

Sir, main yahan apni complaint leke aayi hoon. Yeh log, mere pati aur meri saas, mujhe itna pareshan karte hain, sir. Pehle bhi bohot harassment thi. Ab toh hadd ho gayi! Mujhe pata chala ki mere pati doosri shaadi karne ki soch rahe hain, meri saas (Accused No.2) hi sab karwa rahi hai. Hum sab, main aur mere mummy-papa, turant unke ghar gaye. Lekin sir, unhone mujhe andar hi nahi aane diya! Mere pati (Accused No.1) ne saaf mana kar diya. Meri saas ne toh mujhse itna bura behave kiya, gande-gande taane diye aur kaha 'waapas apne mayke jaa'. Mere pati ne mujhe jalane ki dhamki di aur meri saas ne kaha 'zeher de dungi'. Dono bol rahe the ki main apne parents ke ghar hi rahoon. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, yeh log mujhe maar dalenge!

Sir, main ek mamooli ladki thi, Kerala ke ek chote se gaon se. Meri shaadi hui, socha naya jeevan milega, par unhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di dahej ke naam pe. Roz taane, roz maar-peet, sirf aur sirf aur paisa maangte the. Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi is dahej ke chakkar mein, Sir! Unhone hi mujhe maara hai. Aur ab... ab woh log ba-izzat bari ho gaye? Court kehti hai saboot nahi the? Toh kya meri maut, mera dard, sab jhooth tha? Main kaise maan lu yeh insaaf hai? Meri aatma ko shanti kaise milegi, Sir? Mujhe un logon ko saza dilwani hai!

Sir, main Sushma Gupta bol rahi hoon. Ek padhi-likhi, shadi-shuda ladki thi main. Meri kya galti thi, jo mujhe aise maar diya gaya? Mera pura body jala diya, Sir, aur itne saare zakhm the... aath zakhm. Kya-kya saha hoga maine, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Mera ek chhota sa beta hai, Dheeraj, abhi sirf ek saal ka hai. Woh ab kiske sahare rahega? Woh toh abhi apni maa ka chehra bhi theek se pehchan nahi paya tha. Iss society mein hum women ke saath aisa kab tak hota rahega? Please, mujhe insaaf dilao, Sir. Mere Dheeraj ke liye justice chahiye. Aise ghatiya rivaaj aur soch kab badlegi?

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Pehle toh mujhe laga tha ki Nainital High Court se mujhe relief mil gaya hai, main acquittal ho gaya tha. Woh 2010 ka ek case tha, Government Appeal No. 42. Mujhe puri ummeed thi ki ab sab khatam ho gaya. Lekin sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Woh jo opposite party hai na, usne phir se appeal kar di! Aur ab 29 June 2017 aur 10 July 2017 ko High Court ne ek naya order de diya hai. Meri jo acquittal thi na, usko set aside kar diya! Matlab, jo main beqasoor saabit hua tha, ab woh phirse mujhe mujrim bana rahe hain. Main toh pareshaan ho gaya hoon, sir. Yeh toh seedha-seedha mere saath dhokha hai. Meri madad kijiye, sir!

Sir, main Ramakant Chaudhary hoon, aur meri saas ne mujhe meri saali Sanju Kumari se milne Lodipur bheja tha. Ye 17 November, 1993 ki baat hai. Wahan jab main pahuncha, toh un logon ne pehle toh mujhe Sanju se milne hi nahi diya. Saaf keh diya, 'Jab tak humari dahej ki demands poori nahi hongi, Sanju se koi nahi mil sakta.' Sir, woh log ek motorcycle, ek colour TV aur bees hazaar rupaye cash maang rahe the. Bahut minnatein ki maine, tab jaakar mujhe usse milne diya. Sanju mujhe dekhte hi phoot-phoot kar royi, Sir. Usne bataya ki use roz tang karte hain, maarte-peet-te hain, sirf isliye ki uske maa-baap ne unki demands poori nahi ki. Meri bechari saali bahut takleef mein thi, Sir. Please aap kuch kijiye.

Sir, meri beti Geeta ke saath bahut bura hua. Uske sasural walon ne, uska pati Akhilesh, saas Makkhan aur sasur Dhan Singh, sabne milke usko dahej ke liye bohot pareshan kiya aur aakhir mein uski jaan le li. Poore court case ke baad, unko saza bhi mili thi – 10 saal ki jail aur fine bhi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log apni saza ko challenge kar rahe hain, sir! Meri beti ko maar ke, ab woh log jail se bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Ye toh seedha seedha insaaf ka mazaak hai. Sir, meri aapse vinti hai, please dekhiye is maamle ko. Meri Geeta ko insaaf milna chahiye, aise log bahar nahi ghoomne chahiye.

Sir, main Kanwar Pal, us bechare ka baap jiska murder hua tha. Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di un logon ne! Yaad hai aapko, Geeta Colony PS mein FIR No. 281/2001 darj hui thi? Par sir, kya bataun, jo 5 log the na, jinpe humne ilzaam lagaya tha, un sab ko trial court ne ba-izzat bari kar diya hai! 19 November, 2005 ko yeh faisla aaya tha. Sochiye, mera beta mar gaya aur uske kaatil khule ghoom rahe hain. Isse bhi badi baat, sir, sarkar ne bhi koi appeal nahi ki! Hum gareeb log kahan jayein, jab humari sunwai hi nahi hoti? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh toh zulm hai!

Sir, main Jiwan hoon, Indro ka baap. Meri beti ko unhone maar diya dahej ke liye. Sirf 20 saal ki thi woh, aur 7 saal hi huye the uski shaadi ko. Poore 7 saal tak meri masoom beti ko torture kiya, dahej ke liye sataya. Aakhir mein uski jaan hi le li un zaalimon ne. Maine tab bhi FIR karwayi thi, mere statement (PW1) pe hi case chala. Aur ab Sonepat ke Addl. Sessions Judge sahab ne un sab ko baizzat bari kar diya hai! Sir, ye kaise ho sakta hai? Meri beti ke murder karne waale aise hi khule ghumenge? Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai, Sir. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Meri beti ke saath itna bada anyay hua hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir, meri Indro ke liye. Please aap kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Keshab Chandra Kar, meri beti ke case mein baat karne aaya hoon. Aapko toh pata hai, meri beti ko uske pati, Keshab Chandra Panda ne dahej ke liye maar diya tha. Jajpur court mein poora case chala, kitni mushkil se humne saboot ikatthe kiye. Mere bete Kartik ne bhi gawahi di, aur maine, uska baap, maine khud apni beti ke liye judge sahab ke saamne roro ke sab sach bataya tha. Us zaalim Keshab ko Section 304B IPC ke तहत 7 saal ki jail hui thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ko challenge kar raha hai, appeal kar raha hai! Yeh kya mazak hai? Meri beti ko maar diya, aur ab usko lagta hai woh aise hi bach jayega? Sir, hum gareeb log hain, itni mushkil se insaaf mila tha. Please kuch kariye, usko dobara saza milni chahiye.

Sir ji, main apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Meri beti ko un zaalimon ne dahej ke liye maar daala tha, uska kya kasoor tha? Jab Court ne pehle 304B IPC ke तहत unhe 10 saal ki saza sunayi thi, tab laga tha ki chalo, ab thoda sukoon milega. Par ab ye kya ho gaya Sir? High Court ne appeal mein unki saza kam karke sirf 7 saal kar di hai. Kya meri beti ki jaan ki kimat sirf 7 saal hai? Woh bhi rigorous imprisonment. Unko toh pura 10 saal milna chahiye tha, usse bhi zyada. Mujhe ye kam saza bilkul manzoor nahi hai Sir. Meri puri family toot gayi hai, aur woh ab itni jaldi riha ho jayenge? Aap kuch kijiye Sir, humein insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, 20 January 1996 ki baat hai. DD No. 15A milne ke baad, aapke ASI Shekhar Lal aur Constable Umed Singh mere ghar WZ-175, Harijan Colony, Tilak Nagar aaye the. Unhone dekha ki ek kamre ki khidki tooti hui thi, aur darwaza andar se band tha. Sir, jab khidki se ek ladke ko andar bheja aur usne darwaza khola, tab maine dekha... meri Saroj andar latki hui thi! Meri Saroj, sir! Woh chunni kaat kar uski laash ko niche utara gaya. SDM Dahia sahab ko bhi bataya gaya tha aage ki karwahi ke liye. Aur haan, sir, ek suicide note bhi mila tha wahan. Meri Saroj aise kaise kar sakti hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main Ramu ki maa hoon. Meri beti ko uske sasural walon ne dahej ke liye maar dala tha. Kitna torture karte the usko, aur jab wo mar gayi toh uski laash ko bhi chhupane ki koshish ki thi. Ujjain ki court ne unhe 1999 mein pakda aur saza di thi. Judge sahab ne unhe 7 saal ki jail aur fine bhi lagaya tha. Humne socha tha insaaf mil gaya, par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki wo log uss saza ke khilaaf appeal mein chale gaye hain. Sir, itni mushkil se toh insaaf mila tha, meri beti ko justice mila tha. Mujhe darr hai kahin wo phir se chhoot na jaayen. Please meri help kijiye, meri beti ko insaaf milta rahe.

Sir, main Ramu Lal, meri beti ko Jamshed ne dahej ke liye maar diya tha. Shaadi ke baad se hi use bahut tang karte the, aur ek din unhone meri beti ki jaan le li. Bahut mushkil se police aur court ki madad se Jamshed ko pakda gaya aur use saza mili thi. Court ne bola ki usne Section 304B IPC ke तहत galti ki hai aur usko life imprisonment aur 5000 fine bhi lagaaya tha. Do saal ki aur bhi imprisonment mili thi usko. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri beti toh chali gayi. Uski saza kam nahi honi chahiye. Usne meri beti ki jaan li hai, use pura dand milna chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, Sir, taaki meri beti ko insaaf milta rahe.

Sir, meri beti thi na, usko Surender Singh, Nafe Singh aur uski maa Shama Kaur ne dahej ke liye maar diya tha. Us bechari ko itna sataya, itni cruelty ki, ki uski jaan chali gayi. Bade mushkil se humne case ladha, Sir. Court ne bhi mana ki unhone galat kiya. Unko 29 June 2001 ko convict kiya tha aur 3 July 2001 ko 7 saal ki rigorous imprisonment ki saza bhi sunai thi Section 304-B aur 498-A mein. Ab Sir, woh log, Surender aur uske ghar wale, iss conviction ke against appeal kar rahe hain. Kya matlab hai iska? Meri beti ki maut ke baad, humein thoda insaaf mila tha, ab woh bhi cheenna chahte hain? Sir, please, unko saza milni chahiye jo unhone kiya. Humari family ab dobara is sab se guzarna nahi chahti.

Sir, main Poonam, Mehar Chand ki beti, Tilak Nagar, Delhi se. Meri shaadi 27 June, 1985 ko Anil Kumar se hui thi, jo Krishan Kumar ke bete hain aur Faridabad mein rehte hain. Mere mummy-papa ne apni haisiyat ke hisaab se poora dahej diya tha, ekdum theek-thaak. Par sir, meri kismat hi kharab thi. Shaadi ke bas 6-7 mahine baad hi mere papa guzar gaye. Aur mera chhota bhai Girish toh pehle hi current lagne se chal basa tha. Ab meri ek badi didi hain, Surinder Nagpal, jo Faridabad mein hi shaadi-shuda hain. Meri ek chhoti beti bhi hai ab. Meri toh zindagi hi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai, sir.

Sir, main aapko apni beti ke case ke baare mein batane aayi hoon. Uska pati, Sudhakar Singh, jise court ne pehle hi saza sunayi thi 304B aur 498A ke तहत, dowry death aur maarpeet ke liye. Hamein laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya hai. Par woh abhi tak apni conviction ko challenge kar raha hai. Uski maa toh, Shyama Devi, woh bhi is case mein appellant thi, lekin woh bechari 2011 mein hi mar gayi, uska case ab toh khatam ho gaya. Par mera sawaal Sudhakar se hai. Sir, 2011 se kitne saal ho gaye, abhi tak woh azaad ghoom raha hai appeal ke bahane? Meri beti ki jaan le li usne, aur ab bhi woh apne aap ko sahi saabit karna chahta hai? Kya gareebon ko kabhi poora insaaf nahi milta? Mujhe darr hai ki is appeal mein use chhod na dein. Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon na, jiski beti ke case mein FIR No. 01/2010 Tilak Nagar PS mein hui thi. Meri beti ko uske pati ne aur sasural walon ne dahej ke liye maar diya tha, 498A aur 304B laga tha unpar. Kitni mushkil se toh unko saza mili thi, teen saal ki rigorous imprisonment hui thi. Yeh 20 May 2011 aur 23 May 2011 ki baat hai jab judgment aaya tha. Ab pata chala hai ki woh Tis Hazari Courts mein apne judgment ko challenge kar rahe hain, appeal daali hai unhone. Sir, humein toh laga tha ki ab insaaf mil gaya, par ab phir se woh sab shuru ho gaya. Kahin woh log choot na jaayen, hum garib logon ka insaaf chhin na jaaye. Aap kuch kijiye, sir, meri beti ki aatma ko shaanti mil jaye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon, meri beti ko jis Deepak Kumar ne dahej ke liye maara tha, woh ab jail se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Chitrakoot ke Fast Track Court mein usko saza mili thi, sessions trial number 55 of 2014 tha uska, case crime number 91 of 2013. Us par 498-A, 304-B, 302 IPC aur Dowry Act ke sections lage the. Humne kitni mushkil se usko pakadwaya tha, saza dilwai thi. Ab pata chala hai ki woh appeal kar raha hai. Sir, agar woh nikal gaya toh humara kya hoga? Meri beti ko jo insaaf mila tha, woh bhi chhin jayega kya? Hum bahut darr rahe hain, please kuch kijiye.

Sir, meri beti ko maar diya gaya hai. Mera toh sab kuch lut gaya hai. Sabse dukh ki baat toh ye hai ki Trial Court ne un sab ko chhod diya, jo meri beti ke qaatil hain. Section 302 IPC ka case tha, lekin bolte hain ki 'direct evidence' nahi mila. Kya matlab hai Sir? Hamari beti toh chali gayi na! Sandeep, jisne meri beti se love marriage ki thi, usi ne aur uske parivar ne yeh kiya. Aur ab woh sab bebas ghoom rahe hain. Ye toh insaaf ka seedha seedha mazaak hai, Sir. Hum gareeb log kahan jaayenge? Aap se request hai, please kuch kijiye, meri beti ko insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main Ramvati Devi hoon. Meri beti ke saath bahut zulm hua tha. Uske pati ne use dahej ke liye tang kiya, maar dala tha (Sections 498A, 304B). Bahut mushkil se humne justice ke liye fight kiya aur finally court ne use doshi thehraya. Usse 10 saal ki jail hui thi 304B mein aur 3 saal 498A mein. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Woh toh jail mein hai, ab usko bahar nikalna hai. Usne meri beti ki jaan le li, aur ab woh apni saza bhi nahi bhugatna chahta. Sir, humein pura insaaf chahiye. Woh bahar nahi aana chahiye. Meri beti ko toh hum wapas nahi la sakte, par usko uske gunah ki puri saza toh milni chahiye. Rs. 50,000 compensation uski beti ko milne ki baat bhi hai, par usse kya fayda? Meri beti toh chali gayi na.

Sir, main bas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Yeh jo mera case hai na, CRL.L.P. 657/2018, isne meri neend haraam kar di hai. Sir, 7 February 2020 ko jo faisla aaya hai, Justice Manmohan sahab ki taraf se, woh meri samajh se bahar hai. Hum jaise aam aadmi kahan samjhenge yeh crore judgments aur itne saare kanoon? Yeh toh sab bade bade lawyers aur institutions ke liye bane hain. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Police station mein hi toh aayenge na apni takleef batane? Meri baat suniye, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna bada dhokha hua hai. Jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, use court ne 2014 mein baari kar diya tha (acquittal). Sochiye, mujhpar kya beeti hogi! Ab, sunne mein aaya hai ki sarkar (State) uske khilaaf appeal karna chahti hai, taaki use saza mil sake. Meri toh bas yahi umeed hai. Lekin Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki unhone yeh appeal file karne mein 41 din ki der kar di hai. Pata nahi kyun, par please, yeh der maaf karwa dijiye na. Meri toh saari umeed is appeal par tiki hai. Aap hi bataiye, main aur kitna wait karun insaaf ke liye? Woh aadmi khule ghoom raha hai, aur main yahan rota rahun? Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Bhadwa gaon se aaya hoon, Malwan PS ke under. Meri beti, Urmila, bas 20 saal ki hai. Uski shaadi 1983 mein Raju se hui thi. Abhi woh mere paas hi thi, apne maike mein, Fatehpur zille mein. Parson... parson meri Urmila ko, uski haalat itni kharab ho gayi ki use zila aspataal Fatehpur mein laana pada. Sir, uski haalat bilkul theek nahi hai. Uska pati Raju... pata nahi kya kiya usne meri masoom beti ke saath. Woh abhi hospital mein hai, sir. Meri beti ki yeh haalat dekh kar hum bahut pareshaan hain. Please, meri beti ke liye kuch kijiye, usko insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Mere damaad ne, aur uske saath Karam Ali aur Anwara Begam ne, meri beti ko bohot tang kiya, Sir. Woh log dahej ke liye meri beti ko roz satate the, usko maar-peet karte the. Sir, unhone meri beti ko itna pareshan kiya ki woh mar gayi. Meri beti ki maut unki wajah se hui hai. Mujhe pura yakeen hai Sir, unhone meri beti ko jaan boojh kar maara hai, uski jaan le li hai. Woh log meri beti ke khooni hain. Main chahta hoon ki un teeno ko kadi se kadi sazaa mile. Meri beti aaj mere paas nahi hai unki wajah se. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, unko pakdiye!

Sahab, main kya bataun! Mere toh hosh ud gaye hain yeh sunkar. Woh kaatil, jisne mere gharwale ko berehmi se maara tha, woh ab appeal kar raha hai! Etawah ke Judge sahab ne toh 1990 mein hi use Section 302/34 IPC ke तहत mujrim maana tha aur saza-e-maut sunayi thi. 1992 mein unhone khud Cr. P.C. ke Section 366 ke under 'reference' bheja tha ki uski maut ki saza pakki ho. Itne saal ho gaye, ab phir se woh apni jaan bachane ki koshish kar raha hai? Meri toh bas itni fariyaad hai ki usko uske kiye ki saza mile, jaisa ki adalat ne pehle hi bola tha. Hamari zindagi toh barbaad ho gayi hai uski wajah se!

Sir, main us passenger bus mein tha jab woh dhamaka hua. Soch bhi nahi sakta ki meri jaan bach gayi. Poora bus hil gaya, log cheekhne-chillaane lage. Yeh koi mamooli pataka nahi tha, sir, pakka koi bomb tha ya koi explosive cheez thi. Meri aankhon ke saamne kitne log zakhmi hue, khoon beh raha tha har taraf. Abhi tak woh darr mere dil mein baitha hua hai. Mujhe neend nahi aati. Jin logon ne yeh kiya hai, unhe saza milni chahiye. Aise kaise koi aam logon ki bus mein bomb phod sakta hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, kitni mushkil se investigation poori hui thi. Police ne uss zaalim ke khilaaf Section 302 IPC mein charge-sheet file ki thi, murder ka case tha, sir! Humein thodi umeed bandhi thi ki ab toh insaaf milega. Par ab jab court mein case shuru hua, aur uske upar Section 302 ka ilzaam lagaya gaya, toh woh toh saaf mukar gayi, keh rahi hai usne kuch kiya hi nahi! Meri toh himmat hi toot gayi yeh sunke. Humne paanch gawah pesh kiye hain, sab ne sach bataya hai. Aur toh aur, court ne khud Judicial Magistrate ko bulaya jinhone uss aurat ka confession record kiya tha. Par woh toh ab sab kuch jhootla rahi hai, Sir. Aap dekho, woh toh sab kuch deny kar rahi hai. Bas hume insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Hemalatha hoon. Meri shaadi mein mere mummy-papa ne jitne gehne aur kharche the, sab unhi ne uthaye the. Shaadi ke baad, main aur mere pati Bowrilapet mein theek se reh rahe the. Par ab yeh log mujhe bahut pareshan kar rahe hain. Mujhse 8 tola sona, 70,000 rupaye cash ya ek do-pahiya gaadi maangte hain. Kehte hain agar dahej nahi mila toh panchayat bulayenge aur mujhe wapas ghar nahi le jayenge. Sir, bahut zyaada mental aur physical torture kar rahe hain, mujhe maarte hain, taane dete hain. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe bachaiye.

Sir, main Ramu ki mummy bol rahi hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua na, woh koi bhool nahi sakta. Un logon ne meri beti ko itna pareshan kiya, dowry ke liye maara peeta, aur aakhir mein jaan se maar diya, sir! Bengaluru mein, humne kitni mushkil se case file kiya tha. Fast Track Court-VIII ne, 2014 mein, unhe Sections 498A aur 304B ke तहत दोषी ठहराaya tha aur Dowry Act ke under saza bhi sunaai thi. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh Accused No.1, mera daamad, phir se appeal kar raha hai. Upar ki adalat mein case le gaya hai! Kya matlab hai sir? Meri beti ko insaaf mila tha, ab woh phir se bachne ki koshish kar raha hai? Hum gareeb log kahan tak ladenge? Mujhe darr lag raha hai sir, kahin woh bach na jaaye. Meri beti ki aatma ko shaanti nahi milegi.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki meri beti ke case mein, finally thoda insaaf mila hai. Meri beti, jise in zaalimon ne dahej ke liye maara tha, uske murder case mein, Jahanganj Police Station, Farrukhabad mein, Crime No. 255/2015 ke under, Section 498-A, 304-B IPC aur Dowry Act ke तहत, court ne फैसला सुनाaya hai. Jai Jai Ram aur uski maa Smt. Bhagyawati ko 28.09.2019 ko guilty prove kiya gaya hai. Unhe Section 304-B mein 7 saal ki kadi saza (rigorous imprisonment) mili hai. Sir, meri beti toh waapas nahi aayegi, par thodi tasalli mili hai ki unko saza toh mili. Par ab woh log appeal kar rahe hain, sir. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin fir se unhe chhoot na mil jaye.

Sir, main apni beti ke case ke baare mein baat karne aaya hoon. Meri beti ko Mahesh Patel aur uske gharwalon ne dahej ke liye itna sataya ki unhone usko maar hi daala, Sir! Varanasi court mein Judge saab ne 30.3.2017 ko Mahesh Patel ko guilty maana tha aur usko saza bhi sunayi thi. Humein badi mushkil se insaaf mila tha, Sir. Par ab pata chala hai ki Mahesh Patel ne upar ki court mein appeal kar di hai. Matlab woh apni saza se bachna chahta hai. Hum bohot darr rahe hain, Sir. Kya meri beti ko jo hua, uska insaaf aise hi chala jayega? Ye 304B aur 498A ka case hai. Please kuch kijiye, Sir. Usko uski saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera case pata nahi kahan atak gaya hai. Neeche court se to thodi umeed bandhi thi, par ab sun raha hoon ki woh log phir appeal pe chale gaye hain. Criminal appeal ho raha hai, Section 374 (2) ke under. Ye 397, 401, ye sab sections kya hain, mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aata. Mere bachche ka to autopsy bhi hua tha, sab saman sealed karke bheja tha chemical examination ke liye. Patwari ne bhi mauke ka naksha banaya tha. Itne saboot hain, phir bhi ye log baar-baar case ko khinch rahe hain, criminal revision ki baat kar rahe hain. Sir, bas insaaf chahiye. Aur kitna intezaar karna padega mujhe?

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri beti ko dahej ke liye kitna sataya gaya. Poora parivaar usko maarta peetta tha, aur aakhir mein meri beti ki jaan le li unhone! Sir, West Tripura mein Sessions Judge sahab ne bade mushkil se toh unko saza sunai thi. Meri aankhon ke saamne hua sab, 498A aur 304B mein 3 saal aur 7 saal ki jail hui thi unko, saath mein Rs. 2000 ka fine bhi. Thodi tasalli mili thi ki chalo, meri beti ko insaaf mila. Par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain, sir! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Itni mushkil se toh court ne unko gunehgaar thehraya tha, ab phir se woh chhuth jayenge kya? Meri beti toh wapas nahi aayegi, par unko unke gunah ki saza milni chahiye na? Aap please meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe darr hai ki mera insaaf kho na jaaye.

Sir, main Manju ka father bol raha hoon. Meri beti Manju ko uske pati ne aur gharwalon ne bahut pareshan kiya tha, dahej ke liye tang karte the. Ek din, 24 August 2000 ko, mujhe khabar mili ki meri beti Safdarjung Hospital mein hai. Main wahan gaya toh dekha, woh bechari 90% jali hui thi! Sir, meri beti mar gayi, un logon ki wajah se. Kitna time ho gaya hai, ab jaakar court ne uske pati aur baaki co-accused par Section 498-A aur 304-B IPC ke तहत charges lagaye hain. Sir, please, unko saza milni chahiye. Meri beti ke liye mujhe insaaf chahiye, bas yahi request hai aapse.

Sir, main Mamta ki maa hoon. Meri beti ko in logon ne bohot pareshaan kiya. Uski shaadi Rakesh urf Gudda Sharma se chaar saal pehle hui thi. Uska pati Rakesh aur uske poore parivaar ne meri beti ko dahej ke liye itna sataya, itna maara peeta... uska jeena mushkil kar diya tha. Meri beti toh chali gayi dunia se, uski jaan le li inhone. Aaj mujhe thodi tasalli mili hai, sir. Court ne unpar charges frame kar diye hain. Woh log jo meri beti ko sataate the, dahej maangte the, aur uski maut ke zimmedaar hain, unpar ab IPC ki dhaara 498/34, 304B aur vikalp mein 306 ke तहत case chalega. Meri beti ko insaaf milna chahiye, sir. Bas yehi chahti hoon main, ki inko inke kiye ki saza mile.

Sir, main Rupinder Kaur ke parivar se hoon. Meri beti ko uske pati Paramjit Singh aur saas Gurmit Kaur ne bohot tang kiya. Sir, woh Rupinder ko roz maarpeet karte the, dahej ke liye pareshaan karte the. Meri bholi beti ko unhone itna torture kiya ki aakhir mein uski jaan hi le li. Mujhe yaad hai woh din, Sir. Humne kitni mushkil se insaaf ki ladai ladi thi. Court ne un dono ko, Paramjit aur Gurmit ko, Section 302 aur 498A mein saza sunai thi. Hamein thoda sukoon mila tha ki kam se kam unko unke gunahon ki saza toh mili. Par ab Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Matlab, woh phir se bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain! Meri Rupinder ko toh wapas nahi la sakte, par unko unke kiye ki saza toh milni hi chahiye na? Aap kuch kariye, Sir, humein darr lag raha hai ki unko kahin chhoot na mil jaye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Meri beti ko Hira Ram aur uski biwi Rukma ne dahej ke liye itna pareshan kiya, usko maar hi daala, Sir! Hamari ladki ko marne ke baad, court ne unko saza bhi sunayi thi 3.12.2002 ko, Nagaur ke Fast Track Judge sahab ne. Unko Section 304B IPC ke तहत poori umar kaid hui thi aur 25,000 ka fine bhi lagaya tha. Section 498A IPC mein bhi 3 saal ki saza mili thi. Mujhe laga tha ab meri beti ko shanti milegi, insaaf mil gaya. Lekin Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh kameene Hira Ram aur Rukma us saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, kya garib ko kabhi insaaf nahi milta? Meri beti ki maut ka mazak bana rahe hain woh log. Please Sir, kuch kijiye, humein aur pareshan na hone den.

Sir, main apni beti ke case ke baare mein baat karne aayi hoon. Belgaum court ne 7 January 2012 ko, jo S.C. No. 130/2010 tha, usmein meri beti ke saas-sasur aur woh do aur log (accused No. 2 se 4) aur uska pati (accused No. 1), sabko saza sunayi thi. Unhone meri beti ko dahej ke liye itna sataya tha ki uski jaan chali gayi. IPC ke Section 498A aur 304B ke under unko guilty maana gaya tha. Humein thoda sukoon mila tha ki insaaf hua. Par ab Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh sab apni saza ke khilaaf upar ki court mein chale gaye hain. Criminal Appeal No. 2533/2102 aur 2821/2012 file ki hai unhone. Sir, kya ab phir se mujhe iss sab se guzarna padega? Meri beti ko toh main wapas nahi la sakti, par unko unke kiye ki saza toh milni chahiye na!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh life barbad ho rahi hai. Mera woh purana case tha na, FIR No. 847/2014 ka, jo Rohini Court mein Special Judge (NDPS) ne decide kiya tha? Uska judgment toh 25 January 2017 ko hi aa gaya tha. Main socha tha chalo ab insaaf mil gaya, chain ki saans lunga. Par ab yeh State wale phir se petition daal rahe hain. Pata chala hai ki 140 din ki der ho gayi hai unko, phir bhi woh court se permission maang rahe hain, Section 5 Limitation Act aur Section 482 Cr.P.C. lagake. Mujhe kya pata yeh sab kanoon kya hote hain, Sir? Bas itna maloom hai ki meri takleefein khatam hone ka naam hi nahi le rahi. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye. Main aur kitne dhakke khaunga?

Sir, main Neeraj Kumar, mare hue ka bhai hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, Mansarovar Park PS mein humari FIR No. 97/1995 darj hui thi. Mere bhai ko jin logon ne maara tha, un 4 logon ko trial court ne 10.07.2001 ko bari kar diya hai. Sir, aap sochiye, itne saal humne intezaar kiya, insaaf ke liye, aur ab court ne un sabko chhod diya? Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai. Woh sab khule ghoom rahe hain aur mera bhai ab wapas nahi aayega. Maine yeh revision petition file ki hai, ki yeh faisla palat jaye aur un gunehgaron ko saza mile. State ne toh kuch nahi kiya, isliye main khud aapke paas aaya hoon. Meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Ramadevi ka pita hoon. Meri beti Rama ki shaadi 2 December 1984 ko Dinesh Seth se hui thi. Shaadi ke baad se hi use sasural mein bahut pareshan kiya gaya, dahej ke liye tang karte the. Phir ek din usko... usko maar diya. Kitni mushkil se court mein case chala, saal 2002 mein jaakar usko (Dinesh ko) saza mili. Judge sahab ne bola ki 304B IPC ke तहत, usko 7 saal ki jail hui hai. Humne socha ab toh justice mil gaya, meri beti ko shanti milegi. Par ab suna hai woh phir se appeal kar raha hai. Woh chahta hai usko saza na mile. Sahab, meri beti ke saath jo hua, uska kya? Use dobara saza kyu mile? Yeh galat hai. Main aapse request karta hoon, please ispe dhyan do. Meri beti ko insaaf milna chahiye.

Sir, main Swaran Kanta ka bhai hoon. Meri behen ko unke sasural walon ne maar diya, sahab! Prakash Chander, uski maa Lila Wati, baap Pyare Lal, behen Usha aur bhai Pappu, in sabne milkar meri behen ki jaan le li 9 August 1987 ko, dopahar 2:35 baje. Dahej ke liye meri behen ko itna sataya, itna pareshaan kiya aur phir maar hi daala! Yeh seedha khoon hai, Sir, ya dahej ke liye maut, jo bhi lagao, bas unko saza do. Meri behen ki zindagi barbaad kar di inhone. Mujhe meri behen ke liye insaaf chahiye. Please, aap kuch karo. In sabko saza milni chahiye, inhone meri behen ko kyu maara?

Sir, main aapse apni baat kehne aayi hoon. Yeh jo dahej hai na, sir, yeh ek bahot badi samajik burai hai. Log kehte hain ki yeh to chalta rehta hai, par isne meri zindagi nark bana di hai. Meri shadi ko kuch hi saal hue hain, aur har din mujhe dahej ke liye taane maare jaate hain, torture kiya jaata hai. Sir, main aapko bata nahi sakti ki ladkiyon par kitne atyachar hote hain iski wajah se. Kitni ladkiyan bechari apni jaan de deti hain. Yeh koi mamooli jurm nahi hai, sir, yeh toh ek heinous, brutal aur barbaric cheez hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Main ab aur seh nahi sakti. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, Sunita... meri beti thi woh! Usko maara gaya hai, gala daba ke. Poora gaon janta hai, sabko pata hai kisne kiya. Par abhi court ne kya kaha pata hai? Judge saab keh rahe hain ki yeh murder tha hi nahi! Meri Sunita aise hi mar gayi kya? Aur jin logon ne usko maara, unka naam tak nahi liya ja raha theek se. Bol rahe hain ki prosecution ne prove hi nahi kiya ki unhone jaan-boojh kar gala daba ke maara tha. Kaise nahi prove hua sir? Sab kuchh saamne tha. Ab woh log aise hi chhoot jayenge? Meri beti ko insaaf nahi milega? Yeh kaisa system hai, sir? Mujhe bas meri Sunita ke liye insaaf chahiye!

Sahab, meri beti Priyanka ko maar diya gaya hai! Sirf ek saal hua tha uski shaadi ko Akash Sharma se. Woh kehte hain, uski laash bed par mili hai. Aur uska pati bol raha hai ki usne chunni kaati aur body bed par rakhi. Yeh kya baat hui sahab? Mujhe pakka shaq hai, in logon ne meri beti ko maara hai. Shaadi ke baad se hi use tang karte the. Ab unka kehna hai ki SDM sahab ko bataya hai, Tehsildar sahab bhi aaye the aur body ko mortuary mein rakha hai. Par sahab, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Meri beti khudkushi nahi kar sakti. In logon ne usko maar daala hai. Meri beti ko nyay dilao, please.

Sir, main aapko apni beti ka kissa batana chahta hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, woh kisi maa-baap ke saath na ho. Woh log, Balram aur uski maa Beerbala, unhone meri beti ko dahej ke liye maar diya tha. Sir, woh 2007 ka case hai, Crime No. 231. Kitne saal ho gaye, hum roj court ke chakkar kaat rahe the. Par ab finally, Ghaziabad court ne 22 July 2010 ko unko saza suna di hai. Khushi hai ki justice mila, par beti toh wapas nahi aayegi. Unko 7 saal ki jail hui hai, section 304B IPC ke तहत. Thodi tasalli mili hai, sir. Bas yehi aapko batane aaya tha, ki ab thodi shanti mili hai ki unko saza toh mili. Par hamara dard toh kabhi khatam nahi hoga.

Sir, main Nathu Singh. Meri beti Suman ki shaadi Sanjay Singh se hui thi 26 April 1995 ko. Shaadi ke baad se hi, uske sasural wale dahej ko lekar meri beti ko tang karte the. Usse bahut pareshan karte the, gaaliyan dete the, maarte the. Aur Sir, jab usne ek beti ko janam diya, toh unka zulm aur badh gaya. Meri Suman ko jeena haram kar diya tha unhone. May aur June 1997 mein, do mahine tak meri Suman hamare ghar par hi rahi. Woh bahut dukhi thi, pareshan thi. Uske sasur, Vijay Singh, usko wapas le jane aaye the, par wahan jaakar unhone meri beti ko maar dala, Sir. Mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Kishangarhbas se aaya hoon, mera naam Ramesh hai. Meri suno toh sahi, sir, yeh Dinesh Kumar @ I.eelu, Santra aur Amarsingh @ Phool Singh... in logon ne meri zindagi jhand kar rakhi hai! Pata nahi kaisa badla le rahe hain mujhse. Pichhle hafte hi, in teeno ne milkar bina baat ke mere ghar mein ghus kar mujhe aur meri patni ko bahut maara. Gaaliyan bakte rahe, dhamkiyan di ki jaan se maar denge. Maine kya bigada tha inka, sir? Main gareeb aadmi hoon, kahan jaun? Meri toh poori family darr gayi hai. Inki wajah se raat ko neend nahi aati. Sir, hath jodkar kehta hoon, inke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir!

Sahab, main Pithoragarh se aaya hoon. Meri beti ke saath bahot bura hua tha. Uske sasural walon ne, Nain Singh aur baakiyon ne, usko dahej ke liye maar diya tha. Uske saath itni maar-peet, itna zulm kiya tha ki main bata nahi sakta. Humne case kiya tha 2001 mein, aur Pithoragarh Sessions Court ne un sab ko guilty maana tha. Unko Section 304B aur 498A ke तहत 7 saal ki kaid bhi sunai thi 2003 mein. Ab suna hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain. Meri bas itni guzarish hai ki unhe saza milni chahiye, woh chhute nahi. Humne bahot takleef uthai hai.

Sir, meri beti ko uske pati aur sasural walon ne dahej ke liye maar diya tha. Kya din dekhe hain humne, Sir! Kitna torture kiya meri beti ko, phir uski jaan le li. Bade mushkil se justice mila hai. Kalyan ke Additional Sessions Judge ne 10 November 2011 ko, uske pati ko, jo main accused tha, saza di thi. Murder (302 IPC) ke liye life imprisonment mili. Aur dahej ke liye tang karne (304-B IPC) ke liye 7 saal, maar-peet (498-A IPC) ke liye 2 saal. Par Sir, meri beti toh waapas nahi aayegi na. Saza mil gayi, thoda sukoon hai, par ye ghav kabhi nahi bharega.

Sir, main Sucheta... matlab meri behen Jyoti ka bhai hoon. Uski shaadi Bhagat Singh se hui thi. Kal raat, 10.12.08 ko, subah ke kareeb 2.40 baje, humein police station se DD no.4 ke through khabar mili ki meri behen Sucheta DDU Hospital mein admit hai. Bola 'chhat se gir gayi'. Jab hum wahan pahunche, toh doctors ne use 'brought dead' declare kar diya. Sir, meri behen aisi nahi thi ki chhat se gir jaaye ya khudkushi kare. Uski shaadi abhi zyada time nahi hua tha.
