Woh apne sasural mein bahut pareshan rehti thi, uske saath accha behave nahi karte the. Mujhe poora yakeen hai ki yeh koi haadsa nahi hai, uske pati aur sasural walon ne hi uske saath kuch galat kiya hai. ASI Rajender Singh ji bhi hospital aaye the, unko bhi maine bataya tha. Meri behen ko insaaf dilao, Sir!

Sir, main woh Babita ka baap hoon jiske saath itna bura hua tha. Meri beti Babita ko uske sasural walon ne dahej ke liye maar diya tha, woh bhi shaadi ke kuch hi din baad! Uske pati Sat Pal, uski saas Shakuntla, sasur Ram Prasad, aur woh Krishan Pal, Suman, Sarita, Lalita... sabne milkar meri masoom beti ko tadpaaya. Humne Gokalpuri police station mein FIR karayi thi 2007 mein (FIR no. 232/2007), usme 498A aur 304B IPC, aur Dowry Act ke cases lage hain. Police ne challan bhi file kar diya hai. Ab unka case adalat mein chal raha hai. Bas mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye, sir. Un sab ko saza milni chahiye, woh abhi tak kaise ghoom rahe hain?

Sahab, main Khusboo ka baap hoon. Meri beti ko uske pati ne maar daala, sahab! Shaadi ke baad se hi woh meri beti ko dahej ke liye tang karta tha. Roz usko maarta-peet'ta tha, uski zindagi haram kar di thi. Bechaari Khusboo sab kuch sehti rahi. Ab kuch din pehle hi woh mar gayi, aur uski maut uske pati ki maar-peet ki wajah se hi hui hai. Usne meri beti ko itni buri tarah maara ki woh jaan se chali gayi! Mera toh sab kuch lut gaya, sahab. Mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye. Us zalim ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri Khusboo toh wapas nahi aayegi, par uska qaatil toh saza paye!

Sir, main Taslim Beg, aaj aapke paas yeh complaint lekar aaya hoon. Meri beti... uske sasural waale, khaaskar Ajmal, Jamila aur ghar ke baaki sab log, meri beti ko bohot tang karte the. Baar-baar mujhse aur meri beti se rangin TV, ek motorcycle aur 15,000 rupaye ki demand karte the. Kitni baar mana kiya, kitni baar samjhaya, par woh log maante hi nahi the. Ajmal toh 4th June 2001 ko bhi dobara mere paas aaya tha, usi cheez ki demand karne. Sir, meri beti ko unhone... ab woh nahi rahi... In logon ne meri beti ki zindagi barbaad kar di. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Woh Case Crime No. 415/2023, jo humne Kotwali, Fatehpur mein darj karaya tha, usme... usme accused ko bail mil gayi hai, Sir! Allahabad High Court ne abhi recent judgement mein, Criminal Misc. Bail Application No. 7768 of 2024 mein, usko bail de di. Yeh kya insaaf hai, Sir? Hum itna lad rahe the, sab evidence diya, aur usko High Court se bail mil gayi? Meri toh puri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Woh bahar aayega toh humein aur pareshan karega. Aap please kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main wohi hoon, aapko yaad hoga, maine FIR No. 0032/2024 file ki thi yahan. Kitni mushkil se maine woh sab kiya tha, socha tha ab insaaf milega. Lekin ab toh meri himmat hi toot gayi hai, Sir. Woh jo gunehgaar hai na, opposite party, usko High Court ne bail de di hai! Lucknow Bench se... aur ek case mein nahi, Sir, char alag-alag mamlo mein usko bail mil gayi hai. Maine toh ab appeals bhi daali hain, lad rahi hoon main, lekin mujhe ab darr lag raha hai. Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh hamari safety ka kya hoga? Meri toh jaan ko khatra hai, Sir. Aap hi bataiye, ab main kya karoon? Please, meri madad kijiye.

Daroga Ji, main Simpi Kumari ka baap bol raha hoon. Meri teesri beti Simpi Kumari ki shaadi 2012 ke Fagun mahine mein hui thi. Hindu reeti-riwaaz se, Lalan Kumar ke saath, jo Gulamichak gaon ke Ramanuj Yadav ka beta hai. Maine apni haisiyat ke hisaab se sab kuch diya tha shaadi mein. Lekin Daroga Ji, shaadi ke turant baad se hi meri beti ko bahut pareshaan kiya ja raha hai. Uska pati Lalan, dewar, bhainsur, gotni aur sasur sab milkar usko roz maarte-peette hain. Sir, woh log ek motorcycle ki demand kar rahe hain aur meri beti ko bahut takleef de rahe hain. Meri beti ki jaan ko khatra hai, Daroga Ji. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, meri beti Khushbu ke saath bahut bura hua hai. Bhagalpur ke Jawahar Lal Medical College mein uska post-mortem hua hai. Doctor ne bataya hai ki meri Khushbu ko gale daba kar maara gaya hai. Uska dum ghonta gaya hai, aur usi se uski jaan gayi hai. Soch kar hi rooh kaanp jaati hai. Doctor sahab ne yeh bhi bataya ki uski maut post-mortem se 12 se 24 ghante pehle hui thi. Sir, yeh hatya hai, meri beti ko maara gaya hai! Please, aap meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye meri beti ke liye. Woh abhi chhoti thi, uske saath aisa kaise kar sakte hain log? Meri Khushbu ke Qatilon ko saza milni chahiye. Humein bas insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Khushbu Kumari ka baap bol raha hoon. Meri beti Khushbu ke saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Aaj uska post-mortem hua hai Jawahar Lal Medical College, Bhagalpur mein. Doctor sahab ne report di hai, sir... unhone bataya hai ki meri beti ka gala dabake maara gaya hai! Strangulation se maut hui hai uski, dum ghutne se aur shock se. Ye toh seedha seedha qatl hai, sir! Doctor ne bola maut 12 se 24 ghante pehle hui thi post-mortem se. Sochiye, meri bachhi ko kitni takleef hui hogi! Please, aap jaldi action lijiye, sir. Hamein insaaf chahiye, uske katilon ko saza milni chahiye. Meri Khushbu ko aise kaise maar sakte hain koi?

Sahab, main Neha Khatri hoon. Meri shaadi ke baad se hi mere sasur aur saas ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Roz-roz taane maarte the, dahej ke liye tang karte the. Unhone mujhe maara-peeta bhi hai, gaaliyan bhi di hain aur jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Maine badi mushkil se himmat karke unke khilaaf FIR darj karwai thi (FIR No. 154/2015), sections 498A, 323, 504, 506 mein. Police ne investigation ke baad charge-sheet bhi file kar di thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log High Court chale gaye hain, Article 226 aur Section 482 Cr.P.C. ka hawala dekar, meri complaint ko khatam karwana chahte hain, apni charge-sheet quash karwana chahte hain. Sahab, yeh log aise bach nahi sakte. Mujhe justice chahiye. Maine jo itna sab saha hai, uska hisaab hona chahiye. Aap please kuch kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, meri beti Shaina ki zindagi barbaad ho gayi! Woh sab uske shohar ki galti hai. Uska affair chal raha tha Asma naam ki ladki se. Main aur mere pati ne kitni koshish ki, haath-pair jode ki Shaina ka ghar bas jaaye, uska rishta theek ho jaaye apne pati aur sasural walon se. Par unhone ek na suni, meri beti ko bahut pareshaan karte the. Uska rishta hamesha bigda hi raha. Ek baar toh woh 1-1.5 mahine mere paas hi aa gayi thi, itni dukhi thi. Phir unhone bade bade waade kiye ki ab sab theek ho jayega, meri beti ko wapas le gaye the April 2012 se pehle. Uske baad bhi unhone meri beti ko chain se nahi rehne diya... mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai ye court case mein. Assam sarkaar ke khilaaf mera case chal raha hai, aur mere vakil hain N.N.B. Choudhury ji. Judge sahab, Hon'ble Justice Kaushik Goswami hain. Pata nahi kya system hai, itne saare kanoon aur faisle hain, par meri sunwai hi khatam nahi hoti. Pichle saal 21 December se shuru hua, fir 22 Jan, 25 Jan, 30 Jan, aur ab February mein bhi 20 aur 22 ko tareekhein thi. Har baar bus nayi tareekh mil jaati hai. Gareeb aadmi hoon, sahab, itni baar court ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke thak gaya hoon. Rozgaar chhoot raha hai, paise kharch ho rahe hain. Bas insaaf chahta hoon, kab milega?

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai court mein, aur uski sunwai Hon'ble Justice Kaushik Goswami sahab ke saamne ho rahi hai. Mere liye toh vakeel sahab MR. N N B CHOUDHURY hain, woh dekh rahe hain sab. Lekin doosri taraf se toh State of Assam wale hain, unke bade vakeel hain. Sir, December 2023 se yeh tareekhein pad rahi hain — pehle 21.12.2023 ko thi, phir 22.01.2024, 25.01.2024, 30.01.2024, aur abhi February mein bhi 20.02.2024 aur 22.02.2024 ko hearings ho chuki hain. Itni baar court ja chuka hoon, intezaar karte karte thak gaya hoon. Bas insaaf chahiye mujhe, Sir. Pata nahi kab yeh sab khatam hoga.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon isliye aapke paas aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga Deoria mein, hamare Bhatparani thane mein ek bahut bada case tha, jisme Section 302 IPC lagi thi, mere bhai ka murder hua tha. Uss case (Crime No. 221/2010) mein, court ne 2014 mein us katil ko umar qaid ki saza sunai thi, aur 20,000 ka jurmana bhi lagaya tha. Humne socha tha finally insaaf mila hai. Lekin Sir, ab humein pata chala hai ki woh convict phir se appeal kar raha hai, apni saza kam karwane ke liye ya bahar aane ke liye. Itne saalon baad, kya humari pareshani khatam nahi hogi? Meri family bahut darr rahi hai, agar woh bahar aa gaya toh humari jaan ko phir se khatra ho sakta hai. Please sir, kuch kijiye, humein bachaiye. Mujhe bahut tension ho rahi hai.

Sir, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Ye jo Siri hai, Munakka hai, Misri hai, aur Ram Gahan... in sab ne milke humara jeena haram kar diya tha. Bade mushkil se police ne Siri, Munakka, aur Misri ko pakad ke jail bheja tha, socha ab chain ki saans lenge. Par sir, Ram Gahan toh abhi bhi khule ghoom raha hai! Aur ab pata chala hai ki ye sab appeal kar rahe hain! Matlab kya, ye baahar aa jayenge dobara? Humara kya hoga? Meri family ko bahut darr lag raha hai. Meri suno sir, inko dobara jail mein hi rakho, khaaskar Ram Gahan ko bhi andar karo. Hum gareebon ki koi sunega ya nahi?

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon mere saath kya hua. Woh 14 April 2010 ki shaam thi, kareeb paune saat baje. Main apne ghar ke paas hi tha, Sidharth Extension mein, House No. 131-B ke bilkul saamne, Pocket C ke paas. Sir, yehi aapke Sunlight Colony PS ka area hai. Vahan kuch log aaye aur unhone mujhe bina wajah ke zabardasti rok liya, mera raasta rok diya. Sir, unki poori planning thi, ek saath milkar unhone mujhe ghera. Aur phir unhone mujhe bahut maara-peeta. Mere shareer pe chotein aayi hain, dikhaun aapko? Mujhe dard ho raha hai. Sir, unhone mujhpe hamla kiya hai, inko saza milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Raj Pal bol raha hoon. Meri suno sir, mujhe Meerut mein 2002 mein ek case mein phasa diya gaya tha, jabki main begunah tha. Raja Ram Saroj naam ke judge ne mujhe saza suna di. Tab se main jail mein hoon, Agra jail mein band hoon. Itne saal ho gaye, ab 2010 mein meri appeal file hui hai. Kya kasoor tha mera? Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir. Itne saal jail mein kaat diye. Please, meri appeal jaldi suni jaaye, main toh bas riha hona chahta hoon. Mujhe galat fasaaya gaya hai.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri suniye, please. Mujhe court se bail mili thi, ek case mein main tha aur bail mil gayi thi. Par abhi, pata hai kya hua? Mujhe wapas pakad liya hai, sir! Aur usi ilzaam pe pakda hai jiske liye mujhe pehle hi bail mil chuki thi. Yeh toh galat hai na? Jab court ne mujhe bail di hai, toh fir se usi baat pe kaise detain kar sakte hain? Un logo ne toh mere puraane cases ka status bhi nahi dekha. Mere jo papers the, unko properly check bhi nahi kiya gaya. Aise kaise bina dekhe detain kar sakte hain, sir? Meri toh life kharab ho rahi hai. Please meri madad kijiye, sir. Yeh toh kanoon ka ghalat istemal hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Woh log na, jinke khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh ab mere case ko band karwana chahte hain. Kehte hain ki saboot mein kami hai, ya phir sab kuch galat hai. Par sahab, yeh to saara jhooth hai! Jo bhi unki arguments hain na, ki saboot theek nahi ya kuch aur gadbad hai, woh sab to poori sunwai (trial) mein hi decide hoga na? Aise kaise koi kah de ki case hi khatam kar do? Police ne chargesheet banayi hai, usme saaf-saaf likha hai ki kitna bada jurm hua hai. Unhone jo kuch kiya hai, woh toh ekdum sangheen apradh hai! Woh sochte hain ki bas aise hi case khatam ho jaayega, par aisa nahi chalega. Mera case itna halka nahi hai ki bina sune hi dismiss ho jaaye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Poora trial hona chahiye, tabhi sach saamne aayega aur unko saza milegi.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aa raha kya ho raha hai. Maine itne saboot diye, bataya kaise galat kiya mere saath, par woh log keh rahe hain ki yeh toh bas 'contradictory evidence' aur 'deficiencies' hain jo 'disputed questions of fact' hain. Bolte hain ki inko toh 'full trial' mein hi decide kiya ja sakta hai. Matlab aur kitne saal court ke chakkar kaatoonga main? Meri toh rooh nikal jaayegi! Aur suno, unki taraf se bol rahe hain ki yeh case 'quash' nahi ho sakta, kyunki chargesheet mein toh saaf-saaf 'cognizable offenses' dikh rahe hain. Agar offense dikh raha hai, toh fir yeh sab natak kyun? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad karo, please.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh koi sun hi nahi raha. Maine kitne saboot diye hain, saare contradictory evidence bhi dikhaye, jo deficiencies hain woh bhi batayi, par woh log keh rahe hain ki yeh toh bas 'disputed questions of fact' hain. Bolte hain poora trial chalega tab jaake decide hoga. Yeh kya baat hui? Mere paas sab clear hai, phir bhi mujhe ghooma rahe hain. Aur unki taraf se toh keh rahe hain ki chargesheet mein saaf-saaf cognizable offense dikh raha hai, case ko quash nahi kiya ja sakta. Matlab meri baat ki koi value hi nahi hai kya? Meri toh zindagi kharab ho rahi hai is sab mein, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Hanumesh, Sanjay Nagara police station mein complaint karne aaya hoon. Main BMTC bus (number KA-01 F 4368) ka conductor hoon, aur mere saath mere driver Syed Zahir bhi hain. Sir, 7 October 2015 ki baat hai, hum apni duty pe the. Ek aadmi ne humein bahut pareshaan kiya, sir. Usne humein gaali galauj di, sabke saamne insult kiya. Usne humein maara bhi aur dhakka-mukki ki. Hamare sarkari kaam mein usne rukawat daali. Sir, hum public servant hain, hum apni duty kar rahe the. Usne humari beizzati ki aur humein chot bhi pahunchai. Please sir, uske khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo. Bahut galat hua hai humare saath.

Sir, main bohot darr gayi hoon aur pareshaan bhi. Nadeem ne mere saath bohot galat kiya hai. Usne meri marzi ke bina, zabardasti mere saath ganda kaam kiya hai. Yeh ek baar ki baat nahi, sir. Usne toh baar-baar aisa kiya hai, jabardasti. Pichle hafte bhi usne mere saath wahi ganda kaam kiya tha, mujhe bohot takleef hui. Kal 10 April ko meri maalkin Juhi ne mujhe itna maara ki main rote hue ghar se bahar nikal gayi. Tab saamne Gulam bhaiyya ki biwi ne mujhe andar bulaya aur meri haalat dekhkar pucha. Maine unhe sab bataya hai. Ab main yahan aayi hoon, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please us Nadeem ko saza dilao.

Sir, main bahut majboor hoon, meri madad karo. Yeh jo Suresh, jiska naam Pichki bhi hai, aur uska bhai Naresh, Banwari Lal ke bete hain, inhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata hai, Suresh Kumhar Gali, Rampura, Delhi mein rehta hai aur Naresh D-5, Gali no.8, Kunwar Singh Nagar mein. Kal raat inhone mere saath bahut galat kiya. Mujhe dhamki di, mera samaan bhi le gaye. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, saab. Meri family bhi safe nahi hai inki wajah se. Please, inpe sakht action lo, nahi toh ye mujhe jeene nahi denge. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye please. Woh Santosh Gautam, Sohan Lal aur Ram Dayal, teeno ne milkar meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Baat 2 November 2009 ki shaam 6 baje ki hai. Main apne ghar, Neb Sarai ki Gali No. 1 mein, H. No. 26 mein tha. Yeh teeno badmash mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus aaye. Unhone mujhe galat tareeke se roka, pakad liya. Fir, inhone mere saath bahut buri tarah se maar-peet ki. Mujhe chotein aayi hain. Aur Sir, jaate-jaate mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi de gaye ki agar complain ki toh anjaam bura hoga. Main bahut darr gaya hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir. Please inke khilaaf sakht action lijiye.

Sir, main aapko 25 June 2017 ki baat batane aaya hoon. Us din na, un logon ne mujhe aise hi pakad liya aur ek jagah band kar diya. Meri koi galti nahi thi, phir bhi unhone mujhe bahut maara, sir! Itna maara ki main behosh hone wala tha. Mujhe toh theek se yaad bhi nahi ki kya kya hua, bas itna pata hai ki uske baad PCR van se mujhe Jagpravesh Hospital le jaaya gaya tha. Wahan police wale bhi aaye the, unhone mujhse baat ki thi. Meri haalat bahut kharab thi us waqt. Ab tak mujhe us incident ka darr lagta hai. Sir, main bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile. Un logon ko saza honi chahiye jinhone mere saath aisa kiya.

Sir ji, main Kawalpreet Kaur hoon. Mujhe aur meri behen Amanpreet ko bahut takleef hui hai. Ye baat 4 March 2015 ki raat 10 baje ki hai, Baljeet Nagar mein Shiv Park ke saamne wali gali mein. Ek aadmi ne, jiska naam toh main abhi nahi janti, usne jaan-boojh kar hum dono par khaulta hua garm paani phenk diya. Meri poori body jal gayi hai, aur meri behen Amanpreet ko bhi kaafi chot aayi hai, usko bhi bahut jal gaya hai. Humara koi kasoor nahi tha, usne bina wajah hume aise maara hai. Bahut dard ho raha hai sir, humari halat kharab hai. Please usko pakdo aur saza dilwao, usne humare saath bahut galat kiya hai. Hume insaaf chahiye!

Sir, dekho na, mere saath kya ho gaya! Main Ravi Ranjan hoon. Us Rakesh Kumar Mishra ne... usne toh meri jaan hi le li hoti. 13 June 2014 ki baat hai, us din usne mujhe itna buri tarah se maara ki main Sushrut Trauma Centre mein admit ho gaya tha. Meri MLC report bhi bani hai, usmein saaf likha hai 'physical assault'. Usne jaanwaro ki tarah peeta mujhe, Sir. Woh toh kismat achhi thi ki main bach gaya. Usne toh jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi mujhe. Aap dekho na, Section 308 IPC lagna chahiye us par. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, usne mere saath bohot galat kiya hai. Mujhe abhi bhi dard hota hai us din ko yaad karke. Please kuch karo, Sir.

Sir, main Budh Singh, Maidan Garhi Chowk se bol raha hoon. Pichli 1 June 1999 ko shaam 6:30 baje ke kareeb, hamari gali mein kuch gundo ne bahut bawaal kiya. Unhone Asha ko itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, uski beizzati ki, ki woh bechari darr ke maare kaanp rahi thi. Aur phir unhone hum sab par pathar fenkne shuru kar diye! Ishwar Chand, Kanta Devi aur Rajwati ko bhi chotein aayi hain. Lekin unhone mujhe toh buri tarah maara, sir. Mere upar bade-bade pathar maare, mujhe bahut gehra zakhm laga hai. Main bahut dard mein hoon aur pareshaan bhi. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, in sab badmasho par sakht se sakht kaarwai karo. Humein insaaf chahiye, Daroga ji!

Sir, main Raj Kumar Singh hoon. Main bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Woh Tariq Hasan, Sayyad Shabbir Hussain ka beta, jo Jamia Nagar, 110/75, Gali No.02, Gaffar Manzil mein rehta hai... usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata nahi kya chahta hai mujhse. Pichhle kuch dino se bina baat ke mujhe tang kar raha hai. Kabhi gali deta hai, kabhi jaan se maarne ki dhamki deta hai ki mera haal kharab kar dega. Mujhe darr lagta hai sir, bahut darr lagta hai! Main Darya Ganj police station mein hi aaya hoon kyunki mujhe yahi bharosa hai. Please sir, kuchh karo. Meri family bhi darr gayi hai. Ab toh hadd ho gayi hai. Uski wajah se main ghar se nikalne mein bhi darrta hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, please help me!

Sir, main Ranvir bol raha hoon. 29 August 2013 ki baat hai, Vishnu Garden mein kuch logon ne mujh par jaanleva attack kiya tha. Un badmashon ne mujhe bahut maara. Police ko information mili thi, DD no. 11 A par. ASI Ashok Kumar ji mauke par aaye bhi the, par tab tak toh log mujhe uthakar DDU hospital le ja chuke the. Police team hospital mein bhi aayi thi, par us time meri haalat itni kharab thi ki main kuch bol nahi paya, statement de hi nahi pa raha tha. Mujhe bahut dard ho raha tha, sir. Phir IO saahab dobara aaye the raat ko 8:15 baje, tab thoda hosh mein aakar maine apni baat batayi. Un logon ne meri yeh haalat kar di, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Dharamwati, Ashok Kumar ki patni hoon. Main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere sasur Radhey Shyam, jeth Roshan Lal, jeth Chandermal aur jethani Santosh aur Usha ne milkar mere saath bahut bura kiya hai. 9 April 2002 ko subah kareeb 7 baje, H. No. 219, Madangarhi gaon mein, mere apne ghar mein, in sabne milkar mujhe buri tarah maara-peeta. Sir, un sabki niyat ek thi, sabne jaan-boojhkar mujhe takleef di. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, mera poora shareer dard kar raha hai. Yeh log mere apne hain, aur inhone mere saath itni berahami se maar-peet ki hai. Main Mehrauli PS ki jurisdiction mein rehti hoon. Please, aap meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main Akash hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai! Sir, 4 April 2006 ki baat hai, dopahar mein kareeb dedh baje (01:30 PM) ka time tha. Main Bhagat Singh Park Gurdwara ke saamne, Yamuna Vihar, C-9 Block mein tha. Wahan ek Sardar ji ne mujhe pakad liya, zabardasti roka aur ek dande se bahut buri tarah maara. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi Sir! Unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai aur main bahut dara hua hoon. Kripya meri madad kijiye aur unke khilaaf action lijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Ramwati hoon, Savitri Nagar se aayi hoon. Ye 31 May 2007 ki raat ki baat hai, kareeb 12 baje the. Woh aadmi... woh mere ghar mein ghus aaya, sir, zabardasti. Usne meri izzat pe haath daala, itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di ki main bata nahi sakti. Jab mere bete Umesh ne usko rokne ki koshish ki, toh usne hum dono ko bahut buri tarah se peeta. Humein chot bhi lagi hai. Usne humein jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai, poore parivaar ko. Sir, humein bahut darr lag raha hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko yeh batane aaya hoon. Mera ek case tha Guna mein, ST No. 19/2006, jo 8 February 2007 ko hua tha. Usmein un sabko, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha, saza mili thi, conviction hua tha. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain. Jo Adalat ne unko saza sunayi thi, usko challenge kar rahe hain. Unhein apni conviction aur sentence se takleef ho rahi hai, woh uske khilaaf hain. Sir, itni mushkil se toh mujhe justice mila tha. Ab yeh log phir se court mein chale gaye hain. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, kahin unhein chhoot na mil jaye. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai, sir. Aap kuch kijiye, please.

Sahab, main Rajeev Ranjan Tiwari bol raha hoon. Aaj general election ka din hai, 26 November 1989. Subah se hi main Paatan thane ke under Golhana gaon mein, Booth No. 132 par BJP ka karyakarta bankar kaam kar raha tha. Hum log voting booth se thoda hata ke, kareeb 200 yard uttar ki taraf, voteron ko parchiyaan de rahe the. Sab shanti se chal raha tha. Subah ke lagbhag 10:40 baje the, aur main apni duty kar raha tha, tabhi woh log aa gaye aur... meri toh himmat hi toot gayi. Sir, please meri suniye.

Sir, main Mohinder Singh, Constable. Mujhe toh naukri se hi nikal diya gaya tha, Sir, bina kisi galti ke! Woh chote se Security Court mein meri koi sunwai hi nahi hui thi, bas jaldi-jaldi ek faisla suna diya. Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi us waqt, ghar-baar sab mushkil mein aa gaya. Main itna pareshaan raha, idhar-udhar bhatakta raha insaaf ke liye. Ab jaake, Sir, ek bade Judge sahab ne meri suni hai. Unhone 24 September 1998 ko ek order diya hai. Usme unhone saaf-saaf bol diya hai ki meri dismissal galat thi aur woh pehle wali saari proceedings bhi cancel kar di hain. Aur ab, Sir, mujhe vapas meri naukri pe rakhne ka order mila hai, saare faayde ke saath. Itne saalon baad mujhe thoda sukoon mila hai, Sir. Yeh hi batana tha aapko.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh Kapashera police station mein meri FIR hui thi na, number 213/99. Usi incident ka case hai yeh. Itne saal ho gaye hain, 1999 se main ghum raha hoon. Pehle judgement aaya 2002 mein, phir order aaya. Mujhe laga ab toh insaaf milega. Par ab sun raha hoon ki phir se appeals chal rahi hain. Yeh kya mazak hai mere saath? Meri zindagi kharab ho gayi hai is chakkar mein. Same incident hai, phir bhi baar baar court ke chakkar lagane pad rahe hain. Main ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe kaun sunega? Aap hi kuch karo, sahab, mujhe insaaf dilao. Yeh 20 saal se zyada ho gaye hain.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Kapashera police station mein jo FIR number 213/99 darj hui thi na, uska case abhi tak chal raha hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, 1999 ki baat hai yeh! Woh Additional Sessions Judge ne 2002 mein ek faisla sunaya tha, uski saza bhi sunai thi. Mujhe laga tha ab toh sab khatam ho jayega, par nahi. Ab pata chala hai ki uske khilaaf phir se appeal chal rahi hai. Sir, wohi ek hi mamla, wohi ek hi ghatna, kitni baar sunenge? Meri toh himmat toot chuki hai. Bas insaaf chahiye mujhe, kab milega? Main thak chuki hoon is tareekh pe tareekh se.

Sir, main Lajpat Rai Verma bol raha hoon. Meri suniye please. Woh 2 September 2008 ki baat hai, raat mein A-98, Pandav Nagar mein bahut bada jhagda ho gaya. Meri halat itni kharab thi, sir, mere sir se khoon beh raha tha. Jab Govind Sahai ji aur Sushil Kumar ji spot pe aaye, toh unhone dekha mera haal. Unhone jhat se meri injury report banayi aur mujhe turant LBS Hospital bhej diya, Sushil ji mere saath hi the. Hospital se meri MLC collect karne ke baad, unhone meri statement (Ex.PW1/A) record ki. Ussi ke base pe ruqqa banaya aur FIR bhi register karwa di. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, main itna ghayal ho gaya hoon, bahut dard ho raha hai.

Inspector Sahab, main Binod Tanti bol raha hoon. Meri suno please. Gaon Nishindra mein, Farakka PS ke under, 29.12.78 ko ek bahut bada haadsa hua hai. Susanta Mondal aur uske saath, Hiranmoyee Mondal, Sabitri Mondal, Purnima Mondal aur Upendra Nath Misra – in sab ne milkar, common intention ke saath, Kalipada Mondal ka seedha murder kar diya! Mere saamne, Sahab! Aur Sahab, inhone mujhe bhi nahin chhoda. Mujhe bhi bahut buri tarah se maara hai, mujhe chot lagi hai. Mera toh dil kaamp raha hai yeh sab yaad karke. Woh log gunde hain, insaan nahin. Mujhe un sabke khilaaf complaint likhwani hai. Insaan ko aise kaise maar sakte hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sahab, please meri madad karo.

Sir ji, main Pritam Singh, Gurdaspur se aaya hoon. Meri baat toh suno. Woh Dhian Singh aur Harbans Singh ka jo case tha na, adalat mein 27 February 1998 ko uska faisla aaya tha. Kehte hain ki 'prosecution partly succeeded'. Ab iska kya matlab Sir? Adha insaaf mila mujhe? Meri toh poori zindagi kharab ho gayi hai unki wajah se. Woh log toh khule ghoom rahe hain aur mujhe abhi tak justice nahi mila. Meri khud ki appeal bhi chal rahi hai, aur State ne bhi appeal daali hai unke khilaf, par Sir, main thak gaya hoon. Darr lagta hai ki kahin woh phir se kuch galat na kar dein. Kuch toh karo, please.

Sir, main Gangtok ghoomne aayi thi apni do saheliyon ke saath, 15 May 2016 ki baat hai. Humne ek taxi hire ki thi sightseeing ke liye. Wo driver... usne humein bohot pareshan kiya, theek se behave nahi kiya. Hum teeno ladkiyan thi aur wo driver humein pata nahi kahan kahan le gaya, gande tareeke se baat karne laga. Hum bohot darr gaye the, Sir. Maine socha ab toh police ko batana hi padega. Aap please us driver par action lo. Meri saheliyan bhi darr gayi hain. Main aapko saari details dungi, bas aap meri help karo.

Sir, main Ram Singh hoon, Adarsh Nagar se. Yeh 21 September 1990 ki baat hai, subah ke lagbhag 11 baje. Meri patni Anaro Devi aur main apne ghar ke paas hi the. Wahan Shri Ram aur Prem Chand aaye aur bina kisi baat ke humein maarna shuru kar diya. Unhone ek bhothre hathiyar se mujh par hamla kiya, jisse mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai, sir. Meri patni Anaro Devi ko bhi unhone ussi hathiyar se maara, uske bhi chot lagi hai. Unki toh niyat hi humein nuksaan pahuchane ki thi. Sir, please unke khilaaf strict action lo, humein bahut dard hua hai aur insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Ramu Lal. Pahar Ganj mein meri readymade garments aur steel items ki dukaan hai, 1998 se ye business kar raha hoon. Poora Sales Tax Department mein registered hoon, sab kaam pakke se karta hoon. Meri poori zindagi isi par tiki hai. Assessment Year 2002-2003 ki baat hai. Maine M/s DD Enterprises ko, jo G-134, Multani Dhanda, Pahar Ganj mein hain, steel balls bechi thi. Pure ₹23,50,000/- (teentees lakh pachaas hazaar) ka maal tha, Sir! Unhone mujhe ST-1 form number 22A 893932 bhi diya tha aur uski payment bhi receive hui thi. Abhi tax department se notice aaya hai, keh rahe hain ki us form mein ya payment mein kuch gadbad hai. Meri itne saalon ki kamaai aur izzat daanv par lag gayi hai. Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri kya haalat hai... Jin logon ne mere saath yeh sab kiya tha na, unke khilaaf Bhopal ki Special Judge MP/MLA court ne 21 January 2019 ko charges frame kiye hain. Un sab par ilzaam laga hai ki unhone mujhe zabadasti uthaya, band karke rakha, bahut maara-peeta bhi tha. Mera saara samaan bhi cheen liya tha, aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Kitna dar gayi thi main, aaj bhi soch kar kaanp uthti hoon. Ab woh log is order ke khilaaf kahin aur appeal kar rahe hain, petition wagera daal rahe hain. Par sir, unko saza milni chahiye jo unhone mere saath kiya hai. Meri suniye, please.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Bohut pareshaan hoon. Mera woh purana case yaad hai aapko, jisme mujhe maara-peeta gaya tha aur zabardasti band karke rakha gaya tha (wohi sections 323 aur 342 IPC waala)? Usmein ab ek aur problem aa gayi hai. Pichle saal, 3 January 2018 ko, ek Special Judge (CBI) ne ek order pass kiya hai. Ab woh mera case jo chal raha tha, use transfer kar diya hai! Mumbai mein, 19th Court, Esplanade waale Additional Chief Metropolitan Magistrate sahab ki adalat mein. Sir, main itni door baar baar kaise jaaunga? Pehle hi itne saal ho gaye, ab phir se naye sire se sab shuru hoga kya? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye, please.

Sir, meri suno, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh log jabardasti meri zameen par ghus gaye the, mere plot mein! Yeh meri property hai, mera ghar hai. Unhone bina permission ke andar ghuspaith ki, aur phir wahi baithe rahe, sirf mujhe pareshan karne ke liye, meri beizzati karne ke irade se. Unki niyat bilkul kharab thi, koi galat kaam karne aaye the. Maine kitni mushkil se yeh zameen banayi hai, aur woh aise hi kabza kar lenge? Court mein bhi saabit ho gaya hai ki yeh sab kuch meri hi jagah par hua hai, koi jhooth nahi. Ab aap hi batao Sir, mujhe insaaf kab milega? Meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, woh log... mere ghar mein ghus aaye zabardasti! Main apne ghar mein tha, socha safe hoon, par unhone meri privacy tod di. Sirf ghuse hi nahi, unhone mujhe khoob maara-peeta, hathiyaron se maara hai mujhe! Dekhiye, abhi bhi dard ho raha hai, bahut chot lagi hai. Upar se itni gandi gaaliyan de rahe the ki main sun bhi nahi sakta tha. Aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi de rahe the. Sir, woh ek nahi the, sab milkar aaye the mujhpe hamla karne. Meri zindagi, mera ghar, sab disturb ho gaya hai. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe un logon se insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Ramu, bijli ka kaam karta hoon, electrician hoon. Meri mehnat ki kamai hai, usi se mera ghar chalta hai. Pichle dino, Mr. Chhaganbhai ke kehne par maine ek jagah wiring ka kaam kiya tha. Par sir, woh jo aadmi hai na, jiske khilaf humne pehle FIR karwai thi, usne mera payment rok liya. Jab main paise maangne gaya toh ulta mujhe dhamki dene laga, mere tools bhi tod diye. Meri to rozi-roti pe ban aayi hai, ghar mein chote bachche hain. Usne mera kaam poora rukwa diya. Ab suna hai woh case hatwane ki koshish kar raha hai, jabki usne mera itna nuksan kiya hai. Main garib aadmi hoon sir, mujhe usse bahut dar lagta hai. Meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf dila do.

Sir, main Ram Singh hoon. Meri ek badi mushkil hai. Humara ek criminal case tha jisme court ne mere haq mein faisla sunaya tha. Woh faisla 15 March 201* (kuch saal pehle) ka tha. Humein laga tha ab sab khatam ho gaya, hum jeet gaye. Par jo Ramesh Chandra Jaiswal the, jinho ne pehle case kiya tha, unki toh death ho chuki hai. Unka beta ab ussi faisle ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai, Sir. Aur ismein itni der ho rahi hai na, kya bataun! Pehle toh unhone appeal file karne mein hi itni der kar di, fir maafi maangi (delay condonation). Ab court ne unhe 17 December 2016 ko order diya ki aur counter affidavit file karo. Meri jeeti hui baat bhi ab tak latak gayi hai. Gareeb aadmi hoon, Sir, kitne aur chakkar kaatunga court ke? Please meri madad karo, yeh log mujhe tang kar rahe hain.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Mere 12 saal ke bete ke saath jo hua tha, usne court mein poora sach bataya tha. Woh khud crime ka shikar hai, victim hai! Uski gawaahi par hi un logon ko saza mili thi. Par ab woh mujrim log, jinhe saza hui hai, woh mere bachche ki baat ko jhootha bol rahe hain. Kehte hain, "Woh toh bachcha hai, uski baat par kaise bharosa kar sakte hain? Koi aur saboot chahiye." Sir, yeh kahan ka insaaf hai? Kya sirf isliye ki mera beta chhota hai, uski sachchi baat ko galat mana jayega? Usne poore himmat se har baat batayi thi, uski baat mein poora vishwas jhalak raha tha. Woh bilkul sach bol raha tha. Meri aapse request hai, please mere bachche ki gawaahi ko kamzor mat hone dijiye. Uska yakeen mat todne dijiye.

Sir, main yahan bahut pareshan hoke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur koi sunne ko taiyaar nahi. Pata nahi kisne, 19 June 2012 ko ek order pass kiya, aur phir 22 June 2012 ko Amravati ke bade judge saab ne bhi uspar mohar laga di. Yeh dono orders mere khilaaf hain, sir. Meri toh saari ummeedien khatm ho gayi hain. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai, yeh injustice hai! Main toh bas ab yahi chahta hoon ki yeh jo galat faisla hua hai, isko kisi tarah badalwaya jaaye. Main iske khilaaf ladna chahta hoon. Aap hi meri madad kar sakte hain. Please, meri situation samjhiye aur mujhe sahi raasta dikhaiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Aaj tak woh din nahi bhooli jab mere apne ko inhone maar diya tha. Varanasi ka case hai, 1977 ki baat hai. Bade mushkil se justice mila tha, kitni pareshaani jheli humne. Mirza, Kishore, Ram Bala, Multaz, Sukhpal, Algauj, Ramdhari, Nithohar, Bansu, Ram Kewal, Swaroop, Keshav, Sriram, Phaggu aur Banarasi, in sab ne milke mera ghar ujaad diya tha. Court ne inko life imprisonment di thi, 302/149 IPC mein saza hui thi. Sir, us din se thodi shanti mili thi ki chalo, insaaf hua. Par ab sun rahi hoon ki woh log phir se... pata nahi kya hoga. Mujhe dar lag raha hai, sir. Meri family abhi bhi unke naam se kaanpti hai. Bas itni dua hai ki unko jo saza mili hai, woh barkaraar rahe. Hum gareeb log aur kitna sehte rahein, sir?

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon ki woh ghatiya aadmi, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya hai, ab anticipatory bail maang raha hai. Crime no. 224/2024, Vidyagiri Police Station mein mera case chal raha hai. Usne mere saath balatkar kiya, mujhe buri tarah mara-peeta, meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki. Usne mujhe dhokha diya, dhamkiyan di, aur gaali galauj bhi ki hai. Mere paise bhi zabardasti cheen liye the. Aap dekho na sahab, itna sab karne ke baad bhi woh bahar ghoomna chahta hai? Kaise himmat kar raha hai woh? Meri request hai, use bail bilkul mat milne dena. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sahab.

Sir, main Swarath, Dujram Kashyap ka beta, Piparkhunta gaon ka rehne wala hoon. Meri umar kareeb 44 saal hai. Humara gaon Lalpur police station ke area mein aata hai, Mungeli zila, Bilaspur ke paas. Sir, mera ek bahut purana case chal raha hai, uska number hai Criminal Appeal No. 1217 of 2013. Aapko kya bataun, itne saalon se main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, un logon ne mujhe bahut tang kiya hai. Court-kachahri ke chakkar kaat-kaat kar thak gaya hoon. Sir, main bas yahi fariyad karne aaya hoon ki meri sunwai ho jaye, mujhe justice mile. Woh log abhi bhi mujhe pareshaan kar rahe hain. Please, meri madad kijiye Daroga ji, main bahut mushkil mein hoon.

Sir, Pranam. Main Swarath, Dujram Kashyap ka beta, Piparkhunta gaon se aaya hoon. Lalpur thane ke andar hi aata hai hamara gaon, Mungeli zila mein. Meri umar 44 saal hai, Sir, pichle kayi saalo se bas pareshan hi pareshan hoon. Mera ek case High Court tak gaya tha, Criminal Appeal No. 1217 of 2013. Uss mamle ke baad bhi mujhe chain nahi mila hai, Sir. Pehle Bilaspur civil district tha, ab Mungeli mein hoon, par takleefein wahi ki wahi hain. Woh saamne wale log, jinke khilaaf pehle bhi ladai ki thi, woh abhi bhi mujhe aur mere parivaar ko dhamka rahe hain, meri zameen pe kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri jaan ko khatra hai, Sir. Itne saal ho gaye, main insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Kripya meri madad kijiye, nahi toh main toh mar hi jaunga. Mujhe aap hi se umeed hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Aapko yaad hoga 2004 ka wo maamla, Crime No. 321/2004, Mainpuri ka. Narendra, Brajesh aur Pintoo alias Surendra ne mere ghar mein ghuskar humein maara tha, gaaliyan di thi aur jaati ke naam par itna zaleel kiya tha. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko bahut chot lagi thi, humein bahut dhakke khaane pade the. Bade mushkil se 2010 mein Special Judge ne unko saza sunayi thi, tab jaakar thodi shanti mili thi. Humne socha chalo insaaf mila. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, meri toh neendein udd gayi hain! Meri family phir se darr gayi hai. Woh log agar chhoot gaye toh humein jeene nahi denge. Please, kuch kijiye sir. Hamein unse bachaiye aur mera insaaf barkaraar rakhwaiye.

Sahab, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki meri life mein kya chal raha hai. Ek bahut zaroori case tha, Crime No. 15 of 2006, jo Vigilance aur Anti-corruption Wing, Trichirapalli mein register hua tha. Yeh meri taraf se corruption ke against complaint thi, itni mushkil se maine awaaz uthai thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh accused log, jinke khilaf maine itni himmat dikhai thi, woh court chale gaye hain. Woh log Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga kar meri FIR (jo 01.11.2006 ko register hui thi) ko hi quash karwana chahte hain, matlab khatam karna chahte hain! Meri poori mehnat, mera poora case barbaad ho jayega agar aisa hua toh. Sir, please kuch kijiye. Mujhe darr hai ki mujhe justice nahi milega. Meri madad kijiye, sahab.

Sir, main bahut pareshani mein aapke paas aaya hoon. Aapko pata hai, 11 June 2013 ko Chikmagalur Sessions Court ne us gunehgar ko saza sunayi thi, jisne meri family ki zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Mujhe laga tha finally insaaf mila hai, ab thoda sukoon milega. Par abhi news mili hai ki woh Cr.P.C. ke Section 374 (2) ke andar apna appeal file kar raha hai. Yeh sunke toh mera dil baith gaya hai, sir! Itne saal ho gaye us baat ko, itni takleefein jheli hain, aur ab woh phir se case kholna chahta hai? Kya matlab hai iska? Humne jo guzara hai, kya woh sab dobara hoga? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh bach na jaaye. Please, aap kuch kijiye, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon... mere saath jo hua na, woh koi dushman ke saath bhi na kare. Ye Bhadravathi Court mein C.C.No.2958/2010 ka case chala tha na, unhi logon ne mereko bahot pareshan kiya tha. Unhone mujhe gaaliyaan di, itni gandi-gandi ki main sun bhi nahi sakta. Meri beizzati ki sabke saamne. Sir, unhone mujhe maara bhi tha, khoob maara tha, mujhe chot bhi lagi thi. Aur toh aur, jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi mujhe aur mere poore parivaar ko. Saath milkar, pura plan banakar un sab ne mujhe target kiya tha. Main bahot darr gaya tha, sir. Meri complaint par unhe 23.02.2013 ko convict bhi kiya gaya, saza bhi mili unhe. Par Sir, woh din aaj bhi yaad aate hain toh dil se darr nahi jaata. Aisi harkatein karne walon ko to... bas! Mujhe bas itna kehna tha.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aayi hoon. Yaad hai, meri Aman Vihar police station mein FIR hui thi, 2015 mein? Woh jo ghatiya aadmi mere peeche pada rehta tha, stalking karta tha, badtameezi karta tha, usne toh mujhe maara bhi aur jaan se maarne ki dhamkiyan bhi di thi. Humne kitni mushkil se case kiya tha! Lekin, Sir, court ne kya kiya? 20 December 2018 ko usko baizzat bari kar diya. Magistrate sahab ne keh diya ki woh nirdosh hai! Ye kaise ho sakta hai? Itna sab kuch hone ke baad bhi usko chhod diya? Mera toh dil toot gaya hai, Sir. Mujhe laga tha insaaf milega, par ab toh woh khule aam ghoom raha hai. Mujhe abhi bhi usse darr lagta hai. Sir, please kuch kijiye, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Kya mujhe kabhi justice nahi milega?

Sir, main yahan aapko apni pareshaani batane aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai na, woh case jismein us aadmi ko convict kiya gaya tha? Judge saab ne usko mujrim maana tha, aur saza bhi di thi. Humne socha tha chalo, ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin sir, ab sunne mein aaya hai ki usne phir se appeal kar di hai! Woh upar ki adalat mein gaya hai, bol raha hai ki uski saza kam karo ya chhod do. Meri to jaan nikal gayi sunke. Humne itni mushkil se woh case jeeta tha, ab woh phir se isko review karwa raha hai. Pata nahi kya Section 39, ya 397, 401 CrPC bolte hain. Sir, woh mera dushman hai, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Uska vakil Y. Chakradhara Raj bhi laga hua hai. Hum gareeb log kahan tak ladenge? Meri aapse yahi request hai, sir, please meri madad karo, uski yeh appeal reject honi chahiye. Mujhe mera insaaf waapas chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon. Pichle saal, woh Ramu ne mujhe itna maara tha, bahut chot lagi thi mujhe. Maine aapke police station mein complaint ki thi. Fir, court mein case chala tha, Kodala ke Judge Sahab ne usko guilty maana tha. Bola tha ki 6 mahine jail mein rahega, Section 323 ka case tha. Usko saza mili thi, sir! Fir usne appeal ki Chatrapur ke bade Judge Sahab ke paas. Wahan bhi woh haar gaya, 21 March 2016 ko, Judge Sahab ne meri baat suni aur uski saza barkarar rakhi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh fir se kahin aur appeal kar raha hai, yeh Criminal Revision bolte hain shayad. Sir, itni mushkil se toh insaaf mila hai. Kahin woh bach na jaaye. Mujhe usse ab bhi dar lagta hai. Meri family bhi pareshan hai. Please sir, kuch kariye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Yeh jo case tha mera, jis accused ne mujh par jurm kiya hai, uska appeal dismiss ho gaya hai. Sessions Judge, Adilabad ne 21.10.2008 ko jo judgment diya tha (Crl.A. No.20 of 2006), uske khilaaf usne appeal kiya tha. Ab yeh naya case (Criminal Revision Case) mein uska appeal toh dismiss ho gaya hai, yeh sunkar thoda chain aaya. Lekin, Sir, uski jo conviction thi, usko modify kar diya gaya hai. Matlab kya hua? Kya usko saza kam mili? Ya case halka kar diya? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha. Main toh poora insaaf chahta hoon. Aap bataiye ab kya hoga? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh phir se bach na jaaye. Meri madad kijiye, Sir. Mujhe poora insaaf chahiye, jo usne kiya hai uski poori saza mile.

Sir, main badi pareshani mein hu. Meri ek bahut purani case thi, 1999 ki. Uska ab jaake High Court Jabalpur mein faisla aaya hai. Judge Rajendra Kumar Srivastava ne 14 August 2019 ko sunaya hai aur 16 August ko post hua hai. Sir, yeh Vinod Sharma, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, uski Criminal Appeal thi (Cr.A. No. 1418/1999). Socho Sir, 1999 se lekar 2019 tak, poore 20 saal ho gaye! Main bas date pe date ginta raha. Ab judgment aaya hai, par mujhe abhi bhi justice poora nahi mila. Meri takleef kam nahi hui hai. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Jagdish Chand. Kal subah ki baat hai, 17 October 2004 ko. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Mere do bhai, Pawan Kumar aur Binder Singh, unki death ho gayi hai. Unki body ka Civil Hospital mein post-mortem bhi hua hai. Aur jo injured the, unka bhi doctor ne medicolegal examination kiya hai. Aapke SHO sahab, SI Paramjit Singh ji, woh khud Civil Hospital aaye the subah. Unhone subah 4 baje meri statement record ki thi. Aur uske baad Sections 304 aur 308 IPC ke तहत meri FIR bhi darj ki gayi hai. Main bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Yeh sab dekh ke mera dil toota hua hai. Mujhe pura bharosa hai ki aap mujhe insaaf dilwaenge.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri takleef badhti jaa rahi hai. Pata nahi ye log kya kar rahe hain. Meri complaint par jo charge sheet (no.1 of 2022) file hui thi, usko ab ye log 'quash' karwana chahte hain. Matlab case hi khatam karna chahte hain! Pichle saal 14 February (14.02.2023) ko, court ne unko bulane ka order diya tha, 'summoning order' tha. Aur court ne mere case ko 'cognizance' bhi liya tha, matlab sunwai shuru ho gayi thi. Ab unka vakeel aaya hai aur bol raha hai ki poora case hi radd kar do. Mere vakeel sahab Bal Keshwar Srivastava ji bhi the wahan. Sir, main itni mushkil se lad raha hoon, aur ab ye sab karke wo log bachna chahte hain. Aap dekho, please, meri madad karo. Inka case band nahi hona chahiye, inhone galat kiya hai mere saath.

Sahab, main Nagashettyhalli, Manjunath Layout se bol rahi hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Pura 1 November 2017 ki raat ki baat hai, kareeb 10:30 baje. Woh chaar log, jo hamare padosi hain, mere ghar No. 263 mein ghus aaye. Bilkul bina pooche, jaise unka hi ghar ho. Unhone aate hi jhagda shuru kar diya. Mujh par haath uthaya, maara peeta. Aur to aur, meri izzat pe bhi haath daala, bahut gandi badtamizi ki. Mera ghar ka samaan bhi tod phod diya, bahut nuksaan hua hai. Jaate jaate jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi de gaye ki agar complain ki toh bahut bura hoga. Sahab, main bahut darr gayi hoon, un sab ne milke mujhe pareshan kiya hai. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Sarvamangala L.M. hoon, Jahnavi Cluster, Sanjay Nagara mein rehti hoon. Bahut pareshaan hoon, sir. Yeh baat hai 3 May 2014 ki raat ke kareeb 10 baje ki. Chaar log the, Accused number 1 se 4. Unhone mere saath itna galat kiya, sir. Mere apartment mein ghus kar, unhone mujhe maara-peeta, pakad ke rakha, jaane nahi diya. Meri izzat pe haath daalne ki koshish ki, badtameezi ki. Gaali galoch bhi ki aur mere ghar ka kuch nuksaan bhi kiya. Sir, main itni darr gayi thi, akeli thi. Woh charon milkar yeh sab kar rahe the. Meri sunwai kijiye, sir. Unhe saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Bellanduru se aayi hoon. Woh Sunil Kumar hai na, jo apne aap ko pata nahi kya samajhta hai, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Jo 4th Cross pe rehta hai, woh Sunil Kumar.V, Venkataswamy Reddy ka beta, uski wajah se main bahut pareshan hoon. Kareeb 35 saal ka hoga. Pata nahi kya chahta hai mujhse. Har din, har time mujhe harass karta hai, kabhi gali deta hai, kabhi dhamki deta hai. Mere ghar ke saamne aakar khada ho jata hai. Sir, mujhe bahut darr lagta hai, ab toh ghar se nikalne se bhi darti hoon. Meri request hai, please aap kuch kijiye. Meri complaint likhiye, isse pehle ki woh kuch aur kar de. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere saath kya hua. Dus March 2021 ki raat ko, kareeb saade nau baje, jab main apne Maruti Mansion Apartment ke parking mein thi, Annayyappa Layout mein, tab woh teen log aaye. Unhone bina kisi wajah ke mujhse jhagda karna shuru kar diya. Sahab, unhone mere saath bahut badtameezi ki, mujhe dhakke maare, gande tareeke se chhua aur bahut gaaliyan bhi di. Jab maine unhe roka, toh unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Main bahut darr gayi thi aur abhi tak uss din ko bhool nahi paayi hoon. Meri izzat par haath daala hai unhone, aur main chahti hoon ki aap un par sakht se sakht kaarwai karein. Mujhe unse bahut khatra hai, Sahab. Please mujhe insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main Rajkumar hoon. Vyalikaval Police Station ke area mein rehta hoon. Aaj main apni complaint lekar aaya hoon. Pichle saal, 10 August 2018 ko, dopahar ke 3 baje ke kareeb ki baat hai. P.G. Halli mein, 8th Main Road par, maine apni Swift car footpath par park ki thi. Toh ek aadmi ne apni car meri gaadi ke bilkul paas laga di, ekdum touch ho gayi. Jab maine use bola ki thoda dhyaan se park karo, toh woh mere upar chillaane laga aur gaali galoch karne laga. Sir, usne mujhe raste mein rok kar maarpeet ki. Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai, Sir. Usne sabke saamne meri bezzati ki aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Main bahut darr gaya hoon aur bahut pareshaan hoon us din se. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sahab, main Suresh P. hoon. Meri suno toh sahi, bohot mushkil mein hoon main. Pichle saal 20 November ko shaam ke 7 baje ki baat hai. Main apne ghar ja raha tha, 7up Circle, Marappa Garden mein, tabhi kuch badmaashon ne mujhe rastay mein rok liya. Zabardasti mujhe pakda, aur itni gandi gandi gaaliyan di, sahab, main aapko bata bhi nahi sakta. Mujhse paise maangne lage, dhamkane lage ki jaan se maar denge. Main bohot darr gaya tha, unhone mujhe maara bhi. Meri body pe chotein aayi hain. Yeh log bohot khatarnak hain, sahab. Meri jaan ko khatra hai. Kripya karke unke khilaaf sakht karwai karo, please. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Padmavathi hoon aur meri saheli Sunitha Kumari. Yeh 13 April 2018 ki shaam ki baat hai, lagbhag paune paanch baje honge. Hum RBI Layout, J.P. Nagar mein park ki taraf walk ke liye ja rahe the. Jaise hi hum 7th Phase ke paas pahuche, ek admi Honda Activa par aaya. Usne bina kuch soche-samjhe hum dono ke chehre par mirchi powder phenk diya! Meri aankhon mein jalan hone lagi aur main kuch dekh nahi pa rahi thi. Tabhi usne meri saheli Sunitha ki Mangalya chain jhat se cheen li aur use dhakka de diya. Uske baad, us harami ne meri taraf dekha aur meri Mangalya chain bhi cheen-ne laga. Maine apni chain kas ke pakad li thi, lekin usne mujhe ghaseet-te hue thodi door tak le gaya. Jab maine chain nahi chhodi, toh usne mujhe kaat bhi liya, Sir! Aur phir usne chaku bhi nikal liya... hum bahut dar gaye the, Sir. Please usko pakdo!

Sir, main Martin Immanuel hoon. Meri baat suniye, sir. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata hai, 16/11/2010 ko, No.1 aur No.2 ne mujhe bahut maara-peeta, gandi gaaliyan di aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Unhone yeh sab milkar kiya tha, sir. Maine iski complaint seedhe court mein ki thi, judge sahab ke paas. Court ne meri baat suni aur meri complaint ko register bhi kiya hai. Ab unhone aapke Sanjaya Nagara Police Station ko bola hai ki is mamle ki jaanch karein aur report submit karein. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Wo log abhi bhi bahar ghoom rahe hain, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Raghavendra hoon. Main aapke paas apni shikayat lekar aaya hoon. Us din, Accused No.1, jise main jaanta hoon, usne mujhe call kiya tha. Woh poora sharaab ke nashe mein tha. Unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Sir, main bahut dar gaya hoon aur mujhe nyay chahiye. Meri kripya report likh lijiye aur un logon par sakht action lijiye.

Sahab, main Hemavathi hoon. Meri shaadi 2005 mein hui thi, aur tab se hi mere pati ne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya hai. Chhoti-chhoti baaton par, woh sharab peekar mujhe gaali dete hain, bezzat karte hain, aur maarpeet bhi karte hain. Meri zindagi unhone bilkul barbaad kar di hai. Ab main aur nahi seh sakti, Sahab. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Barbara Filmer Fernandes hoon. Aaj se kareeb ek saal pehle, 21 March 2021 ko raat ke das baje ka waqt tha. Main apni car park kar rahi thi Reliance Mart shopping mall ke paas, V. Nagenahalli Main Road par. Ye aapke Hebbala thane ke area mein hi aata hai. Main bas apni gaadi park kar rahi thi ki tabhi woh do log, pata nahi kaun the, wahan aa gaye. Unhone mujhe rok liya, gaali-galoch karne lage. Meri izzat par haath daala, mujhe badtameezi se touch kiya, aur dhamkiyan bhi di. Unhone mujhe maara bhi, sahab. Main bahut darr gayi thi. Meri koi galti nahi thi, main bas apni gaadi park kar rahi thi. Mujhe bahut bura laga, meri beizzati hui hai. Aap please un logon ke khilaaf kadi se kadi karwayi kijiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main Padma, bahut pareshan hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai, yeh teeno log, jinke khilaaf maine court mein complaint ki thi. 26 June 2019 ko inhone milkar saazish ki, mujhe maara peeta, meri izzat pe haath daala, aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki tak di. Mujhse zabardasti paise bhi maang rahe the aur mere khilaaf galat kagaz bhi banaye hain. Main toh bilkul toot gayi hoon, darr gayi hoon. Maine jab court mein complaint ki (Section 200 Cr.P.C. ke under), toh court ne meri suni aur aapke Hebbala Police Station ko yeh case investigation ke liye bheja hai (Section 156(3) Cr.P.C. ke hisaab se). Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye in logon se.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri baat suniye please. Woh jo Ajay Bhargava ka case tha na, jiska Crl. Case No. 289386 hai... Tis Hazari ki Mahila Court mein Ld. MM-01 ne 8 May 2019 ko jo faisla sunaya tha. Sach kahun toh, sir, mujhe us judgment se pura insaaf nahi mila. Ab toh usme appeal bhi ho gayi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon, kaise aage badhoon. Main bas apna haq chahti hoon, sir. Woh jo appeal hui hai, mujhe uska darr lag raha hai, ya main us faisle se khush nahi hoon aur ab mujhe aur justice chahiye. Aap meri madad kijiye, sir, please. Mujhe toh yeh Section 374(3) Cr.P.C. wagera kuch nahi pata, bas aap meri sun lo.

Sir, main Hiteshi Arora, ek advocate hoon. Meri ek FIR (No. 322/06) Tilak Marg PS mein 24 August 2006 ko darj hui thi. Main Delhi mein, apne Chamber No. 208, Second Floor se apna kaam karti hoon. Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Mera case court mein chal raha hai, aur main toh pareshan ho gaya hoon. Woh jo Ashok S/o Jagat Singh aur Puneet hain na, jinke khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, unke itne bade-bade lawyers hain – Sh. Rahul Sharma, Sh. Abhishek Sharma aur ek aur, Sh. Himanshu Kaushik. Par sir, jab woh teen-teen log apni baat rakhte hain, toh meri sunta kaun hai? Mujhe lagta hai ki humari aawaaz dab jaati hai. Meri toh neendein udd gayi hain is sab se.

Sir, dekhiye na, mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Main aapko bata raha hoon, 16 October 2009 ki raat thi, kareeb 11 baje honge. Main Geeta Colony mein, woh Gurudwara ke paas wale 13 Block mein tha. Wahan kuch logon ne bewajah mujhse jhagda shuru kar diya aur mujhe bohot buri tarah se maara, Sir. Main zakhmi ho gaya tha aur itni buri halat mein tha ki PCR wale aaye aur mujhe utha kar seedha SDN Hospital le gaye. Wahan mera ilaaj hua, doctors ne meri saari chotein dekhi aur sab likha. Police wale bhi hospital mein aaye the. Meri to koi galti nahi thi, Sir. Mujhe un logon se insaaf chahiye, jinhone mujhe itna dukh diya aur maara.

Sir, main apni fariyaad leke aapke paas aaya hoon. Kal raat ki baat hai, 16 October 2009 ko, theek 11 baje. Main Geeta Colony mein, apne 13 Block, Gurudwara ke paas se ja raha tha. Wahan achanak se kuch logon ne jhagda shuru kar diya aur mujhe bina wajah maarna-peetna shuru kar diya, sir. Meri koi galti nahi thi! Un logon ne mujhe itni buri tarah se maara ki main wahin gir gaya aur behosh ho gaya. Mera pura shareer abhi bhi dard se toot raha hai. Phir police ki PCR van aayi aur mujhe uthakar SDN Hospital le gayi. Wahan doctors ne mera ilaj kiya hai, aur meri MLC report bhi banayi hai. Sir, please un logon ke khilaaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Ajay Mehto bol raha hoon. Yeh baat 25 December 2013 ki hai, sir. Madanpur Khadar mein, JJ Colony ke A-2/1133 mein kuch logon ne mujhse aur mere bhai Ricky se bewajah jhagda kiya. Unhone humein itna maara, itni chotein aayi ki hum behosh ho gaye the. Seedha AIIMS Trauma Center le jaaya gaya humein, sir. Wahan police wale bhi aaye the, SI Rajiv Kumar aur Mahipal ji. Unhone hamari MLC bhi banayi thi, par sir, meri aur Ricky ki haalat aisi nahi thi ki hum kuch bol paate. Bahut dard mein the aur darr bhi gaye the. Aaj 8 March 2014 hai, ab thodi himmat aayi hai. Sir, meri aapse request hai, un gundon ke khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai ho. Please, hamari madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main Raj Kumari hoon. Mujhe apne potey Ram ke baare mein report likhwani hai. Kal, 16 tareekh ko, shaam kareeb 3:30 baje, mera Ram cycle chalaane gaya tha. Woh Valmiki Mandir, Sunder Nagri ke paas hi tha, ki uski cycle do logon ki motorcycle se halki si touch ho gayi. Mera bachcha ghayal ho gaya hai, use GTB Hospital bheja gaya hai. Sir, un gundon ne mere potey ko bina wajah maara hai. Meri aap se hath jod kar guzaarish hai, unke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo. Please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Suresh Kumar, yahaan Ghonda gaon se aaya hoon. Mujhe bahut pareshan kar rakha hai, Daroga ji. Kal shaam ko to Manoj ne seedhe dhamki di ki jaan se maar dega. Meri to neend ud gayi hai, Sir. Please inke khilaf kuch karo, mujhe insaaf dilwao.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki kal mere saath kya hua. Main apni sarkari duty kar raha tha aur tabhi yeh Jitender @ Golu, s/o Rajender Kumar, jo A-407, Camp no.4, Jwalapuri ka rehne wala hai, usne mujh par hamla kar diya. Sir, usne mujhe jaan se marne ki koshish ki! Meri duty mein rukawat daali aur mujhe buri tarah maara-peeta. Main toh bahut darr gaya tha, mujhe laga aaj bachunga nahi. Usne bilkul bhi parwah nahi ki main kaun hoon. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai aur main bahut pareshan hoon. Please sir, uske khilaf kadi se kadi kaarwai karo.

Sir, main Shakuntala bol rahi hoon. Aapke K. M. Pur police station main aaj, 14 August ko aayi hoon, kyuki meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai jo kal raat hua. Sir, 13 August ki woh raat... main kaise bataun? Woh toh ek kaala din tha meri zindagi ka. Main so rahi thi aur woh badmash log mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi darr ke maare. Unhone jo kiya... main bohot pareshan hoon, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Unhe pakadna zaroori hai. Meri madad kijiye, Sahib. Main bohot mushkil mein hoon.

Sir, main Subhash Chander Arora, aapke paas complain leke aaya hoon. Yeh baat 22 June 1996 ki hai, subah kareeb 7 baje. Hum apni dukaan par the, Burari Road pe, RBTB Hospital ke main gate ke paas, shop No.1 pe. Sir, woh do log, unhone milkar saazish ki aur hum par hamla kar diya. Mere saath Kamal Arora bhi tha. Un badmasho ne chaaku se hum dono ko maara, seedhi chot pahunchai. Sir, itna ganda hamla kiya ki humein laga jaan hi chali jayegi. Mujhe bahut dard hua, Sir. Please unko pakdo aur humein insaaf dilao.

Sahab, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai in logo ki wajah se. Yeh Sachin Aggarwal, jo X-3752, gali no. 8, Shanti Mohalla, Delhi mein rehta hai, aur iska partner Pawan Bhagat, jo X-3338, Raghubar Pura, Gandhi Nagar, Delhi ka hai... Mere bachche, meri wife... sab darre huye hain. Sir, please inke khilaaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki kal shaam kareeb 7:30 baje ki baat hai. Hum log antim sanskar se laut rahe the. Jab hum Murugan Mandir ke paas, mere ghar ke saamne se guzar rahe the, tabhi A1 se A6 tak, woh sab log illegally ekaththa ho gaye. Unke paas bade-bade jaanleva hathiyar the, sir. Unhone hum par achaanak attack kiya, humein bahut buri tarah dhamkaya. Meri aur mere dost Sukumar ki jaan lene ki koshish ki, humein bahut chot lagi hai. Unka poora irada humein jaan se maarne ka tha. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Ramesh hoon. Aaj shaam ki baat hai, kareeb 7:30 baje ke aas-paas. Ek antim sanskar khatam hua tha aur hum log wapas ghar ki taraf ja rahe the. Mere ghar ke bilkul paas, Murugan Mandir ke saamne se jab hum guzar rahe the, tabhi woh 6 log, hathiyar leke aa gaye! Un sab ne ikatthe hoke hum pe attack kar diya, Sahab! Un logon ne mujhe aur Sukumar ko gaaliyan di, dhamkiyan di aur jaan se maarne ki niyat se buri tarah se peeta. Meri to jaan hi nikal gayi thi. Humein bohot gehre zakhm aaye hain. Hum bohot darr gaye hain. Aap se vinati hai, in sab gundo pe sakht se sakht action lijiye, Sahab.

Sir, main... meri baat suno please. Mere pati ko, Ravi ko, police ne pakad liya hai. Pata nahi kis baat pe, yeh 5 tareekh ko hua. Subah-subah ghar se utha liya aur keh rahe hain 'preventive detention' hai. Matlab bina kisi galti ke, sirf shaq pe? Mera pati koi criminal nahi hai, sir! Humare chhote-chhote bachche hain, woh ab kya khayenge? Humne toh court mein bhi is detention ke khilaaf challenge kiya hai, humare vakil sahab ne bola hai ki yeh order galat hai aur Article 226 ke तहत humne petition daali hai. Par sir, kab tak aayega insaaf? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, mera pati nirdosh hai. Please kuch kijiye, sir, meri help kijiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri suniye please. Yeh Ravinder Verma, jo Chhote Lal ka beta hai, A-47, Hastsal Vihar, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi mein rehta hai, aur uska bhai Raj Kumar, jo D-83C, Hastsal Vihar, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi mein rehta hai. Sir, main Deepak bol raha hoon. Baat 18 October 2013 ki hai, raat ke kareeb 10 baje the. Main Janak Vihar, Pusa Delhi mein Sai Baba Jagran se apne ghar laut raha tha. Sir, suniye meri baat! Main badi umeed se aapke paas aayi hoon. Mera poora haal bigad gaya hai. Woh Amit Arora, Harish Kumar ka beta, aur Ravi Prakash ne milke meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Aur ab pata chala hai, Amit Arora toh trial ke beech hi mar gaya! Yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Woh toh bina saza paaye chala gaya, meri toh sari mehnat bekar ho gayi. Par Sir, Ravi Prakash, Parmeshwar Prasad ka beta, jo L-2B/69, Mohan Garden, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi mein rehta hai, woh toh abhi zinda hai na? Usne jo zulm kiya hai, uski saza toh milni hi chahiye! Please Sir, us Ravi Prakash ko pakado. Meri guzaarish hai, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye uske khilaaf. Bohat dukh uthaya hai maine.

Sir, main Jahangir Puri, B-1150 se hoon. Meri yeh purani baat hai, jab Amar aur uske kuch saathiyon ne mujhe bahut buri tarah maara tha. Unhone patthar ya kisi cheez se mujhe chot bhi pahunchai thi. Un sab pe IPC 323, 324 aur 34 ke तहत case chala. Court mein toh unhone saaf bol diya tha ki 'Humne kuch nahi kiya' (Not guilty), par bhagwaan sab dekhta hai. Kitne saal lag gaye is case mein, par finally, court ne unko दोषी ठहराया (Convicted). Sach ki jeet hui, sir. Mujhe thodi rahat mili hai ab.

Sir, main Shivam, meri baat suniye. Us din, 25 September 2020 ki raat thi, kareeb dedh baje honge. Main Street number 10, Multani Dhanda, Pahar Ganj mein tha, apne ghar ke paas hi. Aur sir, uske baad unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Bole, 'Dobara dikha toh khatam kar denge.' Sir, mujhe unse bohot darr lag raha hai. Meri jaan ko khatra hai. Kirpa karke unpar action lijiye, sir.

Sir, main Rehana bol rahi hoon. Aaj subah, kareeb 12:15 baje, Jahangir Puri mein mere ghar, E-241 ke bilkul saamne, us aadmi ne mujh par hamla kiya. Sir, usne ek tez dhaar hathiyar se seedha mujh par vaar kiya. Mujhe kitni chot lagi hai, aap dekh sakte hain! Main us time itni ghabra gayi thi ki kya bataun. Usne jaan-boojh kar mujhe maara hai, mujhe nuksaan pahunchaya hai. Meri aapse haath jodkar request hai, please uske khilaaf karrahi karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh toh sarasar zulm hai!

Sahab, main Shan Mohammad hoon. Suno meri baat, please. Yeh 30 April 2012 ki subah ki baat hai, kareeb gyarah baje honge. Main apni Gali No.19, New Mustafabad mein, ghar E-1914 ke saamne khada tha, tabhi Yasin aur Shahabuddin wahaan aa tapke. Sir, Yasin ne mujhe bina baat ke, aise hi pakad liya, poori taakat se. Aur phir... phir Shahabuddin ne mere upar chaku se vaar kar diya! Usne mujhe chaku maar diya, seedha. Mujhe itna dard hua ki main bata nahi sakta. Khoon behne laga, main cheekha. Main toh marte marte bacha hoon Sahab. Maine fatafat 100 number pe call kiya, police wale aaye aur mujhe turant GTB Hospital le gaye. Meri jaan bach gayi, lekin main bahut darr gaya hoon. Sir, please, in dono pe sakht se sakht action lo. Inko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Wo Sammi Kapoor hai na, jo Raghubir Nagar mein, Tanki Wali Jhuggi, RG-172 mein rehta hai, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pata nahi us din kya hua, usne achanak mujh par attack kar diya, kisi tez hathyar se. Mere haath-pair mein gehri chot lagi hai, Sir. Abhi tak us dard se nikal nahi paa raha hoon. Mujhe toh laga tha ki main bachunga hi nahi! Meri FIR bhi darj hui thi pehle, number 236/17 thi uski. PS Khyala waalon ne investigation bhi ki thi. Unhone ab charge sheet bhi file kar di hai. Par Sir, mujhe darr lagta hai, aur main bas ab insaaf chahta hoon. Aise log khule aam ghoomenge toh hum gareebon ka kya hoga? Please, usko kadi se kadi saza dilwaiye. Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main bohot pareshaan hoon. Woh Babu aur uske saathi hain na, unhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Yaad hai na, jo Sriniwas Puri area mein mere saath hua tha? Un logon ne mujhe raste mein roka tha, bina kisi wajah ke, zabardasti. Aur fir, jab maine protest kiya, toh ek hathiyar se unhone mujhe maara peeta. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi us din! Aaj bhi woh dard yaad aata hai toh kaanp uthta hoon. Meri toh FIR bhi hai, 182/04 number. Police ne unke khilaaf charge sheet bhi file kar di hai sections 341, 324, 34 IPC mein. Par sir, mujhe unse abhi bhi darr lagta hai. Inko saza milni chahiye, warna yeh kisi aur ke saath bhi aisa hi karenge. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sahab, main Pushpa hoon. Meri suniye please. 16 April 2011 ki shaam thi, pata nahi kya ho gaya, mere jeth Ramvir, devar Vinod aur Prem Singh, aur mere pati Charan Singh – in sab ne milkar mujhe buri tarah se maara. Meri koi galti nahi thi, bas aise hi shuru ho gaye gaali galoch karna aur phir haath utha diya. Unhone mujhe itna peeta ki main dard se chilla rahi thi, shareer par chot lagi hain. Kaise bhi karke maine PCR call kiya, aur phir police mujhe GTB Hospital le gayi. Doctors ne dekha, bahut bura haal tha mera. Sahab, in logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Please, in sab ke khilaaf strict action lo, mujhe insaaf chahiye, main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske saath woh hadsa hua tha 10 September 2015 ko. Raat ke kareeb 10:30 baje the, East Azad Nagar mein, Footover bridge ke paas, Road No. 57 par. Akhtar Hussain urf Raza aur Parvez, in dono ne milkar mujh par jaanleva hamla kiya tha. Unhone toh mujhe marne ki puri koshish ki thi, Sir! Ab suna hai prosecution ne unke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file kar di hai. Bas aap se yahi request hai Sir, ki jaldi se jaldi mujhe insaaf mile aur unhe unke kiye ki saza mile.

Sir, baat 1 October 2012 ki hai. Dopahar ke kareeb 12:30 baje, main Salman apne dost Suhail ke saath Yamuna Vihar School exam dene ja raha tha. Tabhi Naushad naam ke ek rickshaw driver ne achanak mujhe takkar maar di. Maine bas usse itna kaha ki "bhaiya, thoda dhyan se chalao," toh woh ekdum se gussa ho gaya aur gaaliyan bakne laga. Phir toh uske abba Habib aur bhai Dilshad bhi aa gaye wahan. Un teeno ne milkar mujh par aur mere dost Suhail par blade se hamla kar diya, humein buri tarah ghaayal kar diya. Sir, yeh bahut galat hua hai mere saath. Meri suno aur insaaf dilaao!

Sir, main Rohit, mera naam Rohit hai. Meri baat suniye, sir, bahut zaroori hai. Yaad hai, 12 May 2019 ki raat, kareeb 11 baje? Main B-Block, J.J. Colony, Bakkarwala mein tha, Mundka PS ke area mein. Woh aise bach nahi sakte!

Sir, meri suniye, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Pura 10 June 2018 ki raat ko, lagbhag 11 baje ka time hoga, main apne ghar H-4/2426, Transit Camp, Anand Parbat ke bilkul bahar khada tha. Tabhi woh Sadhu Ram aaya, aur bina kisi baat ke, usne mujhe ek tez dhaar hathiyar se maara, Sir. Jaan boojh kar maara tha mujhe! Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, abhi tak dard ho raha hai. Anand Parbat thane ke area mein hi hua yeh sab. Usne mujhe itni takleef di hai, Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe us Sadhu Ram se insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Inder Sen, aapko apni takleef batana chahta hoon. Yeh ghatna 2 August 2017 ki hai, raat ke kareeb 9:15 baje the. Main Prem Nagar, Gali No. 14 ke paas, Anand Parbat, Delhi mein apne ghar jaa raha tha. Achanak ek aadmi ne bina kisi baat ke mujh par chaku se hamla kar diya. Usne jaan-boojhkar mujhe chaku maara, Sir. Mujhe bahut dard hua, khoon beh raha tha. Simple hurt toh aap keh rahe ho, par mere liye woh bahut badi baat thi. Meri kya galti thi, mujhe aaj tak samajh nahi aaya. Usne mujhe seriously injure kiya tha. Kripya karke us accused ko pakdo, Sahab. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri haalat bahut kharab chal rahi thi. Main bahut financial difficulties mein tha, samajh lo bilkul toot chuka tha. Main in petitioners ko pehle se jaanta tha, acquaintance the mere. Toh, main unke paas gaya aur unse bahut request ki, ki please mujhe apni firm mein naukri de do. Bahut baar bola maine, bar-bar minnatein ki. Par unhone mujhe job dene se mana kar diya. Unhone phir mujhe ek offer diya ki job toh nahi denge, par hum tumhare saath business karenge. Apni firm ke liye contracting ka kaam denge aur tum jo service doge, uspar tumhe commission milega. Sir, meri majboori thi, mere paas koi aur rasta nahi tha. Isliye maine unki yeh baat maan li, saare terms aur conditions agree kar liye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri complaint suniye. Pichle saal, 07.07.2023 ko mere saath bahut bura hua tha. Sangamner City Police Station mein, maine ek FIR darj karwai thi, jiska number hai 561/2023. Un logon ne mujhe maara-peeta (Sections 323, 324), meri izzat pe haath daala (Section 354), mujhe bahut gandi gaaliyan di (Section 504) aur jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi (Section 506). Woh sab ek saath the (Section 34). Ab woh chahte hain ki yeh FIR hi cancel ho jaye, jaise kuchh hua hi na ho. Meri takleef ko jhooth bolna chahte hain. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Maine na Head Constable (AWO/TPO) ke liye Delhi Police mein apply kiya tha, 2022 mein. Woh recruitment nikli thi na, uske liye maine poori mehnat se form bhara tha. Meri toh bas ek hi umeed thi ki police mein naukri mil jaaye. Saare papers bhi dekhe the, saari taiyari ki thi. Pata nahin kya ho gaya, ab usmein kuch problem aa gayi hai. Mujhe samajh nahin aa raha ki mere saath aisa kyun ho raha hai. Maine toh bas apni taraf se poora try kiya tha. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri toh bas yahi request hai ki mujhe meri mehnat ka phal mile aur yeh jo matter hai, iska jaldi se kuch solution nikle. Main bohot pareshan hoon, sir.

Sir, main H. No. 211, Gali No. 10, Than Singh Nagar, Anand Parbat, Delhi mein rehta hoon. Computer repairing, hardware aur software ka kaam karta hoon. Mere ghar ke saamne Vinod apni family ke saath rehta hai. Isse pehle bhi hamari kai baar jhagde hue hain, sir, ye bahut badtameez log hain. Parso, 11.02.2017 ko, raat ke kareeb 10 baje, Vinod ne apni scooty tedhi-medhi park kar di thi. Jab mera kirayedaar Inder ghar wapas aaya, usne horn bajaya ki bhai thoda theek se laga lo gaadi. Itna sunte hi, Vinod ka beta ghar se bahar aaya aur seedha Inder ko gaali dene laga, dhamkiyan dene laga. Sir, yeh log hadd kar rahe hain. Please kuch kijiye.

Sahab, main wohi sufferer hoon, jiske case ka ab finally judgment aa raha hai. Meri FIR No. 153/11, Khanjawala Police Station mein register hui thi. Woh log, jinhone mere upar jaanleva hamla kiya tha, Sections 307/34 IPC aur 25/27 Arms Act ke under. Kitne saal se main bas court ke chakkar laga raha hoon, aur ab sunne mein aaya hai ki trial conclude ho raha hai. Meri toh poori life disturb ho gayi hai. Bas yahi dua hai ki court unko kadi se kadi saza de. Sir, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, aur meri family ko bhi thodi shanti mile. Bahut mushkil waqt dekha hai maine.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Kal raat, woh log mere ghar ke saamne aaye aur bina baat ke jhagda shuru kar diya. Pehle toh mujhe bahut gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, meri bezzati ki. Meri toh himmat hi nahi hui kuch bolne ki. Phir unhone, ek ne danda utha kar seedha mere sar par maara. Mujhe bahut tez chot lagi hai, abhi bhi dard ho raha hai. Woh log mujhe jaan-boojhkar tang karna chahte the, meri shanti bhang karna chahte the. Sir, kripya karke meri complaint likh lijiye aur un sabke khilaf sakht se sakht kaarwai kijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, meri baat suno please. Main Amit hoon, aur main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut bada galat hua hai. Woh Santu, Ram Kishore ka beta, jo Anand Parbat ke Nehru Nagar mein Gali No. 5, H.No. 190 mein rehta hai, usne mere saath bahut bura kiya tha. Yeh baat 28 May, 2016 ki hai. Us din usne jo kiya, main bata nahi sakta. Sahab, mera case Sessions Court mein bhi gaya tha 30 September, 2016 ko, par mujhe ab tak insaaf nahi mila. Woh Paras toh ab raha nahi, par Santu abhi bhi ghoom raha hai. Aap hi batao, main kahan jaun? Meri madad karo sahab, mujhe nyay chahiye!

Sir, main Vikas Sagar bol raha hoon. Woh Janmashtami ki raat thi, 10 August 2012 ki baat hai. Main aur mera dost Ajay (jo ab nahi rahe), mandir se darshan karke paidal ghar laut rahe the. Kareeb 11:30 PM ka time tha, jab hum Gurudwara ke peeche Central Market mein pahunche. Sir, wahi par woh CCL 'R', Kailash, Pawan, Ashu, CCL 'V' aur Amit, in sab ne hum par bina baat ke hamla kar diya. Mujhe toh bas simple chot aayi thi, par woh darr aur takleef main kaise bhool sakta hoon? Sir, un logon ne jo kiya hai, uski saza unhe milni hi chahiye. Meri request hai, please action lijiye.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh din tha 1 May 2019 ka, shaam ka time tha, main kahin jaa raha tha. Achanak se Sonu (Mohd. Aurangzeb) aaya aur usne bina kisi baat ke chaaku nikaal ke seedha meri body mein ghusa diya. Sir, itna dard hua, main wahin zameen par gir gaya. Khoon hi khoon nikal raha tha, meri aankhon ke saamne andhera chha gaya. Main marte-marte bacha hoon, sir. Usne mujhe maarna chaha tha. Kaise koi aise kisi par chaaku chala sakta hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye jo usne mere saath kiya hai. Meri jaan ko ab bhi khatra hai usse. Main Jamia Nagar Police Station mein complain kar raha hoon, please meri help karo.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath kya hua. Yeh 28 July 2018 ki baat hai, raat ke kareeb 9 baje the. Main apni scooty par Matke wali road par, Savitri Mobile Shop ke paas baitha tha. Apne ek dost se baat kar raha tha, bilkul shaanti se. Achanak se, pata nahi kahan se, woh do accused aur unke saath do aur bande, total chaar log aaye aur mere upar peeche se attack kar diya, sir. Mujh par vaar kiya gaya, bina kisi baat ke. Mujhe chot lagi hai. Main toh bas apne dost se baat kar raha tha aur unhone mujh par hamla kar diya. Meri suno sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye in logon se. Inhone mujhe bina wajah maara hai.

Sir, main Ashok Kumar hoon. Meri beti Jyoti bhi mere saath AIIMS Trauma Center mein admit hai, saab. Us din, 3 June 2018 ko, pata nahi kya ho gaya hamare saath. Hum apne ghar par hi the, 778, Mahawar Nagar, Kotla Mubarakpur, New Delhi mein. Achanak se attack hua ya jo bhi tha... humein bahut buri tarah se chot lagi. Itna dard tha ki hosh hi nahi tha. Main aur meri beti, dono injured the. Police ke pahunchne se pehle hi PCR van wale humein AIIMS Trauma Center le aaye the, kyunki halat bahut kharab thi. Baad mein Inspector Raj Kumar saab aur unke saath HC Rajeev Tyagi aur Ct. Virender humein yahan hospital mein dekhne aaye. Main bas yahi kehna chahta hoon ki jisne bhi yeh kiya hai, usko saza milni chahiye. Humein insaaf chahiye, saab. Meri beti bahut darr gayi hai.

Daroga ji, main Arun Kumar hoon. Meri suniye please. Kareeb ek saal pehle ki baat hai, woh Mohd. Rahim Murshid Alam, jisko log Mughla kehte hain na, usne mere upar jaanleva attack kiya tha. Sir, usne chaku se mujh par vaar kiya, mera sab kuch loot liya. Main us din bahut darr gaya tha, laga tha ab jaan nahi bachegi. Meri to rooh kaamp gayi thi. Police ne FIR ki, fir charge sheet bhi file ho gayi hai uske khilaaf, court mein case chal raha hai. Uska woh chaku bhi mila hai jo usne use kiya tha, malkhane mein rakha hai. Sir, bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, aise logon ko saza milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Rajat bol raha hoon. Aaj Baithak Restaurant mein jo hua na, Hari Nagar Extension mein, uske baare mein batana hai. Hum log wahan the, tabhi Sonu Chaudhary ne bina kisi baat ke hum par attack kar diya. Usne mujhe aur mere dost Imran ko buri tarah maara. Dekho na sir, mere kitni chot lagi hai, khoon nikal raha tha. Hum toh bas wahan baithe the, suddenly usne ye sab shuru kar diya. PCR wale bhi aaye the, unhone hi humein yahan bheja aur us Sonu ko bhi unhone hi pakda hai. Meri aapse request hai, usne jo kiya hai na, usko saza milni chahiye. Hum gareeb log hain, humara koi kasoor nahi tha. Bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Bahut dard ho raha hai.

Sahab, main Uma Shanker yahan complain karne aaya hoon. Baat hai 1 March 1997 ki, raat ke kareeb 8:30 ya 8:45 baje. Main aur mera beta Ravi Kumar, hum apna dog leke ghar se bahar ghoomne nikle the. Ravi ne dog ki chain pakdi hui thi. Hum abhi ghar se bas 100 kadam hi door gaye honge ki un logon ne, jo accused hain, humein gher liya. Unhone bewajah humse jhagda shuru kar diya aur mere bete ko bhi maara. Mere dog ko bhi daraya. Sir, meri suniye, yeh bahut galat hua hai. Main toh bas apne bete ke saath ghoom raha tha. Please un par action lijiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath kya zyadati hui hai. Woh 19 July 2006 ki baat hai, raat ke kareeb 8 baje. Manoj alias Saleem aur Vicky alias Lala, in dono ne milkar mujhe bahut buri tarah se maara, Sir. Mujhe laga main toh aaj gaya. Meri kya galti thi, Sir, jo unhone aise hamla kiya? Is poore maamle ki FIR Karol Bagh police station mein darj hui hai, Section 324/34 IPC ke under. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki un logon ko saza mile. Aise gundon ko khule ghoomne ka koi haq nahi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Woh Daljeet Singh alias Bittoo hai na, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Yeh 1 December 2004 ki baat hai, shaam ko saade saat baje ke aas-paas. Main apne ghar ke paas hi tha, Kikkar Wala Chowk, Regar Pura mein, H. No. 5403/70 ke paas. Usne bina kisi wajah ke mujhe maara, bahut buri tarah se chot lagi hai. Usne jaan boojh kar kiya hai, sahab. Mujhe bohot dard ho raha hai aur darr bhi lag raha hai. Aise kaise koi kisi ko bhi maarega? Meri yeh complaint likho aur us Daljeet Singh ke khilaaf Section 324 IPC mein sakht action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Please meri madad karo.

Sir, main Nafish, mujhe log Raja bhi kehte hain, Shastri Park se aaya hoon. Meri baat suniye, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Yeh Alimuddin aur uske bete Mustkeem, Nadeem aur Waseem ne meri zindagi hell kar rakhi hai. Inhone 4 February 2015 ko mujhe pehli baar tang karna shuru kiya tha, aur aaj tak karte hain. Woh date mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai. Kabhi gali dete hain, kabhi dhamki, kabhi faltu ki ladai. Main toh seedha-saadha aadmi hoon, mujhe samajh nahi aata kya karoon. Saab, please kuch karo, main inki harkaton se bahut thak gaya hoon. Meri family bhi darr gayi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Ye baat hai 29 September 2008 ki, dopahar ke lagbhag 2:50 baje. Main Badi Chowpal, Fatehpur Beri, New Delhi ke paas hi tha. Wahan achanak se kuch log ikkathe ho gaye, ek toli banakar. Unka irada hi kharab tha, sir. Un sab ne milkar danga-fasad karne ki koshish ki, mere ghar mein ghusne lage, cheezein tod-fod rahe the aur mujhe bhi chot pahunchane ki koshish ki. Main toh bahut darr gaya tha us din. Meri madad kijiye, sir. Un sab badmashon ko pakdiye.

Sir, main Rakesh Kumar hoon. Meri suno na, please. 22 January 2008 ki baat hai, subah ke 11:30 baje ke aas-paas, main Saraswati Market mein, woh Crust Jinn Hotel ke paas khada tha. Tabhi yeh Devender Singh aaya aur usne mujhe bina wajah rok liya. Mujhe pakad ke rakha, Sir. Aur phir ek sharp cheez se mujh par vaar kiya! Dekho na, mujhe kitni chot lagi hai. Usne mujh par hamla kiya, Sir, mujhe bahut dard hua. Main usse bahut darta hoon. Aap please uske khilaaf kaarwai karo. Usko saza milni chahiye, warna woh aur logon ko bhi pareshan karega. Meri madad karo!

Sir, main Prashant Vihar se aaya/aayi hoon. Meri baat suniye, Sir. Raat ko kuch log mere ghar mein ghus gaye. Woh chori karne ki koshish kar rahe the, mera samaan churana chahte the. Jab maine unhe roka, toh unhone mujh par hamla kiya, maara-peeti ki. Mujhe bohot chot lagi hai, Sir! Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Yeh koi ek aadmi nahi tha, Sir, 2-3 log the. Woh jabran mere ghar mein ghuse aur mujhe zakhmi kar diya. Mera ghar ka saara samaan idhar-udhar kar diya unhone. Bhagwan ka shukra hai ki chori nahi hui, par unhone jo darr aur chot di hai, uska kya? Kripya karke unke khilaaf sakht action lijiye, Sir. Meri FIR darj kar lijiye.
