Pehle bhi aisi ghatna hui hai, FIR No. 281/2008 ke tehat. Please meri madad karein.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kya ho gaya tha us din. Baat hai 24 March 2016 ki shaam 7:35 baje ke aas-paas ki. Un logon ne mujh par itna buri tarah hamla kiya, maara-peeta ki meri haalat bahut kharab ho gayi thi. Mujhe toh bas itna yaad hai ki baad mein main Lady Hardinge Hospital, Delhi mein tha/thi. Wahan police wale Narender ji aaye the, unhone meri medical report (MLC) bhi collect ki aur mera poora bayan record kiya tha. Meri halat dekhkar HC Baljor Singh ji ne bola ki Section 308 IPC ke तहत case banega. Unhone meri tehrir aage di thi. Sir, mujhe un logon se insaaf chahiye, jinhone mere saath itna galat kiya hai. Main bas itna chahta/chahti hoon ki unhe saza mile.

Sir, main aapko ek complaint batana chahta hoon. Yeh baat 17 April, 2010 ki hai, shaam kareeb 7:45 baje ka time tha. Main Karol Bagh mein, gali no. 21, park ke bilkul paas wali barber shop pe tha. Wahan Prem Raj ne bina kisi wajah ke, jaan-boojh kar mujh par ustra se hamla kiya. Usne mujhe bahut buri tarah se chot pahunchai, sir, mera khoon nikal gaya tha. Mujhe bahut dard hua aur abhi tak uska asar hai. Woh aise khuleaam ghoom raha hai. Kripya karke uske khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai karein. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe Virender Pal Singh aur Deepak @ Deepu se bachao. Yeh dono S-48, South Anarkali, Subzi Mandi Chowk, Delhi-51 mein rehte hain. Pata nahi kya problem hai inhe mujhse, roz mujhe gaali dete hain, dhamki dete hain. Meri family ko bhi darate hain. Kal bhi mera rasta rok kar dhamkaya ki agar complaint ki toh theek nahi hoga. Sir, mera jeena mushkil kar diya hai inhone. Please, in par action lo, main bahut darr gaya hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Rizwan bol raha hoon. Meri kya galti thi, pata nahi, par uss din Sunil Singh ne mujh par hamla kiya! Ghonda mein, Boys Senior Secondary School No.2 ke paas usne mujhe pakda aur ek tez dhaar wali cheez se mujh par vaar kar diya. Mujhe bohot gehri chot lagi hai, Sir. Khoon bhi nikla tha, abhi bhi dard ho raha hai. Main toh bas apna kaam kar raha tha, usne jaan-boojh kar mujhe maara hai. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi wahan. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi maarpit aur zulm hai. Aap please uss Sunil Singh par sakht se sakht action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sahab! Meri madad karo.

Sahab, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath kya zyadati hui. Parson raat, 26.09.2017 ko, kareeb 12:15 AM pe, jab main Sultanpuri mein P-2 Block Park ke paas, Lalla Kabadi ki dukaan ke bilkul saamne se jaa raha tha, tabhi do anjaan log aaye. Unhone mujhe roka aur meri jeb mein jo kuch bhi tha, mera phone aur wallet, sab kuch chheen liya. Main bahut darr gaya tha, Sahab. Unhone mujhe dhakka bhi diya aur dhamki di ki agar awaaz nikali toh theek nahi hoga. Meri toh himmat hi nahi hui kuch karne ki. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Woh log kaun the, mujhe nahi pata, par unhone meri saari mehnat ki kamai le li. Meri cheezein wapas mil jaayen toh badi meherbani hogi. Main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sahab, main Uttam Nagar, Nawada Village, Transformer wali gali se aaya hoon. Meri suniye na, kal shaam ka waqia hai. Main ghar ja raha tha ki Kuldeep aur uske saath ke do-teen log mujhe raste mein mil gaye. Bina baat ke hi gaali galoch karne lage, itni gandi gaaliyan di hain! Jab maine rokne ki koshish ki, toh Kuldeep ne mujhe pakad liya, mera collar pakad ke kheenchne laga aur doosre log bhi mujhe maarne pe utar aaye. Bade mushkil se main unke changul se chhoota. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, Sahab. Yeh log aise hi badmashi karte rehte hain. Meri jaan ko khatra hai. Kirpya karke inke khilaf karwai kijiye, main bohot pareshan hoon.

Sir, main Gunga hoon. Meri suniye, sir! Yeh baat hai 6-7 June 2013 ki raat ki, lagbhag 11:30 baje honge. Main Suraj Park ke dhaba pe khana khane gaya tha. Achanak bahar Sunny baitha tha, usne bina kisi baat ke, ekdum se chaku nikal kar meri kamar pe maar diya. Meri hip pe itna gehra zakhm laga hai, bahut khoon beh raha tha. Mera bhai bhi turant wahan aa gaya tha, usne jaldi se 100 number pe call kiya. Police bhi aayi thi, sab poochha unhone. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, us Sunny ne mujhe jaan se marne ki koshish ki hai! Bahut dard ho raha hai mujhe ab bhi. Please, usko pakdo.

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitna pareshaan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai in logon ki wajah se. Woh Rashid hai na, Mazhar Ali ka beta, jo Sultanpuri, F-7/71 mein rehta hai, aur uska beta Sajju, jo usi ki aulad hai aur F-7/W-49 ki jhuggi mein rehta hai, in dono ne meri naak mein dum kar rakha hai. Har din mujhe pareshaan karte hain, gali-galoch karte hain. Kal toh inhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, Sir. Meri koi sunta hi nahi. Please, aap meri madad kijiye. Inko rokiye, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Pappu, Kalle Munna ka ladka, D-498, Buland Masjid, Shastri Park, Delhi se aaya hoon. Mujhe ek bahut zaroori complaint likhwani hai. Woh Saddam aur Badshah, Allabaksh ke ladke hain na, jo D-497, Buland Masjid, Shastri Park mein rehte hain, unhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Baat 8 March 2013 ki hai, us din se lekar aaj tak, unhone mujhe itna pareshan kiya hai ki main bata nahi sakta. Meri family ko bhi woh log daraate-dhamkaate rehte hain. Sir, main aapke paas insaaf ke liye aaya hoon. Please meri madad kijiye, main unse bahut tang aa chuka hoon. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main bohot pareshaan hoon. Meri suno na, saab. Woh Amit Dhillon aur uske ek aur saathi ne, us din, mujh par jaanleva hamla kiya tha. Unhone mujhe bade bade hathiyaron se maara, jisse mujhe bohot gehri chot aayi hai. Ab tak main us takleef se theek se ubhar nahi paya hoon. Meri body par abhi bhi nishaan hain aur dard hota hai. Meri FIR (No. 170/2012) toh tabhi darj ho gayi thi, par mujhe abhi tak proper justice nahi mila, saab. Yeh koi mamooli baat nahi thi, unhone meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi. Main chahta hoon ki police is matter ko seriously le aur Amit Dhillon aur uske partner ke khilaaf kadi se kadi karwahi ho. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, bas.

Sir, meri toh FIR register ho gayi thi, badi mushkil se. Uske baad, police ne acchi tarah se jaanch bhi ki. Pura investigation hone ke baad, accused logon ke khilaaf chargesheet bhi court mein file ho gayi thi. Mujhe laga ab kuch insaaf milega. Judge saahab ne bhi hamare case ka cognizance liya, matlab mamle ko dekha. Accused ko court se summons bhi bheje gaye. Jab woh finally court mein aaye, toh unko bhi chargesheet ki copy de di gayi. Ab main bas yahi soch raha hoon ki aage kya hoga? Kab tak yeh sab chalega, sir? Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, meri suniye na, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Main Sanjay Parve hoon. Ye 13 November 2015 ki raat ki baat hai, kareeb das baje ka time tha. Main Anand Parbat mein Mother Dairy Transit Camp ke paas se jaa raha tha. Wahan do aadmi the, Sir. Un dono ne bina wajah mujhe gher liya aur maarna shuru kar diya. Unhone mujhe haath-pairon se bahut peeta, itna maara ki main gir gaya. Aur Sir, unmein se ek ne toh peeche se sharab ki botal se bhi maara mujhe! Sochiye, Sir, kitni himmat hai unki. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, abhi bhi dard ho raha hai. Please, Sir, un dono ko pakdiye aur mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main Ashok, Jamia Nagar mein rehta hoon. Yeh baat 23.5.1999 ki raat ki hai. Main apni dukaan band karke ghar jaa raha tha. Raat ke lagbhag 8 baje se 9:40 baje ke beech, Okhla Head ke paas, jahaan hamara police post hai, wahaan bohot bada hungama hua. Ek poora jhund tha logon ka, sabke paas khatarnak hathiyaar the, talwarein, dande... pata nahi kya-kya. Yeh sab milkar danga kar rahe the. Meri aankhon ke saamne unhone police station ke andar ghuskar, hamare police waalon par hamla kiya. Unko unki duty karne se roka, maar-peet bhi ki. Sir, itna darr lag gaya tha mujhe, main chhup gaya. Aise log agar khule ghoomenge toh hum aam logon ka kya hoga? Kripya karke in sab par sakht karwayi karo, sir. Hamari suraksha ka khayal rakho.

Sir, main Lala Ram bol raha hoon. Meri suniye please. Bohat saalon pehle, 02.11.2000 ko, theek dopahar 12 baje, Gopal Nagar, Najafgarh, Delhi mein, kuch badmashon ne humein ghera. Main aur meri patni Sheetaji wahan the. Unki pehle se hi common intention thi humein nuksaan pahunchane ki. Unhone humein jaan-boojhkar maara-peeta, Sir. Hamein simple hurt hua, chot lagi. Hum bahut darr gaye the, aaj bhi yaad karke kamp uthta hoon. Main bas insaaf chahta hoon, Sir. Unko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Abdul Latif hoon. Pata nahi ye sab kab tak chalega. Wo 06.04.1997 ka din tha, jab mere saath ye hadsa hua tha. Us din ke baad se meri zindagi theek nahi hai. Maine tabhi Hauz Qazi police station mein FIR karwai thi, jiska number 85/97 hai. Jisne ye kiya tha, uska naam Yashpal hai, log use Vinod bhi kehte hain. Uske pitaji ka naam Kesri Singh hai. Mera case court mein 13.06.1997 ko pahuncha tha, uska case number hai 02402R0223972003. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, ab tak bas dates hi mil rahi hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath kya ghinauna incident hua. Yeh 7 October 2007 ki baat hai, raat ke kareeb 10 baje the. Main apni shop ke saamne hi khada tha, address hai A-52/36E, Gali No 16, Nai Basti, Anand Parbat, Delhi. Achanak Bal Singh aur uske do aur aadmi, total teen log, wahan aa gaye. Unka poora iraada mujhe pareshan karne ka nahi, balki attack karne ka tha. Unhone mujhe dhamkana shuru kar diya aur maarne ki koshish ki. Main bahut dar gaya tha Sir. Meri jaan ko khatra tha. Please meri complaint likhiye aur mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Bahut bura hua mere saath.

Sir, main aapke paas ek complain leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Pichle mahine, exactly 16 April ko, mere saath bahut bura hua. Woh paanch log the, Sir. Mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus aaye. Meri family bahut darr gayi thi. Unhone mujhe bahut buri tarah maara-peeta, Sir, hathiyaron se hamla kiya. Abhi tak dard hai body mein. Aur upar se, mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Bohut darr lag raha hai mujhe aur mere parivar ko, Sir. Woh sab ek saath aaye the, unka plan hi tha mujhe nuksan pahunchane ka. Please, un paanchon ke khilaaf kadi action lo, Sir. Main bas insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main Sujeet Kumar bol raha hoon. Aaj bhi mujhe woh din yaad hai, 22 November 2006 ka, jab dopahar ke 2:45 baje, Civil Lines ki Rajpur Road Authority ke saamne, Manoj ne mujh par hamla kiya tha. Woh Nathu Lal ka beta hai, sir. Usne mujhe itni buri tarah se maara tha, chot pahunchai thi. Mera kasoor kya tha, mujhe aaj tak samajh nahi aaya. Civil Lines PS mein uske khilaaf FIR No. 334/06 darj hui thi. IPC ke section 323 aur 324 ke तहत us par case chal raha hai. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile. Usne jo mere saath kiya, uski saza use milni chahiye. Aap please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Pichle mahine ki 31 tarikh ko, Dera Wala Nagar mein H. No. B-182 ke saamne, Rajesh aur uska ek saathi ne mujhe bina wajah roka. Sir, unhone mujhe gandi-gandi gaaliyan di aur phir ek dande se mujh par attack kar diya. Meri peeth par aur haath par bahut chot lagi hai, abhi bhi dard ho raha hai. Khoon bhi nikla tha us din. Main bahut darr gaya tha aur unhone mujhe dhamki bhi di ki agar police ko bataya toh aur bura haal karenge. Sir, please unke khilaaf strict action lo. Unhone mujhe bahut pareshan kiya hai. Mujhe unse insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Akshay Singh, aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki mujhe insaaf chahiye. Pata hai na, woh case jismein mujhe aur Nitin ko un logon ne kitna ghayal kiya tha? Usmein police ne toh sab jaanch kar li, charge sheet bhi file hui aur court ne offense ka cognizance bhi le liya tha. Un dono accused ko charge sheet ki copy bhi mil gayi thi. Aur dekho na Sahab, 17/11/2015 ko court ne unke khilaaf Section 324/34 IPC ke under proper charges bhi frame kar diye the! Lekin ab woh dono accused bol rahe hain ki woh guilty nahi hain, unko toh trial chahiye. MATLAB? Itna sab hone ke baad bhi woh maan nahi rahe? Hum dono, main aur Nitin hi toh gawaah hain. Ab humein gawaahi dene ke liye bulaya jayega. Sir, yeh log jaan boojh kar case lamba kar rahe hain. Meri bas itni guzaarish hai, mujhe jaldi insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main Suman, aapko batane aayi hoon ki 13 July 2010 ko, dopahar ke theek 12 baje, mere saath bahut bura hua. Woh aadmi, daru pee kar seedha meri jhuggi, C-117, Suraj Park, Sector-18, Rohini mein ghus aaya. Sir, woh meri jhuggi mein zabardasti ghusa, mujhe nuksaan pahunchane ki niyat se. Usne ek tez hathyar se mujhpar vaar kiya, jisse mujhe mamuli chotein aayi hain. Aur usne meri beizzati bhi ki, bahut gande shabdon ka istemal kiya. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Dr. Sachin, GTB Hospital se bol raha hoon. Meri complaint hai. Baat 9 December 2006 ki hai, main hospital mein duty par tha, ek patient Bhupender Verma ka ilaaj kar raha tha. Main apna kaam kar raha tha, aur suddenly usne aur uske sath aaye Pawan Verma, Ajay Verma aur Shyam Sunder Verma ne mujh par hamla kar diya. Unhone mujhe maara, peeta. Kya yeh tareeka hai? Hum doctors hain, apni jaan daav par laga kar logon ka ilaaj karte hain, aur badle mein humein maar padti hai? Meri koi galti nahi thi. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai aur main bahut darr gaya hoon. Kripya in sabke khilaf sakht action lijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai inhone. Mujhe poora pata hai inka address, please meri help kijiye. Ek toh Naveen hai, sab usko Chuddi bulate hain, Suresh Chand ka beta hai. Wo Khairpur Village, KM Pur, New Delhi mein F-521, first floor pe rehta hai. Aur doosra Dharuv Sing hai, Lal Bahadur Singh ka beta. Uska ghar Bhagwan Gali, Bhola Nagar, KM Pur, New Delhi mein H.No. 734, 2nd floor par hai. Sir, inhone mujhe itna pareshan kiya hai, main raat ko so bhi nahi paati. Meri suniye please, mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Abdul Nadeem hoon, log mujhe Bablu bhi kehte hain. Meri suno, please. Ye baat hai 22 September 2011 ki, jab mere saath woh sab hua tha. Us din ke baad se meri zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Kitni baar main yahan aaya hoon, kitne applications diye hain, par koi sunwai hi nahi hoti. Aaj bhi main woh din yaad karke darta hoon. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Itne saal ho gaye, ab toh lagta hai jaise sab bhool gaye hain meri takleef. Meri files kahaan hain? Kuch toh karo, please.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, 2004 se ye case chal raha hai, aur ab tak mujhe insaaf nahi mila. Pehle toh 38 log the, unhone mera sab kuch cheen liya tha. Usme se 2 toh bachhe the, pata nahi kya hua unka. Aur ab, Daroga ji, woh 14 log jinko Ahmednagar ke judge ne saza di thi, Bombay High Court ne bhi unki saza barkaraar rakhi thi, woh fir se appeal kar rahe hain! Meri toh neend udd gayi hai. Itni mushkil se thodi shanti mili thi, ab fir se wahi darr, wahi tension. Please, Sir, kuch kijiye. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh log chut na jaayen.

Sir, main Gulab Singh hoon, Vidisha se. Aaj subah, kareeb 10 baje ki baat hai. Main apni khet gaya toh dekha... wahan Karan Singh apna tractor leke meri zameen jot raha tha! Saab, woh hamari zameen hai. Mere pitaji, swargiya Nathu Singh ne, us saal usko girvi rakha tha, par iska matlab ye nahi ki koi bhi aake uspar kabza kar le. Woh hamari kheti hai, hamara guzaara hai! Uska kya haq banta hai meri zameen par hal chalane ka? Yeh toh seedha-seedha hamare saath dhokha hai, zulm hai. Aap se vinati hai, meri madad kijiye. Meri report likhiye, saab!

Sir, main ek aam aadmi/aurat hu. Pichle saal 15 March ko, Shahdol ke Judge Sahab ne un logon ke khilaaf charges lagaye the, jinhone mere saath bahut buri tarah maar-peet ki thi. Mujhko jaan se marne ki dhamki di thi aur sabke saamne gaaliyan di thi. Woh Sessions Case No. 51/2019 tha, Sir. Un par 307, 323, 294 aur 506 (II) jaise bade section lage the. Mujhe laga tha ab toh mujhe insaaf mil jayega. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh log is Judge Sahab ke order ko upar court mein challenge kar rahe hain. Woh chahte hain ki un par se yeh sab ilzaam hat jaayen. Sir, agar aisa ho gaya toh woh phir mujhe pareshaan karenge. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir. Insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main Suresh Kumar, Datia se aaya hoon. Mujhe yaad hai woh din, 19 August 1994, jab un logon ne mujh par hamla kiya tha. Meri haalat bahut kharab thi. Kitne saal lage us case ko ladne mein, Section 324 IPC ke तहत unpar case chala tha. 26 June 2001 ko Second Additional Sessions Judge ne unhe 6 mahine ki kaid aur 500 rupay jurmana sunaya tha. Humein thoda toh insaaf mila tha. Par ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh apni appeal lekar Supreme Court mein chale gaye hain. Sir, itni mehnat, itna dard jhelkar jo thoda insaaf mila tha, woh bhi chhin jayega kya? Main bahut pareshaan hoon, Sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Aaj phir court mein humare case ki sunwai thi, aur wahan dekho kya hua. Humare jo sarkari vakil hain na, woh bol rahe hain ki unko ab tak case diary mili hi nahi hai, jabki intimation di gayi thi. Keh rahe hain ki aur waqt chahiye unhe, arrange karne ke liye. Yeh kya mazak hai? Saamne wale ke vakeel toh fatafat bol rahe hain ki unke paas charge sheet ki copy hai, usi se case ka faisla kar do. Matlab meri taraf se hi der ho rahi hai? Sir, mera case bina matlab ke latka hua hai. Mujhe lagta hai yeh jaan-boojhkar kar rahe hain. Please kuch kijiye, mera insaaf aise hi atka rahega toh main kaha jaunga?

Sir, main Raghubar Dayal hoon. Baat 28 May, 1994 ki hai. Un logon ne, jo abhi court mein hain, mere aur mere saathiyon par buri tarah se hamla kiya tha. Bahut maar-peet hui thi, Sir, mujhe aur mere logon ko chot bhi lagi thi. Humne tabhi complaint ki thi. Kai saalon baad, pichle saal, 27 August, 1996 ko Additional Sessions Judge saab ne order diya tha ki un logon par Section 323 aur 34 IPC ke under charges frame kiye jaayen, matlab un par case chalaya jaaye. Hum thoda sukoon mila tha. Lekin Sir, ab woh log, apne vakeel ke through, Section 397 aur 482 CrPC ka hawala dekar, us Judge saab ke order ko quash karwana chahte hain! Matlab, woh chahte hain ki unpar koi charge na lage, unhe koi saza na mile. Yeh toh galat hai na, Sir? Itni maar khaayi, itna intezar kiya aur ab woh bachna chahte hain? Please, meri madad kijiye, Sir, unhe saza milni chahiye!

Sahab, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Yeh 15 April, 1993 ki baat hai, bahut puraani baat hai lekin ghav abhi bhi taaza hai. Mera aur woh Dasya ke pitaji ka kuyein khodne ko lekar jhagda chal raha tha, hamari zameen ke border ka dispute tha. Us din, 15 tareekh ko, Dasya aur uske pitaji ne milkar mujhe kaam karne se roka. Unhone mere saath bahut badtamizi ki, dhamki di aur mere logon ko bhi daraya. Meri sari mehnat aur jo paisa maine lagaya tha, sab barbaad ho gaya. Maine us din hi police ko inform kiya tha, aur ab aap mujhe insaaf dilaiye. Aise logon ko saza milni chahiye, Sir. Please meri suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri zindagi khatre mein hai. Yaad hai, Narela thane mein meri FIR number 311/2018 darj hui thi? Jin logon ne mujhe itna buri tarah maara tha, dande se bhi peeta tha, Sections 323, 324, 34 lage the unpar... Ab woh log court mein meri FIR ko radd karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, woh gunde hain, anti-social elements hain. Unhone mujhe aur mere parivaar ko jaan se maarne ki dhamki di hai. Kehte hain case wapas le lo, warna achha nahi hoga. Main aur mera parivaar bahut dare hue hain. Mujhe un logon se bachao, Sir. Meri FIR ko quash mat hone dena. Meri aur mere parivaar ki suraksha ki zimmedari lijiye. Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kitna bada zulm hua hai. Woh Mahinder, Vishnu, Daulat Ram alias Kalia aur Salim alias Langra... in charon ne milkar mere apne ki jaan li thi, Sir! Delhi ke Judge sahib ne unko Section 302 aur 34 IPC ke तहत convict kiya tha, aur life imprisonment ki saza bhi di thi. Par ab ye sab appeal file kar rahe hain! 1996 se case chal raha hai, Sir. Kitne saal ho gaye, meri to neendein ud gayi hain. Mujhe bas yahi darr hai ki kahin yeh log phir se bahar na aa jaayen. Vishnu aur Mahinder ko toh bas 8 rupaye ka fine bhi laga tha, itna kam? Meri puri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Please, kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, inko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main Koyyur P.S. mein pehle bhi complaint dene aaya tha. Yaad hai aapko, woh Crime No. 8/2015 wala case? Police ne sab theek se investigate kiya tha aur A.1, A.2, A.3 ke khilaaf charge-sheet bhi daali thi. Un logon ne 17 tareekh ko mujhpar hamla kiya tha, Section 324 IPC ke तहत. Aur public mein bahut pareshani bhi create ki thi, Section 290 IPC ka bhi case hai. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh main accused, A.1, ek petition file kar raha hai, Court mein, C.C.No. 94/2015 ko quash karwane ke liye. Sir, itni mushkil se toh yeh case aage badha hai. Meri darkhwast hai, please, un logon ko bachne mat do. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir. Woh log apni galti ki saza zaroor paayein.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi mushkil lekar aayi hoon. Mere pati ka murder hua tha, aur police ne teen logon ko pakda tha. Main accused, wohi tha jisne asli kaam kiya, aur do uske saath the. Par sir, court ne woh do logon ko toh pehle hi acquittal de diya, unko chhod diya. Ab yeh jo main aadmi hai, isko bhi saza nahi mil rahi hai. Judge sahab keh rahe hain ki is par seedha 302 ka charge nahi lagaya gaya tha, bas 302 r/w 34 ka charge tha. Toh kya ab isko murder ki saza nahi milegi? Woh toh Ernakulam Sessions Court mein case chal raha tha, sir. Itna bada murder hua hai, aur bas is technical baat ki wajah se ek khooni bach jayega? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai. Mera toh ghar barbaad ho gaya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kitne saalon se is case ke chakkar laga raha hoon. Meri suno toh sahi. Woh jo case tha na, 2010 wala, jismein meri complaint thi, ab uski charge sheet tak ko court mein theek se nahi rakha ja raha. Puraane documents hain, important hain. Aur woh Dr. Sanjeev Bhagat hain na, unhone jo bayan diya tha, uski copy aur unka affidavit, sab kuch important hai mere case ke liye. Main chahta hoon ki yeh sab papers judge sahib tak pahunche, taaki unko poori picture clear ho. Pata nahi kyun yeh log delay kar rahe hain, mujhe insaaf chahiye sir. Kitni mushkil se maine yeh sab papers ikatthe kiye hain. Meri toh bas yahi request hai ki yeh sab court record pe aana chahiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske saath Dharamvir alias Babbu aur Ravi Kumar ne itna galat kiya tha. Kitni mushkil se inko Pathankot ke court ne 14 January 2014 ko saza sunai thi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya, chain ki saans aayi thi. Par yeh log phir upar chale gaye, appeal ki Sessions Judge ke paas. Wahan bhi inki appeal 14 May 2015 ko kharij ho gayi thi. Ab pata chala hai ki yeh phir se kahi aur petition file kar rahe hain. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai Sir, kahin yeh nikal na jayein. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi inhone. Please, jo pehle conviction ka order aaya tha, wahi barkarar rehna chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir!

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath jo galat hua tha, uski FIR maine darj karayi thi na? Ab woh log, jin par maine case kiya tha, woh court mein gaye hain. Section 482 CrPC laga ke mere criminal proceeding ko khatam karna chahte hain. Kya matlab hai iska? Maine itni mushkil se himmat karke complaint ki thi, aur ab woh chahte hain ki sab radd ho jaye? Meri toh sunwayi hi nahin hogi phir? Mujhe lagta hai woh bade log hain, paisewale hain, isliye yeh sab kar rahe hain. Meri kya galti hai isme? Main toh sirf insaaf chahta hoon. Aap please meri madad kijiye, sir. Unhe mere case ko aise khatam karne mat dijiye. Mera toh sab bigad jayega. Meri suno, sir, main sach bol raha hoon.

Daroga ji, main Anjali Khurana ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Sir, woh meri apni rishtedaar hai, par usne mere saath jo kiya woh koi dushman bhi nahi karta. Humari Kalkaji mein jo C-30, 1st Floor, DA Flats wali property hai na, usko lekar hamara jhagda chal raha hai. Pata hai, 22 May, 2015 ko usne mujhe raste mein roka aur jaan boojh kar itni buri tarah maara ki mujhe bohot gehri chot lagi. Usne mujhe pakad ke rakha, kahin jaane nahi diya. Maine kabhi socha nahi tha ki ek apna hi rishtedaar aise karega. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe usse insaaf chahiye. Bahut dukhi hoon main, sir.

Sir, main Prem Prasad. Mere saath aur mere dost Kapil ke saath bahut galat hua hai. Pata hai, 13 April 2022 ki raat ko, kareeb 10:30 baje, hum Ashoka Road pe Bangla Sahib Gurudwara ke bilkul saamne, subway footpath pe the. Tabhi Pradeep Mamgain, jisko Meggi bhi kehte hain, aur Amanpreet apne kuch aur logon ke saath aaye. Unhone humein bina wajah rokaa, Sir. Woh log bahut badtameez the. Unhone humein zabardasti pakda aur ek tez dhaar hathiyar se humein chot pahunchai. Mujhe aur Kapil ko dono ko laga hai, Sir. Main bohot darta hun in logon se. Kripya inke khilaaf kadi karwai karo, please. Humari madad karo, saab.

Sahab ji, main Sahab Singh hoon. Meri ek badi pareshani hai, sir. Mera ghar hai E-16, Vijay Vihar, Phase-I, E-Block mein. Wahan pe Vijay, Manoj aur Naveen, ye teen real brothers pichle 14-15 mahine se mere tenants hain. Sir, ye log na toh kiraya dete hain, aur na hi bijli ke bills jama karte hain. Kal raat, 23 August 2010 ko, kareeb 10 baje main unke ghar gaya tha kiraya maangne. Socha tha ki shayad ab de denge. Par inhone phir wahi kiya, kuch bhi nahi diya. Sir, meri toh bahut problem ho rahi hai inki wajah se. Ab main kahan jaaun? Meri madad kijiye, sir. Bahut tang aa gaya hoon.

Sir, main aapko wahi case batane aaya hoon, jismein pehle toh Chingleput ke Sessions Judge ne sabko ba izzat bari kar diya tha. Meri toh saari ummeed hi toot gayi thi uss waqt. Total 28 log the, jinmein se mere apno ke khoon (Section 302 aur 34 IPC) ke liye jinpar ilzaam tha, sab ko chhod diya gaya tha. Par abhi abhi Madras High Court se khabar aayi hai. Unhone Sessions Court ka woh faisla palat diya hai. Criminal Appeal No. 295 of 1970 mein, High Court ne 27 logon ko alag alag apradhon ke liye doshi thehraaya hai. Yeh sunke thoda sukoon mila hai, Sir. Matlab, ab unhe saza milegi jinhone mere parivaar ke saath itna galat kiya tha. Bhagwan ka shukr hai, thoda toh insaaf mila hai.

Sir, main Sati Mitra hoon. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? In do bhaiyon ne, Sunil Chandra Roy aur Satyendra Chandra Roy ne, mere pati, Col. S. C. Mitra ko maar daala. Unki jaan le li! Mera toh sab kuch chheen gaya, Sir. Aur jab yeh sab hua, toh mujhe bhi inhone maara, simple chot pahunchai. Socho, Sir, mera pati bhi gaya aur mujhe bhi maara! Ek teesra bhai tha Amalesh Chandra Roy, usko toh chhod diya, par yeh Sunil aur Satyendra, inhone hi mere pati ko khatam kiya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Kaise jiyungi main ab inke bina? Bahut takleef mein hoon, Sir.

Police wale bhaiya, please meri baat suno. Main Subalpur gaon ki hoon, West Bengal se. Meri umar bas 20 saal hai. Pichle mahine ki 20/21 January ki raat ko, un logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Meri galti bas itni thi, ki maine ek ladke se pyaar kiya jo humari jaati ka nahi tha. Is baat par gaon ki panchayat ne hi order diya, ki mujhe saza milegi. Aur phir un logon ne... sabne milkar... mera gang-rape kiya. Meri izzat loot li, bhaiya! Main ab kaise jioongi? Please, mujhe insaaf dilwao, un sabko saza milni chahiye. Mera ghar Labpur PS ke paas hai, Birbhum district mein.

Sahab, main Mohan Suna hoon, Bangabahal gaon, Bolangir zila se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi, sahab! Mere bete Gajendra Suna ko maar daala hai. 29 June 1970 ki subah thi, mere apne bhaiyon ne... haan, sahab, mere hi sage char bhai aur unka ek beta, sabne milkar ek gundon ki toli banayi. Unka maksad sirf mere bete ko khatam karna tha. Unhone mere masoom Gajendra ka khoon kar diya. Mera ghar ujad gaya, sahab. Maine kabhi socha bhi nahi tha ki mere apne hi mere bete ke dushman ban jayenge. Mujhe un sabke khilaaf sakht se sakht action chahiye. Unko saza milni chahiye. Please, mujhe insaaf dilaiye, main bikh gaya hoon.

Sir, main Laxmi hoon. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye, sir, meri poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Main bas us ladke se shaadi nahi karna chahti thi, toh usne mere upar acid phenk diya! Sochiye, sir, ek ladki ki kya galti thi ki usne apni pasand batayi? Mera chehra... mera poora shareer jal gaya hai. Main ab khud ko sheeshe mein bhi nahi dekh sakti. Itna dard hai, sir, na body mein, na dil mein. Meri kya galti thi? Aise hamle India mein kitne common ho gaye hain, mere jaise kitni ladkiyan iska shikaar ho rahi hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Us zaalim ko saza milni chahiye. Please meri suno, main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, meri suno na! Wo jo accused number 1 hai, jisne mujhe itna maara tha, uska case chal raha hai court mein. Aaj uske bade-bade vakil aaye the. Wo keh rahe hain ki usko jo Section 326 IPC mein saza mili hai na, wo galat hai. Bolte hain ki iski toh charge sheet mein Section 326 laga hi nahi tha, aur ab aise convict kar diya! Sir, usne mujhe itni buri tarah chot pahuchayi thi ki main abhi tak dard mein hoon. Ab uske vakil keh rahe hain ki Section 326 koi chhota offence nahi hai Section 307 se, aur saza bhi dono ki same hai. Matlab, wo bahana bana raha hai apni saza se bachne ke liye! Kya meri choton ka koi matlab nahi? Usne jo kiya hai, uski saza use milni hi chahiye, chahe koi bhi Section ho. Please sir, insaaf dilao mujhe.

Sahab, main Subalpur gaon se hoon. Meri umar bas 20 saal hai. Pichli 20 aur 21 January ki beech waali raat ko, mere saath bahut bura hua, Sahab. Gaaon ke panchayat ne mujhe saza di, Sir. Meri kya galti thi? Maine bas ek ladke se rishta rakha tha, woh bhi kisi aur jaati ka tha. Iss baat par panchayat ne hukm diya, aur phir kuch logon ne milkar mere saath... meri izzat loot li, Sahab. Unhone mere saath galat kiya, mera gang-rape kiya. Yeh sab Labpur PS area ke Subalpur gaon mein hua, Birbhum zila mein. Main toot gayi hoon, Sahab. Main kaise jiyungi ab? Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Un sab logon ko, jinhone yeh ghinona kaam kiya hai, unhe kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir. Main aapke aage haath jodti hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Mera case chal raha hai na, woh accused number 1, 3 aur 12... unke lawyer साहब, Sri Krishna Reddi, bol rahe hain ki unko trial mein 'prejudice' hua hai. MATLAB UNKO LAGTA HAI UNKI BAAT SAHI SE SUNWAYI NAHI HUI? Sir, prejudice toh humko hua hai! Meri zindagi kharab ho gayi hai aur ab yeh log naye-naye bahane bana rahe hain. Woh bolte hain agar unko dobara sunwai mil jaaye (retrial), toh woh baaki points par baat hi nahi karenge. Matlab sidhe-sidhe chhootne ka rasta dhoondh rahe hain. Yeh kya tareeka hai, sir? Aam aadmi ko insaaf kab milega? Har baar naye-naye rules aur 'prejudice' ke naam par case ko lamba kheench rahe hain. Meri taraf se toh koi prejudice nahi dekhta. Bas insaaf chahiye, sir, yeh dobara sunwai mat hone do!

Sahab, main Ram Kumar hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Yeh baat hai 2009 ki, 5 June ko subah-subah kareeb 8 baje, woh Pratap Singh hai na, usne mere ghar pe aake bada hungama kiya tha. Humara ek purana jhagda chal raha tha, aur us din usne hadd hi kar di thi. Maine tabhi aapke station mein report likhayi thi uske khilaaf. Ab pata chala hai ki March 2023 mein ek order aa gaya hai, jisko mujhe wapas karwana hai. Woh order mere khilaaf hai, meri toh samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Meri mushkilein aur badh gayi hain uski wajah se. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main is mamle ko wapas khulwana chahta hoon aur us order ko hatwana chahta hoon. Meri suniye please.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek purani case thi, usmein 06.12.2013 ka ek order aaya tha, main usko wapas bulwana chahti hoon. Mujhe ab pata chala hai ki mera wo case bina meri marzi ke hi court se wapas le liya gaya tha, 'withdrawn' ho gaya tha. Sir, kasam se bol rahi hoon, maine kabhi apne vakil ko nahi kaha tha ki mera case wapas le lo. Ye mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai! Maine kisi ko koi instruction nahi di thi. Mera case chal raha tha, aur achanak se pata chala ki khatam ho gaya. Meri sunwai toh hui hi nahi! Main bas itna chahti hoon ki wo 06.12.2013 wala order wapas liya jaye aur mera case phir se khule. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera case itne saalon se chal raha hai, 2000 se pending hai! Socho, 23 saal ho gaye meri zindagi ke is chakkar mein. Har baar date milti thi, main toh pahunch jata tha court mein, par mere vakil saahab kabhi nahi dikhe sunwai ke liye. Main toh apna sab kuch chhod ke jata tha, par unki taraf se koi nahi aata tha. Ab toh court ne bhi khud se ek naye vakil ko bulaya hai, Amicus Curiae bolte hain, meri madad karne ke liye kyunki mere side se koi nahi aa raha tha. Ye toh achhi baat hai, par socho, itne saal se main akela lad raha tha. Meri toh saari umar nikal gayi is intezaar mein. Bas ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please meri suno.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. 2018 mein, ek gaadi waale ne mujhe itni tezi se takkar maari thi ki meri jaan jaate jaate bachi. Woh toh seedha mujhe maarne ki koshish kar raha tha! Uske khilaaf FIR bhi hui thi, Crime No. 462/2018, Sections 279 aur 308 IPC ke तहत. Humein laga tha ab insaaf milega, lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein case khatam karwane ki koshish kar raha hai, matlab jo charge sheet file hui thi na, usko quash karwana chahta hai, SC No. 547/2019 mein. Toh kya usne jo mere saath kiya, uski koi saza nahi milegi? Mera dard, meri chot, woh sab bekar jayega kya? Sir, please, meri suniye. Mujhe justice chahiye, aise logon ko chhootna nahi chahiye.

Sir ji, main aapko kya bataun, meri kya haalat hai. 2 June 2012 ki baat hai, dopahar ke 12:40 PM ke aas-paas ka time tha. Khureji Khas mein, Kasai Wali Gali, MCD School ke paas, wahan par bahut bada jhagda hua tha. Sir, woh log meri family ke saath maar-peet pe utar aaye the. Itna darra diya unhone ki hum aaj tak us din ko bhool nahi paaye hain. Humne ya kisi aur ne police ko phone bhi kiya tha us waqt. Main chahti hoon ki meri baat suni jaaye aur un logon ke khilaaf action liya jaaye jinhone us din humein itna pareshan kiya tha. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please meri help kijiye.

Sir, main Shyamlal hoon. Aaj, 23.07.2010 ko mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Kuch logon ne mujhe bahut maara-peeta, sir! Main Hanumangarh Town ke Government Hospital mein admit hoon, bahut buri tarah injured hoon. Meri haalat bahut kharab hai. Hospital walon ne hi Hanumangarh Junction police station ko inform kiya tha. Abhi Lekhram ji, police wale, yahan aaye the hospital mein. Unhone meri poori baat suni aur raat ke kareeb 7:50 baje meri statement bhi record ki hai. Maine unko sab kuch bata diya hai ki kaise un badmashon ne mujhe peeta. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir! Un logon ko saza milni chahiye.

Sahab, main Kamlesh bol rahi hoon. Woh din tha 1 September 2011, shaam ke kareeb 5:15 baje. Hum Mundka ke Industry Village mein, House No. 395 ke paas khade the. Kya bataun Sahab, achaanak se Joginder Singh, Bala, Parveen Devi aur Bhim Singh, yeh sab ek saath aa gaye. Sabne milkar hum par hamla kar diya, lathi aur hockey stick se maara, Sahab! Mujhe aur Jyoti ko itni buri tarah maara ki humein bahut gehri chot lagi, grievous hurt hui hai. Devender Singh ko bhi unhone nahi baksha, unhe bhi maara. Meri aapse request hai, in sabke khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai karo. Hum bahut darr gaye hain.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye na. Jo mere saath galat hua hai, uski toh hadd ho gayi hai. Maine aapko saare saboot diye hain. Jitne bhi paperwork the, jo bhi documents the, sab jama kar diye hain. Aur jo bhi zubani gawahiyan hain, woh bhi sab batayi hain, ek-ek cheez. Jisne yeh sab kiya hai na mere saath, uske khilaaf pakke saboot hain mere paas. Aap bas please, usko pakdo aur sachchai samne lao. Koi shaq nahi rehna chahiye ki usne kitna galat kiya hai. Mera to jeena haram ho gaya hai sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye bas!

Sahab, meri baat suno please. Main M. Settu hoon, aur mujhe aapki help chahiye. Yeh 13 January 2014 ki baat hai, shaam ke kareeb 7 baje honge. Main apne office mein baitha tha, tabhi mere bhatije, Shyamu, Krishna aur Sonu, ne mujhe niche bulaya. Jaise hi main niche gaya, maine dekha ki wo log aur unke saath Shakti Bel aur Mukesh bhi the, aur hum sab ko buri tarah maar rahe the. Sir, main, meri patni Rani, Manju, Malti, aur Arumugan, hum sab ko bahut chot lagi hai. Humein AIIMS Trauma Centre le jaaya gaya tha, jahan doctor ne bola ki hum sab bayan dene ke liye fit hain. Sir, please un gundo ko pakdo, humein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri life hell ho gayi hai. Yeh Maya aur uska husband Ashok Kumar, jo WZ-1281, Nagal Raya, New Delhi mein rehte hain, inhone mujhe bahut pareshan kar rakha hai. Main gareeb aadmi hoon, meri sunne wala koi nahi hai. Pichhle kayi dino se yeh log mere saath badtameezi kar rahe hain. Meri zameen ke kaagaz bhi inhone jabardasti rakh liye hain aur wapas nahi de rahe. Jab main wapas maangta hoon toh gaali galoch karte hain, jaan se maarne ki dhamki dete hain. Meri family bhi inse darr gayi hai. Sir, mujhe in dono se security chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Saab, aap meri suno toh, kitni takleef ke baad finally kuch toh ho raha hai! Pata hai, court ne un sab ke khilaaf action le liya hai. Unko pehle bulaya gaya tha, woh jo summons hote hain na. Jab woh aaye court mein, toh unko chargesheet ki copy bhi di gayi hai, jismein sab likha hai ki kya-kya kiya hai unhone. Aur saab, judge saab ne kaha hai ki unke khilaaf *prima facie* case ban raha hai. Ab un par IPC ki dharaein 325, 341, 506(II) aur 34 lag gayi hain. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, saab. Bohot zulm kiya hai unhone.

Sir, main kya bataun, uss din se main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera jo case tha na, woh Anil Kumar Meena ke khilaaf, jismein usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di, usko finally court ne trial ke liye bhej diya hai. Yeh order 18 February 2022 ko, Ms. Manu Shree madam ne diya tha, jo Patiala House Court ki Ld. MM-03 hain. Humara jo State Vs. Anil Kumar Meena case hai, usmein bahut saare gawahon ki list bhi ban gayi hai, unke bayan bhi record hue hain. Bas ab mujhe ummeed hai ki jaldi insaaf milega. Kitna wait karu main aur, sir?

Sir, aapko yaad hai na, maine woh complaint di thi? Haan, wahi, meri FIR toh darj ho gayi thi. Uske baad, apne yahan ke police walon ne bohot achche se jaanch-padtaal ki. Meri baat suni, sab evidence collect kiya. Aur pata hai, un logon ke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file ho gayi hai ab! Court mein bhi case gaya, toh judge saab ne uska pura dhyan rakha. Un gunehgaron ko court se bulawa bhi gaya, summons bheje gaye. Jab woh log finally court mein aaye, toh unko bhi woh chargesheet ki copy mili, jo police ne banayi thi. Ab bas, sir, insaaf ka intezaar hai. Bohot umeed hai mujhe ki jaldi faisla hoga.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Meri toh jaan nikli hui hai inn sab mein. Yaad hai, maine kitni mushkil se FIR karwai thi us din? Uske baad, police waalon ne toh theek se investigation bhi ki, aur pata chala ki unn aaropiyon ke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file ho gayi hai. Mujhe laga chalo ab toh kuch insaaf milega. Fir court ne bhi mamla dekha aur un sabko summons bheje gaye. Woh log court mein aaye bhi the aur unhe chargesheet ki copy bhi mil gayi thi. Ab Sir, aage kya ho raha hai? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, kab tak yeh log aise hi rahenge?

Thanedar sahib, meri suniye! Main Ashok Kumar hoon. Woh Dilawar @ Lala, Vinod aur Kiran, un teeno ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mere ghar mein, A-229, Sanjay Camp, Chanakyapuri mein, zabardasti ghus aaye woh! Kya aise koi kisi ke ghar mein ghus sakta hai? Aur phir un teeno ne milkar mujhe itna maara, itna maara ki poora badan dard kar raha hai. Mujhe bahut gehri chotein aayi hain. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, please un par sakht se sakht action lijiye. Main bahut darr gaya hoon aur mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh Uttam Nagar PS mein jo complaint di thi, uska follow-up kya hua?

Sahab, mera naam Gomti hai. Main Kishangarh, Vasant Kunj se aayi hoon, mera ghar H. No. 101/19 hai. Mere pati Ganesh ne mujhe bahut maara hai, sahab! Pata hai, 15 February 2012 ko, dopahar ke 2:30 baje ke aas-paas, usne mere upar haath uthaya. Itni buri tarah se peeta mujhe ki ab tak dard hai. Uski maar se mujhe kaafi chot lagi hai. Woh toh hamesha se hi aise karta rehta hai, par ab toh hadd ho gayi hai. Meri jaan ka khatra hai usse. Aap please meri suniye aur mujhe insaaf dilaiye, sahab. Main bahut pareshan hoon aur darr gayi hoon.

Sahab, main aapke paas complaint karne aaya hoon. Wo Sumit, jise Mitey bhi kehte hain, aur Praveen Kumar... in dono ne milkar mujhe bahut maara hai, sahab! Mera raasta roka, mujhe dhakka diya aur itni buri tarah peeta ki mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai. Meri toh haddi bhi toot gayi thi, sahab! Bilkul jaan nikal gayi thi meri us din. In dono ne jaan-boojh kar mujhe itna takleef pahunchai hai. Pehle bhi mujhe pareshan karte the, aur us din toh hadd hi kar di. Mujhe darr lagta hai inse, sahab. Kripya inke khilaf karwai karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main apni complaint leke aaya hoon. Meri woh purani FIR hai na, number 262/2008 wali. Jab se maine woh file ki thi, tab se bas intezaar hi kar raha tha. Police ne, matlab hamare IO sahab ne, poori jaanch padtaal ki. Bahut mehnat ki hai, sir. Aur finally, unhone un badmashon ke khilaaf chargesheet daakhil kar di hai. Court ne bhi Rohtash aur Deepak, woh jo hain na, unka mamla serious liya hai. Unko court ne bulaya tha, summons bhi aa gaye the. Woh court mein aaye bhi, aur unko chargesheet ki copy bhi de di gayi hai. Bas, ab umeed hai ki jaldi se insaaf milega. Bahut pareshan ho chuka hoon, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aayi hoon. Mera pati hai Shiva Ram Tiwari, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Hum Mohan Garden, L extension 312, Uttam Nagar mein rehte the. Meri usse shaadi hui thi, lekin usne mujhe itni buri tarah maara hai na, ki main bata nahi sakti. Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai, Sir. Meri haalat bahut kharab hai. Usne mujh par hamla kiya hai, itna ki ab main aur nahi seh sakti. Usne mere upar Section 326 IPC ka jurm kiya hai. Please uske khilaf action lijiye. Mujhe sirf aur sirf insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main Geeta. Meri suno please. Us din, 6 December 2008 ki raat thi, kareeb 9:30 baje. Main apne ghar ja rahi thi, Mangolpuri mein Water Tank ke paas. Achanak Pradeep ne mujh par kuch feka. Pata nahi kya tha, acid jaisa kuch tha. Mere badan mein aag lag gayi. Main behosh ho gayi, Sir. Mujhe hospital le gaye log, tab police ko bhi bataya gaya tha, DD No. 23A tha us din. Us Pradeep ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di, Sir. Mera itna bada nuksan hua hai. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sir. Please kuch karo. Us Pradeep ko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, dekho na, main kitna pareshaan hoon. Yeh Ranjeet Singh, Jaswinder Kaur aur Sarabjeet Singh, yeh teeno mere padosi hain, hum ek hi building mein rehte hain. In logon ne milke mujhe buri tarah maara hai, mere upar attack kiya hai. Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai, doctors ne bola grievous hurt hai. Mere haath-pair bhi tootne se bache hain. Main garib aadmi hoon, mujhe kaisa insaaf milega? Sir, please meri madad kijiye, inhone mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. IPC ke section 325/34 ke तहत inko saza milni chahiye. Sir, main bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile aur yeh log dobara kisi ke saath aisa na karein.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Aaj, 10 April 2002 ki raat thi, kareeb saade nau baje honge. Main apne ghar mein hi tha, tabhi woh badmaash Ajay zabardasti mere ghar mein ghus aaya. Maine usko roka, bola 'bhai, kyun pareshaan kar raha hai?' Lekin usne meri ek na suni, ulta mere daahine jabde pe itne zor se maara ki mera ek daant hi toot gaya, Sir! Khoon nikalne laga. Ab aap hi batao, ghar mein bhi safe nahi hain kya? Us Ajay pe kaarvayi karo Sir, mujhe usse bahut khatra hai aur insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Radhey Mishra, D-50, Om Vihar, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi se hoon. Meri suniye please, bohot pareshaan hoon main. Yeh Anita, w/o Sh. Ram Babu, jo G-45, Vijaya Nagar, Mohan Garden, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi mein rehti hai, isne meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Har roz kuch na kuch naya drama karti rehti hai. Kabhi gali deti hai, kabhi mere ghar ke saamne kooda daalti hai. Aur ab toh hadd ho gayi hai, kal raat mere ghar mein ghusne ki koshish ki thi. Sir, mujhe darr lagta hai, meri family bhi upset hai. Main ek shareef aadmi hoon, mujhe isse bachao. Pura mohalla jaanta hai iski harkaton ko. Sir, please meri help karo, main iski complaint karne aaya hoon.

Sir, main Raj Kumar bol raha hoon. Aapko yaad hai woh Sanjay Tyagi ka case? Usne mujhe itna buri tarah maara tha, mere haath-paer tod diye the, section 325 ka mamla tha. Uttam Nagar PS mein FIR number 753/01 bhi hui thi. Badi mushkil se, 18 December 2017 ko Tis Hazari Courts ki Ld. MM Deepika Singh madam ne use convict kiya tha, aur phir 6 February 2018 ko saza sunai. Ab pata chala hai, Sir, ki woh convict, Sanjay Tyagi, apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Yeh toh sarasar nainsaafi hai! Itni mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha, aur ab woh phir se case khol raha hai. Main bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Mujhe darr lag raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir. Is mujrim ko aise chhootne mat do.

Sir, main yahan bahut mushkil mein aaya hoon. 24 June ko mere saath aur mere parivaar ke saath bahut zulm hua hai. Aziz Khan, Shameen, Azad urf Lalu aur Haseen, in chaaron ne milkar hum par hamla kiya tha. Unhone mere bhai ko jaan se maar diya, sir! Aur mujhe bhi itna buri tarah se peeta ki meri haddiyan toot gayi hain, abhi bhi dard se tadap raha hoon. Woh sab ek saath aaye the, poora plan banake. Meri duniya ujad gayi hai, sir. Mujhe un sabke khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai chahiye. Unhe pakad ke saza do, please.

Sir, main Indu Bala bol rahi hoon. Meri complaint hai Sanjiv Yadav @ Sanju ke khilaaf, jo Virender Singh Yadav ka beta hai. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, Sir. Yeh baat hai 27 November 2014 ki, raat ke kareeb 10:30 baje. Main apne ghar mein thi, H. No. 72, Gali no. 1, Village Saidulajab mein. Yeh Mehrauli police station ka area hai na? Usne mujhe jaan-boojh kar rok kar rakha, Sir. Mujhe kahin jaane nahi diya, jaise bandh kar diya ho. Usne mujhe maara bhi hai, bahut chot lagi hai mujhe. Meri suniye Sir, usko saza milni chahiye. Usne mujhe bina wajah bandh kiya aur maara bhi.

Sir, main Subodh ka father bol raha hoon. Mera beta Subodh, sirf 12 saal ka hai. Uske saath Pitambar School mein bahut bura hua hai. Manoj Kumar ne use itni zor se kaan pe thappad maara ki mere bachhe ka kaan ka parda hi phat gaya hai! Sir, yeh koi chhoti baat nahi hai. Us din, 1 November 2014 ko subah 10 baje ki baat hai, usne mere masoom bachhe pe haath uthaya. Ab tak mera beta takleef mein hai. Uska ilaj chal raha hai, doctor keh rahe hain parda damage ho gaya hai. Mujhe nyay chahiye sir! Aap please us Manoj Kumar ke khilaaf kadi se kadi action lo. Mere bachhe ko takleef mein dekh kar mera dil phat raha hai. Aap hi kuch karo.

Sir, main Deep Enclave Part III, Vikas Nagar se aayi hoon. Mera naam Sunita Devi hai. Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, in Nirmala Devi aur inke bete Rajesh Kumar se. Ye log 62, Gali no. 1, Deep Enclave Part III, Vikas Nagar, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi mein rehte hain, bilkul mere pados mein. Pata nahi kya chahte hain, har roz koi na koi naya jhagda karte hain. Pichhle hafte toh inhone meri dukaan ke saamne kachra daal diya aur jab maine roka, toh Rajesh ne mujhe dhakka diya. Uski maa, Nirmala Devi, bas khadi hoke gaaliyan deti rahi. Mere pati Late Sh. Ram Lal ji ki death ke baad se inhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai, sir. Mujhe chain se jeene nahi de rahe. Meri aapse guzaarish hai, in par koi sakht action lo. Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai inse, meri suno sir.

Sir, aapko yaad hai na, maine woh case file kiya tha? Jo FIR maine karwai thi, uske baad toh police ne khoob achhe se jaanch ki. Pura investigation hua aur fir un badmaashon ke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file ho gayi. Judge sahab ne bhi hamara case dekha aur un sab accused logon ko court bulaya. Jab woh log court mein aaye, toh unko saari chargesheet ki copy bhi de di gayi hai, sir. Ab bas mujhe yehi ummeed hai ki jaldi se jaldi insaaf milega. Kitne din se pareshan hoon, sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Woh 4 October 2008 ki baat hai. Shaam ke kareeb 5 baje honge. Main Baljeet Nagar mein Holi Chowk ke paas se nikal raha tha, jahan woh Police Boot bhi hai. Wahan itna bhayanak jhagda ho raha tha, main toh darr hi gaya. Logon ne gundagardi macha rakhi thi. Itni ladai, itni gaali-galoch... mera toh dil hi baith gaya. Main yahan aapke paas isliye aaya hoon, ki please aap kuch karo is baare mein. Meri family bhi darr gayi hai us din se. Ye log aise kaise lad sakte hain public place pe? Aap please enquiry karo aur action lo, Daroga ji. Mujhe bahut disturb hua hai is incident se.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Aaj, matlab 10 December 2017 ko, main Roshnara Club ke paas, railway line ke side mein tha, Dilli mein. Wahan kuch log the, pata nahi kyun, mujhse faltu mein jhagda shuru kar diya. Bahut ganda jhagda tha, Sir. Unhone mujhe bahut gaali galoch ki, dhakke maare. Meri koi galti nahi thi, main toh bas wahan se guzar raha tha. Mujhe bahut darr lag gaya. Meri beizzati hui hai, Sir. Aap please meri madad kijiye, un logon par action hona chahiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Woh 30 April 2010 ka din tha, Jagatpuri mein F-84/85 ke paas, Saeed Ahmad aur Yunus ne mujhe itna buri tarah maara tha ki meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Unhone meri haddiyan tak tod di thi, sir! Mujhe seedha LBS Hospital bhagna pada tha. Meri haalat bahut kharab thi us din. Police bhi aayi thi, SI Sudhir Kumar aur Aashish ji. Ab unka case court mein chal raha hai, 325/34 IPC ke तहत. Bas meri yahi guzaarish hai, un zalimon ko कड़ी se कड़ी sazaa milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main wohi gareeb aadmi hoon jiski haddi todi thi Om Prakash aur Bimal ne. Aapko yaad hoga, woh Shalimar Bagh PS ka FIR no. 771/02 wala case. Kitne saal ho gaye iss baat ko, 2002 ki baat hai sir! Meri toh puri zindagi kharab kar di unhone. Pehle toh Rohini Court mein Judge Vishal Singh Sahab ne unhe doshi maana, 21 September 2012 ko judgment aaya tha, unko saza bhi sunai thi 4 October 2012 ko, section 325/34 IPC ke तहत. Ab suna hai woh phir se appeal kar rahe hain, uper court mein ja rahe hain. Yeh kya insaaf hai sir? Main kitni baar court ke chakkar lagaunga? Meri suno sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, yeh log phir se bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri madad karo!

Sahab, main Ramu bol raha hoon, Haveli Ajam Khan se. Meri toh rooh kaanp gayi dekh ke. Aaj shaam, lagbhag पौने aath baje (7:45 pm) ke aas-paas, Jama Masjid Bazar mein, maine ek dead body dekhi hai. Ek aadmi bilkul zameen par pada hua tha, koi movement nahi thi. Lagta hai use kisi ne maar diya hai, Sir. Yeh bahut hi horrifying hai. Meri aap se request hai, please jaldi se aake dekho. Pura bazaar darr gaya hai. Kripya karke is matter ko seriously lijiye. Mujhe toh raat ko neend bhi nahi aayegi.

Sir, main Babloo, Jhuggi No. 715, K Block, Bhalasva se aaya hoon. Meri suno, please. Woh Ishrar, hamara padosi... usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai, Sir! Yeh 24 February 2008 ki subah, lagbhag 10:30 baje ki baat hai. Meri biwi Pushpa ne dekha ki uski biwi Shabina... aur phir Ishrar ne mujh par hamla kar diya! Sir, usne mujhe maara, itna maara ki mujhe laga main mar hi jaunga. Usne meri jaan lene ki koshish ki hai. Jahangir Puri PS ne uske khilaaf Section 323 aur 308 IPC mein charge-sheet bhi file ki hai. Sir, woh bahut bada gunda hai. Aap please mujhe insaaf dilaiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main Ram Saran hoon. Meri suniye na, saheb. Yeh baat hai 4 March 2007 ki, shaam ke paanch baje ka waqt tha. Holi ka din tha, sab log khush the. Main apne ghar ke bahar khada tha, tabhi woh sab log aa gaye. Mujhse zabardasti Holi khelne ko kehne lage. Maine mana kiya toh unhone mujh par hamla kar diya, sir! Mujhe maara-peeta, meri jaan lene ki koshish ki. Sir, woh log toh mujhe maar hi daalte! Maine kisi ka kya bigada tha? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unhe kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Meri case mein, jo ek public document ki certified copy thi, uske liye mujhse gawaah maange gaye. Matlab, ek sarkari mohar laga hua kagaz, jise prove karne ke liye kisi witness ki zaroorat nahi hoti, uske liye mujhe court mein gawaah laane ko kaha gaya. Yeh toh seedha-seedha kanoon ke khilaaf hai, Sir! Law mein saaf likha hai ki aise document ke liye gawaah bulaane ki zaroorat hi nahi hoti. Is wajah se mera kitna time waste hua, aur mujhe kitni mental tension hui. Meri kya galti thi? Bas ek official paper tha, phir bhi mujhe itna ghumaya gaya. Please, aap meri madad kijiye, mere saath galat hua hai.

Sahab, main badi umeed se aapke paas aaya hoon. Mere case mein na, ek bahut zaroori sarkari kagaz ki certified copy di thi maine. Woh to public document tha, uski nakal thi bas. Lekin pata nahi kyun, mujhe baar-baar bola gaya ki isko prove karne ke liye gawah bulao. Sir, main kitna bhatka, kitna kharcha hua mera, sirf ek gawah dhoondhne ke chakkar mein! Abhi pata chala hai ki uske liye to gawah ki zaroorat hi nahi thi, woh to kanun ke hisaab se bilkul galat maang thi. Mera itna time waste ho gaya, itni pareshani uthai maine! Woh log seedhe-seedhe galat the. Meri suniye Sahab, aise kaise koi mujhe be-matlab tang kar sakta hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh zindagi hi ulajh gayi hai iss case mein. Shivpuri mein Special Sessions Trial No. 56/1999 chal raha tha mera, uska faisla 3 May 2000 ko aaya tha. Pata nahi kaisa insaaf mila, mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aaya. Ab pata chala hai ki ussi faisle ke khilaaf teen-teen appeals chal rahi hain — Cra.355/2000, Cra. 454/2000, aur Cra.459/2000. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, 2000 ki baat hai, aur ab tak yeh case chal hi raha hai! Meri toh ummeed hi toot gayi hai. Ek hi judgment ko baar-baar appeals mein ghumate rehte hain. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, kab tak aise hi ghoomte rahenge court ke chakkar?

Sir, meri to kismat hi kharab hai, kab se ye court-kacheri ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. Mera ek case tha na, Budaun mein, 1980 se chal raha tha, aap socho kitne saal ho gaye. Pehle jo Sessions Judge ne फैसला sunaya tha, wahi High Court ne bhi confirm kar diya, 2007 mein. Allahabad se bhi mujhe koi relief nahi mili, Sir. Main to tab se tut gaya tha, laga ab to insaaf mila hi nahi. Aur ab sun raha hoon ki phir se yeh appeal mein chala gaya hai. Matlab, meri ladai abhi tak khatam nahi hui? Sir, meri bas ek hi guzaarish hai, mujhe insaaf dilwa do. Bahut ho gaya ab!

Sahab, meri baat suniye. Ye case, jismein Dhamtari court ne us aadmi ko 1999 mein convict kiya tha, woh ab tak chal raha hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, aap sochiye! Mujhe thodi rahat mili thi jab High Court ne bhi 2014 mein judge sahab ke order ko sahi thehraya, meri suni. Laga tha finally ab insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki yeh log phir se appeal mein gaye hain. Meri kya galti hai, Sahab? Main toh bas apne liye insaaf chahta hoon. Itne saalon se bas court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, ab aur nahi. Please, kuch kijiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, dekhiye na mere saath kya ho gaya! Woh Panchu Das aur Jatindra Nath Chatterjee, in logon ne mere upar attack kiya. Poora gang tha unka, Sir! Mujhe itni buri tarah se maara hai ki, meri toh haddiyan tootne se bach gayi, aur sir pe bhi bahut serious chot aayi hai. Ekdum group mein aaye the, sab milke. Meri toh jaan nikal jaati. Aur woh do auratein bhi thi, Durga aur Hazari naam ki, woh bhi unke saath hi thi, pura plan tha unka. Ab sun raha hoon ki unko toh chhod diya gaya hai. Ye kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Hum gareeb logon ko kya insaaf milega aise? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bahut takleef hui hai mujhe.

Sir, woh Aas Mohammad, Akhtar aur Sher Mohammad, un logon ne mere saath jo kiya hai na, main kya bataun! Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai unki wajah se. Unhone mere apne ki jaan le li thi, aur unko court ne pakda tha. Judgement bhi aaya tha 24 December 1999 ko, Section 304 Part II ke तहत. Lekin Sir, sirf 3 saal ki jail aur 5,000 rupaye ka fine? Yeh koi insaaf hai kya? Mera itna bada nuksaan hua hai, aur woh abhi bhi appeal kar rahe hain, apni conviction ke khilaaf. Unko toh aur badi saza milni chahiye thi, taaki unko samajh aata ki unhone kya gunaah kiya hai. Mujhe darr lagta hai, Sir, woh log jaldi bahar aa jayenge toh phir se mujhe ya mere parivar ko pareshan karenge. Meri madad kijiye, Sir. Mujhe asli insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Renu Meena hoon, jo deceased ki maa hoon. Meri beti ko maara gaya tha, aur us case mein, Gurmey Wangchuk Wazalingpa aur baaki jo log the na, un sabko court ne chhod diya hai. Sessions Judge sahab ne 29 July 2016 ko unhe bari kar diya, acquittal de diya! Mere bachche ke qaatilon ko aise hi kaise chhod sakte hain, Sir? Mera dil toot gaya hai, mujhe yakeen nahi ho raha. Yeh insaaf nahi hai mere saath! Isliye maine dobara appeal daali hai, meri appeal ka number Criminal Appeal No. 30 of 2016 hai. Sir, bas itna chahti hoon ki meri beti ko insaaf mile, unhe unke kiye ki saza mile. Please, meri suniye.

Saab, mujhe Bhura se insaaf chahiye. Anand Vihar mein, usne mere saath jo kiya, main bata bhi nahi sakti. Usne mujhe zabardasti band kar diya tha, phir mujhe itna maara ki ab tak uske nishaan hain. Meri haddiyan tod di thi usne, aur meri izzat bhi loot li thi. Jab court ne usko umarqaid ki saza sunayi thi, tab mujhe thodi rahat mili thi. Par ab pata chala hai ki usne toh appeal kar diya hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Saab. Itni mushkil se toh woh jail gaya tha, kahin phir se bahar na aa jaaye. Meri poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, bas yahi chahti hoon ki woh apni saza poori kaate. Usne jo mere saath kiya, uski saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, un teen logon ne jo mere saath kiya tha, woh main kabhi bhool nahi sakti. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi unhone. Pata hai, Trial Court ne unko pakda tha, 23 December 2019 ko unhe doshi thehraya tha, acid attack (326A/34 IPC) ke liye. Phir 29 January 2019 ko unhe saza bhi sunayi thi. Judge sahab ne yeh bhi kaha tha ki mujhe compensation milega, mera haq hai woh. Lekin ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain, is judgment ke khilaaf. Matlab, woh phir se mujhe pareshan karna chahte hain? Sir, meri kya galti thi? Mujhe mera insaaf chahiye, aur jo compensation bola tha, woh bhi milna chahiye. Please unhe rokiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, Sangam Vihar PS mein meri FIR No. 885/2005 thi. Jo badmaash log hain, jinhone mujh par jaanleva hamla kiya tha (Section 307 IPC), unko lower court ne convict kiya tha aur 5 saal ki saza bhi sunai thi 2010 mein. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki wo log judgment ko challenge kar rahe hain, appeal daal di hai. Mujhe phir se darr lag raha hai. Kya matlab hai iska? Meri jaan ko ab bhi khatra hai unse. Meri toh jaan nikalti jaa rahi hai yeh sunkar. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath jo hua na, meri toh rooh kaanp jaati hai. Us ghatiya insaan ne mere bacche ke saath itna galat kiya, usne us masoom ko haath lagaya, maara bhi. Section 323 IPC ke under bhi usne mujhe bohut takleef di. Maine socha tha meri duniya ujad gayi. Uska case West Sikkim ke Gyalshing court mein Special Judge ke saamne chala tha. POCSO Act ke sections 5(m) aur 5(n) ke तहत usne jo ghinawane crimes kiye the, unke liye maine himmat karke complaint darj karayi thi. Bahut lamba struggle tha, Sir. Shukr hai bhagwan ka, 24 February 2017 ko finally usko convict kiya gaya. Thodi shanti mili hai ki insaaf hua, lekin woh dar aur takleef abhi bhi mere andar hai.

Sir, main aapko mere saath jo hua tha, uske baare mein batana chahta hoon. Yeh Goru aur Hajari, yeh jo do log hain na, inhone mujhe itna maara tha ki meri haddiyan tak tod di thi. Bahut zyaada chot lagi thi, Sir. Bhilwara mein hua tha yeh sab. Woh 1985 ka case hai, Sessions Court mein chala tha. Uska judgment 1986 mein aaya tha, tab toh laga ki insaaf mil gaya. Magar, Sir, ab pata chala hai ki yeh log apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Itne saal ho gaye hain, main us din ki chot ab tak nahi bhool paya hoon. Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai ki agar yeh log bahar aa gaye toh phir se meri zindagi mushkil kar denge. Meri aapse request hai, Sir, ki please in logon ko chootne mat dijiye. Jo inhone mere saath kiya hai, uski saza toh milni hi chahiye. Main ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe aapki madad chahiye.

Sir, main Bhakhra Ram hoon. Pichle mahine ki 24 tareekh ko subah-subah, main apne gumshuda oont dhundhne jungle gaya tha. Jab main Moza Durjani ke jungle mein tha, tab wahan kuch log mil gaye. Unhone bina kisi baat ke mujh par ekdum se hamla kar diya, Sir! Lathiyon se mujhe bahut buri tarah maara. Main cheekhta raha, bachao-bachao karta raha. Meri cheekhein sunkar, Ramsingh jo paas mein apni gaay-bhains ke saath tha, woh meri taraf aaya. Usne dekha ki woh log mujhe maare jaa rahe hain. Usne unse bahut minnatein ki, 'Mat maaro ise!' Par un kamino ne Ramsingh ki ek na suni. Ulta, usko bhi dhamkaya ki paas mat aana, warna tera bhi yahi haal karenge. Sir, mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, woh log bahut khatarnak hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, 1977 ki baat hai jab uss zaalim ne mere apne ko maara tha. Dhule ke Judge sahab ne usse saza sunai thi, Section 304 ke तहत usse mujrim maana gaya tha. 14 February 1978 ko use 10 saal ki kadi qaid hui thi. Humne socha tha ki chalo, thoda insaaf toh mila. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh upar ki adalat mein appeal kar raha hai! Sir, itne saal baad, itni mushkil se toh ye faisla aaya tha. Woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish karega? Meri family ko usse jaan ka khatra hai. Please kuch kijiye, Sir. Woh bahar nahi aana chahiye.

Sahab, kya bataun main aapko... woh jo Ahmedabad ka case tha na, 1992 wala, uski baat kar raha hoon. Mera apna, usko un logon ne jaan se maar diya tha, aur mujhe bhi bohot buri tarah peeta tha. Kitne saal ho gaye, main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi thi. Pata hai, woh jo court No. 18 ke Judge sahab hain Ahmedabad City mein, unhone 1995 mein hi ek judgment diya tha. Usmein woh A-1 aur A-3 hain na, unko doshi thehraya tha. Unko Section 304 Part II (jaan lena) aur Section 323 (maarpit karna) ke under guilty mana tha. Aur unko kadi saza, Rigorous Imprisonment di thi. Ab thoda dil ko sukoon mila hai ki chalo, der se hi sahi, par insaaf mila toh sahi. Meri toh bas yahi fariyad thi, sahab.

Sahab, main Gurmeet Ram Rahim bol raha hoon. Meri suniye toh sahi, main kitna pareshan hoon! Mujhe na, yeh court ke do orders ne bilkul tod diya hai. Sir, 3 August 2018 ko ek hi din do orders aaye hain, aur meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Panchkula mein Special Judicial Magistrate, CBI waalon ne paas kiye hain yeh orders. Sir, mera ek purana case chal raha hai na, woh FIR No. RC1(S)/2015 wala, usi se judde hain yeh sab. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Yeh orders galat hain, mujhe inhe challenge karna hai. Aap meri madad kijiye, main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main apni pareshaani batane aaya hoon. Mera ek case court mein chal raha hai, aur wahan judge sahab ya saamne waale vakil ne mere ek document par aitraaz kiya hai. Arre Sir, woh koi aam kagaz nahi tha! Woh toh ek dum sarkari, certified copy thi, ek public document ki nakal thi. Maine socha tha ki yeh toh bas dikha do, kaam ho jaayega. Lekin Sir, mujhe bola gaya ki iske liye bhi gawaah lao! Maine kitni mehnat se woh certified copy nikalwai thi, poore sarkari tareeke se. Par phir bhi bolte hain ki koi aadmi bulao jo isko prove kare. Ab aap hi bataiye, jab woh pehle se hi sarkari nakal hai, uspar Mohar lagi hai, toh usko dobara gawaah se prove karne ki kya zaroorat hai? Yeh toh seedha seedha galat hai, Sir! Meri tarah gareeb aadmi ko kitni dikkat hoti hai aise mein. Please aap dekhiye na, mere saath galat ho raha hai.

Sir, suniye na meri baat! Mai bahut pareshan hoon. Mere saath court mein bahut galat hua hai. Pata nahi kitne crore judgments hain, kitne kanoon hain, sab legal practitioners, researchers ke liye bane hain, phir bhi mere mamle mein itni badi galti kaise ho sakti hai? Mera jo paper tha na, ek sarkari document ki certified copy thi, uske liye mujhse gawah maange gaye! Bolte hain witness lao, prove karo! Jabki kanoon saaf-saaf kehta hai ki aise public document ki certified copy ke liye koi gawah bulane ki zaroorat hi nahi hoti. Ye to seedhi-seedhi kanooni galti hai, Sir. Isi wajah se mera case latka hua hai, meri toh life kharab ho gayi is chakkar mein. Please help kijiye!

Sir, main Satish bol raha hoon. Meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi! Pata hai kya hua? Pichli raat, yaani 25 December 2007 ki subah, lagbhag 3:27 baje ke aas-paas... mera poora badam se bhara truck, woh Tata 407 gaadi number DL-1LD-3195, highway se chori ho gaya! Loot liya sab kuch. Mere driver Shailender aur cleaner Sunil ne bataya ki unke saath yeh sab hua. Unko bhi kitna pareshaan kiya hoga. Mujhe toh jab PS Khajuri Khas se phone aaya, ASI Tilomani Bhatt ji ka, tab meri jaan hi nikal gayi. Unhone bulaaya toh main turant aa gaya apne driver aur cleaner ke saath. Sir, meri mehnat ki kamai thi woh, poora truck badam se bhara tha. Ab kya karunga main? Meri madad kijiye, sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Mera court case chal raha hai na, aur maine ek bohot zaroori document pesh kiya tha. Woh koi aam kaagaz nahi tha, Sir. Ek sarkari daftar se mili hui certified copy thi, ek public document ki. Matlab, bilkul official! Mujhe laga ab toh mera paksh mazboot ho jayega. Lekin wahan pe mere saamne hi bol diya gaya ki nahi, iske liye gawah laao proof karne ke liye. Sir, yeh toh seedhi-seedhi galti hai na law mein? Mera vakil bhi shocked tha, bola aise certified sarkari kaagaz ko gawah ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Is galti ki wajah se mera case bigad raha hai. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bohot bada annyaay ho raha hai. Aap hi batao, aise galat tareeke se mera evidence deny kar denge toh main insaaf kaise paaunga?

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek zaroori document hai, sir, jo ek *certified copy* hai aur *public document* bhi hai. Matlab, sabko pata hai ki ye asli hai, government ki taraf se authorized hai. Par pata nahi kyun, mujhse baar-baar use prove karne ke liye bol rahe hain! Kehte hain, 'gawah lao, *witness* bulao'. Jabki, kanoon toh kehta hai ki aise *certified public documents* ke liye kisi *witness* ki zaroorat hi nahi hoti. Ye toh seedha-seedha galat hai, sir! Mera kaam atka pada hai, mujhe takleef ho rahi hai. Ye sab *legally erroneous* hai, mere saath anyay ho raha hai. Aap hi bataiye main kya karoon?

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath bahut badi galti hui hai. Meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aata, itne kanoon hain, 4 crore judgments hain, sab vakeelon ke liye system bana hai, phir bhi ek aam aadmi aise pareshaan hota hai? Jo mere case mein document tha na, woh toh certified copy thi, public document tha. Uske liye witness bulane ki koi zaroorat hi nahi thi, ab jaake pata chala hai. Pehle toh mujhe bewajah ghumaya gaya, witness ke liye kitna daudaya! Yeh toh seedhe-seedhe law ki galti thi, pehle unhone galat samjha. Mera kitna time aur paisa waste hua, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna galat hua hai court mein. Mera ek sarkari kagaz tha, uski certified copy thi mere paas. Lekin pata hai kya? Wo log mujhse gawah (witness) mang rahe the usko prove karne ke liye! Main kitna pareshan hua, kitne chakkar kaate gawah dhoondhne ke liye. Baad mein pata chala, woh bhi vakeel sahab ne bataya ki uss document ke liye toh koi gawah chahiye hi nahi hota! Yeh toh seedhe seedhe kanoon ke khilaaf tha jo unhone kiya. Meri wajah se kitna time waste hua aur kitni takleef hui, sir. Ye sab galat hua hai mere saath.

Sir, main toh bas tang aa gaya hoon. Meri suno na, please. Woh saamne wale log aur unke vakil, woh toh bas mujhe pareshan kar rahe hain. Maine yeh *sarkari nikal* (certified copy) jo dikhaya tha na, unhone usko maana hi nahi. Kehte the gawah leke aao. Main gareeb aadmi, kahan se gawah laata baar-baar? Aur abhi pata chala hai ki *kanoon ke hisaab se usme koi gawah chahiye hi nahi tha*! Pehle sabne galat samjha, mera toh bas time aur paisa barbaad hua. Judge sahab bhi pehle galti kar rahe the, ab kahin jaake samjha hai ki woh document apne aap mein hi kaafi tha. Sir, mujhe is dhokhadhadi aur pareshani ka hisaab chahiye. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sir, suniye meri baat, main kitna pareshan hoon. Court mein maine apna certified copy jama kiya tha, woh ek sarkari kagaz tha, public document. Maine socha tha ki yeh toh pakka proof hai, isme kya dikkat hogi? Par pata hai kya hua? Woh log bole ki yeh toh galat hai, isko toh prove karna padega, gawah bulao. Main toh ghabra gaya, sir! Kahan se gawah laata main? Ab baad mein pata chala ki us kagaz ke liye toh kisi gawah ki zaroorat hi nahi thi, woh toh aise hi valid tha. Sir, mera kitna time barbad hua, kitna paisa kharch hua is chakkar mein. Bina matlab ke mujhe pareshaan kiya gaya. Hum jaise gareeb logon ko aise hi dhakke khane padte hain kya? Meri toh bas itni si request hai, mujhe mera haq dilao, aur aise galat tareeke se pareshaan na kiya jaaye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aa raha kya ho raha hai. Woh jo mera document tha na, sir, woh ekdum certified copy thi, ek sarkari kaagaz ki. Aap khud socho, jab woh public document ki certified copy hai, toh usko prove karne ke liye kisi gawah ko bulane ki kya zaroorat hai? Mera vakeel keh raha hai ki yeh toh kanoon ke khilaf hai, galat hai. Pata nahi kyun mujhe itna tang kiya ja raha hai. Itne saare kanoon hain, itne faisle hain desh mein, sab kuch clear hai phir bhi mere saath aisa ho raha hai. Meri baat suniye sir, bahut zyaada pareshaan ho chuki hoon main.

Sir, yaad hai na maine us din FIR karayi thi us badmash ke khilaaf? Jo usne mere saath kiya tha, uski wajah se meri kitni mushkil se din guzre hain, aapko pata hai. Main toh bas insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi thi. Bhagwan ka shukr hai, aapki police ne acchi jaanch ki. Pura investigation kiya, aur mujhe pata chala hai ki ab uske khilaaf court mein charge-sheet bhi file ho gayi hai. Court ne bhi mera case dekha hai, aur us gunde ko bulaane ke liye summons bheje the. Woh aaya bhi hai, aur usko charge-sheet ki copy bhi mil gayi hai, jaise kanoon ke hisaab se hota hai. Toh Sir, ab toh poora case ban gaya hai uske khilaaf. Ab toh usko saza milegi na? Mujhe bas meri takleef ka hisaab chahiye. Umeed hai ab jaldi justice milega.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon. Woh jo gunda tha na, jisne mere rishtedaar ki jaan le li thi aur mujhe bhi buri tarah se maar-peet ki thi, woh ab court mein appeal kar raha hai. Usko jo saza mili thi, 7 saal ki jail aur 5000 rupaye ka jurmana, woh usko challenge kar raha hai. Mujhe laga tha insaaf mil gaya hai. Usko Section 304(1) aur Section 324 IPC ke तहत saza hui thi. Meri aankhon ke saamne mere apne ko maara gaya, aur mujhe bhi chot pahunchai gayi. Ab woh jail se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Agar woh nikal gaya toh hamari zindagi dobara mushkil ho jaegi, humein darr lag raha hai, Sir. Please, kuch kijiye. Usne jo kiya tha, uski saza toh poori ho. Is appeal ko rokiye, Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshaan ho kar aaya hoon. Woh Pintu Gupta, jisne mujhe itni buri tarah maara tha aur Section 326 IPC ke तहत usko saza mili thi Jaunpur court se, ab woh appeal kar raha hai. Sessions Trial No. 74 of 2011 mein, 2017 mein usko convicted kiya gaya tha. Sir, badi mushkil se toh mujhe thoda insaaf mila tha. Ab agar woh appeal jeet gaya aur bahar aa gaya toh meri aur mere bachchon ki jaan ko khatra hai. Usne mujhe jo chot di thi, usse main aaj tak theek nahi ho paya hoon. Woh bahut hi gunda kism ka aadmi hai. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, please is matter ko dekhiye. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko usse bachao, sir. Bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Shyam Bihari Mishra aur uske saathi, jinhone mere [family member, e.g., pita/bhai] ko berehmi se maar diya tha aur mujhe bhi jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, unka case abhi bhi chal raha hai. Sarai Inayat police station mein unke khilaf Section 302 aur 307 IPC ke तहत case दर्ज hua tha. Allahabad court number 5 ne 2005 mein unko life imprisonment ki saza sunayi thi. Lekin sir, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki un logon ne us judgment ke khilaf appeal kar di hai. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki agar woh bahar aa gaye toh meri aur mere parivar ki jaan ko khatra hai. Itni mushkil se insaaf mila tha, ab phir se woh log shuru ho gaye hain. Aap please kuch kijiye, sir. Humko insaaf chahiye aur meri family ki safety ensure honi chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh kismat hi aisi hai ki adalat ke chakkar khatam hi nahi hote. Yaad hai aapko, Srikakulam mein, woh Fast Track Court thi na, wahan mera case tha, S.C.No.162 of 2000. Maine socha tha jaldi insaaf mil jayega. 2006 mein judgement bhi aa gaya tha, 18 December ko. Mujhe laga ab sab theek ho jayega, meri mushkilein khatam. Par ab sunn raha hoon ki uske khilaaf *appeals* chal rahe hain! Itne saalon baad bhi mujhe shanti nahi mil rahi. Woh log appellants ke counsel ki baat sunn rahe hain, Public Prosecutor bhi hai, aur mere purane judgment aur saare papers phir se check kar rahe hain. Itne saare kanoon, itne faisle, par mere liye nyay bas ghumta hi rehta hai. Main toh ab sach mein thak gaya hoon, Sir.

Sahab, main Nirmala hoon. Mera pati, Ramkrishna, unko un gundon ne maar dala! Meri aankhon ke saamne! Woh log toh bilkul darinde the. Ek dangerous hathiyar se unhone Ramkrishna ko maara, aur jab main bachane gayi, toh mujhe bhi nahi chhoda. Mujhe bhi ussi hathiyar se itni buri tarah maara ki main ghanto behosh padi rahi. Meri body pe itne grievous hurt hain, zakhm hain, main chal bhi nahi pa rahi hoon theek se. Woh log chaar-paanch the, sab ek saath milkar aaye the. Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai sahab. Ab toh bas unko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Humein insaaf chahiye, sahab! Meri madad karo!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, yeh kya chal raha hai? Mere saath itna galat hua hai, aur ab woh log (accused) bol rahe hain ki unhone toh apni property bachane ke liye sab kiya tha? Yeh toh bilkul jhooth hai, Sir! Trial Court mein toh unhone kabhi yeh baat uthai hi nahi thi. Woh khud bhi toh kabhi nahi bole ki unhone 'right of defence of property' mein yeh sab kiya. Ab suddenly unke lawyer, Mr. D.V. Patel, yeh naya point la rahe hain? Jab pehle kabhi nahi bola, khud nahi maana, toh ab yeh bahana kaisa? Mujhe lagta hai yeh sab humein aur pareshan karne ki saazish hai. Sir, humein insaaf kab milega? Meri toh bas itni request hai ki unki yeh nayi argument na maani jaaye.

Sir, main Lallan Prasad bol raha hoon. Aaj shaam kareeb 7:30 baje ki baat hai. Main apne ghar se khana khane jaa raha tha, tabhi Jai Prakash Prasad, Subash Prasad, Bachhalal Prasad aur Nayan Prasad ne mujhe raaste mein hi pakad liya. Sir, unhone bina kisi baat ke mujhe ghusson aur thappadon se maarna shuru kar diya. Main dard se cheekha, toh meri awaaz sunkar kuch gaon wale aur main jinko jaanta hoon, woh log mujhe bachane aaye. Lekin sir, tabhi Jai Prakash Prasad gusse mein apne ghar ke andar gaya aur ek pistol nikal laya. Meri jaan ko khatra hai sir, please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Srikakulam se aaya hoon. Mera ek bahut purana case hai, SC No. 162 of 2000. Aap sochiye, sir, kitne saal ho gaye! 2006 mein ek judgment aaya tha, II Additional District aur Sessions Judge saheb ne diya tha Fast Track Court mein. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Yeh kya mazak hai, sir? Mera case itne saalon se chal raha hai, aur ab jab thodi rahat mili thi, toh phir se shuru ho gaya. Itne judgments, itne kanoon hain desh mein, phir bhi gareeb ko insaaf ke liye kitna tadapna padta hai. Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai ki kahin mera hak phir se na chhin jaye. Kripya karke meri madad kijiye, sir. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main Lakhimpur Kheri se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2012 mein mere saath ek bahut bura haadsa hua tha. Rizwan ne mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, usne mujhe bahut buri tarah se ghayal kiya tha. Kotwali Sadar P.S. mein uske khilaaf Section 307 aur 326 IPC ke तहत case crime no. 1787/2012 darj hua tha. Poora sessions trial chala, Court No. 1 Kheri ke judge sahab ne 29.3.2018 ko usko saza sunayi thi. Main socha tha ki ab mujhe insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh Rizwan ab us judgment ke khilaaf appeal mein chala gaya hai, Section 374(2) CrPC ke under. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, woh phir bahar aa gaya toh meri aur mere parivaar ki jaan ko khatra hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf dilaiye, usko bahar mat aane dijiye.

Sir, pehle toh woh Sugumaran Sub-Inspector sahab mere paas hospital aaye the. Tab meri statement record ki gayi thi aur unhone FIR bhi darj ki. Us time case Section 324 IPC ke under register hua tha. Woh ghatnasthal par bhi gaye the, wahan sab check kiya, mahazar aur plan bhi banaya gawahon ki maujoodgi mein. Phir Manjula madam ne aage ki jaanch sambhali. Unhone dobara witnesses se poochtaach ki aur mera mamla Section 324 se badal kar 326 IPC kar diya. Aur ab toh Inspector Poongavanam sir ne is case ko aur bhi serious sections mein change kar diya hai. Bas, mujhe ab insaaf mil jaye!

Sir, meri suniye. Yeh jo C.C.No.381/1996 wala case hai na, yeh meri jaan kha gaya hai. Pata nahi kitne saalon se chal raha hai, 1996 se! Pehle Magistrate court mein hum jeete 15/2/2008 ko. Phir woh teeno accused Additional Sessions Court gaye, wahan bhi hum jeete 26/10/2010 ko. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Lekin Sir, woh log phir se revision mein chale gaye hain, upar ki court mein. Abhi 29 October 2021 ko phir se naya notification aaya hai. Meri toh poori zindagi isi case mein nikal gayi. Kya mujhe kabhi shanti nahi milegi? Woh teeno baar-baar pareshan kar rahe hain. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sahab, main apni pareshaani batane aaya hoon. Mujhe stipendiary constable ki post ke liye chuna gaya tha. Jab maine form bhara tha na, tab toh mere upar koi police case wagaira kuch bhi pending nahi tha. Bilkul saaf tha record mera. Par pata nahi kaise, meri kismat hi aisi nikli ki baad mein mere upar ek criminal case lag gaya. Main un lagbhag 30-35 logon mein se ek tha jinpar woh case register hua. Meri toh koi galti bhi nahi thi usme, sahab. Ab mera future khatre mein hai. Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske saath 2008 mein un logon ne maara-peeti ki thi. Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi us din, itni buri tarah mara tha ki Section 326 IPC ke tehat 'grievous hurt' ka case bana tha. Aapko yaad hai na? Amalner court ke Ad hoc Additional Sessions Judge sahib ne, 16 April 2010 ko, Sessions Case No. 15 of 2008 mein un sabko saza sunayi thi. Main socha chalo insaaf mil gaya. Lekin sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh log apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain! Matlab, woh phir se bahar aakar humein pareshan karenge? Meri aur mere parivaar ki jaan ko abhi bhi khatra hai, sir. Please, mera insaaf mat chheeno, unhe wohi saza milni chahiye jo court ne pehle di thi.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, bahut majboor hoke aapke paas aaya hoon. Yeh Jai Prakash Thakur aur uska saathi Ranjay Thakur, dono ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Yeh log Jhuggi No. 117, Kathiya Baba Ashram, near Gurudwara, Dairy Delhi mein rehte hain. Roz-roz mujhe tang karte hain, dhamki dete hain, aur meri izzat par haath daalte hain.
