Kal bhi inhone mere saath badtameezi ki, sabke saamne mujhe zaleel kiya. Main aur kitna bardasht karun, sir? Mujhe inse jaan ka khatra hai. Please kuch action lijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko apne saath hui zyadti ke baare mein batana chahta hoon. Yeh baat 3 February 2018 ki hai, shaam ke theek 4:15 baje the, jab main Hari Nagar Ashram ke Railway Park mein tha, New Delhi mein. Wahan par Mahesh, jise Mikki bhi kehte hain, Sandeep Singh Rekhi (Goga) aur Bharat (Kalu) - yeh teeno log the. Sir, unhone mujhe bina kisi wajah ke roka, rasta rokte hue mujhe pakda aur phir bahut maara peeta. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi us din. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, aur un sab ne milkar yeh kiya. Main bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Mujhe in logon se insaaf chahiye, please in par sakht karwayi karein.

Sir, main Harbir Singh s/o Sh Hoshiar Singh, aaj aapke paas bahut bade dukh ke saath aaya hoon. Meri baat suniye, Sir, mujhe kitne saalon se insaaf nahi mila. Yeh baat hai 11 April 1993 ki, jab us Krishan s/o Sh Rattan Singh, jo Jharoda Kalan gaon ka hai na, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi, Sir. Tab se main bas thokarein kha raha hoon, har darwaze pe gaya par koi sunwai nahi hui. Ab toh mujhe lagta hai aap hi meri aakhri umeed hain. Usne jo mere saath kiya, uski saza use milni chahiye. Please, Sir, us Krishan par kaarwai kariye, bahut ho gaya ab.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... kal raat ki baat hai, 10 November 2012 ko, raat ke 8:22 baje honge. Hamare Sangam Vihar mein, wo J-1st Block, House No. 516/16 ke paas bohot bada jhagda ho gaya tha. Itna ganda jhagda tha ki main kya bolun. Hum to ghar ke bahar hi the, tabhi dekha ki Durga Mandir ke paas, F-2nd Block mein, kitni bheed lagi hui thi. Aur sir, gali mein khoon bikhra pada tha! Mera to dil hi baith gaya dekhkar. Pata chala ki do ladke kisi ko bhaga rahe the, aur pata nahi kya hua. Please sir, investigate kijiye, bohot dar lag raha hai. Humare area mein aisa kaise ho sakta hai?

Sahab, main woh aadmi hoon jiske saath pichle saal bohot bura hua tha. Usne mujhe itni buri tarah maara tha, Section 326 ka case bana tha uspar. Mujhe bohot takleef hui thi, ab bhi dard hota hai. Khair, court ne 19 July 2008 ko usko दोषी ठहराया tha, haan ji, convict kiya tha. Fir 28 July 2008 ko usko do saal ki jail aur paanch hazaar rupaye ka fine bhi laga tha. Mujhe laga tha ab jaake thoda insaaf mila hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh upar appeal kar raha hai, Sir. Yeh kya baat hui? Itni mushkil se toh saza mili thi usko, ab yeh fir se case chalayega kya? Meri jaan ko khatra hai, mujhe aur tension ho rahi hai. Please, aap kuch kariye, sahab. Uske bahar aane se meri zindagi aur mushkil ho jayegi.

Sir, main Neeraj bol raha hoon. Meri suniye, sir, bahut buri haalat hai meri. Ye baat hai 12 June 2014 ki shaam ki, kareeb sava chhe baje honge. Main apne ghar pe hi tha, House No. 568, Gali No. 6, Ambedkar Nagar, Haiderpur, Delhi mein. Wahan Saurabh aaya, aur usne bina kisi wajah ke mujhe roka. Sir, maine kuch socha bhi nahi tha, aur usne ek ustra (razor) nikal kar mujh par hamla kar diya! Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai, sir. Usne jaan-boojh kar mujhe zakhmi kiya hai, bahut ganda tareeka tha uska. Mujhe bahut dard hua, mera pura chehra khoon se lathpath ho gaya tha. Sir, usne mere saath U/s 326 IPC ka offence kiya hai. Please, uske khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. In logon ne hamare upar hamla kiya, humein maara peeta, aur ab court mein inke bade-bade wakeel keh rahe hain ki inhone toh self-defence mein kiya tha, apni property bachane ke liye! Bol rahe hain ki inko toh chhod hi dena chahiye. Meri kya galti thi? Maine toh kuch nahi kiya tha. Aur agar saza deni bhi hai, toh keh rahe hain ki Section 304 Part-II lagao, kam saza do, kyunki sabne alag-alag kaam kiya tha. Lekin sir, woh sab wahan the, sabne milkar hi toh humein nuksaan pahunchaya tha. Meri toh jaan nikalte-nikalte bachi hai. Inko poori saza milni chahiye, ye bachne nahi chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, bas.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh log, jinhone mere gharwale ko maara tha (302 IPC) aur humein zakhmi kiya tha (324 IPC), woh ab phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Kerala High Court ne bhi 7 November, 2001 ko unki saza confirm ki thi, Sir! Hamein laga tha ab finally justice mil gaya hai, par ab yeh log Supreme Court ja rahe hain. Itne saal se hum lad rahe hain, Sir, har din dard mein jeete hain. Jab High Court ne saza barkaraar rakhi, tab thodi umeed bandhi thi. Par ab yeh appeal sunkar mera dil baith gaya hai. Mujhe darr hai, Sir, kahin yeh log phir se bach na jaayen. Hamari madad kijiye, Sir, humein justice chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Mera case saalon se chal raha hai aur mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Baat 1966 ki hai, mera Criminal Appeal No. 116 tha Patna High Court mein. Usmein 10 December, 1968 ko ek faisla sunaya gaya tha, par Sir, wo mere haq mein nahi tha, mere saath bahut galat hua. Mujhe laga, yeh to anayay hai! Isliye maine uske khilaaf Supreme Court mein appeal kiya hai, jaise Article 134(1)(c) ke tehat hota hai na. Mere vakil S. M. Mishra aur S. S. Jauhar hain. Aur unka vakil B. P. Jha hai. Abhi Khanna J. saahab ne wahan judgment diya hai. Sir, ab aap hi batao, main kya karoon? Meri poori zindagi isi case mein nikal gayi hai. Bas aap meri madad karo, please.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon, woh jo accused tha na, jisne mujhe maara tha, usko court ne Section 326 IPC mein guilty mana tha. Uski wajah se meri zindagi tabah ho gayi thi, mujhe kitna dard mila. Usne High Court mein appeal ki thi, socha tha bach jayega. Par shukr hai, High Court ne bhi trial court ka decision sahi bataya aur uski appeal reject kar di. Ab usko do saal ki rigorous imprisonment mili hai. Sir, main bas yahi confirm karne aaya hoon ki uski saza pakki ho gayi hai. Isse thoda sukoon mila hai ki mujhe finally insaaf mila hai, warna main toh haar hi maan chuka tha.

Sir, main Prashant bol raha hoon. Meri suniye na sir, main kitna pareshan hoon. 29 June 2000 ki raat thi, kareeb 10:40 baje, jab mujhe Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital mein admit kiya gaya tha. Mujhe itni chotein lagi thi, itna dard tha ki main bata nahi sakta. Jab Dr. P. Soni ne meri MLC banayi thi, unhone khud likha tha ki meri injuries 'dangerous' hain. Jaanleva thi meri chotein, sir! Ab court mein Dr. Vivek Khanna aakar keh rahe hain ki meri kuch chotein toh bas upari-upari (superficial) thin. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, main us dard se guzra hoon, aur ab yeh sab sun raha hoon? Meri sirf pehli injury ko hi dangerous maan rahe hain, baaki sab ko halke mein le rahe hain. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai, sir? Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi!

Sir, main Tole Majra gaon se aaya hoon, meri suniye please. Woh Randhir Singh, Harbhajan Singh aur Bahadur Singh ke parivaar ke log hain na, kul 12 bande... unhone humari zindagi haram kar di hai! Us din, 1.11.1996 ko, un sab ne milkar humare ghar mein ghuskar hum par jaanleva hamla kiya tha. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko itni buri tarah maara, hathiyaaron se bhi peeta, khoon nikal gaya tha. Haddein toot gayi thin meri, sir! Jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi de rahe the aur humari zameen par bhi kabza karne ki koshish ki thi. Sir, woh log bahut dabang hain, humein darate rehte hain. Hum garib log hain, hum kya karein? Please, unko kadi se kadi saza dilwaiye. Humein insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main Rajesh, is gaon mein rehta hoon. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye, bahut zaroorat hai, Sir. Woh Randive log – Audumbar, Sharad, Shivaji, Dhanaji aur Dilip – in paanchon ne milkar mere chhote bhai ko maardala, Sir! Pura din meri aankhon ke saamne ghoom raha hai. Woh log ekdum se jhund banakar aaye (149), hathiyar (148) the unke paas. Bahut gaali-galoch kiya (504), phir jhagda shuru kar diya (147). Jab mera bhai beech-bachav karne gaya, toh usko buri tarah peeta (323), itna peeta ki uski jaan le li (302). Aur ab woh log humein dhamki de rahe hain (506) ki agar police mein complaint ki toh humein bhi nahi chhodenge. Hum bahut dar gaye hain, Sir. Meri family bahut mushkil mein hai. Kripya karke un sabke khilaaf sakht action lein. Mujhe mere bhai ke liye insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Baliram Pandurang Bhoir. Meri zameen hai Survey No. 93, uspar Shankar Gopal Patil se bahut puraana jhagda chal raha hai. Woh meri zameen hadapna chahta hai. Main toh pehle bhi April 1992 mein sarkari naap karwa chuka tha, woh Government Surveyor aaye the. Par tab boundary ke nishaan nahi lag paaye the, toh bola agle baar aake fix karenge. Ab, 29 June 1992 ko, main aur mere bete Narayan aur Chandrakant, hum Thane se Jogi saab ko (woh cadastral surveyor hain) apni jeep mein leke aaye the. Hum theek dopahar ke 12 baje apni us jhagde wali zameen par pahunche hi the ki... aage kya hua woh main aapko batata hoon.

Sir, please meri baat suno. Main bahut pareshaan hoon. Jin logon ne mere saath itni zyadati ki thi, mujhe gaali di, dhamkaya, buri tarah maara, aur toota-foota bhi kiya tha, ab woh court mein appeal kar rahe hain. Unhone toh saboot bhi mitane ki koshish ki thi, Sahab! Unke upar IPC ke Section 294, 506B, 323, 326 aur 201 ke तहत charges lage the. Ab woh Section 397/401 CrPC ka bahana lekar keh rahe hain ki unpar se ye saare charges hata diye jaayen. Agar aisa ho gaya toh mujhe justice kaise milega? Meri toh puri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Please, Sir, unko saza milni chahiye. Meri madad karo, Sahab!

Sir, main Belgaum se aaya hoon, ek bahut bade injustice ki complain karne. Jin logon ne mujhe itna buri tarah maara tha, ki meri jaan nikalte nikalte bachi, unko court ne ek tarah se acquittal de diya hai. Matlab, jo serious Section 326 lagna chahiye tha, usmein toh unhe convict hi nahi kiya. Sirf Section 324 lagaya, aur usmein bhi Probation of Offenders Act ke under chhod diya! Yeh kya insaaf hua sir? Meri haalat itni kharab hai, aur woh log aise hi ghoom rahe hain? Meri chot ab tak theek nahi hui hai. Aapse guzarish hai, kuch toh kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isiliye aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Samiruddin jo hai na, usne mere bhai ko maar dala. Pura court ne Sessions Judge ke saamne dekha hai, Furreedpore mein. Usko murder ka *guilty* mana gaya hai. Aur toh aur, usko *death sentence* bhi mila hai! Meri jaan mein jaan aayi thi ki chalo ab insaaf milega. Lekin Sir, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki yeh *sentence confirm* hone ja raha hai aur woh Samiruddin *appeal* kar raha hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai, Sir? Woh Civil Surgeon ka report bhi toh tha, usne bataya tha kitna gehra ghaav tha, kaise maara gaya. Saaf-saaf murder tha! Ab woh murderer phir se bahar aane ki koshish karega kya? Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir, usko saza milni chahiye. Insaaf dilwa dijiye, Sir. Mera sab kuch chala gaya hai.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai. Court ne toh un sabko, woh Inspector aur baaki sabko, convict kar diya tha. Meri gawaahi suni thi na, sir? Maine sach bola tha! Pura case ladke, itni mushkil se unhe saza mili thi. Ab yeh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Inke bade-bade vakil aakar bol rahe hain ki unko galat saza di gayi hai. Kya matlab hai iska? Meri suffering, mera dard, woh sab jhooth tha kya? Main toh Public Prosecutor sahib pe bharosa karti hoon ki woh phir se humari baat rakhenge, court ko samjhaayenge ki kaise in logon ne galti ki thi. Sir, mujhe nyay chahiye, yeh log phir se bachne nahi chahiye. Meri awaaz suniye, sir.

Sir, main PW-1 hoon, suniye meri baat. Us din hum par kitna bada hamla hua tha. Mujhe toh lathi se maara gaya, meri jaangh aur ungli par kitni chot lagi hai, aap dekh sakte hain. Lekin sabse bura toh Sati ke saath hua. Usko bhi inhone lathi se maara aur phir us 'appellant' ne toh bhale se uske pet mein ghop diya. Sati bechari wahin mar gayi, sir! Uski koi galti nahi thi. Main hi thi jo subah 10 baje Hussainganj Police Station aayi thi yeh sab report karne. Ab toh chargesheet bhi file ho chuki hai us main aaropi aur 5 aur logon ke khilaaf. Bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hokar aapke paas aaya hoon. Mera ek bahut purana mamla hai, jo 16 December 2000 ka hai, Guna ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne Ashoknagar mein ek faisla sunaya tha, Sessions Trial No. 106/2000 mein. Usmein jo 'conviction' hui thi, uss judgment aur saza se main bilkul bhi khush nahi hoon. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai, aur poora insaaf nahi mila. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki Raghunath alias Jagna ka bhi ek case, appeal No. 91/2001, usi purane faisle se juda hua hai. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, 2000 se ab tak main sirf intezaar hi kar raha hoon. Meri sunwai kab hogi? Kya mujhe kabhi insaaf milega ya main aise hi court-kacheri ke chakkar kaatta rahunga? Meri madad kijiye, sir, main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main Sk. Suleman Khatik, umar meri lagbhag 65 saal hai. Dhule ke Devpur area mein, Khatikwadi mein rehta hoon. Mere saath meri biwi Shakinabi, beti Salma jo abhi 22 saal ki hai, aur beta Sk. Sharief apni biwi ke saath rehte hain. Meri ek aur beti thi, Shehnazbi. Uski shaadi Shahada mein Jahur Khatik se hui thi, jo ab accused hai. Sir, meri beti ab duniya mein nahi rahi. Woh Jahur ke paas hi thi. Mujhe poora yakeen hai ki meri beti ke saath kuch galat hua hai aur uski maut ka zimmedaar woh Jahur hi hai. Mera toh ghar ujad gaya sir. Mere baaki teen bete, Shamsu, Chhotu aur Salim, woh sab toh alag rehte hain. Meri Shehnazbi ke liye mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Manoj Kumar Gupta ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Usne 2012 mein meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi, mujhe goli maari thi. Ghazipur Police Station mein Case Crime No. 153/2012 darj hua tha, Sections 307 aur 504 IPC ke under. Mujhe kitni takleef hui thi, Sir, main bata nahi sakta. Fatehpur ke Additional Sessions Judge ne use 10 saal ki kadi saza di thi aur Rs. 20,000 fine bhi lagaya tha, 2015 mein judgment aaya tha. Mujhe laga ab insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai woh toh appeal kar raha hai. Daroga ji, agar woh chhut gaya toh mera kya hoga? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us din, woh phir se mujh par hamla kar sakta hai. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, meri suniye zara. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai! Ek purana mamla tha sir, 1995 ka. Tab mujhe jhootha hi phansa diya tha in logon ne, Sections 147, 148 aur 326/149 IPC ke tehat. Woh toh maine apna reply bhi diya tha ki main bewajah usme ghaseet liya gaya tha. Ab sir, usi case mein mujhe prosecute kar diya gaya aur main convicted bhi ho gaya. Aur ab, 2013 mein, mere department se mujhe show cause notice aaya hai. Kehte hain maine apni conviction chhupayi! Meri naukri pe ban aayi hai sir. Main kya karta? Itne saal purana mamla, jisme main beqasoor tha, ab uski wajah se meri izzat aur naukri dono daav pe hain. Sir, please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, raat ke 11 baje ka time tha, tabhi mere upar hamla hua. Dekhiye na, mere pet mein ek dedh inch lamba aur aadha inch gehra chaku laga hai. Poori abdominal cavity tak andar tak chala gaya tha. Itna dard tha ki main bas bechain hi hota ja raha tha. Doctor ne check kiya aur bola ki abhi is injury ka nature decide nahi kar sakte, bahut serious lag raha hai, isliye mujhe turant Arrah Sadar Hospital refer kar diya gaya hai for proper management. Meri toh jaan atki hui hai, Sir. Pata nahi kitna khatarnak zakhm hai. Kripya is mamle mein action lijiye aur mujhe insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main Haridas, yahan report likhwane aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar rakhi hai in logon ne. Yeh Sukhdeo aur Noumi, jo mere rishtedar bhi hain aur padosi bhi, inke khilaaf maine pehle bhi FIR karayi thi. Tab jaa kar, Chhindwara court mein, Sessions Trial No. 176/2001 mein, 10 March 2003 ko Judge saab ne inko saza sunayi thi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki yeh log appeal kar rahe hain. Matlab, meri saari mehnat, mera woh dard, sab phir se shuru ho jayega? Main bahut darr gaya hoon, Sir. Kahi ye log phir se mujhe pareshaan na karein. Kripya dekhiye, jo saza mili hai, woh barkaraar rahe.

Sir, main Yusuf bol raha hoon. Raat ko kareeb gyarah baje ki baat hai, kisi ne mere pet mein chaku maar diya. Dekho na sir, kitna gehra zakhm hai, poora pet andar tak cut gaya hai. Dard se meri jaan nikal rahi thi, main itna bechain tha ki bas kya bataun. Doctor sahab ne bhi bola ki mamla bahut serious hai, mujhe turant Arrah Sadar Hospital bheja hai aage ilaj ke liye. Abhi tak theek se pata nahi chal raha ki chot kitni gehri hai, doctor ne kaha 'nature of injury is reserved'. Sir, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, bahut dard mein hoon.

Sir, main kya bolun ab! Meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi us din. Pata hai na, woh Umaria waala case, S.T. No. 148/94? Jab Additional Sessions Judge saab ne usko 1997 mein conviction di thi. Maine socha chalo, ab finally insaaf mila hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh *appellant* phir se appeal mein chala gaya hai! Yeh 2015 mein judgment aaya hai appeal ka. Matlab itne saal baad bhi usko chain nahi hai, woh chahta hai ki uski saza maaf ho jaaye? Main darr gayi hoon, sir. Kya hoga ab? Kya usko chhod denge? Meri to jaan nikal jaati hai yeh sab soch ke. Please, kuch kijiye sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, usko chhootne mat dijiye!

Sir, meri biwi Sunita subah bore-well se paani bharne gayi thi. Roz ki tarah woh 7:30 tak wapas aa jaati hai, par aaj nahi aayi. Mujhe bohot chinta hui, toh main apne do doston, Sekar aur Nagaraj, aur do aur logon ke saath use dhoondhne gaya bore-well pe. Humne poora area dekha, par woh kahin nahi mili. Sir, uska woh plastic ka bartan, jismein woh paani laati thi, woh bore-well ke paas zameen par pada mila. Meri biwi wahan nahi thi. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, sir. Aisa pehle kabhi nahi hua. Kuchh galat zaroor hua hai uske saath. Kripya meri madad kijiye, use dhoondhne mein. Meri Sunita kahan gayi, pata nahi. Main bohot pareshan hoon, sir.

Sahayak ji, meri baat suniye, main Amarjit Singh. Ab court mein kya bol rahe hain yeh log! Ke Madan Lal, jo ek declared gunda hai, usko maine zabardasti apne ghar mein ghusaya? Arre, main kyun karunga aisa? Yeh sab jhooth hai, sir! Meri izzat pe baat aa gayi hai. Woh log bas case se bachne ke liye kuch bhi bol rahe hain. Mere paas saboot hain, gawah hain. Dr. Satpal hain, Dr. Gupta hain, aur mere padosi Tulsi Ram, Jaswinder Kaur, Mohinder Kaur... sabko pata hai sach kya hai. Aur toh aur, woh investigating officer, SI Bachan Singh ji bhi hain. Yeh log mujhe fasana chahte hain. Please, meri madad karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye in logon se.

Sir, main Namdeo Keshav Padte hoon. Meri suniye, please! Uss din, 21 June 1966 ko, woh Bal Ghanshyam Gadkar, usne bina kisi baat ke mujhe chaku ghop diya tha! Meri jaan nikal jaati, Sir! Usne seedha mujhe maarne ki koshish ki thi. Mera khoon beh raha tha, main zameen pe gir gaya tha. Itna dard tha ki main bata nahi sakta aapko. Mujhe laga ab main bachunga nahi. Aaj bhi us incident ko yaad karke meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Meri usse koi dushmani nahi thi. Pata nahi kyu kiya usne aisa. Aap please usko kadi se kadi saza dilwaiye, Sir. Aise logon ko khula nahi chhodna chahiye!

Sir, main Thopramkudy Panchayat Road se apne ghar jaa raha tha. Achanak, road ke left side mein ek ridge se, wo aadmi aur uski biwi ne mujh par acid phenk diya. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aaya kya hua! Sir, meri unse purani dushmani chal rahi thi, aur usi wajah se unhone ye ghinona kaam kiya hai. Meri poori body, especially mera sar, gardan, kandhe aur hath-pair buri tarah jal gaye hain. Main bahut dard mein hoon, Sir. Meri aankhon mein abhi tak wo scene ghoom raha hai. Please Sir, unko kadi se kadi saza dilwaiye. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe Metropolitan Magistrate ke court mein pesh kiya gaya hai, woh bhi accused banakar. Meri toh koi galti nahi thi, lekin Police Station Mukherjee Nagar ne meri FIR No. 560/2001 mein jaanch ki. Uske baad, 03.07.2002 ko Cr.P.C. section 173 ke तहत mere khilaaf charge sheet file kar di. Mujh par ilzaam lagaya gaya hai ki maine kuch aise kaam kiye hain jin par saza milti hai. Main toh ek seedha-saadha insaan hoon, sir. Maine kuch galat nahi kiya. Mujhe is case mein galat phansaya gaya hai. Meri madad kijiye, main bahut ghabraya hua hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh jo mera purana mamla tha, 2008 ka, S.C.No.363, jismein Ernakulam ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne us gunehgar ko saza di thi, mujhe laga tha ab chain milega. Par ab pata chala hai ki usne toh upar appeal kar di hai, woh akela aadmi, usne apna case (Crl.Appeal No.870) daal diya hai. Ab woh jail se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai! Aur Sir, ek doosra case tha, woh bhi 2008 ka hi, S.C.No.465. Usmein do log the, unhone bhi appeals (Crl.Appeal No.1434 aur No.871) daal di hain. Sir, humein toh laga tha ki court ne faisla suna diya toh sab khatam. Yeh log baar-baar appeal karke humein kyun tang kar rahe hain? Hum garib log kitni baar courts ke chakkar kaaten? Humare insaaf ko aise hi latkayenge kya? Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Ramparvekra gaon se hoon, Kachchha zille ke Mandvi taluka se. Aapko yaad hai woh 1988 wala mamla? Jab humare logon par itne saare 17 logon ne milkar hamla kiya tha? Unmein se kuch logon ne to jaan tak le li thi, aur kuch ko buri tarah zakhmi kar diya hathiyaron se. Bahut mushkil se, itne saalon baad, Court ne unko saza sunai thi 1989 mein. Humne socha ab jaake insaaf mila. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh paanch log, jo mukhy aaropi the, woh fir se appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, ab phir se woh case khul gaya hai. Meri family ne itna dukh jhela hai. Humein dar lagta hai ki kahin woh phir se azad na ho jayen aur humein phir se pareshan na karein. Hum bas insaaf chahte hain, sir. Woh apni saza kaat lein.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. 2 November 2003 ko ek incident hua tha, uske baad toh meri life hi disturb ho gayi hai. Humein kya pata tha ki yeh log itna gir jaayenge? Ussi incident ko lekar, 29 November 2003 ko Tehatta PS mein hamare khilaaf ek jhootha counter-case file kar diya gaya hai. Sir, total satrah log hain, jinpe yeh ilzaam lagaya hai. Mere saath Taher Ali Mondal, Samsul Haque Mondal, Sarmen Ali Mondal aur Patal Sk. jaise logon ka naam bhi daal diya hai. Hum sab gareeb log hain, humne kuch nahi kiya. Yeh log bas humein phansa rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please aap dekhiye, yeh galat ho raha hai mere saath.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... humari family ne kitna suffer kiya hai! Woh log, jinhone humari zindagi barbaad kar di thi, jinhein court ne saza sunayi thi... woh phir se appeal kar rahe hain! Socho, Sir, 1989 ki baat hai yeh, itne saal ho gaye hain, ab tak humein poora insaaf nahi mila. Woh sab mil-jul ke aaye the, unke poore parivaar ne hamla kiya tha. Mere aadmi ko maara tha unhone, aur humein bhi jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, maara-peeta tha. Ab woh 302, 307 aur 323 IPC ke under convicted hain, aur ab usko challenge kar rahe hain? Kya matlab hai iska, Sir? Kya unko saza nahi milegi? Hum darr ke saaye mein jeete hain. Please, kuch kijiye, hamein bas insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Radha bol rahi hoon. Meri suniye na, sir, bahut pareshan hoon main. Pichle hafte woh log, sab mil-jul kar aaye the, aur mujhe aur mere pariwar ko bahut maara. Hathiyar se maara hai, sir, mujhe toh gehri chot lagi hai, abhi tak dard hai. Khoon bhi nikla tha, pura shareer dukhta hai. Aur sir, sabse badi baat, unhone meri jaati ka naam le kar bahut gaali galoch ki. Public mein meri beizzati ki, bola 'tum SC/ST wale toh aise hi hote ho, tumhari aukat hi kya hai'. Sir, mera toh jeena haram kar diya hai un logon ne. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon. Un sab par sakht se sakht karwai ho, please sir. Yeh SC/ST Act ke तहत bhi aata hai, sir.

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon. Meri suno na, ye kya ho raha hai mere saath? Mera ek seedha-saadha case tha, par wo saamne wale ne ek *counter-case* daal diya hai, jhootha hai poora. Ab mere vakeel sahab keh rahe hain ki Magistrate sahab ne galti kar di hai, mera case *Sessions Court* bhej diya hai. Sir, mera case itna gambhir nahi tha ki seedha wahan jaye. Par kyuki unka bhi case hai, to keh rahe hain *dono cases* ko *Sessions Court* hi dekhegi. Ye toh galat hai na? Sirf isliye ki ek *counter-case* hai, mera chhota sa maamla bhi wahan latak gaya. Mera toh bilkul *exclusively* *Sessions Court* wala case nahi hai. Meri madad karo, sir. Main toh fas gaya hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri to life hi barbaad ho gayi hai is case mein. Mera Sessions Case No. 81 of 2002, kitna puraana case hai, 2002 se main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Pehle ek order aaya tha 16 January 2004 ko, ki mera case Chief Judicial Magistrate ke paas bhej rahe hain. Mujhe laga chalo ab kuch toh hoga. Par ab, sir, 8 August 2005 ko Purulia ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne woh puraana order hi set aside kar diya hai! Matlab kya hai sir? Kya mera case aise hi idhar-udhar ghoomta rahega? Main gareeb aadmi, kahan tak court-kachehri ke chakkar kaatun? Meri to ummeed hi toot rahi hai. Please, sir, kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main aapko ek bahut serious baat batane aaya hoon. Hamare M.G. Road pe, Mandya-Melakote Road ke paas ek naya Mahadeshwara Mandir bana hai. Kareeb 20 din pehle ki baat hai, raat ke time, Prasanna, K.N. Gopala Krishna aur unke kuch saath wale, jo hamare hi area ke hain, mandir ke bilkul paas bahot zor se mike set laga ke bajane lage. Itna shor tha ki neend haram ho gayi sabki. Jab mera bhai, jo ab is duniya mein nahi raha (mere bhai, Sahab!), aur meri behen ke pati Narayana Swamy aur kuch log unse request karne gaye ki awaaz kam kar do, toh Gopala Krishna aur uske chamchon ne unse ladna shuru kar diya. Bilkul gundagardi kar rahe the, Sir! Inko please pakadiye.

Sir, main Atmasingh bol raha hoon. Meri suniye, mujh par kya beeti hai. Woh Ghansasingh, Harbans Singh, Pyarasingh, Niranjansingh, Singarasingh aur Lalsingh... in sab ne milkar mera ghar barbaad kar diya hai. Sir, mera beta Kandh... usko maar dala unhone! Qatl kar diya mere bete ka! Hum sab Majhabi Sikh hain, ek hi biradari ke, aur woh Lalsingh toh mere hi ghar ke ek hisse mein rehta tha! Usne humein dhokha diya! Danga kiya, hum par hamla kiya, buri tarah se chotein pahunchayi. Ab Alwar court mein unka case chal raha hai, par sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Mere bete ko waapas kaun layega? Mujhe un sab ko kadi se kadi saza dilwani hai, sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to jaan hi nikal gayi thi us din. Woh teen log – Anand @ Jat, Satish @ Madrasi aur Parmod Mandal – inhone humare saath robbery ki thi, mujhe buri tarah se chot pahunchai thi aur jaan lene ki bhi koshish ki thi. PS Adarsh Nagar mein meri FIR bhi darj hui thi, number tha 124/09. Court ne bhi inko saza sunai thi 23.04.2012 ko, ek Additional Sessions Judge साहब ने फैसला सुनाया था. Anand ko toh paanch saal ki jail aur fine laga tha, aur 397 IPC mein saat saal ki aur saza mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki ye log apni saza ko challenge kar rahe hain. Sir, agar ye bahar aa gaye toh meri aur mere parivaar ki zindagi dobara khatre mein pad jaegi. Humein badi mushkil se insaaf mila tha, please us insaaf ko banaye rakhiye. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sahab, main Ranbir @ Kari ki maa hoon. Yaad hai na, Dabri P.S. ki woh FIR No. 160/01? Mere bete ko Sanjay Mishra ne berehmi se maar diya tha. Aaj bhi woh khoon yaad aata hai toh meri neend udd jaati hai. Pura parivaar bikhar gaya tha. Bahut mushkil se humne himmat banayi. Shukar hai ki court ne uss zaalim Sanjay Mishra ko saza sunayi hai. Sessions Case No. 62/09 mein usko umar qaid mili hai, aur Rs. 10,000 ka jurmana bhi laga hai. Meri bas yahi complaint hai, Sir, ki usko kabhi bahar mat nikalne dena. Mere bete ko toh usne wapas nahi aane diya, ab usko bhi jail mein hi sadna chahiye. Humne bahut kuch saha hai, Sir.

Sahab! Main aapke paas bohot mushkil se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sahab! Woh log... woh gunde... unhone mere bhai ko maar dala! Pura gang tha, sahab, hathiyaron ke saath aaye the, aur mere bhai ko beech sadak pe gher kar maar diya. Uski koi galti nahi thi. Section 302, 149, 148 IPC, yeh sab lagta hai un par. Main un sabko janta hoon, woh abhi bhi ghoom rahe hain azaad. Mera pura parivaar dara hua hai. Aap inse nyay dilwaaiye, sahab. Inko zindagaon ki saza milni chahiye. Meri bas yahi appeal hai aapse, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi problem leke aayi hoon. Meri beti Lata aur mere sasur Shankar, woh humara khet dekh rahe the, jise abhi tractor se jotwaya tha. Un badmashon ne wahan aakar un par hamla kiya, laaton aur ghusson se bahut maara tha unko! Kitni chot lagi thi! Humne case kiya, Section 326/34 IPC ke तहत. Abhi abhi, 1 May 2015 ko court se ek order aaya hai, aur usmein un sab accused ko bari kar diya gaya hai! Sir, yeh toh sarasar galat hai! Itna sab kuch hone ke baad bhi unko koi saza nahi mili. Meri family ke saath itna bura hua, aur woh log aise hi ghoom rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, aap hi kuch kariye.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshaan hokar aaya hoon. Un logon ne mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, Sir! Police ne bhi Section 307 ka bada case banaya tha unpe aur charge-sheet bhi file kar di thi. Meri toh saari ummeed thi ki ab unhe saza milegi. Lekin Sir, abhi pichle mahine, 12 October ko, court se un accused logon ko favour karne wala ek order aa gaya hai. Pata nahi kya hua, meri samajh mein kuch nahi aa raha. Pehle case Magistrate sahab ke paas chal raha tha, ab bol rahe hain Sessions Court mein jayega. Yeh kya ho raha hai Sir? Jab jaanlewa hamla hua tha, toh yeh log aise kaise bach sakte hain? Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon. Please, meri madad karo, Sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh poori duniya ujad gayi thi jab us Bharatsinh Pratapsinh Parmar ne mere bhai ka khoon kiya tha. Bade sangharsh ke baad, 2003 mein, Bhavnagar ke Fast Track Court ne usko Section 302 IPC mein life imprisonment ki saza sunayi thi. Humne socha tha ab insaaf mil gaya, woh criminal jail mein rahega. Lekin ab suna hai woh phir se court mein koi application laga raha hai, bahar aane ke liye. Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya toh humara kya hoga? Meri family toh darr ke maregi. Usne murder kiya hai, usko zindagi bhar jail mein hi rehna chahiye. Please, sir, humari suniye, usko bahar mat aane dijiye. Humein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Ghanshyam Das, Chitrakoot se aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi hi tabah kar di hai un logon ne. Kitni mushkil se maine 26 October 2005 ko Sitapur police station mein unke khilaaf FIR darj karwai thi. Unhone mujhe maara, peeta, jaan lene ki koshish ki thi, aur darr-dhamki bhi di thi. Dharaein bhi lagayi thi maine – 498A, 326, 307, 506 IPC ki. Mera Moqudma Reference Number 39/2005 aur Case Crime Number 298/2005 hai. Aur ab sun raha hoon ki wo log meri FIR hi quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain! Sir, agar meri FIR hi quash ho gayi toh mujhe kabhi insaaf nahi milega. Meri saari mehnat barbaad ho jaayegi. Please, meri suniye aur meri madad kijiye.

Sir, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai! Woh log ne mere bhai ko maar diya, itni bedardi se, ussi khatarnak hathiyar se! Yeh toh seedhe seedhe qatal hai, Section 302 ka mamla hai. Aur uske upar, mujhe bhi bohot gehri chot lagai hai, dekho na! Hum gareeb log hain, bas insaaf chahiye. Mujhe pata hai Belgaum ke Session Court mein hi iska faisla hoga, bade judge ke saamne. Par sir, yeh case itna mushkil kyun ban raha hai? Log bolte hain kanoon mein kuch uljhan hai. Par insaan mara hai! Mera bhai mara hai! Bas mujhe nyay dilwa do, unko saza milni chahiye jinhone yeh kiya hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri ek FIR thi, yaad hai aapko? Woh Sonam Dadul Bhutia aur unke saathi logon ke khilaaf thi, FIR No. 25/2021, jo maine 17 August 2021 ko darj karwai thi. Ab pata chala hai ki woh log court mein chale gaye hain, Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga kar, meri us FIR ko hi quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Matlab, mera poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain! Sir, yeh toh galat hai na? Maine itni mushkil se toh case kiya tha, ab woh use bhi band karwa denge? Kaisa insaaf hai yeh? Aap please meri madad kijiye, mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin mujhe insaaf na mile.

Sir, main Bhart Singh, Gwalior se. Meri aap se haath jod kar guzaarish hai, meri suno. Pata nahi meri kya galti thi, 1 June 2014 ki raat 9:15 baje, kuch badmashon ne mujhe aur mere bhai ko buri tarah maara, Sir. Unhone dangerous hathiyaron se hamla kiya, humein itni gehri chot lagi ki hospital mein mahino admit rehna pada. Meri puri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai us din se. Ab court mein Sessions Trial No. 704/2014 chal raha hai. Mujhe abhi pata chala ki 3 December 2014 ko Judge Sahab ne un logon par Section 326 IPC ka charge lagaya hai. Sir, unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi! Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Unko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye taaki kisi aur ke saath aisa na ho. Meri help kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main wohi Murshidabad, Lalbagh waale case ka victim hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2004 se chala aa raha hai yeh mamla. Un logon ne mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, hathiyaron se buri tarah zakhmi kiya tha. Section 307 aur 326 IPC ke under charge hue the woh. Maine kitni mushkilein jheli hain is case mein, kitne saal ho gaye! Aur abhi-abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki unhe Arms Act waale sections se toh bari kar diya gaya hai! Matlab, unhone mujhe hathiyaron se maara, meri jaan lene ki koshish ki, aur ab kehte hain ki hathiyar the hi nahi? Sir, yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Meri toh saari ummeed toot gayi hai. Kripya dekhiye, please. Mujhe toh lagta hai yeh log phir se kuch karenge.

Sir, main toh ek aam aadmi hoon. Yeh jo court-kachehri ka chakkar hai, samajh nahi aata. Par mujhe itna pata hai ki meri gawaahi sach hai. Yeh log bol rahe hain ki main interested party hoon, isliye meri baat pe bharosa mat karo. Par bade court ne, Supreme Court ne bhi toh kaha hai ki agar gawaahi bharosemand hai, toh sirf isliye ki main interested hoon, meri baat ko galat nahi keh sakte. Aur Sir, agar investigation mein ya police se koi chook ho bhi gayi hai, koi paperwork mein kami reh gayi hai, toh bhi meri sachchi baat ko reject nahi kar sakte. Mera case bilkul clear hai, saboot bhi hain. Meri gawaahi pe bharosa karna hi padega, yeh kanoon bhi kehta hai. Meri suniye Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun... Dheeraj Kumar ne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Usne mere saath zabardasti ki, meri izzat loot li (Section 376 IPC). Aur jab maine usey rokna chaha, toh usne mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di (Section 506 IPC). Main toh bahut darr gayi thi, par himmat karke Nihal Vihar police station aayi. Yahan meri FIR No. 459/2014 darj hui thi. Police ne achhe se jaanch ki aur Dheeraj ke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file kar di hai court mein. Ab mera case (Sessions Case No. 96 of 2014) chal raha hai. Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki usey uske kiye ki saza mile. Meri aankhon ke saamne usey punishment milni chahiye. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko bas yahi batane aayi hoon. Woh Kunal Kumar hai na, R-946, Raghubir Nagar wala, usne meri zindagi tabah kar di hai. Kareeb do saal pehle ki baat hai, usne mujhe apne ghar mein dhakke se kheench liya tha. Meri marzi bilkul nahi thi, aur usne mere saath bahut galat kiya, zabardasti ki. Us din ke baad se, woh mujhe lagatar dhamka raha hai, ki kisi ko bataya toh theek nahi hoga. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai, sahab. Police ne uske khilaaf 376 aur 506 IPC mein charge sheet toh file kar di hai, par mujhe ab bhi insaaf chahiye. Woh aise khule ghoomega toh meri jaan ko khatra hai. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... meri toh zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Manikant Singh, jise Tarun bhi kehte hain, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Yeh sab ek baar nahi, kai baar hua hai, mere hi ghar pe, Anand Parbat area mein, 12 July 2013 se pehle. Usne teen-chaar baar mere saath zabardasti ki, jab main akeli hoti thi. Sir, usne meri izzat ke saath khela hai, mujhe bahut daraya dhamkaya hai. Main abhi tak us khauf se nikal nahi paayi hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Anand Parbat police station ne uske khilaaf charge sheet toh file kar di hai, par main chahti hoon ki use कड़ी se कड़ी saza mile. Meri duniya ujad gayi hai.

Sir, main Nihal Vihar thane aayi thi 26 April 2013 ko. Maine apni saari takleef bata kar, puri details ke saath ek written complaint di thi us accused ke khilaaf. Socha tha ab toh mujhe insaaf milega, meri sunwai hogi. Lekin, sir, meri us complain par toh kuch bhi action nahi liya gaya! Kisi ne kuch kiya hi nahi. Jab 4 din tak koi jawab nahi mila, toh main 30 April ko dobara thane aayi. Maine poocha, "Meri complaint ka kya hua?" Lekin mujhe seedhe muh bata diya gaya ki kuch nahi hua hai. Aur jo police wale duty par the, woh toh mujhe dekh kar avoid karne lage. Meri baat sunne ko hi taiyar nahi the. Aap hi batao sir, main ek gareeb aurat kahan jaun?

Sir, main Raj Pal Dhall, aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Yeh baat 12 August 1994 ki hai, Raj Nagar Ghaziabad mein. Wahan Satyapal Singh, Ajay Kumar Singh, Sukhpal Singh aur Satyavir Singh ne, K. R. Ahuja aur kuch aur logon ke saath milkar ek saazish rachi. Unhone mujhe, mere bhai Sanjay Dhall aur Deepak Malik ko Kavi Nagar Police Station mein zabardasti pakad ke band kar diya. Sir, wahan unhone humein itna maara, itna torture kiya ki main bata nahi sakta. Humara kya kasoor tha? Hum beqasoor the, Sir! Aaj tak us din ka dard mere andar hai. Meri request hai, Sir, un logon ko saza dilwao. Humein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, woh Randhir Kumar Ojha, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Khayala Police Station mein maine uske khilaaf complaint di thi. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha, meri izzat loot li thi. Kitna time ho gaya hai, yeh sab 2013 ki baat hai. Police ne investigation ki, aur uske khilaaf charge sheet bhi file ki thi court mein. Abhi mera case Metropolitan Magistrate se Additional Sessions Judge (Fast Track Court) mein transfer ho gaya hai. Suna hai ki court ne uske khilaaf section 376 IPC ke तहत charge bhi frame kar diye hain. Bas ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri ek hi guzaarish hai, usko saza milni chahiye taaki koi aur ladki is dard se na guzre.

Sahab, mujhe complain karni hai. Log jo bolte hain na ki aurat kamzor hoti hai, yeh toh sab jhooth hai! Yeh mardon ki zyadti hai hum auraton ke saath. Agar taaqat ka matlab sirf maar-peet hai, toh theek hai, woh humse zyada taaqatwar honge. Par asli taaqat toh dil ki hoti hai, himmat ki hoti hai. Hum auraton mein woh zyada hai. Main kitna kuch sehti hoon, kitni qurbani deti hoon ghar ke liye, bachchon ke liye. Har mushkil mein khadi rehti hoon. Phir bhi mujhe aise treat kiya jaata hai, jaise meri koi value hi nahi. Meri suniye, Sahab. Hum nahi toh unka kya? Ghar kaise chalega? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sahab, is zyadti ke khilaaf.

Sir, main wohi victim hoon, jiske saath 6 August 2005 ki raat ko House No. 5312, B-Block mein itna bada haadsa hua tha, kareeb 8 baje. Meri puri zindagi barbaad kar di un logon ne. Woh Kapil Mohan Sharma, Gajender Rathi, Pradeep Dhama, Rishi Verma, Anil Sharma, Lalit Mohan Sharma aur Raj Mohan Sharma – yeh saaton log the! Unhone milkar meri izzat looti thi. Aur Sir, unhone mujhe itna daraya-dhamkaya bhi tha ki main kisi ko bata na sakoon. Meri jaan ko ab bhi khatra lagta hai. Timarpur police station ne charge sheet toh file kar di hai, lekin itne saal ho gaye, mujhe abhi tak proper insaaf nahi mila. Main bas yahi chahti hoon ki un sab ko kadi se kadi saza mile, taaki kisi aur ke saath aisa na ho. Mujhe bohot darr lagta hai, sir. Meri help kijiye.

Sir, main ek bahut pareshaan aurat hoon. Krishan Lal Chawla naam ke aadmi ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. WZ-79C, Taja Garden mein, 2010 se 2011 tak, lagbhag ek saal tak usne mere saath bahut galat kiya. Meri marzi ke khilaf, zabardasti usne mere saath rape kiya. Main bahut darr gayi thi, kyunki usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di thi agar maine kisi ko bataya. Uske darr se main chup rahi. Ab mujhme himmat aayi hai. Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe Krishan Lal Chawla se insaaf dilwaiye. Usne mera sab kuch cheen liya hai.

Sahab, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh duniya hi ujaad di hai in logon ne. Jo mere saath hua hai, uske baad toh jeene ka mann hi nahi karta. Wo Brahm Dev Kamat aur uska saathi Om Prakash, in dono ne meri zindagi tabah kar di hai. Maine hi darrte-darrte Brahm Dev Kamat ko pehchana tha, tab jaake use police ne pakda. Uska samaan bhi check hua, aur usne khud bataya ki usne mere saath kya kiya aur kahan kiya. Phir Om Prakash ko bhi pakda gaya. Meri jaan ko ab bhi khatra hai, sir. Punjabi Bagh police station mein jo FIR No. 100/11 darj hai, usmein inko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sahab, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Ye jo aadmi hai na, jiske khilaaf mera case chal raha hai, usne phir se naya drama shuru kar diya hai. Pehle toh isko Ahmedabad Sessions Court se anticipatory bail mil gayi thi. Mujhe laga tha bas ab yeh pakda jayega, par nahi! Phir jaise-taise karke, bahut mushkil se, Gujarat High Court ne uska woh bail 18.07.2014 ko cancel kiya tha. Mujhe thodi tasalli mili thi ki chalo ab insaaf milega. Par abhi pata chala hai ki yeh phir se us High Court ke faisle ko challenge kar raha hai! Sir, ye kya chal raha hai? Kya hum gareeb logon ko kabhi insaaf nahi milega? Woh aadmi bas tareekh pe tareekh lagwa raha hai, aur humein pareshan kar raha hai. Kripya dekhiye sir, usko dobara bail na mil jaye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon ki mujhe bahut tension ho rahi hai. Mere saath jo galat hua hai, woh toh ek sexual offence hai, aur main toh ek aurat hoon. Ab woh log (accused) keh rahe hain ki compromise kar lo, aur mera case khatam karwa denge. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, sir! Aise kaise ho sakta hai ki itna bada gunaah karke bhi woh log bach jayenge, sirf ek compromise se? Ye toh non-compoundable offence hai na, sir? Isme toh compromise nahi ho sakta. Mujhe lagta hai woh log Section 482 ka kuch laga kar mera case band karwana chahte hain. Mujhe dar lag raha hai, sir, mera case khatam na ho jaye aur unko saza na mile. Yeh saari baat 24 May 2023 se chal rahi hai. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe justice chahiye!

Sir, main Udaimandir Police Station mein 2016 mein ek FIR darj karwai thi, number 49/2016. Usme maine bataya tha ki kaise us aadmi ne 2002 mein mere saath dhokha kiya, zabardasti ki, aur phir paison ke liye blackmail bhi kiya (Sections 376, 420, 386 IPC). Kitne saal tak main chup rahi, phir himmat karke complaint ki. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh meri FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Meri to saari ummeed toot jayegi, Sir. Itni mushkil se maine ye kadam uthaya tha. Kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega? Please, meri madad karo. Meri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar ye case band ho gaya.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi tabah ho gayi hai! 30 January 2013 ko main apni mummy Shanti Devi ke saath is Uttam Nagar police station aayi thi. Mujhe tab itna rona aa raha tha ki kuch bol bhi nahi pa rahi thi. Par maine himmat karke apna poora bayan darj karwaya. Woh Narender alias Nikhil, usne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai, meri izzat par haath daala hai! Usne mujhe jhoothe vaade kiye aur phir... Sir, meri FIR bhi ho chuki hai, usmein saari baatein likhi hain. Please, mujhe usko saza dilwani hai. Main bas nyay chahti hoon, sir. Usne meri zindagi nark bana di hai.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh log bol rahe hain ki yeh toh bas ek chhoti si galti thi, anjaane mein ho gaya. Unka vakeel bol raha hai ki 'innocent lapse' tha, us par koi action mat lo. Par Sir, yeh koi chhoti baat nahi thi mere liye! Meri family ko kitna dukh hua hai, woh kaise bhool sakte hain? Unki yeh 'unintentional mistake' ne mujhe bahut nuksaan pahunchaya hai. Mujhe lagta hai unhe saza milni chahiye. Aise kaise bol sakte hain ki chhod do? Kya mere saath insaaf nahi hoga? Sir, please, mujhe nyay dilaiye. Unhone jaan boojh kar kiya ho ya anjaane mein, mujhe toh bhugatna pada na.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... meri toh puri zindagi ujaad di hai us Kamal Chaurasia ne! Patel Nagar mein rehta hai woh. October 2012 se hi usne meri zindagi nark bana di thi. Usne mere saath itna galat kaam kiya, meri izzat loot li. Aur jab main pregnant hui, toh usne mujhe zabardasti, dhamka ke, woh... mera bachcha bhi khatam karwa diya. Main kya karti? Main toh bas uspar bharosa karti thi. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Mujhe usse insaaf chahiye. Please, usko kadi se kadi saza dilwaiye. Usne meri duniya barbaad kar di hai.

Sir, meri suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Bheem hai na, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Usne Maya Puri ke C-76, Phase-II mein, mujhse shaadi ka jhootha vaada kiya. Aur phir mere saath galat kaam kiya, zabardasti ki. Jab maine kisi ko batane ki koshish ki toh usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di. Bola, agar kisi ko bataya toh woh mujhe khatam kar dega. Main itna darr gayi thi ki kuch bol hi nahi paayi. Ab main himmat karke aapke paas aayi hoon. Usne mere saath dhokha kiya hai, meri izzat loot li hai aur mujhe dhamkaya bhi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main ek divorcee hoon. Mera talaq hua hai abhi. Mere mummy-papa ne badi mushkil se meri doosri shaadi ke liye ladka dhoondhna shuru kiya tha. Jeevansathi.com pe mujhe yeh aadmi mila. Usne pehle toh saaf mana kar diya ki woh mujhse shaadi nahi kar sakta. Mujhe laga chalo, kam se kam sach toh bola. Par phir usne kaha ki uski mummy ka khayal rakhne ke liye koi chahiye. Maine socha, shayad yahi meri kismat hai, ek naya ghar mil jayega, ek family mil jayegi. Main uski mummy ka khayal rakhne lagi, uske ghar rehne lagi. Par sir, isne toh meri zindagi barbaad kar di! Shaadi ka jhootha vaada toh nahi kiya, par har tarah se mera fayda uthaya hai, dhoka diya hai. Ab main kahan jaun? Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jiske case mein Vasant Vihar PS mein FIR No. 305/2016 register hui thi. Woh jo accused hai na, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Usne mere saath rape kiya, gandi harkatein ki aur dhokha bhi diya tha (Sections 376, 377, 420 IPC). Court ne toh uske khilaaf charges bhi frame kar diye the, 22 February 2017 ko, Patiala House Courts mein. Humein laga tha ab toh justice milega, thodi shanti milegi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se court mein chala gaya hai, bol raha hai uske upar charges galat lagaye hain! Yeh kya mazak hai, sir? Meri zindagi barbaad kar di usne, aur ab woh aise petition daal ke case ko aur lamba khinchna chahta hai. Please, sir, help kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main yahan apni complaint leke aayi hoon. Deepak Dogra naam ka ek aadmi hai, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Usne shaadi ka jhootha waada karke, kareeb dhaai saal tak mere saath physical relations banaye. Yeh sab 6 October 2010 se shuru hua tha. Uske dada ki Madipur wali factory mein bhi aur mere apne ghar mein bhi, usne meri marzi ke bina mere saath galat kiya. Usne mujhe poora dhoka diya hai, Sir. Mujhe usne cheat kiya hai aur meri izzat se khela hai. Punjabi Bagh police station mein uske khilaaf sections 376, 496, 420 IPC ke तहत case file hua hai. Bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Sangam Vihar PS se aayi hoon. Meri suniye please. Woh ladka, usne toh meri zindagi barbaad kar di! Usne pehle mujhse shaadi ka jhootha vaada kiya, aur phir mere saath bahut galat kiya. Jab maine mana kiya toh usne mujhe maara-peeta bhi. Aur usne aur uske paanch family members ne milkar mujhe dhamkiyan di hain, kehte hain agar maine kuch kiya toh bura hoga. Main pehle court gayi thi, Sir, kyunki meri FIR koi nahi likh raha tha. Maine Section 200 CrPC ke तहत complaint di thi. Ab judge sahab ne Section 156(3) CrPC ke under bola hai ki meri FIR zaroor darj ki jaaye. Meri bas yahi request hai, please meri FIR likho aur un sab ko pakdo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bahut zyaada pareshan hoon main.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri FIR No. 76, jo 19.2.2002 ko darj hui thi, uske baad Sessions Judge Sahab, Patiala ne bhi 29.10.2002 ko order pass kiya tha ki Jasbir Singh Ahluwalia, Saroj Rani aur unke saathiyon par sections 376, 354, 506, 294 jaise gambhir dharaon ke तहत case chalaya jaye. Unhone meri izzat par haath daala, mujhe gandi-gandi baatein sunayi, dhamkiya di aur meri zindagi barbaad karne ki koshish ki thi. Ab yeh log, jo mujhpar itna zulm kar chuke hain, woh court mein apni charges quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, please! Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Unhe saza milni chahiye. Meri family bahut darr rahi hai. Inhe aise kaise chhod sakte hain?

Sir, main badi mushkil se yahan tak aayi hoon. Meri zindagi ujaad di hai us darinde ne. Usne meri izzat par haath daala, meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Jab se woh ghatiya harkat hui hai, main na din ko chain se so paati hoon, na raat ko. Log mujhe alag nazron se dekhte hain. Main Barabanki se hoon, Sir. Mujhe sirf insaaf chahiye. Usne jo kiya hai, woh seedha Section 376 IPC ka mamla hai. Usko zindagi bhar jail mein dalwao, Sir. Please, meri madad karo. Mujhe usko Rs. 2,000 ka fine nahi, life imprisonment chahiye. Mere sath bahut galat hua hai.

Sir, main yahan bohot himmat karke aayi hoon. Mujhe na, abhi pata chala hai ki ek naya kanoon bana hai, jo hum ladkiyon aur auraton ko galat kaam se bachane ke liye hai, jo exploitation hota hai na, usko rokne ke liye. Mere saath bhi bohot bura hua hai, Sir. Meri jaisi kitni ladkiyan hain jinki life barbaad ho jaati hai. Log majboori ka fayda uthate hain aur phir galat raaston pe dhakel dete hain. Kya yeh naya kanoon sach mein humari help karega? Kya mujhe insaaf mil payega? Mujhe darr lagta hai, par ab thodi umeed bhi hai. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko meri takleef. Log mujhe aurat samajh kar kamzor samjhte hain, kehte hain yeh kya kar legi. Par sir, yeh toh mardon ki zyadti hai hum auraton ke saath. Agar taakat sirf brute force hoti toh shayad hum thode kam hote, par agar himmat aur moral power ki baat karein na, toh hum auratein kahin zyada mazboot hain. Maine itna kuch saha hai, itni mushkilein jheli hain. Kya mere mein himmat nahi hai? Kya main self-sacrificing nahi hoon? Meri sehney ki shakti dekho, sir! Woh log meri is himmat ko nahi samajhte aur mujhe tang karte hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh log mera jeena mushkil kar rahe hain, bas isliye ki main ek aurat hoon.

Sir, main Nangloi se aayi hoon. Woh Kapil hai na, usne meri zindagi tabaah kar di hai. Baat 14 April 2011 ki hai, dopahar ke dedh baje, main apne ghar A-765 Camp No. 2 mein thi. Woh mujhe utha ke le gaya, mere mummy-papa ki permission ke bina. Main toh chhoti bachhi thi sir, kya pata tha kya ho raha hai. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya, meri izzat loot li. Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di usne. Police ne toh investigation bhi complete kar di hai aur charge sheet bhi court mein file ho gayi hai. Ab mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Us Kapil ko saza milni chahiye, usne meri poori life barbaad kar di hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Anil Kumar Shukla, usi ne sab kiya hai. Yaad hai, 25-26 January 2012 ki raat thi? Karib 12:45 baje woh mere ghar mein ghus aaya tha, sir. Raat ke andhere mein jab main so rahi thi, usne meri privacy mein trespass kiya. Usne mujhe kuch pilaya ya khilaya hoga, mujhe hosh hi nahi tha. Jab aankh khuli toh sab kuch khatam ho chuka tha. Usne meri izzat loot li, sir. Aur jab maine uska virodh kiya, toh usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di. Main darr gayi thi, bahut zyada darr gayi thi. Mujhe bas ab insaaf chahiye us Anil Shukla se. Moti Nagar Police Station mein complaint bhi ki thi. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kya hua tha. Mujhe acchhe se yaad hai, woh 2 May 2013 ka din tha. Raju Tyre Shop ke bilkul paas, Lokesh ke idhar hi, mere saath bahut badi anghatna ho gayi thi. Main toh pura ghabra gaya tha, sir! Maine turant hi police ko phone kiya. Meri complaint par ek wireless operator sahab ne jaankari aage bheji, aur phir mujhe pata chala ki HC Mahender sahab ne meri FIR bhi darj kar li hai. Uske baad, ASI Ranbir Singh aur ek Ct. Rajesh bhi Raju Tyre Shop aaye the, poori jaanch-puchh karne. Sir, bas yahi darkhwast hai, mujhe insaaf dilwa do!

Sir, main aapke paas bohot himmat karke aayi hoon. Ye Pradeep naam ka aadmi hai, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Baat 3-4 saal purani hai, Uttam Nagar mein, C-500, J.J.Colony, Hastaal Road pe. Usne mujhe pehle ek Limca offer ki, usme kuch nasheela padarth milaya tha. Mujhe hosh hi nahi raha uske baad, aur usne mere saath bahut galat kiya, mera rape kiya. Us din se main darr-darr ke jee rahi hoon, usne mujhe dhamki bhi di thi kisi ko bataya toh jaan se maar dega. Maine itne saal dard mein guzare hain. Ab aur nahi seh sakti. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe us Pradeep ko saza dilwani hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir.

Sahab, main aapko kya bataun, mera Vinay Kumar Singh wala case, jo 2008 se chal raha hai, abhi tak khatam nahi hua. Kanpur Nagar mein, woh Jai Mangal Sharma judge sahab ne 2014 mein do-do baar faisla sunaya tha, ek 13 November ko aur ek 18 November ko. Hum socha tha ab toh chain milega, par nahi! Ye log bolte hain, case abhi bhi court mein chal raha hai, appeals chal rahi hain. Meri to poori zindagi is chakkar mein nikal gayi hai, sahab. Itna pareshan ho gaya hoon main. Vinay Kumar Singh toh maze mein hai, aur main yahan bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Bas ab mujhe nyay chahiye, aur kuch nahi.

Sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri suniye please. Khedabari mein rehta hoon main. Ye jo Saddam Hossain hai, Late Safik Miah ka beta, aur uska saathi Rabban Ali, Md. Bajlu Miah ka beta, dono ne meri zindagi hell bana di hai. Roj dhamki dete hain, ghar ke saamne aake gaali-galoch karte hain. Bolte hain, 'meri zameen chhod de varna achha nahi hoga.' Pichhle hafte meri dukaan ka shutter bhi tod diya. Meri family bhi darr gayi hai. Ye log Khedabari, P.S. Sonamura, District Sepahijala ke hi rehne wale hain. Sir, mujhe inse bachao, bahut bade gunde hain ye. Agar kuch ho gaya toh iski zimmedari unhi ki hogi. Please, meri madad karo, Sahab!

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Mujhe aur mere parivar ko Md. Saddam Hossain, jo Late Safik Miah ka beta hai, aur Md. Rabban Ali, jo Md. Bajlu Miah ka beta hai, yeh dono Khedabari, Sonamura ke rehne wale, bahut pareshan kar rahe hain. Court ka order jo 04.03.2023 ko aaya tha, uske baad bhi inki harkatein band nahi hui hain. Mujhe dhamkiyan dete hain, gali-galauj karte hain, aur kehte hain ki mera jeena mushkil kar denge. Sir, meri jaan ko khatra hai. Hum log bahut darr gaye hain, ghar se nikalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Kripya in par sakht se sakht action lijiye. Hum garib log hain, aap hi hamari madad kar sakte hain.

Sir, main aapke paas bohot mushkil mein aayi hoon. Us aadmi ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pehle usne mujhse shaadi ka jhootha vaada kiya, bade-bade sapne dikhaye, mujhe dhokha diya. Maine us par itna bharosa kiya tha, par usne... usne mere saath galat kaam kiya, zabardasti ki, Sir! Meri izzat loot li usne. Main andar se puri toot chuki hoon. Maine iski complaint pehle 10.10.2024 ko bhi di thi, aur aap logon ne sections 376 aur 417 IPC ke तहत case bhi register kiya hai. Par abhi tak... mujhe insaaf nahi mila hai. Woh ganda aadmi khule ghoom raha hai. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Yeh Md. Saddam Hossain hai, Late Safik Miah ka beta, aur Md. Rabban Ali, jo Bajlu Miah ka beta hai, dono Khedabari, Sepahijala ke rehne wale hain. Sir, in logon ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pichle kuch dino se yeh mujhe aur mere parivaar ko bahut pareshan kar rahe hain. Kal shaam ko bhi, mere ghar ke paas aakar gaali-galoch kiya aur dhamki di ki agar maine unki baat nahi mani toh accha nahi hoga. Mujhe in dono se bahut dar lag raha hai, Sir. Yeh pehle bhi aise kaamo mein shamil rahe hain, inka naam 04.03.2023 ke judgment mein bhi hai. Kripya inke khilaf sakht action lijiye, Sir, taaki hum shanti se reh saken.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri suniye please. Us aadmi ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pehle shaadi ka jhootha waada kiya, mujhe dhoka diya (417 IPC). Fir usne mere saath galat kaam kiya, mera balatkaar kiya (376 IPC). Upar se, meri jaati ko le kar bhi mujhe gaaliyan di (504 IPC, SC/ST Act). Kehta tha 'tum neech jaati ke ho', bahut insult kiya! Mujhe dhamkiyan bhi deta hai ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh jaan se maar dega (506 IPC). Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh case (Spl.C.No.945/2024) ko khatam karwana chahta hai. Please Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh bahut powerful hai, usko saza milni chahiye. Main bahut darr rahi hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed aur dard leke aayi hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, unhone mujhe dhokha diya, jhoothe waade kiye. Shaadi ka jhootha sapna dikha kar, unhone mere saath zabardasti ki, meri izzat loot li, Sir! Jab maine mana kiya, toh mujhe buri tarah maara-peeta bhi. Gaaliyan di aur dhamkiyan bhi di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh mujhe aur mere gharwalo ko jaan se maar denge. Yeh sab unhone milkar kiya, kai log the us waqt. Main bahut sehmi hui hoon, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please! Un sab ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, please meri suniye, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Dwarka court se, Ms. Apoorva Rana Metropolitan Magistrate madam ne 19.08.2023 ko mere khilaaf ek order pass kiya hai. Usmein likha hai ki mere khilaaf cognizance le li gayi hai aur mujhe summon kiya gaya hai. Sir, yeh bilkul galat hai, main toh be-kasoor hoon! Bina wajah mujhe itni takleef ho rahi hai. Meri toh neendein udd gayi hain. Is order ko quash karwane ke liye, maine Section 482 CrPC ke under ek petition file ki hai. Meri aapse request hai ki aap meri madad karein, yeh mere saath bahut bada injustice ho raha hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai, zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Mujhe Dwarka court se ek notice mila hai, usme 19 August 2023 ki date hai. Madam Apoorva Rana Metropolitan Magistrate ne yeh order pass kiya hai. Pata nahi kyun, sir, mujhe bulaya jaa raha hai, jaise main koi bahut bada gunehgar hoon! Maine toh kuch kiya hi nahi hai, kasam se. Koi bewajah mujhe phasane ki koshish kar raha hai. Main toh bahut seedha-saadha insaan hoon. Aap meri suno, sir, yeh order galat hai. Isko radd karwana hai, meri madad karo, please!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe court se ek order mila hai, 19 August 2023 ka. Judge Apoorva Rana ji ne bheja hai Dwar district court se. Usmein mujhe bulaya gaya hai, summon kiya gaya hai. Lekin sir, mera koi kasoor nahi hai, main toh bekaar mein phas gaya hoon. Pata nahi kaise yeh sab ho gaya. Meri toh raat ki neend udd gayi hai. Yeh order bilkul galat hai, isko please radd karwa do (quash karwa do). Meri madad kijiye, sir. Main toh seedha-saadha aadmi hoon, mujhe toh kanoon ka zyada gyaan bhi nahi. Bas itna pata hai ki mere saath galat ho raha hai.

Sir, main Dhatri hoon. Main Manipal University mein MBBS ki student hoon. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir, pata nahi main kaise bataun. 20 June 2013 ki raat thi, kareeb 11:20 baje. Main library se padhai karke waapas aa rahi thi apne campus ke andar hi, Pharmacy College ke saamne. Tabhi 3 log aaye aur mujhe ek auto mein forcibly utha le gaye. Auto ka number KA.20/A-8850 tha aur uska driver Hariprasad tha, main usko pehchan gayi. Unhone mujhe kidnap kar liya, sir! Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Manipal University mein MBBS ki student hoon. Mera naam Dhatri hai. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir! Pichli raat, 20 June 2013 ko, raat ke kareeb 11:20 baj rahe the, main library se vapas apne hostel aa rahi thi. Jaise hi main Pharmacy College ke saamne pahunchi, ek auto rikshaw (number KA.20/A-8850) mere paas aakar ruka. Usmein teen log the. Unhone zabardasti mujhe auto mein kheench liya aur kidnap kar liya. Main bahut darr gayi thi, cheekhti rahi par koi nahi tha wahan. Us auto ka driver Hariprasad tha, main use pehchan gayi thi. Sir, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Please un logon ko pakdo aur mujhe insaaf dilao.

Sir, meri suniye, main Manipal University ki MBBS student Dhatri hoon. Meri zindagi khatre mein hai! 20 June 2013 ki raat, kareeb 11:20 baje, jab main library se padh kar waapas aa rahi thi, Manipal campus mein Pharmacy College ke saamne, tab teen gundo ne mujhe utha liya. Ek auto rickshaw tha, jiska number KA.20/A-8850 tha. Usse Hariprasad naam ka aadmi chala raha tha. Sir, woh mujhe zabardasti kidnap kar ke le gaye. Main bahut dar gayi thi, meri madad kijiye! Meri family bahut pareshan hogi. In logon ko pakad lijiye, please!

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Maine kitni mushkil se PS North Avenue mein woh 0007/2016 wali FIR darj karwai thi apne pati aur sasural walon ke khilaaf. Unhone mujhe dahej ke liye itna sataya (Section 498A), mera saara streedhan aur samaan hadap liya (Section 406), aur toh aur mere saath badtameezi bhi ki (Section 354)! Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein ek application (Crl. M.C. 5130/2019) daal kar meri FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri complaint sachchi hai, meri jaan nikal jaayegi agar woh FIR hi radd ho gayi toh. Meri toh ek hi umeed hai iss case se, please unki yeh application reject honi chahiye. Unko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. 15 November ko mere saath bahut bura hua. Usne mujhe maara-peeta, meri izzat par haath daala aur fir... fir usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di, mere saath galat kaam kiya. Usne gandi harkatein bhi ki aur jab maine use roka to jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Maine Kapashera police station mein FIR bhi karwai thi, uska number hai 525/2022. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh *anticipatory bail* maang raha hai. Sir, agar use bail mil gayi toh woh mujhe nahi chhodega, meri aur meri family ki jaan ko khatra hai. Meri aapse haath jodkar vinti hai, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye aur usko bail mat milne dijiye. Main bahut darr rahi hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Main toh bas itna chahta hoon ki woh jo mujrim hai, uski bail cancel ho jaye. Par yahan court mein Suman De saab, jo sarkari vakil hain, unhone phir objection utha diya hai. Kehte hain meri application chalegi hi nahi! Bole ki meri bail cancel karne ki guharish toh pehle hi suni ja chuki hai, accused bhi wahan tha, aur woh toh 'merits' par dismiss bhi ho gayi thi. Ab main kya karoon? Aur upar se yeh bhi bol rahe hain ki woh pehle wala order, jisme meri request reject hui thi, woh toh Section 401 Cr.P.C. ke under 'revisable' hai. Toh kya main har baar aise hi dhakke khata rahunga? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri toh suno koi!

Sir, dekhiye na, hum kitne pareshan ho gaye hain. Mera case 2006 se chal raha hai. Murshidabad ke Kandi court mein, Additional District and Sessions Judge Sahab ne 25 aur 26 April 2006 ko ek judgment diya tha. Session trial number 2 of 2003 tha, ya session serial number 67 of 2002. Us judgment mein ek conviction hua tha, mujrim ko saza mili thi. Mujhe laga tha, chalo, ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab woh log uske khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain! Itne saal ho gaye hain, 2006 se ab tak, meri poori zindagi is case mein ulajh gayi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, yeh kab khatam hoga? Sir, please kuch kijiye, ab toh aur intezaar nahi hota, mujhe bas apna insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, maine pichle saal 23 October ko ek FIR karwai thi (Crime No. 1002/2024). Us case mein Anand Singh Lodha aur Brajendra Sharma accused hain. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein application daal rahe hain, nayi BNSS (Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita) ke Section 528 ke तहत, meri FIR ko cancel karwane ke liye! Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi gunda-gardhi hai. Meri complaint sachchi hai, unhone galat kiya tha. Agar meri FIR hi cancel ho gayi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Sahab, please kuch kijiye. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar unhe saza nahi mili. Meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Maine jo FIR darj karwai thi, Crime No. 1002/2024, jo 23.10.2024 ko register hui thi, ab ye Anand Singh Lodha aur Brajendra Sharma usko khatam karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Ye log Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), Section 528 ke तहत court mein gaye hain meri FIR quash karwane ke liye. Meri kya galti hai? Maine to apne saath hue zulm ki shikayat ki thi. Agar meri FIR hi khatam ho jayegi, to mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Mujhe in logon se bahut dar lag raha hai, Sir. Please kuch kijiye, meri madad kijiye. Ye log mera case band karwana chahte hain. Main aapke sharan mein hoon.

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Main bahut badi museebat mein hoon. Aapko toh pata hai, meri ek FIR chal rahi hai Kotwali, Gwalior mein, Crime No. 97/2023, woh jo ghatiya aadmi tha jisne mere saath Section 376, 376(2)(n) IPC ke तहत galat kaam kiya tha. Ab suna hai woh High Court mein petition laga raha hai ki meri FIR ko hi quash kar diya jaaye! Yeh kya mazak hai, Sir? Usne meri zindagi barbaad ki, aur ab woh chahta hai ki usko koi saza na mile? Meri FIR kaise cancel ho sakti hai? Agar meri FIR hi cancel ho gayi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye. Main bahut darr gayi hoon aur pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya/aayi hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai, Sir. Maine bade mushkil se ek FIR darj karwai thi un logon ke khilaaf. Par abhi haal hi mein, 10.02.2025 ko, High Court se ek order aaya hai W.P.No.33661/2024 mein, jisme meri woh FIR hi cancel kar di gayi hai! Meri toh puri ummeed toot gayi hai, Sir. Jisne galti ki thi, woh ab azaad ghoom raha hai aur meri complaint hi khatam kar di. Maine socha tha mujhe insaaf milega, par yeh kya ho gaya? Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir. Unhe kaise chhod sakte hain? Meri FIR wapas bahal karwaiye, please.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jisne 20 May 2013 ko FIR number 213/2013 darj karwayi thi Gazipur police station mein. Woh aadmi jiske khilaf maine complain ki thi, ab meri FIR quash karwana chahta hai. Par Sir, usne mere saath bahut bura kiya tha. Us din hum mile the, aur uske baad usne mujhe maara-peeta, zabardasti roke rakha, jaan se marne ki dhamki di aur phir... usne meri izzat loot li! Meri zindagi barbaad kar di Sir! Main bas insaaf chahti hoon. Itna zulm kiya hai usne. Mujhe please insaaf dilwao.

Sir, main Sunita hoon. Woh Belonia waala mera case hai na, jismein Special Judge ne 02.03.2016 ko usko conviction aur saza di thi. Mujhe laga tha ki chalo ab jaakar mujhe insaaf mila hai. Par sir, ab usne us judgment ke khilaaf appeal file kar di hai. Uski hearing bhi ho gayi hai 25.03.2019 ko. Sir, woh log toh apni taraf se Ms. R. Purukayastha jaise bade advocate leke aaye hain. Hamari taraf se Mr. B. Chowdhury, Public Prosecutor hain, woh toh hain, par sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Itni mushkil se toh usko pehle conviction mili thi. Agar woh appeal jeet gaya toh kya hoga? Kya woh phir se chhoot jayega? Meri toh saari ummeed toot jayegi agar usko saza nahi mili toh. Aap kuch kijiye sir, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main badi mushkil mein hoon. Woh jo aadmi hai na, jiske khilaaf maine pehle complaint ki thi, usne pehle toh sessions court se anticipatory bail le li thi. Mujhe laga ab insaaf kabhi nahi milega! Lekin phir High Court ne 18 July 2014 ko uski woh bail cancel kar di thi. Tab jaake meri jaan mein jaan aayi thi, laga tha chalo ab toh woh pakda jayega. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh high court ke is order ko challenge kar raha hai! Matlab woh phir se bail lene ki koshish kar raha hai! Sir, please dekhiye, agar woh phir bahar aa gaya toh meri zindagi barbad kar dega. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai. Meri aapse request hai, please kuch kijiye, usko phir se bail na mile. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera jo criminal case chal raha hai na, usmein appeal file karni thi. Lekin sir, jinhone mere liye appeal karni thi, unhone 106 din ki deri kar di. Poore ek sau chhah din! Ab woh court mein application daal rahe hain ki inki galti maaf kar do. Yeh kya mazaak hai, sir? Mera insaaf itne dinon tak latka diya inhone. Agar unki yeh galti maaf ho gayi, toh mere case ka kya hoga? Mujhe dar lag raha hai ki meri sunwai aur justice delay ho jayega ya milega hi nahi. Sir, yeh meri jaan ki baat hai, please meri madad kijiye. Main bahut umeed se aaya hoon aapke paas.

Sahab, main kya bataun? Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mere pati ne mere saath itna galat kiya hai ki main sharm se mar ja rahi hoon. Unhone mere saath jabardasti ki hai, jis tarah se koi dushman bhi nahi karta. Woh mere saath aisi-aisi harkatein karte the jo main bol bhi nahi sakti, mera poora shareer dukhta hai. Mujhe maara-peeta bhi hai, roz-roz ki maar-peet se main thak chuki hoon, mera shareer aur rooh dono dukhi hain. Begumpur police station mein meri complaint par jo FIR No. 378/2022 darj hui hai, woh bilkul sahi hai. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon, sahab. Mujhe unse bachao, main bahut darr gayi hoon.

Sahab, main bohot pareshan hoon, Sir. Meri toh zindagi ulajh gayi hai. Mera ek case chal raha hai Dwarka Court mein, wahan ke Judge sahab ne ek 'order' diya hai 25 October 2016 ko. Sahab, woh order mere khilaaf hai, woh 'order of charge' paas kar diya hai, aur mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Pata nahi kya samajh ke yeh order de diya gaya. Main toh bas insaaf chahta tha, lekin yeh toh ulta ho gaya. Main is order ko challenge karna chahta hoon, Sir. Meri sunwai theek se nahi hui hai. Woh asli mujrim hain, unpe charges lagne chahiye, unko saza milni chahiye. Meri aapse request hai ki is order ko dekha jaaye aur mere case mein dobara charges frame kiye jaayein. Main is order se bilkul khush nahi hoon, Sahab. Please meri madad kijiye, main bohot umeed se yahan aaya hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Ramu Lal hai na, hamare mohalle ka, woh humein roz tang karta hai. Meri chhoti si dukaan hai, uske saamne aake roz gaali-galoch karta hai, dhamki deta hai ki dukaan chhod doon. Meri family bhi usse bahut darr gayi hai, bachche school jaane se bhi darte hain. Pata nahi kab kya kar dega woh. Humare paas koi aur sahara nahi hai, aap hi humein bachao. Pichhle hafte usne ek ladai ki aur bola agar maine complain ki toh jaan se maar dega. Mujhe usse bachao, saab, woh criminal type ka aadmi hai. Meri jaan ko bhi khatra hai, aur mere business ko bhi. Kripya uske khilaf sakht action lo. Main bas shanti se apna kaam karna chahta hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon... meri FIR number 163/2014 thi na, jismein us aadmi ne mere saath galat kiya tha, Sections 376, 342 aur 506 ke तहत. Bade mushkil se, main court ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke, 2017 mein usko saza dilwa payi thi. Mujhe laga tha ab meri zindagi mein shanti aayegi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar phir se appeal kar raha hai, uss judgment ke khilaaf. Woh apni saza se bachna chahta hai. Sir, main bahut darr gayi hoon, agar woh bahar aa gaya toh meri aur mere parivar ki zindagi phir se hell ban jaayegi. Please, kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh bahar nahi aana chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun... meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai! Woh gande log, un logon ne mere saath... (pause, emotional) gang rape kiya tha, sir! Yeh Manjhanpur thane ke area ki baat hai, 2019 ka case hai, Crime No. 141. Unhone mujhe maara bhi tha, itna mara tha ki mai behosh ho gayi thi, aur dhamkaya bhi ki agar kisi ko bataya toh jaan se maar denge. Maine himmat karke FIR karwayi thi, tabhi sections 376-D, 323, 506 IPC lage the. Ab suna hai woh log bail lene ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, mujhe unse bahut darr lagta hai. Meri jaan ko khatra hai. Unhe saza milni chahiye, sir. Aap please meri madad kijiye, mujhe nyay dilaiye.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aayi hoon. Mujhe aaj bhi woh din yaad hai, 1 July 2009, subah ke 11 baje. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi un logon ne. Kitni mushkil se, kitni fight ke baad, Sivagangai ke Fast Track Mahalir Neethimandram mein, S.C.No.74/2011 mein, unko Section 376 r/w 109 IPC ke तहत सजा mili thi, 29 March 2016 ko. Par ab sunn rahi hoon ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai. Itni mushkil se thoda sukoon mila tha ki justice mili hai. Please, unko dobara koi chance mat do. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh phir se sab kuch kharab kar denge.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Woh din, 1 July 2009, subah ke 11 baje... uss darinde ne mere saath jo kiya, main kabhi bhool nahi sakti. Kitni mushkil se maine himmat ki, police ne support kiya. Shivgangai ke Fast Track Mahalir Neethimandram mein, S.C.No.74 of 2011 tha case. Pure saal lage, phir jaake 29 March 2016 ko judge saab ne usko saza sunai thi, Section 376 IPC ke तहत. Mujhe laga tha ab finally justice mil gaya. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh judge ke decision ke khilaaf appeal mein chala gaya hai. Kya meri takleef kabhi khatam nahi hogi? Mujhe phir se darr lag raha hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Woh log na, jinke khilaaf maine case kiya tha, ab woh ulta mujhe pareshan kar rahe hain. Unhone High Court mein ek naya application daal diya hai, pichle saal 7 February 2022 ko. Bolte hain Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga ke kuch relief chahiye unhe. Sir, mera case toh chal raha tha, ab yeh beech mein hi sab rokne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Pata hai, uski sunwai bhi video conferencing se hui hai. Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha kya chal raha hai. Yeh jo petitioner hai, yeh mera case khatam karwana chahta hai. Meri aap se request hai Sir, please meri madad karo. Inhe rok do, mera case aage badhne do. Bahut galat ho raha hai mere saath.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, Subhash ne mere saath kitni zyadati ki thi. Uske khilaaf humne Hanumangarh ki SC/ST Act waali court mein case kiya tha. Bade mushkil se insaaf mila tha, 27 January 2010 ko judge sahab ne mere haq mein faisla sunaya tha. Humne socha tha ab sab theek ho jayega. Par, Sir, woh kameena Subhash ab upar appeal le gaya hai. Mera woh jeeta hua case, jo faisla mere haq mein aaya tha, usne usko challenge kar diya hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai ki yeh sab kya ho raha hai. Kya humein kabhi shanti se jeene nahi denge? Meri jaan ko khatra hai, Sir. Kahi mera insaaf chhin na jaaye, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Aap kuch kijiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye please. Yeh 13/14 January 2011 ki raat ki baat hai. Us raat mere saath jo hua, woh main kisi ko bata nahi sakti. Un logon ne meri izzat loot li, mera rape kiya, aur mujhe itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di ki main sun bhi nahi sakti thi. Aur phir jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di agar maine kisi ko bataya. Sir, main bahut darr gayi thi, us din ke baad se meri neend udd gayi hai. Main har pal darr-darr ke jee rahi hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Woh gunehgar khule ghoom rahe hain aur meri zindagi nark ban gayi hai. Please unhe pakadiye aur mujhe insaaf dilaiye, Sir. Mujhe aap par poora bharosa hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri to zindagi hi kharab ho gayi hai in sab cheezon mein. Woh jo ek complaint maine ki thi na, 2001 mein... haan, wahi Annexure P4 wali, uske baad se pata nahi kitni baar mujhe court bulaya gaya hai. Woh jo summoning order aaya tha 7 September 2001 ko (Annexure P5), us din se lekar aaj tak, har doosre din koi naya case, koi nayi petition aa jati hai. Ek hi baat, ek hi mudda, ek hi complaint, pata nahi kitni baar chal chuka hai. Yeh log mujhe baar-baar tang kar rahe hain. Meri to samajh nahi aa raha, kab khatam hoga yeh sab. Sir, kripya karke meri madad kijiye. Main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, meri suniye, main kitni pareshan hoon. Pata nahi meri kismat mein aur kitna dukh likha hai. Meri izzat lootne walon ko, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha (Section 376 IPC), unko finally court ne saja di thi. Sivagangai ke Fast Track Mahalir Neethimandram ne 29 March 2016 ko unhe convict kiya tha, S.C.No.74 of 2011 mein. Mujhe laga tha ki ab insaaf mil gaya, thoda sukoon milega. Par ab sun rahi hoon ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain! Fir se mera case khul gaya hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai Sir? Kya hum jaisi gareeb auraton ko kabhi poora insaaf nahi milega? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh bach na jayein. Itni mushkil se jo justice mila hai, woh bhi chhin jayega kya? Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, jo maine complaint di thi na, aap logon ne woh le li aur Cr.No.49/2011 mein mera case darj kar liya hai. FIR bhi ban gayi hai. Un zalimon ne mujhe maara, dhamkaya aur mere saath woh galat kaam kiya, isliye IPC ke sections 323, 506 aur 376 r/w 34 lage hain. Uske baad, aapki team ne jaanch shuru kar di. Mujhe medical check-up ke liye bhi bheja gaya. Jahan yeh sab hua tha, wahan ka spot mahazar bhi hua hai. Jo saamaan mila, usse FSL test ke liye bheja gaya. Gawahon ke बयान bhi record kiye gaye hain. Aur woh jo aaropi the na, jinhone mujh par itna zulm kiya, unke paas anticipatory bail thi, phir bhi woh khud hi police station aa gaye the. Sir, ab bas mujhe insaaf milna chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Wo Amit Kumar, jisne mujhe uthaya tha, usne meri poori life kharab kar di. Yaad hai, 13 February 2009 ki baat hai, main Nangloi ke Jaat Chowk mein apne Tuition Centre se nikal rahi thi, tabhi usne mujhe kidnap kar liya. Usne mere saath bahut galat kaam kiya, meri izzat loot li, aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Main kitne saalon se is insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Police ne uske khilaaf sections 363, 366, 376 aur 506 IPC ke तहत chargesheet file ki hai. Sir, meri bas itni guzaarish hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Main aaj bhi us darr mein jee rahi hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas badi mushkil se aayi hoon. Mera naam... (naam nahi bataungi abhi). Yeh Vijit Aggarwal, isne meri poori zindagi tabaah kar di hai. Usne mujhse shaadi ka vaada kiya tha, bade-bade sapne dikhaye the, aur main uski baaton mein aa gayi. Main us par itna bharosa karti thi, Sir. 25 January 2008 se lekar 18 February 2008 tak, usne baar-baar Delhi aur aas-paas alag-alag jagahon par mere saath... physical relations banaye. Har baar yahi kehta raha ki shaadi karega. Par usne sirf mera faayda uthaya hai, Sir. Usne mere saath dhokha kiya hai, meri izzat ke saath khilwad kiya hai! Yeh rape hai, Sir! Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please, us Vijit Aggarwal par sakht se sakht action lijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... Prayag Sharma ne meri zindagi tabah kar di hai. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, meri izzat loot li. Ek baar nahi, Sir, pata nahi kitni baar usne yeh ghinona kaam kiya mere saath. 2007 se lekar 2009 tak, saalon tak usne mujhe pareshan kiya. Kabhi mere apne ghar par, kabhi Delhi ke Cozy Home hotel mein, kabhi Mussoorie mein Hill Queen mein, kabhi Nainital ke Shubham hotel mein, Bhopal mein bhi... har jagah usne mujhe nahin chhodha. Usne meri life hell bana di hai. Main bas justice chahti hoon, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye us kameene se.

Saab, main kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Harpreet Singh, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Yeh 24 February 2008 ki baat hai, subah ke 6 baje, Chaukhandi Mother Dairy ke paas. Usne aur Harjeet ne milkar mujhe zabardasti uthaya tha. Sir, Tilak Nagar police station ki hadd mein hi yeh sab hua. Usne mujhe bandh karke rakha, blackmail kiya aur fir... usne meri izzat loot li, saab! Jhoote shaadi ke vaade kiye, mujhe dhoke mein rakha. Main toh samjhi thi meri shaadi ho gayi hai, par woh sab jhoot tha. Saab, mujhe bas us Harpreet Singh se insaaf chahiye. Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut mushkil mein aayi hoon. Us ladke ne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Usne jhoothe vaade karke, mujhe shaadi ka jhaansa dekar, mere saath physical sambandh banaye. Uski wajah se main pregnant ho gayi thi. Usne force kiya, aur 2 May 2007 ko mera abortion hua. Mere paas uska doctor ka certificate bhi hai, Sir.
