Uske baad bhi usne mujhe chhod diya. 18 June 2007 ko mera medical check-up bhi hua tha. Usne meri izzat loot li hai, mere saath dhokha kiya hai, yeh toh rape hai Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Hari Nagar se hoon. Bahut pareshan hoon, badi himmat karke aapke paas aayi hoon. Ek Parmod Kamlani hai, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Holi se 15-20 din pehle, dopahar 12 baje, mere ghar M-1, WZ-169, Hari Nagar mein, usne zabardasti mere saath galat kaam kiya, meri marzi ke khilaaf. Usne dhamki di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya ya awaaz uthayi toh woh mujhe jaan se maar dega. Main bahut darr gayi thi. Aur sir, Holi ke 15-20 din baad, usne usi jagah dobara wahi ghin

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Woh aadmi ne mujhpe haath uthaya, Sir. Usne mujhe dhakka diya, pakda aur phir... meri izzat pe haath daala. Uska irada saaf tha, meri modesty ko outraj karna chahta tha. Main bahut darr gayi thi, Sir. Mujhe bahut sharmindagi aur gussa aa raha hai. Aisa lag raha hai jaise main kahin surakshit nahi hoon. Please, uske khilaaf Section 354 IPC ke tehat action lijiye. Main nyay chahti hoon.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon. Meri jo musibat hai na, usme bade-bade log involved hain. Yeh sab Kerala Legislative Assembly ke Members hain, yani MLA log! Meri samajh mein nahi aa raha, sir, jab aise log hi galat kaam karte hain toh hum gareeb logon ka kya hoga? Mera case court mein chal raha hai. Yeh jo Crl.M.C. No.3178/2016 aur 2111/2016 hain, yeh sab usi main case se jude hain, jiska number C.C. No.1389/2015 hai. Thiruvananthapuram ke Judicial First Class Magistrate Court - III mein pending hai yeh. Sir, please meri suniye. Yeh log apni taaqat ka ghalat istemal kar rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye bas.

Sir, yeh case ab meri samajh se bahar ho gaya hai. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai in sab mein. Woh jo mere teen-teen cases hain na, sab ek dusre se jude hue hain. Main toh bas Thiruvananthapuram court mein C.C. No.1389/2015 ke liye insaaf chahta hoon. Usmein jo accused hain, sir, woh sab bade-bade MLAs hain. Aapko pata hai na, unka kitna influence hota hai. Ab yeh jo do aur cases chal rahe hain, judge sahab keh rahe hain ki sab ek hi order se nipta denge. Main toh bas itna janta hoon ki main complainant hoon aur mujhe nyay chahiye. Ek toh pehle se itni mushkil, upar se yeh cases ki taareekh pe taareekh. Meri toh life puri ulajh gayi hai in chakkar mein. Mujhe lagta hai woh log apni power use kar rahe hain is case ko ghumaane ke liye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki maine 31 January, 2015 ko ek complaint darj karwai thi. Main HDFC Life Insurance mein kaam karti thi, aur woh jo accused hai na, woh mera superior officer tha. Meri job mein main jo bhi work karti thi, uske liye mujhe incentives milte the. Par woh aadmi, mera boss, hamesha apni power ka galat fayda uthata tha. Meri mehnat ki kamayi, mere incentives, un par uski buri nazar rehti thi aur woh har baar mujhse paise demand karta tha. Usne mujhe itna pareshan kiya, Sir, ki main bata nahi sakti. Meri puri mehnat bekar ho jaati thi uski wajah se. Main bahut dukhi aur majboor feel karti thi. Please, meri suno aur insaaf dilwao.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya karoon. 25 August 2021 ki baat hai, main apne ghar mein akeli thi. Mera devar, Mushtaq Ahmad Shah, apni biwi Shaheena aur bete Tawseeq ke saath, zabardasti mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Unhone darwaza toda aur andar aa gaye. Phir Mushtaq ne mere saath bahut badtameezi ki, meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish ki. Main chillati rahi, ro rahi thi, lekin unhone meri ek na suni. Shaheena aur Tawseeq bhi unka saath de rahe the. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha tha, main akeli thi. Meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki unhone, mere apne ghar mein. Mujhe unse apni jaan ka bhi khatra hai. Please, Daroga ji, mujhe insaaf dilao. Meri madad karo.

Sir, main complaint karne aayi hoon. Mere ghar mein AC lag raha tha, aur tabhi kuch log, woh petitioner hain na, woh aur unke saath ke do-teen aur log zabardasti mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Sir, mera husband toh ghar pe the hi nahi, aur main akeli thi apne do chhote bachchon, meri maa aur meri behen ke saath. Andar aate hi unhone humein dhamkana aur pareshan karna shuru kar diya. Hum sab itna dar gaye the, especially mere bachche. Sir, yeh meri family ki safety ka matter hai. Un logon ne humari privacy mein interfere kiya. Mujhe unpe strict action chahiye, please Sir.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki 8 November 2020 ko dopahar ke 3 baje ki baat hai. Main apni zameen par, jo Hyderpora Bye-pass pe hai, kaam kar rahi thi. Tabhi woh log wahan aa gaye aur unhone mujhe mere khet mein kaam karne se roka. Sir, unhone mujhe gandi-gandi gaaliyan di aur bahut badtameezi ki. Meri taraf galat niyat se badhe, jisse meri bezzati hui. Main bahut darr gayi thi aur unse bahut pareshan hoon. Yeh log meri zameen bhi zabardasti hadapna chahte hain. Please unpe sakht se sakht action lijiye, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Rekha devi bol rahi hoon. Mera Tis Hazari Mahila Court mein ek case chal raha tha. Pichle mahine, 26 July ko, Judge Sahab ne ek judgment sunaya tha. Main sochi thi ab sab khatam ho gaya. Par abhi pata chala hai ki us judgment ke khilaaf appeal file ho gayi hai! Woh log keh rahe hain Section 378 Cr.P.C. ya BNSS 419 ke tehat. Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Main toh bohot pareshaan hoon. Itni mushkil se thoda sukoon mila tha, ab phir se court-kachahri ke chakkar kaatne padenge? Mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha. Aap hi bataiye na, main kya karoon? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye tha.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh raat ki neend ud gayi hai. Aapko yaad hai mera woh case Khushi Ram ke khilaaf? Jo Tis Hazari ke Mahila Court mein chal raha tha? Uska ek faisla aaya tha 24 December 2020 ko. Mujhe laga tha ki ab insaaf mil gaya hai, thodi shanti milegi. Par ab pata chala hai ki us faisle ke khilaaf koi appeal file hui hai, section 374 Cr.P.C. ke तहत. Yeh sab kya chal raha hai Sir? Ek baar faisla ho gaya toh baar-baar court kyun jana padega? Main gareeb insaan hoon, itni baar court ke chakkar nahi kaat sakti. Khushi Ram ko saza milni chahiye Sir. Please meri madad kijiye, main ab aur nahi seh sakti.

Sir, main Abhishek Goyal bol raha hoon. Meri suniye please. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai mere saath. Woh log, pados wale, mujhe bahut pareshaan kar rahe hain. Meri property pe kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Kal toh seedhe dhamki de di, "agar police ke paas gaye toh accha nahi hoga". Main toh darr gaya hoon sir. Ghar mein meri biwi bachhe hain, unhe bhi darr lag raha hai. Itne saare kanoon hain, itne judgments hain, par hum jaise gareeb aadmi ko insaaf kahan milta hai? Police station aaya hoon, aap hi meri last hope ho. Meri madad karo please, unse bachao mujhe.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, bilkul toot chuki hoon. Mujhe aapse help chahiye. Pichle mahine, 21 March 2025 ko, Mahila Court se ek order aaya tha, woh mere khilaaf tha, bilkul galat! Meri to sunwai hui hi nahi theek se. Main ek aam aurat hoon, mujhe yeh kanuni baatein itni samajh nahi aati. Par mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai, dhokha hua hai. Woh jo order pass hua hai na, main chahti hoon use change kiya jaaye, use cancel karwa do Sir. Aap hi batao, agar aise galat faisle honge toh hum jaise log kahan jayenge? Meri aapse request hai, please meri madad kijiye, us order ko hatwa dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aayi hoon. Meri suniye, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Pichle mahine, 09.09.2024 ko Mahila Court se ek order aaya tha. Woh order mere saath bahut galat hua hai, Sir. Uss order ki wajah se meri zindagi mein aur mushkilien aa gayi hain. Main uss order ko bilkul bhi nahi maanti. Mujhe lagta hai woh order galat hai aur usse hataya jaana chahiye, Sir. Isi liye main chahti hoon ki uss order ko 'set aside' karwa diya jaye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon ki mujhe kuchh samajh hi nahi aa raha. Meri sunwai Mahila Court, Tis Hazari mein hui thi, woh Ram Kishan wala case tha na? Usme 24 September 2019 ko ek faisla hua tha. Main toh sochi thi ab sab khatam ho gaya, par abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki us faisle ke khilaaf appeal ho gayi hai. Matlab, kya meri ladai phir se shuru ho gayi? Woh judge sahiba ne jo bhi kaha tha, ab usko dobara dekhenge? Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Ram Kishan ne jo bhi kiya tha, uski toh saza honi chahiye thi. Meri sunwai toh theek se hui hi nahi thi. Aap meri madad karo, please. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Yeh appeal-veal kya hota hai, mujhe kuch nahi pata. Mujhe dar lag raha hai.

Sir, main aaj aapke paas complain karne aayi hoon. Us aadmi ne mere saath bahut galat kiya. Usne mujhe aise touch kiya ki meri saari izzat mitti mein mil gayi. Main bahut darr gayi thi aur abhi tak sharm se paani-paani hoon. Ye sirf meri baat nahi hai sir, har aurat ki apni ek izzat hoti hai, ek sharam hoti hai, aur aise log use kuch nahi samajhte. Bade-bade courts bhi yahi kehte hain ki auraton ki izzat 'class' ke taur par dekhni chahiye, matlab har aurat ki izzat important hai. Section 354 IPC isi liye toh hai na, taaki aise logo ko saza mile. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, mujhe nyay dilaiye aur us aadmi ko uske kiye ki saza milni chahiye, warna kal kisi aur ladki ke saath aisa hoga.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki kitne saalon baad mujhe thoda sukoon mila hai. Woh 18 February, 1998 ka din tha, jab us aadmi ne meri zindagi barbaad karne ki koshish ki thi, Ranchi mein. Usne meri izzat pe haath daala tha, Sir. Kitna ganda kaam karne ki koshish ki thi usne. Main us din se bas insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi thi. Ab High Court ne bhi uska appeal dismiss kar diya hai aur usko 7 saal ki rigorous imprisonment ki saza mili hai. IPC ke Section 376/511 ke तहत usko guilty maana gaya hai. Mujhe thoda to insaaf mila hai, Sir. Meri sunwai hui, shukr hai Bhagwan ka.

Sir, main Madhu Prakash, meri beti Aradhana @ Reemu ke liye complain karne aayi hoon. Meri beti sirf 15 saal ki hai, aur uski saheli Ruchika bhi ussi umar ki thi. Ab Ruchika is duniya mein nahi rahi, sahab! Woh dono HLTA mein jaate the, jahan T. Thomas aur Kuldeep Singh, jo coach aur manager hain, rehte hain. Wahan office bhi hai aur unke rehne ka bhi. Meri beti ne bataya ki wahan kuch galat hua hai. Pata nahi kya hua, par Ruchika ab mar chuki hai aur meri Aradhana bahut darr gayi hai. Yeh chhoti bachchiyan thi, sir! Un logon ne kuch galat kiya hai wahan. Meri beti bhi trauma mein hai. Please, mujhe insaaf chahiye un sabse, Ruchika ke liye aur meri Aradhana ke liye bhi.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, yeh kaisa insaaf hai! Pehle toh judge saab ne meri baat suni thi, aur Chandkauri ji (jinhone apni aankhon se sab dekha tha) ki gawahi pe hi toh usko mujrim mana tha. Phir upar waali adalat ne bhi meri baat sahi maani aur usko saza sunai. Ab woh kambakht phir appeal kar raha hai. Uska wukil bolta hai ki maine FIR der se karayi... arey, main us din kitni ghabrai hui thi, itna sab hone ke baad kaise turant daudti police station? Aur kehte hain mujhe chot nahi lagi! Kya matlab, chot lagegi tabhi jurm hua? Meri izzat pe hamla hua hai, uska kya? Aur Chandkauri ji toh sach bol rahi hain, unki aur uski purani dushmani hai toh kya hua, sach toh sach hi rahega na? Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir, ki kahin phir se mujhe hi na ghumaya jaaye, aur woh bach ke nikal jaaye. Meri madad karo Sir!

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon, jiske saath Hamirpur mein woh sab hua tha. Meri zindagi tabah ho gayi thi jab us aadmi ne mere saath galat karne ki koshish ki thi. Main toh ek chhoti si bacchi thi, Sahab, kya pata kya hota hai! Mujhe toh ab bhi darr lagta hai woh din yaad karke. Kitni mushkil se court gayi, trial chala S.T. No. 205/1996 mein. Shukar hai Special Judge Sahab ne usko guilty paya. IPC ki Section 376/511 aur humaare SC/ST Act ki Section 3(2)(5) ke tehat usko saza mili hai. Bas yahi chahti hoon ki aisi cheezein kisi aur ke saath na ho. Bahut takleef uthai hai maine, Sir, bahut takleef.

Sir, main toh bas yahi kehne aayi hoon ki woh log ab bhi apni baaton se palat rahe hain. High Court mein bhi woh toh bol rahe the ki main 16 saal se badi thi aur maine khud hi 'haan' kaha tha. Socho, kitna jhooth bolte hain! Lekin shukra hai, High Court ne unki baat nahi suni aur mera paksh sahi thehraya, unki saza barkarar rakhi. Abhi bhi unke vakeel wahi purani ghisipiti baatein dohra rahe the jo unhone pehle trial court aur High Court mein bhi boli thi. Par State ke vakeel ne toh court ke faisle ko support kiya, meri taraf se. Aur meri umar prove karne ke liye, woh school ka transfer certificate (Ex.P9) bhi toh dikhaya tha court mein. Usmein mera naam aur meri sahi umar, sab kuch clearly likha hai. Phir bhi woh log mujhe galat sabit karna chahte hain. Mujhe bas ab insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main woh ladki hoon jiske saath 2013 mein woh ghatna hui thi. Yaad hai, FIR number 36/2013, us aadmi ne meri izzat uchhali thi, Sections 354/354A IPC ka case tha uspar. Pehle toh Metropolitan Magistrate ne usko chhod diya tha, 8 September 2015 ko. Main toh bilkul toot gayi thi, laga insaaf kabhi milega hi nahi. Par phir, humne himmat nahi haari, State ne appeal file ki. Aur bhagwan ka shukra hai, ab Additional Sessions Judge ne usko convict kar diya hai! Usko ek saal ki simple imprisonment aur paanch hazaar ka fine laga hai. Thoda sukoon mila hai sir, itne saal intezaar karna pada meri izzat ke liye.

Sir, main S.K. Bhalla hoon. Meri ek application hai. Main Joshi Road, Karol Bagh mein House No. XVI/70, Gali No. 2 ka owner hoon. Sir, 2005 ki baat hai, ek aadmi ne mere bagal wala ghar, Gali No. 3, House No. XVI/72 ka aadha hissa khareeda tha. Uske baad se meri zindagi haram ho gayi hai. Woh log meri property pe kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain, kabhi deewar todne ki baat karte hain, kabhi kachra hamare ghar ke aage phenkte hain. Maine court mein bhi case daala hua hai, lekin woh log sunte hi nahi. Sir, meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Ghar se nikalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Woh log jaan-boojh ke tang kar rahe hain.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri to izzat hi loot li usne. Mera darr abhi tak gaya nahi hai. Main yahan himmat karke aayi hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile. Us Dawa Tsh ne meri beizzati ki, Sir. Jo usne kiya, main kaise bhoolun? Usne meri modesty ko outrag kiya hai. Meri zindagi kharab kar di hai usne. Yeh sab jo hua hai, main kaise seh paungi? Mera bayaan, jo main aapko bata rahi hoon, please usko seriously lena. Main sach keh rahi hoon, Sir. Mujhe usse darr lagta hai. Bahut mushkil se main yahan tak pahunchi hoon. Mujhe nyay chahiye, Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, meri suno na, ye kya zulm hai! Woh jo teen log the na, accused number 1 se 3 tak, jinke khilaaf humne itni mushkil se case jeeta tha. Pune ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 17 February 2017 ko ek order diya tha, Criminal Appeal No. 71 of 2011 mein, woh mere favour mein tha. Humein laga chalo ab thodi shanti milegi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se uss judgement ko challenge kar rahe hain! Revision petition daal di hai unhone. Sir, hum kitni baar court ke chakkar kaatenge? Itna paisa lag gaya, itna waqt barbaad hua, aur ab woh fir se shuru ho gaye. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Yeh log humein jeene nahi denge kya? Kripya kuch kijiye, humein insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon... mere saath jo hua na, woh bahut galat hai. Usne mere saath badtameezi ki, galat tareeke se touch kiya. Meri izzat pe haath daala, Sir. Aur jab maine use roka, toh usne mujhe dhamki di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh meri zindagi kharab kar dega. Main tab se bahut darr gayi hoon, ghar se nikalne mein bhi darr lag raha hai. Mujhe raat bhar neend nahi aayi. Main aapke paas issi ki complain karne aayi hoon. Meri yeh complaint likhiye, Sir, aur please action lijiye uske khilaaf. Main chahti hoon ki usko uski harkat ki saza mile aur woh dobara kisi aur ladki ke saath aisa na kare. Meri madad kijiye, Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas complain leke aayi thi, meri ek FIR darj hui thi, yaad hai? Uska Crime No. bhi tha. Abhi-abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh dusri party na, court mein chali gayi hai. Kehte hain ki 'humari FIR ko quash kar do,' matlab meri complaint ko hi khatam karwana chahte hain. Sir, yeh kya baat hui? Itni mushkil se toh maine himmat karke report likhwai thi, aur ab woh bina poori sunwai ke, court mein appeal kar rahe hain ki meri FIR hi cancel kar do? Mujhe toh insaaf chahiye, sir! Meri takleef ka kya? Meri FIR aise hi kaise cancel ho sakti hai?

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aayi hoon. Bade mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha. Woh aadmi jisne meri zindagi barbaad ki, jiske gande kaam ki wajah se maine suicide karne ki bhi sochi thi, court ne usko pakda tha. Us par Section 376 (rape) aur Section 306 (abetment of suicide) lage the. Usko 10 saal aur 5 saal ki rigorous imprisonment mili thi, aur Rs. 5,000 ka fine bhi. Mujhe laga tha ab chain se jeeyungi. Par ab sun rahi hoon ki woh apni conviction aur sentence ko challenge kar raha hai, appeal file kar raha hai! Matlab, woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai? Sir, please, usko rokhiye! Agar woh release ho gaya toh meri jaan ko khatra hai. Main bahut darr rahi hoon. Meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main uss din ki baat bhool nahi paati. 9 April 2006 ki subah thi, kareeb 10-10:30 baje ka time hoga. Main apni raah jaa rahi thi, tabhi woh ganda aadmi mere saamne aa gaya. Usne meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki, sahab. Main bahut darr gayi thi, bahut cheekhi. Maine puri taakat laga di usse bachne ke liye. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi uss din. Usne meri zindagi barbaad karne ki koshish ki thi. Shukr hai ki main bach gayi, par woh darr aaj bhi mere andar baitha hai. Jharsuguda court ne 12.05.2006 ko S.T. Case No. 27 of 2006 mein usko Sections 376/511 IPC ke तहत convict kiya tha. Use 7 saal ki jail aur 5000 ka jurmana laga. Mujhe laga ab thoda insaaf mila. Lekin ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh iske khilaaf kuchh kar raha hai. Sahab, mujhe aur tension nahi chahiye. Meri suniye, usko saza milni chahiye jo mili hai. Yeh meri request hai, please.

Sahab, main yahan aaya hoon kyunki mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Mujhe na, woh Korea Baikunthpur waale Special Judge ne, SC & ST Act ke case mein, 2 April 2011 ko saza suna di thi. Maine kuch kiya hi nahi tha, Sahab! Main toh bilkul begunah hoon. Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi us faisle se, us conviction aur sentence se. Pata nahi kaise judge sahab ne aisa judgment de diya. Ab main usi judgment ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hoon, meri sunwaai ho rahi hai. Meri suno Sahab, mujhe insaaf chahiye, main itne saal se pareshaan hoon. Woh saza aur conviction, sab galat hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... Woh pehla wala gunda, jisne sab kiya tha, woh toh phir se court mein jaa raha hai apni saza kam karwane. Aur Sir, jo uske saath do aur the na, woh doosre aur teesre waale, woh toh ab keh rahe hain ki unka naam meri pehli complaint (Ex.P1) mein likha hi nahi tha, toh woh toh begunah hain! Bol rahe hain unhe chhod do! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri aankhon ke saamne sab hua tha! Maine tabhi unke nickname bataye the aur unke baap ka naam bhi toh bataya tha! Main unhe kaise bhool sakta hoon? Woh sab ek hi gang ke the, saath mein hi kaam kar rahe the. Ab bas naam nahi likha tha toh woh bach jaayenge? Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir, aur ab yeh nikalna chahte hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, sabko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... mere saath jo hua na, woh bohot ganda tha. Main kisi tarah khud ko chhudaya wahan se aur seedhe ghar bhagi. Mummy ko sab bataya toh woh sunke bohot gusse mein aa gayi. Hum dono uski dukaan par gaye usse poochhne ki usne aisa kyu kiya mere saath. Par Sir, woh aadmi itna badtameez nikla ki usne meri mummy ke saath bhi misbehave karna shuru kar diya. Meri mummy ko bhi sunaya! Kitna himmat aa gaya hai usmein, Sir! Ab aap hi batao, aise logon ko toh saza milni chahiye na? Please meri madad karo, Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas ek shikayat lekar aayi hoon. Hyderabad mein kuch dinon se toh meri zindagi haram ho gayi hai. Woh Prerana Woman's Welfare Organisation waale na, woh ek 'Miss Andhra Personality Contest' karwa rahe hain, 10 August ko Bharathi Vidya Bhavan mein. Hum toh sochte the, theek hai jiska jo man kare. Par ab doosre organisations, jaise woh A.P. waale, iska zabardast virodh kar rahe hain. Roz road pe halla-gulla, dharna-pradarshan, posters... meri toh naak mein dam aa gaya hai, sir! Meri beti toh school jaane se bhi darr rahi hai, kehti hai 'Mummy, bahar ladai ho rahi hai'. Pura area hi tense ho gaya hai. Humein toh bas shaanti chahiye, sir. Yeh log jo tamasha kar rahe hain, isse sab darre hue hain. Meri family disturb ho rahi hai. Please, kuch kijiye, sir. Humari madat kijiye, yeh log toh jeene nahi de rahe.

Sir, dekho na yeh kya ho raha hai! Woh Brijesh, jisko itni mushkil se Section 376 aur 506 IPC mein pakadwaya tha, aur court ne use life imprisonment di thi, 1 lakh ka fine bhi lagaya tha... ab woh us judgment ko challenge kar raha hai. Sultan Puri PS ki FIR No. 1341/07 thi, yaad hai aapko? 2012 mein usko guilty declare kiya tha aur 2013 mein saza sunayi thi. Main socha tha meri mushkil khatam ho gayi, par ab phir se woh appeal kar raha hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai Sir, kahin woh bach na jaaye. Meri zindagi tabah kar di thi usne. Please, mera insaaf mat chheeno.

Sir ji, main aapko apni mushkil batane aayi hoon. Meri baat suniye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Yeh baat hai 9 January 2017 ki, subah ke theek 10 baje ki. Main apne Hemanoor gaon mein Basavanna Mandir ke paas se school ja rahi thi, पैदल. Tabhi woh ganda aadmi apni motorcycle pe aaya. Usne mujhe raaste mein hi rok liya aur mere saath bahut gandi harkatein ki. Main itni darr gayi thi ki kya bataun. Us din se meri neend udd gayi hai, Sir. Usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mujhe ab bhi woh din yaad aata hai toh kaanp jaati hoon. Please Sir, usko sakht se sakht saza dilwaaiye. Meri suniye, mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, kal raat jo mere saath hua... main toh Madhyamic ki student hoon, abhi 16 saal ki hi toh hoon. Padhai ke liye maine accused ke ghar mein ek kamra kiraye pe liya tha. Kal, 8 tareekh ko, raat ke kareeb 9:30 baje, main apne room mein padh rahi thi. Woh aaya aur darwaza knock kiya. Maine andar se lock kiya hua tha, usne kholne ko kaha. Jaise hi maine darwaza khola, woh seedha mere room mein ghus aaya, mujhe pakad liya, gale laga liya, aur mera haath bhi pakda. Sir, main bahut darr gayi thi, bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karun.

Sir, aapko pata hai na, meri inquiry (investigation) complete ho gayi hai. Us darinde ke khilaaf court mein charge-sheet bhi file ho chuki hai. Us par Indian Penal Code ki Section 376 (2) (f) ke तहत charge bhi frame ho chuka hai, wohi ghinona jurm jisne meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Meri taraf se, case prove karne ke liye total terah witnesses ne gawahi di hai, sab sach bola hai. Meri kya, sabki rooh kaanp jaati hai sunkar. Lekin, aapko pata hai, us accused (mujrim) ka bhi bayan record hua hai Section 313 CrPC ke under, aur woh kamina abhi bhi apni innocence ki baat kar raha hai! Bolta hai ki usne kuch nahi kiya, woh innocent hai aur abhi trial chalana chahta hai. Sir, woh jhooth bol raha hai, woh mujrim hai, use saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main Rasipuram se hoon. Main ek practising lawyer hoon, Sir, bohut mushkil se padhai ki hai. Meri shaadi 05.04.2001 ko hui thi aur 20.04.2001 ko Rasipuram Sub Registrar Office mein properly register bhi hui thi. Main Adi Dravidar Scheduled Caste se belong karti hoon, Sir. Aur mere pati (A1), woh bhi Ariyaloor mein advocate hain, woh Hindu Barkava Kula Mooppanar, Backward Community se hain. Unke saath, unke pure gharwale (A2 se A10) bhi, sab milkar mujhe ab bahut pareshaan kar rahe hain. Meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai, Sir. Yeh log meri community ki wajah se mujhe torture kar rahe hain. Meri suniye aur mujhe insaaf dilwaiye, please.

Daroga ji, main Anil Kumar Upadhyay. Meri baat suniye sir, main koi chhota-mota aadmi nahi hoon. Maine apni zindagi ke keemti saal BSF ko diye hain, pura dil laga kar service ki hai. Aap record check kar lo, 1991 mein main Constable (Radio Operator) bana tha. Meri mehnat dekhi unhone, toh 1992 mein Naik (Radio Operator) bana diya. Phir 1997 mein Head Constable (Radio Operator) tak pahuncha. Kitni postings par kaam kiya hai, kya-kya nahi dekha. Aur ab, 2003 mein jab main 126th Battalion mein tha, tab mere saath jo hua... Sir, itni lambi service ke baad aise mere saath kaise ho sakta hai? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye Daroga ji, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, woh jo aadmi hai na, Petitioner No.1, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Usne mujhe raaste mein roka, maara-peeta, bahut chot pahunchai thi. Aur sabse badi baat, meri izzat par haath daala, mujhe bahut ashamed feel karaya. Mera ghar ka samaan bhi toda, bahut nuksaan kiya tha. Haveri ke bade judge ne bhi toh usko pehle guilty thehraya tha aur saza sunai thi. Lekin ab woh uss decision ko challenge kar raha hai, apni saza se bachne ki koshish kar raha hai. Sir, usko aise chhootne nahi dena chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri suniye, please.

Sir, main bas bohot dukhi hokar aapke paas aayi hoon. Woh jo aadmi hai na, Accused No. 1, usne meri zindagi nark bana di hai. Usne meri badnaami ki hai, gaon-gaon mein mere baare mein galat baatein phailaayi hain. Mujhe sabke saamne beizzat kiya hai, aisi-aisi baatein boli hain ki main kisi ko muh nahi dikha sakti. Aur sir, uski toh himmat dekho, usne mujhe gandi-gandi dhamkiyan bhi di hain, gumnam khat bheje hain. Mujhe itna darr lagta hai. Meri izzat, meri aabru pe usne itna ganda vaar kiya hai, khaaskar meri behen ko bhi target kiya hai. Yeh sab Bengaluru mein hua hai, sir. Crime No. 60 of 2020 ke andar humne complaint ki thi, ab woh log court mein (C.C.No.16321 of 2020) apne cases ko challenge kar rahe hain. Par main kya karu? Meri toh puri family pareshaan hai. Please, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Amarpur mein jo court hai, wahan 12.08.2016 ko mere khilaaf ek judgment aaya tha. Main toh toot gaya tha! Fir maine himmat karke uske khilaaf appeal daali Gomati ke Sessions Judge ke paas. Par, sir, wahan bhi mujhe insaaf nahi mila! Unhone bhi 28.03.2018 ko wahi purana faisla barkarar rakha, meri baat suni hi nahi. Mujhe laga meri toh zindagi khatam ho gayi. Ab majboor hoke, 04.06.2018 ko maine ek aur petition file ki hai, ki case ko dobara dekha jaye. Pura system mere khilaaf lag raha hai, Sir. Aap hi bataiye main kahan jaun?

Sir, main bahut zyaada pareshaan hoon. Pata nahi kya hoga mere saath. Woh aadmi, jiske khilaaf maine complain ki thi, ab woh mera puraana case hi band karwana chahta hai. Mera P.R.C. No. 31 of 2016 wala case hai, jo Karaikudi ke Principal District Munsif-cum-Judicial Magistrate Court mein chal raha hai. Kitne saalon se main insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon, aur ab woh Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga kar case ko quash karwana chahta hai! Matlab, meri itni mehnat, meri takleef sab bekar ho jayegi? Yeh toh seedha-seedha injustice hai, Sir. Woh kaise aise case band karwa sakta hai? Aap please meri help kijiye, Sir. Mera case band nahi hona chahiye. Mujhe justice milna chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh jo Narkeldanga PS mein mera case tha, No. 115, 2000 mein file hua tha... jis mein usne sarkari kaam mein badha daali thi aur mujhpar hamla bhi kiya tha... woh Sealdah court se bari ho gaya! Judge sahab ne usko chhod diya 18 May 2001 ko. Itne saalon baad bhi mujhe justice nahi mila. Mera G.R. Case No. 1183/2000 tha. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai ki woh aise hi bach ke nikal jaaye? Main is faisle ko challenge karna chahta hoon. Please, meri madad kijiye. Isko dobara dekhiye, usko saza milni chahiye. Meri poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is chakkar mein.

Sir, main woh 40 saal ki aurat hoon jiske saath itna zulm hua hai. Maine socha tha ki mujhe insaaf milega, par ab yeh kya ho raha hai? Meri medical report mein likha hai ki mere saath koi zabardasti nahin hui? Yeh kaise possible hai, sir? Maine kitna kuch saha hai, unhone meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki thi, mujhe maar-peet ke kiya tha yeh sab! Main kaise maan lu ki kuch nahi hua? Mere gawahon ne bhi dekha tha mera haal. Yeh report galat hai, sir. Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur ab yeh keh rahe hain ki kuch hua hi nahin? Mujhe toh laga tha police meri sunegi. Please, meri baat suno, sir. Main jhoot nahi bol rahi, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main na, apni cousin ke saath paidal ghar jaa rahi thi. Dandare Sir ke khet ke paas hi the hum log. Tabhi Sonoli side se woh ladka apni motorcycle pe aaya. Usne mujhe roka, mujhse baat ki, aur mera haath pakad liya. Bolne laga, jab tak tum apna naam nahi bataogi, main tumhe jaane nahi dunga. Aur phir, 'I love you' bhi bola. Main bohot darr gayi thi sir! Jaise-taise uske changul se chhoot kar bhaagi aur seedhe ghar pahunchi. Maine saari baat apne papa ko batai hai. Sir, yeh theek nahi hai, mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai usse. Please kuch karo na sir.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut dukhi hokar aaya hoon. Mujhe meri zindagi ka insaaf nahi mil raha. Pata nahi kya karu. Suri mein jo Additional Sessions Judge sahab hain, unhone 20 May 2013 ko ek faisla sunaya tha, usse main bilkul bhi khush nahi hoon, sir. Main bahut dukhi aur pareshan hoon us faisle se. Unhone toh Bolpur ke Assistant Sessions Judge sahab ke 29 November 2007 wale puraane faisle ko hi sahi thehra diya. Woh faisla bhi galat tha, aur ye naya wala bhi! Sir, meri to poori ummeed toot gayi hai. Meri madad kijiye, kripya is mamle ko dobara dekha jaaye. Main is criminal case mein aur nahi jhel sakta.

Sir, main Tikamgarh se aayi hoon. Meri ek purani complaint thi, yaad hai, 2009 mein jo hui thi, complaint case number 307. Usmein court ne finally 22 July 2014 ko order diya tha, aur us ghatiya aadmi par Section 354 IPC ke तहत charge lagaya tha. Usne meri izzat pe haath daala tha, aur main tab jaake thoda sukoon mila tha ki justice mil raha hai. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar, woh aadmi, phir se us order ko challenge kar raha hai. Woh chahta hai ki us par se charge hatt jaaye! Sir, main kitni mushkil se sab face kiya tha. Kya usko saza nahi milegi? Kya meri mushkil phir se shuru ho jayegi? Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe darr lag raha hai.

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitni pareshan hoon. Badi mushkil se mujhe insaaf mila tha Fast Track Mahila Court, Thiruppur mein. Woh judgment 19.08.2014 ko aaya tha, mere case S.C.No.167 of 2013 mein. Mujhe laga tha ab sab theek ho jayega, woh gunehgar ko saza mil gayi thi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh accused, wohi aadmi, phir se court mein appeal kar raha hai! Usse mere khilaaf jo decision aaya tha, woh pasand nahi aaya. Ab yeh kya mazak hai? Kya mujhe phir se wahi sab se guzarna padega? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai yeh sunke. Sahib, please kuch kijiye. Meri toh himmat toot rahi hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mera case hai na, Crime No. 851/2018, jo Civil Lines, Vidisha police station mein register hua tha. Usmein, jiske khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh aurat ab anticipatory bail lene ki koshish kar rahi hai. Sir, usne mere saath itna galat kiya hai. Usne mera rape kiya hai, jiske liye uspar IPC ke sections 376(2)n, 376(2)i lage hain. Aur POCSO Act ke sections 3/4, 5/6 bhi lagaye hain uspar! Matlab, meri chhoti bachi bhi shamil hai. Usne mujhe stalk kiya (354-D), aur mere khilaaf saazish bhi ki (120-B). Agar usko anticipatory bail mil gayi toh woh humein chhodegi nahi. Meri aur meri bachi ki jaan ko khatra hai. Aap please kuch kijiye, usko bail mat lene dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, please!

Sir, mere saath jo bhi hua tha, uske baad aap logon ne mujhe hospital bheja tha medical ke liye. Usne jo kiya, woh toh sabko pata hai. Aapke officer ne usko pakda bhi tha aur uska bhi medical karaya. Mujhe laga ab insaaf milega. Uske khilaaf Section 450 aur 376 IPC ke तहत charge sheet bhi file hui thi. Pehle woh jail mein tha, judicial custody mein... lekin Sir, ab usko bail mil gayi hai! Woh bahar ghoom raha hai. Humne itne gawah bulaye, 15 log the, aur 14 documents bhi the, phir bhi usko bail mil gayi? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Meri zindagi kaise chalegi ab? Kripya meri madad kijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Ruchika bol rahi hoon. Bahut pareshan hoon, isliye complain karne aayi hoon. Kal ki baat hai, main apni friend Aradhana ke ghar gayi thi. Maine use bataya ki woh accused (jo aadmi pareshan karta hai) mere ghar aaya tha aur usne mujhe apne office bulaya tha. Hum dono Aradhana ke saath tennis court mein practice kar rahe the, tabhi Paltoo, jo wahan ball pick karta hai, usne aake bataya ki woh aadmi mujhe apne office bula raha hai. Sir, main aur Aradhana dono darrte-darrte us aadmi se milne gaye. Woh office ke bahar hi khada tha. Usne humein andar aane ke liye itna force kiya, itna zidd ki. Hum uski baat maan kar office ke andar chale gaye. Sir, mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, pata nahi kya ho raha hai mere saath.

Sahab, main aapke paas bohot umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, jab se woh hadsa hua. Ek saal ho gaya hai, aur mere case mein koi sunwai nahi ho rahi. Yeh jo mera mamla hai na, bahut gambhir hai, mere saath bohot bada zulm hua hai. Lekin court mein bhi kya ho raha hai, mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Jo sarkaari wakiil hain, woh bhi theek se apni zimedari nahi nibha rahe. Lagta hai jaise sab kuchh neglect ho raha hai, koi dhyan hi nahi de raha. Meri toh bas yahi request hai, sahab, please dekhiye mere case mein itni laparwahi kyun ho rahi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, warna mera toh jeena mushkil ho jayega.

Sir, main aapko bas itna batane aayi hoon ki jo mere saath hua tha, Darwha court mein uski sunwai finally ho gayi hai. 10 May 2019 ko, us gande aadmi ko saza mil gayi. Usne mujhe galat tareeke se chhua tha, gandi baatein karta tha aur dhamki deta tha ki kisi ko bataya toh theek nahi hoga. Main bahut darr gayi thi, sir. Mera POCSO case, jo 2016 se chal raha tha, usme usko IPC ke Section 354, 354-A, 506 aur POCSO Act ke Section 8 aur 12 ke तहत दोषी ठहराaya gaya hai. Mujhe thodi rahat mili hai ab. Aap sabki wajah se mujhe insaaf mila hai. Bahut shukriya, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2007 mein mere saath ek bahut bura haadsa hua tha. Us case mein, court ne ek aadmi ko pakda tha, usko saza bhi sunayi thi 2008 mein. Kitni mushkil se mujhe thoda insaaf mila tha, meri zindagi tabah ho gayi thi us waqt. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, jise court ne convict kiya tha, woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, Sir. Kya meri saari mehnat, mera insaaf, sab bekar ho jayega? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai yeh sunke. Kripya meri madad kijiye, dekhiye na Sir, usko dobara chhutne mat dena. Mujhe pura vishwas hai aap pe.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jiske saath 2013 mein woh ghatiya harkat hui thi. Aapko yaad hoga, Kamrup court ne uss aadmi ko Section 354 IPC mein doshi thehraya tha, 13 August 2013 ko. Mujhe laga tha ab toh sab theek ho gaya, mujhe insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh ghatiya aadmi phir se appeal kar raha hai! Usko saza mili thi, Judge Sahab ne usko convict kiya tha. Yeh kya ho raha hai? Kya ab use phir se chhod denge? Meri izzat pe haath daala tha usne, aur ab woh azadi chahta hai? Mujhe darr lag raha hai, Sir. Please, kuch kijiye. Main toh bas shaanti se jeena chahti hoon.

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Meri suno toh sahi, yeh mere saath kitna galat ho raha hai. Mujhpe jhootha ilzaam lagaya hai Section 354 IPC ka. GR Case No. 10 of 2013 mein mujhe ek saal ki jail aur paanch sau rupaye jurmana kar diya. Main toh begunah hoon, sir! Maine kuch bhi nahi kiya. Maine aage appeal ki thi (Criminal Appeal No. 08 of 2015), socha tha upar ki adalat mein insaaf milega. Par wahan bhi meri conviction aur saza ko barkarar rakha hai. Yeh mere saath bahut bada anyay hai, sir. Main kahan jaaun ab? Meri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Aap hi kuch karo.

Sir, main aaj 25.12.2017 ko, shaam ke 4 baje Hrishyamukh police outpost, Belonia mein yeh complaint likhwane aayi hoon. Meri baat suniye Sir, aaj dopahar theek 12:30 baje ki baat hai. Main apne ghar ke kitchen mein thi. Mere husband aur bete ghar par nahi the. Tabhi woh aadmi mere kitchen mein ghus aaya. Usne mujhe gandi-gandi baatein bolin, indecent proposal diya aur paise bhi offer kiye. Sir, main dar gayi thi. Kuch samajh pati usse pehle hi usne mujhe zabardasti pakad liya, gale lagaya aur mere kapde utarne ki koshish karne laga. Usne mere breasts ko bhi touch kiya. Main uski pakad se chhutne ke liye bahut jor lagaya. Mujhe usse bahut mushkil se chhutkara mila. Meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi narak ho gayi hai. Woh jo pehle wala judgment aaya tha na, 22 March 2004 ko, Special Judge sahab ne diya tha SC/ST Act ke under, usse main bilkul khush nahi hoon. Mujhe uss judgment se insaaf nahi mila tha. Meri toh izzat, meri family ki izzat, sab daav pe laga di thi un logon ne. Kitne saal ho gaye, main tab se justice ke liye bhatak rahi hoon. Ab maine phir se appeal kiya hai. Yeh log toh mujhe jeene nahi denge. Mujhe lagta hai ki yeh log ab bhi mujhe dhamka rahe hain, aur police mein meri sunwai nahi ho rahi. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe sachcha insaaf chahiye, ab aur nahi sehna mujhse.

Sir, main Kantila Chutia ke khilaaf complaint karne aayi hoon. Usne raat ke waqt mere ghar mein ghuspaith ki thi, chori-chhupe aaya tha. Aur Sir, usne meri izzat par haath daala, meri beizzati karne ki koshish ki. Golaghat mein court ne usko chhod diya, bari kar diya! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh zindagi kharab ho gayi hai, aur woh aise hi ghoom raha hai? Police ne pakda tha, case bhi chala tha, par phir bhi usko acquittal mil gaya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir! Meri kya galti thi? Maine toh sirf sach bataya tha. Please, kuch kijiye, usko saza milni chahiye. Meri izzat ka sawaal hai.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut dukhi hoke aaya hoon. Meri to kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Saalon se mera ek case chal raha hai, pata nahi kab se, meri to zindagi nikal gayi ismein. Palamau Daltonganj mein, 2015 mein ek court ne faisla sunaya tha, uske khilaaf maine appeal daali thi ya usmein kuch badlav hua. Abhi pichle mahine, 24 April ko uska naya faisla aaya hai. Lekin Sir, mujhe lagta hai ki jisko sazaa mili thi, uski sazaa kam kar di gayi hai, ya phir theek se insaaf nahi hua mere saath. Itne saal maine dhakke khaye hain, aur ab yeh? Meri madad kijiye Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas bohot umeed se aayi hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur ab toh aisa lagta hai insaaf bhi mazak ban gaya hai. Pata hai, woh 1988 ka case, jismein un chaaron badmashon ne humein itna tang kiya tha? Usmein toh court ne unhe saza sunayi thi 2002 mein, Ranchi ke judge saab ne unko guilty thehraya tha. Main tab jaake thoda sa chain se so payi thi. Par abhi-abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh teeno log phir se appeal kar rahe hain! Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Itne saal ho gaye, ab toh humein shanti se jeene do. Kya unko kabhi saza nahi milegi? Har baar aise hi naye bahane banate rahenge? Meri suno sir, main bohot thak chuki hoon is ladai se. Mujhe dar lagta hai, aur ab toh lagta hai yeh log kabhi nahi sudhrenge. Kripya karke meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko apni purani pareshaani batane aayi hoon. Yaad hai, woh S.T. No. 447 of 1988 wala case? 2002 mein uska judgment aaya tha. Judge Hara Prasad Chakraborty sahab ne tab chaaron gunehgaaron ko guilty thehraya tha aur unko saza bhi hui thi. Maine socha tha ab meri zindagi mein shanti aa jayegi, mera insaaf ho gaya. Par nahi, Sir! Aaj itne saal ho gaye, woh log phir se bahar aa gaye hain aur mujhe tang kar rahe hain. Meri family ko bhi dhamkiyan mil rahi hain. Meri jaan ko khatra hai, Sir. Mujhe toh laga tha sab khatam ho gaya, par abhi tak mujhe pura insaaf nahi mila. Please, kuch kijiye Sir. Main bahut darr gayi hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun? Meri toh life hi tabah ho gayi hai. Woh log, jinhein 2002 mein court ne guilty bola tha, unko saza bhi sunai thi... 16 April 2002 ko judgment aaya tha, 16 May ko saza. Judge saahab, Shri Hara Prasad Chakraborty ne khud un chaaron ko mujrim mana tha. Ab dekhiye, woh fir se appeal pe appeal daal rahe hain! Ranchi mein ye sab hua tha. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Itne saal ho gaye, 1988 ka case hai. Ab tak mujhe final insaaf nahi mila. Kya mera kasoor hai ki itni der ho rahi hai? Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai ki kahin woh log bach na jaayen.

Sir, main kitni pareshan hoon, aapko kya bataun. Woh Mandya waala case tha na, mera jo 2011 se chal raha tha. Sessions Court mein, case number 128/2011 tha. Judge sahab ne 19.06.2013 ko judgment sunaya tha. Sir, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha (Section 376 IPC), usko toh bilkul clean chit mil gayi, acquittal ho gaya. Meri izzat par haath daala tha, usko rape ke case se toh free kar diya! Aur bas Section 354 IPC mein hi guilty mana, woh bhi sirf ek saal ki saza. Sir, yeh kya insaaf hai? Mere saath itni badi nainsaafi hui hai. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi aur usko bas ek saal? Mujhe aur insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko wahi case batane aayi hoon. Yaad hai, 2004 mein mere saath jo hua tha, woh gandi harkat. Kitni mushkil se toh Pune court ne uss aadmi ko pakda tha. Us Judge sahab ne 18 January 2005 ko usse Section 354 IPC mein दोषी ठहराया tha, rigorous imprisonment ki saza bhi sunayi thi. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya, meri izzat par haath daalne wale ko uski saza mil gayi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh us conviction ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai, sir! Yeh kya mazak hai? Itni struggle ke baad jab saza mili, toh ab woh bachna chahta hai? Meri zindagi barbaad kar di usne, aur ab woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai? Mujhe darr lag raha hai, sir. Please, kuch kijiye. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai ye sunke.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai ki yeh sab kab khatam hoga. Uss badtameez aadmi ne mere saath jo kiya tha, uski toh maine complaint ki thi na... woh Section 354 IPC wala case tha, Criminal Case No. 70/2013. Court ne usko guilty mana tha, saza bhi sunai thi. Par woh mana nahi, usne phir appeal kar di, Criminal Appeal No. 14/2013. Wahan bhi court ne meri suni aur uska conviction confirm kar diya. Mujhe justice mila tha, 6 January 2014 ko Add. Sessions Judge Sarangarh ne bhi mere haq mein faisla diya tha. Par ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh phir se kahin ja raha hai, revision file kar raha hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai sir? Kya mujhe kabhi chain se jeene nahi denge? Please sir, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon kyunki mera dimag kharab ho gaya hai. Woh aadmi, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, usko court ne *convict* kiya tha. Mujhe thodi tasalli mili thi. Phir usne *appeal* file ki, aur woh bhi *dismiss* ho gayi thi Akola ke Sessions Judge ne. Mujhe laga ab finally justice mil gaya hai. Lekin Sir, ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh fir se kuch naya kar raha hai. Bol raha hai ki woh jo *appeal dismiss* hui thi, uski *legality, propriety, correctness* sab galat thi! Ye kya mazak hai? Kya usko kabhi saza nahi milegi? Woh har baar koi na koi naya daanv khelta rehta hai. Main darr gayi hoon ki kahin fir se meri sunwai na ho aur woh bach ke nikal jaaye. Please, aap kuch kariye Sir, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main yahan aapko batane aayi hoon, mere saath jo hua tha na, woh BSF ka banda... usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Court ne bhi usko guilty maana hai, Section 354 ke tehat. Aap soch sakte ho, kitna mushkil tha mere liye yeh sab. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log BSF Act ke Section 93(6) ke andar usko kisi aur chote charge mein saza dene ki baat kar rahe hain. Yeh kya insaaf hai, Sir? Jab woh guilty prove ho chuka hai, toh usko ussi offense ki proper punishment milni chahiye jiske liye woh doshi paya gaya hai. Meri izzat ka sawal hai, Sir. Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki usko uske kiye ki puri saza mile, uski saza badalne ki koshish na ho. Please meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Woh badmash aadmi, usne mere saath jo kiya tha, uski toh baat hi alag hai. Mujhe laga tha ki chalo, thoda toh insaaf mila. Magistrate court ne usko 354 IPC ke under doshi maana tha, meri izzat ke saath jo badsalooki ki thi uske liye. Meri maar-peet, meri choton ka toh kuch hua hi nahi, usme toh chhod diya usko. Par kam se kam 354 mein toh guilty tha. Aur ab, Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, woh appeal kar raha hai! Woh keh raha hai ki woh toh kuch bhi nahi kiya. Kya aise hi hota hai? Pehle mujhe mara, meri beizzati ki, aur ab woh chhutna chahta hai? Sir, mujhe darr lagta hai. Kya mujhe kabhi poora insaaf nahi milega? Please meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kitne time se chakkar kaat rahi hoon. Pehle toh mera case CMM Court mein gaya, chargesheet bhi submit ho gayi thi. Socha ab insaaf milega. Par nahi, phir trial ke liye Sessions Court bhej diya gaya. Wahan S.C No.1527/2013 number mila, aur CCH-55 (LIV Addl.City Civil and Sessions Judge) Judge saheb ko assign hua. Unhone accused par Sections 376(2)(f) aur 511 IPC ke तहत charges bhi lagaye, mujhe laga ab kuch hoga. Par usne bola woh guilty nahi hai, trial chahiye usko. Kuch gawahon ke bayan bhi record hue the. Aur ab, abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki 'jurisdiction' ka masla bolkar mera case ek aur naye Court mein transfer kar diya gaya hai. Sir, main kab tak aise ghoomti rahungi? Mera insaaf kab hoga?

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Yeh Govinda aur Pawan @ Judi, jin logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha, ab woh phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Humne itni mushkil se unko neeche ki court mein saza dilwai thi, aur ab suna hai ki woh high court chale gaye hain, Criminal Appeal No. 340/2019 file karke. Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir, kahin unhe chhod na dein. Meri family bahut tension mein hai. Aap please dekho na, Sir, hum gareeb logon ko insaaf milna chahiye. Woh log phir se bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Agar woh bach gaye toh meri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi.

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon... woh Shailender Aggarwal hai na, jisne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Uska case court mein chal raha hai. Mujhe laga tha ab sab theek ho jayega, par ab pata chala hai ki usne phir se kuch naya kar diya hai. Koi 'Criminal Revision' ki petition daal di hai usne, bol rahe hain ki court ka pehle wala faisla palatwana chahta hai. Sections 397, 399, 401 Cr.P.C. wagera ki baatein ho rahi hain. Mujhe itna sab samajh nahi aata, bas itna pata hai ki woh mujhe aur pareshan karna chahta hai. Meri madad kijiye sir, main bahut darr gayi hoon usse.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, yeh Shailender Aggarwal hai na, isne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai! Pehle bhi isne bahut pareshan kiya tha, aur ab phir se yeh court mein kuch naya leke aa gaya hai. Mera jo case chal raha hai, usmein yeh uss faisle ko badalwane ki koshish kar raha hai, pata nahi kaun se CrPC ke section laga ke. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh jo uska 2023 ka naya daakhal hai na, number 561/2023, is par dhyaan dijiye. Woh fir se sab gadbad karna chahta hai, sir. Meri suniye, bahut tang aa gaya hoon main isse. Please kuch kijiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Govinda aur Pawan @ Judi hain na, unhone phir se appeal daal di hai. Court ne toh unhe pehle saza sunayi thi, maine socha ab thoda chain milega, par nahi! Yeh log case ko aur lamba khinch rahe hain. Meri zindagi toh aise hi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur ab yeh fir se court ke chakkar. Kya karun main sir? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Wohi log hain jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha, aur ab khud hi apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Aap kuch kariye na, please. Kab tak main aise hi bhagta rahunga?

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, bahut dukhi hoon. Meri suniye please. Mahila Court se ek faisla aaya hai, 17 March ko. Tis Hazari Court se. Meri ummeed toot gayi hai, Sir. Mera poora case 'State v. Sunil Badolia & Anr.' tha, aur wo Sunil Badolia aur uska sathi, unke favour mein decision aa gaya. Mere saath itna galat hua, aur ab court ne bhi meri baat nahi suni. Main is faisle se bilkul khush nahi hoon, Sir. Mujhe iske khilaaf appeal karni hai. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, aap meri madad karein. Mujhe upar ki court mein jaana hai, insaaf ke liye. Kya karoon main ab?

Sir, main kya bataun? Bohut mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha. Woh gunda tha na, jisne mere saath badtameezi ki thi, mujhe pakda tha, aur dhamkiyaan di thi (Sections 354, 354B, 506 IPC wale cases mein)... Mahila Court ki judge sahiba ne, Ld. MM-01 ne, usko 01.11.2019 ko convict kiya tha. Mujhe laga tha, chalo ab meri zindagi mein shanti aa jayegi. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki usne phir se appeal kar di hai (under Section 374 Cr.P.C.). Woh saza se bachna chahta hai! Mujhe phir se darr lag raha hai, Sir. Kya mujhe phir se wahi sab dekhna padega? Woh gunda bahar aa gaya toh meri jaan ko khatra hai. Please kuch kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main Sonia. Aaj 8 August 2010 ko dopahar ke lagbhag 3 baje ki baat hai, main apne ghar pe akeli thi. Tabhi Raju Qadri, jo Shastri Park mein rehta hai, mere ghar aa gaya. Usne mujhse mere pati ke baare mein poocha. Maine bataya ki woh sabzi bechne gaye hain. Toh woh bolne laga, "Agar paise chahiye, toh mere office aa jaana." Sir, main toh sunkar kaanp gayi! Maine usse saaf-saaf mana kar diya. Maine bola ki "Mujhe koi paisa nahi chahiye, aur main aisi gandi harkatein nahi karti." Mujhe bahut bura laga uski baatein sunkar. Meri izzat pe hamla kiya hai usne. Please uske khilaaf kuchh kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Main toh bas ek kamra dhoondh rahi thi, kitne dinon se pareshaan thi. Phir 2 May 2015 ko shaam paanch baje ke kareeb, ek Amit Kumar Sharma naam ka aadmi mila. Usne mujhse kaha ki woh mujhe ek kamra dilwa sakta hai, kyunki uski apne makan-malik se bohot acchi banti hai. Mujhe yakeen dilane ke liye usne yeh bhi bola ki woh khud IAS ki taiyari kar raha hai aur woh A-Block- 434, Third Floor, Nehru Vihar, Delhi mein hi rehta hai. Main toh bechari, kamra dhoondh dhoondh ke thak gayi thi, uski baaton mein aa gayi. Mujhe laga koi madad kar raha hai. Woh mujhe apne usi kamre mein le gaya aur bola ki thodi der ruk jao...

Sir, main Satyawati bol rahi hoon. Aaj Dharmender ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Main use rokne gayi thi jab usne... pata nahi kya-kya kiya. Usne mujh par haath uthaya, sir. Meri izzat pe bhi haath daala. Aur gusse mein aakar usne mere sar par ek bandook jaisi cheez se zor se maar diya. Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai mere sar par. Khoon nikalne laga. Meri jaan lene ki koshish ki usne, sir! Kisi ne police ko phone kiya aur mujhe JPC Hospital le gaye. Wahan se fir GTB Hospital shift kar diya. Meri halat bahut kharab hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye us Dharmender se!

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon, isliye yahan aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai Court mein, The State ke khilaaf. Humein lagta hai ki humare saath galat hua hai, isliye humne appeal daali hai. Sir, yeh case itne saalon se chal raha hai, bas date pe date milti hai, koi hal nahi nikal raha. Mere vakil sahab hain Mr. Anand Kumar Pandey ji, woh meri taraf se lad rahe hain. Aur State ki taraf se Mr. Santosh Kumar ji hain. Sir, humein toh bas insaaf chahiye. Yeh itna lamba process hai, hum jaiso ke liye bohot mushkil ho jata hai. Meri sunwai kijiye, sir, aur meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, jo maine Rudranil Ghosh, Parambrata Chattopadhyay, Srijit Mukherjee aur Jishu Sengupta ke khilaaf ki thi. Woh Alipore CJM Court mein chal rahi thi, uska case number tha C-827 of 2016. Ab yeh bade log hain na, Sir, yeh meri us complaint ko khatam karwana chahte hain! Inhone 26 February 2016 ka jo order aaya tha, usko bhi challenge kar diya hai. Mujhe dar lag raha hai, meri sunwai kaise hogi? Yeh log alag se application daal ke mera case hi band karwana chahte hain. Sir, maine bade mushkil se himmat karke woh complaint ki thi, ab yeh log mujhe insaaf nahi milne de rahe. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Maine bade dukh se woh Ashish Chauhan aur Surajit Chatterjee ke khilaaf FIR darj karwai thi, socha tha ki ab insaaf milega. Par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein chale gaye hain! Unhone do-do petition file ki hain, pata nahi kaunse Article 226 aur Section 482 CrPC ka naam le rahe hain, aur meri hi FIR ko quash karwana chahte hain. Matlab jo maine itni mushkil se complain ki thi, woh sab bekar ho jayega? Sir, please meri suniye. Yeh log aise kanoon ka sahara lekar bach nahi sakte. Mujhe toh lagta hai, yeh bade log hain, paise wale hain, isliye yeh sab kar rahe hain. Meri FIR ko kaise quash kar sakte hain? Jo unhone kiya hai, uski saza toh milni chahiye na? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, please kuch kijiye!

Sahab, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri baat suniye. Maine kitni mushkil se woh FIR darj karwai thi, aur ab woh Ashish Chauhan aur Surajit Chatterjee, dono milkar use quash karwana chahte hain. Pata nahi kya-kya Article 226 aur Section 482 laga rahe hain. Matlab, woh chahte hain ki mera case hi band ho jaaye! Jo mere saath galat hua hai, uska kya? Kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega? Woh aise hi bach jayenge kya? Please Sahab, meri madad kijiye. Unki wajah se main pehle hi bahut pareshan hoon, aur ab yeh meri FIR bhi khatam karwane mein lage hain. Aap please kuch karo, mera case band mat hone do!

Sir, meri duniya ujad gayi hai! Paanch tareekh ko, 05.01.2022, meri beti S ko Narela ke hospital le gaye, par woh toh wahan pahunchte hi dead declare kar di gayi. Meri beti, woh Delhi Civil Defence mein kaam karti thi, Naya Bans ke SDM office mein vaccination centre pe duty thi uski. Sir, wahan uska superior, Suresh Gautam, meri beti ko bahut pareshan karta tha. Usne meri bachi ka jeena haram kar diya tha, usko sexually harass karta tha. Usi ki wajah se meri beti ne... aisa kadam utha liya. Sir, mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye. Us harami Suresh Gautam ko saza milni chahiye!

Sir ji, main aapko apni complaint batane aayi hoon. Meri mummy, Santosh, pichle ek saal se Mohd. Aakil @ Horn ke saath live-in mein rehti hain. Woh hamare ghar mein hi mummy ke saath rakhail ki tarah rehta hai. Jab mere papa aur bhai ghar par nahi hote the, tab yeh Aakil @ Horn mere saath gandi harkatein karta tha. Woh mere private parts ko touch karta tha, Sir! Aur jab woh yeh sab karta tha, meri mummy bhi wahan hoti thi! Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai. Usne mujhe dhamki di hai ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh mujhe jaan se maar dega. Sir, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Please, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, dekhiye na, Alok Chandra ne phir se appeal daal di hai. Jo 03.08.2018 ko mere favour mein judgment aaya tha, aur usko 26.09.2018 ko saza mili thi, woh sab challenge kar raha hai. Kehta hai trial court ne *evidence* theek se nahi dekha, aur meri *gawahi* mein *contradictions* the. Aur toh aur, Sir, woh mere *conduct* par bhi sawal utha raha hai! Yeh kya ho raha hai? Maine sach bola hai, itni mushkil se sab bataya tha, aur ab woh mujhe hi jhootha sabit karna chahta hai. Meri kya galti hai Sir? Kya mujhe dobara is sab se guzarana padega? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, usko bachne mat do phir se!

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aayi hoon. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Aapko yaad hoga, 2017 mein, Mysuru ki court ne us aadmi ko saza di thi jisne mere saath galti ki thi. S.C.No.112/2016 number ka case tha woh. Usne mere saath badtamizi ki thi, galat tarike se chhua tha. Judge saahab ne usko POCSO aur IPC 354-A ke तहत gunahgaar maana tha aur 5 saal ki jail aur Rs.1 ka fine lagaya tha. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya toh meri zindagi phir se mushkil ho jayegi. Main bahut pareshan hoon aur darr rahi hoon. Please, meri madad kijiye, uski saza barkarar rahe, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aayi hoon. Mujhe pata chala hai ki wo Suresh Kumar Sharma, jisne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, uski bail ki application chal rahi hai. Log keh rahe hain ki wo 'bail petitioner' hai. Sir, usne meri zindagi tabah kar di hai, aur ab use bahar nikalne ki baat ho rahi hai? Wo bade logon mein se hai, kisi cheez ka 'owner' hai, isliye shayad uski suni jaa rahi hai. Mujhe dar lag raha hai, sir. Agar wo bahar aa gaya toh meri security ka kya hoga? Main ek aam insaan hoon, sir. State of Himachal Pradesh se meri yahi request hai ki mujhe insaaf mile. Judge saahab (Justice Ranjan Sharma) se bhi yahi appeal hai ki mere jaison ki bhi suni jaaye. Sir, please use bail mat lene dijiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, itni pareshan hoon na, meri toh zindagi jhand ho gayi hai! Woh jo aadmi tha, usne mere saath jo galat kiya tha (Section 354 IPC, jo likha hai na), uski complaint maine kitni himmat karke ki thi. Pehle toh laga tha ki court ne meri baat sun li hai, 'cognizance' liya tha, mujhe laga ab insaaf milega. Par abhi pata chala hai, Sir, ki woh order hi 'set aside' ho gaya hai! Matlab, jo pehle judge sahab ne mana tha, ab woh nahi maana ja raha. Mera case phir se 'remand' kar diya hai, bolte hain ki ab 'delay' dekhenge, ki der kyun hui. Arre Sir, usne mere saath kya kiya, woh nahi dekh rahe, bas der dekh rahe hain! Main toh darr ke maare chup thi, himmat hi nahi ho rahi thi. Ab phir se kitna ghoomna padega, pata nahi. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir, uss aadmi ko saza milni chahiye! Meri madad karo, please!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai. Woh jo Sessions Case No. 147/2014 Karkardooma Court mein chala tha, usmein woh ek hi aadmi, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, woh guilty ho gaya tha. Judge sahab ne use 28.02.2017 ko doshi thehraya tha aur 21.03.2017 ko saza bhi suna di thi. Mujhe laga tha ab jaakar thodi chain ki saans aayegi. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh Cr.P.C. ke Section 374 ke tehat appeal kar raha hai. Matlab, woh phir se woh judgment aur saza ko challenge kar raha hai. Sir, itni mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha, ab yeh sab dobara? Meri toh himmat nahi ho rahi sir. Mujhe darr hai ki woh phir se bach jayega. Please, kuch karo, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri to zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Main BSF mein tha, desh ki seva kar raha tha. Lekin pichle saal, August 2022 mein, pata nahi kis baat par mujhe Summary Security Force Court ne naukri se nikaal diya. Meri to jaise duniya hi ulat gayi. Maine appeal bhi ki thi, sir. Director General BSF ke paas gaya, socha wahan toh meri suni jaayegi, insaaf milega. Par is saal June 2023 mein unhone meri appeal bhi kharij kar di. Meri naukri chheen li, mera bhavishya andhere mein chala gaya. Main bas itna kehna chahta hoon ki yeh dono orders galat hain, mujhe meri naukri wapas chahiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Meri madat kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh jo mera case tha na, SC/ST Act ke under, usmein Secunderabad ke Special Judge sahab ne ek order pass kiya tha March 8, 2023 ko. Sir, woh order mere khilaaf aa gaya. Pata nahin kyun, itna sab kuch hone ke baad bhi, unhone aisa faisla suna diya. Mujhe laga insaaf milega, par bilkul ulta ho gaya. Ab toh humne us order ko challenge kiya hai, dobara case lagwaya hai upar ki court mein, Revision mein. Meri suniye Sir, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Woh galat order ko theek karwana hai.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha mere saath yeh kya ho raha hai. Woh court mein na, judge sahab ne mujhe Section 504 IPC ke तहत saja suna di hai. Meri kya galti thi, mujhe kuch pata nahi. Unhone mujhe poore ek saal ki simple imprisonment de di hai, aur upar se ek hazaar rupaye ka jurmana bhi laga diya. Aur to aur, agar main woh Rs. 1000 nahi de paya na, toh bol rahe hain ki do mahine aur jail mein rehna padega! Sir, yeh toh bahut zyada hai. Meri toh life barbaad ho jayegi. Main itne din jail mein kaise rahunga? Meri family ka kya hoga? Please sir, kuch kijiye, yeh toh bahut galat hai mere saath.

Sir, dekho na, mere saath kitna bada dhoka hua hai. Pichli baar jo adalat ka faisla aaya tha, woh toh bilkul galat tha mere liye, main toh tabah ho gaya usmein. Isi liye, ab main upar ki adalat mein gaya hoon, N. Rai sahab hain mere vakil, bade sahab hain woh. Unhone bola ki humne 'revision petition' daali hai. Woh keh rahe hain ki court dobara check karegi ki pehle jo decision aaya tha, woh theek tha ya nahi, sahi tareeke se hua tha ya nahi. Ek Sudesh Joshi sahab bhi hain, woh sarkari vakil hain, Sikkim sarkar ki taraf se bol rahe hain. Sir, mujhe yeh Sections 397-401 Cr.PC ka toh kuch samajh nahi aata. Bas itna pata hai ki meri sunwai ho rahi hai aur main bas insaaf chahta hoon. Aap hi dekho, kaise galat ho sakta hai mere saath.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri suniye, please. Mere saath jo galat hua tha, woh Crime No. 99/2021 mein register hua tha. Aapko toh pata hai, Section 354A kya hota hai... us aadmi ne meri izzat uchalni chahi thi, mere saath gandi harkat ki thi. Woh case abhi Bengaluru mein Nrupatunga Road ke XXIV Additional C.M.M. court mein chal raha hai. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar, wohi aadmi jiske khilaf maine itni himmat karke complaint ki thi, woh ab court mein is case ko hi challenge kar raha hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, sir? Hum victims ko insaaf milne mein itna time lagta hai, aur aise log case hi band karwane ki koshish karte hain. Mujhe toh darr lag raha hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, yeh case rukna nahi chahiye.

Sir, meri ek urgent complaint hai. Aapko yaad hai, NSCBI Airport PS ka Case No. 48, jo 19 September 2014 ka hai? Woh Section 354A IPC wala case, jo mere saath galat hua tha. Ab jisne yeh sab kiya tha, woh anticipatory bail ke liye apply kar raha hai. Court mein CRM No. 3032 of 2021 chal raha hai, aur woh bail lene ki koshish kar raha hai! Sir, itne saal ho gaye, main justice ka intezaar kar rahi hoon, aur ab woh aise hi chhoot jayega? Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai. Agar usko bail mil gayi toh meri safety ka kya hoga? Meri baat suniye, please use bail nahi milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, aap suno na meri baat. Usko 14 February 2017 ko pakda tha police ne, mere saamne hi. Police station le gaye the aur bole agle din court mein pesh karenge. Lekin sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Agle hi din, 15 February ko, usko court le jaate hi bail mil gayi! Ek din mein hi chhoot gaya woh! Mera to khoon khaulta hai. Case register hone ke baad, usko samans bhi gaye, woh court aaya bhi. Saari charge sheet, sab papers usko diye gaye, charges padhke sunaye. Lekin sir, woh ab bhi keh raha hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi! 'Not guilty' bol raha hai! Yeh meri zindagi barbaad kar raha hai, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Sri Ram Luxury PG mein rehti thi, Bellanduru ke Nagireddy Layout mein, 38/1, 8th Cross. Main wahan paying guest thi. Meri kuch personal reasons thi, isliye maine PG chhodne ka decide kiya. Toh 8 April 2018 ko raat ke kareeb 9 baje, maine PG ke owner (A-1) se apna advance amount wapas karne ki request ki. Maine sirf apne paise maange the. Par sir, usne mujh par bahut gusse mein chillaaya aur paisa wapas dene se saaf mana kar diya. Aur itna hi nahi, usne mere sar par bhi maara! Mujhe bahut darr lag gaya aur bohot bura feel hua. Sir, yeh to bohot galat baat hai. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bas pareshan ho gayi hoon. Mera case Ram Dutt Joshi ke khilaf chal raha tha na, Mahila Court mein? Judge sahab ne 11 September 2019 ko uske khilaf judgment bhi de diya tha. Mujhe laga ab finally shanti milegi. Par nahi, woh kamina ab phir se appeal kar raha hai! Cr.P.C. Section 374 ke under, bolte hain. Yeh kya tareeka hai, Sir? Hum jaisi auraton ko kya kabhi insaaf milega ya bas court ke chakkar hi katte rahenge? Delhi Tis Hazari Courts se ab yeh naya natak shuru ho gaya hai. Woh phir se dhamkiyan de raha hai ki main usko chhod doon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar rakhi hai usne. Please, Sir, kuch kijiye. Main aur nahi seh sakti.

Sahab, main aapko woh case number 648/2014 ke baare mein batana chahti hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, maine us ghatiya aadmi ke khilaaf complaint ki thi. Usne meri izzat par haath daala tha, mujhe galat tareeke se chhua, gandi-gandi baatein sunata tha aur mera peecha bhi karta tha. Police ne toh investigation complete karke chargesheet bhi file kar di thi, Sections 354, 354A aur 509 IPC ke तहत. Ab pata chala hai ki woh court mein bol raha hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi! Woh trial ladna chahta hai. Sahab, itna sab hone ke baad bhi woh apni galti nahi maan raha. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di usne, aur ab woh clean nikalne ki koshish kar raha hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai aur main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, usko uske kiye ki saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera case 2014 ka hai, woh jo us aadmi ne mere saath badtameezi ki thi, meri izzat uchhalne ki koshish ki thi. Us waqt police ne sab jaanch ki thi, ek-ek baat dekhi thi. Fir uske khilaaf court mein chargesheet bhi file ki thi, ki usne galat kaam kiya hai, mujhe harass kiya hai. Judge sahab ne bhi uspar woh saare aarop lagaye the — molestation ke, badtameezi ke. Lekin Sir, woh kameena saamne khade ho kar bolta hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi, woh case ladna chahta hai. Aur ab toh yeh sunne ko mil raha hai ki 'ingredients' ki kami hai. Iska matlab kya hua? Kya woh aise hi bach jayega? Sir, itne saal se main nyay ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main yahan Jaspal Singh alias Sonu ki shikayat karne aayi hoon. Usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. 15 March 2014 ki raat ko kareeb 8 baje, H. No. 527, Village Poot Kalan, Delhi mein, usne mere saath zabardasti ki, meri marzi ke khilaaf. Main use rokne ki bahut koshish karti rahi, par usne meri ek na suni. Usne mujhe dhamki bhi di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh mujhe aur mere parivar ko nuksaan pahunchayega. Main tab se bahut darr gayi hoon aur bahut takleef mein hoon. Usne jo mere saath kiya hai, uski saza milni chahiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir. Please uske khilaaf karwai kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri suno toh sahi, yeh kya ho raha hai? Woh aadmi jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, court ne usko discharge kar diya hai! Matlab, uska case ab aage chalega hi nahi, use bina trial ke hi chhod diya? Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Usne galti ki hai, mera bahut nuksaan hua hai, aur ab use aise hi jaane denge? Mujhe toh laga tha ki har mamle mein justice milta hai, trial hota hai, par yahaan toh mera case shuru hone se pehle hi khatam kar diya. Agar aise hi log chhote rahenge toh hum jaiso ko insaaf kaise milega? Dilli sarkar bhi toh is faisle se khush nahi hai, suna hai maine. Toh fir mujhe kyon nahi justice mil raha? Sir, yeh sahi nahi hai, please meri madad karo.

Sir, main Anand Vihar se aayi hoon. Meri yeh complaint hai Manish Gupta ke khilaaf. Usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pehle toh usne mujhe zabardasti utha liya, Sir, kidnap kiya mujhe. Main bahut darr gayi thi, bahut royi. Aur phir... phir usne mere saath bahut galat kaam kiya, mera rape kiya. Main toh mar hi gayi thi us din. Aur usne mujhe dhamki bhi di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh mere poore parivaar ko khatam kar dega. Main bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Us Manish Gupta ko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main bas aapko ye batane aayi hoon... mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf milega, par Tis Hazari Court se 15 February 2023 ko jo order aaya hai na, usne toh meri zindagi hila di. Wo Suresh Kumar Tanwar, jisne mere saath gandi harkatein ki, mujhe cheda, dhamkiyan di... usko Mahila Court ne *discharge* kar diya! Matlab, usko chhod diya? Kaise sir? Ussne section 354, 354A, 506 IPC ke under jo crimes kiye the, uska kya? Main abhi tak darr mein hoon aur wo khule ghoom raha hai. Aap hi batao, aise kaise usko chhod sakte hain? Meri suniye sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi problem leke aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir. Woh log... woh log mujhe itna ganda ganda bole hain na, ki mere dil pe ek gehra zakhm ban gaya hai. Jaise Tiruvalluvar ji ne kaha hai na, ki aag ka ghav toh bhar jaata hai, par jo zubaan se chot lagti hai, woh kabhi nahi bharti. Bas wahi haal hai mera, sir. Raat-din mujhe unke bol yaad aate hain. Main so nahi pata, kha nahi pata. Mujhe lagta hai jaise andar se main poora jal gaya hoon. Please sir, meri madad kijiye. Unhone meri izzat pe ungli uthai hai, mera jeena mushkil kar diya hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap hi toh hamari aakhri umeed ho.

Sir, meri suniye na! Main kitni pareshan hoon, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Mera case High Court mein tha, wahan se ek judgment aaya tha 19 January 2021 ko, aur ek 15 January ko. Mujhe laga tha ab finally mujhe justice milega, par nahi! Ab toh sab us par appeal kar rahe hain. Attorney General, National Commission for Women, Maharashtra Sarkar, sab appeal kar rahe hain. Aur sabse badi baat, woh ghatiya accused Satish, jisne meri zindagi barbaad ki, woh bhi appeal kar raha hai! Yeh kya ho raha hai? Kya usko kabhi saza nahi milegi? Itne saare judgments hain, itne kanoon hain, par mere liye koi insaaf nahi hai? Main aur kitna intezaar karun, Sir? Please, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, meri suniye, mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Yeh 6 September 2017 ki baat hai. Main Syndicate Bank mein interview dene gayi thi. Wahan jo branch manager the, unhone... unhone mujhse bahut ajeeb aur gandi baatein ki. Interview ke dauran unhone mere kapdo par comment kiya, bole 'aise mat pehno', 'waise pehno'. Mujhe itni sharm aayi, Sir. Ek job interview mein koi aise kaise bol sakta hai? Meri izzat pe haath daala hai unhone. Us din toh main dar gayi thi, kuch bol nahi paayi. Ab himmat karke 8 September 2017 ko, yeh complaint darj karwane aayi hoon. Mujhe un branch manager pe sakht se sakht action chahiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main D.P. Vipra College, Bilaspur mein Assistant Professor hoon, ek seedha-saadha insaan. Meri toh life barbad hone ki kagaar pe hai, Sir. Pata nahi kisne aur kyun, mere khilaf ek FIR file karwa di hai. Number hai 0036, aur date hai 25.06.2018. Aap socho, main padha-likha aadmi, college mein bachchon ko padhata hoon, aur mujhpar aisa ilzaam lag gaya! Meri toh reputation kharab ho jayegi, Sir. Yeh FIR bilkul galat hai, mujhe fasaaya ja raha hai, pakka. Meri samajh mein nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Ghar mein sab pareshaan hain. Please, aap meri madad kijiye, Sir. Kaise bhi karke yeh FIR jaldi se jaldi cancel karwa dijiye. Main bahut pareshani mein hoon.

Sir, main Jahangir Puri se aayi hoon. Meri ek complaint hai, FIR No. 89/2021, jo maine 07.02.2021 ko darj karwai thi. Aap hi batao, woh padosi ne mere ghar ke paas room aur toilet banate hue meri paani ki supply wali pipe tod di thi. Jab maine unko roka, toh unhone mujhe gandi niyat se chhua, gandi-gandi baatein bolin aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di! Isi liye toh maine Sections 354A aur 506 IPC ke तहत report likhwai thi. Ab woh log court mein meri FIR ko cancel karwana chahte hain, meri complaint ko khatam karna chahte hain. Sir, yeh toh bilkul galat hai! Unhone mere saath itna bura kiya, aur ab woh bachna chahte hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, meri report ko cancel mat hone dena.

Sir, main Panipat Women's PS mein FIR karwai thi, 14 April 2017 ko. Us din un logon ne mere ghar mein ghus kar, mere saath badtamizi ki, mujhe maar-peet ki aur kapde utaarne ki koshish bhi ki thi. Maine 323, 354-B, 452 aur 506 IPC ke तहत report likhwai thi. Police ne investigation bhi ki aur court mein report bhi submit ki. Lekin sir, ab jo court ka order aaya hai 23 August 2018 ko, usmein se 354-A wali dhara hata di hai. Jabki unhone mere saath gandi harkatein ki thi. Aise kaise ho sakta hai? Meri suno na sir, unhone charge hi nahi lagaya sexual harassment ka. Yeh toh bahut galat ho raha hai mere saath. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please is matter ko dobara dekho.

Sir, main P bol rahi hoon. Please meri suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Baat 28 December 2017 ki hai, dopahar ke kareeb 3:20 baje. Main apne pati Sohit aur unke dost Akash ke saath Banke Bihari Sweets ke saamne, Mukhiya Market mein road pe chal rahi thi. Main thoda aage thi unse. Tabhi wahan 3-4 ladke khade the. Unhone mujhe dekh kar itni gandi-gandi baatein boli, itni badtameezi ki, main bata nahi sakti. Main toh kaanp gayi, itna darr gayi. Meri toh izzat uchhal di unhone sareaam! Sir, aise kaise koi bhi road par kisi ladki ko pareshaan kar sakta hai? Mujhe un gundo par action chahiye, sahab. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main ek ladki hoon. Aaj mere saath bahut bura hua Jhandewalan Road, Nabi Karim, House No. 6127 ke paas. Main wahan se guzar rahi thi ki ek ladka piche pad gaya. Pehle toh bas follow kar raha tha, phir usne mujhe tease karna shuru kar diya, gandi-gandi baatein bolne laga. Main bahut darr gayi thi, kuch bol hi nahi paayi. Jaise hi maine himmat karke use ghoora, woh turant bhag gaya. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Achha hua wahan kisi bhale insaan ne turant police ko call kar diya. Thodi der mein SI Ravi Shankar Sir aur unke saath Constable Purushottam ji spot par aa gaye the. Sir, aise ladkon ki wajah se hum ladkiyan safe feel nahi karte. Please usko dhoondho aur use saza dilao. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe ek aadmi ne poora bewakoof banaya hai. Woh bolta tha ki uske paas ek aisa system hai jismein 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments aur saare laws stored hain. Kehta tha ki bade bade legal practitioners, researchers aur institutions bhi uska system use karte hain. Usne mujhe vaada kiya ki mera case woh pakka jeetwa dega, kyunki uske paas itni legal knowledge hai. Bola ki woh sab rules, sab faisle nikaal ke dikha dega, aur koi mujhe hara nahi sakta. Main toh ek aam aadmi hoon, uski baaton mein aa gaya aur usko apne saare savings de diye. Ab woh phone nahi utha raha aur gayab ho gaya hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mere paise wapas dilwa dijiye aur usko pakdo.

Sir, main apne pati Sumit ke saath Monu ke paas gayi thi, bas uss pichhle jhagde ke baare mein poochhne. Par woh Monu toh pura gunda hai Sir! Woh apne ghar se danda le aaya aur mere pati Sumit ko dande se maarna shuru kar diya. Main beech mein aayi, unko bachane ki koshish ki, toh uss zalim ne mere sir par bhi danda maara, Sir! Mere sir se khoon nikalne laga. Phir woh teenon ne milkar humein ghusson se bhi khoob peeta. Humari kya galti thi Sir? Hum toh bas baat karne gaye the. Meri madad kijiye Sir, un gundon ko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere saath kya hua tha. Maine ek FIR karwai thi, number 710/15, us aadmi ke khilaf jisne mujhe galat tarike se chhua tha, harassment ki thi. Meri izzat par haath daala tha usne, Section 354A IPC ke तहत. Saket Courts mein case chal raha tha, badi mushkil se main himmat karke court gayi. Lekin Sir, 13 January 2016 ko, Trial Court ne usko discharge kar diya! Matlab, usko chhod diya? Mujhe laga mera toh sab kuch khatam ho gaya, insaaf mila hi nahi. Main toot gayi thi. Ab maine suna hai ki State ne is order ke khilaf appeal ki hai, revision petition dali hai. Sir, please, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh galti karne wala aadmi aise hi kaise chhoot sakta hai? Meri suno, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharaab hai. Mujhe laga tha ki jab apne desh mein itne saare judgments aur kanoon hain, chaar crore se bhi zyada, toh mera case toh fatak se solve ho jaayega. Log bolte hain sab system mein hai. Par sahab, main kitne dino se dhakke kha raha hoon, koi sunwai nahi hai meri. Kya yeh saare laws aur judgements sirf bade-bade vakeelon, researchers, students aur institutions ke liye hi hain? Hum jaiso gareebon ko toh koi dekhta hi nahi. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai, aur yeh sab itne bade-bade systems hain, phir bhi mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Meri madad kijiye sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, dekho na meri problem. Main ek aam aadmi hoon, aur mera case court mein chal raha hai. Yeh log kehte hain ki 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments aur kanoon hain, desh bhar mein. Sun kar hi mera sir ghoom gaya! Itne saare laws, itne judgments... main kya karun, saab? Kya mujhe sab yaad karna padega? Yeh sab to bade-bade vakeelon ke liye hai, colleges ke students ke liye hai, institutions ke liye hai. Hum jaise gareeb aur anpadh logon ka kya hoga? Mujhe to bas thoda insaaf chahiye, aur yeh kanoon itne complex bana diye hain ki samajh hi nahi aata. Aisa lagta hai jaise humare liye kuch hai hi nahi. Meri sunega kaun, aur mujhe samjhayega kaun ki mera haq kya hai?

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai. Woh aadmi jisko POCSO case mein special judge ne saza sunayi thi na, Agartala mein, pichle saal 24 April ko... woh ab us saza ke khilaaf upar appeal mein chala gaya hai! Sochiye sir, kitni mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha, ab woh phir se case khulwa raha hai. Uske do-do bade-bade vakeel aaye the, Mr. J. Bhattacharjee aur Mr. Sanjib Ghosh, woh uske liye lad rahe the. Aur hamari taraf se sarkar ke P.P. sahab, Mr. Raju Datta, woh koshish kar rahe hain. Par sir, mujhe darr lag raha hai, kahi uski saza kam na ho jaaye ya woh chhoot na jaaye. Itni himmat karke maine complain ki thi. Mujhe bus mera insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh sab dekh kar meri jaan nikli ja rahi hai.

Sir, main [Victim's Name] hoon. Meri complaint hai, Crime No. 278 of 2022, aapko yaad hoga. Kitni umeed thi mujhe ki ab jaake insaaf milega. Par aaj court se jo khabar aayi hai na, mera toh dil hi baith gaya. Accused number 1 se leke 6 tak, aur woh 8 se 12 tak, sabki petitions toh approve ho gayi hain. Mera jo case tha unke khilaaf, woh toh quash ho gaya hai! Matlab woh sab toh aazad ho gaye. Sirf woh ek, accused number 7, uski petition reject hui hai. Baaki sab aise hi chhoot gaye? Yeh kya insaaf hai, sir? Itne saare log, itna bada gunaah, aur sab ke sab safed poshi mein nikal gaye? Mera kya hoga ab? Mujhe toh ab bahut darr lag raha hai. Please, sir, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh puri ummeed hi toot gayi hai. Woh Crime No. 278 of 2022 mein jo case chal raha tha, jisme itne saare log the, ab pata chala hai ki un sabko toh relief mil gayi! Accused No. 1 se 6 tak, aur phir 8 se 12 tak, sabke cases quash ho gaye hain, Sir! Matlab meri complaint ka kya hua? Itni mehnat ki, itna bhaga-daudi ki, aur ab sab free? Sirf ek woh Accused No. 7 hai, jiska petition reject hua hai. Baaki sab toh nikal gaye. Main kya karu, Sir? Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai. Kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega?

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di court ne. Woh Crime No. 278 of 2022 wala case, jisme maine itni mushkil se FIR karwai thi... ab suna hai ki sabke sab, woh 10 log, unko toh court ne chhod diya. Mera case hi quash kar diya unke liye! Meri suni hi nahi. Itni mehnat ki, itne chakkar kaate, aur ab sab bekaar? Bas ek woh accused no. 7 hai jiska petition reject hua hai. Baaki sab toh azaad ghoomenge ab? Sir, ye kaisi insaaf hai? Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Meri toh koi sunwai nahi hui. Main gareeb aadmi, kahan jaaun ab? Aap hi bataiye main kya karun?

Sir, December 2014 ki baat hai. Jab meri mummy, bhai aur behen ghar pe nahi the, tab woh aadmi hamare ghar aaya tha. Woh mere liye kurkure aur chocolates bhi leke aaya tha, sir. Phir usne apne phone mein gandi-gandi tasveerein dikhayi mujhe. Usne mere saath 'gandi baat' karne ki koshish ki. Aur jab maine mana kiya toh usne mujhe dhamki di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh mujhe thappad maarega. Sir, uske baad... usne mere saath bahut galat kiya. Usne mere saath jabardasti ki, meri izzat loot li. Main bahut darr gayi thi, sir. Please, usko saza dilwaiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai! Itni mushkil se humne woh Crime No. 278/2022 file karwaya tha, socha tha ab insaaf milega.
