Lekin ab court se pata chala hai ki accused number 1 se 6 aur 8 se 12 tak, sabhi ki petitions allow ho gayi hain! Matlab, unke upar se case hi quash ho gaya. Itne saare log toh azaad ghoom rahe hain! Sirf woh accused number 7 ki petition reject hui hai. Sirf woh akela pakda gaya hai, baaki sab toh bahar hain! Yeh kaisa insaaf hai, Sir? Meri toh saari umeed hi toot gayi hai. Hum jaise gareebon ko kabhi insaaf nahi milta kya? Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha, yeh sab kaise ho gaya.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, Crime No. 278 of 2022 mein humne woh case darj karwaya tha. Kitni mushkil se woh FIR hui thi, aur abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki court ne toh mere *accused* (1 se 6 aur 8 se 12 tak) sabko *criminal petition* mein *allow* kar diya hai! Unke khilaaf jo *crime* tha, woh *quash* ho gaya hai, Sir! Matlab woh sabke sab saaf nikal gaye? Sirf ek accused No. 7 hai, jiska *petition reject* hua hai. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Itne saare log the, unhone jo kiya, aur sabko aise hi chhod diya? Meri to duniya hi lut gayi, Sir. Gareeb aadmi ki kaun sunega? Aap hi bataiye, main ab kya karoon? Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, Crime No. 278 of 2022 mein. Abhi court se khabar aayi hai ki woh 10-11 log, accused number 1 se 6 aur phir 8 se 12 tak, un sab ki petitions allow ho gayi hain. Iska matlab hai, unke khilaaf jo case tha, woh pura quash ho gaya hai! Meri saari mehnat, mera dard, sab bekar ho gaya kya? Itne saare log aise hi bach jayenge? Sir, yeh toh bahut galat hai. Bas accused number 7 ki petition reject hui hai, usko chhod kar baaki sab ko toh clean chit mil gayi. Humein kya mila? Hum gareeb logon ko insaaf kab milega? Police mein complaint ki thi ki insaaf milega, par yahan toh sab ulta ho gaya. Sir, meri madad kijiye, main kya karun ab?

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Mera case tha na, Crime No. 278 of 2022? Jismein itne saare log accused the, 1 se 12 tak. Abhi court se ek naya order aaya hai, aur mera toh dimag kharab ho gaya hai sunke. Pata hai kya hua? Woh jo accused the na, 1 se lekar 6 tak aur phir 8 se 12 tak, un sab ki petition court ne allow kar di hai! Matlab, jo case unke khilaf tha, woh quash ho gaya hai. Sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Itni mushkil se toh case banaya tha, aur ab aise hi sabko chhod denge? Bas ek accused number 7 hai, uski petition reject hui hai. Baki sab free ho gaye! Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai ki itne saare criminals aise hi bach ke nikal jaayein? Meri suniye sir, please!

Sir, main Mrs. J bol rahi hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai mere saath. Pichli baar court ne jo faisla sunaya na, woh 28 tareekh ko, woh bilkul galat tha. Mere aur meri chhoti beti XYZ ke saath jo zulm hua tha, uski sunwai theek se hui hi nahi! Humko insaaf mila hi nahi. Ab toh hum phir se court ja rahe hain, Daroga ji. Appeal kar rahe hain. Sarkar (Delhi Govt.) bhi hamare saath hai is case mein. Humne Cr.P.C. 378 ke तहत application di hai, ki humein dobara mauka mile. Bas aap se yahi fariyad hai, ki ab toh humein insaaf dilwa do. Meri beti ki zindagi barbaad ho jayegi aise toh. Bahut umeed se aaye hain aapke paas.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aayi hoon. Yaad hai mera woh Thanjavur wala case, SSC No. 89 of 2016? Jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, badtamizi ki thi aur main SC/ST category se hoon, usko court ne 6 October 2017 ko saza sunaai thi. IPC 354 aur SC/ST Act ke sections lage the us par. Judge sahib ne use ek saal ki jail (rigorous imprisonment) aur sirf 200 rupaye fine ki saza di thi. Maine socha chalo, der se hi sahi, thoda toh insaaf mila. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh badmaash apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Itni mushkil se toh mujhe thodi shanti mili thi. Kya woh fir se mujhe pareshan karega? Meri suno, sir, usko apni saza milni chahiye, woh bachna nahi chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki ye 16 December 2019 ki shaam thi, kareeb 5 baje honge. Main paas wali dukaan par kuch khane ki cheezein lene gayi thi. Jaise hi main dukaan ke bahar khadi thi, wahan ek aadmi khada tha. Usne... sir, usne mujhe galat tareeke se mere chest par touch kiya. Main itna ghabra gayi, itna dar gayi ki main kuch bhi nahi khareed paayi aur seedhe ghar bhaag gayi. Ghar aakar maine rone lagi aur apni mummy ko sab bataya. Meri mummy ne sunte hi turant us dukaan ki taraf gayi. Sir, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon kyunki mujhe pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, jisne meri zindagi tabah kar di thi, woh ab apna case quash karwana chahta hai! Yaad hai na, Haldia PS mein maine uske khilaaf complaint ki thi, woh jo Navi Mumbai mein bhi zero FIR hui thi? Usne mujhe kitna pareshaan kiya tha, stalk kiya, chhup chhup ke meri tasveerein li aur meri izzat uchhali thi. Main kitni mushkil se himmat karke uske khilaaf boli thi. Chargesheet bhi file ho chuki hai, aur ab woh chahta hai ki sab khatam ho jaye? Aise kaise chalega, Sir? Meri kya galti thi? Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please, usko jaane mat do, woh phir se kisi aur ladki ke saath aisa karega. Meri madad karo, Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, pichle saal 9 July ko, court ka woh faisla aaya tha jisme usko (the accused) Section 9(m) ke तहत mujrim thehraya gaya tha? Aur phir 21 August ko ASJ sahib ne usko saza bhi sunayi thi. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya hai, meri takleef ka ant ho gaya. Lekin sir, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki usne us faisle ke khilaaf appeal file kar di hai, BNSS ke Section 415(2) aur 528 ke under. Sir, main kya karoon? Meri himmat nahi hai ki main phir se court ke chakkar kaatu. Woh toh guilty hai, yeh toh sabit ho chuka hai! Please, sir, aap kuch kijiye, woh appeal reject honi chahiye. Meri family bahut darr rahi hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha mere saath kya ho raha hai. Mera jo case tha na, woh Spl.SC No.08 of 2024 wala, Karur ke bade Judge sahib ne usmein ek order diya tha pichle saal 27 November 2024 ko. Mujhe laga ab thoda insaaf milega aur shanti hogi. Lekin ab sun raha hoon, woh jo accused log hain, woh 2, 3, 4 aur 5 number wale, unhone phir se appeal file kar di hai. Haan sir, woh Judge sahib ka order challenge kar rahe hain. Woh nahi chahte ki unhe saza mile. Yeh log toh mujhe aur mere parivar ko aur pareshan kar rahe hain. Main gareeb aadmi hoon, kahan tak ladunga? Pehle hi itna kharcha ho gaya hai. Mujhe lagta hai yeh jaan boojhkar mamla lamba kheench rahe hain. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Karur court mein humara jo case (Spl.SC No.08 of 2024) chal raha tha, usmein Principal District Judge Sahab ne 27.11.2024 ko ek order diya tha. Woh order humare favour mein tha, humein thodi umeed mili thi. Par ab woh jo accused hain, yani accused number 2, 3, 4 aur 5, unhone us order ko challenge kar diya hai! Unhone Criminal Appeals (Crl.A(MD) No.646 of 2025 aur 647 of 2025) file ki hain. Yeh log humein chain se jeene nahi de rahe, Sir. Meri request hai ki aap kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Aur kitna ladenge hum?

Sir, main... main wohi ladki hoon jiske saath 2013 mein Chikmagalur mein woh ghatiya harkat hui thi. Aapko yaad hai na, Special Case No. 8? Woh jo aadmi tha, usne mere saath Section 354A aur Section 7 ke तहत bahut galat kiya tha. Court ne use saza di thi, 8 aur 9 January 2014 ko woh convict hua tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni conviction ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri zindagi barbaad kar di usne, aur ab woh saza se bachna chahta hai? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Please, use dobara saza milni chahiye. Humari family ne kitna suffer kiya hai. Use dobara jail bhejiye, Sir, please!

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi takleef lekar aayi hoon. Mera ek case chal raha tha, POCSO Act ke andar, West Sikkim ke Gyalshing mein, Special Judge ki adalat mein. Uska number tha Sessions Trial (POCSO) Case No.09 of 2019. Usmein jo faisla aaya na, 26 February 2020 ko, us judgment aur sentence se main bilkul bhi khush nahi hoon. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath poora insaaf nahi hua, Sir. Woh insaan jisne meri zindagi barbaad ki, usko poori saza nahi mili. Jo order aaya hai, usse main bahut dukhi hoon, aaj bhi woh baat sochkar mera dil rota hai. Kripya aap meri madad kijiye, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main aur kahan jaaun. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, jo mujhe us din nahi mila.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Yaad hai na mera woh POCSO wala case, jo Saket Court mein chal raha tha? Kitni mushkil se Judge Sahab ne 28 February 2020 ko woh judgment diya tha, aur phir 11 March 2020 ko us harami ko saza bhi sunayi thi. Mujhe laga tha, chalo ab finally meri beti ko insaaf mil gaya, mera dukh khatam ho gaya. Lekin Sir, ab woh jo accused hai na, woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Woh court ke us decision ko, us saza ko challenge kar raha hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Kya meri beti ko phir se court ke chakkar lagane padenge? Mujhe phir se woh sab yaad dilaya jayega? Main toh darr gayi hoon, Sir. Meri request hai, aap kuch karo na. Meri help karo, please.

Sir, main kya bataun? Woh accused na, jiske khilaaf maine complain ki thi, woh phir se court chala gaya hai. Sunne mein aaya hai ki usne Criminal Revisional Application file ki hai, Section 482 read with 401 CrPC ke under. Chahta hai ki mera case hi quash ho jaaye, khatam ho jaaye! Mera woh Netaji Nagar Police Station Case No. 312 of 2018, jo maine 15th September, 2018 ko file kiya tha, jisme Sections 354A, 506, 34 IPC lage the, woh abhi tak ACJM 'A' ke court mein pending hai. ACGR No. 4463/2018 hai uska. Ab agar woh case hi band ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega, sir? Maine kitni mushkil se himmat ki thi complain karne ki. Please kuch kijiye!

Sir, main ek aam aurat hoon. Meri ek complaint thi Balasore Town P.S. mein, Case No. 0176/2021. Un logon ne mujhe gaali di thi, galat tareeke se chheda tha aur jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Sections 294, 354A, 506 lagaye the un par. Police ne investigation karke apni report (jise Final Form ya charge sheet kehte hain) file ki thi 14.07.2022 ko. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein application de rahe hain meri case ko band karwane ke liye. Woh meri puri report ko 'quash' karwana chahte hain. Sir, itni mushkil se toh maine himmat karke FIR karwai thi. Agar yeh case band ho gaya, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Woh log phir se mujhe pareshan karenge. Main aapse request karti hoon, please meri madad kijiye. Meri report ko cancel mat hone dijiye.

Sir, main Gwalior se aayi hoon. Aapko pata hai, Gole Ka Mandir police station mein mere saath jo hua tha, uski FIR hui thi – Crime No. 508/2022. Woh Yogic Sciences ke HOD hain na, unhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mujhe galat tareeke se touch karte the, gandi baatein bolte the, meri izzat uchhali. Yeh sab Section 354-A aur 509 IPC ke under aata hai. Aur mujhe pura yakeen hai, isme conspiracy bhi thi, Section 120-B. Ab woh yeh FIR quash karwana chahte hain, apni power ka galat fayda utha ke. Sir, main bahut darr gayi hoon, pareshaan hoon. Meri madad karo, please. Unko saza milni chahiye, warna aage aur ladkiyon ke saath bhi aisa hi karenge. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir ji, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon. Bidar ke Women Police Station mein maine ek case file kiya tha, Crime No. 41/2022. Uske baad court mein bhi C.C. No. 2646/2023 chal raha hai. Kitni mushkil se main himmat karke aage badhi thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh accused, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, woh court mein petition daal raha hai. Woh chahta hai ki yeh saara case hi quash ho jaye, khatam ho jaye! Aap hi batao sir, aisa kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar use saza nahi mili. Please, aap kuch karo. Meri sunwai toh ho. Yeh proceedings rukni nahi chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mera jo case court mein chal raha hai na, uski sunwai hui thi. Toh unka jo lawyer hai na, wo bol raha hai ki mere khilaaf jo allegations hain, unme toh koi offence banta hi nahi hai. Matlab kya? Mere saath itna kuch hua hai, aur ab wo keh rahe hain ki maine kuch kiya hi nahi hai? Ye toh galat hai sir! Public Prosecutor sahab aur mere wakiil ne bhi bola hai ki ye sab evidence ki baat hai, aur court ko ismein interference nahi karna chahiye unke favour mein. Main toh bas justice chahta hoon, sir. Saboot hain mere paas, sab kuch clear hai. Ye log bas case ko dabana chahte hain. Please, meri help kijiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Maine court mein ek application file ki hai, pata nahi kitni mushkil se paper jama kiye hain. Judges sahab ne bhi meri baat suni hai aur bola hai ki 'rule returnable forthwith'. Matlab, jaldi se jaldi ispe action hoga, sir. Aur woh jo sarkari wakeel hain na, APP, unhone bhi State ki taraf se notice accept kar liya hai. Ab toh sarkar bhi isme shamil ho gayi hai. Sir, main toh bas yahi chah raha hoon ki mujhe mera haqq mil jaye, jo bhi meri main relief hai na, woh mujhe mil jaye. Bahut dukhi hoon main, sir. Meri toh suniye, please.

Sir, main Palarivattom police station mein yeh complaint lekar aayi hoon. Aapko pata hai na, kaise un logon ne mujhe beech raaste mein rok liya tha, mera rasta block kar diya tha? Phir, bina kisi baat ke, itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan bakne lage public mein, meri beizzati ki (294b). Jab maine protest kiya, toh unme se ek ne toh mujhe maara bhi, haath uthaya mujhpar (323). Aur sir, sabse gandi baat, usne mujhse galat tareeke se chhua, meri izzat par haath daala (354A). Main bahut darr gayi thi, aur bahut sharminda feel kar rahi hoon. Meri FIR bhi hui thi, police ne investigation bhi ki hai. Ab yeh log bol rahe hain ki kuch galat hua hi nahi? Kaise nahi hua sir? Sab meri aankhon ke saamne hua hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, aise logon ko chhodna nahi chahiye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon kyunki main bahut ghabrai hui hoon. Yaad hai, mainne Sanjay Kumar ke khilaaf FIR karwai thi (Case Crime No. 08 of 2019), usne mere saath jo gandi harkat ki thi (Section 354-A IPC ke under)? Police ne apni jaanch kar ke uske khilaaf charge-sheet bhi daakhil ki thi (No. 135 of 2019), aur court (Dehradun CJM) ne bhi use bulaya tha, tareekh bhi mili thi. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, Sanjay Kumar, ek naya case lagwa raha hai court mein. Woh chahta hai ki yeh jo sab hua hai, jo police ne kiya hai, aur jo court ne use bulaya hai, woh sab radd ho jaye. Sir, woh bachna chahta hai! Mainne bahut mushkil se himmat karke complaint ki thi, aur ab woh aise nikal jayega? Meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai. Maine 2017 mein Cyber Police Station, Kolkata mein ek complaint darj karayi thi (Case No. 93 of 2017). Us aadmi ne meri life jhand kar di thi online. Woh mujhe gandi cheezein bhejta tha, stalk karta tha, aur dhamkiyan deta tha. Meri izzat par haath dala tha usne, meri shanti cheen li thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein case khatam karwane ki koshish kar raha hai (GR Case No. 1306 of 2017, jo CMM Kolkata ke paas hai). Daroga ji, please meri madad kijiye. Itne saal ho gaye, main bas insaaf chahti hoon. Woh kaise bach sakta hai? Usne jo kiya hai, uski saza milni chahiye. Please, mera case band mat hone dijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri toh sunwai koi kar hi nahi raha. Woh jo chaar log hain na, accused No. 1 se 4, jinke khilaf mera case chal raha hai, C.C.No.2544/2017 Mysuru ke JMFC(III) Court mein, unhone mujhe galat tareeke se roka tha (Section 341), gaali-galoch ki thi (Section 504), aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi (Section 506), poori planning ke saath kiya tha (Section 34). Ab yeh log Section 482 Cr.P.C. lagaakar mera pura case hi quash karwana chahte hain! Sir, yeh toh bahut galat hai. Meri toh koi galti nahi thi, mujhe toh bas nyay chahiye. Kya aise log aise hi chhoot jayenge? Aap hi kuch kijiye, sir, please. Mera case mat hatne dijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Woh aadmi mera jeena haram kar rakha hai. Sir, woh mera peechha karta hai, har jagah stalk karta hai. Humne pehle bhi aapke yahan complaint ki thi, 2018 mein Crime No. 432/2018 mein case bhi bana tha uske khilaaf. Police ne mere aur mere pati ke statements bhi liye the aur charge sheet bhi file ki thi. Par woh abhi bhi baaz nahi aa raha. Usne mujhe itni gandi gaaliyan di hain, apmaan kiya hai ki main bata nahi sakti. Aur sir, woh mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki deta hai. Meri family bohot darr gayi hai. Mujhe har waqt usse khatra lagta hai. Sir, please kuch kijiye, mujhe usse bachaiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jisne Ambedkar Nagar PS mein FIR No. 1180/15 darj karayi thi. Us badmash ne mujhe chheda tha, peecha kiya tha aur dhamki bhi di thi. Sections 354, 354D, 506 IPC ke तहत case bana tha. Mujhe laga tha ab toh usko saza milegi. Par Sir, Saket Court ki Mahila Court ne 28.03.2016 ko usko bari kar diya! Meri toh himmat hi toot gayi thi. Abhi suna hai ki sarkaar ne is acquittal ke khilaaf appeal daali hai. Sir, woh aise kaise bach sakta hai? Usne meri zindagi barbaad ki hai. Please, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Aap log kuch kijiye taki woh phir se jail jaaye, usko saza mile.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Woh aadmi, jab dekho tab mera peecha karta hai. Pehle toh bas ghoorta tha, phir comments pass karne laga. Mujhe itni sharam aati hai, main bahar nikalne se bhi darti hoon. Usne meri izzat uchalne ki koshish ki hai. Jab main kahin jaati hoon, woh mere piche-piche aata hai, mujhe message karta hai, calls karta hai. Main toh ab ghar se nikalne mein bhi darr lagta hai. Pura din bas yehi tension rehti hai ki woh kahin mil na jaye. Meri toh neend bhi ud gayi hai. Sir, please, aap kuch kijiye. Meri complaint likho. Mujhe usse bachao. Gandhidham Police Station mein yeh case hai, wohi 7 April 2015 wala. Meri madad karo, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aayi hoon. Woh aadmi, jo do-do companies ka Director hai, usne meri zindagi nark bana di hai. Woh mera peecha karta hai (stalking), mujhe gande ishare karta hai, aur phone par bhi bahut badtameezi se baat karta hai. Meri izzat par hamla karta hai woh. Jab maine uske khilaf complaint ki thi 02.12.2019 ko, tab laga tha ki ab sab theek ho jayega. Par ab toh woh chahta hai ki yeh C.C.No.120 of 2020 wala case hi band ho jaye, Secunderabad Court se. Usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai, Sir! Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai. Meri aankhon ke saamne andhera cha gaya hai. Kripya karke uske khilaf yeh proceedings rukne mat dijiye. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon ki mera jo case chal raha hai, woh abhi bhi Alipore court mein Ld. Judicial Magistrate ke paas pending hai, ACGR No. 7195 of 2016. Yeh Haridevpur Police Station Case No. 715 of 2016 hai, jo 24.12.2016 ko Sections 354C aur 354D IPC ke तहत register hua tha. Lekin sir, ab toh hadd ho gayi! Accused ne ek naya revision application (CRR 1124 of 2018) daal diya hai, jismein woh chahte hain ki yeh saara case hi quash ho jaye, matlab band ho jaye! Meri izzat ke saath khilwad hua, stalking hui, aur ab yeh log chahte hain ki unhe koi saza hi na mile. Sir, itne saal se main justice ka intezaar kar rahi hoon, aur ab yeh log mere case ko hi khatam karwana chahte hain? Aap please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, mera case band nahi hona chahiye!

Sir, main Porvorim se aayi hoon. Meri complaint hai, badi pareshan hoon main. Pichle kayi dino se, aur khaaskar aaj 11 January ko, do ladke mera peecha kar rahe hain. Ek ka naam Bashir Ahmad hai aur doosra jo hai, woh bhi uske saath hi rehta hai. Jahan jaati hoon, college ho ya market, yeh dono mujhe follow karte hain. Phone pe bhi messages aate hain, bahut gandi baatein likhte hain. Main toh bahar nikalna bhi mushkil ho gaya hai mere liye. Meri life pura disturb ho gayi hai. Sir, please inke khilaaf action lo. Meri izzat aur safety ka sawal hai. Mujhe in dono se bahut darr lagta hai. Inki wajah se meri family bhi tension mein hai. Please meri help kijiye, sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, yeh court ka chakkar na, meri toh samajh se bahar hai. Kehte hain 4 crore judgments hain, itne saare kanoon hain, hum gareeb logon ko kya samajh aayega? Mera case chal raha hai, aur pichle sunwai mein kya hua, mere vakil aur jo sarkari vakil tha, dono ne aapas mein consent de diya, aur case finally sun liya. Abhi tak theek tha, par phir... wo jo dusra party tha na, non-applicant No.2, uska toh koi vakil hi nahi tha. Toh judge sahab ne court mein baithe Mr. S. D. Chande ko bula liya aur kaha, 'aap amicus banke help karo court ko'. Yeh amicus kya hota hai Sir? Koi vakil nahi tha toh kya court kisi ko bhi khada kar dega? Mujhko toh lag raha hai mere saath kuch galat ho raha hai, mujhe kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha. Meri sunwai toh ho gayi, par yeh sab dekh kar main ghabra gaya hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Woh jo aadmi hai na, jiske khilaaf maine 2019 mein Domestic Airport police station mein FIR (No. 57/2019) karayi thi Section 354D (stalking) ke तहत, ab woh us FIR ko quash karwana chahta hai. Sir, main uske institute mein kaam karti thi 2013 mein, tab woh mujhe mila tha. Uske baad se usne meri naak mein dam kar rakha hai. Har jagah peecha karna, pareshan karna. Bahut mushkil se himmat karke maine complain ki thi. Ab agar woh FIR bhi cancel ho gayi toh mujhe kaun bachayega? Main bahut darr rahi hoon, Sir. Meri request hai ki meri FIR ko cancel na hone de. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main toh ek seedhi saadhi kalaakar hoon, Yakshagana karti hoon. Mera toh bas yahi kaam hai. Main Facebook pe bhi active rehti thi. Ek din, ek aadmi ne wahan mujhse contact kiya. Usne bola ki woh mera bahut bada fan hai. Usko sab pata tha ki main Yakshagana karti hoon, artist hoon. Meri saari personal information bhi usne kahin se nikaal li thi. Usne mujhse bola ki woh mere art ke baare mein kuch likhna chahta hai, meri kala ko promote karna chahta hai. Maine socha koi accha insaan hoga, fan hai toh support kar raha hai. Maine us par bharosa kar liya, Sir. Par woh toh bilkul dhokhebaaz nikla. Please, meri madad kijiye!

Sahab, main isliye aaya hoon yahan. Rehan @ Kallu Mulla aur Radhey Shyam ne jo kiya hai mere saath, uski wajah se meri family bahut darr rahi hai. Badarpur PS mein unke khilaaf FIR No. 113/2019 darj hai aur SC No. 88/2020 mein unka case chal raha hai. Aapko pata hai na, kitni takleefein uthai hain maine? Yeh log abhi bhi mujhe aur mere gharwalon ko threaten karte rehte hain. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, Sahab. Meri toh neend udd gayi hai. Kripya karke aap meri madad kijiye, inhe jaldi se jaldi saza milni chahiye. Bohut pareshan hoon main, Sahab!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, insaaf ka intezaar karte karte thak gayi hoon. 09.08.2019 ko case shuru hua tha, aur aaj 2025 aa gaya hai. Sochिए Sir, itna lamba time! Woh ladka, jo mujhe har jagah stalk karta tha, peechha karta tha, aur jaan se maarne ki dhamkiyaan deta tha, usne meri neend haraam kar di thi. Main ghabrahat mein rehti thi. Abhi pichhle mahine 25.04.2025 ko sunne mein aaya ki order reserve hua hai, aur agle din hi 26.04.2025 ko judgment bhi aa gaya. Itne saalon tak tadapne ke baad, ab bas mujhe usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Uske khilaaf police ne stalking aur dhamki dene ke charges lagaye hain. Bas yahi chahiye ki ab aur der na ho. Meri suniye Sir, please.

Sir, main aapko May 2020 ki ek bahut serious baat batana chahti hoon. Maine apne Instagram par kuch screenshots aur saari details post kiye the. Ek group tha jiska naam 'Bois Locker Room' tha, aur usmein kuch ladke itni gandi baatein kar rahe the! Ladkiyon ko objectify karna, unki slut-shaming karna, aur toh aur rape ko bhi casual tareeke se discuss kar rahe the. Yeh sab dekh kar mera khoon khol gaya tha! Mujhe laga ki yeh sab logon ke saamne aana chahiye, isliye maine yeh expose kiya. Phir Delhi Commission for Women (DCW) ne bhi iska notice liya aur action shuru kiya. Mujhe baad mein pata chala ki is mamle mein FIR No. 142/2020 bhi register hui hai. Meri bas yahi request hai ki in logon par sakht se sakht kaarwai ki jaaye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki meri jo FIR thi, woh Mehrauli PS mein darj hui thi, uska number 2432/14 hai. Bohot mushkil se investigation chali hai, Sir. Police ne mere aur jo gawah the, unke bayaan bhi liye hain, aur saare zaroori documents bhi banaye hain. Ab finally, jaanch poori ho gayi hai. Police ne Sanjay aur Kale, un dono badmaashon ke khilaaf court mein charge sheet submit kar di hai. Un par dhara 307 (jaan se maarne ki koshish), 354 (chhedchhad), 506 (dhamki dena) aur 34 IPC (sabne milkar kiya) ke charges lage hain. Sir, mujhe unse insaaf chahiye, bohot daraya aur pareshan kiya hai unhone.

Sahab, main ek complaint darj karwane aayi hoon. Main Faridabad mein kaam karti hoon, gharon mein maid ka kaam karti hoon. Zyada padhi-likhi toh hoon nahi, bas paanchvi tak hi gayi hoon school. Apne bhai aur bhabhi ke saath rehti hoon. Mujhe yaad hai, maine 6 November 2013 ko ek bayaan diya tha. Usi bayaan ke baad, Greater Kailash-I thane mein meri FIR bhi kati thi, jiska number 232/13 tha. Bahut lamba time ho gaya hai sahab, ab tak mujhe theek se justice nahi mila. Bahut pareshan hoon, meri suno please.

Sir, meri suniye, main aapko kya bataun. Yeh baat hai 11 June 2017 ki. Main toh ek call center mein job karti thi, ek company mein. Ab ye jo Yogesh hai na, yeh hamare mohalle mein hi rehta tha pichle do-teen saal se. Toh bas, aise hi jaanti thi main isko. Lekin sir, uss 11 June se lagbhag chaar-paanch din pehle hi, maine isse baat karna bilkul band kar diya tha. Matlab, maine isse milna-julna, baat-cheet sab khatam kar di thi. Main toh isse door rehne lagi thi. Pata nahi kya chahta hai mujhse yeh...

Sir, main Mohit Kumar Verma aur unke saathiyon ke khilaaf jo FIR No. 761/2016, PS Shakarpur mein दर्ज hai, uski victim hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai in logon ki wajah se. Kitne saal ho gaye, main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Pata hai Sir, pichli baar, 13 January 2020 ko, Mahila Court ne unki 'discharge applications' reject kar di thi. Matlab, court ne finally kaha tha ki unpar charges frame honge, unka trial chalega. Mujhe thodi umeed bandhi thi ki ab mujhe insaaf milega. Lekin Sir, ab yeh log phir se upar ki court mein chale gaye hain! Bol rahe hain ki neeche wali court ka order galat hai. Yeh sab mujhe aur pareshaan kar rahe hain. Sir, please dekhiye na, mujhe insaaf chahiye, ab aur nahi seh sakti.

Sir, main Krishna Park mein D-148/A, E-1 mein kiraye pe apne husband ke saath rehti hoon. Main Dakhinpuri mein ek beauty parlour mein kaam karti hoon. Sir, mere pados mein hi ek aadmi rehta hai, uska naam Vijay Kumar hai. Woh mujhe bahut pareshaan karta hai, sir. Roz mujhe chedta hai aur bolta hai ki usse dosti karoon. Main bahut uncomfortable feel karti hoon uski wajah se. Jab main apne kaam se ghar aati hoon, ya ghar se nikalti hoon, woh hamesha aas paas hi rehta hai aur mujhe dekh ke smile karta hai. Meri zindagi haram kar di hai usne. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai. Meri madad kijiye, sir, please. Main bahot pareshan hoon uski harkaton se.

Sir, main aaj 18.04.2016 ko aapke paas bahut pareshan hoke aayi hoon. Pichle kuch dino se ek aadmi ne meri zindagi haram kar rakhi hai. Woh mujhe stalk kar raha hai, bina matlab ke calls aur messages bhejta rehta hai. Uska number hai 9999483234. Sir, maine jab Truecaller pe uska number check kiya na, toh uska naam Pawan dikhaya. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, ghar se nikalne mein bhi darr lagta hai. Meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Please kuch kijiye, mujhe isse bachaiye aur insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main Shahid Bhagat Singh College se B.A. (Hons.) Hindi ki student hoon. Hamare mohalle mein ek Harun naam ka ladka rehta hai. Woh pichle do mahine se mujhe bahut tang kar raha hai, meri zindagi haram kar di hai. Jab bhi main college jaati hoon ya wapas aati hoon, woh mera peecha karta hai, mujhe dekh ke ajeeb-ajeeb gaane gaata hai. Baar-baar mera phone number maangta hai. Maine usko pehle bhi saaf mana kar diya hai ki main number nahi doongi, par woh sunta hi nahi. Mujhe itni sharam aati thi aur darr lagta tha jhagde ka, isliye maine ab tak ghar mein bhi kisi ko nahi bataya. Par ab toh main bahut pareshaan ho gayi hoon, meri padhai bhi affect ho rahi hai. Aaj 25.07. ko toh usne hadd hi kar di. Sir, please uske khilaaf kuch action lo, meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon ki main kitni pareshan hoon. Baat 21 June, 2014 ki hai. Woh din subah-subah, mere phone par, jo mera number 9811088215 hai, ek anjaan number se baar-baar calls aane lage. Woh number tha 8950073653. Main itni ghabra gayi thi, Sir. Unhone phone uthane par itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, aur dhamkiyan bhi dene lage. Meri neend haram ho gayi hai, mujhe bahut mental harassment ho raha hai. Woh log mujhe darane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Aap please meri help kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to jaan nikal gayi hai. Maine pehle bhi is aadmi ke khilaaf FIR karayi thi na, woh 11 April 2016 ko thi, uska number 142/2016. Woh mera purana driver hai, sir. Jab se usne naukri chhodi hai, tab se bas mera peecha kar raha hai, mujhe stalk kar raha hai. Main kitni pareshan hoon, bata nahi sakti. Aur suniye, kal raat ko, 7 July 2016 ko, kareeb 10 baje, woh phir se mere ghar ke neeche khada tha! Akela bhi nahi tha, uske saath teen aur log the. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, sir. Yeh insaan mujhe chain se jeene nahi dega. Please meri madad kijiye, iske khilaaf sakht action lijiye.

Sahab, main Vikas Saxena ki biwi hoon. Meri shaadi 2011 mein hui thi usse. Kya bataun sahab, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. 2013 se hi hamara divorce case chal raha hai court mein. Main tab se usse alag, apne maayke mein reh rahi hoon, apne parents ke ghar. Bahut pareshan hoon main, sahab. Upar se main R.G. Stone Clinic mein naukri karti hoon, apni guzara chalane ke liye. Aap hi bataiye sahab, ek aurat ki zindagi kitni mushkil ho jaati hai jab uska pati usse aisa kare. Mujhe nyay chahiye sahab, bas nyay.

Sir, main aaj aapko complaint karne aayi hoon. Ye baat hai 19 April 2013 ki. Meri mummy ne na Sandoz Restaurant se khana order kiya tha. Bas 15-20 minute hi hue honge mummy ko order place kiye hue ya woh wahan se nikli hi thi, aur uske baad na, mere saath jo hua woh main batane ki himmat bhi nahi kar paa rahi hoon. Mujhe abhi tak woh din yaad aata hai toh meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Meri zindagi puri badal gayi hai us din ke baad se, sir. Woh dard abhi bhi fresh hai. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon. Mera woh case chal raha hai na, Manoj Sharma ke khilaaf, FIR No. 507/2021. Woh mujhe stalk karta tha, phone pe aur saamne se bhi pareshaan karta tha, jaan se marne ki dhamkiyan deta tha. Pichhle mahine, 21 August ko, Mahila Court ne us par charges frame karne ka order diya tha. Main itni khush thi, laga ki chalo ab toh justice milega. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh kamina Manoj Sharma, us order ko challenge kar raha hai. Karkardooma Court mein phir se petition file kar di hai usne, bachne ke liye! Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, agar woh bach gaya toh meri toh life hell ho jaegi. Pehle hi itna pareshaan kiya hai. Please, aap log kuch kijiye, use saza milni chahiye. Meri request hai ki aap meri help karein.

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon, meri ek bahut purani complaint thi, FIR no. 227/2018, Greater Kailash PS mein. Woh ladka, jo mujhe hamesha follow karta tha, stalk karta tha (Section 354D IPC ka case tha). Saket Court mein, Mahila Court mein, judge sahiba ne pichle saal 9 October 2018 ko usko bari kar diya tha. Sir, mujhe insaaf nahi mila. Woh aise hi chhoot gaya! Mera toh jeena mushkil kar diya tha usne. Ab main is judgment ke khilaaf appeal kar rahi hoon, CrPC Section 372 ke तहत. Aap please meri madad kijiye. Main chahti hoon use saza mile, mere saath jo hua, uski saza milni chahiye. Bohot darr lagta hai sir, aise log khule ghoomte hain toh.

Sir, main Varsha Sengar hoon. Main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Ek ladka hai, Manish naam hai uska, Rajpal ka beta. Yeh 2012 se hi mere peeche pada hua hai. Jab main Badarpur school jaati thi, tab se lekar Jaitpur Modh tak, yeh har din mera peecha karta tha. Main itni ghabra jaati thi, kya bataun! Beech mein, March 2013 se August 2013 tak usne peecha karna band kar diya tha. Mujhe laga chalo jaan chhooti. Lekin Sir, ab woh phir se mere peeche pad gaya hai. Kabhi school ke raaste mein dikhta hai, kabhi ghar ke paas ghoomta rehta hai. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Please, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe usse bachao.

Sir, main yahan apne case ke liye aayi hoon. Woh jo ladka tha na, jo mera peecha karta tha, mujhe stalk karta tha, uske khilaaf jo case chal raha tha... Pata hai Sir, court ne usko guilty toh maan liya hai, doshi thehraya hai, 16 January 2020 ko uska judgment aaya tha. Lekin, Sir, saza kya mili hai use? Sirf ek mahine ki jail aur bas 20,000 rupaye ka fine! Yeh kya baat hui, Sir? Usne meri zindagi nark bana di thi, main ghar se nikalne se bhi darti thi. Meri izzat, mera chain sab cheen liya tha. Aur usko itni halki saza? Ek mahina toh kuch bhi nahi hai. Mujhe laga tha use theek-thaak punishment milegi, jo usne kiya uske liye. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath yeh insaaf nahi hua.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo galat hua tha na, uska case Raipur court mein tha. Special Judge ne usko (accused) 2018 mein hi *bari* kar diya tha, sir! Socho, meri beti pe kya guzri hogi aur usko *acquittal* mil gaya! Hamara to dil toot gaya tha us din, saara bharosa uth gaya tha. Lekin maine haar nahi maani. Hamne petition file ki thi. Usme thodi *delay* ho gayi thi, kareeb 60 din ki, par ab Hon'ble Supreme Court ke niyam se, woh *delay condone* ho gayi hai, *accept* ho gayi hai hamari appeal! Itna time lag gaya, par ab jaake phir se umeed jaagi hai. Sir, main bas itna chahti hoon ki meri beti ko insaaf mile. Woh aadmi aise hi kaise chhoot sakta hai? Ab jab petition *condone* ho gayi hai, to please aap log bhi madad karo. Mujhe meri beti ke liye *justice* chahiye, bas!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mujhe Bijawar Court se ek order mila hai, 4 October 2017 ka. Sir, usmein na, Judge sahab ne mere upar galat charges laga diye hain. Main toh socha tha ki mujhe discharge kar denge, main toh begunah hoon! Lekin unhone seedha Section 305, 354D(2) aur POCSO Act ka Section 12 laga diya hai. Sir, yeh suicide, yeh stalking, aur woh bacche wala case... main aisa kabhi soch bhi nahi sakta. Meri toh family, meri toh reputation, sab kuch daav pe lag gaya hai. Main tab se rota hoon. Sir, please meri suniye, main sach mein bahut galat phasa hoon. Aap hi kuch kariye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri ek court mein matter chal rahi hai. Pata nahi kya hota hai in cases ka! Pichli baar na, 7 February 2019 ko sunwai hui thi, puri lambi sunwai hui thi. Mere vakil sa'ab, Shri Dharmendra Singhal, aur unke saath Sri Shivendra Raj Singhal bhi the. Sarkari vakil, Sri Sanjay Chaturvedi, bhi the. Sab papers dekhe gaye. Aur us din na, court ne mere haq mein ek order pass kiya tha. Bola tha ki ye order abhi tak chalega, operational hai. Lekin Sir, itne saal ho gaye, woh order to mere paas hai, lekin saamne waale log to maante hi nahi hain! Meri samasya to jyon ki tyon hai. Woh order hone ke baad bhi mujhe pareshaan kar rahe hain. Aap hi batao, jab court ne faisla mere paksh mein diya hai, to ye log kyun nahi sunte? Police kuchh nahi karti to kahan jaayenge?

Sir, main Rajamahendravaram se aayi hoon. Meri ek complaint thi jo C.C.No.1808 of 2020 mein chal rahi hai. Usne mere saath cheating ki hai, Section 417 IPC ke तहत. Aur sir, usne mujhe bahut stalk bhi kiya hai, Section 354D IPC ke under. Ab woh banda, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, woh court mein petition daal raha hai ki yeh saara case hi cancel ho jaaye! Matlab, woh chahta hai ki us par koi action na ho aur woh bach jaaye! Maine itni mushkil se report darj karayi thi, aur ab woh chahta hai ki uski saari proceedings 'quash' ho jaayein. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Woh kaise bach sakta hai? Meri suniye, sir.

Sir, main Rajvansha Gopal Gajbhe hoon. Meri betiyon ke school se 31/01/2016 ko subah 10 se 10:30 baje ke beech phone aaya tha. Main ghabra gaya aur turant dopahar 1 baje school pahuncha. Wahan Principal madam ne bataya ki meri beti Prachi ke school bag mein ek love letter mila hai. Sir, aap socho, meri chhoti si beti! Jab maine Prachi se poocha toh usne bataya ki school jaate waqt, woh jo ladka hai, usne use 50 rupaye ka note diya tha. Usne hi yeh love letter bhi diya hoga. Meri beti abhi bacchi hai, usko kya pata! Yeh toh sab galat ho raha hai sir, meri beti ko bigaad rahe hain. Aap meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main aaj, 11 February 2013 ko Jagat Puri PS mein apni problem batane aayi hoon. Main 11th class mein padhti hoon aur apne chacha-chachi ke saath rehti hoon. Pehle hum A-28, Gali No. 22, Old Govind Pura mein kiraye par rehte the. Wahan hamare makan-malik ka beta, Rinku, sir, woh mujhe baar-baar shaadi ke liye propose karta tha. Main use bilkul pasand nahi karti. Uski family bhi, matlab uske gharwale bhi, mere chacha-chachi se uski shaadi ki baat karte rehte the. Mere chacha-chachi ne toh unhe saaf mana kar diya tha, lekin woh log samajhte hi nahi hain. Main bahut pareshan ho gayi hoon, sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas fir se aayi hoon. Aapko toh yaad hoga, Sangam Vihar PS mein meri FIR thi, 601/2016 wali. Woh Sonu Rajora, jisne mujhe kitna pareshan kiya, stalk kiya tha. Meri zindagi usne hell bana di thi! Kitni mushkil se Mahila Court, Saket mein judge sahib ne usko Section 354D IPC ke under convict kiya tha 16 February 2019 ko, aur sentence bhi sunayi thi 18 February 2019 ko. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki usne appeal file kar di hai. Kya matlab hai iska? Kya woh fir se bahar ghoomega? Meri toh jaan sukh gayi thi uski wajah se. Itni ladai ladi, ab yeh sab dobara? Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Please, meri madad kijiye, usko jail mein hi rehne do.

Sir, main aapke paas fir se aayi hoon. Meri beti ka jo POCSO case tha na, Kalaburagi court mein, jismein us aadmi ko 2019 mein saza mili thi. Bahut mushkil se humein insaaf mila tha, Sir. Meri beti ko usne jo takleef di thi, uski saza use mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh kameena phir se appeal kar raha hai! Usne phir se application di hai ki uski saza khatam kar do. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi sunke. Kya hamare bacche ko kabhi chain se jeene nahi denge? Usne jo galti ki thi, uski saza puri kare na. Sir, please kuch kijiye. Hum bahut dare hue hain. Humari madad kijiye, Sir. Woh phir se bach gaya toh kya hoga?

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Maine itni mushkil se 2015 mein Habibganj police station mein ek FIR darj karwai thi, woh 514/2015 number wali. Uske baad se main bas court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, justice ke liye. Ab pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, jiske khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh phir se meri FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga ke. Kya matlab hai iska? Pehle 2016 mein case kiya, phir 2018 mein doosra case bhi usi wajah se. Sir, yeh log meri zindagi barbaad kar rahe hain, aur ab yeh chahte hain ki unhe koi saza na mile? Meri suniye Sir, please, yeh sab proceedings rukni nahi chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bohot pareshaan hoke aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, woh meri purani case? Woh jo aadmi tha, usne meri family ko itna tang kiya tha, meri jaati (Scheduled Caste/Tribe) ko leke bohot kuch sunaya tha, aur uski wajah se toh suicide tak ki naubat aa gayi thi. Kolar ki Court ne 30 November 2010 ko usko guilty mana tha, Section 306 aur Scheduled Castes/Tribes Act ke under. Usse 5 saal ki kadi saza bhi sunayi thi. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki usne uss judgment ke khilaaf appeal file kar di hai. Sir, main bohot darr raha hoon. Meri saari umeed uss saja par tiki thi. Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh humein aur tang karega. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pichle kai hafte se usne meri zindagi haram kar rakhi hai. Mera padosi hai, Sukhinder Bir Singh, jise sab Sandy kehte hain. Sir, woh na... pichle kuch hafte se bahut pareshan kar raha hai. Gande-gande comment pass karta hai, mujhe aankh maarta hai. Aur toh aur, do-teen baar toh usne mujhpe haath uthane ki koshish bhi ki hai, physical assault karne ki. Kabhi adhnange ghumta hai mere saamne, kabhi gande ishaare karta hai. Sir, main ghar se nikalne mein bhi darti hoon ab. Meri madad karo, please.

Sahab, main Syeda Durdana, bahut pareshan ho gayi hoon. Woh aadmi, usne mera jeena mushkil kar rakha hai, hamesha shaadi ke liye peeche pada rehta hai. Uski harkaton se tang aakar, main Golekhana shift ho gayi thi, socha thoda chain milega. Par nahi, woh yahan bhi aa gaya aur abhi bhi mujhe tang kar raha hai. Humne panchayat bhi bulayi thi, sabne use samjhaya ki meri jaan chhod de, par woh nahi mana. Kal raat, 6.12.2012 ko, kareeb 10:30 baje, woh mere ghar mein ghus aaya aur sabke saamne jhagda karne laga. Saare padosi jama ho gaye. Meri to society mein saari izzat chali gayi hai, main bahut dukhi aur frustrated hoon, sahab. Please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Pichle saal, 2015 mein, mere ghar pe daka pada tha. Woh paanch-chhe log the, sab kuch loot ke le gaye the. Main aur mera parivar bahut darr gaye the. Us waqt maine City 'C' Division Police Station, Jamnagar mein FIR karwai thi, woh CR No. I-171/2015 wala case. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log, woh chor-daku, court mein gaye hain aur bol rahe hain ki yeh FIR hi galat hai, isko cancel karwa do. Section 395 ka case hai, sir! Aise kaise ho sakta hai? Kya unko saza nahi milegi? Meri saari mehnat ki kamai loot li unhone, aur ab woh case hatwana chahte hain? Please, sir, hum gareeb logon ko insaaf dilwaiye. Unko aise bachne mat dijiye.

Sir, main Ashwini, Rajivnagar se. Pehle main Nejjuru gaon ki thi, Sidapura taluk se. Sir, meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Ek aadmi hai jo mujhe bahut pareshaan kar raha hai. Har waqt mera peecha karta hai, jahan bhi jaati hoon, woh mere peechhe hota hai. Mujhe rokta hai raaste mein, chalne nahi deta. Aur sir, usne mujhe maara bhi hai, haath uthaya hai mujh par. Meri ijjat par haath daalne ki koshish ki hai usne. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, sir. Usne mujhe dhamki bhi di hai, meri family ko bhi. Mujhe chain se jeene nahi de raha hai. Please sir, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye usse.

Sir, meri baat suniye, main yahaan bahut pareshan hoke aaya hoon. Mujhe jhootha fansaya ja raha hai, saahab! Maine koi galti ki hi nahi hai. Aap original complaint dekh lijiye, usmein mera naam tak nahi hai. Jinhone complaint ki hai, unhone mere khilaaf ek bhi allegation nahi lagaya. Saare ilzaam toh Abhishek Dhaka naam ke ladke par hain. Pura case Abhishek Dhaka ka hai, mujhe isme unnecessary ghaseeta ja raha hai. Charge sheet mein bhi mere against koi specific baat nahi hai. Woh khud bhi Abhishek Dhaka par hi shaq kar rahe hain. Phir bhi mujhe baar-baar bulaya ja raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye, main bilkul bekasoor hoon!

Sir, main aapke paas apni takleef batane aayi hoon. Ye jo aadmi hai na, jiske khilaaf Cyber Crime Police Station, Ranga Reddy District mein FIR hui hai, isne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Sir, ye mera peecha karta hai, har waqt mujhe stalk karta hai. Online bhi gandi-gandi baatein likhta hai, meri izzat uchhalta hai. Meri personal photos aur videos ko bhi usne online daal diya hai, sabko dikha raha hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aata log aisa kaise kar sakte hain! Aur ab ye apni FIR quash karwana chahta hai? Sir, agar isko saza nahi mili toh kya faayda aise laws ka? Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko meri aapbeeti batane aayi hoon. Meri baat suniye, Sir. Yeh 4 November 2014 ki baat hai, main apni office se kaam khatam karke ghar laut rahi thi. Roz ki tarah main apne raste pe thi, tabhi ek aadmi mere peeche pad gaya. Pehle toh mujhe laga, shayad koi galati se hai, par nahi, Sir! Usne mujhe follow karna shuru kar diya. Fir raaste mein usne gande-gande ishaare kiye, aur usse bhi bura, usne mujhe pakadne aur galat tarike se touch karne ki koshish ki. Main bahut darr gayi thi, Sir, meri to jaan nikal gayi thi. Us din se aaj tak, woh darr mere andar baitha hua hai. Raat ko neend nahi aati. Please, Sir, aap hi bataiye main kya karoon? Us aadmi ke khilaaf kadi se kadi karwayi honi chahiye, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Aapko yaad hai, maine Nacharam Police Station mein ek case file karwaya tha, Cr.No. 228/2018. Usne mujhe cheda, stalk kiya, aur jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi (Sections 354, 354D, 506 IPC ke under). Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh accused, woh ganda aadmi, High Court mein chala gaya hai Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga kar. Woh chahta hai ki mera poora case hi khatam ho jaaye, quash ho jaaye! Sir, agar aisa ho gaya toh mujhe justice kaise milega? Meri toh puri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Woh phir se mujhe pareshan karega. Meri request hai, please kuch kijiye, Sir. Mujhe usse bachaiye aur justice dilaiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kahan jaaun. Ek order aaya hai mere khilaaf, jisse meri poori zindagi bigad gayi hai. Aur usse pehle bhi ek aur faisla hua tha, jo kisi 'competent authority' ne kiya tha, pata nahi kiski recommendation pe. Mujhe lagta hai yeh sab galat hai, Sir. Itne bade bade kanoon hain is desh mein, itne saare judgments hain, par mere jaise aam aadmi ke liye koi insaaf nahi? Maine toh bas yahi socha tha ki court mein jaunga toh meri suni jayegi. Meri bas yahi guzarish hai, Sir, jo bhi theek lage, jo bhi relief ho, please mujhe dilwa dijiye. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main abhi-abhi apne ghar ke paas scooty park ki thi. Jaise hi maine apne gharwalon ko awaz lagayi, woh ladke jinki car wahan se nikli thi, ekdum se U-turn leke wapis aa gaye! Unhone mujhe aur meri family ko jaan se maarne ki dhamki di aur phir apni car mein bhaag gaye. Main bahut darr gayi thi, sir. Please kuch kijiye! Main un ladkon ko pehchan sakti hoon agar aap mujhe dikhayein. Meri unse bahut jaan ka khatra hai!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki jis bande ne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, usko court ne chhod diya hai. Acquittal mil gaya use! Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di usne, aur ab use koi saza nahi? Yaad hai mujhe, 15 February 2013 ka din tha, subah ke theek 9:30 baje, apne E-12, Andha Mugal, Pratap Nagar wale ghar ke bilkul saamne. Usne peeche se aakar mujhe galat tareeke se chhua tha, sir. Maine kitni himmat karke aapko bataya tha, socha tha insaaf milega. Aur ab ye faisla? Meri zindagi ka kya hoga, sir? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye tha, par ab toh sab khatam ho gaya lagta hai.

Sir, dekhiye na, ye Pankaj, jo Jai Prakash ka beta hai, isne toh meri zindagi haram kar di hai. Har waqt mera peecha karta hai, jahan jaati hoon, wahi aa jata hai. Phone kar karke tang karta hai, ab toh dar lagne laga hai. Aur Sir, isne toh meri chhoti beti ko bhi nahi chhoda. Uske saath bhi gandi harkatein karta hai, use galat tareeke se chhoota hai. Meri beti toh ab ghar se nikalne se bhi darti hai, itni saham gayi hai. Upar se dhamki deta hai ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh jaan se maar dega, sabko nuksaan pahunchayega. Hum sab bahut darr gaye hain Sir. Please, aap se request hai, usko pakdo aur usko saza dilao. Mujhe aur meri bachchi ko insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye, please. Jin logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi, mujhe cheda, mera pichha kiya, gandi baatein kahi, mujhe zabardasti roka tha... un sab ko court ne chhodi diya, Sir! Acquit ho gaye woh log, 27 August 2019 ko. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Meri izzat par haath daala, mujhe dhamkaya... aur unko koi saza nahi mili? Main kaise bardasht karoon yeh sab? Maine toh pehle bhi complain ki thi, 4 October ko... par kuch hua hi nahi. Ab main appeal kar rahi hoon, Sir. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Woh jo galti kiye hain, unko uski saza milni chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Himanshi, Devender Kumar ki beti hoon. Main aapko batana chahti hoon ki 10 June 2016 ko, shaam ke kareeb 7:30 baje, Sun Light Colony mein, mere ghar H.No. 44 ke paas, ek aadmi ne mujhpar hamla kiya. Usne mujhse zabardasti ki, meri izzat lootne ki niyat se. Main baar-baar usko mana karti rahi ki woh mujhse door rahe, mujhse baat na kare, but usne meri ek na suni. Woh mujhse personal interaction banana chahta tha aur mera peecha nahi chhod raha tha. Upar se usne mujhe dhamki bhi di, Sir. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, meri samajh mein nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Please uske khilaaf action lijiye.

Sir, main yahan apni purani complaint ke silsile mein aayi hoon. Meri FIR No. 151/13, jo R.K. Puram police station mein 10 May 2013 ko register hui thi, wo stalking (Section 354D) ka case tha. Aapko toh yaad hi hoga, usne kitna pareshan kiya tha mujhe. Bade mushkil se, itne saalon ki ladai ke baad, Patiala House Court ki judge Ms. Shivangi Vyas aur Ms. Prabh Deep Kaur ne usko saza sunayi thi 28 January 2020 aur 30 November 2021 ko. Mujhe laga tha ab toh sab khatam ho gaya, insaaf mil gaya. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Sir, meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi yeh sunke. Kya meri yeh itni badi jeet aise hi waste ho jayegi? Woh phir se mujhe tang karega? Aap please kuch dekhiye, humein darr lag raha hai phir se.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh ladka, jisne mujhe itna stalk kiya tha, meri zindagi mushkil kar di thi. Maine himmat karke uske khilaaf complaint ki thi. Karkardooma ki Mahila Court mein, Ritu Singh madam ne 24.08.2018 ko order diya tha ki us par Section 354D IPC ke तहत charges lagenge. Mujhe laga ab insaaf milega. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai, bol raha hai us par charge nahi lagna chahiye. Yeh toh galat hai na Sir? Woh meri life barbaad karke aise kaise bach sakta hai? Usne jo kiya hai, uski saza toh milni chahiye. Please Sir, meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf dilwao. Woh baar baar koshish kar raha hai bachne ki.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Yeh mera case chal raha hai na, CS(OS) 41/2020, usmein phir se nayi problem ho gayi hai. Woh saamne wala party, jinhone mere khilaaf case kiya hai, unka lawyer keh raha hai ki court fees kam padi thi. Ab court ne unko aur ek hafte ka time de diya hai, fees jama karne ke liye. Ek hafte ka extension! Saab, yeh log bas tareekh pe tareekh liye ja rahe hain, aur mera nuksaan ho raha hai. Pehle hi itna time waste ho gaya, ab aur ek hafte ka delay! Meri samajh mein nahi aa raha, main gareeb aadmi kahan tak chakkar lagata rahunga court ke? Meri suno, saab, yeh log jaan boojh ke case lamba khinch rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye jaldi se.

Sir, main Yamuna Depot Metro police station mein pehle bhi aayi thi. Meri ek complaint thi Akbar Malik ke khilaaf, FIR No. 49/2013. Usne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya tha, stalk karta tha, gandi-gandi baatein bolta tha (Sections 354D/509 IPC). Badi mushkil se, saalon ki ladai ke baad, 2017 mein usko trial court ne guilty mana aur saza sunai thi. Mujhe laga tha ab jaake insaaf mila hai, meri jaan chhooti hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh apni conviction ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Sir, agar woh phir se bahar aa gaya toh meri zindagi dobara barbaad ho jayegi. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Kya mera itna lamba sangharsh bekaar jayega? Please, aap meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main wohi lady hoon jisne Vijayanagar Police Station mein Crime No. 104/2021 wali FIR darj karayi thi. Yaad hai na, woh aadmi mujhe stalk karta tha (Section 354D), badtameezi karta tha (Section 504) aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi (Section 506 IPC)? Maine toh socha tha ab mujhe insaaf milega. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh gunda court mein chala gaya hai, khud hi apni petition daal kar meri puri FIR ko 'quash' karwana chahta hai! Meri sunwai bhi ho gayi hai wahan. Matlab, meri complaint ko khatam karwana chahta hai! Kya usko itni himmat kaise mili? Meri baat kaun sunega Sir? Usne jo kiya, woh sab galat tha, aur ab woh meri hi awaaz dabana chahta hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai aur insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Amar Colony se aayi hoon. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Ek ladka pichle kai dino se mera peecha kar raha hai. Main college jaun ya market, woh har jagah follow karta hai. Mujhe online bhi disturb karta hai. Kal toh usne hadd hi kar di, raste mein mujhe rok kar badtameezi ki, gande comments paas kiye aur jab maine protest kiya toh meri izzat pe haath daalne ki koshish bhi ki. Upar se dhamki de raha hai ki agar maine complain ki toh mujhe jaan se maar dega. Meri zindagi narak ban gayi hai, sir. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Please uske khilaf action lijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi us maamle mein. Jab Sessions Case No. 28241/2016 ka faisla aaya tha, toh mujhe laga chalo ab thoda sukoon milega. Woh jo accused tha, jise saza mili thi, usne ab phir se appeal kar di hai! Yeh Tis Hazari court mein, Section 374(2) Cr.P.C. ke तहत appeal bol rahe hain. Sir, meri toh himmat nahi hai aur ladne ki. Woh aadmi phir se mujhe pareshan karega, mujhe dar lag raha hai. Ek aam insaan hoon main, baar baar court ke chakkar kaise lagaun? Please aap meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya ho gaya hai, meri toh neend haram ho gayi hai in sab sarkari kaagazon ki wajah se. Woh jo pichle saal ek order aaya tha na, D.O. No.141/2021, jo 25.01.2021 ko nikla tha, uski wajah se meri toh zindagi hi ulajh gayi hai. Uske baad ek aur naya order aa gaya, No.204/T1/2021, 26.07.2021 ko. Aur phir 17.08. ko bhi kuchh aur papers aaye hain. Yeh bade babu log pata nahi mere saath aisa kyun kar rahe hain! Main toh bas itna chahta hoon ki yeh jitne bhi orders hain, yeh sab galat hain. Inko radd karwa do Sir, please. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai in documents ki wajah se.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mera toh dimag ghoom gaya hai iss court-kacheri ke chakkar mein. Ek toh case itna lamba khinch raha hai, upar se, opposite party ne toh wakiilon ki poori fauj utaar di hai mere khilaaf. Jo unke bade wakiil hain, Dr. N. K. Shukla saab, unke saath bhi do aur hain – Arijit Tiwari aur Rashika Soni ji. Aur sir, jo 'Objector' hain, unke toh ginati hi mat poochhiye! B. P. Sharma ji hain, M. L. Saket ji, Raza Ali, Anuja Sharma ji, Sameeksha Gupta ji, aur Nitesh Jain ji – chhah-chhah log! Sirf ek baat pe objection ke liye! Aur sarkari wakiil, Shri Adil Minhaz ji, woh alag hain. Main toh ek akela aadmi, itne saare wakiilon ka saamna kaise karunga? Mujhe toh dar lag raha hai, sir, kahin meri baat dab na jaaye. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon... meri ek bahut badi pareshaani hai. Pichle saal, woh jo ganda aadmi tha na, usne meri beti ko bahut pareshaan kiya tha. Uski wajah se toh humari zindagi nark ban gayi thi. Police ne badi mushkil se FIR ki, case chala Bikaner court mein. Pichle saal 9 February ko, judge साहब ne finally us par charges frame kiye the. Haan, woh POCSO ke under aur 354D IPC mein bhi tha, chhedchhad aur peecha karne ka case. Humein laga tha ab insaaf milega. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, woh ganda aadmi, us order ko challenge karne high court chala gaya hai! Yeh kya ho raha hai Sir? Kya woh aise hi bach jayega? Hum garib log kahan jayenge? Mujhe darr lag raha hai, please meri madad kijiye. Usko saza milni chahiye, usko bachne mat dijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mera toh sab kuch barbaad ho gaya hai. Woh jo mera case chal raha tha na, Crl.M.C. No. 9610/2002, usme ab order aa gaya hai. Justice Hema ji ne 23 May, 2005 ko faisla suna diya. Itne saalon se main intezaar kar rahi thi, socha tha shayad ab insaaf milega, par dekhiye mere saath kya hua! Kehte hain ki 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments hain, itne kanoon hain desh mein, par ek gareeb ko insaaf nahi milta. Meri toh suni hi nahi gayi. Woh log jo meri zindagi barbaad kar gaye, unko toh chhutti mil gayi. Ab main kahan jaun, Sir? Meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main Sona Devi ka bhai hoon. Meri behen, Sona Devi, sirf 23 saal ki thi. Aaj 18 July 2015 ko, dopahar mein kareeb 3 baje ke aas-paas humein pata chala ki woh ab nahi rahi. Aur log keh rahe hain ki usne suicide kar liya! Sir, meri Sona aisi nahi thi, woh bahut himmatwali thi. Woh suicide nahi kar sakti! Uska body seedha Ghazipur cremation ground le gaye, bina humein poori baat bataye. Yeh sab kaise ho gaya? Mujhe pakka lagta hai ki uske saath kuch galat hua hai. Kripya iski achhe se jaanch kijiye, sir. Meri behen ko insaaf chahiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir.

Sir, main apni complaint leke aayi hoon. Meri shaadi 18 May, 2005 ko hui thi, Tutus Gunaraj se. Pehle sab theek tha, par ab Sahab, mere pati ka kisi aur aurat ke saath chakkar chal raha hai. Jab mujhe is bare mein pata chala aur maine unse poocha, toh unhone mujhe bahut maara-peeta, gaaliyan di aur meri zindagi mushkil kar di. Meri saari khushiyan cheen li us aurat ke chakkar mein. Ab toh, Sahab, unhone mujhe ghar se hi nikaal diya hai, akela chhod diya. Main kahan jaaun? Mujhe nyay chahiye, Sahab. Meri madad karo.

Sir, meri beti Savitri ki shaadi 1980 mein hui thi. Bas char saal hi huye the uski shaadi ko, aur phir... 31 July 1984 ki raat, subah 2:30 baje usko Rohtak ke Civil Hospital laaya gaya. Woh buri tarah zakhmi thi, Sir. Doctor ne toh turant 3:30 baje police ko khabar bhi de di thi. Par... woh bach nahi paayi, Sir. Usi subah 7:10 baje Savitri humein chhod kar chali gayi, uski death ho gayi. Doctor ne phir se police ko inform kiya. Meri beti ke saath bahut galat hua hai. Uske pati ne hi kiya hoga, Sir. Mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye, please.

Sir, main Ramwati, meri beti ke liye insaaf maangne aayi hoon. Court ne uske pati ko 498A aur 306 IPC mein guilty toh mana tha, ki usne meri beti ko torture kiya aur suicide ke liye majboor kiya. Par unhein 302 (murder) aur 304B (dowry death) se toh pehle hi bari kar diya tha. Ab sun rahi hoon, woh us judgment ko bhi challenge kar rahe hain! Kya matlab hai iska? Jo thodi bahut justice mili thi, usko bhi khatam karna chahte hain? Meri beti aise hi nahi marr gayi thi, Sir. Un logon ki wajah se mari thi. Mujhe meri beti ke liye poora insaaf chahiye, unko kisi bhi tarah ki chhoot nahi milni chahiye. Please meri help kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Mera woh purana case tha na, FA No. 12 of 2001, uska jo judgment 25 April 2003 ko aaya tha, maine usko dobara review karne ki application di hai. Mere vakil Mr. Dasgupta ne bhi yahi kaha hai ki court ne saare saboot theek se dekhe hi nahi the. Meri biwi ne na, mere khilaaf ekdum jhoote aur badtameezi wale ilzaam lagaye the. Sir, woh sab kuch jhooth tha! Usne jo allegations lagaye the, woh mere liye seedha seedha cruelty thi. Meri izzat mitti mein mila di thi usne, aur court ne us waqt dhyan hi nahi diya. Main bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Yeh toh zulm hua hai mere saath.

Sir, main bohot pareshaan hoon. Aap meri baat suniye na. Mujhe laga tha ab jaakar thoda sukoon milega, jab Alamin ko saza mili thi. 04.04.2019 ko, Udaipur ke Gomati Judicial District ke Sessions Judge saab ne usey convict kiya tha, case number ST 21 (GT/U) of 2018 mein. Mujhe yaad hai woh din. Meri puri family ko insaaf mila tha. Par ab sun rahi hoon ki Alamin ne appeal daal di hai! Woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh jaan nikal rahi hai yeh sochkar. Humne itni mushkil se woh case jeeta tha. Please, kuch kijiye. Mujhe darr lag raha hai. Kya mujhe phir se wahi sab dekhna padega?

Sir, suniye na, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai! Woh Bansiya aur uske baap Chela Ram ne mere apne ko itna tang kiya ki usne apni jaan de di. Pata hai, Sir, Balotra Sessions Judge sahab ne bhi dekha tha, 19-6-92 ko un dono ko Section 306 IPC mein doshi thehraya tha. Bansiya ko toh 7 saal ki rigorous imprisonment aur do hazaar ka fine hua tha, aur Chela Ram ko 5 saal ki kaid. Humein laga tha thodi shanti milegi, par ab woh appeal kar rahe hain. Meri toh jaan nikalti jaa rahi hai, Sir. Yeh log humein chain se jeene nahi denge. Aap bas ye dekh lijiye ki unhein unke kiye ki saza mile aur humein insaaf milta rahe.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe State Bank of India, Ernakulam mein meri naukri se nikal diya gaya hai. Deputy General Manager sahab ne bina wajah mujhe hata diya. Meri toh poori zindagi isi job par depend karti thi, mera ghar-parivaar kaise chalega ab? Maine iske khilaaf court mein petition bhi daali thi, ki mujhe meri naukri wapas mile, mere saare benefits milen jis din se unhone mujhe nikala hai. Lekin Sir, meri woh writ petition bhi reject ho gayi. Main toh haar gaya hoon, meri toh koi sunta hi nahi hai. Aap hi bataiye main ab kya karu? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, meri naukri wapas dilwa dijiye, please.

Sir, meri report jo police ne file ki thi, woh Kancheepuram ke Judicial Magistrate-II tak pahunchi thi. Mujhe laga, chalo ab kuch hoga. Par, Magistrate sahab ne kaha ki mera case toh Sessions Court mein hi chalega, toh unhone Chengalpattu ke Principal District and Sessions Judge ko forward kar diya. Main toh soch rahi thi, aur kitne dardon se guzarna padega, kitne offices ke chakkar! Phir Chengalpattu se mera case Mahila Court mein bhej diya gaya. Thodi tasalli mili, ki chalo Mahila Court hai, shayad jaldi sunwai ho. Aur ab finally, Mahila Court ne mera case SC.No.9 of 2008 mein file pe le liya hai. Sir, bas ab toh umeed hai ki mujhe insaaf milega, bahut intezaar kar liya.

Sir, dekho na, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Paritosh Nath alias Babu, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, usko court ne pehle saza sunayi thi. Yaad hai na, 27 June 2019 ko Sessions Judge sahab ne usko convict kiya tha. Meri jaan mein jaan aayi thi us din. Socha tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki usne appeal daal di hai! Section 374(2) Cr.P.C. ke तहत. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri case No. S.T.(T-1) 16 of 2018 hai. Us Dharmanagar court mein. Sir, woh phir se baahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Mujhe darr lag raha hai. Kya meri saari mehnat waste ho jayegi? Please, meri help karo. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mera pati hai na, woh Agartala Family Court mein mere khilaaf case kar diya hai. Kehta hai ki main uske saath bahut cruelty karti hoon, aur usko chhod ke chali gayi (desertion). Jabki aisa kuch bhi nahi hai, sir! Maine toh hamesha uski baat maani, ghar sambhala. Ab woh Hindu Marriage Act, 1955 ke Section 13 mein mujhse talaq maang raha hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karu. Yeh toh bilkul jhooth hai, woh mujhe badnaam kar raha hai aur mera ghar todna chahta hai. Please meri madad karo, sir. Main toh bechari aurat hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh jo mujrim hai na, jiske khilaaf 1986 mein case chala tha Pune mein, woh abhi tak mujhe chain se jeene nahi de raha hai. Socho, 1987 mein hi Sessions Judge sahab ne usko saza di thi, uski galti confirm kar di thi. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya, par nahi! Woh toh abhi tak appeal pe appeal daale ja raha hai, case ko kheenche ja raha hai. Uska wahi bada vakil Deshpande sahab har baar aa jate hain. Hum gareeb log kab tak in courts ke chakkar kaatenge, sir? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai is sab mein. Bas, ab usko aur mauka mat do. Mujhe meri shanti chahiye, sir. Kya meri zindagi yahi dekhte dekhte khatam ho jayegi?

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitne saalon se pareshaan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Yeh FA No. 12 of 2001 wala case hai na, usmein 25th April, 2003 ko jo judgement aaya tha, main usse bilkul khush nahi hoon. Meri biwi ne mere khilaaf jhoothe aur bade-bade ilzaam lagaye the, Sir. Ussne meri reputation kharab ki, aur yeh sab mere liye toh sidhi-sidhi 'cruelty' thi. Mere advocate, Dasgupta ji, bhi yahi bol rahe hain ki Court ne uss time saare facts theek se dekhe hi nahi. Saaf-saaf dikh raha tha ki woh jhoot bol rahi thi, but Court ne overlook kar diya. Ab main is judgement ko review karwana chahta hoon. Kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega? Itne saal ho gaye, mujhe bas nyay chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Begum Pur police station ne pehle bhi case file kiya tha. Meri beti ko uske pati, Ram Gopal, aur saas, Tara Devi, ne dahej ke liye bahut sataya, bahut tang kiya. Unhone meri beti ki zindagi nark bana di thi, aur phir uski jaan le li. Yeh dowry death ka case hai, sir. Aaj tak mujhe samajh nahi aaya, Tara Devi toh court se pehle hi chhoot gayi, 19 March 2015 ko. Kaise? Woh bhi barabar ki mujrim thi. Ab bas Ram Gopal par case chal raha hai. Main chahta hoon ki Ram Gopal ko kadi se kadi saza mile. Meri beti ko justice milna chahiye. Sir, please meri suniye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri shaadi puri tarah se toot chuki hai, main apni biwi se divorce chahta hoon. Iske liye main Balodabazar ke Family Court mein gaya tha, HMA No.105A/2022 case tha mera. Maine divorce ki application di thi, par judge साहब ने 18 January 2023 ko jo faisla sunaya, woh mere haque mein nahi tha. Meri application reject ho gayi, ya mujhe laga ki insaaf nahi mila. Ab main us faisle ko challenge karne ke liye upar ki adalat mein ja raha hoon. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh shaadi ab aur nahi chal sakti, meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Meri do FIRs thi na, jinka main itne time se peecha kar raha tha, ek Bengaluru mein aur ek Mangalore mein. Bengaluru mein jo Crime No. 295 wali FIR thi, 7th Additional Chief Metropolitan Magistrate Court mein, woh toh ab khatam ho gayi hai, quash ho gayi hai. Aur Mangalore wali bhi, Crime No. 176, 6th Judicial Magistrate First Class Court mein jo thi, woh bhi quash ho gayi hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Itne saal maine insaaf ke liye ladai ki, itni daud-bhaag ki. Meri toh saari mehnat paani mein chali gayi. Hum jaise aam logon ke liye koi insaaf nahi hai kya? Woh bade-bade kaanoon, woh 4 crore judgments, woh sab humaare kya kaam ke? Police station mein complaint ki, courts mein chakkar kaate, aur ab sab khatam? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, ab main kya karoon? Kahan jaaun?

Sir, main aapke paas badi mushkil se aayi hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Pehle toh Bengaluru mein ek case chal raha tha mera, woh Crime Number 295 wala, woh pata nahi kaise court ne quash kar diya, yaani meri FIR hi cancel kar di! Maine itni umeed lagai thi, socha tha ab toh insaaf milega. Aur abhi, Mangalore mein bhi ek aur case tha mera, woh Crime Number 176 wala, woh bhi band karwa diya un logon ne. Meri toh zindagi jhand ho gayi hai sir. Jin logon ne mere saath galat kiya, woh toh ab maze mein ghoom rahe hain. Main kahan jaaun ab? Meri sunvai toh kahi ho hi nahi rahi. Kya gareeb ko insaaf nahi milta? Sir, please kuch kijiye. Meri puri ummeed aap par hai. Mujhe bas mera insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, isliye aapke paas aayi hoon. Meri shaadi ke baad se hi mere pati aur unke gharwalon ne meri zindagi hell bana di hai. Dahej ke liye itna sataya, maara peeta. Meri saari jewelry aur saman bhi nahi wapas kiya. Aur toh aur, mere pati ne chori-chhupe doosri shaadi bhi kar li! Jab maine himmat karke police mein report likhwai thi, woh Pandua P.S. ke do cases the - ek 2021 mein aur doosra bhi usi saal. Ab woh log court mein application dekar mere cases khatam karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Woh mujhe dhamkiyaan dete hain aur meri izzat uchhalte hain. Sir, meri request hai, please unhe aisa karne mat dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera to dil toot gaya hai. Jiske saath meri shaadi fix thi, woh ladka... ek vakeel ko lekar mere paas aaya aur saaf bol diya ki humari shaadi nahi ho sakti. Kehta hai, humari jaati alag hai aur uske ghar wale kabhi nahi manenge is rishte ko. Sir, maine kitne sapne dekhe the! Jab usne aise bola, main ro-ro ke paagal ho gayi. Phir main uski mummy ke paas bhi gayi thi. Unhe bhi bataya ki aapka beta kaise mera future barbaad kar raha hai, uska yeh kaisa attitude hai. Par koi sunwai nahi ho rahi, sir. Ab main kahan jaun, kya karun?

Sir ji, main apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Meri beti ko unhone Uttam Nagar mein dahej ke liye itna sataya, itni maar-peet ki ki uski jaan le li! Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki Uttam Nagar police station ne un sab ke khilaaf, meri beti ke pati aur sasural walon ke khilaaf, court mein challan file kar diya hai. Matlab, jo judge sahab hain, Metropolitan Magistrate, unke saamne ab case chalega. Police ne Sections 498A aur 304B ke तहत unpar case banaya hai, dahej aur cruelty ka. Un accused logon ko paper-work bhi mil gaya hai. Sir, ab unka trial shuru hoga. Meri bas yahi request hai ki unhe jaldi se jaldi aur kadi se kadi sazaa mile. Meri beti ko न्याय मिलना चाहिए!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh zindagi hi mushkil ho gayi hai. Main ek ladke ke saath live-in mein rehti hoon. Ab aap hi bataiye, yeh koi crime thodi hai? Maine toh suna hai ki court bhi kehta hai ki yeh mera personal decision hai, ki main shaadi karun ya na karun. Lekin yahan society wale, mohalle wale, sab mujhe aur usko jeene nahi de rahe. Kabhi taane marte hain, kabhi ghar ke bahar khade ho jaate hain, dhamkiyan dete hain. Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai, sir. Mera toh bas yahi kehna hai ki jab yeh legally galat nahi hai, toh log hamein kyun pareshan kar rahe hain? Humein aapki protection chahiye, sir. Aap hi kuch kijiye, hum bahut pareshaan hain.

Sir, meri suniye na, main bahut dukhi hoon. Mere pati aur sasural walon ne mujhe itna tang kiya, itni beizzati ki, itni maar-peet ki... aur bhi bahut kuch. Unki cruelty ki wajah se main wahan aur reh nahi paayi, unhone mujhe ghar se nikaal diya. Ab main apne mummy-papa ke paas, apne ghar pe sharan li hui hoon. Mujhe un sabke khilaaf action lena hai, unko unki harkaton ki saza dilani hai. Lekin main samajh nahi paa rahi ki kya main yahin se, jahan ab main reh rahi hoon, yahin se case kar sakti hoon? Ya mujhe wapas unke shehar jaana padega? Main bahut darr rahi hoon. Please meri madad kijiye, Sir. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main Inderjit Kaur Sidhu. Meri ek complaint hai, Naraina police station mein FIR No. 146/99. Maine apne sasur Raj Kumar Khanna aur unke poore parivaar ke khilaaf 498A aur 406 IPC ke तहत case file kiya tha. Un logon ne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya, dahej ke liye tang karte the aur mera saara streedhan (dowry articles) bhi rakh liya. Ab sir, woh log court mein meri FIR hi cancel karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Unke bade-bade lawyers hain, woh toh bas case ko khatam karna chahte hain. Main ek aam aurat hoon, kahan jaungi? Mere saath jo galat hua hai, uski toh sunwai honi chahiye na? Meri madad karo sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko apni pehle wali complaint ke baare mein batane aayi hoon. Meri shaadi ke baad, mere pati aur unke gharwalon ne mera saara dowry ka samaan aur mera stridhan hadap liya tha. Maine iski complaint ki thi aur police ne charge sheet bhi file ki thi. Magar Sir, ab jo court ka order aaya hai, Ms. Nisha Saxena ji ne 13.3.2002 ko jo faisla sunaya hai, usse main bilkul khush nahi hoon. Unhone sirf mere pati aur mere sasur par Section 406 IPC ke तहत dowry ke samaan aur mere stridhan ki hera-pheri ka case banaya hai. Baaki logon ko chhod diya. Mujhe lagta hai ki yeh galat hua hai, aur main chahti hoon ki meri baat dobara suni jaye, mujhe insaaf mile.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi thi. Mere pati ka chakkar chal raha tha doosri aurat ke saath. Mujhe itna dukh hua, itna akelapan mehsoos hua ki maine apne papa ko sab khat mein likh diya. Yaad hai mujhe, 2 July 1993 ko ek letter likha tha, sab bataya tha usmein unko. Kaise woh doosri aurat mere pati ke pichhe padi hai. Pata hai sir, mere sasur ji bhi uss aurat ke ghar gaye the, ek baar nahi, do-do baar! Usse samjhane ke liye ki woh mere pati ko chhod de. Usse advice bhi di thi ki jaldi se shaadi kar le kahin aur. Maine bhi koshish ki thi, main bhi gayi thi unse baat karne, par sab bekar. Meri kisi ne nahi suni, sir. Bas insaaf chahiye mujhe.

Sir, main kya bataun... meri beti ke saath jo kiya unhone, dahej ke liye usko maara, itna pareshaan kiya. Itne saal case chala, hum court ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke thak gaye. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki court ne maana ki haan, uske saath zulm hua, Section 498A mein teen saal ki kathor kaid hui hai unko. Theek hai. Par Sir, meri beti toh mar gayi, dahej ke liye maari gayi thi! Uss bade aarop, 304B, mein toh unko chhod diya? Yeh toh bahut galat baat hai. Aur ab toh woh upar appeal mein bhi chale gaye hain apni saza kam karwane ke liye. Humko toh poora insaaf mila hi nahi Sir. Aap hi batao, meri beti ko justice kaise milega? Unko toh poori saza milni chahiye thi.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri shaadi koi mazak thodi na thi? Hum Hindu log, humare liye toh shaadi janam-janam ka rishta hota hai, ek pavitra sanskar hota hai, Sir! Ek aatma ka doosri aatma se milan hota hai. Kya pyaar, kya apnapan, kya fikar... sab kuch hota hai pati-patni ke beech. Maine toh socha tha ki yeh rishta poori zindagi chalega, bachche honge, parivaar aage badhega. Yeh toh humare dharm ka ek sabse important sanskar hai. Lekin ab toh sab kuch bikhar gaya hai, Sir. Yeh log humare pavitra rishte ki koi izzat hi nahi karte. Meri toh saari ummeedien toot gayi hain. Mujhe nyay chahiye, Sir!

Sir, meri baat suno toh sahi, main bahut pareshan hoon. Yeh jo aap log kehte ho na ki chaar crore se zyada judgments aur kanoon hain, mujhe toh sun ke hi darr lagta hai. Itne saare kanoon hain, phir bhi hum jaise aam logon ko insaaf milna itna mushkil kyun hai? Mujhe lagta hai, yeh sab jo system bana hai, yeh lawyers ke liye hai, bade-bade researchers, students aur institutions ke liye hai. Hum jaise gareeb, anpadh logon ke liye toh koi jagah hi nahi hai ismein. Jab hum jaate hain, toh sab bolte hain 'bahut complex case hai', 'bahut paperwork hai'. Sir, mujhe toh bas mera haq chahiye. Kya hum jaise logon ko insaaf milne ka koi tareeka nahi hai? Yeh saara system sirf bade logon ke liye bana hai kya?

Sir, main Rama ka baap hoon. Meri beti Rama ko Kuldeep Seth ke bete ne maar dala tha, sir! Uski shaadi toh bas 2.12.1984 ko hui thi, aur 22.11.1986 ko woh chali gayi. Humne toh pehle hi bola tha, woh log usko bahut tang karte the, dahej ke liye maarte the. Humein toh bas kisi ne inform kiya tha ki us Kuldeep Seth ke bete ne kuch kiya hai. Delhi High Court mein case chal raha tha. Abhi jo judgment aaya hai na, usmein usko 304B (dowry death) se toh acquittal mil gaya! Yeh toh sarasar galat hai, Sir. Meri beti ki maut ka insaaf kahan? Lekin haan, 498A (cruelty) mein usko guilty mana hai aur 3 saal ki rigorous imprisonment di hai. Par Sir, yeh kam hai! Meri beti ki jaan gayi hai! Humein pura insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please humari madad kijiye.

Sir, main Usha Devi hoon. Meri suniye, Sir. Maine apne pati Surendra Singh ke khilaaf pehle bhi FIR darj karai thi. Usne mujhe kitna sataya, kitni zyadti ki, maine toh uski legally wedded doosri biwi hoon! Usne mera samaan, sab kuch le liya. Par abhi haal hi mein, 20 March 2002 ko, Ballia ke ACJM saab ne use saare ilzamon se bari kar diya, Sir! Sections 405 aur 498A IPC mein use not guilty bol diya gaya. Ye kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri sari shikayaton ko court ne maana hi nahi. Woh aise hi khule ghoom raha hai, aur main yahan dukhi hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main Lata Devi, meri beti ko un logon ne toh maar hi daala. Uski shaadi ke baad se hi uska pati aur uske ghar wale (sasural wale) usko bahut pareshaan karte the, dahej ke liye use torture karte the. Meri beti bechari, unki maar-peet aur taano se tang aakar suicide kar baithi. Aur uske baad, unhone toh saare saboot bhi mitaane ki koshish ki thi, jaise kuch hua hi nahi. Jamnagar ke Additional Sessions Judge ne unko *guilty* declare kiya tha, mere allegations sahi maane the. High Court ne bhi unki *conviction* ko *confirm* kar diya. Ab sun rahi hoon, woh log Supreme Court mein *appeal* karne gaye hain. Sahab, itni ladai ke baad bhi kya meri beti ke katil bach jayenge? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri beti ko toh wapas laa nahi sakte, par unko saza toh milni chahiye na!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... mera to dimag kharab ho gaya hai in sab kanooni chakkar mein. Jis aadmi ne mere saath galat kiya tha, use pehle Rajgarh ke ACJM sahib ne 16-17 February 2006 ko guilty maana tha, haan, convict kiya tha. Mujhe thoda sukoon mila. Phir usne Nahan mein Sessions Judge sahib ke paas appeal daali. Wahan bhi 9 December 2009 ko, Judge sahib ne meri suni aur uski conviction barkaraar rakhi. Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh mein, do-do baar usko doshi thehraya gaya! Ab sun raha hoon ki woh phir se koi 'criminal revision petition' laga raha hai. Yeh kya mazaak hai? Ek baar, do baar, teen baar... kya kabhi mujhe insaaf poora nahi milega? Kya woh aise hi ghoomta rahega? Mujhe darr lagta hai, sir. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh saza kaate!

Sir ji, main yahan bahut dukhi aur pareshan hoke aayi hoon. Meri shaadi ka case hai, mere pati Balbir Singh ne mere khilaaf divorce file kiya tha. Aur abhi pichli baar, court ne, woh 26 April 1990 ka jo order tha, usmein hamari shaadi khatam karne ka faisla suna diya. Judge sahab ne bhi woh pehle wala decision pakka kar diya. Mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha, sir, mera kya kasoor hai? Main toh bas yahi chahti hoon ki yeh jo judgement hai, isko please wapas liya jaye. Meri shaadi ko wapas jod diya jaye. Yeh Hindu Marriage Act ke Section 13 ke under Balbir ne yeh sab kiya hai, par main toh sirf apna ghar bachana chahti hoon. Aap meri madad kijiye, sir, please.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya/aayi hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, jismein main bahut saalon se pareshan hoon. Pehle Trial Court mein bhi meri sunwai nahi hui thi, aur ab toh High Court ne bhi... Jharkhand High Court ke ek judge sahab ne 29 April, 2009 ko ek order diya tha. Us order mein bhi meri appeal reject kar di gayi, sir! Unhone bola ki main case se discharge nahi ho sakta/sakti, aur Trial Court ka faisla hi sahi hai. Matlab, main abhi bhi is case mein phansa/phasi hui hoon. Aur saamne woh Asha Rani Pal hai. Sir, itne saal ho gaye, 2009 ka mamla hai, meri zindagi kharab ho gayi hai. Mujhe is case se nikalna hai, sir! Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Kiran Sinha hoon. Meri shaadi Amrendu J. se hui thi, aur unhone aur unke gharwalon ne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya, dahej ke liye. Isiliye mere papa, Madhusudan Sinha ne 31-12-2005 ko Ambikapur police station mein FIR karayi thi. Police ne poori jaanch ki, aur Section 498A IPC ke तहत charge-sheet bhi file ho chuki hai Chief Judicial Magistrate ke saamne. Ab Sir, ye log, mere husband aur unke pariwar wale, court mein application lagakar case ko quash karwana chahte hain. Poori proceedings khatam karwana chahte hain. Sir, itni mushkil se mera case yahan tak pahuncha hai. Agar ye quash ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Please, inka application reject hona chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, sir!

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon kyunki mera pati, jisne meri zindagi barbaad ki, ab keh raha hai ki jab uske baki gharwale toh bari ho gaye, toh usko bhi chhod do. Kya matlab hai Sir? Unko chhod diya toh isne jo kiya uska kya? Aur toh aur, Sir, ab woh yeh bhi keh raha hai ki humari shaadi valid hi nahi thi! Kya mazak hai yeh? Poore reeti-riwaz se shaadi hui thi meri. Mandap mein, agni ke saamne kasme khaaye the. Shaadi koi khel nahi hoti, Sir. Yeh toh do aatmaon ka milan hota hai, pyaar, bharosa sab hota hai isme. Meri poori zindagi uske naam kar di, aur ab woh aise palat raha hai. Uska lawyer keh raha hai case band kar do. Nahin Sir, usko aise nahi chhod sakte.
