Meri shaadi sach thi, aur usne jo kiya hai, uski saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main Vibha ki maa hoon. Meri beti ke saath bahut galat hua tha. Uske shauhar ne usko itna pareshan kiya, maar-peet ki, aur phir uski jaan le li. Poore gaon ko pata hai kya haal tha meri beti ka. Jab Sessions Court ne usko Section 498A aur 302 IPC ke तहत saza sunayi thi, tab thodi shanti mili thi. Humne socha tha, chalo, meri beti ko insaaf mila. Lekin ab yeh kya sunne mein aa raha hai? Bombay High Court ne us mujrim ko chhod diya? Usne meri beti ko maara tha, Sir! Meri beti ki hatya ka ilzaam us par tha aur ab use ba-izzat bari kar diya? Yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Main aap se hath jod kar guzarish karti hoon, mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye. Us qaatil ko saza milni chahiye. Please, Sir, kuch kijiye.

Sir, meri beti ne suicide kar liya tha, uske pati ki wajah se. Usne meri beti ko itna pareshan kiya, itni maarpeet ki, dahej ke liye tang kiya ki woh bechari toot gayi aur majboor hokar yeh kadam utha liya. Usne hi meri beti ko marne ke liye uksaya tha. Sessions Court mein judge sahib ne usko, uske pati ko, Sections 306 aur 498A IPC ke tehat doshi mana aur saza bhi sunai thi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin, uski behen ko toh chhod diya gaya, jabki woh bhi meri beti ko bahut tang karti thi. Aur ab, woh kambakht High Court chala gaya hai, apni saza kam karwane ke liye! Sir, hum gareeb log hain, humein insaaf chahiye. Meri beti ko justice milna chahiye. Usne jo kiya, uski poori saza usko milni chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Ramvati. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, woh aapko pata hi hai. Un logon ne meri beti ko itna pareshan kiya, itna torture kiya ki usne apni jaan de di. 2013 mein court ne unko saza bhi sunayi thi, 6 saal ki rigorous imprisonment hui thi unko 306 aur 498-A mein. Humein laga tha ab finally thoda insaaf milega. Lekin sir, ab khabar aayi hai ki woh log appeal mein hi mar gaye hain. Matlab, unhone poori saza kaati bhi nahi, aur ab case bhi khatam ho gaya? Meri beti ko kya insaaf mila phir? Itne saal ladte rahe, police station ke chakkar kaate, court gaye, aur end mein yeh? Mujhe toh laga tha ki kanoon sabko dekhta hai, par yahan toh lagta hai woh maut se bhi bach gaye. Bahut dukh ho raha hai, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko pata hai, mera jo apna tha, usne suicide kar liya tha... Anil Patel ki wajah se. Bohot mushkil se, teen saal ho gaye the, 2009 se case chal raha tha. Phir jaakar, 17 February 2011 ko, Maihar Court ne usko Section 306 IPC mein convict kiya, teen saal ki saza bhi sunai thi. Hazaar rupaye fine bhi laga tha. Hum thode shaant hue the ki chalo justice mila. Par ab Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh Anil Patel, Ramji Patel ka beta, usne appeal kar di hai 23 February ko. Woh toh chahta hai ki usko saza na mile! Hamare saath itna bada dhoka hua hai, humne apna sab kuch kho diya, aur woh ab saza se bachna chahta hai? Kripya karke Sir, aap kuch kijiye. Meri toh bas itni request hai ki usko saza milni chahiye. Usne jo kiya hai, uski saza toh bhugatni hi padegi.

Sahab, main bahut dukhi aur pareshan hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, uski yaad aate hi dil baith jaata hai. Uske sasural walon ne usse itna tang kiya, itna zulum dhaya ki bechari ne majboori mein apni jaan de di. Unko Sections 306 aur 498A ke तहत Saza bhi hui thi. Sessions Court ne teen saal ki jail aur paanch hazaar ka fine lagaya tha, aur fir 2003 mein Bombay High Court ne bhi us faisle ko barkarar rakha. Lekin sahab, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log High Court ke decision ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Matlab, unki saza kam ho sakti hai ya woh chhoot bhi sakte hain? Humne kitni mushkil se insaaf paya tha. Meri beti toh wapas nahi aa sakti, par uske gunahgaron ko saza toh milni chahiye. Aap kuch kijiye, sahab, mujhe dar hai ki kahin phir se humare saath be-insaafi na ho jaaye.

Sir, main Suntia Malik. Mujhe help chahiye. Maine bade mushkil se ek complaint file ki thi court mein. Mere saath bahut galat hua tha. Uspe, Shri R. K. Jain sahab, jo hamare Metropolitan Magistrate hain New Delhi mein, unhone meri suni aur Inder Raj Malik aur teen aur logon ko summon kiya tha. Matlab unko bulaya tha court mein, ki unhone galat kiya hai. Magar sir, ab pata chala hai ki wo log (Inder Raj Malik aur baaki) ek aur petition leke pahunch gaye hain. Mere hi case ke against, mere hi summons ko challenge kar rahe hain. Iska matlab kya hai, sir? Meri to koi sunwai hi nahi ho rahi. Main itni pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf kab milega? Yeh log baar baar tareekh pe tareekh karwa rahe hain, mujhe bas justice chahiye.

Sir, main Priyanka ki maa hoon. Meri beti Priyanka ko uske sasural walon ne, Ramesh ne, uske saas-sasur Sahib Singh aur Raj Rani ne, aur devar-nanad Manju, Ravinder, Sunil ne milkar maar dala hai. 6 November 2009 ko, woh log meri beti ko Saroj Hospital & Heart Institute, Rohini leke gaye, keh rahe the zehar kha liya. Par sir, yeh sab unka kiya-dhara hai. Meri bachchi wahan pahunchte hi mar gayi. Police station Alipur mein bhi khabar gayi thi, DD No. 21A mein likha hai. Sir, meri beti ko unhone bahut pareshaan kiya, aur ab zehar deke jaan le li. Mujhe meri beti ke liye insaaf chahiye, sir. Un sabko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main Madhu Bala. Aapko pata hai, main kitne mushkil se Ghaziabad mein apne pati aur sasural walon ke khilaaf complaint file ki thi. Unhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi, dahej ke liye kitna torture kiya tha. Ab jab main insaaf ke liye aage badhi hoon, toh yeh log naye-naye tareeke nikaal rahe hain mujhe aur pareshan karne ke. Court mein jaake bol rahe hain ki Ghaziabad ki adalat ka toh jurisdiction hi nahi hai! Matlab, woh chahte hain ki mera woh criminal case hi khatam ho jaaye, band ho jaaye, taaki unko koi saza na mile. Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha mere saath dhokha hai. Pehle toh pareshan karo, phir jab main aawaz uthaun, toh usko bhi daba do. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh log meri complaint band na karwa paayein, please kuch kijiye!

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Mere pati ne... meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Maine socha tha ki humara rishta poora hai, par unhone mujhse bina divorce liye, doosri shaadi kar li! Aur sir, hum abhi bhi ek hi ghar mein rehte hain, main unki pehli patni hoon! Yeh kaise kar sakte hain woh mere saath? Mujhe har din taane milte hain, apmaanit kiya jaata hai. Meri zindagi narak ban gayi hai. Mujhe itna dukh hai, itna dard hai ki main ab aur seh nahi sakti. Mujhe lagta hai main toot jaungi, main mar hi jaungi is sab se. Sir, yeh seedhi-seedhi zyadati hai, cruelty hai mere saath. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun? Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, main court ke chakkar kaat rahi hoon. Un logon ne, mere sasural walon ne, mujh par itna zulm kiya hai! Dahej ke liye maara-peeta, 498A ka case chal raha hai un par. Aur ab, ab woh log court mein application de rahe hain ki case hi khatam kar do! Woh jo A-6 hai na, woh bhi shaamil thi sab mein. Usne bhi mujhe bahut pareshaan kiya hai. Cheepurupalli court mein case chal raha hai, aur ab yeh log bol rahe hain ki unko is case se mukti chahiye. Kaise? Maine kitna kuch saha hai, mera ghar ujad gaya, aur yeh log aise hi bach nikalenge? Please sir, aisa mat hone dijiye. Meri suniye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh log yeh 498-A aur Dowry Act ke charges se bachna chahte hain. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... Meri shaadi 20 May, 2014 ko Nimeshbhai Desai se hui thi. Hum dono doctors hain, main pediatrician hoon aur woh bhi doctor hain. Socha tha sab theek ho jayega, par shaadi ke turant baad se hi problems shuru ho gayi, sir. Roj-roj ke jhagde, tanav... meri zindagi nark ban gayi hai. Woh log mujhe bahut pareshan karte hain. Ab toh hadd ho gayi hai, main aur nahi seh sakti yeh sab. Mujhe unse न्याय चाहिए, sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Baldev Raj hoon. Meri beti Kavita ka case hai yeh. Woh log jo meri beti ki maut ke zimmedar hain, unko court ne acquittal de diya hai. Kaise ho sakta hai yeh? Meri beti 6 July 1993 ko apne sasural ki chauthi manzil se gir kar mar gayi thi. Uska pati Chander Prakash aur baaki sab log usko dahej ke liye Section 498A ke तहत satate the, aur meri beti ki maut 304B IPC ka seedha-seedha mamla hai. Abhi pichle saal 6 July 2002 ko jo Additional Sessions Judge ka faisla aaya, usme sab ko baizzat bari kar diya gaya. Sir, yeh insaaf nahi hai. Main Baldev Raj, apni beti Kavita ke liye nyay chahta hoon. Kya meri beti ki jaan ki koi keemat nahi? Please meri help kijiye, sir. Woh log aise hi chhoot nahi sakte!

Sir, meri behen, Keno ka naam tha, Subasini Mohanty bhi bolte the usko. Uske sasural walon ne, khaaskar uski saas, Pramila Patnaik ne, meri behen ko bahut pareshan kiya. Dahej ke liye roz-roz taane marte the, maarpeet karte the. Bechaari ko itna sataya ki woh... woh mar gayi, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unhone meri masoom behen ki zindagi barbaad kar di. Woh log bahar ghoom rahe hain aur meri behen ki maut ka koi hisaab nahi hai. Un sabko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri behen ko unhone jaan se maar dala hai, sir. Us Pramila Patnaik aur uske saare ghar walon ko jail mein daalo. Bas itna hi chahiye mujhe.

Sir, main toh ek seedhi-saadi aurat hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ulat-pulat ho gayi thi. Bade mushkil se na, court ne mere pati ko convict kiya tha. Metropolitan Magistrate sahib ne unko saza bhi sunayi thi 31 March 2010 ko, aur phir sentence bhi sunaya tha 7 May 2010 ko. Mujhe laga tha, chalo, ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par woh na, uske baad Sessions Judge ke paas appeal karne chale gaye. Wahan se bhi unki appeal 18 August 2010 ko dismiss ho gayi. Maine socha, shukr hai Bhagwan ka, ab toh kissa khatam hua. Par ab phir se pata nahi kaun sa Section 397, 401 Cr.P.C. laga ke naya petition daal diya hai. Sir, main kitni baar court jaungi? Main toh bas itna chahti hoon ki jo pehle फैसला hua tha, wohi final ho. Mujhe aur nahi ladna. Main thak gayi hoon, bas insaaf chahiye aur shanti.

Sir, main yahan apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Meri beti ko uske sasural walon ne, uske pati ne, dahej ke liye itna sataya, itna maara... aakhir uski jaan le li. Humein poora yakeen hai ki unhone use maara hai, pehle dowry ke liye torture kiya aur phir usko maar dala. Humne complaint ki, case chala, kitni mushkil se charge sheet file hui thi Sections 498A, 304B, 306, aur Dowry Act ke तहत. Baad mein toh Section 302 bhi lag gaya tha. Lekin, ab Fast Track Court ne un sabko acquittal de diya! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri beti ki maut ka koi insaaf nahi? Woh log khule ghoom rahe hain. Main aapse request karta hoon, please is decision ko challenge kariye. Humne aap pe bharosa kiya tha. Woh log meri beti ke qatil hain, unhein saza milni chahiye. Please, humari madad kijiye.

Sahab, main wohi aurat hoon jiska case Mangalore ke JMFC (III Court) mein chal raha tha, C.C.No.5099/2007. Mere pati ne mujhe IPC ki dhara 498A aur 504 ke तहत bahut tang kiya tha, Sir. Kitne saal lage is struggle mein. Par ab jaakar mujhe insaaf mila hai. Court ne 24 April 2009 ko mere pati ko convict kar diya hai, Sir. Haan, 498A mein usko doshi paya gaya hai aur saza bhi mili hai. Pata nahi kitni takleef uthai hai maine, ab jaakar thodi himmat mili hai. Shukriya, Sir.

Sahab, main Ramu ka baap bol raha hoon. Meri beti ko unke pati aur sasural walon ne maar dala tha. Kitni takleefein di thi use, pehle roz marte the, fir jaan hi le li. Bahut mushkil se toh court ne unko guilty mana hai, life imprisonment aur teen saal ki saza bhi di hai, 28 October 2004 ko, Sessions Case No. 69/2004 mein. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, humein darr hai ki kahin woh log phir se bach na jayein. Itni kurbani di hai humne, aur abhi bhi nyay ke liye ladna pad raha hai. Meri beti ko toh lauta nahi sakte, par jo saza mili hai, woh toh barkarar rehni chahiye na? Please, aap kuch karo, humein pura nyay chahiye.

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mere pati aur sasural wale mujhe roz-roz mentally aur physically torture karte hain. Ye sab ek-do din ki baat nahi hai, saalon se chal raha hai. Har din meri izzat utarte hain, maar-peet bhi karte hain. Inki harkaton se meri jaan ko khatra hai. Sach kahun toh, main itni toot chuki hoon ki suicide tak ka khayal aata hai, ya fir mujhe lagta hai ki ye log mujhe itni gehri chot pahunchayenge ki main theek nahi ho paungi. Sir, yeh jo mere saath ho raha hai, yeh clearly 498A IPC ke under aata hai. Please, mujhe insaaf dilaiye, ab aur bardasht nahi hota.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri life hell ho gayi hai. Yeh Rajib Lochan Chakraborty aur Vaswati Chakraborty, in logon ne meri shaadi ko mazak bana rakha hai. Aur woh Subhadip Chakraborty, advocate sahib, woh bhi bas papers pe papers banate rehte hain. Main toh ab itni pareshan ho gayi hoon, sir. Court mein itne sare 'judgments' aur 'laws' ki baatein hoti hain, mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Bas mera case ghoomta rehta hai. Abhi toh woh Judge Subhasis Dasgupta sahib bhi keh rahe hain ki unke 'conclusions' pe 'agree' kar gaye hain... matlab ab meri shaadi ka kya hoga? Sir, mujhe lagta hai mere saath injustice ho raha hai. Meri toh koi sunta hi nahi. Bas yeh 'marriage' ka matter hai, meri zindagi daav pe lagi hai. Please, meri help kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh koi sunta hi nahi. Lucknow se aaya hoon main. Mera ek case chal raha tha, usmein 2016 mein ek order aaya tha jo mere khilaaf tha. Mujhe laga tha ki ab jab main appeal karunga toh mujhe insaaf milega. Maine us galat order ke khilaaf appeal daali thi, poori ummeed se. Lekin Sir, pichle saal 6 April 2019 ko, Lucknow mein hi, Additional Sessions Judge sahib ne meri appeal bhi dismiss kar di! Meri appeal reject ho gayi, matlab woh pehla galat order abhi bhi waisa hi hai. Main kahan jaaun, Sir? Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Reeta hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Meri shadi 20 February 2011 ko Ankit Kumar se hui thi, aur ab usne Family Court Bijnor se divorce le liya hai. Judge saheb ne 30 November 2019 ko Ankit ke favour mein faisla suna diya aur meri shadi tod di! Pata nahi kis Section 13 Hindu Marriage Act ke andar yeh sab hua, par maine toh kabhi nahi chaha tha ki mera ghar tute. Woh toh bas mujhse peecha chhudana chahta tha, Sir. Mujhe yeh faisla bilkul manzoor nahi hai, isi liye main iske khilaaf appeal kar rahi hoon. Main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Yeh sab mere pati ke saath jhagde se shuru hua tha. Choti si baat thi, par dheere dheere itni badh gayi ki ab toh court-kacheri ke chakkar lag rahe hain. Hamare rishte mein itni kadvahat aa gayi hai ki hum dono bas ek doosre ko neecha dikhana chahte hain. Woh chahte hain ki case unki convenience ke hisaab se kahin aur transfer ho, aur main chahti hoon mere liye asaan ho. Upar se mere sasur ji ne bhi ek naya case daal diya hai, woh chahte hain ki maine jo unke khilaaf complaint ki thi, woh khatam ho jaye. Samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon, Sir. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mera dimaag kharab ho raha hai. Poonamallee court mein mera ek case chal raha hai (CC.211/2012), jismein mere pati aur unke gharwale (accused 1 to 3) hain. In logon ne mujhe bahut torture kiya hai, dahej ke liye tang kiya, mera saaman (streedhan) bhi nahi diya, aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki tak di thi. Isliye un par sections 498A, 406, 506(i) IPC ke charges lage hain. Ab jab unhein court se summon mila, toh unhone ek petition daal di (CMP.No.3942/2012) ki unhein in charges se 'discharge' kar do, matlab case se nikaal do. Court ne pehle toh unki appeal dismiss kar di thi, par ab woh us order ke khilaaf 'revision' mein chale gaye hain. Bol rahe hain ki unke khilaaf koi proof hi nahi hai. Sir, main toh sab sach bata rahi hoon, woh aise kaise bach jayenge? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir!

Sir, main Sutapa Pal hoon. Aaj main apni purani complaint ke baare mein baat karne aayi hoon. Maine 9 October 2000 ko Barasat Police Station mein ek written complaint di thi. Meri shaadi Amar Kumar Pal se 19 April 1998 ko hui thi. Shaadi ke baad main apne pati Amar aur unke maa-baap ke saath, unke ghar mein rehne chali gayi thi. Wohi mera sasural tha, Sir. Par wahan meri life itni difficult ho gayi thi ki mere paas complaint karne ke alawa koi option nahi bacha tha. Bohot umeed se aayi thi main yahan us din. Meri bas itni request hai ki please meri madad karein.

Sir, main Suman ka bhai hoon. Meri behen Suman Narula ki shaadi bade dhoom-dhaam se 22 November 1987 ko Rajiv Narula se hui thi, Hindu reeti-riwaaj se. Humne socha tha meri behen khush rahegi, par ab toh sab khatam ho gaya. Sir, uski maut ho gayi hai, aur woh bhi unnatural death! Humein pakka yakeen hai ki iske peeche mere jija Rajiv Narula aur unki maa, Smt. Sunita Narula ka haath hai. Meri behen ko woh log bahut tang karte the, pareshan karte the. Usne kabhi complain nahi ki, par humein pata tha haalat theek nahi. Meri behen khud se apni jaan nahi le sakti. Unhone hi use maara hai ya majboor kiya hai. Sir, please meri madad karo, mujhe meri behen ke liye insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main yahan bahut pareshan hokar aaya hoon. Aapko toh pata hi hoga, mera ek purana case chal raha tha Alipore Court mein, woh 2011 ka Criminal Appeal No. 15. Usmein ek faisla aaya tha, Sir, 17 January 2014 ko. Woh judge sahib ne jo decision diya hai na, woh bilkul galat hai mere saath. Meri toh poori zindagi kharab ho gayi hai uss faisle ki wajah se. Main uss judgment se bilkul khush nahi hoon, Sir. Meri aapse request hai ki is faisle ko phir se dekha jaaye, please. Saare details toh pehle se hi aapki files mein honge, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri shaadi 9 December 2002 ko hui thi, poore Hindu reeti-riwaz se. Hamari shaadi Hindu Marriage Act ke under register bhi hui thi, 30 December 2002 ko. Shaadi ke baad woh mere saath hi rehti thi, ek patni ki tarah. Lekin, uske baad kya hua, woh toh main hi jaanta hoon. Contai, Purba Medinipur ke Additional District Judge ke court mein mera ek Matrimonial Suit (number 105 of 2007) chal raha tha. Usmein jo order aaya hai na 4 April 2007 ko, woh mere saath bahut galat hai Sir. Mujhe woh order bilkul manzoor nahi hai. Meri puri zindagi daav pe hai. Isi liye main us faisle ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bas insaaf.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Maine apni biwi se talaq (divorce) maanga tha, Hindu Marriage Act, Section 13 ke tehat. Socha tha insaaf milega. Usne mujhe itna tang kiya, itna zaleel kiya, aur phir mujhe akela chhod kar chali gayi thi. Cruelty aur desertion, yehi mere grounds the, sir. Saalon ki pareshaani ke baad finally court gaya tha. Par trial court ne toh meri petition hi dismiss kar di, October 3, 2013 ko. Mera divorce hua hi nahi! Ab usi faisle ke khilaf main appeal kar raha hoon. Samajh nahi aata, itna sab jhelne ke baad bhi mujhe nyay kyon nahi mil raha? Main toh bas apni zindagi mein thodi shanti chahta hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. 2015 mein maine Hirapur PS mein complaint ki thi (Case No. 28/2015). Un logon ne mere saath itna bura kiya tha. Husband aur sasural walon ne dahej ke liye maara-peeta, meri cheezein bhi rakh li (498A, 406, 325). Jaan se maarne ki koshish bhi ki (307). Aur unhone... woh sab bhi kiya (376, 511). Yeh sab milkar kiya tha (120B, 34). Sir, mera case Asansol Women PS mein transfer hua tha aur abhi Magistrate Court mein chal raha hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, main insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log is case ko khatam karwana chahte hain! Meri sunwai to hui hi nahi theek se, aur ab yeh sab! Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, mere case ko band mat hone dijiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun! Meri toh life hi jhand ho gayi hai. Mere pati ne pehle divorce case daala tha mere upar, Hindu Marriage Act ke Section 13-A ke under. Tarn Taran ke ADJ sahab ne 1 October 2016 ko unki petition dismiss kar di thi. Socha tha chalo ab toh khatam hoga ye sab, thodi shanti milegi. Par nahi, ab unhone us order ke khilaaf appeal kar di hai. Matlab, unhe divorce chahiye hi chahiye, chahe judge ne mana bhi kar diya ho. Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Ye kab tak chalega?

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Kitne saalon se mera case chal raha hai, yeh Crl.M.C. 3750/2008 wala. Maine socha tha ki ab toh sach saamne aayega. Woh log jhoot pe jhoot bolte rahe the court mein, isliye maine Section 340 Cr.P.C. ke तहत application lagayi thi ki unki jhoothi gawaahi pakdi jaaye. Mere vakeel sahab ne bhi bola tha ki Supreme Court ke Iqbal Singh Marwah wale case ka reference deke hum unko expose karenge. Par ab pata chal raha hai ki mere vakeel sahab hi shayad woh application wapas lena chahte hain. Yeh kya insaaf hai, Sir? Hum gareeb log kab tak dhakke khate rahenge? Meri toh ummeed hi toot gayi hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon.

Sahab, main yahan apni bahut badi pareshani leke aayi hoon. Mera naam hai [victim's name, not provided]. Mere pati ne Howrah Court mein mere khilaaf divorce ka case kiya tha, kehte hain main unpe bohot zulm karti hoon. Aap sochiye, main kaise zulm kar sakti hoon? Pure 6 saal se case chal raha tha, 1994 se. Aur ab, 21 September 2000 ko, Additional District Judge sahab ne unke favour mein decree de diya, unhe divorce mil gaya. Sahab, yeh bilkul galat hua hai mere saath. Main toh is decision se bahut dukhi hoon, poori tarah se aggrieved hoon. Unhone jhooth bolkar divorce liya hai aur abhi maine is order ke khilaaf appeal file ki hai. Meri suniye Sahab, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Kya ek pati jhoote ilzaam lagake apni patni ko aise hi chhod sakta hai?

Sir, meri beti ki shaadi ko abhi zyada time nahi hua tha. Bas ek saal chaar mahine pehle hi uski shaadi hui thi uss aadmi se. Aur ab woh... ab woh nahi rahi, sir. Usne meri beti ko maara hai. Meri beti ki maut 10 September 2010 ko hui thi. Abhi toh saat saal bhi poore nahi hue the uski shaadi ko. Woh log meri beti ko bohot tang karte the, dowry ke liye bhi pareshaan karte the. Maine kitni baar samjhaya tha, par woh nahi maane. Ab meri beti chali gayi. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon, sir. Uss aadmi ko uske kiye ki saza milni chahiye. Usne meri beti ko maar daala!

Sir, meri beti ke saath jo kiya na Firoj Ali Molla aur Siraj Ali ne, woh koi insaan nahi karta. Meri masoom beti ko itna torture kiya, itna pareshan kiya, ki us bechari ne apni jaan de di. Humne toh bas insaaf manga tha. Aur ab jaake Barasat ke Fast Track Court mein, 5th September, 2009 ko, unko saza mili hai. Firoj Ali ko 7 saal aur Siraj Ali ko 2 saal ki kaid. Fine bhi laga hai. Meri beti toh waapas nahi aayegi, sir, par yeh jo case tha na, SC-2(3) of 2005, usmein kam se kam justice toh hua. Ab unki appeal chal rahi hai, pata nahi kya hoga.

Sir, main Navrangpura Police Station mein aapko complain karne aayi hoon. Meri shaadi ko kuch saal ho gaye hain, par mere pati aur unke gharwalon ne meri zindagi nark bana di hai. Shaadi ke baad se hi dahej ke liye mujhe tang karte hain. Roz naye-naye bahane se paiso ki demand karte hain. Agar main mana karti hoon, toh mere pati mujhe buri tarah peet-te hain. Gaaliyan dete hain, aur mere character par ungli uthate hain. Aur sir, unhone mere saath itni gandi harkatein ki hain, itne galat kaam kiye hain, jo main kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti. Meri izzat loot li hai, meri rooh tak ko takleef di hai. Main ab aur nahi seh sakti. Please, sir, mujhe unse bachao aur unko saza dilwao. Meri jaan ko khatra hai aur meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main bahut pareshaan hoon! Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. 26 June 1977 ko Ludhiana mein meri shaadi hui thi, bade dhoom-dhaam se, poore Hindu reeti-riwaj se, par ab... mera pati mujhe chhod gaya hai, bilkul akela, aur upar se itna zulm karta hai mujhpe. Hamein koi bachcha bhi nahi hua, aur ab toh main bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon. Isliye, majboori mein, maine 13 January 1984 ko yeh talaq ki complaint file ki thi, Hindu Marriage Act ke Section 13 ke tehat. Mujhe bas is rishte se azadi chahiye, aur kuch nahi.

Sir, main X bol raha hoon. Aaj 26 April 2015 ko, hum X, Y aur Z, Green Park Metro Station ke paas the. Hamara dost Shivam bhi humare saath tha. Sir, bahut gandi harkat ki hai isne. Humne use wahi pakad liya aur aapki police ko call kiya. Aapke SI Bharat Lal aur Constable Jagbir saahab wahan aaye the. Humne unko poori baat batayi aur ek written complaint bhi unhe de di thi, sir. Woh ladka, jiski humne complaint ki hai, woh abhi bhi wahin hai. Please sir, dekhiye na isko, hum bahut pareshan hain iski harkaton se. Humari madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut himmat karke yahaan tak aayi hoon. Meri do betiyan hain, chhoti wali toh abhi tak darr ke maare sehmi hui hai. Kuchh logon ne unke saath bahut ghatiya harkat ki hai, galat tarike se haath lagaya aur unki izzat se khelne ki koshish ki. Sir, main kya bataun, meri betiyon ki zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Unhone unko itna dara diya hai ki woh school bhi nahin jaana chahti. Humare naam aur saari jaankari aapke paas file mein hogi, par main bas itna chahti hoon ki un darindon ko kadi se kadi saza mile. Meri betiyon ko nyay milna chahiye, sir. Humari madad kijiye, please.

Sir, main Arvind Sharma, aapko meri problem batane aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir! Ye State of Himachal Pradesh ke log, matlab, yahan ke sarkari afsar, inhone mera jeena haram kar diya hai. Meri zameen ka mamla tha, uspar ye log zabardasti kabza kar rahe the. Maine kitni complaints ki, par koi sunwai nahi. Majboor hokar, main court gaya, sir! Aur abhi 15 December ko hi decision aaya hai. Judge Rakesh Kainthla saab ne bhi sab dekha hai. Par sir, abhi bhi mujhe peace nahi mil rahi. Wo log abhi bhi mujhe tang kar rahe hain. Meri request hai, aap please meri madad kijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, aapko apni takleef batane aayi hoon. Mere case mein phir se ek naya masla ho gaya hai. Pichle saal, September mein, Tis Hazari Court mein jo POCSO judge sahab ne accused pe charges frame kiye the, woh order ab challenge kiya gaya hai. Bolte hain Section 397/401 Cr.P.C. ke under, upar ki court mein appeal daali hai. Main toh bas yehi jaanti hoon ki itni mushkil se unpe charges lage the, aur ab woh log chahte hain ki unpe koi case hi na chale. Sir, meri toh neend ud gayi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya hoga. Kya mera case kabhi khatam nahi hoga? Yeh log bas insaaf ko latka rahe hain. Meri madad karo Sir, please!

Sir, namaste. Main toh ab tang aa chuka hoon inn court-kachahri ke chakkar se. Kitne saal ho gaye, bas tareekh pe tareekh milti hai. Pichle saal, 6 October 2021 ko, Panaji ke bade judge saab ne ek order diya tha. Mujhe laga tha chalo, ab toh kuch umeed bandhi. Mera case aage badhega, insaaf milega. Par ab suna hai ki State ne, matlab sarkar ne, uss order ko phir se challenge kar diya hai. Bolte hain 'Criminal Revision Application No. 32/2020' file ki hai. Meri toh samajh se bahar hai ye sab. Pehle ek faisla aata hai, phir usko hi 'galat' bolkar badal dete hain. Gareeb aadmi ko kab milega chain, sir? Bas mujhe mera haq chahiye, aur ye kanooni jhanjhat khatam ho.

Sir, main Geeta Devi. Bahut pareshaan hoon, Sir. Meri zameen par kuch logon ne kabza kar liya hai aur ab wo hume ghar mein bhi ghusne nahi dete. Humara case court mein chal raha hai. Pata hai, pichle saal hi humari sunwai hui thi, judge sahab ne sab suna. Humare vakil, Shri Deo, ne saari baat rakhi. Aur jo sarkari vakil the, Shri Sirpurkar, wo bhi maujood the. Sab record pe hai, Sir. Lekin ab tak koi action nahi hua. Wo log ab bhi dhamkaate hain, raat mein aate hain. Mujhe aur mere bachchon ko dar lagta hai. Court ka mamla apni jagah, par police toh hamari madad kar sakti hai na? Kripya karke un logon par koi action lijiye, Sir. Hum bas insaaf chahte hain.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri zindagi toh jhand ho gayi hai inn logon ki wajah se. Pehle toh koi sunwai hi nahi thi meri. Jab sab jagah se haar gaya na, tab jaake High Court mein application lagayi maine. Mere vakeel sahab, woh bade H.R.A. Choudhury sahab hain, unhone meri poori baat rakhi. Unke saath ek aur vakeel madam (Ms. R. Deka) bhi thi. Court mein sunwai chal rahi thi, sir. Sarkari vakeel (Mr. D. P. Goswami) bhi the aur woh saamne waali party (Respondent No.2) ke vakeel (Mr. J. Abedin) bhi the. Mera case Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 ke Section 528 ke under tha, Article 227 ke saath. Judge sahab ne sabki suni hai, sir. Bahut ummeed se main yahan aaya hoon. Bas ab mujhe insaaf mil jaaye.

Sir, aapko pata hai na, maine kitni himmat karke apni statement di thi, aur jo aur log gawah the, unki bhi suni thi. Police walon ne poori jaanch-padtaal ki, aur phir woh jo ganda kaam mere saath hua tha na, us sab ke liye court mein charge sheet file kar di. Mera case court mein baकायदा register ho gaya hai, Spl.C.C. ke naam se. Judge sahab ne dono taraf ki suni hai, meri bhi aur uski (accused) bhi. Aur ab us harami ke khilaaf charges laga diye hain — IPC ki dhara 509, 506 aur POCSO Act ki dhara 11(iv) ke तहत. Us ghatiya insaan ko sab padh ke bhi suna diya hai ki kya-kya ilzaam hain uspar. Mujhe bas mera insaaf mil jaye, sir, please!

Sir, aaj shaam 4:30 baje ka waqt tha, main apni beti Lalita ko tuition chhodne ja rahi thi. Tabhi Sandeep urf Kala ne, meri beti ke saamne hi, gandi-gandi gaaliyan deni shuru kar di aur badtameezi se ishaare kiye. Mujhe bohot gussa aaya par maine socha chalo ignore karti hoon, aur hum wahan se nikal gaye. Ghar aakar maine apne pati Suresh Kumar ko sab bataya. Unka toh khoon khaul utha, aur woh gusse mein ghar se nikal gaye. Phir kya hua, shaam 5:15 baje ke kareeb, kisi ne mujhe phone karke bataya ki Sandeep mere pati se lad raha hai. Yeh sunte hi main, meri beti Lalita aur mere devar Sanjay turant us gali mein bhag kar gaye jahan... Aap hi batao, yeh sab kya ho raha hai mere saath?

Sir, mera naam Mindra hai. Main aaj aapke paas complaint darj karwane aayi hoon. Kal, yaani 06.02.95 ko, shaam ke kareeb 6:30 baje ki baat hai. Jab main Khyala Village mein apne ghar Wz-186 ke paas wali gali se guzar rahi thi, toh Raju Khan aur uske kuch logon ne mujhe gher liya. Unhone mere saath badtameezi ki aur mujhe dhamkiyan di. Main bahut darr gayi thi, sir. Yeh roz-roz ki gundagardi ho gayi hai. Please, aap unke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lijiye. Meri jaan ko khatra hai. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir, maine toh pehle hi bataya tha, meri FIR darj hone ke baad, police ne poori investigation ki. Kitni pareshaani uthai maine, aapko kya bataun. Jab jaanch poori ho gayi, toh accused ke khilaaf chargesheet file kar di gayi. Court ne bhi hamare case ko dekha aur usko serious liya, tab thodi umeed bandhi. Phir accused ko court mein bulane ke liye summons bhi bheje gaye. Jab woh finally court mein haazir hua, toh usko meri chargesheet ki copy bhi de di gayi. Ab main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, sir. Mujhe bas justice chahiye.

Sir, main Anju hoon, Sachin ki biwi. Geeta Colony se aayi hoon, Jhuggi No. E-91/29. Sahab, mere saath bohot galat ho raha hai. Ek Rajesh naam ka aadmi hai, woh humari jhuggi ke paas hi rehta hai. Roz mujhe aur mere bacche ko tang karta hai. Kabhi gandi-gandi gaali deta hai, kabhi ghoor-ghoor ke dekhta hai. Aaj toh usne meri choti beti ko bhi daraaya hai, woh school se aa rahi thi. Hum gareeb log hain, Sahab, kahan jayenge? Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, apne aur apne parivaar ke liye. Meri aapse haath jod ke request hai, please uske khilaaf kuchh action lo. Woh aadmi humein jeene nahi dega. Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Twinkle Wadhwa bol rahi hoon. Woh jo incident hua tha na, uske baad meri haalat itni kharab thi ki mujhe seedha GTB hospital bheja gaya tha. Wahan se jab discharge hokar ghar aayi, toh laga thoda theek ho jaungi. Par sir, sach bataun toh mere haath mein itna zyaada dard tha ki main kuch bol hi nahi pa rahi thi. Aisa lag raha tha jaise bas cheekhti rahoon. Us din, is bhayanak dard ki wajah se, main apna bayaan tak nahi de paayi thi police ko. Aap samjho na, us waqt kuch hosh hi nahi tha, bas dard hi dard tha. Ab thoda theek feel kar rahi hoon, toh socha aa kar apni baat rakhoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Itni mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha. Woh Vijay Dhall, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, usko Saket Court ne pichle saal, 25 July 2017 ko, doshi thehraya tha. Aur phir 24 August 2017 ko usko saza bhi mili thi. Maine socha, chalo ab meri zindagi mein shanti aayegi, meri pareshani khatam ho gayi. Lekin ab pata chala hai, sir, ki usne toh appeal kar di hai! Woh jo conviction hua tha, jo uske khilaaf faisla aaya tha, usko challenge kar raha hai. Sir, mera toh dimaag ghoom gaya hai. Agar usko chhod diya toh? Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai. Meri toh jaan nikal jayegi, sir. Aap kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Dabri se aayi hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, jo file hui thi, FIR number 606/14. Wo Tony alias Amitabh, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Usne mujhe cheda, badtameezi ki, Sir! Meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish ki, mere kapde tak utarne ki koshish ki. Woh mujhe gandi-gandi baatein bolta tha, meri beizzati karta tha. Aur Sir, usne mujhe dhamki bhi di hai, ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh wo aur bura karega. Jab se investigation hui hai, charge-sheet bhi file ho gayi hai, mujhe bas ab insaaf chahiye. Mujhe bahut dar lagta hai, woh mujhe baar-baar pareshan karta hai. Kripya karke usko saza dilwaiye.

Sir, main Rakesh. Meri suno toh sahi, kya haal bana diya un logon ne mera. Ye baat hai 10 July 2001 ki, raat ke time, kareeb 9:20 baje. Main apni Gali mein, H. No. 240, Shadi Nagar, Azadpur ke bilkul saamne khada tha. Sir, woh sab ek saath aaye aur bina matlab ke mujhe rok liya. Fir unhone milkar mujhe itna buri tarah se maara ki mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai. Mera haal bura kar diya unhone. Sir, unka koi haq nahi tha mujhe aise rokne ka aur itna peetne ka. Woh sab jaan boojhkar mujhe takleef dena chahte the. Aap please meri madad kijiye, mujhe un logon se insaaf chahiye. Meri FIR 317/01 hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Aaj, matlab 28 June 2012 ko, dopahar ke theek teen baje, RZL-170, Vijay Enclave, Dabri ke bilkul saamne, Prakash Bhardwaj aur woh Gaumti Ram, dono ne mujhe gher liya. Unhone mujh par hamla kiya Sir, mujhe dhakke diye, meri bahot beizzati ki koshish ki. Meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish ki un gundo ne! Mujhe bahut tez chot lagi hai, Sir. Mera haath pakda aur maara bhi. Aap please in par action lo, in logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir!

Sir, main Jyoti hoon. Mujhe aapko ek complaint deni hai. Baat 20 December 2006 ki subah 8 baje ki hai. Main Sarvodya Vidhalaya, Chatterpur ke paas thi. Wahan Rahisuddin naam ke ek aadmi ne mera rasta rok liya, Sahab. Usne mujhe zabardasti wahan jaane hi nahi diya jahan main jaa rahi thi. Aur itna hi nahi, usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Main uski harkaton se bahut darr gayi hoon. Please uske khilaaf sakht se sakht action lijiye. Meri jaan ko khatra hai usse.

Sir, main Pul Prahlad Pur police station mein hi complaint karwane aayi thi. Woh Daya Shankar alias Guddu hai na, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Roz mujhe gandi-gandi baatein bolta hai, ajeeb harkatein karta hai, meri izzat uchhalta hai. Main toh bas chahti hoon ki usko saza mile. Meri FIR number 12/13 hai, aapne mere 161 ke bayan bhi liye the. Maine sab sach-sach bataya tha. Shukr hai aap logon ne use pakad liya tha. Ab bas jaldi se case khatam ho aur mujhe insaaf mile, sir. Bohot pareshan hoon main uski wajah se.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera case pata nahi kab se chal raha hai, aur ab tak koi final judgment nahi aaya. Court mein toh bas tareekh pe tareekh mil rahi hai. Woh jo sarkari vakeel hain na, Ms. Amandeep Kaur ji, woh case dekh rahi hain State ki taraf se. Main toh socha tha jaldi insaaf milega, par abhi tak bas intzaar hi kar raha hoon. Ab bol rahe hain ki 20.09.2025 ko judgment reserve kiya hai. Matlab, abhi aur itna lamba intzaar karna padega? Meri toh saari ummeed toot rahi hai, sir. Mujhe bas mera haq chahiye, aur kitna tadpaoge?

Sir ji, main aapko kya bataun... 19 April 2012 ki baat hai, dopahar ke lagbhag 12:45 baje the. Main apne ghar pe thi, H. No. 52A, DDA Flats, Sun Light Colony mein. Woh Bharat Singh @ Rajender mere ghar mein ghus aaya, sir. Usne meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki. Mere breast ko galat tarike se chua, sir! Mujhe laga jaise meri rooh nikal gayi. Usne mujhe mere hi kamre mein band kar diya aur gandi gandi harkatein karne laga, mere saamne ashleel ishaare kiye. Meri toh izzat hi mitti mein mil gayi, sir. Maine us din hi complaint ki thi aur FIR bhi hui thi PS Sun Light Colony mein, Section 354/342/509 IPC ke तहत. Bas ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Bahut darr gayi thi main us din.

Sir, main Vandana hoon. Aaj aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batane aayi hoon. 26 August 2000 ki raat, kareeb 9:30 baje ki baat hai. Main Jahangir Puri mein I & J Market Mandir ke paas Gali 200 se guzar rahi thi. Wahan Tilak Raj, Shobha aur Seema ne mera raasta rok liya. Sir, unhone mujhe bina wajah roka, bahut gandi gandi gaaliyan di. Meri izzat uchalne ki niyyat se ashleel ishaare bhi kiye. Itna hi nahi, ek blunt cheez se mujhe chot bhi pahunchayi. Yeh sab unhone mil kar kiya, meri zindagi kharab karne ki koshish ki. Main bahut darr gayi thi. Sir, mujhe unse insaaf chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aayi hoon. 17 June 2013 ki raat thi, kareeb 8:45 baje, Lok Nayak Puram Bakkarwala, Pocket-A, flat no. 607 ke paas, kuch logon ne mere aur mere pati ke saath bahut gandi harkat ki. Unhone mere saath badtameezi ki, mujhe galat tarike se chhua aur gandi-gandi baatein boli. Jab maine unhe roka, toh unhone mere chehre pe thappad maara aur mere pati ko bhi bahut maara. Sir, unhone humein jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Mujhe unse aur unki harkaton se bahut darr lag raha hai. Please aap meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Surjeet Singh hoon, Subhash Nagar, ghar no. 3/93 se bol raha hoon. Daroga ji, 17 March 2005 ki raat thi, kareeb 9:30 baje. Kuch log mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus aaye. Rajouri Garden PS ke area mein hi hai mera ghar. Woh sab darwaza tod kar, dhakke maar kar andar ghus aaye. Unka iraada bahut galat tha Sir. Woh sab milkar humein, gharwalon ko chot pahunchane ki poori taiyari mein the. Aisa lag raha tha jaise humein maar hi dalenge woh. Humara poora parivaar, bachche tak darr ke maare kaanp rahe the us raat. Aapse request hai Sir, turant action lijiye. Meri jaan aur mere parivaar ko unse bahut khatra hai.

Sir, main Neelam bol rahi hoon. Woh Kuldeep hai na, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata nahi usko kya ho gaya tha, woh mujhe dekhta rehta tha aur gandi gandi baatein bolta tha. Sir, usne mujhe gande ishare bhi kiye! Meri izzat ka khayal tak nahi rakha usne. Main toh itni ghabra gayi thi ki kya bataun. Aise public place par koi kisi ladki ke saath kaise gandi harkat kar sakta hai? Mujhe bahut sharam aa rahi thi. Aap uspar IPC 509 ke तहत case darj kijiye, sir. Usne meri beizzati ki hai, usko saza milni chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Bimla Bhatt. Main aur meri friend Aisha Jaiswal, hum dono Rajendra Place ke Hotel Sidharth mein the. Pata nahi kab aur kaise, wahan teen log aa gaye. Unhone hamari taraf gandi-gandi baatein ki, ashleel ishaare kiye aur itne gande comments pass kiye ki main bata nahi sakti. Humari izzat pe itna bada attack kiya, sir. Mujhe itna sharam aur darr laga, kya bataun. Humare saath itna bura behave kiya un teeno ne, jaise unko koi khauf hi nahi tha. Sir, please unpe action lo, unhone hamari dignity ko hurt kiya hai. Aise logon ko saza milni chahiye. Meri request hai ki aap jaldi se jaldi is mamle mein kuch karein.

Sir, main Malvika Tiwari. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai kal shaam, 19.07.1998 ko, kareeb 7:30 baje. Main apni Gypsy (DL-3CA-2431) leke Panchsheel Enclave Market, Joseph Tito Marg ke paas thi, Hauz Khas PS ke area mein. Ek Harjot Singh naam ka aadmi, apni car (DL3CJ-0624) itni rash aur negligently chala raha tha ki usne meri Gypsy mein takkar maar di. Main toh shock mein thi, uske baad usne meri taraf dekh kar gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, ashleel awaazein nikalne laga. Meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish ki, meri modesty ko insult kiya. Sir, main bahut darr gayi thi aur sharam se mar gayi. Please us par sakht action lo, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main 26 saal ki ladki hoon. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Mera padosi hai na, woh middle-aged aadmi, usne meri izzat par haath daala. Yeh 15 October 2011 ki baat hai, dopahar ke theek 1 baje. Hamare ghar ke saamne hi, H.No. 317, Gali No.7, Amrit Puri 'B' Garhi, New Delhi mein. Usne mujhe pakda, sir, aur meri modesty ko outrage karne ki koshish ki. Usne mujhe maari bhi aur galat tarike se chhua. Main bahut ghabra gayi thi aur chilla rahi thi, par woh ruka nahi. Sir, please uske khilaaf sakht action lo. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai aur insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Anjali ki maa hoon. Meri beti abhi minor hai, choti hai. Ye baat hai 3 June 2012 ki raat ki, kareeb 11:30 baje. Hum apne ghar par hi the, H.No. 2274, second floor, Gali Hingabegh, Tilak Bazar, Delhi mein. Wahan ek aadmi ne meri beti Anjali ke saamne bahut hi gandi harkat ki, Sir. Usne aise gande-gande ishaare kiye, meri beti ko dekh kar. Meri Anjali bahut darr gayi hai us din se, Sir. Uski masoomiyat pe chot pahunchi hai. Uska irada tha ki Anjali use dekhe aur woh use pareshan kare. Aap meri madad kijiye, Sir. Us aadmi ko saza milni chahiye. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, woh kisi aur ke saath na ho. Meri Anjali bahut sahami hui hai.

Sir, main Jyoti Verma hoon. Main school jaati hoon, abhi teen-ager hi hoon. Aaj subah, 1 May 2012 ko, kareeb 10:30 baje ki baat hai. Main Dakshin Puri mein, C-56 ghar ke saamne se jaa rahi thi. Tabhi wahan ek middle-aged aadmi, uska naam Gulab Chand hai, usne mujhe rok liya. Sir, usne mere saath badtameezi ki, mujhe galat tareeke se chhua. Uski niyat bilkul kharab thi, meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish kar raha tha. Usne bahut gandi-gandi gaaliyan di aur aise gande ishaare kiye ki main bata nahi sakti. Main bahut zyada darr gayi thi aur ab bahut sharam aa rahi hai. Please, sir, us Gulab Chand ke khilaaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Neha Sharma hoon. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye. Ye Rohit Singh naam ka ladka hai, isne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pichle saal December 2011 se lekar ab tak, 10 June 2012 tak, isne Aman Vihar thane ke ilake mein, mere ghar ke paas kai jagahon par meri photographs aur mere personal letters publish karwa ke meri badnami ki hai. Meri izzat mitti mein mila di hai isne, Sir. Isne meri reputation kharab karne ki puri koshish ki hai. Aur pichle saal bhi, 10 June 2012 se kareeb saat mahine pehle, Kirari gaon mein Samshan Ghat ke paas bhi isne aise hi kiya tha. Main bahut pareshaan hoon, Sir. Aap please is par karwayi kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshan hokar aayi hoon. Yaad hai na, 2014 mein ek aadmi ne mere saath galat kiya tha, meri izzat par ungli uthai thi? Police ne tab meri complaint suni thi aur Court ne usko pakda tha. Judge sahab, Shri Harun Pratap, unhone 9 aur 16 July 2014 ko usko pakka mujrim maana tha, Section 509 IPC ke under. Usko teen mahine ki jail aur 2000 rupaye fine ki saza bhi sunayi thi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya, woh meri aankhon ke saamne phir nahi aayega. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh apni saza se bachne ke liye appeal kar raha hai! Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Kya woh phir se khule ghoomega? Meri aur meri family ki security ka kya hoga? Main haath jodkar kehti hoon, please usko rok dijiye, usko uski saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Sonia, Amit Bhasin ki wife, Baljeet Nagar se aayi hoon. Mera address hai T-517, D-56, Hill Road, Patel Nagar thane ke paas. Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri zindagi jhand ho gayi hai. Kya bataun aapko? October 2009 se lekar, abhi 17 January 2013 tak, woh log mujhe itna pareshan kar rahe hain ki mera jeena mushkil ho gaya hai. Din-raat bas tension mein rehti hoon. Meri kisi ne nahi suni, Sir. Ab main aapke paas aayi hoon. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please, meri madad kijiye. Main aur nahi seh sakti, Sir.

Sir, main bahut himmat karke yahan tak aayi hoon. Mere saath 24 February ko jo hua, woh main kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti theek se. Us ghatiya aadmi ne mujhe ghoora, gande-gande ishare kiye aur aisi baatein boli ki meri rooh kaanp gayi. Main itni darr gayi thi, sir, ki abhi tak mujhe neend nahi aati. Usne meri izzat pe haath daala hai, meri beizzati ki hai sabke saamne. Kya hum ladkiyan sadak pe bhi safe nahi hain? Mujhe usko saza dilwani hai, sir. Please meri madad kijiye, aise logon ko chhoda nahi jaana chahiye. Meri zindagi kharab kar di usne.

Sir ji, main Kanta hoon. Aaj dopahar kareeb 12 baje ki baat hai. Main apne ghar B-750, Mangolpuri par hi thi. Wahan ek aadmi aaya aur usne itne gande gestures kiye, itni besharam baatein boli mere saamne. Usne jo bhi bola, woh sab meri hearing mein tha. Main sunkar sharam se paani-paani ho gayi, sir. Meri izzat ko usne sareaam beizzati ki hai. Mujhe itna insult feel hua hai, main aapko bata nahi sakti. Meri modesty par usne attack kiya hai, mera apmaan kiya hai. Please, aap us par action lo, usko saza milni chahiye. Aise log khule aam ghoomenge toh hum auraton ka kya hoga? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Jyoti Kamboj. Ek Sarfraz Khan naam ka aadmi hai, usne mere saath bahut ghatiya harkat ki hai. Main bahut pareshaan hoon uski wajah se. Usne mujhse bahut gande ishaare kiye, aise jo koi soch bhi nahi sakta. Aur upar se muh se bhi bahut bekaar, obscene baatein boli. Sir, mujhe itna beizzati feel hua, meri izzat par usne hamla kiya hai. Meri modesty ko itna hurt kiya hai usne. Main chahti hoon ki uske khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai ho. Please, meri madad kijiye. Us Sarfraz Khan ko saza milni chahiye taaki dobara kisi aur ladki ke saath aisa na kare. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon.

Sir, main Arjita Singh. Woh 11.04.2009 ki raat thi, kareeb 8:45 baje ki baat hai. Main Saket ke PVR Complex mein thi. Ek aadmi ne meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish ki. Usne mere saamne aisi gandi-gandi baatein boli aur aise ishaare kiye, jo main aapko bata bhi nahi sakti. Maine sab kuch suna aur dekha hai, Daroga ji. Mujhe itna darr laga aur itni sharam aayi us waqt. Meri self-respect ko usne poori tarah se hurt kiya hai. Yeh Section 509 IPC ke तहत aata hai. Sir, please uske khilaaf action lo. Aise logon ko saza milni chahiye. Agar yeh aise hi ghumte rahenge toh hum ladkiyan kaise safe rahengi? Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon mere saath kya hua. Yeh baat hai 18 April 2013 ki, raat ke kareeb 10 baje. Main apne ghar D-451, Mangolpuri, Delhi ke theek saamne khadi thi. Wahi PS Mangolpuri ke area mein. Tabhi wahan ek aadmi ne mujhe dekh kar itne gande ishare kiye aur itni ashleel baatein boli, ki meri toh himmat hi toot gayi. Sab sun rahe the aur uski niyat saaf thi, meri izzat ko uchhalne ki, mujhe insult karne ki. Mujhe itna bura laga, meri modesty ko usne hurt kiya. Police ne puri jaanch ke baad uske khilaaf Section 509 IPC ke under chargesheet bhi file ki thi. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon, Sir.

Sir, main yahan is Whabudeen alias Tappal ke khilaaf complaint karne aayi hoon. Us raat, 25/26 March 2017 ko, der raat 12:30 baje ke kareeb, usne mere saath bahut gandi harkatein ki thi. Usne mujhe gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, obscene gestures kiye. Meri izzat uchhalne ki poori koshish ki usne, meri modesty ko insult kiya. Mujhe itna bura laga tha, itni sharm aayi, main darr gayi thi us din. Aap logon ne tab Malviya Nagar PS mein FIR (number 125/17) toh lodge ki thi aur investigation bhi chali thi. Ab bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Aise ghatiya aadmi ko saza milni chahiye, taaki aur kisi ladki ke saath aisi himmat na kare koi.

Sahab, main dobara aa gayi hoon yahan. Aapko yaad hoga, us badmaash ne mere saath kitni gandi harkatein ki thi. Usne mujhe offensive baatein kahi thi, ajeeb gestures kiye the, meri modesty ko outrange kiya tha. Maine tabhi complaint ki thi aur aap logon ne case banaya tha. Court ne bhi 2.11.2016 ko uske khilaaf charges frame kiye the, sections 354, 354A, 506, 509 IPC ke under. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin Sir, ab woh phir se upar court mein chala gaya hai, keh raha hai ki us par galat charges lage hain. Yeh toh meri pareshani aur badha raha hai. Kitna mental torture hai! Woh mujhe aur tang karna chahta hai. Please, Sir, mujhe isse bachao. Mujhe nyay chahiye, yeh sab kab tak chalega?

Sir, main Santosh hoon. Meri baat suniye please. Woh Subhash... 14 December 2012 ki shaam thi, kareeb 7:30 baje. Main Kohat Enclave, Pitam Pura mein thi, apne ghar ke paas hi. Sir, usne mere saamne itne gande gestures kiye, itni gandi-gandi baatein boli, ki main sunke hi sharm se mar gayi. Meri ruh kaanp gayi thi. Uska iraada bas mujhe be-izzat karna tha, meri izzat ko uchhalna tha. Yeh meri modesty ka sawaal hai, Sir! Main kaise sehti yeh sab? Aap please us Subhash ke khilaaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Koi aise kaise kar sakta hai kisi ladki ke saath?

Sir, main Shikha Ghai hoon. Aaj 18.12.08 ko dopahar kareeb 12:15 baje, jab main Janak Puri D-block mein police picket ke paas se jaa rahi thi, tab ek aadmi ne mere saath bahut galat kiya. Usne mujhe gande-gande ishare kiye, gandi baatein boli. Aur, sir, usne mujhe touch karne ki koshish ki, dhakka diya, meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish ki. Main bahut darr gayi, sir, abhi tak kaanp rahi hoon. Woh itni himmat kaise kar sakta hai? Mujhe bahut bura lag raha hai. Aap please uske khilaaf sakht se sakht action lijiye, sir. Aise logon ko saza milni chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main Priyanka. Meri friend Neha aur main, hum dono us din 14 April 2009 ko, dopahar ke kareeb 3 baje, Pahar Ganj mein Gali Ram Natha Patwa ke paas se jaa rahe the, H.no. 3631 ke paas. Wahan do ladke khade the. Unhone humein dekhkar bahut gande-gande ishaare kiye, aur gandi-gandi baatein bhi bolne lage. Sir, hum toh itne darr gaye the, humein samajh hi nahi aaya kya karein. Unhone humein dhamkiyan bhi di ki agar kuch bataya toh theek nahi hoga. Humari toh sareaam beizzati kar di. Hum bahut darr gaye hain, aur ab ghar se nikalne mein bhi darr lag raha hai. Please un ladko ke khilaaf strict action lijiye. Humari madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Ab court mein uska vakeel keh raha hai ki hamara jhagda bas parking ki wajah se hai, aur isliye accused ko chhod dena chahiye! Kya Sir, sach mein sirf parking ki baat hai? Meri to life mushkil ho gayi hai uski harkaton se. Meri complaint hai, court mein case chal raha hai, aur ab ye keh rahe hain ki uske khilaaf koi case hi nahi banta? Mera nuksan hua hai, mujhe pareshan kiya gaya hai. Jo sarkari vakeel hain, wo sahi keh rahe hain, uske khilaaf specific allegations hain. Sir, please dekhiye, yeh sirf parking ka mamla nahi hai, bahut serious problem hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Amita Shrestha. Meri baat suniye please, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Main Amrit Kumar Shrestha ki beti hoon aur H. No. C-2-23, Tibia College, DBG Road, New Delhi mein rehti hoon. Sir, kuch dino se meri zindagi narak ban gayi hai. Ek ladka hai, pata nahi kahan se aa gaya hai, mujhe roz pareshaan karta hai. Ghar ke bahar khada rehta hai, peecha karta hai. Phone pe gandi-gandi baatein karta hai. Mujhe darr lagta hai, sir. Main bahar nikalne se bhi darti hoon. Meri family ki izzat ka sawaal hai. Meri neend ud gayi hai, khana-peena chhod diya hai. Please, usse rokiye. Meri madad kijiye. Main bahut dukhi hoon, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut mushkil mein aayi hoon. Meri toh zindagi hi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Suna hai bade-bade log, lawyers, aur jo mahila sangathan hain jaise Bhagini Samaj aur Maharashtra Women's Council, sab hum jaisi auraton ke liye kuch saalon se letters likh rahe hain, baatein kar rahe hain, ki humein insaaf mile. Jaise koi Shri P. K. Kartha bhi keh rahe hain. Papers mein bhi aata hai ki humare liye naye kanoon banenge. Lekin Sir, ye sab toh 1980 se chal raha hai, itne saal ho gaye, par meri sunta kaun hai? Mera pati roz mujhe maarta hai, dahej ke liye tang karta hai. Main kahan jaaun? Jab sab bade-bade log milke itni charcha kar rahe hain, toh meri madad kyun nahi ho rahi? Mujhe lagta hai sab baatein hi hain, zameen par kuch nahi badla. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, please meri suniye. Main Jyoti Shakya, Naresh Shakya ki biwi, Malka Ganj, Gali Ahiram, 1857/1 se hoon. Hamara ek padosi hai, main usko jaanti hoon. Woh bahut ganda aadmi hai. Hamesha gandi-gandi baatein karta hai, gande ishaare karta rehta hai. Main usse bahut pareshaan hoon. Pichle mahine, 20 April ko, shaam ke kareeb 4 baje, main apne ghar ke bahar khadi thi. Woh wahan aaya aur usne... usne apni chaddi utaar di aur mujhe gande ishaare karne laga! Aur phir turant bhaag gaya. Main toh bas dekhti reh gayi. Sir, main bahut darr gayi hoon. Aise ghatiya harkatein karta hai woh. Mujhe usse bahut khatra hai. Please aap uske khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo. Meri izzat ka sawal hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Brijesh. Aapko yaad hai na, woh 28 June 2011 ki baat hai, shaam 6 baje ke kareeb, Molarband mein, 40 feet Road pe, Toll Tax counter ke paas? Woh Deepak Joshi, Lalit Mohan aur Akhilesh Kumar, un teeno ne milkar mera haath jabardasti pakda tha. Meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki thi unhone, sir. Kitni gandi harkatein ki thi mere saath, gande-gande gestures kiye, mujhe itna insult kiya. Aur upar se mujhe dhamkiyaan bhi de rahe the. Bahut himmat karke main yahan tak pahunchi hoon. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki unko trial ke liye bheja gaya hai. Bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapse minnat karti hoon. Woh jo aadmi hai na, jiski complaint maine Govindpuri PS mein ki thi, FIR No. 215/2020, ab woh anticipatory bail lene ki koshish kar raha hai. Sir, usne mere saath itni gandi harkatein ki thi, mujhe sharminda karne ki koshish ki thi. Aur us waqt main toh ek bachchi thi, isliye uspar POCSO Act bhi laga hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai sir, agar use bail mil gayi toh meri zindagi aur mushkil ho jaayegi. Woh phir se humein pareshaan karega. Please kuch kijiye, sir. Usse bail mat milne dijiye.

Sir, woh aadmi jisne mujhe tang kiya tha, meri izzat par haath daala aur jaan se marne ki koshish ki thi, usko 2011 mein court ne saza sunayi thi. Judge sahib ne bola tha ki usko IPC ke sections 509, 506(II) aur 307 ke तहत conviction mila hai. Ab suna hai ki woh apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai! Sir, yeh toh bahut galat hai. Main toh pehle hi uski wajah se kitna darr gayi thi, ab agar woh chhoot gaya toh meri zindagi dobara mushkil ho jayegi. Aap please dekho, usko uske kiye ki saza milni chahiye. Meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ka sawal hai.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aayi hoon. Mujhe na bahot pareshaan kiya gaya hai, online. Ek aadmi hai, usne mera jeena haram kar diya hai. Mere khilaaf usne galat cheezein post ki hain internet pe, meri badnaami ki hai. Section 67 IT Act ke तहत usne ganda content circulate kiya hai, aur Section 509 IPC ke under usne meri izzat pe haath daala hai, aise gande messages bheje hain. Yeh case Nampally Court mein chal raha hai, C.C.No.3610 of 2023. Ab woh accused chahta hai ki uske khilaaf saari proceedings cancel ho jaayen. Matlab, usne jo kiya uski koi saza hi na mile. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Meri modesty aur reputation ka sawaal hai. Police usko aise kaise chhod sakti hai? Please meri help kijiye.

Sir, main Govindpuri Police Station mein jo FIR No. 565/2016 darj karwayi thi na, apne padosi ke khilaaf... wo Section 354, 509, 354-A, 506, 452 IPC ke तहत thi. Usne mere saath badtameezi ki thi, ghar mein ghusa tha, dhamki di thi... meri izzat par haath daala tha! Aur ab, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein petition file kar raha hai meri FIR ko quash karwane ke liye? Sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Kya uski itni himmat ho gayi? Pehle toh usne galti ki, ab woh socha hai ki aise hi bach jayega? Main dar gayi hoon, sir. Agar meri FIR hi hat gayi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh zindagi mushkil ho jayegi. Aap please kuch kijiye, sir. Usse meri FIR hatane mat do, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main Kanjar, Idukki District se aaya hoon. Bahut pareshan hoon saab. Mera ek purana case hai, woh Crime No. 148/2007 wala. Saal ho gaye hain, main nyay ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Ab yeh case High Court, Ernakulam mein chal raha hai. Yeh ek 'Criminal Revision Petition' hai, matlab dobara se review ho raha hai sab. Is case mein State of Kerala ki taraf se Public Prosecutor Sri Sudheer G. hain. Itni der ho gayi hai, par mujhe ab tak insaaf nahi mila. Meri bas yahi guzarish hai, ki mera case jaldi se jaldi nipat jaaye, aur mujhe mera haq mile. Main bahut thak gaya hoon is sab se.

Sir, main wohi hoon na jiske case mein court ne pehle conviction di thi? Yaad hai na, 12 tarikh ko judgment aaya tha. Maine socha tha chalo, ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh jo accused tha, usne toh appeal file kar di hai! Matlab, fir se sab shuru se? Meri toh neend ud gayi hai Sir. Itni mehnat se, itne dar-dar ke maine gawahiyan di thi. Meri family ko bhi threat thi. Agar woh appeal jeet gaya toh kya hoga mera? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir, please kuch karo. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri suniye na, please. Mera case pata nahi kab se chal raha hai. Abhi last month, 9 September ko, Judge Radhakishan Agrawal sahab ki court mein hamari peshi thi. Mere advocate, Manish Sharma ji, puri baat rakhi meri taraf se. Respondent ke liye Government Advocate Akhilesh Kumar ji bhi wahan the. Sabne suna, bas 'Heard' likh diya gaya. Mujhe lagta hai ye itne saare laws aur judgements sirf bade logon ke liye hain, hum jaise aam logon ko toh bas tareekh pe tareekh milti hai. Main sirf nyay chahta hoon, sir. Is system mein mujhe insaaf kab milega? Main thak gaya hoon, sir. Meri madad karo!

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon, meri zindagi jhand ho gayi hai! Woh ladka, Rohit, mujhe bilkul jeene nahi de raha. Main jahan jaati hoon, college, market, woh mera peecha karta hai. Meri chupke se videos banata hai. Pichle hafte toh usne mera haath pakad liya aur itni gandi baatein boli ki main bata nahi sakti. Jab maine use roka, toh woh mujhe aur mere gharwalon ko jaan se maarne ki dhamki de raha hai. Sir, mujhe usse bohot darr lagta hai. Raat-din messages aur calls karta hai. Meri izzat chheeni ja rahi hai. Please kuch karo, sir! Mujhe uske khilaaf action chahiye.

Sir, main Rajeev Nagar se hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua tha, uski FIR number 0326/2018 aapke Kotwali PS mein darj hai. Woh Section 509 IPC aur Section 12 POCSO ka mamla tha. Woh ganda aadmi, usne meri bachchi ko kitna pareshaan kiya tha! Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh case settle ho raha hai? Settlement deed sign karwaya hai unhone 07.07.2025 ka. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri beti ko insaaf chahiye tha, usko yeh settlement nahi chahiye. Humko daraya gaya, dhamkaya gaya tha. Please Sir, mera case band mat hone dijiye. Meri bachi ka future daav par hai. Meri request hai, yeh quashing rukwa dijiye.

Sir, main Suncity Apartment, Ibbaluru mein rehti hoon. Bellanduru, Block No. 6, flat number 811 mein hai mera ghar. Sir, 14 July 2017 ki raat thi, kareeb 10:30 baj rahe the. Main apne ghar mein akeli thi. Ek delivery boy aaya tha, wo kisi aur ke flat mein khana dene aaya tha. Par sir, usne mere ghar ke paas aake ajeeb harkatein shuru kar di. Meri taraf dekha, aur kuch aisi baat boli ki main buri tarah se ghabra gayi. Mujhe bahut uncomfortable feel hua. Sir, raat ka time tha, main bahut dar gayi thi. Aise log agar gharon ke bahar aise behave karenge toh humari safety ka kya? Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Kishan Lal, beta Kale Ram ka, Jahangir Puri, A-361 se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 3 June 2009 ko, maine Model Town police station mein ek written complaint file ki thi (FIR No. 177/2009). Akhilesh Pratap Singh naam ke us aadmi ne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha, Sir. Usne bina wajah mujhe maara-peeta, dhamkiyan di, aur meri bahut beizzati ki thi. Main us din se bahut darr gaya hoon aur bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe laga tha jaldi insaaf milega, par itne saal ho gaye, aur abhi tak main court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. Meri sunwai kab hogi, Sir? Main ek gareeb aadmi hoon, mujhe bahut takleef hui hai. Bas main itna chahta hoon ki mujhe mera haq mile aur us gunehgar ko saza. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main Kokinadra, aapko apni takleef batana chahti hoon. Woh Mahender Singh aur uske saathi... pata nahi kya chahte hain mujhse. Aaj unhone meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki, sir. Pehle toh mujhe dekhkar itne gande ishaare kiye, aur aisi-aisi gandi gaaliyan di ki main sharm se zameen mein gad gayi. Unka iraada hi mujhe badnaam karna tha, sabko sunana tha. Main bas jaise-taise wahan se nikal gayi. Par mera darr yahin khatam nahi hua, sir. Uske theek aadhe ghante baad, mujhe mere phone par ek call aaya. Woh Arvind tha, unhi mein se ek. Usne mujhe dhamki di, bola ki agar maine kuch kiya toh woh dekh lega. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, sir. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe un logon se bachaiye. Unhe saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe aapki madad chahiye. Yeh Saroj Verma, jo Ravinder Verma ki wife hai, isne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata nahi iski kya dushmani hai mujhse. Sir, isne mujhe bahut tang kiya hai. Pehle 6 March 2013 ko, phir agle din 7 March 2013 ko aur teesri baar 23 March 2013 ko bhi isne mere saath bahut galat kiya. Main aapko kya bataun, Sir, mera jeena mushkil ho gaya hai. Mujhe darr lagta hai. Kripya iske khilaaf action lijiye aur mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main bas yahi batane aayi hoon ki 7 November 2015 ko, shaam 7:40 baje, Harkesh Nagar ki Sabji Mandi mein jo public toilet hai na, wahan mere saath bahut galat hua tha. Woh Pankaj Jha naam ka aadmi, usne mujhe gandi niyat se dekha aur aisi harkatein ki jisse meri izzat ko thokar lagi. Meri modesty ko usne insult kiya. Main toh bas pani bharne gayi thi, usne mauka dekh ke ye sab kiya. Meri toh rooh kaanp gayi thi us din. Tab se meri neend udd gayi hai. Uske khilaf Section 509 IPC ke तहत trial chal raha hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Aise logon ko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai usne.

Sir, main Smt. Poonam hoon, Karawal Nagar se. Rama Garden, Gali No.3, A-130/C mein rehti hoon main. Sir, meri suno please, bohot pareshan hoon main. Yeh 29 November 2011 ki baat hai. Mera pati aur beta dono kaam pe gaye the us din. Main ghar pe akeli thi, aur tabhi meri padosan, Ganga, apne teen bade-bade beton ke saath, seedhe mere ghar mein ghus aayi! Bina kisi ijaazat ke, zabardasti. Sir, main kitni darr gayi thi, main aapko bata nahi sakti. Meri izzat pe baat aa gayi thi. Us time bhi maine complaint di thi, 13 December 2011 ko, Commissioner office mein bhi 1 March 2012 ko di thi, par kuch hua nahi. Ab tak woh log mujhe tang kar rahe hain. Please, meri madad karo, Sir!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Yeh baat 2006 November ki hai, 10 se 20 tareekh ke beech. Exact time toh yaad nahi, par Uttam Nagar thane se thoda South mein, kareeb 2 km door, mere aur mere saath kuch aur logon par Lalit, Madan, Jagdish aur Bhagwan ne milkar hamla kiya tha. Un sabki milkar saazish thi aur unhone jaan-boojhkar humein maara, badi takleef di thi. Simple chot toh lagi hi thi, par darr bhi bahut laga tha Sahab. Itne saal ho gaye, ab toh mujhe insaaf chahiye. Aap please in logon par zaroor action lein!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye please. Yeh Parveen aur Amit naam ke do ladke hain na, Prasad Nagar mein rehte hain. 15 August 2008 ki shaam, kareeb 6 baje ki baat hai. In logon ne mere saath bahut gandi harkat ki, meri izzat par haath daala, mujhe beizzat karne ki koshish ki. Main akeli thi aur yeh dono milkar mujhe tang kar rahe the. Mujhe bahut bura laga Sir, main ro rahi thi. Meri request hai ki in par Section 509/34 IPC ke under FIR register ho. Prasad Nagar PS mein hi complaint likhwani hai. In logon ko sabak milna chahiye. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main Nar Singh Pal hoon. Meri beti ke saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Jab yeh incident hua na, main apne gaon gaya hua tha. 18 September 2003 ko jab main Delhi waapis aaya, tab mujhe pata chala ki yeh Harnam Singh meri beti ko utha ke le gaya tha! Bohut pareshaan ho gaya tha main, sir. Accha, Parliament Street police station walon ne use pakad toh liya hai, par isne meri beti ki zindagi kharab kar di hai. Yeh pehle bhi meri beti ko bahut tang karta tha. Chhedta tha use, gandi gandi harkatein karta tha. Sir, meri beti ko is gande aadmi se insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Bimla hoon. Woh Raju, jo C-19, Ram Gali, Nanak Chand Basti, Kotla Mubarakpur mein rehta hai na, usne meri zindagi jhand kar di! 26 August 2017 ki raat ko, kareeb 10:30 baje, usne mere paer par ईंट ka tukda maar diya. Mera paer poora zakhmi ho gaya hai, bahut gehri chot lagi hai, sir. Aaj tak dard se tadap rahi hoon. Aur usne mujhe gandi-gandi harkatein bhi dikhayi, aankhein dikha raha tha, bilkul besharam! Main Kotla Mubarakpur PS ke area mein rehti hoon. Please, usko pakdo aur saza do, nahi toh yeh kisi aur ke saath bhi aisa karega. Main bahut darr gayi hoon.

Sir, main 'N' bol rahi hoon. Meri complaint pe jo FIR hui thi na, wahi case hai yeh. Woh Anurag Luthra aur uske saathi ne jo kiya tha mere saath... Sir, unhone mujhe itna pareshan kiya, gandi-gandi baatein boli, aur meri cheezon ko bhi bigaad diya tha. Yeh sab sunke, meri izzat pe baat aayi hai, mujhe bahut takleef hui hai. Thank God, police ne investigation poori ki aur unke khilaaf chargesheet file kar di hai. Sections 509, 427, 34 IPC lage hain. Sir, meri bas yahi appeal hai ki mujhe justice mile. Unhe unke kiye ki kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Aise logon ko bilkul nahi chhodna chahiye, Sir. Mujhe poora bharosa hai aap par aur court par.

Sahab, main badi pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya karoon. Woh Jitander Kumar, Kishan Lal ka beta, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pichli baar, 2 October 2013 ko, raat ke kareeb 11:55 baje, main apne ghar ke saamne khadi thi, tabhi usne gandi-gandi baatein bolna shuru kar diya. Aise-aise ishaare kiye ki main sharam se zameen mein gad jaati. Meri izzat pe haath daala hai usne apni gandi zubaan se! Sir, mujhe usse dar lagta hai. Meri to neend ud gayi hai. Please, aap meri madad kijiye. Uske khilaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Rekha bol rahi hoon. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye, please. Yeh 17 February 2015 ki subah ki baat hai, kareeb 11 baje. Main, meri behen Poonam aur meri chachi Deepika, hum teeno Gali No. 2 mein, Than Singh Nagar, Anand Parbat, Delhi, House No. 309 ke saamne khadi thi. Sir, wahan ek aadmi ne humari taraf dekh kar itni gandi-gandi harkatein ki, itne gande ishaare kiye aur itni gandi baatein kahi. Uski niyat hi humari izzat par haath daalne ki thi. Usne jaan-bujhkar sabke saamne humein sharminda kiya, taaki log dekhein aur sunein. Hum bahut darr gaye aur ro rahe the. Sir, please usko pakdo aur saza dilao. Humari izzat ke liye ye bahut zaroori hai. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir, main V.S. hoon. Mujhe Amit Malhotra naam ke aadmi se bahut problem hai. Usne mera jeena haram kar diya hai. Pata nahi, November 2015 se lekar ab February 2016 tak, yeh roz-roz mujhe pareshaan kar raha hai. Mujhse galat-galat cheezein maangta hai, sexual favours demand karta hai. Jab main mana karti hoon, toh gandi-gandi baatein bolta hai, meri izzat par haath daalne ki koshish karta hai. Meri modesty ko insult karta hai, Sir. Mujhe dhamkiyan bhi deta hai ki agar kisi ko bataya toh bura hoga. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, ghar se nikalne mein bhi dar lagta hai. Please, Sir, iske khilaaf zaroor action lijiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Narender Sonkar, aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Meri beti D, 17 saal ki hai. Pichle mahine ki 6 tareekh ko, yaani 06.04.2013 ko, shaam ke kareeb 5 baje woh ghar se kapde press karwane gayi thi. Aur Sir, uske baad se woh waapas nahi aayi hai. Poora ek mahina hone wala hai, main kitna pareshan hoon, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Maine har jagah dhoondh liya, rishtedaaron ke yahan bhi poochha, par kahi uska pata nahi chal raha. Sir, mujhe Gaurav pe poora shak hai. Woh ladka pehle bhi meri beti ke peeche pada rehta tha. Meri beti ko kuch ho gaya toh main mar jaunga. Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye. Meri beti ko dhoondh dijiye. Woh abhi tak nahi aayi, mera dil baitha ja raha hai.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh duniya hi ujaad di hai un logon ne. Mujhe zabardasti ghaaseet ke le gaye the, aur keh rahe the ke shaadi karni padegi unse. Maine kitni minnatein ki, par koi nahi suni meri. Har pal meri jaan atki hui thi. Upar se jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di, agar main unki baat nahi mani. Main aaj bhi woh din yaad karke kaanp jaati hoon. Yeh toh seedha seedha kidnapping aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki ka case hai. Please Sir, un logon ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun. Mera woh bahut purana mamla hai, Bahraich ka. Woh 1994 mein hua tha. Woh Guddoo, Prem Chand, Magadhu aur Parmanand – in charon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Unhone mujhe ghar se uthaya, bandh karke rakha aur phir mere saath... ganda kaam kiya tha, Sir. Woh din yaad karke aaj bhi kaanp jaati hoon. 1996 mein Judge Sahab ne unko gunahgaar mana tha aur saza bhi di thi, do-teen saal ki kaid. Par ab suna hai woh log phir se appeal mein chale gaye hain. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir, ki kahin woh chhoot na jaayen. Meri aapse haath jod ke request hai, Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Unko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Dhemaji se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, woh mera bachcha kidnap hua tha 2009 mein? Kitni mushkil se uss gunehgar ko pakda tha aur Sessions Court ne usko Section 363 mein saza bhi sunai thi 2011 mein. Humne itne saal intezaar kiya tha insaaf ke liye. Abhi sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai, Sir. Yeh kya ho raha hai? Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai yeh sochkar. Kya itne saal ki ladai bekar jayegi? Kya woh phir se bahar aa jayega aur humein pareshaan karega? Hum gareeb log hain, Sir. Bas aap hi ho jo humari madad kar sakte ho. Please kuch kijiye, humko bahut darr lag raha hai!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Kitni mushkil se toh Shahjahanpur Court ne, woh Additional Sessions Judge saab ne, usko saza sunayi thi. Meri bachi ko kidnap kiya tha usne (woh Section 363 ka case tha na, Case Crime No. C/13/2004, Sessions Trial No. 475 of 2005). Ab suna hai woh Central Jail Bareilly se appeal kar raha hai apni conviction aur sentence ke khilaaf! Matlab, itni mushkil se insaaf mila, aur ab woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish karega? Hum gareeb log kahan tak ladenge, sir? Meri toh jaan hi nikal jaati hai yeh soch ke. Kya meri bachi ko phir se us trauma se guzarna padega? Please, kuch kijiye, sir.

Sahab, meri baat suno, please. Main bahut mushkil mein hoon. Parso ki baat hai, 16 November 2014 ko shaam ke time, main Ghitorni mein, woh 100 foota road hai na, wahan se jaa raha tha. Kuch logon ne bina baat ke mujhe gher liya aur maarna shuru kar diya. Unhone mujhe buri tarah se peeta, itna ki main zameen pe gir gaya aur behosh sa ho gaya tha. Mujhe abhi bhi bahut dard ho raha hai, pura badan toot raha hai. Police toh aayi thi, aur PCR ne mujhe hospital bhi pahunchaya. Meri jaan bach gayi, par ab main un logon ko chhodna nahi chahta. Sir, please meri complaint likho aur un logon ke khilaaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon, mere saath kya hua. Mujhe kisi ne kidnap kar liya tha. Vo log mujhe zabardasti utha ke le gaye, meri marzi ke bina. Phir mujhe ek aisi jagah pe chhupa ke rakha jahan koi nahi tha, bilkul akela. Mujhe pata hi nahi tha main kahan hoon, aur na hi mujhe wahan se nikalne de rahe the. Ek tarah se illegal confinement thi, sir. Main bahut darr gaya tha, socha ab kabhi ghar wapas nahi ja paunga. Bahut mushkil se main wahan se bhaag ke aaya hoon. Please, un logon ke khilaaf kadi action lo jinhone mere saath yeh galat kiya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir, unhe saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aayi hoon ki Dalip Kumar ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Bahut saal ho gaye, 23.7.2004 ki baat hai, us din usne mujhe zabardasti utha liya tha. Meri marzi ke khilaaf mujhe kidnap kiya, aur phir... jo hua, woh main bayan bhi nahi kar sakti. New Ashok Nagar police ne uske khilaaf case banaya hai, Section 363, 366 aur 376 IPC ke तहत. Woh abhi custody mein hai, but mujhe darr lagta hai. Meri family bahut pareshan hai, aur main toh har din us khauff mein jeeti hoon. Please, use uske kiye ki kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir, aur kuch nahi.

Sahab, main Aslam hoon. Jhuggi No. 283, Gali No. 12, Kadri Masjid, Shastri Park mein rehta hoon. Lakdi ka business karta hoon. Meri baat suno Sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera bhai hai Pappu, woh bhi paas ki jhuggi mein rehta hai. Uske char bachche hain. Uska sabse chhota beta, Shahid, jo sirf डेढ़ saal ka tha, woh pichhle nau mahine se missing hai. Sir, nau mahine ho gaye! Mere bhai ne pehle bhi complaint karayi thi police station mein, lekin kuchh pata hi nahi chal raha. Woh chhota sa bachcha kahan gaya? Hamara to roro ke bura haal hai. Please Sahab, hamari madad karo, us masoom ko dhundne mein. Bachcha bilkul chhota hai, kaise reh raha hoga akela. Kuchh toh karo Sahab!

Sir, main Lalita ka pita hoon. Meri beti, Lalita, jiski umar sirf 15 saal hai, usse Banti aur Ajay Kumar ne kidnap kar liya hai. Yeh ghatna 10 October 2005 ko hamare ghar, House No. 5657, R.R. Block, Navin Shahdara, Delhi se hui thi. Woh meri beti ko meri bina marzi ke, meri guardianship se zabardasti utha kar le gaye hain. Mujhe darr hai sir, ki woh usse zabardasti shaadi karayenge ya phir kuch aur galat kaam karenge. Meri bacchi abhi chhoti hai, sir. Please, meri madad kijiye. Meri beti ko wapas laiye aur un gunehgaron ko saza dilaiye. Main aapka aabhari rahunga.

Sir, main Lalita ka baap hoon. Meri beti Lalita ko 10.10.2005 ko, Banti aur Ajay Kumar, hamare ghar se, House No. 5657, R.R. Block, Navin Shahdara se zabardasti utha le gaye. Meri beti abhi sirf 15 saal ki hai, chhoti bachchi hai. Humari bina marzi ke, usko kidnap kar liya hai. Mujhe poora yakeen hai ki woh log uski shaadi zabardasti karwayenge ya uske saath koi ganda kaam karenge. Sir, meri Lalita ko wapas laado, main aur meri biwi bahut pareshaan hain. Woh log bahut bure hain, meri bachchi ki zindagi barbaad kar denge. Please jaldi kuch karo.

Sir, main Aarti hoon, Suresh Chand ki beti. Main aapko batane aayi hoon ki mere saath kya hua. Woh Vinod Singh hai na, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Woh 11 July 2006 ka din tha, mujhe yaad hai. Papa ne mujhe thodi der ke liye akela chhoda tha. Tabhi Vinod aaya aur... aur usne mujhe zabardasti utha liya. Main cheekhti rahi, chillati rahi, par kisi ne nahi suna. Usne mujhe kahi door le jaakar... mere saath bahut galat kiya, sir. Main bahut darr gayi thi. Meri izzat loot li usne. Sir, please usko saza dilwaiye. Us Vinod Singh ko chhodna mat. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut dukhi man se aapke paas aaya hoon. Meri zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Meri beti, meri pyaari bacchi, 4 January 2012 ko gayab ho gayi hai. Pata nahi kahan chali gayi woh, ghar se nikalne ke baad uska kuch pata nahi chal raha. Main usi din, 4 January ko hi, M.S. Park police station mein report likhwane aaya tha. Maine saari baat batayi thi unhe, meri beti missing hai. Unhone 363 IPC mein case toh register kar liya tha, aur messages bhi circulate kiye the. Lekin Sir, aaj tak meri beti ka koi suraag nahi mila. Mujhe bahut tension ho rahi hai, raat ko neend nahi aati. Meri beti ko dhoondh do Sir, woh bahut masoom hai. Please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, please meri baat suniye. Mera bachcha gayab ho gaya hai, sir! Pata nahi kya karun. Yeh isi saal February ki 28 tareekh ki baat hai, New Usmanpur mein hi. Ek Sajuddin @ Sajid naam ka banda hai, Mohd. Umar ka beta, usne hi mere bachche ko utha liya hai. Mujhe uska pata maloom hai, woh E-130/6 mein rehta hai. Sir, mera to dimaag kaam nahi kar raha. Main bas apne bachche ko wapas chahta hoon. Aap please us Sajid ko pakad lo aur mere bachche ko dhoondh kar la do. Meri aap se hath jod kar guzarish hai, meri madad karo.

Sir, main Ramchandra hu. Meri beti, uska naam... abhi chhodiye, woh Amrita Public School, Sangam Vihar mein padhti hai, class 7th mein hai. Abhi bas 13-14 saal ki hai, Sir. Kal subah, matlab 11 tarikh ko, 7:15 baje school gayi thi. Abhi tak waapas nahi aayi, Sir! Poora ek din ho gaya hai, ab toh raat ke 12:20 baj gaye hai aur meri beti ghar nahi lauti hai. Mera dil baitha jaa raha hai. Pata nahi kahan hogi, kis haal mein hogi. Aap please meri madad kijiye Sir, meri beti ko dhoondhiye. Main bohot pareshan hu, kya karun?

Sir, main Chandani Begum, Geeta Colony se aayi hoon. Aaj 30.11.2006 hai. Mere saath bahut bada zulm hua hai, sir. Woh Munna Khan, usne meri poori zindagi tabah kar di hai. Usne mujhe uthaya, ghar se kidnap kiya, aur phir... phir usne meri izzat ke saath khilwad kiya. Main ab kisko apna chehra dikhaungi? Kya galti thi meri? Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh Munna Khan pakda gaya hai, suna hai maine. Use kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Usne jo mere saath Sections 363, 366 aur 376 jaise gunaah kiye hain, uski use puri saza mile. Meri yahi fariyaad hai, sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Kallo. Meri suniye please. Pata nahi meri kismat mein kya likha hai. Yeh aaj ki baat nahi hai, Sir. Yeh toh bahut purani baat hai, 17 May 2012 ki. Us din mere saath jo hua na, main aaj tak bhool nahi paya hoon. Meri poori life disturb ho gayi hai. Unn logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Main tabhi complaint karne aaya tha, aur aaj tak us insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Mujhe bahut umeed hai ki aap meri madad karenge. Please Sir, meri suniye aur action lijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni complain leke aayi hoon. Meri beti ke saath bahut galat hua hai, Sahab. Wo abhi sirf 15 saal ki hai, chhoti bachchi hai meri. Us kambakht aadmi ne usko kidnap kiya, dhamki di aur phir... uske saath bahut ganda kaam kiya. Mera toh jeena mushkil ho gaya hai. Ye sab 13 June ko hua tha. Police ne uspar case toh darj kar liya hai, usko pakad bhi liya hai, U/s 363, 376 aur 506 IPC mein. Par mujhe insaf chahiye, Sir. Usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri beti darr gayi hai, woh bahar nikalne se bhi darti hai. Please, meri madad kijiye. Us gande aadmi ko chhodna mat.

Saab ji, main Kiransinh Jalamsinh, yahin ka rehne wala hoon. Aaj raat ki baat hai, 14 May 1998 ko, jab main apne kaam se thaka-hara ghar lauta, toh meri biwi ne mujhe ek aisi baat batayi ki mere pairon tale zameen khisak gayi. Usne kaha ki hamaari sabse badi beti, jo abhi sirf 16 saal ki hai, woh ghar nahi aayi hai. Shaam se gayab hai, aur uski koi khabar nahi. Saab, ek baap ka dil jaanta hai, kitna darr lag raha hai. Meri masoom beti kahan hogi, kis haal mein hogi, kuch pata nahi. Meri biwi ka ro-ro kar bura haal hai. Please, meri madad kijiye, meri beti ko dhoondhne mein. Uske saath kuch galat na ho gaya ho. Meri beti ko wapas laado saab.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mera case hai na, usme Court ne 18 tareekh ko Parmanand Katara naam ke wakeel sahab ko appoint kiya tha, ki woh meri madad karenge, mera paksh rakhenge. Mujhe laga chalo, ab toh insaaf milega. Par, Sir, woh toh aaye hi nahi! Socho, main kitni umeed lagaye baitha tha, aur woh bina bataye gayab ho gaye. Court ne bhi bola 'yeh kya ho raha hai, humein accha nahi laga'. Meri toh saansein atak gayi thi, Sir. Kya hoga mere case ka?
