Phir Court ne Mohan Pandey ji ko request kiya, woh kisi aur case ke liye wahan the, unhone haan bhari. Theek hai, unhone madad ki, par unko bhi prepare karne mein time laga na. Mera case aur lamba khich gaya. Ek toh waise hi pareshaan hoon, upar se yeh sab! Main toh bas ab insaaf chahta hoon, Sir. Meri suno!

Sahab, main aapke paas bahut pareshaan hokar aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, Balaghat wala woh hamara puraana case? 1996 mein jo hua tha, uske liye Shakil Khan aur Vahid Khan ko 1997 mein Sessions Judge ne guilty maana tha, saza bhi mili thi. Humein laga tha chalo, insaaf ho gaya. Par ab yeh kya? Pata chala hai ki unhone appeal ki thi, aur uska judgment ab 6 December 2021 ko aaya hai. Itne saalon baad bhi, yeh log peecha nahi chhod rahe! Cr.P.C. 374(2) ke तहत pata nahi kya-kya arguments de rahe hain. Main toh bas darr raha hoon, kahin meri family ki jo takleef thi, woh sab bekaar na ho jaaye. Mujhe abhi bhi Shakil aur Vahid se khatra lagta hai. Kya yeh case kabhi khatam nahi hoga?

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi. Woh aadmi... usne mere saath kitni baar galat kiya, jab main chhoti thi, 16 saal se bhi kam umar ki thi. Maine court mein sab bataya, gawahiyan di, apne testimony mein ek ek baat rakhi. Humne socha ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin sir, High Court ne toh usko chhod diya! Meri baat suni hi nahi, mere saboot ko dekha hi nahi. Kaise ho sakta hai aisa? Maine itna ro-ro ke sab bataya tha, aur unhone meri suni hi nahi. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh aadmi bahar kaise ghoom sakta hai? Mere saath itna galat hua, aur ab High Court bhi meri nahi sun raha. Mujhe nahi pata ab main kahan jaaun, kya karun.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri suno toh sahi! Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Log kehte hain na, 'pyaar andha hota hai' ya 'love and war mein sab chalta hai', par iska matlab yeh toh nahi ki koi aise dhokha deke meri zindagi barbaad kar de! Meri beti ko unhone zabardasti apne saath rakha hua hai, uski marzi ke khilaaf. Mujhe pata hai ki yeh bade-bade kanoon aur judgments ki baatein hain, par hum garibon ka kya? Mujhe bas itna pata hai ki woh meri beti ko illegal tareeke se hold kar rahe hain. Yeh log 'Habeas Corpus-vebas Corpus' ki baat karte hain, mujhe toh bas meri beti chahiye, aur jo bhi insaaf mil sakta hai, woh dilwaiye. Please, help kijiye sir, bahut mushkil mein hoon main.

Sir, meri beti bhaag gayi hai. Abhi toh bas 18 saal ki hui hai, abhi kya samajh hai usko duniya ki? Kisi lafange ladke ke chakkar mein pad gayi hai, shaadi bhi kar li hai uske saath. Woh ladka usko kya future dega, kuch pata nahi. Aur ab toh, Sir, wohi beti court mein jaakar bol rahi hai ki mujhe uske maa-baap se khatra hai, mujhko protection chahiye. Main yahan court ke corridors mein apni beti ke peeche bhaag raha hoon, ro raha hoon, par woh sunne ko taiyaar nahi. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai Sir? Aise bachche sirf moh-maaya mein apni zindagi barbaad kar rahe hain aur court bhi unhi ki sunta hai. Hum maa-baap ka kya kasoor hai? Meri toh bas yahi complaint hai, Sir, humara bhi koi suno.

Sir, meri biwi ko... meri Seema ko koi bhaga ke le gaya hai! Subah se ghar pe nahi hai woh. Pata nahi kiski nazar lag gayi hamari khushiyon ko. Woh jo ek banda hai na, Raju, usne seedhe-seedhe toh nahi uthaaya meri biwi ko, par sab usi ka kiya dhara hai. Usne hi usko bhadkaaya, usne hi yeh sab plan banaya ki meri biwi ghar chhod de, mere se door chali jaaye. Meri toh poori duniya ulat-pulat ho gayi hai, sir! Main toh abhi bhi usko apni patni maanta hoon, meri guardianship mein hai woh. Sirf uske ghar se nikalne se kya offence khatam ho jaata hai? Jisne yeh sab karwaya hai, usko pakdo, usko saza do. Meri biwi ko wapas laao, sir, please. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main bas yahi kehne aayi hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi un teen logon ki wajah se. Jab main chhoti thi, un darindon ne mujhe uthane ki koshish ki thi, bechne ki baat karte the. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi, Sir. Section 366A, Section 372... yeh sab IPC-VPC mujhe nahi pata, bas itna jaanti hoon ki unhone mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Pichle saal, 5 August 2003 ko High Court ke judge sahib ne unhe saza sunai thi – 10 saal aur 5 saal ki kadi kaid. Itne saal baad thoda toh sukoon mila tha, ki insaaf mila. Ab pata chala hai ki unhone appeal file ki hai. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai phir se.

Sir, main Sushila ki behen bol rahi hoon. Meri behen... uske saath bohot galat hua hai. Yeh Sat Parkash, uska chacha Hari Chand aur chachi Sarla, inhone meri behen ki zindagi barbaad kar di! Pehle toh usko kidnap kiya, zabardasti, Sections 363, 366, 366-A ke andar... aur phir, uske saath ghatiya kaam kiya, 376 IPC ke tehet. Meri behen itni toot gayi thi ki usne apni jaan dene ki koshish ki. Marte marte bhi usne ek suicide note likha tha. Us note mein usne sab sachai likhi thi, Sir. Ab yeh log us note ko hi galat tareeke se use kar rahe hain court mein, apne aap ko bachane ke liye. Mujhe meri behen ke liye insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please, in logon ko saza dilwao. Unhone meri behen ko marne par majboor kar diya.

Sir, woh jo mera case tha na, Jabalpur court mein, uska judgment aa gaya hai. Haan sir, woh jo Sessions Trial No. 159/2018 tha, uska faisla 17.12.2018 ko aaya hai. Judge sahab ne, jo XIV Additional Sessions Judge hain, uss darinde ko guilty mana hai. Mujhe thodi tasalli mili hai, sir. Usne mere saath jo kiya tha... Sections 363, 366A, 376(2)(f)(i), 376-A, 376-AB, 302 aur 201 IPC ke under use दोषी ठहराया hai. Sochiyye sir, do-do baar phansi ki saza mili hai use! Life imprisonment bhi aur do aur paanch saal ki kaid bhi. Par sir, mujhe darr lag raha hai. Suna hai woh appeal karega. Kahi phir se bahar na aa jaaye. Aap log zara dhyan rakhna sir, please. Meri zindagi toh usne barbaad kar di, ab kam se kam woh jail mein hi rahe.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, uski complaint maine Sujauli police station mein darj karwai thi, FIR number 033 of 2018. Sections 363, 366 aur 352 IPC ke तहत. Uska kidnap hua tha, aur uske saath badtameezi bhi hui. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein meri us FIR ko hi quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain! Meri complaint ko cancel karwana chahte hain. Unke bade bade vakil hain, aur toh aur government ke lawyer bhi unki baat sun rahe hain. UIDAI se bhi koi aaya hai. Sir, agar meri FIR hi hat gayi toh meri beti ko insaaf kaise milega? Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi nainsaafi hai. Main gareeb aadmi hoon, itne bade logon se kaise ladunga? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki woh log apni power se bach jayenge. Please, meri madad kijiye!

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon, meri bahut badi mushkil hai. Tejaji Devaji Thakor ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Usne mujhe kidnap kiya, mere saath bahut galat kaam kiya, aur mere ghar se samaan bhi chura liya tha. Yeh saari baat 1997 ki hai, Mehsana mein court case chala tha. Us time judge sahab ne 1999 mein usko 10 saal ki jail ki saza di thi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin sahab, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh Tejaji apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar raha hai. Meri itni takleef ke baad bhi, agar woh bach gaya toh main kya karungi? Aap please kuch kijiye, use uski saza milni chahiye. Mujhe ab bhi usse darr lagta hai.

Sir, main Munmun ka baap bol raha hoon. Meri beti Munmun, jo Bhopal ke Millennium College mein padhti thi, usko 29 September 2016 ko kisi unknown person ne kidnap kar liya tha. Tab maine Piplani police station mein complaint darj karai thi. Police ne investigation ki thi, aur uske baad jisne meri beti ko uthaya tha, uske khilaaf section 363 aur 366 IPC ke तहत charge-sheet bhi file ki thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh criminal court mein petition daal raha hai, taaki uski charge-sheet cancel ho jaye! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri beti ke saath itna bada galat hua hai, aur woh aise hi bach jayega? Humne badi mushkil se complaint ki thi. Meri beti ko insaaf kaise milega agar yeh sab cancel ho gaya? Please sir, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai. Us aadmi ne mujhe kidnap kiya tha, aur mere saath bahut galat kiya (Section 366 aur 376 IPC ke under uspar charges the). Mera case Belgaum court mein chal raha tha. Maine socha ab toh mujhe insaaf milega, woh jail jaayega. Lekin Sir, woh jury ne toh usko 'not guilty' bol diya! Matlab, usko chhod diya? Mere saath jo hua, woh sab jhooth tha kya? Judge saab ne toh bola tha ki simple kidnapping (Section 363) mein bhi guilty kar sakte hain, par phir bhi usko chhod diya. Mujhe toh kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Meri izzat chali gayi, aur woh azaad ghoom raha hai. Aap hi batao, mujhe insaaf kaise milega?

Sir, main wohi hoon, Mala Devi. Pichhle mahine maine ek complaint di thi, yaad hai? Woh jo mere saath dhokha hua tha, uske baare mein. Ab mujhe ek court se notice aaya hai, yeh dekho. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai kya ho raha hai. Maine toh sirf apni baat batayi thi, aur ab yeh kaagaz aane lage hain. Woh log jinhone mere paise maare the, woh abhi bhi aazaad ghoom rahe hain, aur mujhe notice pe notice aa rahe hain. Kya karu main? Please, meri madad karo. Mujhe toh sirf insaaf chahiye, aur mere paise wapas. Yeh sab legal proceedings meri samajh se bahar hain, sir. Main toh pehle bhi complain karne aayi thi, ab yeh kya naya chakkar hai?

Sir, main Ram Bharose, ek mamooli sa kabari hoon. Meri chhoti si family hai, do betiyaan hain aur bas ek hi beta tha, 14 saal ka, Raja. Woh 7th class mein padhta tha, Jhilmil ke public school mein. Mera baccha kitna accha tha, sir! Ramlila mein Hanuman ka role karta tha, sab usko bahut pasand karte the. Woh A-2 ko pehle se jaanta tha. Aur A-1, jisko mera beta "uncle ji" bolta tha, uske pair chhoota tha, usse izzat karta tha. Socha bhi nahi tha ki aise log... Sir, mera baccha chala gaya. Mera sab kuch lut gaya hai. Mujhe nyay chahiye, please meri help kijiye.

Sir, main Guddu ki maa hoon. Meri bacchi ke saath jo hua na, uske baad toh meri duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Lekin ab, Pune ke judge sahab ne sab sunke, saare saboot dekhke, yeh maan liya hai ki meri Guddu ke saath zyadati hui hai. Unhone hamare favour mein decision diya hai, Sir. Woh Narayanlal Choudhary hain na, apni kirane ki dukaan wale, unhone khud gawah di hai. Unhone apni aankhon se dekha tha us Rahul ko meri Guddu ke liye chocolates kharidte hue, us din se pehle jab meri bacchi gayab hui thi. Aur Gangubai ne bhi gawah di hai. Sab ne dekha tha un dono ko saath mein. Meri bacchi ke liye justice chahiye, Sir. Ab toh judge sahab ne bhi bol diya hai, us kameene ko saza milni hi chahiye!

Sir, woh jo mera case chal raha hai na, usmein kya ho raha hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai. Woh log 260 din der se papers file kiye the, poore 260 din! Aur court ne bol diya 'theek hai, maaf kar diya'. Kya yeh insaaf hai, sir? Hum jaise aam aadmi ek din late ho jaayein toh kitni mushkil hoti hai, aur unko poore 260 din ki chhoot mil gayi. Aur upar se pata nahi kis baat ki 'exemption' bhi de di hai unko. Har cheez unke favour mein jaa rahi hai, aur main toh bas yahan dhakke kha raha hoon. Meri sunwai kab hogi, sir? Mujhe lagta hai, mere saath galat ho raha hai. Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... meri beti ke saath jo hua, uski FIR humne Dholka Police Station mein 1st February 2013 ko karayi thi. Wo CR No. I-20/2013 hai, Sections 363 aur 366 IPC ke तहत. Usne meri bacchi ko kidnap kiya tha, zabardasti shadi ke liye. Hum itne saal se insaaf ka intezaar kar rahe hain. Aur ab, Sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh accused, jisne meri beti ki zindagi barbaad ki, woh court mein application daal raha hai! Woh chahta hai ki meri complaint (FIR) hi cancel ho jaye! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri beti ke saath galat hua hai, aur woh case hi khatam karwana chahta hai? Sir, please help kijiye. Hamare saath anyay mat hone dijiye. Woh case band nahi hona chahiye. Meri beti ko insaaf milna chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun! Meri toh life hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mujhe bina kisi reason ke, bina kisi galti ke utha liya gaya hai. Jalaun ke DM sahab ne 18 May 2015 ko ek order nikala hai, aur uske basis pe mujhe NSA ke तहत pakad ke band kar diya hai. National Security Act laga diya mujh par! Main bilkul nirdosh hoon, sahab! Mera kya kasoor hai? Pata nahi kaisa order hai ye, bilkul galat hai, farzi hai! Meri azadi cheen li gayi hai. Main toh bas apni family ke paas jaana chahta hoon. Aap hi batao, kya ye insaaf hai? Please meri madad karo, mujhe jaldi se jaldi riha karwao aur ye order cancel karwa do. Main aur nahi reh sakta aise.

Sir, meri suno please! Main bahut ghabrayi hui hoon. Woh jo accused log hain na, unhone humari zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Meri aur mere masoom bachche ki jaan ko khatra hai, aur jo doosre gawah hain, unko bhi woh log bahut dara-dhamka rahe hain. Dabao daal rahe hain, violence ki dhamki de rahe hain, criminal intimidation kar rahe hain. Sir, maine toh pehle bhi 13.01.2012 ko ek complaint di thi, ek representation (Annexure P-5), lekin uspar ab tak koi sunwai nahi hui. Meri aapse haath jodkar request hai, please ab toh meri FIR turant darj karo. Hum sabki safety aur security ka sawaal hai. Hamein un gundon se bachao, sir!

Sir, main Yogendra Yadav hoon. Meri wife, Smt. Manju Yadav, ko kisi ne zabardasti roke rakha hai. Kahan hai woh, mujhe kuch nahi pata chal raha! Main toh bas yahi chahta hoon ki use court ke saamne laya jaye, woh meri legally wedded wife hai! Humari shaadi hui hai, Sir. Humari ek chhoti beti bhi hai, uski custody ka order bhi mere paas hai. Lekin pata nahi kyun, court mein meri Manju ko pesh karne ki baat ki jagah, log meri beti ki custody ke purane order ki baat kar rahe hain. Kya connection hai uska iss sab se? Mujhe toh bas meri Manju wapas chahiye, Sir! Woh kahan hai, kaisi hai, mujhe kuch nahi pata. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai. Please meri help kijiye, use dhoondne mein.

Sir, Champawat court ne 04.05.2016 ko mere favour mein judgment diya tha. Mujhe laga tha mera case khatam ho gaya, insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki State ne uske against appeal kar di thi aur uska judgment bhi 07.12.2017 ko aa gaya hai. Main toh ab bahut dar gaya hoon. Ye kya ho raha hai mere saath? Ek gareeb aadmi ko thodi si khushi bhi nahi mil sakti kya? Pehle main jeeta, ab ye sab. Mere paas aur paise nahi hain Sir, please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas apni takleef batane aayi hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo galat hua tha, uski FIR number 91/2014 Badarpur police station mein darj hui thi. Us gande aadmi ne meri beti ko uthaya tha, uske saath gandi harkatein ki thi. Uspar IPC 363, 354A aur POCSO Act laga tha. Lekin, Sir, court ne, woh 19.12.2016 ko, usko chhod diya! Judge sahab ne usko bari kar diya. Sochiye, Sir, humara kya haal hua hoga. Itna sab hone ke baad bhi, usko koi saza nahi mili. Meri beti abhi bhi darti hai. Abhi pata chala hai ki sarkar ne us faisle ke khilaaf appeal ki hai. Meri bas yahi guzaarish hai, usko saza mile, Sir. Meri beti ko insaaf mile.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Woh Dhirendra Patel alias Jony, jisne mujhe utha liya tha aur meri zindagi barbaad kar di, ab apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai. Chitrakoot ke Fast Track Court ne use pehle saza sunai thi 05.09.2016 ko, Case Crime No. 102 of 2012 mein. Usne mujhe Section 363 aur 366 ke under kidnap kiya tha. Ab woh chahta hai ki use chhod diya jaye. Sir, yeh galat hai! Jo pehle faisla aaya tha, woh bilkul sahi tha. Main bas itna chahti hoon ki usko uske gunah ki saza mile. Meri zindagi ka sawaal hai yeh. Please, meri suniye aur mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Woh aadmi toh abhi bhi mana kar raha hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi! Meri toh samajh nahi aa raha hai. Humne toh apne case mein itne saare saboot diye hain. Dus-das gawaahon ne uske khilaaf gawaahi di hai, un sab ne apni aankhon se dekha tha. Kitne paper, kitne documents, sab court mein jama karaye hain – P1 se P12 tak. Aur toh aur, jo motorcycle usne use ki thi, woh bhi mili hai. Woh MO1 ke naam se court mein hai. Aur ek CD bhi hai, MO2, jismein sab kuch record hai, saaf-saaf dikh raha hai uski kartoot. Par woh toh phir bhi bol raha hai ki usne kuch nahi kiya. Aur khud ki safai mein usne toh ek bhi saboot nahi diya hai, na koi gawaah, na koi kaagaz. Aise kaise chalega, Sir? Mujhe toh insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko bata rahi hoon, yeh Sunil s/o Lakhmi Chand... isne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Usne mujhe uthaya tha, zabardasti shaadi karwane ki koshish ki, aur phir... jo usne mere saath kiya (rape). Police ne pakda tha use, aur court ne bhi usko mujrim thehraya tha 2002 mein. Bhiwani ke Additional Sessions Judge ne usko umarqaid di thi, aur ₹1000 ka fine bhi lagaya tha uss din. Par ab main sun rahi hoon ki usne apni saza ke khilaaf appeal file ki hai! Sir, meri to saari izzat chali gayi thi us din, main kaise bhool sakti hoon? Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai ki woh bahar na aa jaaye. Meri madad karo, Sir. Usko uski saza milni chahiye, woh chhute na.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... badi mushkil se toh case aage badha tha. Court ne sabko guilty maana, saza bhi suna di thi. Mujhe laga ab insaaf mil gaya, chain ki saans aayi thi. Par nahi, sir! Ab un sabne appeal kar di hai. Matlab, phir se wahi sab shuru se jhelna padega? Ek Tej Ram toh tha, woh toh mar gaya hai ab, uska case khatam ho gaya. Par baaki sab toh abhi bhi hain na! Aur suno sir, sabse zyada takleef toh is baat se hai ki meri apni Mausi, Tanno @ Tarawati, aur Mama Laxmi Narain, jinhone mere saath yeh sab kiya tha, unke wakeel ab keh rahe hain ki unko toh saza mil hi nahi sakti! Yeh kya baat hui, sir? Mere apne the woh, unhone hi dhokha diya. Unhe kaise chhod sakte hain? Mujhe toh bahut darr lag raha hai, sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri zindagi toh tabah ho gayi hai. Woh Rinku @ Prempal hai na, jisne meri beti ke saath galat kiya tha... POCSO ka case chal raha tha uspar Bulandshahr court mein. Pata hai, 30.11.2019 ko uske khilaaf faisla bhi aaya tha. Humein thodi tasalli mili thi. Par ab, sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki usne upar appeal kar di hai. Matlab kya, sir? Uska kya matlab hai? Meri beti ko itna dard mila, humne itni mushkil se insaaf ki umeed ki thi, aur ab woh phir se bachne ki koshish kar raha hai? Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Kahi woh chhuth na jaaye. Meri madad kijiye, sir. Hum gareeb log hain, kahan jaayenge hum?

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri aur mere parivaar ki jaan ko khatra hai. Kuch log hain jo humein bahut tang kar rahe hain, harass kar rahe hain, aur humein neecha dikhaate hain. Main 22 saal ka hoon, aur un logon ne humein dhamki di hai ki jhoote case mein phansa denge. Humein unse apni life aur liberty ka darr hai. Meri aapse haath jodkar request hai, please aap humari madad kijiye. Humein un logon se bachaiye. Unko boliye ki woh humein aur pareshaan na karein aur kisi false case mein na phansaayein. Hum bohot darre hue hain, Sir. Please humein protection dijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aayi hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di Premwati ne. Main toh tab chhoti si bachchi thi, school jaati thi. Woh Premwati didi... woh mujhe bahla-phulsa ke apne saath le gayi. Usne kaha tha 'chal ghumne chalte hain,' par woh mujhe gandi jagah le gayi. Wahan usne mujhe un logon ke hawale kar diya. Unhone mere saath bahut galat kiya, sahab. Main kuch samajh hi nahi paayi, bas darti rahi. Woh Premwati sab jaanti thi, usne hi un logon ko raasta dikhaya, mujhe phansaya. Uske karan meri izzat lut gayi. Meri family bhi kitni sharminda hui. Please, un Premwati aur un sab ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye, taaki kisi aur bachchi ke saath aisa na ho. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni bachchi ka case lekar aayi hoon. Meri chhoti bachchi, jisko woh kamina utha kar le gaya tha, uske saath jo kiya usne... Poora Bombay court mein uska case chala, Sir. Us gunehgar ko POCSO aur IPC ke tehat saza mili hai, usko convict kiya gaya hai. Usne meri beti ko kidnap kiya, zabardasti ki, galat kaam kiya uske saath. Usmein aur log bhi the jo uski madad kar rahe the. Meri bachchi ki zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Humein bas ab insaaf chahiye ki usko uske kiye ki poori saza mile, jail mein sadhe woh. Humne bahut dukh jhela hai. Please, Sir, dekho, usko chhootne mat dena.

Sir, main Murad Nagar, Ghaziabad se aayi hoon. Aapko yaad hai mera woh case? 2012 mein hua tha, jo Crime No. 148. Jab woh 'Y' ne meri zindagi barbaad ki thi, mujhe kidnap karke... woh sab kiya tha. Police ne cases lagaye the uspar 363, 366, 376 IPC ke. Ghaziabad Sessions Court ne usko saza bhi sunai thi. Mujhe laga tha ki chalo, ab nyay mil gaya. Lekin Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh 'Y' upar wali court mein appeal kar raha hai! Main itni mushkil se ladi thi, har jagah gayi thi. Ab phir se yeh sab. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh meri kya izzat reh jayegi? Meri zindagi toh pehle hi bigad chuki hai. Please, kuch kijiye, Sir. Mujhe bas nyay chahiye.

Sir, main aapko bas yeh batane aayi hoon. Woh jo aadmi hai na, woh gunda, accused number one, jisne meri aur meri chhoti beti ke saath itna zulm kiya, ab woh bail maang raha hai! Tiptur Town Police ne uska case toh register kiya tha, Crime No. 126/2020. Usne meri beti ko uthaya (kidnap kiya), phir band karke rakha, aur usko aur mujhe dhamki di. Meri beti ke saath toh usne galat kaam bhi kiya, Sir, woh toh bacchi hai abhi, POCSO ke under cases lagaye hain uspar. Aur usne toh uski shaadi bhi karwane ki koshish ki thi, bal vivah! Yeh sab usne apne doosre saathiyon ke saath milkar kiya hai. Sir, agar usko bail mil gayi na, toh humari jaan ko khatra hoga. Please, usko bail mat milne dena. Humein insaaf chahiye.

Sir, Daroga ji, main apni complaint leke aaya hoon. Yaad hai woh Raghbir @ Bheera, Puran ka beta? Jiski 2002 mein saza hui thi, usko court ne दोषी ठहराया था. Ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Usne puraane judgment ko challenge kar diya hai. Itne saal lag gaye mujhe justice milne mein, aur ab woh phir se try kar raha hai bahar aane ki. Meri poori family tab se pareshaan hai. Agar woh choot gaya, toh hamari zindagi phir hell ban jaayegi. Aap kuch karo Daroga ji, please. Hamari madad karo, usko bahar mat aane do.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jiske saath Sukhvinder aur Suresh ne kitna galat kiya tha. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi unhone. Mujhe zabardasti utha kar le gaye the, kidnapping ki thi meri. Woh din main kabhi nahi bhool sakti, 17 July 1997 ka. Nangal PS mein meri FIR No. 123 darj hui thi, jismein unpar 376, 366 aur 363 jaise bade sections lage the. Ambala Sessions Court ne unko saza bhi sunai thi, main thoda sukoon mila tha. Ab suna hai woh high court mein appeal kar rahe hain, apni saza khatam karwane ke liye. Sir, please dekhiye, woh bahar nahi aane chahiye. Mujhe unse bahut darr lagta hai. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main bahut pareshan thi... aaj thoda sukoon mila hai. Woh Basappa Singadi Hegade ke do bete hain na, wahi do bhai. Unhone meri zindagi barbaad karne ki koshish ki thi. Mujhe zabardasti utha ke le gaye the, Sir. Maine socha tha ab toh sab khatam ho gaya. Woh din jab yaad aata hai na, toh rooh kaanp jaati hai. Kitna darr, kitni takleef jheli maine. Par, bhagwan ka shukr hai aur court ka, ki Judge saab ne unhe guilty mana hai. Aaj hi khabar mili hai ki unhe 5 saal ki sakht jail hui hai. Mujhe insaaf mila hai, Sir. Bas yehi batane aayi thi aapko, ki woh gunehgar ab jail jayenge.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri kya haalat hai. Woh ladka (petitioner) mujhe zabardasti le gaya tha, maine nahi jaana tha uske saath! Mujhe itna daraya gaya, itna dhamkaya gaya ki jab mera woh statement liya gaya na Section 164 ke under, tab darr ke maare maine bol diya ki main apni marzi se gayi thi. Woh sab jhoot tha, sir! Usne toh mujhe kidnap kiya tha, meri koi marzi nahi thi. Aur ab uske vakeel court mein bol rahe hain ki main khud gayi thi, toh uske upar jo 363 ka case bana hai, woh galat hai. Par sir, yeh galat hai! Usne mujhe forcibly rakha tha. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Woh aise bach ke nahi nikalna chahiye, usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Agra ke Atmadpur se aayi hoon. Mujhe bohot tension ho rahi hai. Aapko yaad hai na, woh Pramod Kumar, jisne mere saath kya-kya kiya tha? Usne mujhe kidnap kiya, rape kiya... meri toh zindagi hi barbaad kar di thi. Pichle saal, 13 November 2018 ko, court ne use saza suna di thi, sections 363, 366, 376 IPC aur POCSO Act mein use convict kiya tha. Hum sabko laga tha ki ab insaaf mil gaya. Par Sir, ab pata chala hai ki usne jail se appeal kar di hai. Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh fir se humein pareshan karega, mujhe aur mere parivar ko. Main abhi bhi darr darr ke jeeti hoon. Please Sir, kuch kariye, use bahar mat aane dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri baat suniye, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, uski investigation toh poori ho gayi thi. Police ne 10 August 2017 ko court mein charge sheet bhi file kar di thi. Phir, 10 January 2018 ko sunwai ke baad, us Lalu Kumar par charges frame hue hain. Us par meri beti ko uthane ka (IPC 363/366), uske saath galat karne ka (IPC 376(2)(n)) aur POCSO Act ke section 6 ke under bhi case laga hai. Itne saare serious sections lage hain, lekin woh Lalu Kumar bolta hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi, apni galti maan hi nahi raha aur trial maang raha hai! Humne toh apne case ko prove karne ke liye teen gawah bhi pesh kiye hain, meri beti Ms. X khud PW1 ban kar aayi hai, aur main Mr. Z, uska pita, bhi gaya hoon. Ab bas insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Ek toh itne saal pehle, 1996 mein, badi mushkil se mujhe insaaf mila tha. Woh Raigad, Alibaug ke judge sahab ne un sabko saza sunayi thi. Main socha chalo ab toh chain se jeeungi, meri ladai khatam ho gayi. Par nahi, ab phir se yeh appeal-appeal shuru ho gaya hai. Itne saal baad bhi mera peecha nahi chhod rahe! Accused number 9 toh mar bhi gaya hai, phir bhi yeh case chal raha hai. Aap hi bataiye, main aur kitna suffer karun? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai. Mujhe bas ab shanti chahiye, sir. Yeh log mujhe jeene nahi de rahe.

Sir, main woh ladki hoon jiske saath us ghatiya aadmi ne galat kaam kiya tha. Aapko toh yaad hoga maine complaint ki thi. Usne mujhe uthaya tha aur phir mere saath bahut bura kiya. Aur Sir, main toh SC/ST community se hoon, isliye usne mujhe aur bhi zyada target kiya tha. Mujhe bahut daraya tha. Lekin, Sir, ab finally usko saza mili hai! Court ne usko guilty mana hai, aur 7 saal ki kadi jail hui hai usko. Sath hi 25,000 rupaye ka jurmana bhi laga hai. Sir, ab jaake meri rooh ko thoda sukoon mila hai. Meri taraf se aap sabka aur kanun ka shukriya.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki woh Shakeel aur Akhilesh Verma, jinko Pilibhit court ne saza sunayi thi 2013 mein, woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Meri family ne itni mushkil se insaaf paaya tha, sessions court mein unko conviction mila tha. Unhone humari zindagi barbad kar di thi, aur ab woh log keh rahe hain ki unko saza galat mili hai? Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri sunwai 2010 se chal rahi thi, aur jab finally 2013 mein thoda sukoon mila, toh ab yeh naya natak shuru ho gaya. Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir, ki kahin woh log phir se bahar na aa jayein. Please kuch kariye Sir, hum garib log hain, in bade logon se kaise ladenge? Humare liye yeh judgment bahut important tha.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun! Woh accused toh saaf mukar gaya hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi, bolta hai woh begunah hai. Lekin humne toh apni taraf se poora zor lagaya, sir. Court mein das-das gawah pesh kiye, P1 se P12 tak saare documents bhi dikhaye, poore saboot diye ki wohi kasoorwar hai. Meri motorcycle bhi thi jise MO1 mark kiya gaya, aur ek CD bhi thi as proof, jise MO2 bola gaya. Par woh mujrim? Usne toh apni taraf se na ek bhi oral gawah laya, na koi documentary evidence. Kuch bola hi nahi apni safai mein. Sir, yeh toh seedha-saadha dikh raha hai ki woh jhooth bol raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera jo case tha na, woh ab criminal appeal mein chala gaya hai. Neeche toh faisla mere haq mein aaya tha, par ab woh log upar court mein challenge kar rahe hain. Aur mujhe pata chala hai ki mere jaise hi aur bhi cases hain, bilkul same type ke. Judge sahab keh rahe hain ki sabki sunwai ek saath karenge, ek hi judgment mein. Taaki baar-baar ek hi baat repeat na karni pade. Par Sahab, mera darr yeh hai ki itne saare cases ke beech meri alag takleef ka kya hoga? Kya mujhe poora insaaf milega ya sabke chakkar mein mera case bhi bas number banke reh jaayega? Itne saare kanoon aur faisle hain, par meri sunwai kab khatam hogi, bas yehi soch-soch ke pareshan hoon. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, suniye toh meri baat. Yeh log mujhe kamzor samajhte hain, bas isliye ki main ek aurat hoon. Yeh toh mardon ki injustice hai, Sir! Mere pati aur sasural wale mujhe har din torture karte hain, mental aur emotional. Kehte hain, 'teri kya himmat, tu toh kuch nahi kar sakti.' Par Sir, maine sab saha hai, meri endurance unse kahin zyada hai. Meri moral strength bahut high hai, main tootne wali nahi. Mujhe bas aapki help chahiye ki yeh log mujhpe zulm karna band karein. Mera jeena mushkil ho gaya hai. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main X hoon, woh jiske saath yeh sab hua hai. Meri umar toh abhi bahut kam hai, main minor hoon. Woh aadmi... usne mujhe agwa kar liya tha, sir. Meri toh poori duniya hi ulat-pulat ho gayi thi. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya, sir. Usne... usne mera balatkar kiya. Main toh bas darr ke maare kaanp rahi thi. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di usne. Raaton ko neend nahin aati, sir, bas wahi sab yaad aata hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir, bas yahi darkhwast hai. Mujhe pata hai ki Tilak Marg police station ke SHO sahab ne aur ACP sahab ne usko challan kar diya hai, us par case chal raha hai. Bas ab yahi dua hai aur request hai ki use kadi se kadi saza mile, taaki kisi aur ladki ke saath aisa na ho. Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main yahan apni beti ke case ke liye aayi hoon. Aapko toh pata hi hai, uske saath kya hua hai. Police ne puri investigation ki thi, aur court mein charge sheet bhi file ho gayi thi 7 March 2018 ko. Hum shukraguzar hain ki meri beti ka naam bhi aap logo ne secret rakha hai. Lekin Sir, woh Aashif, jisne meri chhoti bachchi ki zindagi barbaad kar di, uspar kitne bade charges lage hain—kidnapping ka, POCSO Act ka, aur usne meri beti ke saath galat kaam kiya baar baar! Itna sab hone ke baad bhi, woh court mein khade hokar bol raha hai ki usne kuch nahi kiya? "Not guilty" bol diya usne, Sir! Kehta hai usko trial chahiye! Yeh kya insaaf hai? Meri beti already itna trauma jhel rahi hai, aur woh apne kiye se mukar raha hai? Hum bohot pareshan hain. Please Sir, kuch kijiye, humein bas insaaf chahiye. Meri beti ko justice milna hi chahiye.

Sir, main Shakarpur police station aaya hoon aaj 23 November 1988 ko. Meri beti, jo kareeb 14 saal ki hai, woh kal se gayab hai. Kal, 22 November 1988 ko subah 7:15 baje woh apne school ke liye ghar se nikli thi. Par school se wapas aayi hi nahi, sir! Humne har jagah dhoondha, apne saare rishtedaaron aur doston ke yahaan pata kiya, poori raat jaag ke usko khoja, par uska kahin bhi koi pata nahi chal raha hai. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai. Sir, please meri beti ko dhoondhne mein meri madad kijiye. Woh bahut chhoti hai, kahan hogi akeli?

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jiske baare mein case hai. Suman Dass, S/o Sh. Dhirender Dass, usne mujhe utha liya tha. Main tab sirf 15 saal ki bachchi thi, Sir. Uska irada tha ki woh mujhe zabardasti shaadi karne par majboor karega. Aur phir, usne mere saath bahut ganda kaam kiya, Sahab. Meri izzat par haath dala. Main bahut darr gayi thi, bahut royi thi. Usne meri puri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mujhe usse bahut darr lagta hai. Aap please use saza dilwao. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main Jyoti Devi hoon. Aapko pata hai na, mere bete Rahul ko Santosh ne kidnap kar liya tha? Mera Rahul, jo Shubham bhi kehlata hai... woh abhi tak wapas nahi aaya hai sir. Maine toh apni tuition teacher ko bhi bataya tha ki mujhe Santosh par pura shak hai. Woh teacher bhi humare saath hai, usne bhi police ko sab sach bataya hai. Mere pati Rajesh Prasad, aur mera beta Rahul... hum sabne police ko baar-baar yahi baat batayi hai. Hum sab ek hi baat bol rahe hain ki Santosh ne hi yeh kiya hai. Police ki investigation bhi is baat ko confirm kar rahi hai. Sir, main bas yahi chahti hoon ki Santosh ko saza mile aur mera beta mujhe wapas mil jaaye. Meri suniye sir, bahut pareshaan hoon main.

Sir, main Jyoti Devi hoon, Rahul ki maa. Mera beta Rahul, jiska doosra naam Shubham bhi hai, use kidnap kar liya gaya hai, sir. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai. Uski tuition wali madam ne bhi police ko bataya hai ki maine unhe pehle hi bol diya tha ki Santosh par pura shak hai, shayad usne hi mere bete ko uthaya hai. Meri baat bilkul sach nikli. Mere pati Rajesh Prasad aur main, hum sabne police ko poori baat batai hai. Aur mera Rahul jab mila, usne bhi sab sahi-sahi bataya. Hum sabne police ki poori madad ki hai, sir. Dekho kaise us Santosh ne meri godh khali karne ki koshish ki. Please sir, us Santosh ko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye. Humein bas insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Jyoti Devi hoon, Rahul ki maa. Mera beta Rahul, jise log Shubham bhi kehte hain, use Santosh ne kidnap kar liya tha. Jab mera beta tuition gaya tha, uski teacher ne bhi court mein testify kiya hai. Maine unhe tabhi bataya tha ki mujhe shak hai, shayad Santosh ne hi mere bete ko uthaya hai. Aur woh teacher apni baat par kaayam rahi, usne sab support kiya. Mere pati Rajesh Prasad ji ne bhi, aur khud mere bete Rahul ne bhi, sabne court mein yahi bataya hai ki Santosh hi culprit hai. Hum sabne prosecution ka support kiya hai. Sir, itna clear hai, Santosh ko saza milni chahiye. Hum toh bas insaaf chahte hain.

Sir, main apni complaint leke aayi hoon. Mujhe laga tha ki mera case, jiska number 190/2018 tha, Dwarka Court mein PoCSO wale judge saheb ne sun liya tha. Unhone 16 July 2020 ko judgment diya tha, aur 22 July 2020 ko un do logon ko saza bhi sunayi thi. Mujhe laga tha ab jaake nyay mila hai, meri pareshaani khatam ho gayi. Par ab pata chala hai ki wo dono accused, jinko saza mili thi, wo us faisle ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain! Cr.PC ke Section 374 ke तहत appeal daal di hai unhone. Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Itni mushkil se toh faisla aaya tha, ab dobara court kacheri ke chakkar lagane padenge? Mujhe dar lag raha hai, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Jin logon ne meri zindagi barbaad ki, unko court ne baizzat bari kar diya hai! Ajeet Kumar aur uske saath jo dusra aadmi tha, unhone mujhe uthaya tha (Sections 363, 366 IPC), saazish ki thi (120B IPC). Aur sir, us doosre aadmi ne toh mere saath galat kaam bhi kiya tha jab main chhoti thi (Section 6 POCSO Act). Mujhe laga tha ab toh unhe saza milegi, lekin unko toh chhod diya gaya! Meri toh saari ummeedein toot gayi hain. Yeh insaaf nahi hai sir, yeh toh mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai. Main kaise jiyungi ab?

Sir, meri choti bacchi... usko maar diya gaya. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai, sahib. Police wale aaye the, unhone sab dekha, meri bacchi ki body ke liye morgue intimation banayi, aur crime spot ka naksha bhi banaya. Bahut mushkil waqt tha humare liye. Phir jaanch (investigation) hui toh us darinde ko pakda gaya, sir. Usne khud kabool kiya ki usne meri masoom bacchi ko kidnap kiya tha, uske saath ganda kaam kiya aur phir uska gala ghont ke maar diya. Ye sunke toh mera dil hi baith gaya. Narad Sinha ji aur Bhuneshwari ji ne police ko bataya tha, tab jaake us par shaq hua aur usko pakda gaya. Sir, usko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye. Meri bacchi ko insaaf chahiye!

Sahab, meri choti beti... uska murder ho gaya hai. Woh ab nahi rahi. Police ne uski body ka intimation banaya hai, aur crime spot ka naksha panchnama bhi kiya hai. Bahut dard ho raha hai, Sahab. Meri bacchi ko usne uthaya, uske saath galat kaam kiya, aur phir uska gala ghont ke maar diya. Haan, usne khud maana hai yeh sab. Narad Sinha aur Bhuneshwari ne hi bataya tha, tab jaake aap logon ne us darinde ko pakda hai. Meri bas yeh request hai, usko aisi saza mile ki aur koi baap apni beti ko khone ka dard na jhele. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sahab!

Sir, main Subhash Bhattacharjee bol raha hoon Umiam (Barapani) se. Aaj 31 May 2013 ko shaam 5:30 baje ke kareeb, Rongmen se meri 15 saal ki beti, haan meri pyaari beti, missing ho gayi hai. Woh ghar par nahi mili, sir! Mera toh dil baitha jaa raha hai. Mujhe pura shaq hai, ji, pura bharosa hai ki Amit Kumar Gupta ne hi meri beti ko uthaya hai. Woh use kidnap karke le gaya hai, sir. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai, please, Umiam Police Station, aap log meri madad kijiye. Meri beti kahan hogi? Kaisi hogi? Meri beti ko dhoondhiye. Jaldi se jaldi action lijiye, sir!

Sir, main yahan apni beti ke liye insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Meri beti ne apne pati ke saath bahut jhagdo ke baad suicide kar liya tha. Hum toh soch rahe the ki adalat mein usko (pati ko) saza milegi. Lekin, ab court keh rahi hai ki shadi ke jhagde aur meri beti ki khudkushi mein koi seedha link (proximate link) nahi hai. Matlab, woh bol rahe hain ki jhagde ki wajah se suicide nahi hua. Aur to aur, kehte hain ki prosecution ne koi saboot hi nahi ikattha kiya humare allegations ko support karne ke liye. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri beti roz dukhi rehti thi, uske pati ne uski zindagi mushkil kar di thi. Hamare saare facts the, saare saboot the. Kya police ne theek se investigation nahi ki thi? Meri beti toh chali gayi, aur uske gunahgar ko ab bhi saza nahi mili. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir!

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh jo Rajbir Singh hai na, jise log Babloo aur Roshan bhi kehte hain, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Saal 2016 ki baat hai, usne aur uske kuch logon ne milkar mujhe utha liya tha, Sir. Kidnap kar liya tha mujhe! Aur phir mere paas jo kuch bhi tha, sab ka sab loot liya. Poora gang hai uska, daku hain sab. Sarita Vihar police station mein iski FIR bhi hui thi, number 149/2016. Abhi bhi uska case chal raha hai Sir, woh kidnapping aur lootpaat wala case. Daroga ji, woh abhi bhi bahar hai, mujhe har waqt darr laga rehta hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sahab, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Pichle saal ki baat hai, 27 March, raat ke kareeb ek baje honge. Main aur mera jija Lampur Road pe the, Lampur Mod ke paas, Narela mein. Hamara tractor tha na, HR-12-6185 number ka, woh wahi pe khada tha. Char log aaye, pata nahi kahan se, aur unhone zabardasti hamara tractor chheen liya. Meri poori kamaai thi woh, Sahab! Robbery karte waqt, unmein se teen toh mujhe aur mere jija ko hathkadi laga di. Socho, hathkadi! Aur phir apni car mein daal ke humein kidnap kar liya. Pata nahi kahan le ja rahe the, bahut dar gaya tha main. Sir, please kuchh kijiye, mera tractor wapas dilwaiye aur un gundon ko pakadwaiye.

Sir, please meri baat suniye. Main X hoon, 19 saal ki. Hum Sonia Vihar, Delhi mein H. No. Z par apni family ke saath rehte hain. Main correspondence se BA kar rahi hoon. Ek Anil Kumar naam ka aadmi tha, Sir, jo pehle 3-4 mahine hamare ghar mein kirayedaar ban kar raha. Uske baad woh yahan se chala gaya aur ab hamare pados mein rehta hai. Sir, tab se woh mujhe bahut pareshaan kar raha hai. Meri padhai, meri zindagi sab mushkil ho gayi hai. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, Sir. Mujhe usse bachaiye!

Sir, mera naam X hai, main Y ki beti hoon. Hum log Z, Delhi mein rehte hain. Main ek seedhi-saadi ladki hoon, BA Pass bhi hoon. Aur ghar par hi ladies ke kapde sil-sil kar guzara karti hoon. Aaj 28.01.2011 ko, mujhe majbooran Nand Nagri police station aana pada hai. Main aapko apni poori baat batana chahti hoon, jo mere saath hua hai. Bade dukh aur himmat karke main yahan tak aayi hoon. Mujhe umeed hai aap meri sunenge aur insaaf dilayenge.

Sir, main X hoon. Meri biwi, Y, gayab ho gayi hai, sir! Bahut ghabrahat ho rahi hai. Main Nand Nagri PS mein report likhwane aaya hoon. Pata nahi kya ho gaya. Woh 22 July 2011 ko shaam paanch baje Sunder Nagri Market gayi thi. Sirf 25 saal ki hai woh, abhi tak ghar wapas nahi aayi. Aaj 24 July ho gayi hai, do poore din ho gaye hain. Mera toh dimaag kharab ho raha hai. Kuch galat na ho gaya ho uske saath. Please, sir, meri madad kijiye. Meri biwi ko dhoond dijiye, meherbani hogi.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon mere saath kya hua tha. September 2008 mein, mere saath bahut bura hua. Us din ke baad main itni darr gayi thi ki kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha tha. Phir jaake November mein, kai din baad, mujhe hospital leke gaye check-up ke liye. Usse pehle main apne pati ke saath ghar pe hi thi, himmat juta rahi thi. Ab log keh rahe hain ki uss test se kuch nahi mila, koi saboot nahi hai. Bolte hain ki main jhoot bol rahi hoon kyunki der se check-up karaya. Par Sir, main sach bol rahi hoon! Yeh sab meri galti nahi thi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri baat pe yakeen karo.

Sir, main Rizwan, Saket City Hospital mein security guard hoon. Mere saath aaj bahut bura hua hai. Wo do ladke, jinko abhi pakda hai, aur unke saath do aur the, total chaar log the. Unhone mujhe buri tarah maara hai, pura physical assault kiya hai mere upar. Sir, unhone toh mujhe ek gaadi mein daal ke kidnap karne ki bhi koshish ki thi! Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi, main bahut darr gaya tha. Pata nahi kya karte mere saath agar main bach nahi paata. Please, un baaki do logon ko bhi pakdo aur mujhe insaaf dilao. Main bahut pareshaan hoon, sir.

Sir, main Asha hoon. Meri beti Kiran ko Govind utha kar le gaya hai! Meri beti sirf 17 saal ki hai, sir. Yeh baat 12 August 2014 ki hai, dopahar ke theek 1 baje ke aas-paas. Woh ghar se bas thoda sa saaman lene gayi thi, aur tab se wapas nahi aayi. Mujhe baad mein pata chala ki Govind ne hi usko kidnap kiya hai. Mera toh dil baitha ja raha hai, sir! Meri masoom beti kahan hogi, kya haal hoga uska? Mujhe uski bohot chinta ho rahi hai. Please sir, meri is complaint (FIR) ko register kijiye aur Govind ke khilaf sakht action lijiye. Meri beti ko wapas laiye, sir, main aapke pair padti hoon.

Sir, main Rajesh Parikh hoon. Meri complaint hai jo FIR no. 331/08 Uttam Nagar PS mein darj hai. Woh Sonu S/o Lala Ram aur Neeraj S/o Ram Gopal, inhone aur apne 2-3 chamchon ke saath milkar, 19 July 2008 ko dopahar 2 baje, Vikas Nagar mein Tyagi Market ki shop no. 57 se mujhe zabardasti utha liya tha. Socho, din-dahaade! Unhone mujhe bahut der tak bandh kar rakha, maara-peeta bhi. Main toh ekdum sehel gaya tha, sir, meri jaan nikal gayi thi. Itna trauma jhela hai maine. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki case sessions court mein gaya hai. Bas ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye, taaki kisi aur ke saath aisa na ho. Meri family abhi tak uss din ko bhool nahi paayi hai.

Sir, main Rajesh Parikh bol raha hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, mera FIR no. 331/08, Uttam Nagar police station mein register hua tha. Woh Sonu, Lala Ram ka beta, aur Neeraj, Ram Gopal ka beta, inhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Sir, 19 July 2008 ko, dopahar 2 baje ke aas-paas, meri dukaan number 57, Tyagi Market, Vikas Nagar se, yeh log apne 2-3 aur gundo ke saath mujhe zabardasti utha kar le gaye the. Mujhe band rakha, bahut maara-peeta. Ab mera case sessions court mein chala gaya hai. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile, sir. Inko inki kartooton ki kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri family ne bahut dukh jhela hai inki wajah se.

Sir, main wahi purana case leke aaya hoon. Meri FIR number 267/06, Sangam Vihar police station mein. Woh log jo mere saath dhoka karke, Section 365 IPC ke तहत, mujhe utha le gaye the. Unke khilaaf police ne investigation ki thi, aur charge sheet bhi file ki hai. Sir, yeh 2006 ki baat hai, 31 March ko ASI Prem Prakash ji ko Patiala House court se Judge Jagdish Kumar ji ka order bhi mila tha. Itne saal ho gaye sir, par ab tak insaaf nahi mila. Main bahut pareshaan hoon, bas ab jaldi se koi faisla ho jaye, mujhe justice chahiye sir, please help kijiye.

Sir, main Avtar Singh. Bahut saal pehle ki baat hai, 16 August 1998 ki raat ya din, time exactly yaad nahi. Us din Karnail Singh aur uske kuch aur saathi aaye the. Unhone mujhe zabardasti pakad ke kidnap kar liya, sir. Mujhe chhupa ke rakha, bandi bana ke rakha tha. Unka maksad tha ki mujhe aise ghumshuda kar dein ki kisi ko pata na chale, illegally confine karke rakhein. Woh din yaad karke aaj bhi meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Meri family ne kitni mushkil jheli hogi. Is mamle mein tabhi FIR darj hui thi, aur unpar Section 365/34 IPC ke तहत charge bhi lagaye gaye the. Main bas ab insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye jo mere saath itna ghinona kaam kiye.

Sir, main Rajjan ke case mein पीड़ित hoon, jo Rajjan convict hua tha. Yaad hai na, Bhind court ne 2003 mein usko saza di thi, Second Additional Sessions Judge ne? Woh ST No. 38/2001 aur ST No. 39/2001 wala case. Meri family ne itna kuch saha hai uski wajah se. Kitni mushkil se toh mujhe justice mila tha. Ab pata chala hai ki usne phir se appeal kar di hai, yeh 2015 ki appeals hain (CRA.625/2015 & CRA.626/2015). Main itne saalon se lad rahi hoon, saab. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh bach na jaaye. Sir, please dekho kuch, meri suno. Itne saal ho gaye, ab kya hoga?

Sir, main Rameshwar Patel, Rajapur gaon ka rehne wala hoon. Meri baat suniye, please. Kal raat ek common incident mein kuch log humein zabardasti le gaye the. Mujhe toh unhone beech raaste mein chhod diya, par mere bhai, Rammilan Patel ko woh log pata nahi kahan le gaye. Sir, subah se uska koi ata-pata nahi hai. Maine Badri Patel, hamare gaon ke Headman sahab ko bhi sab bataya. Unhone hi bola tha ki seedha police station aao. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Mera bhai kahin kisi badi mushibat mein na ho. Please meri madad kijiye, use dhoondhne mein. Hum sab bahut pareshan hain.

Saahab, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Lalit Vilasrao Thakare hai na, usne meri zindagi jhel bana di hai. Meri sari mehnat ki kamai, woh cheen li usne, aur jab maine mana kiya toh itna maara, itna peeta ki abhi tak body mein dard hai. Usne mujhe dhamki di ki agar maine police ko bataya toh mere bache ko utha lega. Main darr ke maare chup raha, par ab aur nahi seh sakta. Mujhe uski yeh saari harkatein record karwani hai, aur usko saza dilwani hai. Sir, mere saath jo zulm hua hai, uska hisaab chahiye mujhe. Yeh insaan bahut khatarnak hai, isse koi aur bhi aage jaake pareshan ho sakta hai. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, Umaria zille mein, Shahdol district mein, S.T. No. 11/1994 ka case. Jis mein mere saath kitna zulm hua tha, woh mujhe utha kar le gaye the aur maara-peeti bhi ki thi. Section 365 aur Section 32 ke तहत un logon ko सजा मिली thi, Judge sahab ne 1 January 1997 aur 17 January 1997 ko unko doshi thehraya tha. Humne socha tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain! Sir, itne saal ho gaye hain, humari zindagi barbad ho gayi hai. Hum bahut pareshan hain. Kya humein kabhi shanti nahi milegi? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki woh log phir se koi gadbad na kar dein. Kripya aap meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is case mein. Court mein mera mamla chal raha hai na, woh saamne wale party ke log, jinhone mere saath itna galat kiya, unka vakil hi nahi aata. Har baar sunwai (hearing) ki tareekh aati hai, aur woh bas gayab ho jaate hain. Sochiye Sir, 2018 se yeh chal raha hai! Kitne saal ho gaye, mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Aaj bhi wahi hua, koi nahi aaya unki taraf se. Court ne toh kaha hai ki ab aage badhenge, par mujhe darr lag raha hai. Itni takleef ho rahi hai, poora parivaar pareshan hai. Woh log aaram se ghoom rahe hain aur main yahan rota rehta hoon. Sir, kripya kuch kijiye meri madad ke liye.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aayi hoon ki ab bas ho gaya. Meri FIR number 441/2013 hai, aur Sessions Case number 26 of 2014 chal raha hai. Kitna aur jhelungi? Woh log sochte hain ki main aurat hoon toh kamzor hoon, kuch nahi kar paungi. Par main itni strong hoon ki ab har hadd paar ho gayi hai. Unki himmat kaise hui mujhe baar baar tang karne ki? Meri izzat pe haath daalne ki koshish karte hain, aur kehte hain ki mera kuch nahi bigaad sakte. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir. Main apni fight poori ladungi, chahe kuch bhi ho jaye. Please, meri help kijiye, unhe saza milni chahiye jo unhone mere saath kiya hai.

Sir, main Varun Kumar ke khilaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Main apne kaam se jaa raha tha, tabhi usne mujhe raste se utha liya, sir! Zabardasti ek jagah bandh kar diya tha, main bahut darr gaya tha, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Usne hathiyar dikha kar, meri jeb mein jo thode paise the aur mera phone, sab chheen liya. Mujhe laga meri jaan hi nikal jaayegi us din. Sir, wo din meri zindagi ka sabse bura sapna tha. Kaise koi kisi ke saath aisa kar sakta hai? Mujhe usko saza dilwani hai, sir. Usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Please meri madad kijiye, Varun Kumar ko uske kiye ki saza milni hi chahiye!

Sir, main toh barbaad ho gaya. Mujhe Babas aur dharm pe bahut vishwas tha. Wo log Ramayan, Geeta ki baatein karte the, shlok sunate the jaise "NAHAM TISTHAMI VAIKUNTHE...". Kehte the ki Bhagwan toh apne sachche bhakt ke paas hi rehte hain, aur uske liye sab kuch tyaag karna padta hai tabhi asli anand milta hai. Maine unki har baat maan li, sir. Apne saare rishte, apna paisa, apni zameen tak unke naam kar di. Socha tha Bhagwan khush honge. Par sir, woh toh Babas nahi, dhongi the! Unhone mere vishwas ka galat fayda uthaya. Ab mere paas kuch nahi bacha. Meri zindagi ki savings, meri shanti sab chali gayi. Mujhe un dhokebaaz Babas se insaaf chahiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Aligarh se aaya hoon. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us din. Woh log... unhone mujhe kidnap kar liya tha, zabardasti utha ke le gaye. Meri family se bade paise maange the, ransom ke liye. Maine socha ab toh gaya main. Aur Sir, unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki bhi koshish ki thi. Bandook dikha ke, goli chalane hi wale the. Bahut mushkil se bacha main. Woh manzar main kabhi bhool nahi sakta, Sir. Meri puri zindagi tabah ho gayi hai us din ke baad se. Bas, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Unko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye, taaki aur kisi ke saath aisa na ho.

Sir, main aapko apni kahaani batane aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di in logon ne. Woh Jamal tha na, usne mujhe pakad ke... matlab, zabardasti utha liya tha! Main kitna darr gaya tha, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Soraj aur Ladu bhi uske saath the, uski madad kar rahe the. Un teeno ne milkar meri zindagi nark bana di thi. Mujhe utha ke ek jagah band kar diya aur phir paise bhi maange mujhse, jaan se maarne ki dhamkiyan di. Woh toh bhagwan ka shukra hai ki case chala, aur judge sahab ne unko saza di. Jamal ko toh Section 365 aur 384 mein saza mili thi, ek saal ki rigorous imprisonment aur Rs. 500 fine. Aur woh Soraj aur Ladu ko bhi 365/109 mein saza mili thi, unko bhi ek saal jail aur Rs. 500 fine. Par sir, jo beeta hai mujh par, woh main kabhi nahi bhool paunga. Ab mujhe darr hai ki kahin yeh log phir se koi gadbad na karein. Aap meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Crime No. 13 of 1993 ki baat kar rahi hoon. Pata hai kitne saal ho gaye meri zindagi ke? Un charon ne mujhe barbaad kar diya tha, Section 366A aur 372 IPC ke under. Mujhe utha liya tha, sir! Do accused, A3 aur A4, wo toh aaj tak faraar hain, unka koi pata nahi. Meri toh neend ud gayi thi. Lekin, A1 aur A2 ka case chala, Eluru mein Judge sahab ne suna. Shukr hai bhagwan ka, A1 ko toh saza mili hai! Das saal ki kathor kaid aur Rs. 200 jurmana. Thodi toh tasalli mili, sir, ki ek ko toh uske kiye ki saza mili. Par sir, woh baaki do jo bhaag gaye, unka kya? Mujhe unko bhi pakadwana hai, sir. Mera pura insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Pushpa hoon, Tek Chand ki biwi. Meri beti Preeti, bas 13 saal ki hai, aur uski saheli Simran, 14 saal ki, Raju ji ki beti, dono kal dopahar 12:30 baje ghar se kuch kaam ke liye nikli thi. 9 April 2013 ki baat hai. Par sir, ab tak wapas nahi aayi hain. Humne har jagah dhoondh liya, par kahin pata nahi chal raha. Mera dil ghabra raha hai, lagta hai koi anjaan aadmi unko utha ke le gaya hai. Meri chhoti bachchi hai sir, please meri madad kijiye. Main raat bhar so nahi payi hoon. Kahan hongi meri bachchiyan? Aap kuch kijiye, sir, please.

Sir, main Arjit Sharma ka baap hoon. Main yahan apne bete ki complaint lekar aaya hoon. Mera beta, Arjit Sharma, Durg ke KPS School mein 12th class mein padhta hai. Sir, use kal kuch logon ne kidnap kar liya hai. Wo school se nikla, par ghar nahi pahuncha. Humne har jagah talaash ki, uske doston se poochha, teachers se baat ki, par uska koi pata nahi chal raha. Humein pakka yakeen hai ki use utha liya gaya hai, Sir. Mera baccha bahut masoom hai, kisi se koi dushmani nahi hai uski. Meri to neend ud gayi hai, Sir. Please, jaldi se jaldi mere bete ko dhoondhiye. Uska phone bhi band aa raha hai. Hum bahut darre huye hain. Aap hi hain jo meri madad kar sakte hain.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aa raha hai kya ho raha hai. Woh jo log the na, jinhone meri zindagi barbaad ki thi, jinko 2016 mein Palamau ke bade judge sahib ne saza sunai thi, unko doshi thehraya tha... woh ab appeal kar rahe hain, sir! Haan, wahi log, jinko 5 July 2016 ko pakka convict kiya tha aur 13 July ko sentence mila tha. Ab mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin unko chhod na dein. Itne saal ho gaye hain, main insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Kya meri galti thi jo mere saath aisa hua? Sir, aap hi kuch kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe bahut tension ho rahi hai.

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitna pareshan hoon. Daltonganj mein mera case tha, Sessions Trial No. 21. Yaad hai, woh 05.07.2016 ko conviction ka judgment aaya tha, aur phir 13.07.2016 ko order of sentence bhi ho gaya tha. Mujhe laga tha ab jaake justice mila hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki un logon ne appeal file kar di hai. Ek hi common judgment ke khilaaf itne saare appeals chal rahe hain, Section 374 (2) CrPC ke under. Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon, main kitni baar court jaunga? 2016 se lad raha hoon, ab jaake thodi shanti mili thi. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin meri saari mehnat barbaad na ho jaaye. Meri bas itni request hai ki mujhe nyay mile.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi ye kab tak chalega. Mera ek purana case tha, Daltonganj court mein. Usme mujhe saza mili thi 2016 mein, July 5 ko. Phir 13 July ko order aaya tha. Sessions Judge sahab ne yeh faisla sunaya tha. Usi faisle ke khilaaf humne appeal daali hai. Ab suna hai ki sare appeals ek saath sune ja rahe hain, kyunki mamla ek hi hai. Main bas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon, Sir. Mujhe umeed hai ki is baar mujhe insaaf milega. Kitne saal ho gaye, main bas yahi sochta rehta hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, bas ab justice chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri maa ko Satish Babanna aur Revanna zabardasti utha kar le gaye hain. Pata nahi unko kahaan rakha hai, kis anjaan jagah par band kar diya hai. Sir, meri maa ki jaan ko bahut bada khatra hai. Woh bahut darr rahi hongi. Please sir, jaldi se jaldi unko dhundo aur meri maa ko wapas lao. Yeh Satish aur Revanna bahut galat log hain. Inke khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai karo. Meri maa ko kuch ho gaya toh main mar jaunga. Mujhe meri maa chahiye, sir. Please help kijiye, main aapke paas madad maangne aaya hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, meri toh jaan atki hui hai. Jin logon ne mere saath itna galat kiya, mujhe kidnap karne ki koshish ki, woh ab 'petitioners' bankar court mein ghoom rahe hain. Kehte hain, unke 'fundamental rights' ka उल्लंघन hua hai! Saab, meri toh jeene ki azaadi hi cheen li thi inhone. Mujhe pata chala hai ki inpar Section 364 (kidnapping) ka case bana hua hai. Par, dekhiye na, pehle FIR ki copy mein kuch aur section tha, aur ab original mein kuch aur dikha rahe hain. Yeh log sab kuch ulta-seedha kar rahe hain, mujhe phasane aur khud bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri request hai, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki yeh log saza se bach jayenge. Meri jaan ko khatra hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main toh ek aam aadmi hoon. Mera jo mamla hai na, aise pata nahi kitne aur bhi hain. Judge sahib ne kaha hai ki sabko ek saath hi dekhenge, ek hi common judgment mein. Kya bataun sir, meri toh zindagi ulajh gayi hai. Sab cases ki facts aur issues bilkul ek jaise hain, aur sab ek hi purane galat judgment ki wajah se hain. Kitne saalon se intezaar kar raha hoon ki kab insaaf milega. Ab jab sab kuch ek jaisa hai, toh jaldi se koi ek faisla ho jaaye, taaki hum sabki pareshani khatam ho. Bas yahi umeed hai ki ab humein justice mil jaaye.

Sahab, meri baat suniye, main toh bas pareshaan ho gaya hoon! 2011 ki baat hai, jab mera bachcha gayab ho gaya tha. Wo Lalit Kumar aur uske saathi Qayyum ne usko utha liya tha, Sahab! Section 364A laga tha unpe, jaan se maarne ki dhamki deke paise maange the. Kitni mushkil se usko waapas laaye the hum. Ab Ghaziabad Court mein itne saalon se case chal raha hai. Pehle 2012 mein chala, phir 2014 mein. Abhi bhi sunwaiyaan ho rahi hain, 2015 mein bhi kuch faisle aaye the. Main toh thak gaya hoon, Sahab. Bas mujhe insaaf chahiye. Un logon ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Har baar court ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke main toot gaya hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Hum sab ek hi problem mein phanse hain. Woh company waalon ne hum sabko ek hi tareeke se dhokha diya hai, same to same facts hain hamare cases ke. Meri file toh pata nahi kitne saal se court mein ghoom rahi hai. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki jitne bhi log hamare jaise hain, jin sabki appeals ek hi judgment se nikli hain, un sabko ek saath hi suna ja raha hai. Ye kya mazak hai? Kitna intezaar karenge hum? Meri toh bas ek hi appeal hai, aur woh bhi in 4 crore judgments ke beech kahin gum ho jaegi kya? Sir, please help kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main apni ek purani complaint ke silsile mein aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, mera ek case tha 2017 ka, jismein finally us gunehgar ko saza hui thi. 12 July 2017 ko usko conviction mila tha aur 15 July 2017 ko sentence bhi sunai gayi thi. Humne socha tha chalo, ab toh sukoon milega, justice mil gaya. Par sir, ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh phir se appeal mein chale gaye hain! Wahi puraana mamla phir se chal raha hai court mein. Meri toh zindagi phir se court ke chakkar mein phans gayi hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, yeh pareshani khatam hone ka naam hi nahi le rahi. Meri toh himmat toot rahi hai. Mujhe bas is mamle se mukti chahiye sir. Main bahut tang aa gaya hoon. Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di unhone. Woh 2017 ki baat hai, 12 July ko mujhe galat tareeke se convict kar diya gaya tha, aur 15 July ko sentence bhi suna diya. Meri kya galti thi, yeh toh uparwala hi jaanta hai. Poore case mein mujhe jhhootha phansaaya gaya tha. Ab hum toh bas ussi verdict ke khilaaf appeal mein hain, Sir. CrPC ke Section 374(2) ke under humne appeal file ki hai. Addl. Sessions Judge ne jo judgment diya tha, usse main bilkul satisfied nahi hoon. Mujhe yakeen hai ki upar waali court se mujhe justice milega. Sir, please aap bhi kuch help kijiye, main toh bas insaaf ki ummeed mein hoon.

Sir, main toh aapko kya bataun... woh Mathura waala case yaad hai na? 2007 ka. Mere bachche ko utha le gaye the yeh Pooran Singh, Padam Singh, Rahees, aur woh Ramesh aur Pohpee bhi the. Sir, kya din dekhe hain humne, woh bhagwan hi jaanta hai. Bachche ko kidnap kiya, ransom maanga... meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Phir badi mushkil se, itne saalon ki ladai ke baad, court ne un paanchon ko life imprisonment di thi, Section 364-A ke under. Humne socha chalo ab thodi shanti milegi. Par ab khabar aa rahi hai ki unhone appeal daal di hai! Sir, kyon? Itni saza ke baad bhi yeh log chain se nahi baithte? Meri toh neend udd gayi hai phir se. Please kuch karo, meri toh bas yahi aarjoo hai ki unki saza kam na ho, woh jail mein hi rahein. Meri family ko justice mila hai, woh bana rahe.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera beta gayab ho gaya hai. Aaj subah jab maine akhbar padha, toh usme likha tha ki mere bete ka kidnapping ho gaya hai aur 5 lakh rupaye ki firauti (ransom) maang rahe hain. Sir, mera toh dimaag ghoom gaya. Usme koi jagah nahi likhi thi ki paise kahan dene hain. Main turant apne bete ke ghar pahuncha. Wahan uske saath rehne wale students ne bataya ki mera beta 25 October 2004 ko subah 11 baje ke kareeb do anjaan logon ke saath bahar gaya tha. Aur Sir, tab se woh wapas nahi aaya hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karu. Aap meri madad kijiye, Sir. Mera beta wapas laa dijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, hamara to poora parivaar hi doob gaya tha us din. Woh Crime No. 346 of 1997, P.S. Soron, District Etah wala case... mere bachche ko utha le gaye the woh log. Kitna time laga, kitni mushkil se hamne justice paya. Judge sahab ne, Special Judge (DAA) / Additional Sessions Judge, Court No.5, Etah ne, 22.11.2008 ko un sabko Section 364A IPC mein life imprisonment ki saza sunai thi. Mujhe laga ab sab theek ho jayega. Par ab pata chala hai ki un logon ne appeal kar di hai! Sir, please, aap kuch kijiye. Itni mushkil se toh saza mili thi, ab kahin woh log choot na jaayein. Hamare saath phir se nainsafi na ho. Mujhe dar lag raha hai, Sir. Meri family ki security ka bhi sawal hai. Police station ka record toh hoga na unke khilaaf. Please, dekhiye.

Sir, main Vidyaram hoon. Aap please meri madad kijiye. Ye 2 October 1984 ki raat ki baat hai, kareeb 8 baje. Main apne gaon Pulawali mein tha, tabhi 7-8 log aaye. Unke paas bandookein thi, Sir. Unhone mujhe aur mere dost Tehsil Khan ko zabardasti utha liya. Unhone humein chhodne ke liye 20,000 rupaye maange. Thodi der baad Tehsil Khan ko to chhod diya, lekin mujhe woh log Uttar Pradesh le gaye aur wahan band kar rakha hai. Meri jaan ko khatra hai, Sir. Woh log bahut khatarnak hain. Please mujhe bachao, Sir. Mera parivaar bahut pareshaan hai.

Sir, Ram Ram! Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Yaad hai na woh Kallu urf Gurdayal aur Pintu, jinhone mere bachche ko uthaya tha? Unko toh saza ho gayi thi Section 364-A IPC ke तहत. Etawah ke Special Judge sahab ne 30 August 2010 ko faisla sunaya tha mere haq mein, Special Case No. 22/2008 mein, jo Bakewar thane ke Case Crime No. 382/2007 se nikla tha. Maine kitni mushkilon se report likhayi thi tab! Ab suna hai un dono ne upar appeal kar di hai ussi faisle ke khilaf. Sir, jab unko saza hui thi tab thodi tasalli mili thi, ab phir se wohi darr. Kya hoga mera? Kya yeh case kabhi khatam nahi hoga? Meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, dekhiye na, mera ek case chal raha tha Bengaluru court mein, Crl. RP No.630/2020. Bahut mushkil se lad raha tha main. Par pichle saal, 20 December 2022 ko, wahan ke Judge sahab ne ek order pass kiya, jo bilkul galat hai, Sir. Mere saath bahut na-insaafi hui hai us order mein. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi woh sunke! Isliye ab maine yeh Criminal Revision Petition file kiya hai, Section 397 aur 401 ke तहत, us galat order ko challenge karne ke liye. Mere vakil sahab ne bhi bola hai ki yeh order sahi nahi hai. Woh log (opposite party) bhi apne vakil leke khade hain. Aap bas meri suniye aur dekhiye, mujhe insaaf mile.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh ek choti si problem hai, par jab aap kehte ho ki 4 crore judgments aur itne saare kanoon hain... toh mujhe toh darr lag raha hai. Ye sab bade-bade lawyers, researchers aur institutions walon ke liye bana hai, Sir. Hum jaise aam log, jinko sirf insaaf chahiye, wo kahan jayenge is itne bade system mein? Meri toh chhoti si zameen ka mamla hai, par ye sab sunke lagta hai meri baat kaun sunega itne saare laws ke beech? Meri toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha ki meri complaint ka kya hoga. Kya meri simple baat bhi itne bade pahaad mein kho jaayegi?

Sir, main Rajjan ke khilaaf complaint karne aayi hoon. Bahut saalon pehle, 2003 mein, Bhind court ne usko saza di thi, mere saath jo usne kiya tha uske liye. Mujhe laga tha ab toh sab theek ho gaya, ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai, usko jo saza mili thi uske khilaaf. Main toh dar gayi hoon, Sir. Itne saal ho gaye us baat ko, ab phir se woh sab yaad aa raha hai. Meri family bhi pareshan hai. Kya woh phir se baahar aa jayega? Woh bahut dangerous aadmi hai. Main bas itna chahti hoon ki jo usko saza mili hai, woh barkaraar rahe. Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko usse khatra hai agar woh riha ho gaya toh.

Sir, main aapke paas aaya hoon, meri Qualis gadi thi, number HR 38 HT 6812. Woh 08.03.2008 ko snatch ho gayi thi. Mera toh dil hi baith gaya tha, Sir, itni mehnat ki kamai thi. Mujhe toh laga gayi meri gadi, ab kabhi wapas nahi milegi. Lekin, Bhagwan ka shukra hai aur aapki police ka bhi, especially ASI Om Prakash Yadav ji ka. Unhone hi Bajgera picket pe checking ke dauraan un do ladkon ko pakda, jo meri gadi chheen rahe the. Unke naam Narender aur Sonam bataye hain. Meri toh jaan mein jaan aa gayi jab suna ki culprits pakde gaye hain. Ab bas meri gadi wapas mil jaaye, Sir. Please help kijiye.

Sir, main Ramu ki mummy bol rahi hoon. Meri beti, Rani, ko kuch logon ne utha liya hai, Sir. Wo kal shaam se gayab hai. Ghar se khelne nikli thi, phir wapas hi nahi aayi. Mujhe bahot darr lag raha hai, Sir. Phone bhi aaya tha unka, paisa maang rahe hain, ransom. Keh rahe hain agar nahi diya toh... Meri chhoti si bachchi hai, Sir, abhi toh 12 saal ki bhi nahi hui hai. Bhagwan ke liye kuch kijiye. Meri beti ko dhundh dijiye, Sir. Unhone usko chhipa ke rakha hai, mujhe pata hai. Jaldi se unko pakadiye. Mujhe meri beti wapas chahiye, Sir, jaise bhi ho. Main toh mar hi jaungi uske bina.

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Yeh Balaghat ke case ka mudda hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, 1989 ki baat hai jab 14 September ko judge sahab ne faisla sunaya tha. Shobhanlal, uske bhai Sukhchand aur Roopchand, aur Madanlal, Yado – in paanchon ne milke mere ghar mein khoon kiya tha, meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Judge sahab ne unko Section 302 aur 149 ke तहत umar-kaid ki saza di thi. Humne socha tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya, chain se jiyenge. Magar Sir, woh log ab bhi appeal mein ghoome ja rahe hain. Mujhe samajh nahi aata itne saalon baad bhi humein itna pareshan kyun kiya ja raha hai. Kya humein kabhi poora insaaf milega ya nahi?

Sir, main aapko ek baat batane aaya hoon. Meri jo complaint thi na, woh FIR C.R. number jo maine darj karayi thi, ab woh log court mein keh rahe hain ki sab dispute 'amicably resolve' ho gaya hai. Mere vakil bhi bol rahe hain ki maamla khatam ho gaya. Par sach bolun toh, mujhe toh abhi bhi lagta hai ki mujhe pura insaaf nahi mila. Itni mushkil se toh maine woh complaint karwayi thi. Ab woh log Cr.P.C. Section 482 laga kar meri FIR ko hi quash karwana chahte hain. Main toh bas chahta hoon ki aap log meri baat suno. Kya aise hi meri poori mehnat bekar chali jayegi? Mujhe bas yeh darr hai ki kahin phir se mujhe pareshan na karein.

Sir, main Soron se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2000 mein mera beta gayab ho gaya tha. Woh Ranno aur uska sathi Bhagwan Swaroop use utha le gaye the, Section 364 IPC ka case tha, Case Crime No. 347/2000. Kitni mushkil se unko pakadwaya tha, kitni bhaag-daud ki thi humne. Fast Track Court, Kasganj mein unhe saza bhi hui thi, 30 June 2017 ko judgment aaya tha. Humne socha chalo ab thoda chain milega. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh Ranno (Criminal Appeal No. 5188/2017) aur Bhagwan Swaroop (Criminal Appeal No. 3777/2017) dono ne appeal file kar di hai! Sir, hum gareeb log hain, kahan itne courts ke chakkar kaaten? Meri toh jaan sukh gayi hai yeh sunke. Kahi woh phir se bahar na aa jaayen aur humein tang na karein. Please Sir, hamari madad kijiye, hamare liye justice barkarar rahe, yahi meri aapse vinti hai.

Sahab, main Ramu (ya koi bhi naam) hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo hua, uske liye insaaf chahiye mujhe. Wo SC No. 577/2017 wala case Tirunelveli Mahila Court mein chal raha hai. Meri 19 saal ki beti ko 29 October 2015 ko dopahar 1:30 baje, din-dahaade 7 logon ne milkar gaadi mein utha liya tha. Woh akeli thi, un darindon ne meri bachchi ko kidnap kar liya! Itne saal ho gaye, ab tak main case lad raha hoon. Aur ab pata chala hai ki ek accused, jo chaar number pe hai, woh case ko khatam karwana chahta hai. Sahab, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri beti ko toh insaaf mila hi nahi abhi tak. Please, meri madad karo, yeh proceedings band nahi honi chahiye. Meri beti ko nyay dilao.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut zaroori complaint lekar aaya hoon. Meri beti ko utha liya gaya hai, sir! Woh bas 19 saal ki hai. Aaj dopahar, 29 October 2015 ko, theek 1:30 baje ke kareeb, meri beti ko 7 log zabardasti ek car mein daal kar le gaye hain. Pata nahi kahan le gaye hain. Meri beti ka abhi tak kuch pata nahi hai, mujhe bahut chinta ho rahi hai. Woh sab log meri beti ko kidnapping karke le gaye hain, yeh seedha-seedha abduction ka case hai. Aap please meri madad kijiye, sir. Meri beti ko jald se jald wapas laane mein meri help kijiye aur un sab logon ko pakdiye jo isme shamil hain. Mujhe meri beti chahiye aur un sabko saza milni chahiye.

Sahab, main Raudi Mandal, Late Bithu Mandal ka beta. Sitamarhi ke Bela thana, Bliswa gaon se aaya hoon. Meri haalat bahut kharab hai, Daroga ji. Bahut pareshaan hoon. Pata nahi kyun, State of Bihar ne mujhe aise tang kiya hai ki ab court mein bhi ladna pad raha hai. Unki wajah se meri family tak suffer kar rahi hai. Lagta hai jaise poori sarkaar hi mere khilaaf ho gayi hai. Aap hi bataiye, ek aam aadmi kahan jaye jab sarkaar hi uski dushman ban jaye? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sahab. Meri suniye aur meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main na bahut pareshan hoon. Mera naam Kavita hai. Woh Ajay @ Mantu, jisne meri family ki zindagi tabah kar di thi, uska mamla abhi tak court mein chal raha hai? Mujhe pata chala hai ki uska koi jail ka report, 2024 ka, ab record par liya gaya hai. Matlab, woh abhi bhi andar hai ya bahar aane ki taiyari hai? Sir, 2010 se mera case chal raha hai, itne saal ho gaye, aur woh mujrim abhi tak saza nahi kaat raha dhang se. Woh Kanpur Nagar jail mein tha. Mujhe darr lagta hai, sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya toh meri aur mere bachchon ki jaan ko khatra hai. Please, mujhe insaaf dilao aur usko bahar mat aane do!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Mera case 2018 ka hai, itne saal ho gaye, ab tak insaaf mila nahi. Pata hai, pichli sunwai pe, 22 April ko, mera apna vakil hi court nahi aaya! Meri toh jaan nikal gayi. Court ne bhi bola ki State ke vakil ko bolo, mere vakil se kahe ki agli tareekh pe zaroor aaye, ya kisi aur ko bhej de. Bola ki ab aur tareekh nahi badhegi, case bahut purana hai. Main toh 8 May ko khud pahunch gaya tha, Sir, time pe. Par jab mera apna vakil hi aise karega toh mera kya hoga? Main bas apna insaaf chahta hoon. Aap hi batao, main kya karun?

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Aaj itne saal ho gaye, 1992 ki baat hai jab Fatehpur court se Surajdin aur uske sathi jo mujhe utha le gaye the, unko saza mili thi. Woh Section 365 ka case tha, yaad hai? Judge sahab ne unko ek saal ki kadi jail aur 200 rupaye ka jurmana lagaya tha. Humne socha chalo, finally justice mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log appeal mein chale gaye hain! Woh case phir se khul gaya hai, Sir. Yeh kya ho raha hai? Itni mushkil se toh woh pakde gaye the, saza mili thi. Ab phir se azad hone ki koshish kar rahe hain. Main darr rahi hoon, Sir. Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh meri zindagi phir se mushkil ho jayegi. Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Anuj ki behen bol rahi hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 11 May 2022 ko, isi court ne uss aadmi ki bail application reject kar di thi. Kitni mushkil se toh humne gawahiyan di thi – Anuj ne, Pitamber ne, Usha Bai ne, even Investigating Officer ne bhi... Sabne sach bataya tha, tab jaake usko saza mili thi. Ab, woh phir se apni sentence suspend karwane aur bail lene ki koshish kar raha hai, Sir. Yeh doosri baar hai! Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh humara kya hoga? Meri family toh darr ke maregi. Humne itni himmat se sach bola tha, kya woh sab bekar jayega? Sir, please, usko bahar mat aane dijiye. Humein insaaf chahiye, woh pehle hi mil chuka hai, use badalne mat dijiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 2014 mein mere bachche ko Pune se utha liya gaya tha. Kitna mushkil waqt tha woh. Phir, badi mushkil se, 30 June 2018 ko us gunehgar ko saza mili thi. Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne use Sections 363 aur 365 ke तहत 5 saal ki rigorous imprisonment aur Rs. 2000 ka fine lagaya tha. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh toh is judgment aur order ko hi challenge kar raha hai, appeal kar raha hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai Sahab? Kya use dobara chhoot mil jaayegi? Meri toh jaan hi nikal jaayegi. Maine itna suffer kiya hai, ab phir se woh sab shuru ho raha hai kya? Aap please dekhiye, mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri to jaan nikli ja rahi hai is case mein. Kitne saal ho gaye, 2014 se ye Sessions Case No. 25 chal raha hai Visakhapatnam ke Anakapalle court mein. Mujhe laga tha ab toh thoda sukoon milega, par nahi! Wo jo Accused No. 4 hai na, usne phir appeal kar di hai. Matlab, itni baar court ke chakkar kaato, aur phir wahi sab dobara? Aur ab toh pata nahi Blue Jeans app pe sunwai ho rahi hai, mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha. Upar se, usko toh sarkari vakil bhi mil gaya hai. Hum gareeb log kahan tak ladenge, Sir? Meri request hai, kuch karo, is baar toh justice milna chahiye. Bahut ho gaya ab!

Sir, woh Sanjeev Ram, jisko Ghaziabad ke Additional Sessions Judge ne 10 February 2012 ko life imprisonment di thi, woh ab bhi appeal kar raha hai? Meri toh poori zindagi usne barbaad kar di thi jab usne mujhe kidnap kiya tha, Sir. Kavi Nagar police station mein maine complaint ki thi. Usko toh Rs. 10,000 ka fine bhi laga tha. Kitni mushkil se toh court ne insaaf diya tha. Agar woh appeal jeet gaya aur bahar aa gaya toh humara kya hoga? Meri family toh abhi bhi uske naam se kaanpti hai. Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi thi. Rakesh Singh ne mujhe kitna pareshan kiya, usne mujhe galat tareeke se band karke rakha, dhamkiyan di, aur zabardasti paise bhi nikalwane ki koshish ki. Sir, usne toh mujhe kidnap bhi kiya tha! Poora gang tha uska, sab milkar yeh saare kaand karte the. Bohot mushkil se, itne saal baad, use October 2012 mein convict kiya gaya aur fir November 2012 mein saza mili thi. Mujhe laga finally insaaf mil gaya, meri jaan chhooti. Par ab pata chala hai ki usne fir se appeal file kar di hai! Yeh kya mazak hai, sir? Meri request hai, please is case mein help kijiye, mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh phir se bach na jaaye. Meri family bhi bohot tension mein hai, sir.

Sir, main Tedesara gaon ke paas se jaa raha tha, shaam ke 5 baje honge. Meri Ambassador car thi. Achank ek white Maruti car ne Sinha Dhaba ke paas meri gaadi ko overtake kiya. Usmein se do log nikle, Shakir aur Parvej alias Chhotu. Unhone mujh par chaku aur desi katta taan diya, sir! Mujhe bahut daraya aur zabardasti meri hi Ambassador car ki pichhli seat par bitha diya. Mera munh kapde se baandh diya. Phir Hasan aur Abdul alias Abbu bhi meri car mein baith gaye. Sir, meri jaan ko khatra hai. Ye log mujhe kidnap kar rahe the! Please help me, sir!

Sir, main aapke paas phir se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 7 November 2004 ko mere bachche ko utha liya tha kuch logon ne, ransom bhi maanga tha. Bahut mushkil se woh din guzre the, sir. Hamari complaint par, Datia court ne un gundon ko, jinhone mere bachche ko kidnap kiya tha, unko saza di thi. Life imprisonment mili thi unhe, aur Rs. 25,000 fine bhi. Hum thoda chain se reh rahe the, soch rahe the ab sab theek ho gaya. Lekin ab suna hai, woh log court mein appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh hamari family ka kya hoga? Woh dangerous log hain. Meri aap se request hai, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe protection chahiye. Unko bahar mat aane dena, sir. Maine bahut trauma jhela hai.

Sir, sun ke meri toh rooh kaanp gayi hai. Yaad hai na aapko wo Thodupuzha court wala case, SC No. 80/2010? Jisme woh teen log, accused number 6, 7 aur 8, unko life imprisonment mili thi mere bachche ke kidnapping ke liye? 25,000 ka fine bhi laga tha har ek par, Section 364 A IPC ke तहत. Ab pata chala hai ki unhone appeal file kar di hai, Crl.Appeal No.465/2015 aur 474/2015 ke naam se! Meri toh neend udd gayi hai, sahab. Itni mushkil se toh insaaf mila tha, ab yeh phir se court-kachahari. Agar yeh chhoot gaye toh humari zindagi tabah ho jayegi. Bahut darr lag raha hai mujhe. Aap kuch kariye na, sahab, please!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera to dimaag kharab ho gaya hai. Humne kitni mushkil se woh FIR karayi thi, P.S. City Gurdaspur mein, woh 20.04.2007 wali, jiska number tha 54. Meri beti ko uthane ki koshish ki thi unhone, Sections 363, 511, 34 IPC ke तहत case bana tha. Par Sir, court ne un sabko baizzat bari kar diya hai! Pehle 2009 mein, aur phir 2010 mein dobara, Fast Track Court ne bhi unhe chhod diya. Main baar-baar court ke chakkar laga rahi hoon, par koi sunwai hi nahin ho rahi. Woh log aise khule ghoom rahe hain, jaise kuch kiya hi na ho. Meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Aap hi batao, kya ab hum gareebon ko insaaf nahin milega? Meri to bas ek hi umeed hai ki aap log kuch karo.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshani mein aaya hoon. Pichle kuch dino se meri jaan ko khatra hai. Woh kuch log hain na, unhone mujhe utha liya tha. Mere gharwalo se paise maang rahe the, ransom ke liye! Maine unki baatein maani nahi toh unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di, itna daraya ki main kaanp gaya. Ek nahi the Sir, sab milkar plan banakar aaye the. Unki wajah se main abhi bhi darr darr ke jee raha hoon. Mujhe lagta hai woh phir se kuch kar sakte hain. Kripya meri madad kijiye, un logon par strict action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, meri family bhi darr rahi hai.

Sir, meri baat suniye, please. Mera beta, Harbhan, 6 June 2002 ko Govindgarh ki sabzi mandi gaya tha sabzi bechne. Bas us din ke baad se, sir, woh aaj tak ghar nahi lauta. Itne saal ho gaye, mera to sab kuch chala gaya. Woh Rahis aur Natthi Singh hain na, unhone hi mere Harbhan ko uthaya tha, paiso ke liye. Court ne unko दोषी mana hai, kidnap kiya, bandhi banaya, aur paisa bhi maanga (Section 364A, 365, 384 IPC). Unko saza bhi ho gayi hai, sir. Par mera beta kahan hai? Main bas itna chahti hoon, mujhe pata chale mera Harbhan kahan hai. Meri madad karo, Sir!

Daroga ji, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath jo Netrapal ne kiya tha, woh soch kar bhi meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Us zalim ne mujhe kidnap kar liya tha, meri jaan lene ki poori koshish ki thi. Main toh bas khuda ka shukr karti hoon ki aaj zinda hoon. Etah ki adalat mein jo case chala tha, usme judge sahab ne Netrapal ko zindagi bhar ki kaid di thi, Rs. 5000 ka fine bhi lagaya tha usne mujhe uthaya tha, isliye. Aur jaan lene ki koshish ke liye 7 saal ki jail aur Rs. 1000 ka jurmana. Itni mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha. Ab suna hai woh phir se appeal kar raha hai. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Meri aap se yahi guzarish hai, please dekhiye ki mujhe aur mere parivaar ko koi takleef na ho. Hum bahut darr mein hain.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai aur ab court mein bhi mere saath अन्याय ho raha hai. Woh Mr. Sharma jo unka lawyer hai na, usne bol diya ki Sanjay Babulal Vyas ko toh is application se chhod do. Matlab, mera accused, Sanjay, aise hi bach jayega kya? Meri toh samajh mein nahi aa raha, itni mushkil se case lad rahe hain, aur yeh log ek-ek karke nikalte ja rahe hain. Judge Sahab ne bhi bol diya ki haan, theek hai, isko dispose off kar do. Main toh bahut tension mein hoon. Ab ek nayi lawyer aayi hain, Ms. Yashma Mathur, meri taraf se. Unhone apna Vakalatnama file karne ki permission maangi hai. Pata nahi woh kya karengi. Par Sir, Sanjay ko toh pakadna chahiye na!
