Sir, main Godhara A Division Police Station mein complain karne aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Woh log, pata nahi kitne the, ikhatte hoke aaye aur hamare ghar pe *hungama* kiya. Unhone *danga* kiya, Sir. Phir mujhe wahan se *zabardasti utha ke le gaye*! Maine kitna *minnat* kiya, lekin woh nahi maane. Raaste mein aur jab woh mujhe pakde hue the, unhone mujhe *bahut maara-peeta*, Sir. Mere shareer par chotein aayi hain. Aur uske upar se, mujhe *gaali-galoch* kiya, *beizzati* ki meri. Jab main unse chhootne ki koshish kar raha tha, toh unhone mujhe *jaan se maarne ki dhamki* bhi di. Sir, meri jaan ko khatra hai. Main *bahut darr gaya* hoon. Please, un logon ke khilaf action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi mere saath kaisa anyay ho raha hai. Baat 2001 ki hai, Adityapur police station mein mere khilaaf ek case (154/2001) bana tha. Uske baad se main bas court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. 2011 mein, 14 February ko, trial court ne mujhe saza suna di. Maine socha, chalo, upar ki adalat mein appeal karte hain, shayad insaaf mil jaye. Magar Seraikella ke Additional Sessions Judge sahib ne bhi meri nahi suni. Pata hai sir, pichle saal, 7 August 2015 ko, unhone bhi wahi purani saza confirm kar di. Meri toh zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Itne saalon se lad raha hoon, aur har baar niraasha hi mil rahi hai. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, meri baat suno, main bahut pareshaan hoon! Pichle saal, 17 November 2023 ko, Rahuri mein, Ahmednagar district mein, kuch logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya. Unhone mujhe bahut buri tarah se maara-peeta, chot lagayi. Meri beizzati ki, gaali galoch kiya. Aur toh aur, mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di! Phone pe gumnam calls karke bhi dhamka rahe hain, Sir. Unhone toh mujhe uthaane ki bhi koshish ki thi, main bahut darr gaya tha. Ab mera case chal raha hai R.C.C. No.276 of 2024 mein, aur woh log chahte hain ki yeh case khatam ho jaaye, meri complaint quash ho jaaye. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh log bahut takleef de rahe hain. Please meri madad karo!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, woh 2009 ka mamla? Satna mein jo Special Judge sahab ne faisla sunaya tha, 17 February 2011 ko. Us aadmi ne mere bacche ko utha liya tha, Sir! Kidnapping ki thi usne. Section 364 IPC aur us MP ke 'Vyapharan Adhiniyam' ke तहत usko 10 saal ki saza mili thi. Ab woh kamina phir se appeal kar raha hai! Usko 10 saal bhi zyada lag rahe hain kya? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi uski wajah se. Sir, please, usko chhootne mat dena. Humne itna kuch jhela hai, ab woh us saza ko bhi palatwana chahta hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bas insaaf.

Sir, main Hyderabad se aaya hoon. Meri biwi, Noorjahan Begum @ Nishat Begum, ko kuch gunde zabardasti utha kar le gaye hain! Yeh parso, 11 July, ko hua tha. Hum log ghar par the, tabhi 4-5 log achanak ghus aaye. Unhone mujhe dhakka diya aur maara bhi. Meri biwi ko pakad liya aur dhamki di ki agar maine shor kiya toh mujhe jaan se maar denge. Phir woh meri biwi ko zabardasti apni gaadi mein daal kar le gaye. Sir, woh log hamare ghar se kuch saman, jewellery aur cash bhi utha kar le gaye hain. Mujhe meri biwi ki bohot chinta ho rahi hai, sir. Uske bina mera jeena mushkil hai. Woh bechari bohot masoom hai. Please un gundo ko pakdo aur meri biwi ko wapas laado. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sahab, meri baat suniye. Mere saath bohot galat hua hai. Kuch log the, ek poori gang thi unki. Unhone mujhe ghar se utha liya, kai dino tak ek jagah band karke rakha, khane peene ko bhi theek se nahi diya. Jaan se maarne ki dhamkiyan di, mujhe aur mere parivaar ko. Sir, main SC/ST community se aata hoon, isliye unhone meri jaati ka mazak banaya, sabke saamne beizzati ki aur meri jo thodi bohot zameen thi, uspe bhi kabza kar liya. Yeh sab election ke chakkar mein hua. Unhone mujhe aur mere logon ko daraya, dhamkaya. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai, sahab. Kripya un logon pe sakht se sakht kaarwai kijiye. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Mera jo Sessions Case No. 120 chal raha hai na, woh 2015 se latka hua hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, meri toh poori zindagi isi mein nikal gayi hai. Pata hai sir, pichle saal 17 March ko, Judge sahab ne ek accha faisla sunaya tha. Woh jo saamne wala hai na, woh baar-baar case se nikalne ki koshish karta hai. Usne ek application dali thi ki usko case se discharge kar do, but Judge sahab ne uski application reject kar di thi. Mujhe laga tha ab jaake chain milega, ab toh insaaf hoga. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal mein chala gaya hai, bol raha hai ki usko case se chhuti milni chahiye. Matlab, woh phir se bhagne ki koshish kar raha hai! Sir, aise kaise chalega? Kitni baar ladun main? Please, meri madad karo. Uska discharge nahi milna chahiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri to kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Woh jo mera court case chal raha hai na, usme bahut badi problem ho gayi hai. Court ke judges bahut naraaz hain humse, bol rahe hain humari taraf se galti hui hai. Mere waqeel sahab aaj date par gaye hi nahi, aur unhone court ko yeh bhi nahi bataya ki woh kyon nahi aa paye ya thoda time chahiye tha. Court ne toh pehle bhi kitni baar bola tha, warnings di thi, par woh suni hi nahi. Meri to sunwai hi theek se nahi ho pa rahi. Aakhri baar pata nahi kab gaye the woh. Sir, mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, ab main kya karoon? Mera case toh latak gaya lagta hai.

Sir, main Shish Pal hoon. Meri suno toh, kal raat mere saath kitna galat hua. Woh Mahesh Kumar hai na, usne mujhe bina wajah ke rok liya. Raat ke kareeb 7:45 baje the, 10 February 2010 ko. Main apne kaam se jaa raha tha, aur usne mera raasta roka, mujhe bahut darr lag gaya tha, saab. Usne mujhe forcibly roka! Isliye main aaj Pul Prahlad Pur PS aaya hoon, subah se wait kar raha tha, ab 3 baje meri baari aayi hai. Maine apni complaint likhwa di hai, aap please iske basis pe FIR register kar do. Us Mahesh Kumar ko saza milni chahiye. Woh aise kisi ko bhi bina baat ke kaise rok sakta hai? Meri madad karo, saab!

Sahab, main Babita hoon. Meri baat suniye please. Pichle saal, 7 January 2021 ko, shaam ke kareeb 5 baje, Nabi Karim mein Gali Tel Mill par, ghar no. 7400 ke paas, Shakuntla (Vijay ki biwi) aur Aarti (Lakhan ki biwi) ne mujhe raste mein rok liya. Main apne kaam se jaa rahi thi, unhone mujhe jaane nahi diya. Fir un dono ne milkar mujhe bahut maara. Meri kamar aur haathon mein bahut chot lagi hai, dekhiye. Main us din bahut darr gayi thi. Insaaf chahiye mujhe unse, Sahab. Koi aise kaise kisi ko rok kar maar sakta hai?

Sir, main yahan Taliparamba se aaya hoon. Meri suniye na, bahut pareshaan hoon. Yeh jo mobile network wali companies hain na, jo humein phone service deti hain, unhone court mein case daal rakha hai. Aur pata hai kiske khilaaf? Hamare Circle Inspector sahab aur Sub Inspector sahab ke khilaaf! Bol rahe hain ki police wale unko kaam nahi karne de rahe. Ab is sab chakkar mein na, hum aam logon ki service bilkul kharab ho gayi hai. Mera phone nahi lagta, internet chalta nahi. Sir, yeh toh bade-bade case hain court mein, humein kya pata kya ho raha hai. Par humari toh zindagi ruk gayi hai. Companies keh rahi hain ki unko roka ja raha hai. Mujhe toh bas network chahiye, mera mobile chale. Meri kya galti hai isme? Please kuch karo, main toh mar raha hoon network ke bina!

Sir, aap suniye meri baat. Woh jo padosi hai na, usne meri apni compound-wall ke upar pura tin ka shed laga diya tha. Meri apni deewar hai woh, aur uska tin seedha mere aangan ke upar latka hua tha, Sir! Meri ghar ki poori space kharab ho gayi thi. Jab bhi mujhe apni deewar pe kuch kaam karwana hota tha, ya saaf safai karni hoti thi, kitni mushkil hoti thi. Maine kitni baar bola usko, par woh sunta hi nahi tha. Akhir mein court case hua, aur Magistrate sahab ne maana ki haan, usne 'wrongful restraint' kiya hai. Par Sir, usko sirf 15 rupaye ka fine laga ke chhod diya! 15 rupaye? Meri itni saari takleef, itna mental harassment, aur bas 15 rupaye ki saza? Yeh toh bilkul insaaf nahi hai, Sir. Mujhe lagta hai usko aur kadi saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main wohi Jhonson Sunny ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Usne mera raasta roka tha, mujhe bina wajah maara aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Police ne uske khilaaf charge sheet bhi file ki hai, Sir. Kitne saal ho gaye hain ab toh, 2005 se yeh case chal raha hai. Court mein bhi uske upar charges frame hue the, par woh abhi bhi bolta hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi. Sarasar jhoot hai Sir! Mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Woh bahar khuleaam ghoom raha hai aur mujhe har waqt usse darr laga rehta hai. Police ne itni jaanch ki, saboot hain, phir bhi usko saza kyun nahi mil rahi?

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri sunwai koi nahi kar raha. Yeh court mein election petition ka case chal raha hai, aur dekhiye, humari taraf se (Election Petitioner) bas teen gawah hain – Debashish, Dipankar aur Sukanta. Aur unke (Respondent) taraf se paanch-paanch log hain – Mohammed Moquim, Santosh, Prashanta, Sourjya aur Sofia. Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha unfair hai! Meri baat kaun sune ga? Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath cheating hui hai election mein, aur ab court mein bhi mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Itne saare gawah unke paas, aur humari taraf se kam. Kya garib aadmi ko kabhi insaaf nahi milega? Please meri madad kijiye, Sir. Meri toh zindagi daav par lagi hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Yeh jo mera case hai na, court mein chal raha hai. Unka jo bada vakeel hai, woh bol raha hai ki kuch hua hi nahi hai, koi crime hua hi nahi hai. Mere saare papers, documents woh log court mein aise ghuma dete hain ki lagta hai main jhooth bol raha hoon. Aur Sir, woh kehte hain ki pehle bhi aise hi ek case mein judgement aa chuka hai, toh yeh case bhi waisa hi hai, kuch farak nahi hai. Matlab meri problem ko woh log ek purane case se compare kar rahe hain, jaise meri takleef ka koi mol hi nahi. Sabse buri baat toh yeh hai Sir, ki jo sarkari vakeel hain, woh bhi unki baat se sehmat hain, unhone bhi kuch oppose nahi kiya. Aise mein mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh suni hi nahi jaa rahi hai. Mujhe lagta hai woh bade bade qanoon aur pehle ke faisle dikha kar bas mujhe aur mere case ko dabana chahte hain.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to zindagi hi mushkil ho gayi hai. Pehle 15 October ko case laga tha, Nalagarh Police Station, Baddi se ek 'Status Report' aayi thi. Mere advocate ko uski copy di, unhone kaha 'padhne ke liye time chahiye'. Maine socha jaldi insaaf milega, par nahi! Ab 28 October ko dobara sunwai hui, tab jaake finally 'suni' gayi baat. Magar sir, yeh toh sirf paperwork hai. Meri JCB jab se confiscate hui hai, mera kaam band hai. Woh 'Status Report' mein likha hai ki mere JCB ko do police wale le ja rahe the. Yeh sab kya chal raha hai? Meri to rozi-roti chali gayi hai, aur yeh log bas report pe report bana rahe hain! Mujhe mera JCB wapas chahiye, meri madad karo sir.

Sir, main aapko meri takleef batane aaya hoon. Mera case court mein 15 October ko laga tha. Tab Nalagarh thane se, SHO sahib ke kehne par, police walon ne ek report submit ki thi, status report. Us report ki copy mere vakil ko bhi mili thi. Unhone time manga tha usko padhne aur apni baat rakhne ke liye. Toh phir, 28 October ko dobara sunwai hui, aur court ne dono taraf ki suni. Sir, par us report mein yeh bhi likha hai ki meri JCB confiscate kar li gayi thi, aur do police wale usko le jaa rahe the. Meri JCB! Sir, woh meri rozi-roti hai, woh aise kaise zabt kar sakte hain? Mujhe toh bahut nuksan ho gaya hai. Aap kuch kijiye sir.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Mere saath jo galat hua hai, uska kya hoga? Court mein unka bada lawyer bol raha hai ki maine jiske khilaaf complaint ki hai, usne toh kuch kiya hi nahi hai! Sab jhooth hai bol rahe hain. Mere paas proofs hain, sab hai, par woh keh rahe hain ki yeh offence bana hi nahi. Aur bolte hain ki yeh toh puraane ek judgment mein pehle hi decide ho chuka hai. Sir, hadd toh tab ho gayi jab sarkari wukil bhi unki baat maan gaye! Matlab, jo meri taraf se ladne wale the, woh bhi unse agree kar gaye. Yeh kya ho raha hai? Itne saare kanoon aur फैसले hain, par mujhe toh lagta hai sab mil-bhagat hai. Meri sunega kaun? Please meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, meri JCB police walon ne utha li thi, Nalagarh thane se. Uska case chal raha hai. 15 October ko court mein meri tareekh thi. Wahan State authorities ne, Nalagarh ke SHO sahab ke instructions par, ek Status Report submit ki. Mere vakeel sahab ko uski copy mili, toh unhone time maanga ki padh ke batayenge. Phir 28 October ko dobara sunwai hui, aur court ne sab sun liya. Lekin sir, us Status Report mein likha hai ki meri JCB confiscate karne ke baad, jab do police wale usko le jaa rahe the... toh aage kya hua? Meri JCB ka kya bana? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha sir, meri mehnat ki kamai hai woh. Please meri madad karo, mujhe meri JCB wapis chahiye aur pata karna hai ki uske saath kya hua!

Sahab, meri suniye! Main Ludhiana ke Police Station Division 5 mein aaya hoon. Pichhle saal ki baat hai, 30 October 2022 ko, un gundon ne mujhe raste mein rok liya. Main apne kaam se ja raha tha aur unhone mujhe pakad ke zabardasti ek kamre mein band kar diya. Ghanton tak band rakha sahab! Mujhe bahut dar lag raha tha. Wo mujhse kuch papers par sign karwana chahte the, meri zameen ke papers the shayad. Jab maine mana kiya toh dhamki dene lage, bole jaan se maar denge agar unki baat nahi mani. Main kya karta? Akela tha wahan. Meri koi sunne wala nahi tha. Sir, ye log bahut khatarnak hain, inki wajah se meri poori family darr ke saaye mein jee rahi hai. Meri request hai aapse, please inke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye sahab!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshani mein aaya hoon. Woh jo accused hai na, usne hamare saath bahut bura kiya hai. Usne humein galat tareeke se roka, maarpeet ki, sarkari kaam mein bhi rukawat daali. Meri cheezein churaane ki koshish bhi ki. Aur ab uske bade bade wakeel hain, jo court mein uski bail ke liye lade rahe hain. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai ki woh kahin bail par bahar na aa jaye aur humein aur tang kare. Usne toh illegal mining type ka bhi kuch kiya hai, jispar Mines Act ke under bhi case ban raha hai. Sir, yeh mamla bohot gambhir hai. Kripya usko bail mat milne dijiye. Humein insaaf chahiye, Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Ye Nalagarh Police station, Baddi (HP) waalon ne meri JCB zabt kar li hai. Do police wale aaye the aur meri JCB utha ke le gaye, bina kisi baat ke. Mera toh usmein sab kuch laga hua hai, sir! Abhi kuch din pehle pata chala ki court mein koi 'status report' dali hai 15 tarik ko. Mere vakil sahab ne kaha ki ab 28 ko sunwai hai. Lekin mujhe toh meri JCB wapas chahiye na! Uske bina main kaam kaise karunga? Meri family ka pet kaise palega? Main toh barbaad ho gaya hoon. Kripya karke meri madad kijiye, sir. Meri JCB dilwa do.

Sir, main Rina Devi bol rahi hoon. Mujhe abhi abhi pata chala hai ki woh jiske khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, usne bail ke liye apply kar diya hai court mein. Sir, woh aadmi bahar aa gaya toh meri zindagi jhand ho jayegi! Usne mere saath itna galat kiya hai, aur ab woh free ghumega? Main bahut darr rahi hoon, sir. Agar usko bail mil gayi na, toh woh mujhe aur mere bachchon ko phir se tang karega, pakka. Meri aapse request hai, please use bail mat milne dena. Humari family usse itna darrti hai. Maine badi mushkil se himmat karke uski report likhwai thi. Agar woh phir se bahar aa gaya, toh humara kya hoga? Please sir, kuch kijiye!

Sahayak ji, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Woh jo aadmi hai na, usne mujhe raste mein roka tha, mera rasta block kar diya (Section 341 IPC). Pura rasta rok kar khada tha, kahin jaane nahi diya. Upar se itni gandi gaaliyan di, sabke saamne meri beizzati ki (Section 504 IPC). Aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di (Section 506 IPC)! Maine toh uske khilaaf Crime No. 222/2022 mein FIR karwai thi, tab jaake thoda sukoon mila tha. Ab pata chala hai ki woh court mein jaake bol raha hai ki usne kuch kiya hi nahi, case hi galat hai! Kya matlab hai iska? Meri toh jaan ko khatra hai, Sahayak ji. Aap hi batao, mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Woh aise hi bach jayega kya? Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, yeh log toh hadd kar rahe hain. Court mein jaake bol rahe hain ki unhone jo sarkari aadesh (public order) nahi maana, uski complaint hi theek se nahi hui hai! Matlab, sabke saamne Section 188 ka ulaghan kiya, aur ab technicality nikal rahe hain ki Cr.P.C. ke hisaab se theek se complaint nahi daali gayi. Kya hum janta ko yeh sab rules pata hote hain? Maine toh jo dekha, jo mere saath hua, woh bataya. Aur Sir, unhone mujhe bekaar mein roka tha, mera rasta band kar diya tha! Yeh seedha-seedha Section 341 ka mamla hai, wrongful restraint. Aur ab bol rahe hain ki koi 'prima facie material' nahi hai, koi 'ingredients' nahi hai! Toh kya meri aankhon dekha jhoot hai? Main kahan jaaun Sir? Meri toh suno, yeh log toh saaf-saaf jhooth bol rahe hain aur bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain.

Sir, main wohi hoon jinka Crime No. 664 of 2019 ka case chal raha hai. Aapko yaad hoga, maine badi mushkil se woh FIR darj karwai thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh dusri party, ya unke log, court mein chale gaye hain. Criminal Original Petition file ki hai unhone, bolte hain ki mere FIR ke saare records mangwa rahe hain. Sir, yeh naya kanoon BNSS, 2023 ke Section 528 ke under kiya hai unhone. Kya iska matlab hai ki woh log mere case ko kamzor karna chahte hain? Meri toh neend ud gayi hai, Sir. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin mera insaaf milna mushkil na ho jaaye. Meri request hai, please isko dekhiye, mera case strong rahe.

Saab, main Rameshbhai Nathubhai. Meri suno please. Bohut pareshaan hoon, aur kahan jaaun samajh nahi aa raha. Court ne ek order diya hai mere favour mein, Special Civil Application 14511 of 2010 mein. Award bhi aa gaya hai, Saab! Uske baad bhi jo company hai, woh mujhe meri payment nahi de rahi. Industrial Disputes Act ke section 17B ke hisaab se, mujhe meri last drawn salary milni chahiye, woh bhi arrears ke saath, jab se court ne bola hai tab se aaj tak. Par Saab, koi sunta hi nahi hai meri. Ghar chalana mushkil ho gaya hai, bachchon ki padhai ruk gayi hai. Main itne saal se intezaar kar raha hoon. Aap please kuch karo, unko bolo ki mera paisa turant de. Meri madad karo Saab, bohut meherbani hogi.

Sir, main kya bataun? Mera toh dimaag kharab ho raha hai yeh sun ke. Kitni baar aayi aapke paas, sab sach bataya. Lekin ab court mein sun rahi hoon ki police ne theek se investigation hi nahi ki. Jahan khoon hua tha, wahan se jo khooni mitti mili thi, use bhi test karne nahi bheja. Ab toh yahi lagega na ki accused ko galat phasaya ja raha hai! Aur woh hathiyar, jisse mujh par vaar hua tha, usko bhi pata nahi kahan se uthaya, uska record bhi theek se nahi hai. Use mere dushman se jod hi nahi pa rahe hain. Meri toh poori zindagi tabah ho jayegi agar woh aise hi chhoot gaya toh. Sir, please kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri family ne itna dard dekha hai. Aapko yaad hai, Bhinmal court mein ek case tha 2000 mein, jab usne mere apne ko maara tha? Us sessions case number 51/99 wale mamle mein, use murder, Section 302 IPC ke तहत life imprisonment hui thi aur bas ₹100 ka jurmana laga tha. Humne socha tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Cr.P.C. 374 ke andar bol rahe hain ki woh purane judgment ko challenge kar raha hai. Sir, ek jaan chali gayi thi, aur ab itne saal baad bhi hamein shanti nahi hai. Meri request hai, kuch kijiye sir. Hamein bas insaaf chahiye aur us gunehgar ko uski saza milni chahiye. Hum bahut darre hue hain, sir.

Sir, main aapko apni complaint batana chahta hoon. Baat 7 June 2020 ki hai, subah ke kareeb 10 baje honge. Main apni mausi ke ghar ja raha tha, apne kisi kaam se. Raste mein hi, woh kuch log jinka naam ab case mein hai, unhone mujhe gher liya, mera rasta rok liya. Jaan boojh kar mujhe tang kiya, Sahab. Main bahut darr gaya tha us din. Din-dahaade aise koi kaise kisi ko rok sakta hai? Meri toh himmat hi toot gayi thi. Mujhe unse bachna tha par woh sun hi nahi rahe the. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Kuch saal pehle, Bengaluru mein, kuch logon ne milkar mujhe jaan-boojhkar ghera, mera rasta roka, aur bahut hungama kiya tha. Ekdum dange jaisa mahaul bana diya tha, Sir. Ussi incident ka case C.C.No.26487 of 2015, court mein chal raha hai. IPC ki dharaein 143, 147 aur 341 r/w 149 lagi hain un logon par. Lekin Sir, abhi tak mujhe insaaf nahi mila hai. Woh log aaj bhi khule ghoom rahe hain. Mera case 32nd Additional Chief Metropolitan Magistrate ke paas pending hai. Main toh bas justice chahti hoon, Sir. Meri puri family pareshaan hai. Please kuch kijiye, unko jaldi saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Mera case court mein chal raha hai, aur pata nahi kya ho raha hai. Meri taraf se, sunwai ke time pe koi aata hi nahi hai. Baar-baar, jab bhi judge sahab ne bulaya, meri taraf se koi present nahi hua. Ab toh, 22.07.2025 ko court ne khud se Mr. Satyabrata Mohanty ko Amicus Curiae appoint kar diya hai, taki wo court ki madad kar sakein. Iska matlab hai ki meri taraf se koi lawyer hi nahi hai, sir! Main toh bahut ghabra gaya hoon. Mera case aise hi latka rahega kya? Kya mujhe insaaf milega ya nahi? Please kuch kijiye, meri sunwai toh honi chahiye na!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Main toh ab apne ghar mein bhi safe feel nahi karti. Ye 16 January 2022 ki baat hai, main apne rented ghar mein thi, meri roommate aur mummy bhi saath the. Mummy ne jaise hi darwaza khola, woh Zaakir Alim Mull andar ghus aaya. Usne meri mummy ko dhakka diya aur humein andar jaane se rok diya. Phir, usne humein gaali galauj karna shuru kar diya, itna insult kiya ki kya bataun. Aur Sir, usne humein jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di, bola ki agar complaint ki toh theek nahi hoga. Main bahut darr gayi thi, aur ab bhi darr lag raha hai. Kripya karke us Zaakir ke khilaaf sakht action lo. Mujhe justice chahiye Sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Woh jo log hain, jinke khilaaf maine complain ki thi ki unhone mujhe raste mein roka tha (Section 341), public mein shor-sharaba karke tang kiya (Section 290) aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki di thi (Section 506), ab woh chahte hain ki mera case hi band ho jaaye! Mera jo case number C.C.No.1191/2023, L.B. Nagar court mein chal raha hai, usko 'quash' karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Police ne toh IPC ke sections ke तहत FIR ki thi, par agar woh log ab court se case hi band karwa denge toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Main darr rahi hoon, Sir. Un logon ne milkar (Section 34) mujhe pareshaan kiya tha, ab agar woh bach gaye toh meri aur himmat toot jayegi. Please, meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon ki meri ek FIR hai, Crime No. 39 of 2017. Usme kuch logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Unhone bina baat ke mujhe roka, ikatthe ho kar pareshaan kiya, aur sarkari orders ko bhi nahi maana. Yeh sab 21 May ko hua tha, main sab sach bata raha hoon. Ab mujhe sunne mein aaya hai ki koi meri us FIR ko cancel karana chahta hai. Sir, meri complaint genuine hai, meri FIR mat cancel hone do. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye. Un logon ne jo kiya, uski saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, woh jo CC.No.97/2016 wala case hai na, usmein jo 5 accused hain, yeh log phir se nikalne ki koshish kar rahe the. Meri suno toh, Sir! Inhone Magistrate saheb ko ek application di thi, ki humein is case se, accused ki list se discharge kar do. Matlab, Sir, yeh chahte the ki inko chod diya jaaye, in par se charges hata diye jaayen. Pata hai, inke bade bade vakil bhi lage hue hain inko bachane mein. Lekin shukar hai Bhagwan ka, aur hamare justice system ka bhi, Magistrate saheb ne 8 August 2019 ko inki application reject kar di! Bol diya ki nahi, tum abhi bhi accused ho. Yeh log kitni baar try karenge Sir? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, yeh paanchon ke paanchon mujrim hain aur inko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh naukri lagne waali thi, par ab sab khatam ho gaya. Woh bol rahe hain ki maine affidavit mein apne upar ke criminal cases ka zikr nahi kiya. Sir, woh Rampur Naikin PS, District Sidhi waala Crime No. 100/15, Section 294, 323, 506, 34 IPC ka case toh bas ek jhagda tha, purani baat hai. Mujhe laga tha woh mamla toh kab ka settle ho gaya. Maine toh sach mein socha ki ab koi case nahi hai, isliye affidavit mein nahi likha tha. Aur ab bol rahe hain ki ek aur naya FIR No. 26/22 bhi hai mere khilaaf. Meri toh samajh mein nahi aa raha, main kya karoon. Meri family ko main kaise dekhunga, Sir? Meri madad karo.

Sir, main Santosh Kumar, aapko batana chahta hoon ki 25 October 2014 ko humare yahan kitna bada jhagda hua tha. Mujhe, aur mere bhai Arvind aur Sanjeev ko itni buri tarah maara gaya ki humein Jag Pravesh Chand Hospital le jaana pada. Humara toh bura haal tha, sir. Jab PCR ko DD No. 25A mila jhagde ka, toh SI Yogesh Kumar aur Constable Ajay spot pe aaye the. Par tab tak toh hum hospital mein the, treatment chal raha tha. Phir, SI saab ne Constable Ajay ko wahin chhod kar hospital mein humein dekha. Hum teeno wahin admit the aur unhone humari MLCs bhi collect ki. Sir, itna sab hone ke baad bhi ab tak humein insaaf nahi mila. Hamein bahut takleef hui hai.

Sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri suno please. Yeh Vijay Pal hai na, Mange Ram ka beta, aur uska saathi Naresh, jo late Rajpal ka beta hai aur Baba Haridas Nagar ke House No. 77, D Block mein rehta hai, inhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Roz mujhe dhamki dete hain, gali-galoch karte hain. Pehle bhi maine inke khilaf complaint ki thi, FIR No. 25/10 bhi hui thi PS Baba Haridas Nagar mein, par koi faayda nahi hua. Ab toh mamla court tak pahunch gaya hai (SC No. 89/12), par ye sudharne ka naam hi nahi lete. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, Sahab. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Aap please kuchh kariye.

Sir, main Satish Saini bol raha hoon. Meri suniye, sir, meri life barbaad kar di in logon ne. 1 September 2010 ki raat thi, kareeb dedh baje honge. Karawal Nagar mein, Rama Garden, Gali No. 3, H. No. 154 ke theek saamne, ye Mukesh, Kali Charan urf Teetu, Rakesh aur Suresh urf Neetu ne mujhe bina wajah pakad liya, roka. Bahut maara peeta mujhe, sir, simple hurt aayi hai mujhe. Aur sir, itna hi nahi, ye log mere ghar ke andar bhi ghus gaye, trespass kiya hai inhone. Meri family darr gayi hai. Ye log bahut kharab hain, sir. Inke khilaf strict action lijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, woh jo meri FIR thi na, woh toh darj ho gayi thi. Uske baad, apne sab Inspectors ne bahut achhe se investigation ki. Sach mein, unhone puri jaan laga di. Aur haan, un badmaashon ke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file kar di hai court mein. Meri toh saansein atki hui thi. Phir court ne bhi case ko serious liya aur un logon ko bulaya. Jab woh log aaye na court mein, toh unko woh chargesheet ki copy bhi de di gayi hai, jaise kanoon mein likha hai. Ab toh lagta hai, thoda insaaf ki kiran dikh rahi hai. Bas ab jaldi se sab khatam ho aur mujhe nyay mile, sir.

Sir, main Kinshuk bol raha hoon. Meri ek emergency complaint hai. Pura din kharab ho gaya sir! Pata hai, 15 June 2013 ko shaam mein kareeb 6:30 baje, main, mera bhai Kush aur mere papa, Dr. V.K. Singh, hum Rohini Sector-2 mein apne naye ghar gaye the. Humne apni Honda City car, Bikaner Sweets ke bilkul saamne park ki thi. Sir, jab hum wapas aaye toh dekha ki kisi ne apni Maruti Zen car hamari gaadi ke bilkul peeche park kar di hai. Ab hum apni car nikaal hi nahi paa rahe hain! Puri gaadi fas gayi hai sir. Bahut dikkat ho rahi hai. Please kuch kijiye sir!

Sir, main Ratan Lal Jain, H. No. 216, Maidan Garhi, Farm House se hoon. Meri suniye sir, yeh Sohan Lal, Ram Kishan aur Sri Chand, in logon ne meri life mushkil kar di hai. Meri property par galat tareeke se kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Baar baar dhamki dete hain aur mujhe tang karte hain. Maine pehle bhi bataya tha, par koi sunwai nahi hui. Sohan Lal toh Sonepat se aata hai, aur Ram Kishan, Sri Chand yahi Maidan Garhi ke rehne wale hain. Sir, mera jeena haram ho gaya hai. Mujhe darr lagta hai, meri family ko bhi khatra hai. Please inke khilaaf strict action lo, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Raghubir Singh hoon. Mujhe un logon ne, jo accused hain, bahut buri tarah se peeta hai. Meri koi galti nahi thi, par unhone mujhe jamke thappad maare, ghusand maare. Aapko pata hai, mera MLC bhi bana hai, Ex.A-2. Doctor Naushad ne check kiya tha mujhe. Unhone bataya ki simple injuries hain, par mere neeche wale hoth par bahut zyada soojan hai, abhi tak dard hota hai. Woh log toh court mein bhi maan chuke hain ki MLC sahi hai, kehte hain ki haan maine maara. Meri to izzat chali gayi, aur dard alag se. Sir, please un logon par sakht karwayi karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Surender Singh Chauhan hoon. Meri ek complaint hai aapke paas, bahut dukhi hoon, sir. Humari, matlab meri aur meri patni, Ram Murti ki Sher Mohd aur Firdosh Begum ne bahut buri tarah pitai ki hai. Unhone meri patni ko bhi nahi chhoda, usko bhi maar-maar ke adhmara kar diya. Hum dono ko bahut chotein aayi hain, sir, uski report bhi banayi hai doctors ne. Humara medical (MLC) hua hai, aur pata hai sir, un accused logon ne toh khud court mein maana hai ki haan, unhone hi humein peeta tha. Ab aap hi batao sir, humein kab insaaf milega? Aise kaise koi kisi ko bhi peet ke nikal jayega?

Sir, main Naresh Kumar, bahut pareshan hokar aapke paas aaya hoon. Baat 20 April 2009 ki subah ki hai. Main aur mera dost Satyajit Singh, hum dono Sultan Puri ke F-Block mein Hari Lal Pahalwan Akhada ke paas wale Govt. Park se nikal rahe the. Hum apne raste jaa rahe the ki achanak kuch logon ne, sab ne milkar, humein jaan-boojhkar roka. Hum jahan jaa rahe the, woh humara rasta tha, humein poora haq tha wahan se jaane ka. Lekin unhone bina kisi wajah ke humein zabardasti aage badhne se rok diya. Yeh bilkul galat tha, Sir. Humara raasta rokar unhone humein bahut tang kiya. Mujhe un sab par kaarwai chahiye, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aaya hoon. Woh Harish Kumar aur Kanhiya Lal, inhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Baat hai 19 November 2007 ki. Main apne ghar ke paas, A Block, Durga Vihar Chowk par khada tha. Bina kisi baat ke, inhone mujhe ghera aur buri tarah maara-peeta, sir. Mujhe rok kar rakha, aur mere saman ka bhi nuksan kiya. Upar se, mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di. Pehle bhi maine complaint ki thi, FIR no. 837/07 hai uski. Police bhi aayi thi tab, Bir Sen sahab aur Samay Singh ji. Par ab tak koi insaaf nahi mila hai. Please, sir, in logo par action lo. Meri madad karo!

Sir, main Dikshant Panwar. Meri suniye, sir, bahut galat hua mere saath! Ye 31 December 2015 ki baat hai. Raat ka time tha, sahi time yaad nahi, H.No.292, Ber Sarai mein, jo Vasant Vihar police station ke area mein aata hai. Kuch logon ne, sir, mujhe wahan bina wajah rok liya. Unhone mujhe pakad ke rakha, bilkul zabardasti. Phir, sir, unhone mujhe ghoonson aur laaton se maara. Bahut dard ho raha hai, sir, mera pura shareer dukhta hai. Aur sabse buri baat, sir, unhone mujhe zabardasti sharab pilayi! Main peena nahi chahta tha, par unhone mujhe force kiya. Sir, main aapke paas insaaf ke liye aaya hoon. Un logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, unhe saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main na, ek company chalata hoon, jiska naam hai Transaction Solutions International. Humara Delhi mein office hai, DLF Prime Towers, Okhla mein. Humara kaam hai banks ko help karna, jaise ATM lagana, unki security dekhna, digital payments mein assistance dena, aise 20 states mein hum service dete hain. Bahut mehnati kaam hai, sir. Baat 2014 ki hai, hum Vasant Vihar mein PNB bank ke liye ek ATM lagane ki jagah dhoondh rahe the. Isi beech kuch log mere paas aaye, aur unhone phir jo kiya, usne mujhe bahut pareshan kar diya hai, sir. Meri to neend ud gayi hai!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Raj Kumar Garg naam ke aadmi ne mujhe bahut dhokha diya hai. Yeh Raj Kumar Garg, S/o Banarsi Das Garg hai, aur Pitampura ke West Enclave mein, H.No. C-1/37, Delhi mein rehta hai. Isne meri saari savings loot li hain, sir. Maine ispe trust kiya tha, socha tha ki yeh mera kaam kar dega, lekin isne toh bas jhoote vaade kiye aur mera hard-earned money leke bhaag gaya. Ab toh phone bhi nahi utha raha. Meri family bahut problem mein hai uski wajah se. Aap please kuch karo, sir. Mujhe meri mehnat ki kamai wapas chahiye. Usne mujhe fasaya hai, sir. Please uske khilaf action lo.

Sir, mera case toh bahut time se latka hua hai. Pehle meri FIR darj hui thi, bade mushkil se. Phir hamare IO sahab ne jaanch padtaal ki, aur finally un gunehgaron ke khilaaf chargesheet file kar di. Court mein bhi case gaya, toh judge sahab ne mamla dekha aur un sab ko bulaya gaya court mein. Jab woh pesh hue, toh unhe chargesheet ki copy bhi de di gayi. Ab yeh sab toh ho gaya, Sir. Aage kya hoga? Mujhe toh bas nyay chahiye, kab tak aise hi chalega?

Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri baat suniye. Pul Prahlad Pur police station mein meri ek FIR hui thi, uss waqt bhi main bahut pareshan tha. Woh FIR number 247/12 hai. Avdesh Singh aur uske do-teen saathiyon ne mujhe raaste mein roka tha, bahut ganda maara-peeta tha. Aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi, bilkul. Unhone mujhe bandhak bhi banaya tha ek tarah se. Court mein case chal raha hai, aur unke khilaaf charges bhi frame ho chuke hain 8 July 2013 ko, section 323, 341, 506, 34 IPC ke under. Sab clear hai, sir. Lekin yeh Avdesh Singh aur uske saathi abhi bhi bol rahe hain ki unhone kuch nahi kiya, 'not guilty' bol rahe hain! Yeh to seedha-seedha jhooth hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Main bahut darr gaya hoon aur pareshan hoon. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, meri suniye! Pata nahi kya karoon, bas aap hi madad kar sakte ho. Yeh Sohan Lal, jo Jaldhari Prasad ka beta hai, J-II-1/7, Gupta Colony, Sangam Vihar, New Delhi mein rehta hai, aur uska sathi Fainku Prasad, Chotak Prasad ka beta hai, J-II-43-1, Gupta Colony, Sangam Vihar, New Delhi mein rehta hai, yeh dono meri zindagi barbaad kar rahe hain. Roz-roz mujhe gali dete hain, dhamki dete hain, mere bachchon ko bhi target karte hain. Ghar se nikalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Sir, please inke khilaaf action lo, mujhe dar lagta hai. Meri family danger mein hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, yeh baat 2007 February ki hai, shaam ka time tha. Main Jagdish Pradhan ki dukaan ke bahar khada tha. Mera cable ka kuch mamla tha unke saath, usi par baat kar raha tha. Achanak cable operator ke 4-5 gunde type log aa gaye aur mujhse jagra karne lage. Sir, unhone mujhe gher liya tha, bahas bahut badh gayi thi. Main akela tha aur woh 4-5 the. Vijay bhi unke saath hi dukaan par maujood tha. Itni narrow road thi, logon ki bheed lag gayi. Ek car aayi toh Jagdish ji ne beech-bachav karwaya, Pranav naam ke ladke ko hataaya, aur fir jaake sab log wahan se chale gaye. Par sir, us din unhone mujhe bahut pareshan kiya tha, meri izzat uchhali thi public mein. Mujhe un sab par kaarwai chahiye!

Sir, dekhiye na, kitna time ho gaya hai, mera case abhi bhi chal raha hai. Mere saath jo hua, usmein nainsaafi hi nainsaafi hai. Hamare side se, prosecution ne pure saat gawah bulaye hain, sabne sach bola hai, sabne dekha tha. Meri toh FIR bhi Ct. Abdul Wahid ne hi register ki thi, pata hai aapko. Jab mujhe chot lagi thi, toh police mere saath spot pe bhi gayi thi, site plan bhi banaya tha. Accused ko pakda bhi tha aur uski proper personal search bhi ki thi. Itne saare kanoon hain, itne judgments hain desh mein, par mujhe abhi tak insaaf nahi mila hai. Sir, bas ab aap hi kuch kijiye, mujhe mera haq dilwaiye.

Sir, main Aditya Kashyap. Meri suniye, sir! Baat hai 31 December 2018 ki, raat ke kareeb 9 baje the. Main Church Colony, Sangam Vihar ki Gali No. 9 mein tha. Wahan kuch gundon ne mujhe bina wajah rok liya aur maarpeet shuru kar di. Sir, unhone mujhe bahut buri tarah se peeta. Jaise-taise main wahan se jaan bachakar bhaaga toh woh do log aur unke saath 4-5 aur log, sab meri wali gali mein aa gaye. Aur phir mere upar aur mere ghar par pathar aur eentein fenkne lage. Meri jaan ko khatra hai, sir, please kuch kijiye!

Sir, Ram Ram. Main na, ek bohot bade mushkil mein hoon. Woh Pradeep Sethi hai na, usne meri zindagi jhand kar di hai. Pata hai sir, usne mera raasta roka tha, mujhe jaane nahi de raha tha. Maine use kitna request kiya, par woh nahi mana. Aur sir, uski wajah se mera kitna nuksaan hua hai, meri property bhi usne damage ki thi. Mera dil toot gaya tha. Pichle saal, 14 March 2016 ko, Saket Court ke judge sahab ne bhi kaha tha ki uske khilaaf poore saboot hain, ki uspar 341 aur 427 IPC ke तहत case banega. Ab woh phir appeal kar raha hai. Sir, aap please dekhiye, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Usne jo kiya hai na, uski saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main yahan apni baat batane aaya hoon. Aapko toh pata hi hai, woh Ramanpreet Kaur, Avneet Singh ki biwi, jo C-154, 3rd Floor, Mansarovar Garden, Delhi mein rehti hai, usne mujhe kitna pareshaan kiya tha, maara tha. Maine uske khilaaf case kiya tha na! Ab finally, court ka decision aa gaya hai. Judge sahab ne usko doshi thehraya hai, haan! Mujhe chot pahunchane ke liye (under section 323 IPC). Bahut takleef di thi usne, sir. Chalo, der se hi sahi, par insaaf mila toh. Dil ko thodi shanti mili hai. Par haan, usko mujhe rokne ke mamle (341 IPC) mein chhod diya hai, uska thoda dukh hai. Phir bhi, yeh bhi bohot badi baat hai.

Sir, main apni complaint leke aapke paas aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai, Sir. Yeh baat hai 30 April 2013 ki, subah ke kareeb 10 baje. Main apne ghar, H. No. 71, Jain Colony, Part II, Delhi mein tha. Tabhi Babu Ram Meena aur uska sathi, dono milkar mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Unki niyat sahi nahi thi. Unhone mujhe bina wajah rok liya, aage badhne nahi diya, ek tarah se bandhak bana liya. Main bahut dar gaya tha aur pareshaan bhi. Meri samajh mein nahi aa raha tha ki kya karoon. Saheb, please meri suniye aur un logon ke khilaaf action lijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Poonam hoon. Meri shaadi Kishan Kumar se 26 March 2003 ko hui thi. Shaadi ke baad, bas ek hafte hi sab theek raha. Uske baad se meri zindagi narak ban gayi hai, sir! Mere pati Kishan Kumar ne mujhe dahej ke liye taunt karna shuru kar diya. Har baat pe bolte hain, 'kam dahej layi hai', 'tera baap gareeb hai'. Shaadi ke 15-20 din ke andar hi yeh sab shuru ho gaya tha. Sir, woh mujhe bahot pareshan karte hain, maarte bhi hain aur jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi dete hain. Main bahot dar gayi hoon. Please meri suniye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main Bajrangi Chaudhary. Meri baat suniye, sir. Us din, 1 August 2007 ko subah 9 baje ki baat hai. Main apne kaam se jaa raha tha, Sangam Vihar mein I-10/956/957 ke paas, tabhi woh log achanak aa gaye. Unhone mujhe bina wajah ke rok liya, sir. Pura raasta rok diya mera. Aur phir unhone mujhe maara-peeta bhi. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, sir. Jaan-boojh kar mujhe hurt kiya hai un sabne milkar. Meri koi galti nahi thi. Unki wajah se mujhe kitni takleef hui hai. Sir, mujhe un sab logon ke khilaaf action chahiye. Unko saza milni chahiye. Please meri help kijiye, sir.

Sir, main aapko wahi puraana case batane aaya hoon. Mera jo FIR number 59/03 hai, Sangam Vihar thane mein, ussi ke baare mein. Yaar, 29 January 2003 ki raat ko kareeb 8:30 baje ki baat hai, un logon ne mujhe bewajah roka aur maara-peeta tha. Matlab, bina kisi reason ke mujhe ghera aur phir meri maar-peet ki. Meri koi galti nahi thi. Tab ASI Fiyaz Khan sahab aur Baljeet Singh sahab aaye the. Itne saal ho gaye, ab tak kuch theek se nahi hua. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Un logon ne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya tha, meri izzat uchhali thi. Please, ispar dhyan dijiye.

Sir, main Rajiv Ranjan S/o Sh. Umesh Verma hoon. Meri complaint suno. Woh Shiv Kumar hai na, usne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya hai. 22.01.2006 ki baat hai, us din usne mujhe bina wajah roka, aur phir... phir usne mujhe maara bhi! Mere toh pure shareer mein dard ho gaya tha. Mujhe lagta hai woh abhi bhi mujhe dhamki de raha hai. Maine toh pehle bhi bataya tha aapko, meri FIR No. 27/06 hai Sarita Vihar PS mein. Us case mein jaldi se action lo sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Aise kaise koi kisi ko maar ke nikal jayega? Meri toh raat ki neend udd gayi hai uski wajah se. Please, kuch karo uske khilaaf.

Sir, main Sumriti Devi. Yeh meri hi complaint hai, sir. Un logon ne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya tha. Jab maine unki baat nahi mani, toh mujhe gher ke, zor-zabardasti se roka. Phir mujhe buri tarah maara-peeta bhi aur jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Main bahut dar gayi thi, sir. Meri complaint ke baad police ne jaanch ki thi, aur un logon par charge sheet bhi lagi thi. Ab to bas yahi umeed hai ki mujhe insaaf mile.

Sir, main aapke paas ek complaint lekar aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Karkardooma Court mein mera ek case chal raha tha, jiski sunwai Ld. M.M. S.P.S. Laler ji kar rahe the. Unhone 17.09.2011 ko ek order diya, aur usme mere accused ko summon hi nahi kiya. Matlab, bulaya hi nahi court mein! Kehte hain ki unke खिलाफ koi material hi nahi hai. Par sir, yeh toh galat hai! Unhone mujhe roka tha (341 IPC), meri cheezein todi thin (427 IPC), sab milke aaye the (34 IPC). Humne sab proof bhi diye the. Phir bhi judge sahab ne keh diya ki 'material sufficient nahi hai'. Main kya karoon? Yeh order toh sirf guess-work pe based hai, illegal hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, woh galti karke bhi khule ghoom rahe hain!

Sahab, main aapko kya bataun, meri puri duniya ujad gayi thi. Woh chaar log, jinhone mere apno ko berahami se maara tha, Thalassery ke Sessions Court mein, Case No. 151 of 1997, haan wohi accused number 1, 3, 4 aur 5, un sab ko ab maut ki saza mili hai. Section 302 aur 149 IPC ke तहत, judge sahab ne unhe phaansi ki saza sunayi hai. Itne saal ho gaye the, har pal bas us dard mein jeeta tha ki un darindon ko punishment kab milegi. Aaj jab yeh news suni, toh thodi jaan mein jaan aayi hai. Meri ankhon ke saamne jo khoon hua tha, uska insaaf mila hai. Bas ab yahi dua hai ki ye saza jaldi se poori ho, taki meri aatma ko shanti mile.

Daroga ji, main Hari Shankar bol raha hoon. Padosi ka naam hai Mukesh. Sir, main toh hadd se zyada pareshaan ho gaya hoon. Woh har roz raat ko itna zor se gaane bajata hai ki ghar mein bacche padh nahi paate, aur meri biwi, uski tabiyat kharab rehti hai, woh so nahi paati. Maine usse kitni baar bola hai, hath-pair jode hain, par woh ulti-seedhi baatein karta hai aur jaan-boojhkar volume badha deta hai. Mujhe lagta hai woh sirf mujhe tang karne ke liye, mujhe satane ke liye hi yeh sab kar raha hai. Yeh 'intent to annoy' hi toh hai na? Humara poora parivaar mental torture se guzar raha hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye, please. Mera ek case tha Pratappur court mein, Sarguja mein, bahut saal pehle ka. 2009 mein uska faisla aaya tha, jo mere liye sahi nahi tha. Woh ek serious criminal case tha, jisko Sessions Trial (S.T.) bolte hain. Us waqt jo judge the, unhone jo judgment diya, usse mujhe bilkul insaaf nahi mila tha. Meri lawyer, Smt. Indira Tripathi ji, ne us judgment ke khilaf appeal ki thi. Abhi pichle saal 2018 mein hi high court mein uska naya faisla aaya hai. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe ab toh complete justice mile. Kitne saal ho gaye hain, main aaj tak isi mamle mein uljha hua hoon, sir. Mera poora parivar is wajah se kitna dukhi hai, aap soch bhi nahi sakte.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di in logon ne. Yaad hai, maine Dhalli Police Station mein ek FIR karwai thi, FIR No. 4/2019, 4 January 2019 ko? Wohi jab mujhe raaste mein roka gaya tha, mera rasta block kiya tha, Section 341 ke under. Main Shimla ke Dhalli area mein rehta hoon, aur us din mujhe kitna pareshan kiya gaya. Kitni mushkil se maine woh complaint darj karwai thi, socho! Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court chale gaye hain, meri FIR ko quash karwane ke liye! Yeh kya insaaf hai, Sir? Meri toh koi galti nahi thi, ulta mujhe hi pareshan kiya ja raha hai. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sir. Please, meri madad kijiye. Unhe saza milni chahiye, woh meri FIR kaise khatam kar sakte hain?

Sir, main aapko bas thank you bolne aayi hoon. Jo mere saath hua tha, uske baad toh meri puri zindagi hi badal gayi thi. Us aadmi ne mujhe galat tarike se chhua, mujhe pakad ke rakha tha. Main itni darr gayi thi ki kya bataun. Bachchi thi main tab, samajh nahi aata tha kya ho raha hai. Woh din yaad karke bhi abhi tak darr lagta hai. Bahut mushkil se himmat karke maine yeh case lada. Itne time se court mein tareekh pe tareekh lag rahi thi, lagta tha kabhi justice milega bhi ya nahi. Lekin ab finally, use saja mili hai. Court ne use POCSO Act ke Section 8 aur IPC ke Section 341 ke under convict kiya hai. Mujhe ab thoda sukoon mila hai ki use uske galat kaam ki saja mili. Sach mein Sir, justice mila hai mujhe.

Sahab, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Yaad hai, maine Ghatlodiya police station mein ek FIR karwai thi, woh I-C. R. No. 163/2008 wali? Jin logon ne mujhe raste mein roka tha, dhamki di thi, aur zabardasti paisa maanga tha. Mujhe jaan se maarne ki, meri izzat uchalne ki dhamki di thi. Main unki wajah se bahut darr gaya tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein application daal rahe hain meri uss FIR ko khatam karwane ke liye. Matlab, unhone jo gunaah kiya, uski saza nahi milegi? Sir, aise kaise chalega? Main ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri complaint sach thi, maine jo bhi bataya, woh sab hua tha. Agar meri FIR hi khatam ho gayi, toh mujhe nyay kaise milega? Please, meri madad kijiye, sahab. Woh log fir se mujhe pareshaan karenge agar unhe saza na mili.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Pichle saal, 23 June 2020 ko, mere saath bahut bura hua tha. Main apni bike pe jaa raha tha, tabhi un logon ne mujhe roka. Pehle toh mujhe bahut maara-peeta, chot pahunchai. Phir mujhe ek jagah band kar diya, main nikal nahi paa raha tha. Unhone mujhe bahut gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, meri jaati ko le kar sabke saamne bezzati ki. Mujhe itna zaleel kiya Sir. Aur phir jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di, bola agar maine kuch kiya toh dekh lenge. Main bahut darr gaya hoon Sir. Meri suniye, unko saza milni chahiye. Ye Crime No. 141 of 2020 ka mamla hai. Please Sir, action lijiye.

Sir, main Santiniketan se aaya hoon. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye. Pata nahi kya ho gaya hai, woh log chahte hain ki meri complaint cancel ho jaye. Arre, un logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha! 1 August, 2020 ki baat hai, unhone mujhe bekaar mein roka, maara peeta. Meri haalat itni kharab kar di thi ki mujhe hospital mein admit hona pada, bahut serious chot lagi thi. Upar se, mera saara samaan bhi cheen liya tha, loot liya mujhe. Aur jaate jaate dhamki bhi deke gaye ki agar kisi ko bataya toh jaan se maar denge. Maine toh bas Santiniketan police station mein FIR file kiya tha (Case No. 112/2020). Ab sun raha hoon ki woh log meri FIR hatwana chahte hain Bolpur Court se. Sir, yeh toh zulm hai. Mujhe justice chahiye. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye, woh sab IPC ke sections lage hain na, 341, 323, 325, 392, 506... sab sahi hain. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Pichhle saal 25 January ko Arambagh mein mere saath bahut galat hua. Wo log mujhe raaste mein rok liya, zabardasti. Maine socha bas baat karenge, par unhone toh meri cheez chura li. Aur upar se dhamki bhi di, ki agar maine police ko bataya toh mera bura hoga. Main tab se darr-darr ke jee raha hoon. Meri jaan ko khatra hai sir. Wo log mujhe ghoorte hain, pareshaan karte hain. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karu. Please sir, un logon pe karwai karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai, mujhe har pal darr lagta hai. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Raju Chaurasia hoon. Wohi, jisne Moti Nagar police station mein apni beti ke liye FIR 151/2008 darj karayi thi. Meri beti ke saath jo zulm hua hai na, uski wajah se humara poora parivaar toot gaya hai. Maine apna poora bayaan record karwaya tha, ek-ek baat batayi thi (Ex. PW2/A). Mujhe pata chala hai ki meri beti ke kapde bhi scientific opinion ke liye Rohini FSL bheje gaye hain, achhi baat hai. Aur humne uska birth certificate bhi diya hai investigation ke liye, taaki uski sahi umar confirm ho sake. Sir, bas jaldi se justice mil jaye meri masoom beti ko. Bohat pareshan hain hum. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Jab woh sab hua, tab main minor thi, mere birth certificate mein bhi yahi likha hai. Police ne us darinde ka medical bhi karaya tha, sab proof hai. Court ne bhi uspar kitni saari dharaein lagaayi hain – usne mujhe roka, band kiya, dhamki di, aur mere saath galat kaam karne ki koshish ki thi (Sections 341, 342, 506 aur 376/511 IPC). Par Sir, woh gunehgar apna jurm maanta hi nahi, kehta hai main toh nirdosh hoon! Mere liye 13 logo ne gawaahi di hai, documents bhi dikhaye hain, sabne sach bola. Phir bhi woh bahar ghoom raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bahut darr lagta hai.

Sir, main Ramaswami Ayyar. Kal raat ki baat hai, main thoda drink kar liya tha, haan, galti thi meri, maanta hoon. Par jo Village Magistrate sahab hain, unhone bina soche samjhe, bina kisi bade reason ke mujhe pakad liya. Main bas thoda idhar-udhar ho raha tha, koi 'bad conduct' nahi thi meri jiske liye mujhe arrest karte. Poore gaon ke saamne meri izzat uchhali unhone. Aise kaise koi bhi Magistrate kisi ko bhi utha lega? Mujhe bahut bura laga sir. Meri family bhi pareshan ho gayi. Please, aap dekhiye, yeh sahi nahi hua mere saath. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Unhone galat kiya hai.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere bachche ke saath bahut galat hua hai. Woh abhi chhota hai, ek young adult hi toh hai! Hamare desh ka kanoon, woh Juvenile Justice Act, sab kehta hai ki aise bachchon ki care aur protection honi chahiye. Lekin yahan toh lagta hai, sarkar ko khud hi nahi pata unka kaam kya hai. Jab mere bachche ko zaroorat thi, toh usko protection nahi mili. Ab toh yeh khud High Court mein petition file kar rahe hain, CrPC ke Section 482 mein, yeh discuss karne ki unka role kya hai ek citizen ko protect karne mein, khaaskar young adults ko! Agar State (sarkar) ko khud apne role pe clarity nahi hai, toh hum jaise logon ko insaaf kaise milega? Sir, please, mere bachche ko insaaf dilwao, uski suraksha honi chahiye thi jaisa kanoon mein likha hai.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut ummeed se aayi hoon. Meri zindagi usne tabah kar di hai. Woh aadmi mujhe behla fusla ke, zabardasti, ghar se utha kar le gaya tha. Main tab bahut chhoti thi, bachchi thi, usne meri umar ka bhi lihaaz nahi kiya. Mere saath usne bahut ganda kaam kiya hai, Sir. Usne meri izzat loot li, aur bahut hi gandi harkatein ki mere saath. Mujhe bahut suffer karna pada hai. Usne meri puri life barbaad kar di. Mujhe uske khilaaf action chahiye, use saza milni chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf dilaiye.

Sahab, main kya bataun aapko... kal raat humare ghar pe kya beet gayi. Kuch log, pata nahi kaun the, zabardasti ghus aaye. Main aur meri patni, hum dono ko ek kamre mein band kar diya. Bandook dikha rahe the, maar-peet bhi ki humare saath. Humara to pura shareer kaanp raha tha darr se. Saara cash, meri patni ke gehne, jo bhi tha sab loot ke le gaye. Humari zindagi bhar ki kamai thi, sahab! Unhone hume bahar nikalne bhi nahi diya, pura ghar ulat-pulat kar diya. Meri to jaan hi nikal gayi thi. Sir, please unhe pakdo, hume insaaf chahiye. Humara bahot bada nuksan hua hai, kaise jiyenge hum ab?

Sir, main yahan Dr. Deepak Mahajan ke liye aaya hoon. Meri zindagi ka sabse mushkil din tha jab unhe Deepti Anil Devasthali aur uski maa Leena Anil Devasthali ne milkar, zinda nahi chhoda. Unhone mere Dr. Deepak ko kidnap kiya, unhe maara. Kya kya nahi saha humne un dino mein. Har pal unki yaadon mein guzarta hai. Lekin shukra hai, Pune ke Ad Hoc Sessions Judge ne un dono maa-beti ko pakda, unka jurm sabit kiya. 27th December, 2007 ko unhe faansi ki saza sunayi gayi hai, sir. Ab bas yahi darkhwast hai, meri family ko insaaf mile. Unhe unke kiye ki saza mile, unhe faansi ho. Mere Dr. Deepak ko poora nyay milna chahiye, sir. Unhone hamari duniya ujaad di.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Kitne saalon se main apne insaaf ke liye lad raha hoon. Mera ek case chal raha tha, jise log *Criminal Appeal No.384 of 2018* kehte hain. Sir, pehle *29th January 2018* ko ek faisla aaya tha, jisse main bilkul khush nahi tha. Mujhe laga *High Court* se toh mujhe insaaf zaroor milega, isliye main wahan appeal kiya tha. Magar, sir, abhi haal hi mein, *26th June 2024* ko, *Telangana High Court, Hyderabad* ne bhi wahi purana faisla confirm kar diya. Meri toh suni hi nahi gayi. Sir, mere saath bahut galat hua hai, aur ab toh badi adalat bhi wahi baat dohra rahi hai. Main kahan jaun, sir? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main ek bahut zaroori baat batane aaya hoon. Mujhe abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki apne hi police department mein kuch aise log hain, jinhe court ne 'convicted' kar rakha hai, yaani saza suna rakhi hai criminal offences ke liye. Socho Sir, 2010 se yeh log abhi tak job par hain! Yeh toh seedha-seedha hum jaise aam logon ke saath cheating hai. Jin pe hum bharosa karte hain apni protection ke liye, woh khud 'अपराधी' nikle toh hum kahan jayenge? Meri jaan ko bhi khatra ho sakta hai agar aise log power mein hain. Sir, please ispe action lo, aise 'corrupt' logon ko department se nikalna chahiye!

Sir, main aapko wahi puraani baat batane aaya hoon. Bahut saal ho gaye, mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua tha. Woh Budalur police station ke Inspector aur Sub-Inspector the na, unhone mere (ya mere parivaar ke) saath bahut galat kiya tha. Mujhe illegally band kiya, maara peeta, aur toh aur, sir, murder ka mamla tha! Socho, police waalon ne hi kiya yeh sab. Pata chala tha ki court ne unko chhod diya, acquittal ho gaya. Mera toh dil hi toot gaya tha, sir. Kaise justice milta? Abhi suna hai ki sarkaar unke acquittal ke khilaaf appeal kar rahi hai. Sir, meri suno. Unko saza milni chahiye. Woh aise kaise bach sakte hain? Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aayi hoon. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, meri zindagi barbaad kar di gayi hai. Wo Sandeep Kumar hai, jise log Raja ya Vicky bhi kehte hain, usne mujhe band kar diya tha aur meri izzat loot li, sahab! Usne mere saath galat kaam kiya. Jab yeh sab hua, main bahut darr gayi thi, usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi agar maine kisi ko bataya. Yeh ghatna 26 February 2021 ki hai. Mere case mein pehle bhi jaanch hui thi aur police ne 3 March 2021 ko uske khilaaf karyawahi shuru ki thi, lekin abhi bhi mujhe insaaf nahi mila. Mujhe usko saza dilwani hai, sahab. Please meri madad kijiye, main abhi bhi darr se kaanp rahi hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh paanch log, jinhone mere saath itna galat kiya, ab court mein chale gaye hain. Bengaluru ke Nrupatunga Road wale court mein, mera Crime No. 23/2023 ka case chal raha hai. Un logon ne mujhe pehle toh band kar diya, phir khoob maara peeta aur uske baad... meri izzat loot li, Sir! Meri complaint pe unpe rape, maarpeet aur qaid karne ka case hai. Aur ab woh log chahte hain ki ye case khatam ho jaaye, isko quash karwana chahte hain. Police ne toh FIR darj ki thi, par ab woh court mein usko challenge kar rahe hain. Meri suno Sir, unko saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main yahan bahut dukhi hokar aaya hoon. Meri behen/maa/beti ko itna dard diya gaya tha ki marte-marte usne ek 'dying declaration' di thi, jo Magistrate ne record ki thi. Wohi toh hamara saboot hai, sir! Wohi sach hai jo usne apni aakhri saanson mein bola tha. Par ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh mujrim, woh Pradyumna Kumar Reddy wala, woh Anantapur court ke faisle ko palatne ki koshish kar raha hai. Keh raha hai ki uss dying declaration ke alawa aur koi proof nahi hai toh usko saza nahi milni chahiye. Toh kya hua, sir? Woh mere apne ke aakhri shabd the! Kya unki koi value nahi? Sir, humein justice chahiye. Woh convict ho chuka hai, uski saza barkaraar rehni chahiye. Please, isko dekhiye, sir. Woh bachna nahi chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath jo hua hai, woh kisi dushman ke saath bhi na ho. Woh gunde the, unhone mujhe ghar se uthaya. Jabardasti, sir! Main cheekhti rahi, chillati rahi, par koi nahi aaya. Unhone mujhe kidnap kiya aur mere saath bahut bura kiya. Unhone mere saare paise, mera phone, sab cheen liya. Jab main unhe rokne lagi, toh unhone mujhe maara bhi, chot lagi hai, sir. Aur sir... uske baad... unhone meri izzat loot li. Ek nahi the woh, kai log the. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Chanakya Puri police ne case toh banaya hai, par mujhe justice chahiye, sir. Unko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye aur mere samaan bhi wapas milne chahiye.

Sir, woh jo case chal raha hai na, Harpreet Singh aur uske saathiyon ke khilaaf, FIR No. 143/2013? Usmein mere bete Harneet ki gawaahi thi. Sir, woh toh tab sirf 11 saal ka bachcha tha, 6th standard mein padhta tha. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki log keh rahe hain uski baat par bharosa nahi kar sakte. Kehte hain hamare case mein contradictions hain, galtiyan hain, sab jhooth hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai Sir? Mera bachcha itni chhoti umar mein jo dekha, woh sach bataya. Uski baat ko aise kamzor kyun kiya ja raha hai? Humara case bigad raha hai, Sir. Humare saath insaaf kab hoga? Koi sun hi nahi raha meri baat.

Sir, main Smt. X hoon. Aaj main aapko bata rahi hoon ki 3 April 2011 ko subah-subah, kareeb 5:30 baje, humare ghar Z-1 pe, Johny aur uske kuch logon ne hamla kar diya. Meri behen Smt. Y bhi wahin thi. Unhone humein itna maara, sir, ki hum behosh ho gaye the. Meri halat bahut kharab thi, aur meri behen ki bhi. Phir police ki PCR van aayi, aur woh humein turant LBS Hospital le gaye. Wahan doctors ne humara check-up kiya, MLC banaya. Bahut dard ho raha hai mujhe, sir, aur darr bhi lag raha hai. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye!

Daroga ji, main toh poori tarah toot chuki hoon. Mera ek hi beta hai, Gaurav. 6 May 2016 ki baat hai, subah 8 baje ke aas-paas, hum apne ghar 198/18/K-1, Sangam Vihar mein hi the. Tabhi Shahnawaj ne mere bete ko utha liya hai. Sir, usne mere masoom bachche ko kidnap kar liya hai! Mujhe poora yakin hai usne Gaurav ko kahin chhupa ke rakha hai, usse galat tareeke se band karke rakha hai. Pata nahi mera bachcha kis haal mein hoga. Woh tab se missing hai. Meri aapse haath jod ke request hai, please mere bete ko dhoondh dijiye. Meri jaan nikal rahi hai uske bina.

Sir, main Shabila, Tihar Village se. Meri suniye, Sir. Chhe September do hazaar gyarah ki raat thi, kareeb 8:35 baje. Hum apne ghar mein the, WZ-270 mein. Achanak se ye Shamim, Jasmeen, Sammi aur unke saath kuch aur ladke (bachche bhi the, S, Y, R, Sa naam ke) ek jhund banakar aa gaye. Sir, zabardasti, bilkul gundon ki tarah, hamare ghar mein ghus aaye! Inka irada tha mujhe aur meri mummy ko buri tarah se maarne-peetne ka. Hum toh bahut ghabra gaye the, Sir. Ye sab log milkar ek illegal jamaat banakar aaye the, seedhe hamare ghar mein trespass kiya. Sir, humein inse bahut khatra hai. Please in sab par sakht se sakht kaanuni karwai kijiye. Ye Section 143 IPC ke तहत mujrim hain, Sir. Humein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Rajesh Kumar hoon. Hum toh bas padosi hain Kanchhi Lal aur Saroj ke. Unki beti Preeti, jo abhi minor hai, woh 26.7.99 ko Littu naam ke ladke ke saath bhaag gayi thi. Ladki ko Panipat, Haryana se 29.7.99 ko wapas laaya bhi gaya tha. Lekin sir, jab se yeh sab hua hai na, Kanchhi Lal aur Saroj toh humare peeche hi pad gaye hain. Woh humein baar-baar taane dete hain, ghar pe aake gaali-galoch karte hain, kehte hain humne unki beti ko bhagaya hai ya humein sab pata tha. Sir, humara kya kasoor hai ismein? Hum toh bas chupchaap rehne wale log hain. Hamari family ko pareshaan kar rakha hai inhone. Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, inki wajah se humari shanti bhang ho gayi hai.

Sir, main Bajaj hoon. Ek hi mamla tha, us din jo hua tha, uski toh maine poori complaint likhi thi. Abhi pata chala ki High Court mein do-do appeals chal rahi hain, aur dono us ek hi incident se nikli hain. Sir, maine jo allegations lagaye the, woh seedhi-seedhi baat thi. Par High Court bol raha hai ki jo doosre side se allegations hain, woh meri wali se 'almost identical' hain, bas 'kuch improvements' kar di hain unhone. Matlab, meri baat ko hi tod-marod ke pesh kiya ja raha hai. Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha, apni sachchai batau toh bhi aise ghumaya ja raha hai. Sir, yeh sab bahut ulajh gaya hai, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye is sab mein.

Sahab, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Un logon ne jo kiya hai na, woh insaniyat ke naam par ek dhabba hai. Mujhe toh yakeen hi nahi hota ki koi itna ghatiya aur bereham ho sakta hai. Mera sab kuch chheen liya unhone, meri shanti, mera sukoon. Main raat bhar so nahi pata. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Woh aise khule ghoom rahe hain, yeh kaise chalega? Aise gunehgaron ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai unhone. Please, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Faijuddin Jainuddin bol raha hoon. Aaj mere saath jo hua hai na, main bata nahi sakta kitna bura hua hai. Woh Rizwan Ahmed, Ramchandra Kasbe aur Afzalkhan, in teeno ne aur kuch unke unknown saathiyon ne milkar, mujhe raste mein gher liya. Unke paas bade bade dangerous hathiyar the, sir! Unhone mujhe zabardasti utha liya, kidnap kar liya. Phir mujhe bahut buri tarah se maara, meri koi galti nahi thi. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, aur abhi tak dard ho raha hai. Please meri suno aur un sab par sakht se sakht kaarwai karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri jaan ko khatra hai unse.

Sir, suniye na meri baat, bahut pareshan hoon. Woh jo 13 log the na, jinhone mujhe be-wajaha pakad ke bandh kar diya tha, aur jab sarkari log humein chhudaane aaye toh unke saath bhi mar-peet ki, unko Ballia court ne saza di thi, 1983 mein. Teen saal aur ek saal ki jail hui thi unhe. Lekin abhi suna hai ki woh log appeal mein gaye hain! Meri toh jaan sookh rahi hai, Sir. Itni mushkil se toh thoda insaaf mila tha, ab yeh phir se chhoot jayenge kya? Meri toh poori zindagi hi kharab kar di thi unhone, aur ab yeh firse aazad ghumenge? Please Sir, kuch kijiye, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai unse.

Sir, main apni report darj karwane aayi thi, par ab toh woh log mera poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain. Pata nahi kya-kya petitions laga di hain unhone. Pehle ek case tha, phir doosra aur ab ek teesra case bhi ussi se jod diya hai. Ye sab M.Cr.C. No.14484/2012 aur baaki numbers ke saath chal rahe hain. Meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aa raha sir, woh log Section 482 CrPC ka hawala dekar meri FIR ko hi quash karwana chahte hain. Matlab jo maine report likhwai thi, use hi radd karwana chahte hain. Itni mushkil se maine sab bataya tha, aur ab woh aise hi bach jayenge? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh log kanoon ka galat faayda utha rahe hain. Meri madad karo!

Sir, woh Om Parkash, District Inspector ke office mein clerk hai na, usne toh meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi! Section 307 mein usko saja bhi hui hai, teen saal ki rigorous imprisonment hui hai Ludhiana ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne sunai hai. Par sir, woh kya appeal kar raha hai ab? Yeh toh galat hai na! Uski maa Dwarki Devi aur uske bhai Romesh aur Surinder bhi toh the us din mere saath. Un Romesh aur Surinder ko toh police ne challan kiya tha par committing magistrate ne chhod diya tha. Sir, main toh darr gaya hoon, woh phir se kuch kar dega toh? Mujhe pura insaaf chahiye sir, usko chhootna nahi chahiye!

Sahab, main aapke paas bahut badi mushkil mein aayi hoon. Badasha naam ka ek aadmi aur uske teen-chaar saathi the, jinhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Unhone mujhe band kar diya tha, meri izzat lootne ki koshish ki aur mujhe zabardasti utha kar le gaye the. Sir, un gandi harkaton ne mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Unhone mere saath galat kiya, mere saath zabardasti karne ki bhi koshish ki thi. Pehle Satara ki court mein mera case chala tha, lekin abhi tak mujhe sahi insaaf nahi mila. Woh log khule ghoom rahe hain, mujhe phir se unse darr lagta hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, un logon ko kadi se kadi saza dilwaiye.

Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Woh Hira Singh, jisne itna bada gunaah kiya hai, woh bol raha hai ki usko galat phansaya gaya hai! Sab jhoot hai, Sir, jhooth! Uske allegations toh totally galat aur banaye hue hain. Usne toh khud 13 May ko police ke saamne surrender kiya tha, apni galti maan ke. Pehle usko thodi der ke liye interim bail mil gayi thi, mera toh khoon khaul gaya tha. Shukar hai Bhagwan ka ki Shimla ke Judge Sahab ne 12 July ko uski woh bail reject kar di. Par ab woh phir se bail ki application daal raha hai, woh Cr.MP(M) No.1544 wali. Sir, agar usko bail mil gayi na, toh humara kya hoga? Woh bahar aake phir humein tang karega. Please, use bail mat lene do. Humein insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapko Hira Singh ke baare mein batane aaya hoon. Usne 13 May ko surrender kiya tha, aur usko pehle interim bail bhi mil gayi thi, main kitna ghabra gaya tha! Shukar hai, Shimla ke Special Judge sahab ne 12 July ko uski bail reject kar di. Sirf tab thodi jaan mein jaan aayi thi. Ab sun raha hoon ki uska vakeel, Manoj Pathak, keh raha hai ki use galat phansaya gaya hai aur sab ilzaam jhoot hain. Arre Sir, yeh sab bakwaas hai! Woh banda pakka mujrim hai aur usne jo kiya hai, woh sabko pata hai. Ab usne dobara bail ke liye application lagayi hai upar waali court mein. Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya na, toh meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ko khatra ho jayega. Please, usko bail mat milne dena. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Woh Hira Singh, jiske khilaaf maine pehle complaint ki thi, woh phir se bail lene ki koshish kar raha hai! Usne surrender toh kar diya tha 13 May ko, fir usko beech mein interim bail bhi mil gayi thi. Mujhe laga ab kya hoga, bahut ghabrahat hui. Shukar hai, Special Judge Shimla ne 12 July ko uski bail cancel kar di. Thodi jaan mein jaan aayi thi. Par ab pata chala hai ki uska vakil, Mr. Manoj Pathak, phir se court mein application daal raha hai. Kehta hai usko galat phansaya gaya hai, sab jhooth hai! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Usne jo kiya hai, woh sabko pata hai. Agar usko bail mil gayi toh meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ka kya hoga? Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai, aur yeh insaaf nahi hoga. Kripya karke isko rokne mein meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko bata rahi hoon, meri beti ke saath jo hua hai na, woh sun kar aapki rooh kaanp jaayegi. Kareeb das mahine pehle ki baat hai, meri chhoti beti xxx raaste mein chal rahi thi, tabhi woh darinda, woh accused usko zabardasti pakad kar apne ghar le gaya. Usne meri bacchi ko andar band kar diya aur phir... uske saath galat kaam kiya, sir! Penetrative sexual assault, sir! Meri beti chilla rahi thi, usne bahut shor machaya, Valarmathy aur Bhuvaneshwari ne bhi dekha tha, unhone hi mujhe bataya. Uski cheekhein sun kar sab log ikatthe ho gaye. Meri beti ne kitna kuch saha hai, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, usko saza milni chahiye. Meri bacchi ke saath aisa kaise ho sakta hai? Aap please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Ramaswamy Ayyar bol raha hoon. Pata nahi kya ho gaya, bas thodi bohot pee rakhi thi maine. Gaon ke magistrate saab, unhone mujhe pakad liya. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Thodi si sharab pee li toh kya main criminal ho gaya? Unhone mujhe aise ghasita, jaise main koi bada apradhi hoon. Meri beizzati hui hai poore gaon mein. Aise hi koi Village Magistrate kisi ko bhi utha lega? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri family bhi pareshan hai. Yeh sahi nahi hua mere saath. Please help me.

Sir, main Orang Police Station mein complain karne aayi hoon. 6 June 2021 ki baat hai, dopahar ke 12:30 baje honge. Main apne friends ke saath [us aadmi] ke ghar ke aangan mein khel rahi thi. Us aadmi ne mujhe andar bulaya. Andar jaa kar usne mujhe bahut gande-gande videos dikhaye, jo nahi dekhne chahiye the. Phir, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya, usne mujhe rape kiya, Sir. Main bahut darr gayi thi, itna ki bas ro-rokar seedha ghar bhagi. Ghar ja kar maine mummy ko sab kuch bata diya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, please usko pakdo.

Sahab, main aapke paas ek bahut pareshaan hokar aaya hoon. Meri salary se pehle hi Rs. 600 kaat liye gaye the, aur abhi bhi mujhe un logon se apne Rs. 400 lene hain. Jab bhi main unse apne paise maangta hoon, woh log, khaas karke A1, mujhse jhagda karne lagte hain, badi badtameezi se baat karte hain. Aaj subah, 10 April 2019 ko, meri patni Indirani unke ghar gayi thi. Ussne Selvarani se, jo unki A2 hai, apne woh Rs. 400 maange. Selvarani ne bola ki woh shaam tak de degi, par abhi tak kuch nahi hua, Sir. Mera chhota sa amount hai, par mere liye bahut badi baat hai. Ab main kya karoon? Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon. Mera ek POCSO case tha, FIR No. 1306/2014, jo Rohini Courts mein chala tha. Kitne saal lage, 2014 se 2022 tak hum pareshan rahe, court ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke thak gaye the. Pata hai, finally 13 September 2022 ko judgment aaya aur 3 November 2022 ko us gunehgar ko saza bhi sunayi gayi thi. Humne socha chalo, ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin Daroga ji, ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se appeal kar raha hai. Kehta hai ki judgment galat hai aur uski saza hatani hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai? Itni mushkil se toh humein justice mila tha, ab woh sab khatam karna chahta hai? Meri aur mere bachhe ki takleef dobara shuru ho jayegi. Sir, please kuch kijiye, hum toh aur nahi seh sakte yeh sab. Hamein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hokar aapke paas aaya hoon. Ye Dr. Nishikant Dubey, jo G.R.G. Road, New Delhi ka rehne wala hai aur jiske khilaaf humne Mohanpur P.S. mein FIR karwai thi, ab woh court mein apni charge-sheet aur FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai. Uski umar lagbhag 51 saal hai. Sir, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, aur ab woh Section 482 CrPC lagakar sab kuch khatam karna chahta hai. Agar uski FIR aur charge-sheet cancel ho gayi, toh mujhe kabhi insaaf nahi milega. Meri poori zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Maine itni mushkil se case banwaya, aur ab woh sab mita dega? Please sir, meri suniye aur meri madad kijiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, usko bachne mat dijiye!

Sir, main Sita ki maa hoon. Aapko toh yaad hoga, hamara POCSO case tha, Ahmednagar mein. Woh 2017 wala case number 199. Bade mushkil se December 2019 mein judge sahab ne faisla sunaya tha. Hamein laga tha ab finally thoda insaaf mila hai, chain se so paayenge. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar, woh darinda, usne toh appeal daal di hai! Matlab woh phir se court mein jaayega? Sir, meri beti ne itna kuch saha hai, aur ab phir se yeh sab? Hum toh gareeb log hain, kahan se itna paisa laayenge case ladne ke liye. Humari madad kijiye sir. Woh phir se bahar aa gaya toh humara kya hoga?

Sahab, meri suno na! Main kitna dukhi hoon, aapko kya bataun. Yeh Safer Ali aur Nowsad Ali ne meri zindagi ujaad di hai. Pata nahi kaisa insaaf mila tha mujhe Dhubri ke Sessions Judge se 16.08.2014 ko. Us judgment mein toh mere khilaf hi faisla aaya tha, Sir. Meri toh suni hi nahi gayi thi, jabki woh Sessions Case No. 155/2010 aur GR Case No. 78/2009... usmein mujhe bahut galat tarike se phansaya gaya tha. Ab meri appeal chal rahi hai, aur aaj 22.01.2019 ko sunwai thi, phir 19.06.2020 ko bhi. Hon'ble Mr. Justice Manash Ranjan Pathak aur Hon'ble Mr. Justice Manish Choudhury sun rahe hain. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki ab mujhe insaaf mile, aur in logon ki sachchai saamne aaye. Meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main yahan isliye aayi hoon... Mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar, jisko court ne saza di thi, woh ab appeal kar raha hai. Sir, Fast Track Special Court ne L.B.Nagar mein 21.11.2023 ko usko convict kiya tha, S.C.No.566 of 2018 mein. Yeh rape aur POCSO ka case tha, sir. Itni mushkil se mujhe insaaf mila tha, itni taareekhon ke baad. Ab jab usko saza mili hai, toh woh phir se appeal kar raha hai. Main toh soch rahi thi ki ab sab khatam ho gaya, meri zindagi mein shanti aayegi. Lekin ab phir se yeh sab shuru ho jayega? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ka kya hoga? Please, meri madad kijiye, sir. Usne jo kiya hai, uski saza toh milni chahiye na? Mujhe darr hai ki kahin woh phir se na bach jaye.

Sir, main Mariappan hoon. Meri haalat bohot serious hai, Tenkasi ke sarkari hospital mein admit hoon main. 25 July 2011 ki shaam ko, 6:30 baje, mere saath jo hua, woh main kabhi bhool nahi sakta. SI Subbiah ji aaye the yahan hospital mein, unhone meri poori baat suni, ek-ek detail likhi aur mera bayan record kiya. Maine signature bhi kiya us par. Tab mujhe thodi himmat mili. Pata chala hai ki 302 IPC mein case (Crime No. 226/2011) register ho gaya hai. Phir Inspector Radha Krishnan ji bhi spot par gaye the raat 8 baje ke kareeb, investigation shuru ho gayi hai. Unhone rough sketch, mahazar sab banaya hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Naveen Garg hoon. Meri jaan mushkil mein hai, sir. Pichle saal, 28 March 2021 ko, kuch logon ne mujhe pakad liya tha. Woh log police wale bankar aaye the, sab jhoot tha! Mujhe kidnaap kiya, zabardasti kahi band kar diya. Meri puri zindagi kaamp gayi thi. Unhone mujhse paise bhi mange, bahut dhamkiyan di, sir. Meri complaint pe Shastri Park PS mein FIR bhi hui thi, 153/2021 number ki. Sections bhi lage the -- 364A, 386, 365, 342, 419, 170... sab kuch. Ab sun raha hoon ki woh log apni FIR quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Meri jaan ko khatra hai, aur woh log aise hi bach jayenge? Please help me, sir. Mujhe darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main Ramu, hamari company mein kaam karta hoon. Hum sab employees, hamari union ke log, bahut pareshan hain Sir. Dekho Sir, yeh jo sarkar ne ek naya order nikala hai na, 22 July 2011 ka, usmein ek naye aadmi ko hamari company ka Managing Director bana diya hai. Sir, hamari company sarkari hai, hum itne saalon se yahan khoon-paseena baha rahe hain. Aise kaise bina soche-samjhe, hamari parwah kiye bina, kisi ko bhi MD bana denge? Hum sab ko lagta hai ki yeh appointment galat hai aur isse hamara future khatre mein pad jayega. Hamare saath bahut injustice ho raha hai. Please is mamle mein kuch kijiye, Sir. Hamari suniye.

Sir, main bahut himmat karke yahan aayi hoon. Mere saath jo hua hai, woh kisi dushman ke saath bhi na ho. Un logon ne mujhe kidnap kiya tha, gande tarike se bandh karke rakha. Bahut maara-peeta bhi. Aur phir... phir unhone mere saath galat kaam kiya, meri izzat ko loot liya. Mujhe jism-faroshi ke dhande mein bhi dhakelne ki koshish ki. Kamla Market police station mein meri FIR no. 356/02 bhi darj hui thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki Sessions case no. 158/03 chal raha hai. Sir, main bas itna chahti hoon ki un sab ko kadi saza mile. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, par unhe bhi unke kiye ki saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sahab, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 1998 mein Lalitpur mein mere saath jo dacoity aur maarpeet hui thi? Basant Lal aur Ghanshyam ne mujhe bandh kar diya tha aur mera sab kuch loot liya tha. Meri saari savings, meri izzat, sab chheen liya tha. Badi mushkil se, itne saalon baad, court ne unko saza di thi, 10 saal ki jail aur 10,000 rupaye fine. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin sahab, ab pata chala hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain. Meri to jaan hi nikal gayi. Itni takleef ke baad bhi, kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega? Please, aap kuch kariye. Woh gunehgar hain, unko saza milni chahiye. Meri family bahut darr rahi hai.

Sir, main bahut ghabraya hua hoon. Meri jaan pe ban aayi thi us din. Yeh baat 19 November 2013 subah ki hai. Main J.C. Road par Corporation ATM ke paas khada tha, paise nikalne ke liye. Tabhi ek aadmi hathyar leke wahan chhupa hua tha. Usne mujhe achanak pakad liya, Sir. Mujhe band karke, usne mujhe bahut buri tarah dhamkaya. Uski intention thi ki woh mujhe loot le aur shayad maar bhi de. Usne mujh par attack bhi kiya tha, mujhe laga main bachunga nahi. Bahut mushkil se main wahan se bhaaga, Sir. Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai. Woh log meri saari savings le jaate aur meri jaan bhi. Please, un logon ko saza dilaiye, Sir.

Sir, main Virender, Bamnoli gaon se, Dwarka. Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi! Pata nahi 2 July 2011 ko mere saath kya hua. Mujhe toh kuch yaad hi nahi hai. Meri family ne bataya ki main Issapur Khera gaon mein bechari haalat mein, khoon se lathpath mila tha. Kisi ne mujhe bohot buri tarah maara hai, sir. Mera toh dimag ghoom gaya hai. Mere gharwale jaldi se mujhe Ayushman Hospital, Dwarka le gaye. Wahi Palam Vihar, Gurgaon se ASI Dev Charan sahab ne hi police ko inform kiya tha. Meri haalat toh dekho sir, bohot chot lagi hai. Meri family toh bohot pareshan hai. Aap please iski jaanch karo sir, kisne kiya yeh mere saath? Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut takleef mein aayi hoon. Yeh Md. Irfan s/o Sh. Md. Ahsan, jo Jama Masjid, Delhi ka rehne wala hai, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Usne socha tha ki woh bach jaayega yeh kehkar ki woh toh aisa kuch kar hi nahi sakta. Lekin Sir, mera medical hua, aur doctors ne bhi uski poori jaanch ki hai. Unhone saaf saaf likha hai ki woh bilkul theek hai aur sab kuch kar sakta hai. Uska yeh jhoot pakda gaya hai. CMO ne bhi report sign ki hai. Meri puri jaanch ki gayi hai aur ek causality card bhi banaya gaya hai. Mujhe please insaaf dilwao Sir, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Aap please uske khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai karo.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki jisko court ne convict kiya tha, woh phir se appeal file kar raha hai. Kitni mushkil se toh mujhe insaaf mila tha. Woh Ld. MM, Rohini Courts ne usko 01.12.2018 ko convict kiya tha, aur 04.12.2018 ko uski sentence bhi ho gayi thi. Mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai, 24.03.2010 ka din, jab usne woh sab kiya tha. Ab woh phir se appeal kar raha hai, matlab kya meri saari ladai bekar ho gayi? Main toh soch raha tha ki ab shaanti milegi, par ab phir se wahi tension. Meri jaan ko khatra hai sir, woh phir se mujhe tang karega. Please kuch karo, main bahut dar gaya hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh rooh kaanp jaati hai soch ke. Woh Mustkeem... usne mere bachhe ko zabardasti kaam pe laga rakha tha apni factory mein. Dilshad Masjid ke paas, 20 Foota Road pe ek bangles ki factory hai uski, wahi pe. Sir, mera bachha chhota sa hai, aur usne us jaise kayi aur bachhon ko bhi pakad rakha tha. Unse din raat kaam karwaata tha, jabardasti. Hum garib log hain, iska faayda uthaya usne. Bas Bhagwan ka shukra hai ki 24 July ko sham 8 baje ke kareeb, Karawal Nagar PS ke policewale Anara Masjid ke paas patrolling kar rahe the. Tab unhe uski is factory aur hamare bachhon ke baare mein pata chala. Sir, please usko saza dilwao, usne hamare bachhon ka bachpan cheen liya hai!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh zindagi barbaad kar di hai inn logon ne. Main yahan aapke paas insaaf maangne aaya hoon. Woh Asif, Munna Khan ka beta, Laxmi Garden, Indira Puri, Loni UP wala, aur uska saathi Shakir, Jamir Ali ka beta, Jafrabad, Delhi, Street No. 38 wala. In dono ne milke mera saara paisa loot liya hai, Sir. Mujhe dhamki bhi dete hain. Meri toh raat ki neend udd gayi hai. Inka bahut atyachar ho gaya hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye aur inke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lijiye.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jise Vandna Dhir ne Vasant Kunj mein apne ghar mein kaid karke rakha tha. Woh din tha 30 September 2013, jab police ko kisi ne khabar di thi.
