Mujhe yaad hai, kaise woh log aaye the, police wale aur Shakti Vahini NGO ke log bhi the. Unhone raid ki thi uske ghar pe. Meri haalat itni kharab thi, sir, main bata nahi sakti. Mere poore sar aur badan par jagah-jagah zakhm the, chot ke nishaan the. Woh log jab aaye, toh main bilkul bejaan si padi thi. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, Vandna Dhir ne mere saath bahut bura kiya hai.

Sir, main Pardeep Kumar. Meri request hai ki October 2018 se December 2018 tak, Paharganj, Chuna Mandi ki Gali no.5 mein, house no. 2860 ke first floor par, kuch badmaashon ne mujhe aur teen aur couples ko zabardasti band karke rakha. Hum sabko kaid kar liya tha. Woh humein har waqt darate the, sir. Kehte the kutta katwa denge ya bahut maarenge-peetenge. Humari jaan ko khatra tha. Unka bas ek hi plan tha, mujhse dhokhe se paise nikalwana. Unhone mujhe bahut force kiya paisa dene ke liye. Main bahut ghabra gaya tha, sir. Please action lijiye.

Sir, main Shah Nawaj hoon. Mujhe 25 April 2016 ko Manjeet Singh aur Swapan Banerjee ne bahut maara tha, Sir. Unhone mujhe band bhi kar diya tha, kahin jaane nahi diya. Kitna dard hua tha, main bata nahi sakta. Meri haddiyon mein chot aayi thi. Janak Puri police station mein iski FIR bhi hui thi, FIR No. 390/16 hai uski. Itne saal ho gaye, abhi tak unko saza nahi mili. IPC ki dhaara 325 aur 342 lagi hai unpe. Sir, please kuch karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh log aise hi ghoom rahe hain, jabki unhone mujhe itna peeta tha. Meri toh life kharab ho gayi thi us din ke baad. Aap please dekhiye is matter ko.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun? Meri toh life hell ho gayi hai. Jin logo ne mere saath galat kiya tha, mujhe bandh kar rakha tha, mere ghar mein ghus aaye the aur dhamki di thi... unko 2017 mein court ne saza sunayi thi. Mujhe thodi shanti mili thi ki chalo, insaaf mila. Lekin ab sunn raha hoon ki woh log, woh gunde, phir se appeal kar rahe hain! Woh chahte hain ki unki saza maaf ho jaye. Sir, agar aisa hua toh meri aur mere parivaar ki jaan ko khatra hai! Woh log bahar aa gaye toh humein jeene nahi denge. Please, kuch karo Sir. Meri madad karo. Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai.

Sahab, main aapke paas bahut dukhi hoke aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai. Ye saal 2010 ki baat hai, 24 March ko subah 11:30 baje ke aas-paas. Hamare ghar, A-234, First Floor, Lal Bagh, Azadpur mein, wo Kuldeep Singh naam ka aadmi tha na, usne mere chhote bete Sonu ko, jo tab ekdum masoom bachcha tha, ek kamre mein band kar diya. Aur uske saath... uske saath bahut galat kiya, sahab! Uski izzat loot li, wo bhi kudrat ke khilaaf, ek ghinoni harkat ki. Mera beta aaj bhi darta hai, us sadme se bahar nahi aa paya. Police ne investigation karke chargesheet toh file ki hai, documents bhi diye hain, par usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Bas, mujhe mere bachche ke liye insaaf chahiye, aur us darinde ko jail mein daalo.

Sir, main Constable Pradeep hoon. Meri posting IGI Airport PS mein hai, process server ki duty karta hoon main. Kal raat, 15 May 1996 ko, kareeb 8 baje ka waqt hoga, main P. A. Joseph ke ghar gaya tha. Sir, court se unke naam ka summon aaya tha, Section 446 CrPC ke under, wahi dene gaya tha unko. Par sir, unhone summon lene se saaf mana kar diya. Upar se mujhse bahut badtameezi ki, gali galoch ki. Maine bola ki yeh sarkari kaam hai, court ka order hai, par unhone meri ek na suni. Balke, mujhe dhakke maar ke nikalne ki koshish ki. Main toh bas apni duty kar raha tha, par unhone meri aise beizzati ki. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, aise toh koi duty nahi kar payega.

Sahab, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Yeh Ishwar Singh alias Sunny aur Surender alias Munna ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai! 18 August 2007 ki raat ko, kareeb 11 baje, main Chandela Park transformer ke paas, Khyala Village ke road par tha, Tilak Nagar mein. Unhone mujhe wahan se utha liya, sahab! Zabaradasti, mujhe pakad ke rakha, confine kar diya ek tarah se. Mera saara paisa, mera phone, jo bhi mere paas tha, sab chheen liya. Robbery ki hai, sir. Aur unhone mujhe maara bhi hai, bahut ganda. Meri to himmat hi toot gayi thi. Please, inko saza milni chahiye. Meri FIR no. 574/07 hai. Ye log bahut khatarnak hain.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut majboori mein aaya hoon. Meri suniye, koi nahi sun raha meri. Yeh do log, Nirmal Kumar s/o Kundan Lal, jo West Gorakh Park, Shahdara mein rehte hain, aur Ram Niwas Jindal s/o Yado Ram Jindal, jo Hanuman Gali, West se hain, inhone meri zindagi jhand kar di hai. Meri dukaan pe kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain aur mujhe roz dhamki dete hain. Sir, main bahut darr gaya hoon. Raaton ko neend nahi aati. Mera paisa bhi loot liya hai. Meri family bechari hai. Kya karoon, kahan jaun? Please sir, inke khilaf sakht action lo, warna main barbaad ho jaunga. Meri help kijiye, sir!

Sahab, meri baat suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh din, 31 October 1997 ko, dopahar ke kareeb 2 baje ki baat hai. Humare gaon Simultand mein, Chandan Kiyari thane ke area mein... Raghu Manjhi aur uske saath ke aur 4-5 log the, woh sab ekdum hathiyaron ke saath aa gaye. Unhone bina kisi baat ke hum par hamla kar diya, sahab! Ek toh unhone humare apne aadmi ko jaan se hi maar diya, aur mujhe bhi maarne ki puri koshish ki. Hathiyaron se itna buri tarah maara ki mere pure shareer par chot lagi hai, bahut gehre zakhm hain. Sahab, hum sabko bahut buri tarah se ghav diye hain un logon ne, hum sab ghayal hain. Meri jaan bach gayi, yehi badi baat hai. Un logon ne toh sabko khatam karne ka plan banaya tha. Kripya karke un gundon par action lijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri zindagi pura barbaad kar di hai in logon ne. Mere pati Mohit Gupta, unke papa aur mummy, sabne milkar mujhe itna pareshan kiya hai. Pehle toh unhone mere saath dhokha kiya, phir meri saari cheezein, mera stridhan sab apne paas rakh liya. Upar se, mujhe ghar mein band karke rakhte the, maarpeet, gaali-galoch to roz ka tha. Aur sir, sabse badi baat... unhone mera bachcha bhi gira diya, bina meri marzi ke. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon. Court mein case chal raha hai aur ab toh judge saab ne bhi bola hai ki inpe aur charges lagenge, tabhi mujhe thodi tasalli mili hai. In logon ko saza milni chahiye, sir, meri toh duniya ujaad di hai inhone.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kya ho gaya. Mere apne ko unhone zinda nahi chhoda. Pure aath log the, Sir, jinhone mere *pyaar* ko pehle uthaya, phir bandh kar rakha, aur phir finally maar hi dala. Meri family ko kitna tana mara, kitni bezzati ki hai unhone. Yeh sab unki saazish thi. Ab sun raha hu, do toh pehle se hi farar ho gaye hain charge sheet file hote hi. Aur jo dusra main accused tha, woh bhi upar appeal kar gaya hai. Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai, Sir. Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki un sab ko saza mile, jo bhi isme shamil the. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh life hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh log... unhone mujhe poora phasa diya hai. Jab dekho tab mujhe tang karte hain, dhamki dete hain. Main garib aadmi hoon, kahan jaaun? Hum jaiso ke liye kaun sa insaaf hai? Itne saare judgments aur kanoon hain, sab kitaabon mein hain kya? Main toh yahi sochta tha ki kanoon humari madad karega, par yahan toh koi sunne wala hi nahi hai. Meri poori mehnat ki kamai le li unhone. Mujhe bas thoda sa insaaf chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, sir, please. Woh log bahut powerful hain, mujhe dar lagta hai ki kuch kar na dein. Meri family bhi tension mein hai. Sir, aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri to zindagi hi nikal gayi iss case mein. Yeh jo case hai na, S.T. No. 54/2000, yeh 2000 se chal raha hai! Kitne saal ho gaye, aap khud dekho. Pehle unko saza hui thi 2001 mein, phir dobara conviction hua 2011 mein. Do-do baar court ne unko gunehgar thehraya! Par ab phir se woh log appeal pe appeal daal rahe hain. Teen-teen appeals chal rahi hain unki – Cr.A. 576/2001, 592/2001 aur 976/2011. Sir, hum garib log hain, kahan tak court-kachahri ke chakkar kaaten? Meri to bas yahi guzarish hai ki ab aur tareekh pe tareekh na mile, bas ab isko khatam karo, mujhe mera insaaf chahiye.

Daroga ji, main Jagdish Singh. Mujhe pata hai meri pehle ki complaint aapke paas hai. Wohi Rajendra Singh aur Kapildeo Singh, jo 6-7 aur logon ke saath hain, unhone phir naya chakkar chalaya hai. Meri jo case thi, uske against unhone court mein nayi petitions daal di hain. Ek Rajendra Singh ne daali hai, aur doosri Kapildeo Singh aur uske saathi. Ab yeh log mujhe aur pareshan kar rahe hain. Maine toh sach ke liye awaaz uthai thi, par ab lagta hai yeh log chain se jeene hi nahi denge. Bihar Sarkar ko bhi beech mein le aaye hain. Meri madad karo sir, yeh log bahut taqatwar hain, mujhe darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main Vikram Singh, aapko apni pareshani batane aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi hi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Woh Rewari court se jo faisla aaya tha na 23.2.2001 ko, Addl. Sessions Judge saahab ne sunaaya tha, usne toh humein bilkul tod diya hai. Sir, main akela nahi hoon, mere jaise aur teen log bhi hain – Bhagmal, Raj Singh (jisko sab Titu kehte hain), aur Pankaj. Hum sab ko ek hi dande se haanka gaya hai, ek hi jaisa case bana diya. Humne toh apni appeal daali hai, Haryana Sarkar ke khilaaf, taaki humein thoda toh insaaf mile. Samajh nahi aa raha kya hoga, par humare saath bahut galat hua hai, Sir. Please kuch toh suniye, kuch toh kariye humare liye.

Sir, main ek kapde ka vyapari hoon, Bhatia community se. Aaj main apne teen kapde ke pieces leke jaa raha tha, toh ek police wale ne mujhe raste mein rok liya. Pura din dukaan pe mehnat karke aata hoon, aur woh mujhse puchhne laga ki yeh kapde kahan se laaya? Main achhe se bataya, par woh sunne ko taiyar hi nahi tha. Baat badh gayi aur humare beech thodi bahas ho gayi. Uske baad us constable ne mujhe, itne logon ke saamne, pakad liya aur pura raste mein, Girgaum police station tak, aur phir Dhobi Talav tak, meri itni beizzati ki, sir! Log dekh rahe the, main kitna sharminda hua, main kaise bataun? Sir, meri koi galti nahi thi, bas main apna kaam kar raha tha. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri biwi Beenakumari ko uske maa-baap ne zabardasti rok rakha hai. Humne 14 April 1975 ko shaadi ki thi, sabke saamne, aur ek agreement bhi banaya tha jo legally register bhi hua tha. Woh sab proof mere paas hai, sir. Ab uske papa ne Trivandrum ke Chief Judicial Magistrate ke paas ek application de di hai, pata nahi kya proceedings shuru karna chahte hain, bas humein alag karna chahte hain. Meri biwi wahan khush nahi hai, unhone use galat tareeke se pakda hua hai. Mujhe apni biwi wapas chahiye, sir. Please meri madad kijiye, unse meri Beenakumari ko chhudwa dijiye.

Main K. Srinivasa Rao hoon, Anakapalli, Visakhapatnam se. Meri complaint hai mere padosiyon ke khilaf. Chinni Apparao, unki biwi Smt. Chinna Appala Narsamma aur unka beta Chinni Appa Rao. In logon ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai, Sir. Pata nahi kya chahte hain mujhse. Pehle bhi maine complain ki thi, uske baad toh mujhe court mein 'protest application' tak file karni padi. Ab ye mamla II Additional Judicial First Class Magistrate mein chal raha hai, P.R.C.No.5 of 2012. Itna pareshan kar rakha hai inhone. Raat din bas tang karte rehte hain. Kabhi gali dete hain, kabhi dhamkate hain. Main bahut dar gaya hoon, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri suno Sir, please. Main kab tak inki harakatein bardaasht karunga? Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Itni mushkil se court ne insaaf diya tha. Woh Bondal, Bodram, Gimjarilal aur baaki chhah log, sab ko saza hui thi. Rioting ke liye (Section 148), kuch ko galat tareeke se bandhak banane ke liye (Section 342), aur kuch ko raaste mein rokne ke liye (Section 341). Aur toh aur, woh Bondal, Bodram, Gimjarilal, inko toh meri beti ko kidnap karne ke liye (Section 366) bhi saza mili thi. Humne socha tha ab shanti milegi. Par ab pata chala hai ki ye sab ke sab appeal kar rahe hain! Meri toh jaan sukh gayi hai. Agar ye log chhoot gaye ya saza kam ho gayi toh humara kya hoga? Ye phir se humein pareshaan karenge. Sir, please, aap hi kuch kijiye. Hum bohot darre hue hain.

Sir ji, meri ek bahut badi pareshani hai. Yaad hai, R.S.Mangalam Police Station mein, Crime No. 101/2011 mein meri chori ka case register hua tha? Woh Section 379 IPC wala mamla. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki jinke khilaf maine complain ki thi, woh log court mein apni FIR quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi be-insaafi hai na? Meri cheez chori hui, aur ab woh log case se palla jhadna chahte hain? Pehle unhone chori ki, aur ab woh chahte hain ki unhe koi saza na mile. Aap hi bataiye Sir, aise kaise chalega? Meri suniye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh chor log aise aasaani se bachne nahi chahiye.

Sir, main apni dukhi kahani sunane aaya hoon. Humari zindagi tabah ho rahi hai. Kuch log din-dahaade hamare ilake mein illegal khanan (mining) kar rahe hain. Na unke paas koi licence hai, na koi permission, bas jabardasti karte hain. Humne pehle bhi complain ki thi, par lagta hai us FIR mein kuch galti ho gayi thi rules likhne mein. Bihar ke jo asli Minerals Rules hain, 2019 wale, unke hisaab se toh ye sab bilkul gair-kanooni hai. Par shayad galti se 2021 ke rules mention ho gaye the. Meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aata Sir, par yeh log jo kar rahe hain, woh seedhe seedhe kanoon ki dhajjiyan uda rahe hain. Meri aapse haath jod ke guzarish hai, is mamle ko seriously dekho aur un gair-kanooni logon par karwai karo. Hamare saath bahut anyay ho raha hai. Please sahi rules ke andar case darj karo.

Sir, mujhe bahut pareshaani ho rahi hai. Yeh log meri zameen ke aas-paas illegal mining kar rahe hain, khanij nikal rahe hain. Bihar ke jo minerals ke rules hain na, 2019 wale, un sab ki dhajjiyan uda rahe hain. Aur suniye, jab maine pehle report likhwai thi, toh usmein aap logon ne galti se Bihar Minerals Amendment Rules 2021 likh diya tha, jabki asli wale toh 2019 ke niyam hain. Yeh log jo kar rahe hain, woh IPC aur un rules ke hisaab se bilkul galat hai, gair-kaanooni hai. Unke paas koi authority nahi hai yeh sab karne ki. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, is par jaldi se action lijiye, Sir. Meri madad karo!

Sir, namaste. Main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mujhe na insaaf chahiye. Pata nahi kis baat par mere upar case thop diya hai inhone. Bolte hain ki maine Indian Penal Code toda hai aur Bihar Minerals Rules ke hisaab se galat kaam kiya hai. Sir, mera to dimaag kharab ho gaya hai. FIR mein likha hai 'Bihar Minerals Amendment Rules 2021', jabki mere lawyer ne bataya ki asli Rules to 2019 wale hain! Ye to bilkul galat information hai. Mujhe lagta hai mujhe jaan-boojh kar phasaya ja raha hai. Ye jo bhi kar rahe hain, ye sab illegal hai aur inke paas koi authority nahi hai aise logon ko tang karne ki. Main gareeb aadmi hoon Sir, meri suniye, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, meri suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kis baat pe mujhe phasaya ja raha hai. Woh log keh rahe hain ki maine 'Bihar Minerals Rules, 2019' ke khilaaf kuch illegal kiya hai. Meri transport ya mining, jo bhi kaam tha, usko illegal bataya ja raha hai, aur IPC (Indian Penal Code) bhi laga diya hai. Par sir, sabse badi baat toh yeh hai ki unhone FIR mein 'Bihar Minerals Amendment Rules 2021' likh diya hai, jo ki galat hai! Woh rule toh abhi applicable hi nahi hai, ya kuch aur hi mamla hai. Yeh toh pura illegal hai aur unke paas koi authority nahi hai aise karne ki. Main toh bas apna kaam kar raha tha. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai. Kuch log yahaan illegal tareeke se kaam kar rahe hain. Unke paas na koi permission hai, na hi koi authority. Humne suna hai ki Bihar ke mining ke kuch rules hote hain, jaise Rule 39(3) aur 56, jo 2019 ke hain. Par yeh log bolte hain ki 2021 ke rules hain, aur FIR mein bhi wahi likha gaya hai, jabki yeh sab poori tarah se kaanoon ke khilaaf hai. Meri aapse haath jod ke guzaarish hai, inpe sakht se sakht kaarwai karo. Yeh sab bilkul gair-kaanooni hai aur hum jaiso ko pareshaan kar rahe hain.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoke aapke paas aaya hoon. Humare ilake mein kuch log illegally mining ka kaam kar rahe hain, bina kisi permission ya authority ke. Yeh log patthar aur balu nikalte hain din-raat, aur isse humari zameen ko bahut nuksaan ho raha hai. Humari fasle kharab ho rahi hain aur humara jeena mushkil ho gaya hai. Sir, yeh sab bilkul gair-kanooni hai, iski koi permission nahi hai kanoon ki taraf se. Pehle bhi ek FIR hui thi, par usmein shayad rules galat likh diye the, jaise 2021 ke rules mention the jabki 2019 wale the. Lekin sir, point ye hai ki kaam hi illegal hai. Meri aapse request hai, ispe action lijiye. Humari madad kijiye.

Sir, main Sita Devi, gaon [gaav ka naam, placeholder] se aayi hoon. Meri ek bahut badi fariyaad hai. Kuch log humari zameen par aur gaon ke aas-paas, bina kisi permission ke, gair-kanooni taur par khudai kar rahe hain. Din-dahaade truck bhar-bhar ke mitti aur patthar le jaate hain. Ye sab poora galat hai, Sir. Humne kitni baar roka, unhone ulta humein dhamki di. Kehte hain unke paas sab ‘set’ hai, koi kuch nahi kar sakta. Meri fasal barbaad ho rahi hai, gharon mein darar aa gayi hai. Jo Bihar ke khanij wale kanoon hain, ye log un sabki dhajjiyaan uda rahe hain. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Aap se request hai ki in logon par sakht action lein. Hum bahut pareshaan hain.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut zaroori baat batane aaya hoon. Mere khilaaf jo karwahi ki gayi hai na, woh bilkul illegal hai! Unhone jo Bihar Minerals ke rules lagaye hain, Rule 39(3) aur 56, woh sab galat tareeke se istemal kiye gaye hain. Aur toh aur, jo FIR likhi hai mere naam pe, usmein bhi galat rules likh diye hain! 2019 wale rules ko galti se 2021 ke amendment rules bata diya hai. Yeh toh seedha-seedha bina kisi authority ke kaam hua hai, Sir. Mujh par jo bhi ilzaam lagaye hain, woh sab jhoote hain aur kaanoon ke khilaaf hain. Kripya meri suniye, Sir, aur mujhe insaaf dilaiye.

Daroga ji, main kya bataun! Meri toh poori zindagi kharab kar di in logon ne. Yeh jo mere mining ke kaam ya minerals ki transportation aur storage ka mamla hai na, Sir, yeh log bilkul galat tareeke se mujhe phasaya hai. Inke paas koi kaanooni authority nahi hai, aur yeh jo kuchh bhi kar rahe hain, woh bilkul illegal hai. Koi rule dikha rahe hain Bihar Minerals Rules 2019 ka ya 2021 ka, pata nahi, par main kasam kha kar kehta hoon, main galat nahi hoon. Mera kaam bilkul sahi hai. Yeh sab jaanboojh kar mujhe pareshan kar rahe hain. Meri madad kijiye, Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main yahan aaya hoon kyunki meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Yeh log mujhe bar-bar pareshaan kar rahe hain. Kehte hain ki maine kuch galat kiya hai, par mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha. Woh Bihar ke mining rules, ya kanoon ka naam lete hain, Rule 39 ya 56. Kabhi kehte hain 2019 wala kanoon hai, kabhi 2021 ka naam le dete hain meri FIR mein. Main toh hairan hoon ki kaun sa kanoon hai, aur yeh sab ho kya raha hai. Meri toh koi galti nahi hai. Mujhe lagta hai yeh sab bilkul galat hai, illegal hai. Koi authority nahi hai inki mujhe tang karne ki. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Kuch logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Woh bolte hain ki maine illegal kaam kiya hai, meri cheezein bhi zabardasti le gaye hain. Aur jab main poochta hoon toh bolte hain ki yeh Bihar Minerals Amendment Rules 2021 ke hisaab se hai. Par sir, yeh rules toh hain hi nahi! Yeh log galat rules laga rahe hain. Asli rules toh 2019 wale hain, woh jo Khanij Niyam hain na Bihar ke. Unke hisaab se toh jo bhi inhone kiya hai, woh bilkul illegal hai. Unko koi authority nahi thi ye sab karne ki. Meri suniye sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main bahut majboor hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe ek complaint karni hai. Hamare gaon mein, hamari zameen ke paas, kuch log naajayaz tarike se mining kar rahe hain. Din-raat machines chalti rehti hain. Isse hamara pura environment kharab ho raha hai, aur hamari faslon ko bhi nuksaan ho raha hai. Yeh log Bihar Minerals Rules, 2019 ke Rule 39(3) aur 56 ka khuleaam ullanghan kar rahe hain. Sir, inke paas koi authority nahi hai, yeh sab kuch completely illegal hai. Kanoon ki nazaron mein yeh bilkul galat hai. Humne pehle bhi kai baar roka, par woh dhamkate hain. Hum gareeb log kahan jayein? Aap hi humari madad kijiye, sir. Please inke khilaaf sakht action लीजिए aur humein insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main Ram Singh. Meri baat suniye, sir. Pichle hafte, kuchh log aaye the meri site par, jahan main thoda bahut mitti ka kaam karta hoon. Unhone meri tractor-trolley pakad li, keh rahe the ki main 'Bihar Minerals Rules 2019' tod raha hoon. Mujhe toh kuchh samajh hi nahi aaya, sir. Main toh apna pet paal raha tha. Unhone itna bada fine laga diya, aur dhamki bhi di ki jail bhej denge. Main toh darr gaya tha. Baad mein ek jan-pehchan ke wakiil sahab se baat ki, toh unhone bataya ki yeh jo rules hain, jinpe woh log action le rahe hain, woh toh khud hi galat hain, unka koi kaanuni adhaar hi nahi hai. Toh phir mere saath aisa kyu hua? Sir, yeh toh poora dhokha hai, galat tareeke se mujhe pareshaan kiya gaya hai. Meri madad kijiye, sir, mera bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai.

Sir, main kya kahoon, meri toh samajh mein nahi aa raha ki kya ho raha hai. Mere saath pura zyaadti ho rahi hai. Ye log jo bhi kar rahe hain, woh seedha seedha illegal hai, kanoon ke khilaaf hai. Inke paas toh koi authority hi nahi hai is kaam ki. Aur suniye, jo mera FIR likha gaya hai na, usme bhi galat rules likh diye hain. Bihar ke Minerals ke 2019 wale rules ki baat hai, par inhone toh galti se 2021 ke rules daal diye. Matlab, FIR mein bhi galti! Jab pura system hi aise galat chal raha hai toh hum aam aadmi kahaan jayenge? Meri sunwai kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, is illegal activity ke khilaaf.

Sir, main Inspector hoon, Delhi Police mein. Meri suniye sir, ye meri naukri ka mamla hai. Main jab Karawal Nagar PS mein SHO tha na, tab ki baat hai ye. 19 February 2011 ki ek DD entry hai, DD No. 10-A. Uske baad se hi mujhe itni takleef ho rahi hai, sir, kya bataun! Meri file court mein bhi dekhi gayi hai, vakeelon ne bhi meri baat suni hai. Itne saalon se main is mamle mein uljha hua hoon. Ek police officer hokar bhi, insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Sir, bas itna chahta hoon ki is DD entry ke chakkar mein jo problem hai, woh solve ho jaye aur mujhe insaaf mile.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mujhe pata chala hai ki Oriental Bank of Commerce, Safdarjung Enclave branch mein bahut badi cheating hui hai. Hamari mehnat ki kamai wahan rakhi hai, sir! Ye Rakesh Sharma, Rajesh Grover, Upender Kumar Singh, aur unka manager Pradeep Kumar Gupta, sab milkar bank ko hi loot rahe the. Kaise ho sakta hai ye? Aise log bank mein baithe hain toh hum jaise aam aadmi ka paisa kaise safe rahega? Mera toh bank se vishwas hi uth gaya hai. In sab ne milkar fraud kiya hai, hum logon ko dhokha diya hai. In par sakht se sakht action hona chahiye, sir. Meri madad karo, mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main Adarsh Kumar Ahluwalia hoon. Main bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Meri baat suniye, please. 10 June 2014 ki woh ghatiya subah thi. Us din mere saath jo hua, main bata nahi sakta. Shafiq Ahmad, woh Mohd. Rasid ka beta hai, usne meri life mushkil kar di hai. Us din usne mujhe threaten kiya, mere saath badtameezi ki. Main itna ghabra gaya tha ki ussi din, 10 June ko hi, main turant yahan police station aa gaya tha complaint karne. Sir, main bahut darr gaya hoon, aur woh abhi bhi bahar ghoom raha hai. Meri family ko bhi fear hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please, is matter ko serious lo aur usko pakdo!

Sir, main Sahajad Ali hoon. Meri scooty DL 4SCC 1963 Bahubali Park se chori ho gayi thi. Wo din tha 6 August 2018. Maine tabhi online E-FIR bhi karwai thi, saari details di thi aapko. Meri roz ki zindagi ruk si gayi thi uske bina, bahut pareshan tha main. Kitni mushkil se khareedi thi maine, aur ek pal mein sab chala gaya. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki Rohit @ Vidhur naam ka ek ladka pakda gaya hai meri scooty ki chori ke maamle mein. Bhagwan ka shukar hai! Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Meri scooty wapas mil jaye aur us chor ko saza mile, bas yehi chahta hoon.

Sir, dekho na, meri gaadi chori hui thi. Kitni mushkil se mili, par ab sun raha hoon ki court mein us gaadi ko pesh hi nahi kiya gaya! Mujhe bhi gawaahi dene ke liye nahi bulaya. Yeh kya insaaf hai? Meri gaadi ki toh photo bhi nahi hai file mein, main kaise prove karu? Aur, Sir, ye log keh rahe hain ki agar kisi ke paas chori ka saaman mile aur woh jawab na de paye, toh usko chor maana jayega. APP sahab bhi bol rahe hain ki bina explanation ke cheez milna hi kaafi hai usko doshi thehrane ke liye. Par yahan toh meri gaadi hi nahi hai court mein, na meri baat suni. Main kya karun, Sir? Mera toh pura nuksaan ho raha hai. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko apni pareshani batane aaya hoon. Meri zameen par se inhone galat tareeke se *khanij* nikal liye hain, seedhi baat hai chori ki hai! Main toh soch raha tha ki inpar seedhe 379 IPC lagana chahiye, jaise kisi aur cheez ki chori par lagta hai. Par ab log keh rahe hain ki 'Mines and Minerals Act' ke kuch sections ki wajah se, inpar IPC ke tahat मुकदमा nahi ho sakta. Yeh kaisi baat hai, Daroga Ji? Kya khanij ki chori, chori nahi kehlayegi? In logon ne mera itna nuksaan kiya hai, aur ab yeh kanoon ki aad mein bachna chahte hain. Meri bas itni guzaarish hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye, aur inpar IPC ki dhaara 379 hi lagni chahiye, taaki inko sahi saza mile.

Sir, meri baat suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon! Jinke khilaf maine itni mushkil se case kiya tha, woh log ab court mein application laga rahe hain. Mera vakeel keh raha hai ki woh log mera case 'quash' karwana chahte hain. Matlab, unhone jo bhi galat kiya, uski saza nahi milegi? Woh bade bade vakeel Faraz Kazmi ko leke aaye hain, aur unke saath aur bhi kai vakeel the. Sab milkar unhe bachana chahte hain. Aur toh aur, sarkar ke vakeel bhi the wahan, pata nahi kya papers dekh rahe the. Sir, ye toh seedhi-seedhi nainsafi hai! Kya hum jaise logon ko kabhi insaaf nahi milega? Woh log bas paisa aur power dikha kar mamla dabana chahte hain. Mujhe lagta hai mera case khatam ho jayega, Sir. Please kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Daroga ji, main toh thak gaya hoon Sir, iss kaanuni chakkar se. Kitne saal ho gaye! Pehle toh Central Administrative Tribunal mein mere haq mein order aaya tha 29 February 2016 ko. Main khush ho gaya tha ki chalo insaaf mila. Par phir, yeh Delhi High Court ne 24 July 2017 ko, woh mera jeeta hua order hi palat diya. Meri petition ko side karke, unhone respondent ki baat maan li. Yeh toh seedha-seedha dhokha hai mere saath. Ab main appeal mein hoon aur mujhe bas yeh pucha hai ki gareeb aadmi ko kab milega insaaf? Meri puri zindagi daav pe lagi hai, Sir.

Sir, main Panipat ka resident hoon. Mujhe abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki hamare yahaan ki jo Mahalakshmi Spinners Limited company hai, unke khilaaf 2006 mein bijli chori ki FIR darj hui thi. Yeh log, sir, 898 KVA jaisi itni badi demand ki bijli chura rahe the UHBVN se! Hum jaise aam aadmi toh apne ghar ka bill time pe bharte hain, ek unit zyada ho jaaye toh tension ho jaati hai. Aur yeh bade log itni chori karte hain, jiski wajah se humein power cuts jhelne padte hain aur bills bhi high aate hain. Meri aapse guzarish hai ki us FIR (number 76) par sakht se sakht action liya jaaye. Aise choron ko bilkul mat chhodna, sir. Insaaf milna chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mera toh dimag kharab ho gaya hai ye sunke. 2004 ki baat hai, Taldanga P.S. mein maine ek case file karwaya tha, Case No. 44. Poore 20 saal ho gaye! Woh bijli chori ka mamla tha, sir, Section 135 Electricity Act aur chori Section 379 IPC ka. Kitni mushkil se toh case chalu hua tha. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein application de rahe hain ki case ko hi khatam kar do, quash kar do! Aaj judge saab ne unka koi naya kaagaz bhi record pe rakh liya hai. Main garib aadmi itne saalon se insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon aur ab woh bachna chahte hain? Meri aapse request hai, sir, please meri madad kijiye. Is case ko band mat hone dijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Rajinder Ice Factory ka malik hoon. Meri factory Dindarpur, Najafgarh, Khasra No. 339 par hai. Main bahut pareshaan hoon, Sir, meri madad kijiye! Maine ek Sanjay naam ke aadmi ke saath 10 April 2006 ko ek kiraye ka agreement kiya tha. Us agreement ke mutabik, Sanjay ko meri ice factory chalani thi. Woh uska akela malik ban kar chalayega, aur saara fayda usi ka hoga, badle mein woh mujhe har mahine kiraya dega. Maine saaf likha tha ki saara kharcha aur risk usi ka hoga. Ab pata nahi kya ho raha hai, Sir. Please meri suno, main bahut mushkil mein hoon!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mere saath jo hua tha, woh pura alag mamla hai. Meri to samajh mein hi nahi aa raha hai ki achanak mera case itne saare doosre cases ke saath kyun jod diya gaya hai. Log keh rahe hain ki sab mein 'ek hi kanooni baat' hai. Par Sir, har victim ka dard alag hota hai na? Mera case alag police station ka hai, dusron ka alag. Alag-alag courts mein chal raha tha, ab sab ek saath le liye hain 'final disposal' ke liye. Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir, ki meri personal sunwai kahan hogi? Kya meri baat koi sunega ya bas sab ko ek lathi se haank denge? Maine itne time se wait kiya hai insaaf ke liye, aur ab aise sab mix ho gaya. Mujhe lagta hai meri toh sunwai hi nahi ho payegi dhang se. Please Sir, kuch kijiye.

Sahab, meri ek complaint hai jo 1991 ki hai, socho kitne saal ho gaye! Main tab se bas court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, meri poori zindagi isme nikal gayi. Aur ab, mere jo opposite party hai na, woh phir se ek naya panga le aaye hain. Woh chahte hain ki Veraval ki JMFC court ne jo 2003 aur 2004 mein faisle diye the, unko cancel karwa dein. Matlab, jo thodi si umeed mili thi, usko bhi khatam karna chahte hain. Sir, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Itne saalon se main intezaar kar raha hoon, meri patience ab jawab de rahi hai. Please kuch kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri suno toh sahi. Yeh jo pathar ki khadanein (granite quarry operations) chal rahi hain na, inki wajah se hamari zindagi haram ho gayi hai. Har jagah cases chal rahe hain, bohot saare log complain kar chuke hain, police station mein FIRs bhi hui hain. Lekin koi sunta hi nahi. Pathar todne ka kaam chal raha hai, din raat shor, dhool mitti. Hamare gharon mein cracks aa gaye hain. Yeh log saare rules tod ke kaam karte hain, khuleaam gundagardi chal rahi hai. Mujhe lagta hai saare mamle ek jaise hi hain, sabki ek hi problem hai. Koi toh suno hamari, please action lo. Yeh illegal kaam band karwao.

Sir, main Pooja Rawat/Negi, Deepak Singh Rawat ki patni hoon. Meri chori ho gayi hai, sir! 6 December 2015 ko Panchkula ke Sector 19 mein mere ghar se saaman chura liya gaya. Pata nahi kaun tha woh, par mera bahut nuksaan hua hai. Maine us din hi police station mein complain karwayi thi, FIR No. 131. Abhi tak kuch pata nahi chal raha ki kya hua. Wo chor pakde gaye ya nahi, mera saaman wapis mila ya nahi... Sir, please aap meri madad kijiye. Bahut pareshaan hoon main. Meri mehnat ki kamai thi woh sab. Aap hi kuch kar sakte ho.

Sir, main Ram Bharose, Seema Puri se aaya hoon. Meri suno, sir, yeh bijli vibhag walon ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Mere upar galat FIR kar di hai, FIR No. 235/2004. Bolte hain ki maine bijli chori ki hai, Section 39 Electricity Act ke under, ab Section 135 ke hisaab se. Jabki maine aisa kuch kiya hi nahi! Mere ghar pe inspection karne aaye the aur bina kisi solid proof ke, bas aise hi mujhe chor bana diya. Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon, main bijli chori karke kya karunga? Ab toh main High Court mein bhi gaya hoon, Section 482 Cr.P.C. ke तहत, ki ye FIR cancel ho jaaye. Mujhe galat fasaya ja raha hai, sir. Kripya meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Mahesh Kumar hai na, jispar maine pehle complaint ki thi. Usne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha, Sir. Ghar mein ghuskar maarpit ki, gaali galauj ki, mujhe band karke rakha tha, aur toh aur dhokhadhadi bhi ki hai, jaali kagaz bhi banaye the. Uske khilaaf Case Crime No. 595 of 2018 mein mamla darj hua tha, Section 147, 323, 504, 452, 342, 420, 467, 468, 471 IPC lagaye gaye hain. Ab suna hai ki woh court mein ek application daal kar, apna woh saara case, jo Misc. Case No. 817 of 2020 ke naam se chal raha hai, usko band karwana chahta hai. Uske bade-bade vakil bhi aa rahe the sunwai mein. Sir, agar woh case band ho gaya toh meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, use yeh sab karne se rokiye. Main kya karu, Sir?

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi fariyaad lekar aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sahab! Woh Ravi Kapoor aur Ajay Kumar @ Bhenga... unhone mere bhai ko bade bedardi se maara tha. Pehle unko kidnap kiya, phir loot liya aur jaan le li! Vasant Kunj police station mein FIR bhi hui thi, unko saza bhi mili thi, tab jaakar thoda sukoon mila tha. Par ab sun raha hoon ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain, apni saza kam karwana chahte hain. Sahab, woh bahar aa gaye toh meri family kaise surakshit rahegi? Unhone itna bada jurm kiya hai, unhe koi chhoot nahi milni chahiye. Meri aapse haath jodkar guzaarish hai, hamein insaaf dilaiye, unhe bahar mat aane dijiye. Hamein unse bahut darr lagta hai.

Sir, main bahut takleef mein hoon. Meri toh neendein ud gayi hain. Woh jo meri 10 aluminium ki chaadaren thi na, sab chori ho gayi. Pata nahi kaun bure log the, 18 aur 19 October ki raat ko, sab utha kar le gaye. Kitni mushkil se maine woh jama ki thi, mera bahut bada nuksaan ho gaya hai. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki Sumit Bhattacharjee, Palan Adhikary, Chottu Roy aur Prasanta Mondal ka naam aa raha hai isme. Sahab, please aap meri madad karo, un sabko pakdo aur meri cheezein wapas dilwao. Dum Dum police station mein pehle se hi case number 1004/16 hai is chori ka, par mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Un choron ko toh saza milni hi chahiye!

Sir, dekho na, woh chor ka vakeel Sumeet Verma ab keh raha hai ki trial court ka faisla galat hai. Bol raha hai ki us par Section 413 toh lagta hi nahi, kyunki pehle kabhi Section 411 mein conviction nahi hua. Kya matlab hua Sir iska? Woh aadmi saari umar chori ka maal khareedta-bechta raha hai, sabko pata hai, aur ab yeh bolenge ki kyunki pehle kabhi pakda nahi gaya toh us par case hi nahi banta? Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha dhoka hai mere saath. Meri jo cheezein chori hui hain, woh toh uske paas se hi mili thi! Yeh kanoon ke daanv-pench khel ke bachna chahta hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, aise kaise chalega? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai uski wajah se, aur ab yeh safai de raha hai!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mujhe to samajh hi nahi aa raha ye sab kya ho raha hai. Maine itni mushkil se Chakulia P.S. mein woh Cr.M.P. No. 118 of 2007 wala case file kiya tha. Ab Himadri Steel ke woh do log hain na, woh court mein application daal rahe hain ki mera FIR hi cancel kar do! Bol rahe hain meri complaint galat hai. Sir, kitni mushkil se, kitna suffer karke maine woh FIR karayi thi. Aur yeh log chahte hain ki sab radd ho jaaye? Sir, aise toh insaaf kabhi nahi milega. Pata chala hai ki in jaise aur bhi cases hain jahan yeh log FIR quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri to bas yahi darkhwast hai, please dekhiye sir, mera FIR cancel nahi hona chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri zindagi mein bahut disturbance ho gaya hai. Main bas apni shanti se rehna chahta hoon, apna kaam karna chahta hoon, lekin mere padosi... woh log itna shor-sharaba karte hain, itna tang karte hain ki meri 'personal liberty' toh khatam ho gayi hai. Jab dekho tab loud music, gali-galoch... humne kitni baar unhe bola hai, par woh sunte hi nahi. Kehte hain, 'yeh toh hamara haq hai, hum kuchh bhi karein!' Par sir, agar unka haq hai shor machana, toh mera haq nahi hai shanti se rehna? Mera bhi toh haq hai ki main bina kisi rok-tok ke apni zindagi jiyun, par hadd mein reh ke. Unka shor-sharaba poore mohalle ko disturb karta hai. Sir, aap hi bataiye, aise mein kahan se 'law and order' rahega? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, aur meri shanti wapas. Main bas chahta hoon ki woh log apni hadd mein rahein, jisse hum sab araam se reh sakein.

Sir, main Asgar Khan bol raha hoon. Meri suniye please! Main kitna pareshaan hoon, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Mera ek case chal raha tha – Asgar Khan vs. Chairman, Permanent Lok Adalat, Mewat. Maine ek award ko challenge kiya tha, 23 October ka tha woh. Uske khilaaf maine high court mein petition daali thi, CWP No. 2189 of 2016. Par, saab, 21 April 2016 ko mera case hi dismiss kar diya! Meri writ petition kharij ho gayi. Ab main kahan jaaun? Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Insaaf ke liye main yahan aaya hoon. Meri madad kijiye please!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri suniye, please. Meri ek zameen hai, jiske liye maine court mein case jeeta tha. Punalur ke Munsiff Court ne baकायदा decree di thi ki woh property meri hai, aur uska possession mujhe hi milega. Sab paper pe likha hua hai, sab mere haq mein hai. Lekin pata hai kya hua? Woh aadmi, jisne meri property pe pehle bhi kabza karne ki koshish ki thi, usne court ke order ke baad bhi wahan se saare khade ped kaat diye! Ped kaat kar le gaya! Sir, jab court ne mera haq tay kar diya hai, toh uske baad meri property se kuch bhi utha ke le jaana chori nahi toh kya hai? Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi theft hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, uspar sakht se sakht action hona chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh Shivganj Police Station ka Sub-Inspector Gautam Jain, jo Sirohi mein posted tha, usne humein bohot pareshaan kiya hai. Kitni baar complain ki, par koi sunwai nahi hui. Ab toh pata chala hai uska koi bada case chal raha hai, S.B.Civil Writ Petition No. 6372/05 ke naam se. Socho, jisne humein itna dukh diya, woh khud court mein jaakar apna case lad raha hai. Hum gareeb log kahan jayenge? Meri bas yahi appeal hai, mujhe us SI ke khilaaf insaaf chahiye. Meri family ki haalat dekhke toh roona aata hai, sir. Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, G.R. No. 361 of 2003, Chaibasa court mein. Pata hai, woh opposite party wala, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, woh Section 239 Cr.P.C. ke तहत discharge maang raha tha. Matlab, case se nikalna chahta tha! Socho, kitni himmat hai uski. Humne toh itne saal se nyay ka intezaar kiya hai. Mere vakeel साहब, Mr. Pankaj Kumar, ne bhi bahut mehnat ki. Achha hua, 30.06.2004 ko S.D.J.M. Sadar court ne uski application reject kar di. Meri toh jaan mein jaan aayi. Par sir, yeh log baar-baar koshish karte hain case ko lamba khinchne ki. Mujhe bus insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh log aise hi bach nikalne ki koshish karte rahenge toh hum garibon ko kaise nyay milega? Please sir, jaldi se jaldi action ho, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri baat suniye. Pata hai kya hua? Us din na, 26.11.2005 ko, court ne police ki report maan li. Woh bol rahe hain ki koi case hi nahi banta! Aur jin logon ne mere ghar mein ghuskar chori ki thi (Section 448 aur 380 IPC ke तहत), unko chhod diya! Kaise, sir? Main toh woh Respondent No. 3 ka kirayedaar tha. Unhone aur unke saath ke 2-3 logon ne milkar mere ghar mein zabardasti ghuskar tod-phod ki, mera saara samaan idhar-udhar kiya, aur chori bhi ki. Police ne bhi theek se investigation nahi ki aur closure report laga di. Ab court keh rahi hai ki sab theek hai? Sir, mere saath toh bahut bada dhokha hua hai. Mujhe bilkul insaaf nahi mila. Isliye main yeh dobara appeal lekar aaya hoon. Aap hi batao, main kahan jaun?

Sir, main Mohinder Singh. Meri ek complaint hai. Humne toh bade bharose se shares khareede the M/s. Hoshiarpur Express Transport Company Ltd. mein, jo 1937 se chal rahi hai. Socha tha humara future secure hoga, bacchon ka bhala hoga. Lekin ab toh lagta hai sab barbaad ho gaya hai. Company ke jo log hain, woh humein bilkul pareshaan kar rahe hain. Hamare saath bahut *oppression* ho raha hai, matlab humein dabaya ja raha hai. Aur toh aur, *mismanagement* bhi itna zyada hai ki company dubti ja rahi hai. Humne itni mehnat se paise lagaye, aur yeh log humare paise ke saath khilwad kar rahe hain. Meri aapse request hai sir, please kuch kijiye. Humare shares ka kya hoga? Humare paise wapas milenge ya nahi? Yeh log humein barbaad kar denge!

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi hi mushkil mein aa gayi hai. Woh jo mere upar Case Crime No. 193 of 2019 chal raha hai, jismein chori (Section 379 IPC) aur woh khanan act ke तहत jo allegations hain, woh sab galat hain. Meri toh koi galti nahi hai, mujhe jhootha phasaaya gaya hai, Sir. Yeh charge-sheet aur poori proceedings se main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri family bhi disturb hai. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki yeh case jaldi se jaldi quash ho jaye, Sir. Mujhe is jhoothe case se mukti dila do, please. Aap hi meri madad kar sakte ho.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Mera beta, Bharat Bhushan, uske saath 13/14 December 1996 ki raat ko ek 'accident' hua tha. Sab log keh rahe the bas accident hai, par Sir, mujhe pehle din se pata tha yeh koi mamooli haadsa nahi, yeh ek saazish thi. Kitne saal ho gaye, main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Ab jaake court ne bhi meri baat suni hai. Bharatpur ke Judicial Magistrate No.2 ne toh 19.4.2007 ko hi maana tha ki yeh Section 302 (murder) aur 120-B (criminal conspiracy) ka mamla hai. Aur ab Special Judge, Dacoity Affected Area, Bharatpur ne bhi 10.9.2007 ko uss order ko sahi thehraya hai. Jo log iske peeche the, unke khilaaf petitions chal rahi hain, par court ne humari baat suni hai. Sir, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main apni motorcycle chori hone ki complain lekar aaya hoon. Meri bike thi, sir, HR-15A-3501. Pata nahi kisne aur kab chura li. Ab toh meri neend ud gayi hai, sir! Mujhe pata chala hai ki meri wohi chori hui bike ek bahut bade crime mein use hui hai. Yeh 21-22 November 2010 ki raat ki baat hai. Saraswati Vihar Police Station mein FIR No. 439/2010 mein meri bike ka naam hai. Log keh rahe hain ki us bike ka istemal daka dalne aur, bhagwan na kare, khoon tak mein kiya gaya hai. Meri masoom bike se itna bada gunah ho gaya, main toh pareshan ho gaya hoon! Please, meri bike wapas dilwaiye aur un criminals ko pakdiye jo meri property use karke aise gande kaam kar rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, mere saath bahut galat hua tha. Woh Case Crime No. 748 of 2017, jismein Ashok Yadav aur uske saathiyon ne mere saath jo kiya tha, uski toh charge sheet bhi file ho gayi thi 06.04.2017 ko. Maine socha ab mujhe insaaf milega. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log, jo mujhpar itna zulm kiye the, ab woh court mein apni 482 Cr.P.C. application lagake, poori proceedings aur charge sheet ko hi cancel karwana chahte hain! Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Meri saari mehnat, police ki investigation, sab waste ho jayega kya? Main gareeb aadmi hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Kripya dekhiye, unhein case khatam karne se rokiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Ye Kanti, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, usko court ne guilty mana tha, 14 February 2017 ko. Chief Judicial Magistrate ne usko saza bhi sunayi thi 23 May 2017 mein. Humne socha tha ab insaaf mil gaya, chain se rahenge. Par nahi, usne toh appeal kar di, Panipat ke Additional Sessions Judge ke paas (Criminal Appeal No.149 of 2020). Ab pichle saal 5 February 2021 ko us appeal ka bhi faisla aaya. Aur ab sunn rahe hain ki woh us faisle ke khilaaf bhi ek aur petition daal raha hai, woh bhi free mein vakil leke! Yeh kya mazak hai sir? Pehle ek case (CHI-560 of 2015), phir appeal, aur ab yeh naya panga. Kitne saal ho gaye, abhi tak mujhe poora insaaf nahi mila. Mera to bas yahi kehna hai ki please, isko jaldi se khatam karo. Main thak chuki hoon.

सर, मैं आपके पास इस शिकायत के लिए आया हूँ क्योंकि मुझे बहुत डर लग रहा है। मैंने सुना है कि जिन लोगों के खिलाफ Khavda police station में FIR (वह 2005 वाला case, I-CR No. 2/2005) दर्ज हुई थी, वह लोग अब court में जाकर उस FIR को रद्द करवाना चाहते हैं। Bhuj-Kutch LCB के Inspector sahab ने जो report लिखी थी उनके खिलाफ, वह सब अब खत्म करवाना चाहते हैं। उन लोगों ने सरकारी नियम तोड़े थे, वह 1986 के notification की बात थी ना? उनकी वजह से हमें कितनी दिक्कत हुई। अब वह सारे आरोपी बच जाएंगे क्या? मेरी आपसे request है, उनको ऐसे कैसे छोड़ सकते हैं? मुझे तो बस इंसाफ चाहिए। वह लोग गलत हैं और उन्हें सजा मिलनी चाहिए।

Sir, main kya bataun! Meri toh life hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Ye Consumer Forum waalon ne (District Forum West, Delhi) mere khilaaf hi order de diya 28 January 2013 ko. Maine toh unki services ke against complaint ki thi, CC No. 464/2009 tha mera case, aur abhi bhi justice nahi mila mujhe! Main toh bas apni appeal file kar raha/rahi hoon. Ye kaisi sunvaai hai jahaan aam aadmi ko insaaf nahi milta? Aur sir, ye jo judgment aaya hai, kya newspaper waalon ko dikhayenge? Sach sabko pata chalna chahiye. Aap hi batayein, hum jaisa gareeb aadmi kahan jaaye jab aise court mein bhi sunvaai na ho?

Sahab, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki main kitna darr gaya tha. Woh 10 September 1999 ki baat hai, shaam ke kareeb 4:20 baje honge. Main New Delhi Railway Station ke Ajmeri Gate side waale bahar ke gate ke paas khada tha. Wahan maine apni aankhon se dekha, ek aadmi ke paas ek buttondar chaku tha. Bilkul illegal tareeke se woh use leke ghoom raha tha. Sir, aise public place pe koi dangerous knife leke ghoomega toh kitni gandi baat hai, kitna khatra hai logon ki jaan ko! Delhi Administration ne bhi clearly mana kiya hai. Mujhe us time itna darr laga ki kya bataun. Aise logon pe sakht action hona chahiye, Sahab. Hamari safety ke liye yeh bahut zaroori hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe complain karni hai. Meri life barbaad kar di hai in logon ne. Ek toh woh Rahul Sethi hai, jise log Gullu bhi kehte hain. Uska baap Prem Kumar hai aur woh RZ-21N, Gali No. 2, Deepawali Chowk, Dabri Extension, Delhi mein rehta hai. Isne aur uske saathi Aakash Kumar ne, jo Sunil Kumar ka beta hai, mujhe bahut tang kiya hai, Sir. Mera jeena mushkil kar diya hai inhone. Aap please kuch kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Yeh log bahut bade gunde hain, meri sunte hi nahi. Mujhe dar lagta hai inse. Please in par sakht action lo.

Sir, main Amit Kumar Saxena, aaj 24.09.2008 ko yahan Malviya Nagar PS aaya hoon. Mujhe ek complaint likhwani hai. Baat 18.09.2008 ki hai. Main Noida se Saket Mall ke liye nikla tha shaam 6 baje ke aas-paas. Kareeb 6:45 tak main Saket Mall pahunch gaya tha. Maine net pe ek ladki se baat ki thi, uska naam Sanjivini tha. Humne 6:45 baje Saket Mall mein milne ka time fix kiya tha. Maine apni gaadi wahan park ki thi, aur uske baad jo mere saath hua... Sir, main bata nahi sakta kitna pareshan hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main Vijay Pal Singh, Hari Singh ka beta. Kal 8.2.2011 ko mere saath jo hua na, uski complaint karne aaya tha. Pul Prahlad Pur PS se ek police wala aya tha spot pe, par pata nahi kaise unko main wahaan nahi mila. Meri DD entry 40A, woh toh pending kar di. Arre main toh wahi khada tha, pura din wait kiya. Bahut pareshaan ho gaya hoon main. Isliye aaj 9.2.2011 ko dobara aaya hoon, khud police station tak. Please meri puri baat suniye aur meri complaint likhiye. Mujhko bahut takleef hui hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek complaint lekar aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai, sir. Aaj se kaafi saal pehle, 24 March 2004 ki baat hai, dopahar mein lagbhag paune ek baje ka time tha. Main Jagat Puri bus stand ke paas khada tha, jo aapke Preet Vihar area mein aata hai, sir. Wahan par, Santosh alias Ganesh, jo Sabzi Mandi, Ghantaghar, Delhi ka rehne wala hai, aur Shailender naam ke do aadmiyon ne milkar mera saara saaman chori kar liya. Meri mehnat ki kamayi thi, sir. Unhone meri cheezein chura lee. Mujhe bahut bada nuksaan hua hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye unse!

Sir, main Jagdish Chander, Paschim Vihar se. Meri Maruti Car, number DL-4CA-3312, kal raat ko, matlab 13 aur 14 February 1999 ki beech wali raat ko, mere ghar A-3/309 ke bahar se chori ho gayi thi. Main toh poori tarah ghabra gaya tha, sir. Itni mehnat ki kamai se li thi wo gaadi. Meri toh neend ud gayi thi. Socha ab kabhi nahi milegi. Lekin aap logon ne toh kamaal kar diya! Aaj dopahar mein hi, 14 February ko lagbhag 1:15 baje, meri gaadi mil gayi aur chor bhi pakde gaye. Thank God! Bas ab in logon ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri FIR likh lijiye, sir.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri suniye please! Woh Dharmender Mehto @ Kali, jo Pandav Nagar, Delhi ke H.NO. 5-143 mein rehta hai, aur uska saathi Rajender Sharma, jo Khoda Colony, Subhash Park II wala hai – inhone meri naak mein dum kar rakha hai. Sir, yeh log bade gunde hain. Roz-roz mujhe pareshan karte hain, meri property pe kabze ki koshish karte hain. Kal toh unhone mere bete ko bhi dhamkaya, uski life ko threat kiya. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Meri family bhi sehmi hui hai. Kripya inke khilaaf sakht action lo, sir. Main toh ghar se nikalne mein bhi darta hoon ab. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sir, main Amarjit Singh Bagga hoon, aur meri wife Manju Luthra bhi mere saath hai. Sahab, hum bahut pareshaan hain, please meri suno. Yeh Iffco Tokio General Insurance Company wale hain na, inhone humare 4 lakh rupaye rok rakhe hain, jo interest ke saath milne chahiye the. Kitne time se hum inke peeche pade hain, offices ke chakkar kaat rahe hain, but koi sunta hi nahi. Humne inke khilaaf ek suit file kiya tha recovery ke liye, par yeh log bas ghumaate ja rahe hain. Hum gareeb log hain, Sir, itna bada amount hai, humari savings hain woh. Ab aur kitna intezaar karein? Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main wohi hoon, jiski dukaan se 2000 mein chori hui thi Chandni Mahal area mein. Yaad hai aapko, woh FIR number 176/2000? Wahi, jo Chandni Mahal thane mein darj hui thi. Mera bahut nuksaan hua tha, sir. Choron ne mera saara maal uda liya tha. Police ne toh pakad liya tha un logon ko, aur kuch stolen property bhi mil gayi thi. Ab toh case court mein chal raha hai, suna hai trial shuru hone wala hai ya chal raha hai. Bas sir, kitne saal ho gaye, mujhe bas justice chahiye. Un sab choron ko, jo is chori mein involved the, unko saza milni chahiye. Meri to poori zindagi ruk gayi thi us ek incident se.

Sahab, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri ek Ashok Leyland 2516 commercial gaadi thi, jiska number HR63B4393 hai. Maine uska pura beema (insurance) karaya tha 10 October 2016 ko, yeh soch ke ki kal ko koi dikkat ho toh nuksaan ki bharpai ho sake. Par ab jab mujhe paison ki zaroorat padi hai, toh woh beema company hath khade kar chuki hai. Unhone meri gaadi ke paise nahi diye! Mujhe majboori mein unke khilaaf court mein case karna pada. Main unse apne 18 lakh rupaye maang raha hoon, jo mera haq hai, aur saath mein 2% byaaj bhi, jab tak poora hisaab na mile. Aur jo itna court ka chakkar kata hai, uska kharcha bhi. Sir, garib aadmi hoon, bahut pareshaan hoon, bas mera haq dilwa do.

Sir, main Chandan Kumar hoon. Meri ek bike thi, DL-3S-BA-2879 number wali, woh chori ho gayi thi meri. Kitni mushkil se li thi maine woh bike, sir! Abhi pata chala hai ki 11.07.10 ko shaam 5:10 baje, Pushp Vihar mein NBCC Plaza ke paas, ek Sanjay @ Sanju naam ke bande ko meri hi bike ke saath pakda gaya hai. Sir, usne toh meri bike ki number plate bhi badal di thi, DL-3S-AB-8794 laga rakhi thi! Yeh toh seedha-seedha chori ka case hai, sir. Meri bike wapas dilwaiye aur us chor ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Bahut pareshan hoon main, meri rozi-roti judi thi us bike se.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut zaroori complain leke aaya hoon. Meri zameen se kuch log din-dahaade illegally mining kar rahe hain, mitti aur patthar chura ke le jaa rahe hain. Yeh seedhi-seedhi theft hai, Section 379 IPC ka mamla hai! Par mujhe sunne mein aa raha hai ki police wale keh rahe hain ki yeh toh bas Mines and Minerals Act ka case hai. Saab, woh log dacoity ki tarah mera maal utha ke le jaa rahe hain, meri property ko nuksaan pahuncha rahe hain. Kya Mines and Minerals Act unhe IPC ke Section 379/114 se bachayega? Main gareeb aadmi hoon, meri toh poori kheti barbaad ho rahi hai. Mujhe justice chahiye, un choron ko IPC ke तहत punishment milni chahiye. Yeh log abetting bhi kar rahe hain, sab milkar yeh crime kar rahe hain. Please, meri report likho aur unke khilaaf strong action lo.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Pehle toh mera FIR darj hua, police ne investigation ki, mujhe kitni baar thaaney bulaya, court ke chakkar katwaye. Fir police ne report file ki, aur court ne bhi us par sunwai shuru kar di. Main toh soch raha tha ki ab insaaf milega. Lekin Sir, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki jo judge sahab hain na, unhone toh bol diya hai ki yeh poora process hi galat tha! Meri FIR, police ki jaanch, aur court ka mamla lena, sab kuch rules ke khilaaf tha! Toh Sir, mera kya kasoor? Main itne din se jo pareshan ho raha tha, jo dhakke kha raha tha, uska kya? Jab sab galat tha, toh fir yeh sab kiya hi kyon gaya? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye aur meri pareshani ka hal.

Sir, dekho meri kya kismat hai. Maine toh poori umeed ke saath apni FIR darj karwai thi. Police ne bhi jaanch padtaal ki, report bhi court mein file ki. Mujhe laga ab toh insaaf mil jayega. Court ne bhi offence ka cognizance liya tha, sir! Lekin ab pata chal raha hai ki meri woh FIR, police ki woh investigation, aur court ka woh cognizance – sab kuch galat tareeke se hua hai. Rules ke bilkul khilaaf, provisions ke against! Socho, jiske liye itna bhaaga daudi ki, woh sab hi galat nikla. Meri toh duniya hi hil gayi hai, sir. Main toh bas insaaf chahta tha, par ab lag raha hai ki poora process hi faulty tha. Mujhe kya karna chahiye ab?

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, bilkul toot gaya hoon. Meri samajh nahi aa raha kya karu. Ek mamla chal raha tha mere khilaaf, ek FIR hui thi mere upar. Uske baad police ne poori jaanch ki, aur court mein bhi usko aage badhaya gaya. Hum toh bas ghooste rahe officeon ke chakkar, itna paisa laga, itni energy barbaad hui. Aur ab pata chala hai ki woh poora mamla, woh FIR, police ki jaanch, aur court ka jo decision tha, woh sab kanoon ke hisaab se galat tha! Rules ke khilaaf tha. Sir, yeh kya tareeka hai? Meri kya galti thi ismein? Jo log yeh sab galat kar rahe the, unki wajah se meri zindagi jhand ho gayi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please dekhiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi kharab ho gayi hai is case ke chakkar mein. Pehle toh mere khilaaf woh galat FIR darj karwa di gayi, pata nahi kis kanoon ke hisaab se! Phir police ne bhi jaanch theek se nahi ki, sab galat tareeke se kiya gaya. Mujhe toh laga court se insaaf milega, par wahan bhi meri baat suni nahi gayi. Ab jaise pata chala hai ki yeh sab Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke khilaaf tha. Poore case mein koi niyam follow hi nahi kiya gaya! Main toh barbaad ho gaya Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Yeh sab jo hua hai, mere saath bahut galat hua hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Kitni mushkil se maine FIR karwai thi. Police ne poori investigation bhi ki, uski report bhi court mein daali. Mujhe laga ab toh insaaf milega, court ne bhi mere case ko dekha tha. Par ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki yeh sab galat tha? Matlab, jo FIR hui, jo police ne jaanch ki, aur jo court ne mera case aage badhaya, woh sab niyam ke khilaaf tha? Toh meri itni mehnat, itna time aur paisa, sab bekaar ho gaya kya? Agar process hi galat tha, toh mujhe kyon itna ghumaya gaya? Main toh aam aadmi hoon, mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha. Meri sunwai sahi se kyun nahi ho rahi?

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Yeh log jo mere pe case chala rahe the na, woh toh shuru se hi galat tha! Pehle woh FIR file ki, uski investigation hui police ne ki, aur phir court ne bhi uspar action le liya. Ab pata chala hai ki ek bade judge saab ne khud bola hai ki yeh sab kuch, woh FIR, police ki jaanch, aur court ka usko recognize karna, sab ka sab kanoon ke khilaaf tha. Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke rules toh follow hi nahi kiye gaye! Matlab, pura case hi ulta-seedha tha. Sir, main toh bas yahi kehna chahta hu ki jab pura process hi galat tha, toh mujhe kyun itna pareshan kiya gaya? Mujhe insaaf chahiye isme.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai ki kya chal raha hai mere case mein. Meri ek FIR hui thi yahan, poori jaanch bhi ki thi police ne. Phir court mein report bhi gayi aur court ne uspar action bhi liya tha. Main soch raha tha ki chalo, ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin abhi-abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki ek bade judge sahib ne kaha hai ki yeh saari cheezein — meri FIR, police ki woh jaanch, aur court ka jo action tha — sab galat tha. Bol rahe hain ki yeh sab niyam ke khilaf hua hai, Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke hisaab se nahi tha. Sir, main itne chakkar lagaaye, itna pareshan hua, aur ab pata chal raha hai ki sab bekar tha? Meri toh ummeed hi toot gayi hai. Kya matlab hai iska? Mera case ab kya hoga? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is case mein. Pehle toh badi mushkil se meri FIR darj hui, maine socha ab insaaf milega. Police ne jaanch bhi ki, apni report bhi bana di aur court mein pesh ki. Adalat ne bhi us par sunwai shuru kar di thi. Par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki yeh sab kuch galat tareeke se hua hai, niyam-kanoon ke bilkul khilaaf tha! Meri FIR, police ki jaanch, aur court ne bhi jo us par notice liya, sab kuch galat niyam se hua hai. Pura process hi shuru se galat hai, Sir! Meri toh samajh nahi aa raha main ab kya karu. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main kitne din se pareshan hoon. Mere khilaaf ek FIR file hui thi, aur uski jaanch bhi hui. Phir police ne report bhi jama kar di. Aur court ne bhi us case ko aage badha diya, sir. Mujhe toh tab se hi lag raha tha ki kuch toh galat ho raha hai, mere saath. Ab toh judge sahab ne bhi keh diya hai ki yeh jo FIR hui, yeh jo investigation police ne ki, aur jo court ne isko aage badhaya, yeh sab kanoon ke hisaab se galat tha. Unhone bola ki Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke rules ke against tha. Matlab, poora process hi galat tha! Sir, yeh toh seedhe-seedhe mujhe phansane ki koshish thi, aur woh bhi galat tareeke se. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai is galat case ki wajah se.

Sir, main kitna pareshaan hoon, aap soch bhi nahi sakte! Mere khilaaf jo FIR hui thi na, aur uske baad jo police ne jaanch ki, woh sab galat tareeke se hua hai. Abhi-abhi mere vakeel ne bataya ki judge sahab ne khud kaha hai ki Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke saare niyam tode gaye hain. Unhone bola ki meri FIR file karne se leke, police ki inquiry tak, aur court ne bhi jo mere case ka 'cognizance' liya, woh sab 'contrary to provisions' tha. Matlab, poora process hi illegal tha, Sir! Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is wajah se. Jab shuru se hi sab galat tha, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Please meri suniye aur kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon, mere saath bohot badi na-insaafi hui hai. Jo case mujhpe bana, woh shuru se hi galat tha! Meri jo FIR hui, police ne jo jaanch-padtaal ki, aur phir court ne jo case aage badhaya, Judge sahab ne khud kaha hai ki yeh sab Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke kaanunon ke khilaaf tha. Poora tareeka hi galat tha, sir! Mujhe itni takleef hui hai is wajah se. Ab jab court ne hi bol diya hai ki sab kuch niyam ke khilaaf tha, toh ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh toh seedha-seedha dhokha hai.

Sir, main bas yahi kehne aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi in sab chakkar mein. Pehle ek FIR hui mere khilaaf, jiske baad police ne investigation ki aur ek report bana di. Aur phir court ne bhi uss case ko aage badha diya, unhone cognizance le li! Mujhe laga tha ki sab kuch theek se ho raha hai, kanoon ke hisaab se. Par ab, ek bade judge sahib ne bola hai ki yeh jo FIR hui, police ki jaanch, aur court ka case lena... yeh sab kuch kanoon ke khilaaf tha! Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke provisions ke against tha. Matlab, poora process hi galat tha! Mujhe bewajah itni takleef di gayi, Sir. Meri kya galti thi? Aise kaise chalega? Main ab kya karoon, bataiye?

Daroga Ji, main aapke paas apni ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Maine ek case file kiya tha, uski FIR bhi hui thi. Police ne *proper* investigation bhi ki aur report bhi court mein jama ki. Court ne bhi uss pe *cognizance* leke case aage badhaya tha. Par ab judge sahab ne kaha hai ki mera poora FIR, police ki investigation aur jo *cognizance* court ne liya tha, woh sab *rules* ke *contrary* tha. Matlab, poora process hi galat tha! Mere itne saal waste ho gaye, itna paisa laga. Maine toh socha tha mujhe insaaf milega, par yeh kya ho gaya? Poori kaarwai hi galat nikli kanoon ke hisaab se. Ab main kya karoon, Sir? Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Jab se woh mamla hua tha, maine kitni mushkil se FIR karwai thi. Police waalon ne investigation bhi ki, report bhi banai aur court mein jama kar di. Mujhe laga ab toh insaaf milega. Court ne bhi case aage badhaya, sunwai shuru hui. Par ab pata chal raha hai ki yeh sab galat tha, poora process hi rules ke khilaaf tha. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri FIR, police ki jaanch, court ka decision – sab kuch galat tha? Toh phir main kahan jaun? Meri toh puri mehnat aur umeed bekaar ho gayi. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai ki mere saath yeh kya ho raha hai. Please, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Jo mera case chal raha tha na, abhi Judge sahib ne bola hai ki jo poori investigation hui thi, meri jo FIR darj hui thi, aur uske baad court ne jo action liya, woh sab rules ke khilaaf tha, galat tareeke se hua tha. Socho Sir, itne time se main dhakke kha raha hoon, police ne investigation ki, report bhi banayi, aur ab pata chal raha hai ki sab kuch galat hi tha. Meri toh samajh mein nahi aa raha, kya karoon main ab? Mera insaaf toh atka pada hai. Aap hi batao, jab poora system hi galat tareeke se chalega toh hum jaise aam log kahan jayenge? Mujhe help chahiye, Sir. Meri suno please.

Sir, main yahan aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath bohot galat hua hai. Meri life puri kharab ho gayi hai is jhoote case ki wajah se. Pehle police ne mere khilaaf FIR darj ki, phir bina kisi baat ke investigation bhi kar di. Uske baad, court ne bhi us case ko aage badhaya aur mujhe chakkar katne pade. Abhi-abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki jo judge sahab ne decide kiya hai, uske mutabik, mere khilaaf jo FIR hui thi, police ki jo jaanch thi, aur court ne jo notice liya tha, woh sab rules ke khilaaf tha. Unhone khud bola hai ki Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke hisaab se yeh sab galat tareeke se hua hai. Toh Sir, jab sab kuch galat hi tha, toh main kyun suffer kar raha hoon? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, dekhiye na, meri to kismat hi kharab hai. Main kitne time se yahan chakkar kaat raha hoon, aur abhi judge sahab ne bola hai ki jo meri FIR hui thi, uski jaanch (investigation) hui, aur court ne bhi jo mera case dekha tha, woh sab galat tareeke se hua hai. Unhone kaha ki Cr.P.C. aur MMDR Act ke hisaab se yeh sab provisions ke against tha. Matlab, jo police ne investigation ki, aur jo court ne mere case ko dekha, woh sab shuru se hi galat tha. Toh ab mera kya hoga? Meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is chakkar mein. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, saab. Jab sab galat tareeke se hua hai, toh iska hal kya hai? Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Qadir hoon, Chuttan ka beta. Meri suno na, mere ghar mein chori ho gayi hai, saab! D-121, Gali no. 3, Noore lahi, Bhajan Pura mein rehta hoon main. Kal raat, 14.04.2003 se 15.04.2003 ke beech, jab hum ghar pe nahi the, kisi anjaan aadmi ne mere ghar ke taale tod diye, Sir. Ander ghus kar saara saamaan idhar-udhar kar diya. Aur mera sab kuchh, meri biwi ke gehne, woh Jhumar, Tika, Jhumka, sab chura ke le gaye, saab. Meri saari zindagi ki kamayi thi woh! Ab main kya karoon? Kripya meri madad kijiye aur un choron ko pakdiye!

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitni pareshaan hoon. Meri toh saari zindagi is case mein ulajh gayi hai. Woh jo A-1 aur A-2 hain na, jinke khilaaf maine 2011 mein Jubilee Hills police station mein Cr.No. 250/2011 darj karwaya tha... unhone mere ghar mein ghuskar tod-phod ki thi aur chori bhi ki thi (Sections 448, 427, 380 IPC waale case ki baat kar rahi hoon). Ab yeh log court mein Section 482 Cr.P.C. ke under petition daal rahe hain, kehte hain ki mera case hi quash kar do! Matlab, itne saal se main insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon, aur ab woh chahte hain ki unka case hi khatam ho jaaye? Main khud court mein jaakar lad rahi hoon. Sir, yeh bahut galat hai. Unhone jo kiya uski saza milni chahiye. Mera case band mat hone dijiye, please.

Sir, dekho na, yeh kya ho raha hai mere saath? Mera case toh 2015 se chal raha hai, itne saal ho gaye. Abhi pata chala hai ki woh saamne wali party, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, unhone apni appeal file karne mein 172 din ki der kar di thi. Poore 172 din, Sir! Aur ab court bol raha hai ki 'chalo theek hai, maaf kiya', unki der ko maaf kar diya gaya hai. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai, Sir? Hum jaiso ki agar ek din ki bhi der ho jaaye toh pata nahi kya-kya bol dete hain. Aur woh itni badi galti karte hain, toh unhe maaf kar diya jaata hai? Meri toh umeed hi toot rahi hai. Mujhe lagta hai yeh log jaan-boojh kar der karte hain taaki main thak haar jaaun. Sir, please meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Isme meri kya galti hai?

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyuki meri zindagi in Madan Lal Madaan, Ritu Madaan aur Pramod Rana ne bilkul barbaad kar di hai. In teeno ne milkar mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus kar saara samaan chura liya. Mujhe dhoka diya, mere paise hadap liye. Jhoothe kagaz banaye, unko asli bolkar use bhi kiya. Aur jab maine protest kiya, toh mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di. Sir, yeh log bahot dangerous hain. Inki wajah se main 1996 se pareshan hoon, tab Vikas Puri police station mein FIR (No. 547/1996) bhi hui thi. Ab yeh trial face kar rahe hain, inko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri suniye Sir, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main wohi Apoorv Gupta hoon, jiski FIR 505/2017 Timar Pur PS mein darj hui thi. Woh Ali Hasan aur uske saathiyon ka case chal raha hai na. Aaj main court mein gawaahi dene gaya tha. Meri jo cheezein chori hui thi na, woh sab maine pehchaan li, 'case property' bolte hain usko. Maine bola 'haan, yeh sab meri hi hain'. Par sir, jab un choron ko saamne laaye na, main unko identify hi nahi kar paaya. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha tha, sab kuch blur ho gaya. Pata nahi kaise yeh hua, main unko pehchaan hi nahi paaya. Ab kya hoga, meri to saari mehnat barbaad ho jaayegi? Mujhe bahut tension ho rahi hai!

Sir, main wohi banda hoon jiska scooter chori hua tha. UP 65 7047 number tha uska, yaad hai na? Bahut pareshaan tha main, sir. Achha hua ki police station mein hi mera scooter in choron se mil gaya. Haan, mujhe yaad hai, woh jo aapne papers pe sign karwaye the na, jaise woh WW2/D, aur phir personal search memo WW2/E aur F, sab pe mere hi dastakhat hain. Baad mein, meri gaadi mujhe superdari pe mil bhi gayi, shukar hai bhagwan ka. Aur haan, court mein maine un dono aaropiyon ko pehchan liya. Wohi log the, sir, jinhone meri mehnat ki kamai churaane ki koshish ki thi.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh dono accused shuru se bolte the ki unko galat phansaya gaya hai, sab jhooth! Aur phir jab case final arguments par aaya, toh dono bhaag gaye, sir! 24 May 2012 ko unko absconder declare kar diya tha. Socho kitne saal beet gaye, mujhe laga mera insaaf toh kabhi hoga hi nahi. Ab jakar, pichle saal 26 December ko, ek accused Sunny @ Naveen pakda gaya hai. Uske khilaaf naya charge-sheet file hua hai. Sir, itne saal ho gaye hain, ab toh mujhe insaaf dilwa do, please.

Sir, main Shabana Naaz, aapko yeh batane aayi hoon ki mere papa ne na, 1987 mein ek dukaan li thi. Ye North Ghonda mein, C-118, Gali no. 20 mein ground floor pe hai. Humne Khalil Ahmad se pagdi pe li thi sir, poore bees hazaar rupaye diye the us waqt. Aap sochiye, tab bees hazaar kitni badi rakam thi! Aur tab se hum usme bakery chala rahe hain. Poore 36 saal ho gaye, yahi hamara rozi-roti ka zariya hai. Ab pata nahi kya ho raha hai, humein bahut pareshaan kiya ja raha hai us dukaan ke liye. Meri to yahi guzaarish hai ki aap hamari suno aur madad karo.

Sir, main Bhushan Kumar Sharma hoon. Meri complaint hai, ji. Kya bataun sir, raat ko meri neend ud gayi. Woh 8/9 April ki raat thi, kareeb subah ke 4-5 baje honge. Main apne ghar F-99, Gali no. 1, Subhash Vihar, Delhi mein so raha tha araam se. Achanak mujhe apne kamre ke darwaze se kuch awaaz sunai di. Ekdum se meri aankh khul gayi, sir. Maine socha kaun ho sakta hai itni subah? Darr ke mare main utha aur dheere se darwaza khola, toh dekha...

Sir, main Santosh Kumari hoon. Meri aapse haath jodkar vinti hai, main bahut pareshaan hoon. 2 January 1999 ki raat ko, meri property ka taale todkar Saira Bano andar ghus gayi. Mujhe agle din subah, 3 January ko pata chala jab main wahan gayi. Sir, pehle hi mera ek aur ghar SDM Seelampur ne 22 December 1998 ko seal karwa diya tha. Meri to kismat hi kharab hai, upar se ab Saira Bano ne meri is property par bhi kabza karne ki koshish ki hai. Usne bina kisi ijazat ke seedhe mera lock toda aur ghus gayi. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main Vinod Kumar, bahut mushkil mein hoon. Woh log... unhone meri dukaan loot li! Sara cash, jo din bhar ki kamai thi, sab cheen ke le gaye. Aur Sir, meri beti ko bhi nahi chhoda, uske saath badtameezi ki, uski izzat pe haath daala. Maine rokne ki koshish ki toh mujhe dhakke diye, jaan se maarne ki dhamki di. Unke paas hathiyar bhi the, talwar jaisa kuch dikhaya tha. Main unke khilaf complaint likhwana chahta hoon. Meri saari mehnat barbaad kar di Sir. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri suniye, mere ghar mein bahut badi chori ho gayi hai! Main aapke paas complain karne aayi hoon. Ye pichle saal 4 September 2017 ki baat hai, din mein 11:30 se 11:55 ke beech. Humara ghar hai New Gopal Nagar, Najafgarh mein, House no. 99A, Gali no. 31, MD Road par. Koi chor chupke se mere ghar mein ghusa aur humara saara kimti samaan le gaya. Meri 30 gram ki sone ki chain, mere jhumke, maathe ka tikka, do aur sone ki chain 35 gram ki, mere pati ki 5 gram ki sone ki angoothi, meri teen ladies angoothiyan 15 gram ki, aath jod chaandi ki payal, aur humara music system, sab kuch chura le gaye. Sir, mera to bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Jin logo ne mere saath itna galat kiya, unko court ne saaf-saaf chhod diya! Mujhe laga tha ki ab toh insaaf milega, par yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Itne saal mera case chala, itne dhakke khaye, maine kitni umeed lagayi thi. Aur end mein? Dono mujrimo ko ba-izzat bari kar diya. Saboot the, gawah the, phir bhi? Aur Sir, yeh toh aur bhi ajeeb baat hai, ki faisle ki tareekh 15.05.2025 likhi hai. Woh date toh abhi aayi hi nahi! Kya matlab hai iska? Kya sab kuch pehle se hi fix tha? Sir, meri toh himmat toot gayi hai. Yeh mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha, main ab kahan jaun? Please Sir, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske ghar chori hui thi. Aapko yaad hai na, meri statement record hui thi, aur E-FIR bhi karwayi thi, number tha 1148/2018. Police wale aaye the, meri maujoodgi mein poori jagah ka naksha bhi banaya tha. Phir, 22 November 2018 ko main Tis Hazari Court bhi gayi thi. Wahan TIP (Test Identification Parade) hua tha, aur maine apni chori hui cheez (case property P-1) ko sahi-sahi pehchan liya tha. Woh darwaze ka toota hua tala (P-2) bhi mera hi tha, usko bhi identify kiya tha maine. Mera toota hua tala toh police ne jama bhi karwaya tha 12 November ko. Sir, bas ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, kab tak aise darti rahungi?

Sir, suniye meri baat, please. Mera toh dil baitha ja raha hai. Woh gunehgar, jiske wajah se meri yeh haalat hui hai, usko toh dekho! Ct. Kamal usko bade aaram se GTB hospital leke gaye the, uska pura ilaaj karwaya, dawaiyan dilwai, aur fir wapas le aaye. Jaise koi bada mehmaan ho, VIP treatment! Aur main yahan baithi hoon, meri toh kisi ne suni hi nahi. Usne mujhpe itna zulm kiya, aur ab usko hospital mein sab suvidha mil rahi hai? Yeh kaisa insaaf hai, sir? Mujhe toh darr lag raha hai ki woh fir se bahar aake kuch aur na kar de mere saath. Aap kuch toh karo sir, please. Uska toh pura khayal rakha ja raha hai, aur meri takleef ka kya?

Sir, meri suno toh sahi, mera bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai. Yeh 20 January 2007 ki baat hai, dopahar ke theek 2 baje, jab mere shop/dukaan (H. No. 4/2273, Gali No. 3, Bihari Colony, Shahdara) mein, jo Farsh Bazar PS ke area mein aata hai, chaar log zabardasti ghus gaye the. Meri dukaan mein jo bhi saamaan pada tha, woh sab chura liya. Socho, din-dahaade meri mehnat ki kamai chori ho gayi. Mujhe toh pata chala hai ki un charon mein se ek, jiska naam Bhagat hai, uske paas se mera chori ka saamaan mila bhi hai. Sir, ab aap hi batao, mujhe insaaf kab milega? In sab choron ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri bas yahi report hai.

सर, मैं रामू, Matiala gaon se aaya hoon. Meri rickshaw ki chori ka case chal raha hai na? Yaad hai na aapko, plot no. 30/3 ke paas se, mere ghar ke bilkul saamne se, subah 7 baje koi meri rickshaw utha ke le gaya tha? Meri toh rozi-roti hai woh! Kitna pareshan hua main us din se. Aap logon ne investigation ki, us chor ke khilaaf charge sheet bhi file hui. Court se usko summon bhi gaya, aur woh hazir bhi hua tha. Maine suna hai usko CrPC ke hisaab se saare documents bhi diye gaye hain. Aur ab toh us par Section 380 aur 411 IPC ke तहत charges bhi lag gaye hain. Sir, itna sab ho gaya hai, par meri rickshaw kab milegi? Bas yahi fikar lagi rehti hai, mera toh bahut nuksaan hua hai.

Sir, main Balram hoon, Old Kondli, Harizan Basti se. Meri suniye please. Das January do hazaar bees ko, shaam ke theek 4 bajkar 10 minute par, mere ghar ke chauthe floor par, F-Block mein, ek anjaan aadmi chhup kar ghus gaya. Mujhe pata hi nahi chala kab aur kaise woh mere ghar mein andar aa gaya. Sir, mere bina permission ke, seedhi ghar mein ghuspaith ki hai usne! Hum apne ghar mein bhi safe nahi hain toh kahan jayenge? Main aur meri family us din bahut darr gaye the. Meri privacy tooti hai, mere ghar ki security ka sawal hai. Us aadmi ke khilaaf kadi karwai honi chahiye, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, Dwarka North police station mein, FIR No. 169/2017. Yaad hai? Manoj Singh Rawat aur Dinesh Yadav ne milkar meri chori ki thi, mera sab kuch loot liya tha. Aur woh Naresh Kumar bhi tha, jisne mera chori ka saaman khareeda tha. In sabka case abhi bhi court mein chal raha hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, Sir! Meri poori zindagi ki kamai thi woh, bahut mehnat se banaya tha sab kuch. In logon ne meri zindagi kharab kar di. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki mujhe insaaf kab milega. Sir, please, kuch toh kariye, main bahut umeed se aaya hoon.

Sir, main C-302, Sangmitra Apartment mein rehta/rehti hoon. Meri toh neend haram ho gayi hai us raat se. 29 February ko, subah-subah, kareeb 3:58 se 4:24 ke beech, koi mere ghar mein ghus aaya. Darwaza tod kar, main so raha/rahi thi aur usne mera saara keemti samaan chura liya. Mera toh pura ghar ulat-pulat kar diya tha us chor ne. Jo meri poori zindagi ki kamai thi, sab loot li. Baad mein pata chala ki Vinod Kumar @ Kali naam ka aadmi tha woh. Uske paas se mera thoda samaan mila bhi hai. Sir, main bas yahi chahti hoon ki usko uske kiye ki saza mile. Meri toh poori himmat toot gayi hai. Is FIR No. 80021253/2024 ke case mein, meri yahi darkhwast hai ki mujhe insaaf mile.

Sir, main Ramvati Devi hoon. Meri suniye please, bahut pareshaan hoon main. Pichle saal, 27 December 2022 ki shaam, kareeb 6:15 baje, mere ghar mein ghus kar chori hui thi. Wo mera Plot No. 19/20, Patel Garden, Kakrola mein, Ravi Nursing Home ke paas. Sir, Nitin Rajput ne hi ki thi ye harkat, mera saara zaroori samaan chura liya tha. Meri saari savings, mere zewar, sab kuch le gaya woh kameena. Dwarka North police station mein FIR bhi karwai thi, number 855/2022. Ab case chal raha hai, mujhe bas mera samaan wapas chahiye aur usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Kaise koi itna loot sakta hai kisi ko? Meri to neend ud gayi hai, sahib.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere saath aaj shaam ko bohot galat hua hai. Main abhi kareeb 6:30 baje apne ghar ja rahi thi, Timarpur area mein. Tabhi woh Manish @ Mange aur uska ek aur dost, unhone mujhe rok liya. Pehle toh unhone gande-gande comments pass kiye, jo main aapko bata bhi nahi sakti. Main unhe ignore kar rahi thi, par woh picha nahi chhod rahe the. Phir jab main tezi se chalne lagi, toh Manish ne mera haath pakad liya. Main bohot dar gayi thi, sir. Meri cheekh nikal gayi. Kisi tarah main wahan se bhaagi aur seedhe yahan police station aayi hoon. Sir, mujhe unse bohot khatra hai. Please meri madad kijiye, unke khilaaf sakht action lijiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske yahan se pichle hafte bijli ke taar chori ho gaye the. Meri toh poori raat ki neend udd gayi thi, saab. Mujhe laga ab kuch nahi milega. Lekin bahut shukriya aapki police ka. Aaj mujhe pata chala ki aapke jawano ne Manish @ Kamal ko pakad liya hai aur usse Gandhi Vihar Police Chowki le aaye hain. Shukar hai Bhagwan ka, chor pakda toh gaya! Lekin Sir, mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki woh wahan police ko koi electric wires ka bill dikha raha hai. Bill? Kaisa bill? Woh sab jhooth bol raha hai, Sir. Woh saare taar mere the, mere ghar se chori hue the. Woh chor ab bill dikha kar bachne ki koshish kar raha hai. Meri aap se hath jod kar request hai, uski baat par bilkul bharosa mat karna. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main Surender Singh, aapko batane aaya hoon. Yeh 11 January 2005 ki subah ki baat hai. Main apni dairy se kaam khatam karke ghar wapas aaya, kareeb paune nau baje honge. Jaise hi ghar ke paas pahuncha toh meri aankhon ke saamne hi... Meri Atlas cycle! Ravi usko handle se pakde khada tha, aur uske saath Raj Kumar alias Raju aur ek aur ladka Raju alias Bablu, meri cycle ke carrier par ek peele rang ka plastic ka katta baandh rahe the. Matlab, din-dahaade mere ghar mein ghuskar chori kar rahe the! Mera saaman le ja rahe the. Saab, meri to izzat hi chali gayi. In logon ko pakdo, ye bahut badmash log hain!

Sir, meri baat suniye, yeh Karkardooma Court ka mamla hai. Baat 8 December 2010 ki hai, shaam ke 5:15 baje. Humara jo AC Plant hai, C-Block, second floor par, wahan ek aadmi chhup kar ghus gaya. Sir, woh jagah hum property ki custody ke liye use karte hain, wahan zaroori samaan rakha hota hai. Usne wahan se chori karne ki koshish ki! Socho Sir, agar woh chori ho jaati toh kya hota? Court ke andar, aise koi kaise ghus sakta hai? Mujhe toh darr lag gaya tha. Kripya karke is mamle mein sakht action lijiye aur us aadmi ko pakdiye, Sir. Aisi himmat kaise hui uski!

Sir, main Kali Charan hoon. Aaj, yaani 6 February 2009 ki dopahar mein, kareeb 12 baje, maine us Arif @ Uvash ko apne ghar se bahar aate dekha. Uske haath mein ek bag tha, aur mujhe us par bahut ganda shaq hua. Mera dil baith gaya, Sir! Maine turant awaz lagayi, aur apne dost Bijender aur do-chaar public walon ki madad se use wahin pakad liya. Meri cheezein chori kar raha tha woh, mere ghar se! Yeh meri saari mehnat ki kamai hai, Sir. Aise koi kaise kar sakta hai? Aap please meri madad karo, is mamle ki theek se jaanch karwao aur isko saza dilwao. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... woh din tha 27 May 2010 ka, shaam ke the 5:15 baje. Main apne ghar pe hi thi, tabhi meri nazar padi toh dekha ki do jawan ladke, lagbhag 20-22 saal ke honge, mere ghar mein ghus gaye the. Unhone mere pichle darwaje ka tala tod diya tha, Sir!
