Meri toh saansein hi ruk gayi thi yeh dekhkar. Main zor se chillayi, 'Chor! Chor!' Meri awaaz sunkar society ke security guards turant daudte hue aaye. Unhone ek ladke ko toh pakad liya, jiska naam Roshan Massi bataya ja raha hai, lekin Sir, doosra wala meri aankhon ke saamne se hi bhaag gaya! Mere ghar mein chori ho rahi thi, Sir, aur main kuch nahi kar paayi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main Sadiq Nagar, Sector-I, House No. 334 mein rehti hoon. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi parson! 19.01.2018 ko dopahar 1:15 baje ke kareeb, main ghar wapas aayi toh dekha Rajender naam ka aadmi, apne do aur saathi ke saath, mera ghar todkar andar ghusa hua tha. Meri aankhon ke saamne mere gehne, meri ghadi, aur meri jacket chura raha tha! Main usse dekhkar zor se chillayi. Woh bhaagne ki koshish karne laga, lekin maine aur aas-pados walon ne use wahin pakad liya. Sahab, yeh toh seedhi-seedhi chori aur ghar-todne ka mamla hai. Meri cheezein wapas dilwao aur us Rajender par sakht se sakht kaarwai karo! Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main Janak Puri se aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, 29 July 2015 ki shaam ko kareeb 7:50 baje, meri dukaan ke cash counter se Rs. 25,000/- chori ho gaye the. Meri dukaan hai na, Shop No. 8/5, Chhoti Sabzi Mandi mein. Woh ek ladka tha, blue T-shirt pehne hue. Us waqt toh woh bhaag gaya tha, meri poori mehnat ki kamai thi woh, sir! Maine tabhi aapko CCTV footage ki CD bhi di thi. Aur abhi dekho, sir, 15 September 2015 ko, public ne usko pakad liya hai! Main wahi tha, sir, maine pehchan liya, ye wahi chor hai! Please, ab toh usko pakad ke rakho, meri saari mehnat wapas dilwao, sir.

Sir, main Anjal shop ka owner hoon. Meri shop se chori ho gayi hai, sir! Pata nahi kya zamaana aa gaya hai. Pichli raat, 23 February 2014 ko, raat ke kareeb 10:30 baje, meri dukan se ek brand new Geneses Z9, Ferrari model ka mobile phone chori ho gaya. Itna mehnga phone tha, meri saari kamaai usme lagi thi. Maine ek bande ko dekha tha us samay shop ke paas. Usne hi churaya hai, sir. Meri to poori rozi-roti ka sawal hai. Main Patel Nagar police station mein aaya hoon, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe mera phone wapas chahiye aur us chor ko saza milni chahiye. Bohot nuksaan ho gaya hai mera, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshaan hokar aaya hoon. Meri company ke jo important documents the, woh 1 se 28 tak ke, unki chori hui thi aur unko galat tareeke se use kiya gaya. Humne toh unke khilaf Sections 379, 403, 411 IPC aur 120-B IPC ke under ek proper complaint file ki thi. Socha tha, ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin, Sir, Kolkata High Court ne 15 May 2015 ko meri woh poori complaint hi quash kar di, radd kar di. Mera toh poora case hi khatam kar diya unhone! Ab bataiye, jiske documents chori hue, jiske saath itna bada dhokha hua, usko insaaf kaise milega? Main toh bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe nyay mile aur meri complaint ko phir se dekha jaaye. Yeh toh bahut galat ho raha hai mere saath, Sir.

Sir, main Sanatan Dharam Mandir se aaya hoon. Kal raat hamare mandir mein bohot bada anarth ho gaya, Darogaji. Paschim Vihar ke Bhera Enclave mein jo Sanatan Dharam Mandir hai, wahan kal raat 10 aur 11 September 2007 ke beech, koi chor ghus gaya. Subah uth ke dekha toh mandir ka saara samaan gayab! Meri toh rooh kaanp gayi. Vo kameene chor, raat 12:30 se subah 5 baje ke beech, mandir ke 8 chattra, 5 mukut, ek chandi ka chand, ek sone ki nath, aur bhi kitni saari silver-coated gold polish ki cheezein, aur jo thoda cash tha, sab kuch le gaye. Yeh sirf samaan nahi, Sir, yeh toh humare Bhagwan ka apmaan hai, humari shradha chura li unhone. Kripya karke, un choron ko pakdo aur humara pavitra samaan wapas dilao. Bade dukhi hain hum.

Sir, main Ramesh Kumar. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir! Maine apni zameen ke liye appeal ki hai, main Appellant hoon. Lekin yeh log, jinke khilaaf maine case kiya hai (respondents), unke vakil Mr. Ramesh Sharma aur Mr. P.M. Negi, mujhe bahut pareshan kar rahe hain. Court mein to case chal raha hai, par yeh log bahar se bhi dhamkiyan de rahe hain. Bolte hain case waapas le lo. Main ek gareeb aadmi hoon, sir, kahan jaaun? Meri to koi sunwai bhi nahi ho rahi theek se. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap hi kuch karo, meri toh koi nahi sun raha.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera case court mein chal raha tha, jahan Judge Susmita Phukan Khaund aur Judge Budi Habung the. Meri taraf se Mr. Tabit Tapak, woh mere advocate the. Aur state ki taraf se Mr. Gyati Tado the. Sunwai thi 18 November 2025 ko, usi din judgment reserve ho gaya tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki judgment 09 January ko aaya hai, lekin poora saal nahi likha hai, Sir! Pata nahi kya hua, kya insaaf mila mujhe ya nahi? Itne saal ho gaye, ab tak bas dates hi mil rahi hain. Meri madad kijiye, please.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Main bohut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh jaan nikal rahi hai. Peeche, Shivamogga ke Sagar mein jo Adalat hai na, wahaan 28 September 2018 ko mere haq mein ek faisla aaya tha. Itne saal ho gaye the, badi mushkil se mujhe thoda insaaf mila tha, Sir. Mujhe laga ab meri mushkilein khatam ho jayengi. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh saamne wale log, unhone toh Karnataka High Court mein phir se appeal kar di hai. Woh chahte hain ki jo faisla mere haq mein aaya tha, woh sab radd ho jaaye. Kya fayda hua phir itni ladai ka, Sir? Main gareeb aadmi, kahan tak ladta rahunga? Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki mera woh purana faisla barkarar rahe. Aap meri madad kijiye, Sir. Meri sunwai toh karwaiye.

Sir, main aapko apni pareshaani batane aaya hoon. Kitne saalon se main cases ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, mujhe toh insaaf mil hi nahi raha. Ab toh maine yeh "Criminal Revision Case" daala hai, bas yahi aakhri umeed hai. Pehle kya hua tha na, meri ek "Criminal Appeal No. 206 of 2012" thi. Wo Narsapur ke Additional District and Sessions Judge saahab ke paas thi. Unhone 1 February 2013 ko ek "judgment" diya. Usmein unhone meri appeal dismiss kar di, aur woh pehle waala "C.C. No. 396" ka jo order tha, wahi pakka kar diya. Socho sir, meri baat suni hi nahi gayi. Main itna dukhi hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun, court mein jab hamare saboot dikhaye gaye the, toh woh accused number 1 se 3 waale bilkul saaf mana kar gaye. Unki taraf se toh koi gawah bhi nahi aaya, bas ek Ex.D.1 paper dikhaya tha. Meri toh rooh kaंप गई थी तब. Par, trial court ne sab sunkar, saare oral aur documentary evidence dekhkar, un teeno ko Section 392 IPC mein *convict* kar diya tha, saza bhi suna di thi! Meri thodi himmat aayi thi. Lekin sir, Accused number 4 se 6 waalon ko *acquitted* kar diya, unko chhod diya. Aur ab, jin logon ko saza mili thi na, woh log upar *appeal* kar rahe hain! Woh trial court ke faisle ko *challenge* kar rahe hain! Yeh kya mazak hai sir? Meri toh neend ud gayi hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus kar humse paise mange gaye, dhamki di gayi (extortion). Humne turant police mein complaint ki thi aur FIR bhi register hui thi, Sections 341, 323, 379, 506, 34 IPC ke तहत. Lekin Sir, mujhe lagta hai ki investigation theek se nahi ho rahi hai. Jin logon ne yeh sab kiya, woh sab abhi bhi bahar ghum rahe hain, unhe bail mil gayi hai. Mujhe aur mere parivar ko unse bahut darr lag raha hai. Humari jaan ko khatra hai. Please kuch kijiye, humein insaaf chahiye Sir. Humein lagta hai mamle ki jaanch achhe se nahi hui.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, meri complaint suniye. Ek chor ne mera saara samaan chura liya tha, Section 380 IPC ke under. Mujhe yaad hai, pehle Magistrate court mein, CC No.1154 of 2013 mein, usko saza mili thi 15.11.2014 ko. Court ne usko guilty maana tha aur 6 mahine ki jail aur fine bhi lagaaya tha. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Lekin Sir, ab us chor ne Metropolitan Sessions Judge ke paas appeal kar di thi, Crl.A. No.1129 of 2014 mein, aur ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se Revision Case mein gayi hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai? Jisne chori ki, jisko saza mili, woh phir se sab palatne ki koshish kar rahi hai? Meri kya galti thi? Mujhe darr lag raha hai, kahin woh bach na jaaye. Mujhe mera insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please dekhiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Aaj court mein jo hua na, 2 February 2023 ko, usse toh meri neend udd gayi hai. Jo mera criminal case chal raha hai na, CRL.M.C. 703/2023, uske khilaaf un logon ne petition daal di hai Section 482 mein. Matlab, woh log chahte hain ki mera poora case hi quash ho jaye, khatam ho jaye! Aur sabse badi baat, Sir, judge साहब ne unko exemptions bhi de di hain, bolte hain 'subject to just exceptions'. Aur unhe ek hafte ka time bhi mil gaya hai. Meri toh samajh mein nahi aa raha, Sir. Main insaaf ke liye lad raha hoon, aur woh log mere case ko hi band karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri toh saari mehnat barbaad ho jayegi. Sir, please, kuch kijiye, mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai.

Sir, main Gajendra Singh bol raha hoon. KEB Layout, 151 number ghar mein rehta hoon, Sanjaynagar, Bangalore mein. Meri madad kijiye, sir! Pichle mahine, 26 July ko, main apne parivaar ke saath gaon gaya tha. Ghar ko acche se lock karke gaya tha. Jab wapas aaya toh mera toh dimaag kharab ho gaya, ghar ka darwaja toota hua tha aur andar se sab kuch gayab tha! Meri poori zindagi ki kamai, jewellery, sab chori ho gaya, sir. Main bahut pareshan hoon, bahut darr gaya hoon. Koi aise kaise mere ghar mein ghus sakta hai? Sir, please un choron ko pakdiye aur mera samaan wapas dilwaiye. Bahut mushkil se banaya tha yeh ghar, ab toh darr lagta hai. Meri report likhiye, sir.

Sir, main Anantha Padmanabha hoon, P&T Colony, 2nd Cross, House No. 48, RT Nagar ka rehne wala. Meri ek complaint hai, sir. Puraani baat hai, 15 June 2016 ki shaam 5 baje ke aas-paas ki. Main thodi der ke liye walk pe gaya tha, ghar ka main darwaza lock karke. Jab wapas aaya toh dekha, mere ghar mein chori ho chuki thi! Saara samaan idhar-udhar pada tha. Woh do chor, jin pe aapne charge sheet banayi hai, woh mere ghar mein ghuse the aur mera keemti saaman chura ke le gaye. Meri itni mehnat ki kamai thi, sir. Section 380 IPC ke तहत unhe saza milni chahiye. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye aur mera chori hua samaan wapas chahiye. Bahut pareshan hoon main, sir.

Sir, main Sriram Chirping Woods Apartment ki site se aaya hoon, jahan construction chal raha hai. Ek bahut zaroori complaint hai meri. 12 October 2018 ko shaam ke kareeb 5:20 baje, hamaari site par char log ghus gaye. Pata hai kya chura rahe the? Electrical wires ke bade-bade bundles! Humare security guards ne jab dekha, toh himmat karke un sabko vahin, red-handed pakad liya. Socho Sir, kitna nuksaan hota agar woh bhaag jaate. Humne unhe pakad ke aapki police ko hand-over kar diya tha. Meri bas yahi request hai ki inke khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwai ho, taki aage koi aisi chori karne ki himmat na kare. Bahut tang karte hain yeh log humein.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera dimag kharab ho gaya hai! Meri biwi ka mangalya chain chori ho gaya tha. Ghar mein ghus ke, raat ke 2.15 baje, 16/17 January 2013 ko. Woh hamara sabse anmol cheez tha, sir. Humne kitna case ladha, C.C.No.5687/2013 mein. Lekin, sir, II ACMM, Bengaluru ke judge ne us chor ko 30 November 2016 ko acquittal de diya! Bari kar diya use! Ye to bilkul ghalat hai, sir. Hamare saath kitna bada anyay hua hai. Police ne appeal toh file ki hai, Cr.P.C. 378(1)(a) ke तहत, lekin mujhe darr lag raha hai. Kya hamein kabhi insaaf milega? Meri biwi aaj bhi uske liye roti hai. Sir, please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Kal dopahar ki baat hai, 3.50 se 4 baje ke beech mein, Lalbagh Road pe jo K.S. Garden hai, wahan mere ghar se... Accused No.1 ne mere cupboard ki chaabi uthayi aur mera saara sona chura liya. Meri poore zindagi ki kamai thi woh, sir! Woh mera sona leke, Accused No.2 ke ghar chala gaya aur phir dono wahan se gayab ho gaye. Yeh Accused No.1 aur Accused No.2, dono ne milke meri chori ki hai. Aur toh aur, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki unko bail bhi mil gayi hai? Sir, aise kaise chalega? Meri toh saari ummeed hi toot gayi hai. Please, in dono pe sakht se sakht karwai karo aur mera sona wapas dilao.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske ghar chori hui thi. Yaad hai, woh chor pakda bhi gaya tha? Kitne chakkar lagaye maine court ke, kitni baar statements diye. Maine socha tha ab insaaf milega, mera nuksaan pura hoga. Par abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki judge sahab ne uss chor ko Section 380 IPC waale case se hi bari kar diya hai! Matlab, meri chori ka kya? Woh aise hi free ho gaya? Uski toh bail bond bhi cancel ho gayi hai, matlab ab woh poora azaad hai. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai Sir? Meri sari mehnat ki kamai chori hui aur chor ko aise hi chhod diya. Mera toh poora bharosa uth gaya hai. Ab main kya karoon?

Sir, main Bharat. Mujhe ek complaint karni hai. Meri baat suniye please. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Pichle mahine, 26 October 2021 ko, subah 10 se 11 baje ke beech, mere ghar mein chori ho gayi. Mera ghar H.No. 2232, Shanker Gali, Bazar Sita Ram, Delhi mein hai. Hamara area PS Chandni Mahal ke under aata hai. Woh Yusuf naam ka ek aadmi hai na, usi ne mere ghar se saare mobile phones chura liye. Kitne zaroori documents the un phones mein, aur badi mushkil se liye the. Mera bahut bada nuksaan ho gaya hai, sir. Aap hi kuch kijiye, please us chor ko pakdo aur mera saamaan wapas dilwao. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main WZ-211, 2nd Floor, Basai mein rehta hoon. Pichli raat, 15 August 2023 ko, subah 3:30 se 4 baje ke beech, mere ghar mein chori hui hai, Sir! Hum sab family members so rahe the. Dinesh naam ka ek aadmi chupke se mere ghar ke andar ghus gaya. Usne mere ghar mein ghuspaith ki, aur mera bahut saara keemti samaan chura liya. Meri family bahut darr gayi hai, Sir. Hum bahut pareshan hain. Mujhe nahi pata ab kya karein. Kripya aap meri help kijiye, us Dinesh ko pakad kar mera samaan wapas dilwaiye aur usko saza dilwaiye. Meri jaan-maal ka khatra hai Sir, ab toh ghar mein bhi safe nahi feel karte.

Sir, main Shiv Basti se aaya hoon, 62/114 Rama Road. Meri suniye, pichli 13 October ko subah ke kareeb 3:10 baje, mere ghar mein chori ho gayi. Koi Rahul Pathak naam ka aadmi mere ghar mein ghus aaya, jab hum sab so rahe the. Usne ghar ka darwaza tod kar ya chhupke se ghuspaith ki aur mera mobile phone chura kar le gaya. Meri neend khuli toh dekha, sab kuch bikra pada tha aur phone gayab tha. Moti Nagar PS ki jurisdiction mein aata hai ye area. Sir, bahut darr gaya tha main, aur mera phone bhi chori ho gaya. Yeh seedhe-seedhe ghar mein ghus kar chori aur property damage ka mamla hai. Aap please action lijiye, mujhe mera phone wapas chahiye aur us chor ko saza milni chahiye. Mera bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai!

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aayi hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye! Wo Pappu hai na, jispar case chal raha hai, usne mere saath bahut bura kiya hai. Yaad hai, 15 April 2015 ko shaam ke 4:20 baje, mere H.No. mein ghus kar taale tode the. Usne mere saari savings aur keemti samaan chura liya tha. Meri poori zindagi ki mehnat thi woh, ek jhatke mein sab khatam kar diya. Police ne baad mein chori ka samaan uske paas se hi pakda tha. Ab court mein case chal raha hai, Section 454, 380, 411 IPC ke तहत. Sir, main bas itna chahti hoon ki us Pappu ko uske kiye ki saza mile. Aise choron ko bilkul maaf nahi karna chahiye. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, usko kadi saza dilwaiye.

Sir, main Raksha Arora, BF-27, Tagore Garden se aayi hoon. Meri baat suno please. Kya karun, kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Pichhle 20 saal se, jabse divorce hua hai, main aur meri beti Smita yahin reh rahe hain. Meri Smita ne kitni mushkil se padhai ki hai, LLB kiya aur ab Civil Judge ban gayi hai. Hamare paas toh bas woh char properties hain jo humein virasat mein mili thi. Ab kuch log unpe kabza karna chahte hain, humein bahut pareshan kar rahe hain. Hum aurat-beti akeli hain, sir. Koi sunne wala nahi. Woh log humein dhamkiyan bhi de rahe hain. Meri beti ka future, meri puri zindagi daav par hai. Hamari madad kijiye, police investigation karwaiye, please!

Sir, main Sudarshan Park, H.No. E-10, First Floor se bol raha hoon. Meri suniye please. Pichle saal, 23 August 2023 ko subah 6:30 baje ke aas paas, mera ghar tod kar ek aadmi ghus gaya. Daroga ji, woh Pawan naam ka shaks mere ghar mein ghusa, saara samaan chura ke le gaya. Moti Nagar PS ki jurisdiction mein yeh sab hua hai. Sochiye, subah ke time koi aise ghus ke chori kar le! Meri toh neend udd gayi hai us din se. Woh mere ghar mein 'lurking house trespass' aur 'house breaking' karke 'theft' kar gaya. Section 454, 380 aur 411 IPC ke tehat us par case chal raha hai, par Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Usne mera ghar, meri safety, sab barbaad kar diya. Please usko sakht se sakht saza dilwao.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, mere saath kya hua hai. Woh Ram, jise log Rahul ya Lukka bhi kehte hain, Suresh ka beta... usne meri zindagi barbad kar di! 8 aur 9 July 2023 ki beech wali raat ko, kareeb 11:04 PM se subah 5:30 AM tak, mere hi ghar mein, usne... pata nahi main kaise bataun, Sir. Meri neend haram ho gayi hai. Uske khilaf jo case chal raha hai, usmein usko saza milni chahiye. Yeh sab kuch mere apne ghar mein hua hai, Sir, jahan main safe feel karti thi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Libaspur se aaya hoon. Gali No. 4, Khasra No. 24/23. Sir, kal raat ki baat hai, 28/29 October ko, mere saath itni badi lootpat ho gayi. Main ghar pe tha, mere family members bhi the... unhone ghar mein ghus ke, darake dhamkake, sab kuch loot liya. Mera saara paisa, jewellery, jo kuch bhi tha... sab le gaye woh log. Hum itna darr gaye, sir, raat bhar so nahi paaye. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi! Maine Ct. Amit ji ko phone kiya tha tabhi. Woh aaye the aur ek aadmi ko pakda bhi hai, thank god. Par sir, mera nuksaan toh ho gaya na. Please help kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, meri FIR toh kab ki darj ho gayi thi. Police waalon ne bhi puri investigation ki thi, unhone saari jaanch padtaal ki. Phir chargesheet bhi laga di thi court mein. Judge sahab ne bhi case ko dekh liya, cognizance le li thi. Us badmash ko court se summon bhi gaya tha, aur woh aaya bhi tha haazir hone. Aur toh aur, usko meri chargesheet ki copy bhi de di hai. Saare documents uske paas hain ab. Toh ab kya hoga Sahab? Ab toh bas insaaf chahiye mujhe.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, bahut pareshan tha main. Meri jo FIR darj hui thi na, uske baad hamare investigating officer sahab ne badi mehnat ki. Mujhe yaad hai, 24 April 2018 ko, woh Tilak naam ka shaks pakda gaya. Aur jiske liye main itna ro raha tha, mera woh Iron Stand, woh uske paas se hi mila! Bhagwan ka shukra hai, aur police ka bhi, ki meri chori hui cheez wapas mil gayi. Ab toh uske khilaf chargesheet bhi file ho gayi hai aur court mein mamla aage badh raha hai. Bas sir, mujhe ab nyay chahiye, meri sunwai ho.

Sir, suno na ek baat hai. Main toh ab bahut darr gaya hoon. Hamare Mehrauli main market mein jo ICICI Bank ka ATM hai na, wahan ek chori karne ki koshish hui thi! Raat ke 2 baje ke kareeb, 8 July 2015 ko. Ek aadmi tha, Abdul Jafir naam ka, Abdul Malik ka beta. Usne ATM machine kholne ki koshish ki thi, cash churane ke liye. Socho sir, raat ke andhere mein kaun karta hai yeh sab! Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi sunkar. Hum jaiso ki mehnat ki kamai wahan rakhi hoti hai. Agar aise ATM hi safe nahi rahenge toh hum kahan jayenge? Meri aapse request hai, please kuch karo sir. Aise criminals ko saza milni chahiye. Hamare paise aur hamari safety bahut zaroori hai. Please dekho is mamle ko.

Sir, main Chatter Pal Singh hoon. Meri ek complaint hai. Hua yun sir, main 01.01.2001 ko Hathras gaya tha kuch zaroori kaam se. Jaane se pehle, maine apne quarter A-35, Police Colony, Bhajanpura ko theek se lock kiya tha. Mujhe kya pata tha ki mere saath aisa ho jayega. Jab main wapas aaya na sir, mera toh dimaag kharab ho gaya dekh ke. Lagta hai mere ghar mein ghuskar chori hui hai! Sab kuch ulat-pulat tha. Pata nahi kya-kya gayab hai. Aap please meri madad kijiye, sir, main toh bohot pareshan hoon. Mera toh sab kuch chori ho gaya.

Sir, main Anup Kumar Sinha, Ashok Kumar Sinha ka beta. Baat pichle saal 1 December 2021 ki hai. Mere Indian Overseas Bank, IP Extension, Madhu Vihar mein, ek aadmi ne chori karne ki koshish ki thi. Usne bank mein ghusne ki bhi himmat ki! Main toh darr hi gaya tha, Sir, meri puri mehnat ki kamayi thi wahan. Us din, jab humne inform kiya, toh SI Parkash Vir aur Constable Manoj turant aaye the. Maine unko poori baat batai thi. Ab suna hai ki woh chor pakda gaya hai aur us par court mein case chal raha hai. Meri bas yehi request hai, Sir, ki usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri taraf se yeh complain hai.

Sir, main aapko complaint karne aaya hoon. Yeh do log hain, Sunil Kumar s/o Mohan Lal, jo Madipur, J.J. Colony, Delhi se hai, aur Mahesh Khanna s/o Arjun Dev Khanna, jo Savitri Nagar, New Delhi se hai. Sir, inhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mere saare paise fraud karke le liye hain aur ab meri family ko bhi dhamki de rahe hain. Main bahut pareshan hoon, raat ko neend nahi aati. Har waqt darr lagta rehta hai. Yeh log bahut bade gunde hain, sir. Inhone mera jeena mushkil kar diya hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Please sir, meri madad kijiye.

Sir, aap suno meri baat! Mera toh poora life kharab kar diya hai usne. 01.06.2022 ko mere saath jo hua tha na, woh main kabhi bhool nahi sakti. Kitna time ho gaya, ek saal se upar! Aur woh kamina, court mein jaake bolta hai 'Not Guilty'! Kya matlab not guilty? Saboot the mere paas. Pura case chala, 13.07.2022 ko shuru hua tha. Main roj court ke chakkar kaat rahi thi. Aaj, 05.10.2023 ko, finally judgment sunaya gaya hai. Mujhe nahi pata kya hua, par mujhe lagta hai ki mujhe justice nahi mila hai, sir. Main bahut dukhi hoon, please meri madad karo.

Sahab, main Subhash Nagar Metro Station pe housekeeping mein kaam karta hoon. Pichli 8 July, 2021 ko, subah ke lagbhag 6 baje, main store room saaf karne gaya tha. Jaise hi wahan pahuncha, dekha toh store room ka tala toota hua tha, aur ek aadmi andar se bahar nikal raha tha! Uske kandhe pe ek plastic ka katta tha, jisme hamari welding machine, ek lohe ki chheni aur ek torch thi. Tala toota hua bhi wahin paas mein pada tha. Meri aankhon ke saamne woh chori kar raha tha, maine usko wahin pakad liya. Kitni himmat hai uski! Aap please ispe kadi se kadi karwayi karo.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kya hua hai. Woh raat thi 21/22 January 2013 ki, takreeban 12:30 baje. Main apne 78-A, Basant Nagar, Kishan Ganj wale ghar mein, jo tent banaya hua hai, usme so raha tha. Tabhi yeh Murtza, Ishrar ka beta, mere tent mein ghusne ki koshish kar raha tha. Chori karne aaya tha woh! Meri neend khul gayi aur maine use dekha toh meri jaan nikal gayi. Ekdum se darr gaya main. Yeh banda mere ghar mein chori karne ki koshish kar raha tha, sir. Aap please ispe kadi se kadi kaarwai karo. Gulabi Bagh PS ke under aata hai yeh area. Mujhe nyay chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun, mere saath toh bura haal ho gaya tha. Mera purse, paise, saare documents aur mobile phone chori ho gaya tha. Meri toh saansein hi ruk gayi thi! Bhagwaan ka shukr hai, kuch logo ki madad se humne Santosh @ Nepali aur Sunny @ Rahul ko pakad liya. Jab police aayi aur unhe le gayi, toh unke paas se mera chori hua purse, saare paise, documents, aur mera mobile phone bhi mil gaya. Mera toota hua tala aur ek screwdriver bhi mila unke paas se, jis se unhone chori ki thi. Police ne dono ko arrest kar liya hai. Aur haan, unhi ki batayi information par Sanjay Pandey naam ka ek aur aadmi bhi pakda gaya hai. Thank god, mera saara samaan wapas mil gaya.

Sir, main Shiv Kumar, ASI. Meri duty lagi thi 7 April 2018 ko, woh bhi poore din. Main subah se shaam tak, apni poori imaandaari aur lagan se apna farz nibha raha tha, jaise roz karta hoon. Koi galti nahi ki thi maine. Lekin sir, us din jo mere saath hua na, woh bahut galat tha. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki kaisa injustice hai yeh. Jab insaan apna kaam theek se kare, tab bhi usko aise pareshan kiya jaata hai? Main toh bas apna duty hours poore kar raha tha, aur ab yeh sab mere sir pe aa gaya. Meri toh raat ki neend ud gayi hai. Aap please meri help kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar aisa chalta raha toh.

Sir, main Nikhil Sareen bol raha hoon. Pata nahi kya karun, meri to duniya hi hil gayi hai. Pichle saal, 21 April 2022 ko subah 8:15 baje main apne kaam ke liye ghar se nikla tha. Kya pata tha ki mere peechhe se itna bada haadsa ho jayega! Jab wapas aaya toh dekha, mera ghar toota hua tha, saara samaan idhar-udhar pada tha. Meri zindagi bhar ki kamayi, meri mehnat ki cheezein chori ho gayi hain, Sir. Koi mere ghar mein ghus ke sab kuch le gaya. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Ye jo IPC 380, 454, 411 sections mein case chal raha hai, Patel Nagar PS mein meri FIR bhi hai 316/2022, ismein mujhe nyay chahiye. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe mera samaan wapas chahiye aur un choron ko saza milni chahiye. Meri to neend ud gayi hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mera toh dil toot gaya hai. Woh FIR No. 720/2009, jo Prashant Vihar police station mein mere saath chori hui thi, jisme mera saara samaan chura liya gaya tha... jin logon par Section 411, 380, 120B IPC ke तहत case chal raha tha, unhe court ne acquit kar diya! Bari kar diya un sab ko! Socho sir, 2009 ka mamla hai, itne saalon se main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha tha. Police ne kitni mehnat ki thi, maine kitne chakkar kaate the court ke. Meri mehnat ki kamai chori hui aur ab chor azaad ghumenge? Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh saari ummeedein hi khatm ho gayi hain. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main ab kya karun. Bahut galat hua hai mere saath.

Sir, dekho na, woh jo chor tha na, usko toh maine khud ranga haath pakda tha mauke pe. Meri aankhon ke saamne mere ghar mein ghusne ki koshish kar raha tha, chori ke liye. Us din ki baat aaj tak nahi bhula main. Phir, court mein bhi jab usko laya gaya, maine turant pehchan liya. Koi galti nahi hui pehchanne mein, bilkul wahi tha. Aur meri baat mein koi jhooth bhi nahi nikla, sab sahi saabit hua hai. Ab toh saare saboot pakke hain, koi shaq ki gunjaish hi nahi hai. Sir, ab toh Ld. APP sahib ne bhi bol diya hai ki case poora saabit ho gaya hai. Meri aap se yahi vinti hai, usko ab saza milni chahiye. Aise galti karne walon ko chhodna nahi chahiye. Mujhe bas mera nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir, sun ke na mera toh dimag kharab ho gaya hai. Woh Prashant Vihar police station ka case tha na, FIR No. 375/2018, Section 380/411 ka, jisme meri chori hui thi? Aaj pata chala hai ki court ne us chor ko chhod diya! Acquittal de diya usko, sir! Woh aadmi, jisne meri cheezein churai thi, usko chhod diya? Aur reason kya de rahe hain? Ki woh Levis showroom mein ab kaam nahi karta! Kya matlab hua iska? Woh to 2018 se 2020 tak wahi kaam karta tha na! Agar usne naukri chhod di toh kya hua, usne chori toh ki thi! Matlab kya, ab koi bhi chori karke bolega ki main toh ab wahan kaam nahi karta aur bach jayega? Sir, yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Meri mehnat ki kamai thi woh, ab kaun wapas dilayega mujhe?

Sir, main Sanjeev Kumar hoon. Meri suno toh sahi, mera ghar loot gaya! Kal shaam ko, 17 tareekh ko, kareeb 6 baje main apne D-1059, Gali no. 14, Khajuri Khas, Delhi wale ghar pe tala laga kar apni duty pe gaya tha. Main toh khud constable hoon, Ist Battalion DAP mein. Jab main aaj subah, 18 tareekh ko, kareeb 2:15 baje apni duty se wapas aaya toh dekha mere ghar ka tala toota hua tha. Andar jaakar dekha toh ghar ka saara samaan idhar-udhar bikhra पड़ा tha, poora ghar ulat-pulat kar diya tha choron ne. Meri sari mehnat ki kamai thi, Daroga ji! Please help karo, bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai mera.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera to dimaag kharab ho gaya hai yeh sab soch soch ke. Bahut saal pehle ki baat hai, 24/25 July 2007 ki raat thi, mere ghar mein, flat no. 86B, Top Floor, DDA Flats, Sun Light Colony mein, koi ghus aaya tha. Ye aapke Sun Light Colony PS ke area ka hi mamla hai. Woh aadmi, Sunil naam hai uska, raat ke andhere mein mera ghar tod kar ghusa tha, chori karne ki niyat se. Meri toh neend ud gayi thi us raat se. Meri cheezein gayab ho gayi, mera kitna bada nuksaan hua hai. Aise koi kisi ke ghar mein kaise ghus sakta hai? Sir, please mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main M-43, Second Floor, Annexe Building mein kiraye par rehta hoon. Mere landlord, jo Accused No.1 hain, aur unki beti Harpreet Malik ne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. 21 September 1998 ko, unhone mujhe ek jhoothe molestation case mein phansa diya, sir! Main bilkul bekasoor hoon. Yeh sab unhone jaanboojh kar kiya hai, mujhe badnaam karne ke liye. Aur upar se, mujhe dhamkiyan bhi de rahe hain ki mujhe dekh lenge. Meri izzat mitti mein mila di hai inhone. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir.

Sir, woh meri jo chori hui thi na, main ussi ke baare mein aaya hoon. Bahut tension mein tha main, par ab thoda sukoon hai. Achha hua ki police ne un choron ko pakad liya aur jaanch bhi poori ho gayi. Mujhe pata chala hai ki unke khilaaf Section 380, 411, aur 34 IPC ke under chargesheet bhi file ho gayi hai. Court ne bhi is case ka cognizance le liya hai. Un sabhi accused ko court ne summon kiya hai trial ke liye, aur chargesheet ki copy bhi unhe mil gayi hai. Ab bas, sir, jaldi se unhe kadi saza mil jaaye, yahi meri request hai. Bahut pareshani uthayi hai maine.

Sir, main ek aam aadmi hoon, meri suno. Woh jo mere ghar mein chori hui thi na, yaad hai aapko? Raat ko mera ghar tod kar ghuse the woh log, saara keemti samaan le gaye the. Kitna mushkil se banaya tha sab kuch. Police ne pakda toh tha us chor ko, par us din (18.04.2019) court ne jab us par Section 457, 380, 411 IPC ke तहत charge lagaye, toh woh mukaar gaya! Kehta hai maine kuch nahi kiya, bola case chalao. Sir, woh chor to seedha-saadha bol raha hai ki woh nirdosh hai! Meri aankhon ke saamne hua sab, aur woh jhoot bol raha hai. Abhi court mein gawahi chal rahi hai. Meri taraf se, matlab prosecution ne, teen gawah bulaye hain. Pata nahi kab tak yeh sab chalega, Sir. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, meri mehnat ki kamai chura ke woh aise kaise bach sakta hai?

Sir, main Garima bol rahi hoon. Pata nahi kya ho gaya meri kismat ko. Pichle saal, 10 September ko, subah-subah 6 se 7:30 baje ke beech, Raghubir Nagar mein, meri Shop No. 245 se mera Realme C-20 phone chori ho gaya tha. Maine Rajouri Garden PS mein iski report bhi likhwai thi. Kitna mushkil ho gaya hai phone ke bina. Usme mere saare important contacts the, photos thi. Woh log chori karke bhaag gaye, aur ab pata chala hai ki unka case chal raha hai. Aap please meri madad kijiye, mujhe mera phone wapas chahiye ya un choron ko saza milni chahiye. Meri poori zindagi us phone mein thi. Bahut pareshan hoon main.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Mere pati ko police ne pakad liya hai, kehte hain preventive detention hai. Par unki toh koi galti nahi, Sir! Humare ghar mein wahi ek kamane wale hain. Main itni pareshan hui ki High Court tak gayi thi. Maine Habeas Corpus ki petition daali thi ki mere pati ko chhod do, woh beqasoor hain. Par High Court ne bhi meri nahi suni. Pichle saal 25 March 2022 ko meri woh petition dismiss kar di. Ab aap hi bataiye, main kahan jaaun? Mera pati andar hai aur ghar mein bhookhe mar rahe hain hum. Please, meri madad kijiye, Sir. Mere pati ko riha karwa dijiye.

Sir, mujhe yaad hai woh din, 25-35 saal ka hi tha main jab meri Ertiga gaadi bandook dikha ke chheen li thi. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi! Police ne Pradeep aur Parveen @ Sonu ko pakda bhi tha 23 November 2012 ko. Unhone bataya tha ki Md. Arkan naam ka ek aur aadmi meri gaadi le gaya hai. Par Sir, woh Arkan abhi tak nahi pakda gaya. Meri gaadi ka bhi kuch pata nahi. Chargesheet bhi file ho gayi hai 16 January 2013 ko, Section 365, 392, 397, 506 aur 34 IPC ke तहत. Ab tak woh banda bahar ghoom raha hai aur meri gaadi bhi nahi mili. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Mujhe meri gaadi wapas chahiye aur us Arkan ko bhi pakda jaye.

Sir, main Manoj Singh Tomar hoon. Palam Vihar mein jo MCD Toll Tax hai na, SMYR Consortium LLP ka, wahan main supervisor hoon pichle 6 mahine se. Sahib, 2 November 2015 ki raat thi, main apni night duty pe tha wahan, shaam 6 baje se subah 6 baje tak. Mere saath teen aur saathi bhi the — Atul Singh Bhadauria, Divesh Kumar Yadav aur Dashrath Singh. Hum sab apni duty kar rahe the, tabhi kuch log aaye aur hum par hamla kar diya! Hathiyar bhi the unke paas, sir! Sab kuch loot liya humara, zabardasti. Bohut dar gaye the hum sab. Meri aapse request hai ki is mamle mein jaldi se jaldi action liya jaaye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon, aaj dopahar kareeb 12:30 baje ki baat hai. Main apni Swift car, number 9CAB-5659, silver colour ki, leke Sector 10 Dwarka market gaya tha. Meri patni, Shashi Mittal ji, kuch samaan lene Sector 12 chali gayi thi. Main Aggarwal Sweets ke saamne, ek ped ki chhaon mein gaadi park karke baitha hua tha. Kareeb 12:50 baje ka time hoga, achaanak teen ladke meri gaadi ki taraf aaye. Sir, ek ne toh aake seedha aage wala left door khol diya, aur doosra wala jo mere driver side se aaya, usne mujhe poochhna shuru kar diya ki main gaadi mein kyun baitha hoon. Aur bola gaadi se bahar nikal! Main toh darr hi gaya Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai mere saath!

Sir, meri suno na. Main toh bilkul ghabra gaya tha us din. Woh Satpal, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di. Main Singhola gaon mein MCD Primary School ke paas se nikal raha tha, apne kaam se, aur usne mujhe beech raaste mein hi rok liya. Pata hai sir, usne mujhe knife dikhake, mera phone, wallet, sab kuch cheen liya. Meri toh saansein ruk gayi thi! Aisa laga meri jaan nikal jayegi. Usne itni zabardasti ki mere saath, aur dhamki di ki agar maine kisi ko bataya toh woh mujhe chhodega nahi. Sir, please uski FIR likho. Usne jo kiya, uski saza milni chahiye. Mujhe abhi bhi bahut darr lagta hai uske naam se. Narela PS mein hi toh aaya hoon aapke paas, meri madad karo.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mera woh motor accident case hai na, 1995 ka. Usmein 1998 mein ek faisla aaya tha Sitapur court se, jo Motor Accident Claims Tribunal ka tha. Mujhe laga ab thoda sukoon milega. Par nahi! Ab woh doosri party (appellant) us faisle ke khilaaf appeal kar rahi hai, Section 173 Motor Vehicles Act ke under. Meri sunwai hui, unki bhi sunwai hui. Kagaz patra sab dekhe gaye hain. Pata nahi kitna aur ghumayenge yeh log mujhe. Meri puri kahani toh ab main aapko bataunga hi Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main hath jodke aapse guzaarish karta hoon. Meri beti ko… use un darindon ne utha liya tha. Uske saath itni gandi harkatein ki, uski izzat loot li, aur phir use maar dala. Meri choti si beti, Sir! Humne pehle bhi aapke Porompat PS mein darr tha, complaint ki thi. Par kisi ne kuch nahi kiya. Ab dekho, meri beti ko maar diya. Woh log abhi bhi azaad ghoom rahe hain. Unhone sirf meri beti ko nahi mara, meri poori zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir! Meri beti ke liye, uski aatma ki shanti ke liye, unhe saza milni chahiye. Woh Porompat wali FIR number 541(6)2023, uska kya hua? Please kuch kijiye, Sir. Meri beti ko insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main Shrikishan Satish Gitpitia ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Us aadmi ne hamara jeena haram kar rakha hai, Sir. Jab dekho tab public mein aise activities karta hai ki hum sab dar ke rehte hain. Pehle bhi uske khilaaf do-teen FIRs ho chuki hain, par usko koi fark nahi padta. Woh toh kehta hai ki yeh sab toh bas 'law and order' ka mamla hai, 'public order' ko kya affect karta hai! Par Sir, uski wajah se poore ilaake mein darr ka mahol hai. Meri dukaan band karwa di usne ek baar, bacchon ko school jaane mein bhi dar lagta hai. Yeh chote-mote mamle nahi hain, uski harkatein 'prejudicial activities' hi hain. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, mujhe aur mere parivar ko usse bachaiye. Kripya us par sakht action lein, Sir. Hum sab bahut pareshan hain.

Sahab, main aapke paas bohot umeed se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur ab toh insaaf bhi door ja raha hai. Woh 1988 ka case yaad hai aapko? Jalaun ke Rendhar thane mein, Prabhu aur uske paanch aur saathi, aur woh Ram Babu, inhone milkar hamaare ghar pe hamla kiya tha. Murder kiya tha, Sahib! IPC ki dhara 148, 120-B, 302/149 lagi thi unpar. Jalaun ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 10.10.1990 ko unko sazaa sunayi thi. Par ab, woh apradhi Prabhu, Ram Behari, Balvir Singh, aur Viren, inhone appeal kar di hai. Itne saalon baad bhi insaaf nahi mila toh kaise jiyenge hum? Meri suniye, Sahib, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye!

Sir, main na bohot pareshan hoon. Meri ek purani FIR thi, FIR No. 75/2000 Patiala House mein. Usme Santosh @ Ravi aur Manoj Kumar the, jinhone mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Court ne unhe saza bhi sunai thi 24 July 2002 ko, badi mushkil se justice mila tha mujhe. Ab pata chala hai ki woh dono, woh Santosh aur Manoj, apni saza ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Matlab, woh phir se case khulwa rahe hain! Meri toh poori life disturbed ho gayi thi unki wajah se. Kitni himmat karke maine case lada, aur ab woh phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, please meri help karo. Mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai. Inko bahar mat aane do, sir.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya/aayi hoon. Woh jo log hain na, jinko humne pakadwaya tha mere saath galat karne par, jinke khilaaf humne case darj karwaya tha... woh ab bail maang rahe hain. Mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki unki bail application lagi hai court mein. Sir, itni mushkil se toh unko police ne pakda tha aur andar kiya tha. Abhi toh trial bhi poora nahi hua hai, mamla chal raha hai court mein. Agar unko bail mil gayi toh meri jaan ko khatra hai! Woh bahar aakar phir se mujhe ya mere parivaar ko pareshaan karenge. Pehle hi unhone bohot taqleef di hai mujhe. Please sir, aap kuch kijiye. Unhe bail mat milne dijiye. Unhe jail mein hi rehna chahiye jab tak poora insaaf nahi mil jaata. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye sir.

Sir, main ek bahut pareshan aadmi hoon. Aap log jo yeh bolte ho na ki 4 crore judgments aur laws hain, mujhe to kuch samajh hi nahi aata is sab ka. Main to bas apna ek chhota sa masla leke aaya tha, par yahan to lagta hai sab kuch in bade-bade lawyers, researchers aur students ke liye bana hai. Hum jaise common log kya karein? Meri choti si baat kahan suni jaayegi itne saare kanoon ke beech? Mujhe to lagta hai main bas ek number ban ke reh gaya hoon. Meri problem to in sab complicated cheezon ke saamne kuch bhi nahi lagti. Sir, mujhe to bas insaaf chahiye tha, par yahan to itna sab kuch uljha diya hai ki hum jaise logon ka dimaag hi ghoom jaata hai. Please, meri madad karo. Main is chakkar mein bilkul phas gaya hoon.

Sahab, main itne time se court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. Meri sunwai hui, aur finally judge saab ne us galti karne wale par 6 lakh ka fine lagaya tha. Mujhe laga ab thoda insaaf milega, mera nuksan pura hoga. Court ne bola tha ki us 6 lakh mein se 50% yaani 3 lakh rupay mujhe compensation ke taur par milenge. Main kitna khush hua tha ki chalo, thodi toh rahat milegi. Par ab, sahab, mujhe pata chala hai ki jo mere 3 lakh rupay compensation ke the, woh toh stay ho gaye hain! Matlab, mujhe abhi tak kuch mila hi nahi. Yeh kya baat hui? Meri toh umeed toot gayi hai. Mera kya kasoor hai? Main gareeb aadmi hoon, mujhe un paiso ki bahut zaroorat hai. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe mera haq dilwaiye.

Sir, main Ramu hoon. Meri FIR thi na 170/2022 wali, 15 February 2022 ki. Uss din, un logon ne mujhe zabardasti pakad kar ek jagah bandh kar diya tha. Mera saara cash, phone, sab kuch cheen liya. Meri aankhon ke saamne hathiyar dikha kar dhamki di. Meri jaan jaane wali thi, itna darr gaya tha main. Woh ek nahi the, kai log the, aur unki poori planning thi mujhe lootne ki. Hathiyar bhi the unke paas. Ab suna hai ki woh bail maang raha hai? Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaya na, toh meri jaan ko khatra hai. Mujhe unse bahut darr lagta hai. Kripya usko bail na mile, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut zaroori complaint lekar aaya hoon. Pichle mahine, 25 August ko, Delhi ke Police Commissioner sahab ke order pe, mujhe bina kisi wajah ke pakad liya gaya. Bolte hain ki main public order ke liye khatra hoon, aur isliye mujhe National Security Act, 1980, ke section 3(2) ke under band kar diya. Sir, main toh ek seedha-saadha aadmi hoon, main kya jaanoon yeh sab kanoon? Maine kuch galat kiya hi nahi. Unhone mujhe 1 September ko kuch kagaz bhi diye, bolte hain usmein meri galti likhi hai. Par mujhe samajh hi nahi aaya ki maine kya kiya hai. Yeh mere saath zyadati hai. Meri family bahut pareshan hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon mere saath kya hua tha. Woh din mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai, kareeb 1997 ki baat hai. Main shaam ko ghar laut rahi thi, tabhi do log, ek ka naam Anwar aur uska ek saathi, achanak mere saamne aa gaye. Unhone mujhe bandook dikhai, aur mera saara samaan cheen liya. Mera purse, usmein jo bhi cash tha, mera mobile, sab kuch le gaye. Main bahut darr gayi thi, aaj bhi woh raat yaad karke kaanp jaati hoon. Maine unka chehra dekha tha, main pehchan sakti hoon. Bahut mushkil se maine woh paise jama kiye the. Us incident ke baad meri toh neend udd gayi. Justice ke liye main itne saal wait kiya, aur ab jab unhe saza mili hai (7 saal ki rigorous imprisonment), toh woh appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, aise logon ko chhoda nahi jaana chahiye. Please, mujhe insaaf chahiye, unhe poori saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Maine jo apna case file kiya tha, court mein jise 'Original Application' kehte hain, woh isliye taaki mujhe insaaf mil sake. Maine apni takleefein aur jo bhi relief mujhe chahiye tha, sab detail mein likha tha usme. Iske liye bahut chakkar lagaye maine, papers mein amendments bhi hue, jaise MA No. 2226/2024, OA No. 645/2024 aur doosre numbers bhi. Par Sir, ab opposite party ne apna 'counter affidavit' de diya hai. Woh meri saari claims ko galat bata rahe hain aur bol rahe hain ki mera pura case hi dismiss kar diya jaye. Matlab, woh chahte hain ki mujhe kuch na mile, meri baat suni hi na jaye. Main itni mushkil se court tak pahuncha hoon, Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Navneet Singh, 30 saal ka hoon. Us din shaam ko 7:20 baje mujhe itni buri tarah maara gaya, main behosh ho gaya tha. Mujhe sidha JPN Hospital le gaye. Itna dard tha ki main kuch bol hi nahi pa raha tha wahan, doctors ne bola main statement dene ke liye theek nahi hoon. Sach mein sir, wahan koi dekhne wala nahi tha. Police wale aaye the, unhone photos bhi li thi. Meri MLC report bhi ban gayi hai. Meri FIR toh 3 March 2012 ki raat ko kaafi der baad, 11:25 baje likhi gayi thi. Jahan mujhe maara tha, uska site plan bhi police ne banaya tha. Mujhe bahut dukh hua hai sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas aaj bahut dukhi mann se aaya hoon. Meri dadi (ya maa, jo bhi the woh) ko... pata nahi kya kar diya. Kisi ne unhe chup kara diya, Sahab! Meri pyaari dadi thi, old age mein thi woh. Koi itna zaalim kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi, Sahab. Seedhe-seedhe toh koi witness nahi tha, par saare halaat (circumstances) Harshit Jain ki taraf hi ishara kar rahe hain. Har koi ussi pe shak kar raha hai. Mujhe poora yakeen hai ussi ne kiya hai yeh ghinauna kaam. Please, Sahab, aap meri madad kijiye. Prashant Vihar police station mein meri complaint likhiye. Mujhe meri dadi ke liye insaaf chahiye. Usko saza milni chahiye. Tabhi meri dadi ki rooh ko shaanti milegi.

Sir, main Hasina hoon. Aapko kya bataun, mere saath na bahut galat hua hai. Woh 3-4 September 2015 ki raat ki baat hai. Main apni padosan Shamim Bano se baatein kar rahi thi. Mera beta, Md. Shan, bhi wahin paas mein tha. Tabhi Walim, jo thodi door baitha tha, usne mere bete Shan ko dekha aur pata hai kya kiya? Usne mere bete ka phone zabardasti cheen liya, Sir! Bilkul aise hi, forcefully. Mera beta toh bahut darr gaya tha. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi chori hai na? Mujhe is Walim se insaaf chahiye. Aise kaise koi kisi ke bachche ka phone cheen sakta hai!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna bura hua. Woh din tha 5 February 2016, subah ke theek 3 baje honge. Main Pul Dufrin turning se jaa raha tha apne kaam se. Achanak se woh log, ek Javed tha aur uske saath Zakir aur do-teen aur the, unhone mujhe gher liya, Sir. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi! Unhone mujhe dhamkaya, maara-peeta aur jo bhi mere paas tha, sab chheen liya. Mera phone, meri jeb mein jo paise the, sab kuch le gaye. Main bahut darr gaya tha, Sir. Mujhe laga ab toh main zinda nahi bachunga. Please unko saza dilwaiye, Sir. Aise logon ko khula nahi chhodna chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Nishant Saluja. Meri suniye, please! 24 March 2015 ki baat hai, shaam ke kareeb 7:30 baje honge. Main aur mera dost Pawan Kakkar apne office, Tilak Nagar mein Nishant Forex pe the. Achanak do masked ladke ghus gaye andar, Sir! Ek ke paas to pistol thi aur doosre ke paas ek bada chaku. Us chaku wale ne humein seedha dhamkaya, bola saara cash nikal do. Aur Sir, us pistol wale ne na, Pawan ke sir pe pistol ki butt maari. Mera dost gir gaya! Aur us chaku wale ne toh mere upar bhi chaku se attack kiya. Humari jaan nikal gayi thi, Sir. Hum bahut dar gaye the. Bahut buri tarah se maara hai unhone.

Sir, main Anil Kumar hoon. Meri suniye, please! Yeh jo Gabbar Singh alias Gurcharan Singh, Sumit Narula aur Dhiraj hain na, in logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. In sab ne milkar, plan bana ke, mujhe kidnap kiya tha. Meri jaan ko khatra tha, Sir! Meri sari cheezein, cash, sab loot liya inhone. Aur uske baad, meri family se release karne ke liye paise bhi maange, ransom ke naam par. Socho, kitna dar gaya tha main. Abhi bhi darr lagta hai. Khaaskar woh Sumit Narula, woh toh aur bhi dangerous hai, usne mujhe bahut dhamkaya aur maara bhi. Meri request hai, in sabko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Ye log bahar rahe toh meri life safe nahi hai.

Sir, main Shahdara area se baat kar raha hoon. Yahan ka toh bahut bura haal ho gaya hai, sir. Pata nahi kya ho gaya hai, har doosre din chori, loot-paat ki khabarein aati rehti hain. Hum log toh bahut darr gaye hain. Ghar se nikalte hain ya raat ko soye, chain nahi milta. Meri toh neend udd gayi hai, sir. Aisa lagta hai jaise koi security hi nahi hai ab. Log keh rahe hain ki ek Nadeem naam ka ladka hai, Kalu bhi bulate hain usko, apne do-chaar doston ke saath milkar ye sab karta hai. Radhey Shyam, Rakesh, Parveen, Pawan, Balbir, Alam — ye sab uske saath rehte hain. Sir, please kuch kijiye. Hum gareeb log hain, bahut mushkil se kamaate hain, aur ye log sab kuch loot lete hain. Humein insaaf chahiye, sir. Aapki hi umeed hai.

Sir, main kitne dino se pareshan tha. Mera mobile phone chori ho gaya tha. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki Tejpal @ Lala naam ka jo aadmi hai, uske ghar se mera phone mila hai! Socho, woh aadmi kaisa hoga, jo kisi ka samaan chura ke apne ghar mein rakhta hai. Mujhe toh laga tha ab nahi milega phone, lekin aap logon ne dhoondh nikala. Aapne usko 7 May ko subah pakda tha, aur tabhi usne bataya ki phone uske ghar mein hai. Police station mein sab kagaz banaye gaye hain, maine suna. Ab bas usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye, sir. Meri yahi fariyaad hai.

Sahab, main kya bataun, meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai! Woh 8 September 2016 ka din, mujhe aaj bhi sone nahi deta. Woh Kiran Kumar, jo Lala bhi kehlata hai, aur Kamal... unke saath ek aur ladka 'S'... in sab ne milkar ek saazish rachi. Sir, unhone mere 3,92,000 rupaye loot liye, meri mehnat ki kamai! Aur meri scooty bhi le gaye. Magar, sir, sabse badi baat toh yeh hai ki unhone ek insaan ki jaan le li! Aur phir saboot mitane ki koshish ki. Sarai Rohilla PS mein FIR toh hui hai unpe, murder, robbery aur saazish ke charges lage hain. Par sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Unhe aisi saza mile ki aage se koi aisi harkat na kare. Meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Suresh Laxman Khillare hoon. Mere saath mere dost Gunwant aur Dheeraj the. Hum bus number 3523 se Roopdaka jaa rahe the. Raaste mein kuchh badmaashon ne humein gher liya, Sir. Unhone humein bandook dikha kar itna daraaya ki hum kuchh kar hi nahi paaye. Unhone zabardasti mera Samsung Camera, mera Blackberry Torch mobile aur Dheeraj ka Nokia E-73 mobile phone chheen liya. Aur Sir, mera poora Rs. 3,50,000/- cash aur meri wife ki saari jewellery bhi le gaye. Unhone humein ek jagah band kar diya aur dhamki di ki agar kisi ko bataya toh jaan se maar denge. Hum bahut darr gaye the, Sir. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai thi woh. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main abhi-abhi wahan se aa rahi hoon. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Ek ladke ne mujhe raste mein pakda, aur seedhe meri gardan par chaaku rakh diya. Sir, main itni darr gayi thi ki meri jaan nikal gayi. Usne ek dum dhamki di ki 'Chupchaap jitni bhi jewelry pehni hai, sab nikaal de, warna ye chaaku teri gardan mein ghusa dunga.' Sir, uski aankhon mein itna gussa tha, aur chaaku dekh kar toh meri saansein hi ruk gayi thi. Main kya karti, sir? Main toh bas darr ke maare jo usne maanga, woh de diya. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, Ram Ram! Main kya bataun, meri to duniya hi lut gayi. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai chori ho gayi thi, Sir. Paanch lakh rupaye the mere, ek jhatke mein sab chala gaya. Aur Daulat Ram ne mere bahattar hazaar bhi uda liye the. Meri chhoti si bachat thi woh. Sabse bura to ye Puneet alias Lakhan ne kiya, usne tees hazaar ke saath meri Accent gaadi bhi chura li, DL 7 CE 1875 uska number hai. Ab ye sab pakde gaye hain, Hari Mohan ke paas mere paanch lakh mile hain, Daulat Ram ke paas bahattar hazaar aur Lakhan ke paas tees hazaar aur meri gaadi. Aur ab sun raha hoon ki ye sab bol rahe hain ‘not guilty’? Sir, ye to seedha seedha jhooth hai! Meri aankhon ke saamne mera saaman tha inke paas. Inko saza milni chahiye aur mujhe mera saaman wapas milna chahiye, please Sir.

Daroga ji, main wohi hoon jiske saath woh hadsa hua tha aur jiski FIR aapne ki thi. Police ne jab ek Firoz naam ke ladke ko pakda aur usse poochtaach ki, toh usne sab bata diya. Usne Ashu ka naam bhi liya, bola woh bhi uske saath tha is mamle mein. Phir mujhe TIP ke liye bulaya gaya, jahan maine Firoz ko turant pehchan liya. Wohi tha Sir. Uske baad Firoz ko arrest kar liya gaya. Uski hi jaankari par police ne Ashraf alias Ashu ko bhi pakda. Jab Ashu ka bhi TIP hua, toh maine usse bhi bilkul sahi pehchan liya. Ab thoda tasalli hai ki pakde gaye hain yeh log.

Sir, main Balvinder bol raha hoon. Aaj, matlab 23 February 2011 ko, mere saath Rama Vihar mein bahut bura hua hai. Main toh bas apne dost Naveen ke saath wahan gaya tha, kyuki humne suna tha ki wahan saste mein plot mil rahe hain. Mujhe kya pata tha ki wahan aise log honge! Jaise hi hum wahan pahunche, kuch badmashon ne humein gher liya aur meri saari cheezein chheen li. Meri toh himmat hi nahi ho rahi thi, sir. Humare saath loot-paat ho gayi. Main toh bas ek sasta plot dekhne gaya tha, aur dekho kya ho gaya mere saath. Police ko bulaya gaya, SI Manwar Patwal sahab aaye, SHO Begumpur bhi the aur HC Sukhvir, Ct. Chandram bhi. Maine apni poori baat unhe batai hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mera bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai.

Sir, main Ajay Kumar. Meri complaint par, jo 8 February 2024 ko hui thi, Tigri Police Station mein FIR No. 113 register hui thi. Woh din, Arman ne mere saath jo kiya, main bata nahi sakta, Sir! Usne mujhe loota aur jaan se maarne ki bhi koshish ki thi. Uske khilaaf section 397/34 IPC laga tha. Ab finally, police ne poori investigation kar li hai aur charge-sheet bhi file ho gayi hai Saket Courts mein, Ld. Metropolitan Magistrate ke saamne. Us Arman par ab 394, 397, 411, 34 IPC lagaye gaye hain. Bas Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, usko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye. Meri saari umeed ab court aur aap logon par hai.

Sahab, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Yeh baat hai 31 July 2015 ki, raat ke kareeb 10:30 baje. Main Faridabad Bus Stand par tha, Kashmere Gate ke paas. Sir, wahan Neeraj, Jasvinder Singh aur Chandan, aur unke saath ek aur aadmi tha, total chaar log. Un sabne mujhe gher liya, mera saara samaan loot liya. Unhone mujhe bahut dhamkaya, mere saath zabardasti ki. Sir, woh Neeraj aur Chandan toh mujhe maarne par hi tule the, unhone toh chaku bhi dikhaya tha. Main bahut darr gaya tha. Meri jaan bach gayi, yahi badi baat hai. Ab un par case chal raha hai, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Aise logon ko saza milni chahiye, warna aur kitne log aise hi victim bante rahenge. Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki unko unke kiye ki saza mile.

Sir ji, subah subah mere saath bahut galat ho gaya. Solah July 2019 ki baat hai, kareeb subah 9 baje. Main Tank Road Market se jaa raha tha, Ravi Das Marg Crossing pe, Axis Bank ATM ke paas, Karol Bagh mein. Wahan par Jitesh aur Mukesh, aur unka ek aur saathi jo abhi tak lapata hai, unhone mujhe gher liya. Unhone mujhe bandook dikhai aur darr dikha kar mera saara samaan loot liya. Mera phone, purse, jo paise the, sab kuch cheen liya Sir. Main bahut ghabra gaya tha, meri jaan nikal gayi thi. Yeh meri poori mehnat ki kamai thi. Meri aapse haath jod kar guzarish hai, un logon ko pakdo aur mera samaan wapas dilwao. Bahut badi loot ho gayi hai mere saath.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon, yeh Mohit Gupta jo hai na, iske ghar se jo samaan mila hai, woh usne khud hi nikal kar dikhaya. Apni marzi se usne location batayi. Par Sir, sabse ajeeb baat yeh hai ki jab yeh sab ho raha tha, wahan koi bahar ka aadmi, koi public witness tha hi nahi! Koi independent person nahi tha. Matlab, Sir, sirf aapke log the. Aise kaise chalega? Kal ko yeh Mohit toh bol dega ki usko phansaya gaya hai, ya woh samaan uska nahi tha. Meri toh life barbaad kar di hai usne, aur ab agar evidence bhi aise kamzor ho gaya, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Sir, please, aap kuch kijiye. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi usko bachane ki koshish lag rahi hai.

Sir, main Ramesh Nagar mein rehta hoon. Meri suniye please. Aaj se kuch time pehle, 2 December 2018 ki dopahar ko, lagbhag 2:30 baje, main apne ghar ke paas hi phone pe baat karte hue jaa raha tha. Tabhi, pichhe se ek Pulsar motorcycle pe do ladke aaye, itni tezi se ki mujhe kuch samajh nahi aaya. Unhone jhatke se mera mobile phone cheen liya aur wahan se bhaag gaye. Maine unhe pakadne ki bohot koshish ki, chillaaya bhi, par woh itni jaldi gayab ho gaye. Mera naya phone tha sir, ab main kya karunga? Bahut zaroori contacts the usme. Aap se guzaarish hai, meri madad kijiye. Un ladkon ko dhoondhiye aur mera phone wapas dilwa dijiye. Main bohot pareshan hoon sir.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Mere saath jo loot hui thi, bahut darr gaya tha main. SI Pawan Kumar ji ne meri complaint suni, aur jo yeh Section 392/394/397/34 IPC ke तहत FIR दर्ज hui hai, woh Kashmere Gate police station mein Ct. Pawan Kumar ji ke through karwai gayi. SI sir ne case ki jaanch shuru kar di hai, unhone incident spot ka pura site plan bhi banaya hai. Sir, hum sab un badmashon ko dhoondhne Faridabad Bus Stand tak gaye the. Wahan jaakar, maine wohi auto pehchan liya jis mein woh log the! Uss auto ka number DL 1RN 7518 tha, woh sadak kinare khada tha. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Bahut pareshan hoon main.

Sir, main Amit Kumar. Meri baat suniye please. 15 January 2018 ki raat thi, kareeb 8 baje honge. Main Super Shine Chowk pe tha, Kalu Kabari ki dukan ke paas, East Vinod Nagar, Delhi mein. Sir, do log the, pata nahi kaun the. Unhone mujh par attack kiya. Mere paas ek grey color ka Lephone mobile tha, woh mere right hand se chheen liya. Sir, unhone paper cutter se mere left gaal par waar kiya, khoon nikalne laga! Mujhe bahut dard hua. Woh mera phone leke bhaag gaye. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, un logon ko pakdo. Meri jaan bhi ja sakti thi us din. Bade mushkil se phone liya tha. Please help kijiye.

Sahab, main Rajbir hoon. Dominos Pizza mein delivery boy ka kaam karta hoon, woh jo New Friends Colony, Grandley Complex mein shop hai na, wahan pe. Sir, aaj subah, tareekh 12.02.2012 ko, main Mathura Road pe, Okhla Tank ke paas se nikal raha tha apne delivery ke liye. Aur achanak se 'dhaay dhaay' ki awaaz aayi, jaise kisi ne goli chalai ho! Main toh bilkul hil gaya, sahab! Meri toh rooh kaanp gayi. Main turant yahan bhaga-bhaga aaya hoon aapko batane. Pata nahi kaun badmash the aur kyun aisa kiya. Bahut ghabrahat ho rahi hai mujhe.

Sir, main kya bataun! Woh 7 June 2016 ki shaam thi, main Road no. 57, Najad Marble Market se nikal raha tha. Tabhi ek ladka aaya aur meri saari cheezein cheen-jhapat karke bhaag gaya. Mujhe itna darr lag gaya tha, meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi! Meri saari mehnat ki kamai thi usmein. Phir achha hua ki police wale aa gaye, SI Om Prakash sahab aur Prem sahab. Wahan kafi log bhi ikkatthe ho gaye the. Meri kismat acchi thi ki Ct. Yograj sahab ne uss chor ko, jiska naam Akshay bataya gaya hai, ussi waqt pakad liya. Sir, main toh bas yahi chahta hoon ki mujhe mera saaman wapas mil jaaye aur usse uske kiye ki sazaa mile. Bahut mushkil se kamaya tha maine.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mera case bahut time se pending hai. Ye pehle 19.09.2019 ko Sessions Court mein gaya tha. Uske baad se bas charges ke point par arguments hi ho rahe hain. Pata nahi kab tak chalega! Pehle mera case Shri Gorakh Nath Pandey ji ki court mein tha, Tis Hazari Court mein. Phir 09.10.2019 ko mera case transfer ho gaya, dusre judge ke paas. 09.12.2019 ko bhi kuch order aaya tha. Judge badalte rehte hain, aur mera insaaf bas late hota jaa raha hai. Meri suno, sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon is system se.

Sir, main Amandeep Singh, Sadhu Singh da beta, Ludhiana se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir! Pichhle saal se main USA ya Canada jaane ke sapne dekh raha tha. London mein bhi study visa pe kaafi time lagaya tha, socha tha ab kahin set ho jaunga. Par sir, 29 April 2018 ko mere saath bahut bada dhokha ho gaya hai. Ek bande ne mujhe bade-bade sapne dikhaye, bola sab ho jayega, aur mere saare paise le liye. Sir, maine bade mushkil se paisa ikatha kiya tha, kuch udhaar bhi liya tha. Ab main kahin ka nahi raha. Meri poori mehnat, mera poora future daanv pe lag gaya hai. Sir, please meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main dopahar ko kareeb 2:30 baje apni car mein driver seat pe baitha hua tha. Tabhi do ladke aaye, Narender aur Satish. Main unhe court mein bhi pehchan chuka hoon, sir. Narender ne aate hi mujhe gaali deni shuru kar di aur usne mere gale ko apne haath se aise zor se daba diya. Sach kahun toh meri toh saansein hi ruk gayi thi, mujhe laga meri jaan chali jaayegi! Aur woh dusra ladka, Satish, chupchaap meri car ki pichli seat pe jaa ke baith gaya. Yeh sab mere saath hua hai, sir. Meri toh himmat hi toot gayi hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Himanshu, Delhi Police mein Constable hoon. Meri posting IGI Airport PS mein V-B Section mein thi. 12 May 2011 ki baat hai, main apni official duty par tha. Ek FIR No. 664/08 ke summons serve karne main Sector 24 Rohini gaya tha. Wahan main ek taxi stand par ek address ke baare mein pooch raha tha, jiska naam abhi mujhe yaad nahi hai. Sir, main toh bas apna kaam kar raha tha. Lekin tabhi wahan kuch logon ne, jinmein Ranjeet @ Bihari bhi shamil tha, mere saath badtameezi ki aur mujhe roka. Unhone mujhe maara-peeta bhi, meri uniform ki koi izzat nahi ki. Ek police wale ke saath aisa sulook? Mujhe bohot chot lagi hai aur mein bohot dukhi hoon. Kripya karke in gundon par sakht se sakht kaarwai karein, Sir!

Sir, main Neeraj Narula, ek CA hoon. Parson raat ki baat hai, 23 tareekh (23.01.2021) ko, kareeb sawa gyarah baje (11.15 pm) ka time tha. Main apni wife Swati aur dost Ashish ke saath Rumours Restaurant, AGCR Enclave, Delhi mein dinner kar raha tha. Hum sab theek se baithe the, tabhi ek ladka, Shanu naam ka, bina baat ke humse ulajhne laga. Usne pehle to bekaar ki baatein bolein, phir meri wife aur friends ko bhi galat nazron se dekha. Jab maine use roka, toh woh jhagda karne laga aur dhakka-mukki bhi ki. Sir, hum shanti se khana kha rahe the, usne hamara poora mood kharab kar diya. Meri request hai ki uske khilaaf strict action liya jaye. Yeh bilkul theek nahi hai!

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main Kuldeep Chopra, Mirabagh, Paschim Vihar se bol raha hoon. Pata nahi kya ho gaya mere saath, mera ghar number 146, Ground Floor, A-Block hai. Aaj se thoda pehle, 1 April 2012 ko, dopahar mein 2:10 se 2:30 PM ke beech, kuch log mere ghar mein ghus gaye. Sir, unhone darwaza tod diya! Mera poora ghar ulat-pulat kar diya aur bahut saara samaan chura ke le gaye. Yeh robbery hui hai mere ghar mein. Main bahut darr gaya hoon. Meri family bhi tension mein hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, un logon ko pakdiye aur mera chori hua saara samaan wapas dilwaiye. Please, jaldi kuch kariye.

Sir, main aapko apne saath hui ghatna ke baare mein batana chahta hoon. Baat hai 23 April 2012 ki, shaam ke 6:15 baje ke aas-paas. Main Darya Ganj Red Light signal par tha, Manoj Electronics ke bilkul saamne. Wahan Mohd. Sahid naam ke aadmi aur uske ek saathi ne mujhe pakad liya, Sir. Unhone mere saath zabardasti ki aur mera saara samaan chheen liya. Mujhe bahut darr lag gaya tha, unhone mujhe dhamkaya bhi tha. Mera phone, wallet, sab kuch le gaye. Baad mein pata chala ki Ujeb naam ke ek aur aadmi ke paas mera chori kiya hua samaan mila hai. Sir, maine itni mushkil se woh cheezein kamayi thi. Bas yahi request hai ki inko kadi se kadi saza mile, taaki kisi aur ke saath aisa na ho. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri suniye! Main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata hai kya hua? Aath January ko subah ke waqt, kareeb saadhe chhe baje, main Inderlok Metro station ke paas, wo Tapakna Pull waale gande naale ke paas se nikal raha tha. Wahan do ladke the, ek ka naam Kabir aur dusra Ajay ya Raja type kuch tha. Unhone mujhe rok kar jabardasti mera sab kuch chheen liya, sir! Jo bhi mere paas tha, mera phone, paise, sab kuch loot liya. Mujhe bahut darr lag gaya tha, meri jaan nikal gayi thi. Ye aapke Sarai Rohilla Police Station ke area mein hua hai. Please meri help kijiye, sir, unko pakdo!

Sir, 31 October 2020 ki raat ki baat hai, kareeb 10:45 baj rahe the. Main apne ghar ja raha tha, Hanuman Mandir wali gali ke bilkul bahar hi pahuncha tha. Achanak se do log aaye. Ek ne peeche se meri gardan pakdi aur mujhe zameen par dhakka de diya. Main kuch samajh pata, usse pehle hi dusre wale ne mere right pocket se mera golden colour ka Samsung Galaxy J-7 phone nikal liya. Maine unko turant pakadne ki koshish ki, lekin woh bhaag gaye. Sir, mera itna nuksan ho gaya hai, mera woh naya phone tha. Please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Sanoj Kumar. Kal raat ki baat hai, 11 February 2020 ko, raat kareeb 11 baje, main Bawana mein apne dost se milne jaa raha tha. Jaise hi main District Park, Sector 2 ke paas pahucha, achank teen ladke mere saamne aa gaye. Ek ne toh mujhe pakad liya, sir. Doosre ne seedha mere pet par chaku laga diya aur bola, "hilna mat, jaan se maar denge!" Main toh darr ke maare jhatt ho gaya. Aur teesre ladke ne meri pant ki right side pocket se mera mobile phone nikaal liya. Mera phone leke woh teeno wahan se bhaag gaye, sir. Meri toh saans hi ruk gayi thi. Bohot mushkil se phone liya tha, sir. Please meri madad karo.

Sir, suniye na, mere saath 10 February 2022 ki raat mein kareeb 10:50 baje Janakpuri mein, BSES Road C-3A par ek bahut bura haadsa hua. Main apne kaam se ghar laut raha tha ki achanak, yeh Jitender Kumar naam ka aadmi (ya Chetan Kumar Verma) aaya aur usne mujhe zor se dhakka de diya. Main girne hi wala tha ki usne mera Honor blue colour ka mobile phone jhat se chheen liya. Mera toh dil hi baith gaya tha, sir! Woh mera naya phone tha. Shukar hai, police ne use mauke par hi pakad liya aur mera phone bhi turant wapas mil gaya. Lekin sir, aise log khule ghoomte rahenge toh kisi ki bhi jaan-maal khatre mein padegi. Please iske khilaaf sakht se sakht kaarwayi karo.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, mere saath kya hua. Aaj subah, main Bhajanpura market se nikal rahi thi, aur mera phone mere haath mein tha. Achanak se ek banda aaya, Pradeep Kumar Mishra uska naam hai, aur jhatke se mera mobile phone cheen kar bhaagne laga. Meri toh saansein hi ruk gayi thi, par maine himmat nahi haari. Main uske peeche bhagi aur use turant pakad liya. Usne socha tha ki main chhod dungi, par main kaise chhod sakti thi? Mera naya phone tha woh, meri saari memories usmein thi. Maine use wahin pakad liya aur chillana shuru kar diya. Log bhi ikhatte ho gaye. Sir, yeh meri complaint hai, please uske khilaaf sakht action lo. Aise log khule aam ghoomte rahenge toh hum ladkiyan kaise safe rahengi?

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, mere saath kya ho gaya tha. Poora din, poori raat darr lagta raha. Ye 11 September 2015 ki baat hai, dopahar ke 1 baje ke aas paas. Main apni Kailashpuri Road pe, Sagarpur thane ke area mein thi. Tabhi do badmaash, ek ka naam Amit Kumar aur ek aur aadmi, pata nahi kaun tha, woh meri taraf aaye. Unhone jhatke se meri sone ki chain cheen li jo maine pehni hui thi. Usmein ek pyara sa locket bhi tha. Main itna darr gayi thi ki kuch samajh hi nahi aaya kya karun. Baad mein mujhe pata chala ki woh chain Amit Kumar ke paas se mil gayi hai. Sir, un logon ko na, kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Aise kaise koi din-dahaade kisi ki cheez cheen sakta hai? Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi us din.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kya hua. Ek May 2021 ki baat hai, dopahar ke lagbhag dedh baje honge. Main ek auto rickshaw mein baitha. Usmein pehle se hi peeche ki seat par do log baithe the aur ek driver ke paas tha. Main un dono ke beech mein baith gaya. Sab normal lag raha tha. Jab hum Dilshad Garden underpass, Dilshad Garden ke paas pahuche, toh unmein se ek ne driver ko auto rokne ke liye kaha. Jaise hi auto ruka aur main utarne laga, un logon ne mujhe gher liya aur mera mobile phone cheen liya. Sir, main bahut dar gaya tha. Unhone mujhe zabardasti utara aur mera saara samaan loot liya. Meri madad karo sir, bahut nuksaan ho gaya mera.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath bahut galat hua hai! Pichli 23 August 2023 ki raat ko, Shubham, Anoop Tiwari urf Pandit aur Rohan Singh ne mujhe roka. Unhone mujhe darr dikhaya, Sir, bandook tak dikhayi thi! Mera jo bhi tha, meri saari mehnat ki kamai, phone, sab kuch loot liya. Sir, maine bahut mushkil se kamaya tha woh, abhi tak unka chehra yaad aata hai toh kaanp uthta hoon. Meri saari savings chali gayi, main toh bilkul toot gaya hoon. Agle din main SI Dharamvir Singh aur HC Mukesh ji ke saath Sarai Kale Khan PS mein tha, report likhwane. Kripya karke in logon ko kadi se kadi saza dilwayiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Rajpal Singh. Mujhe ek complaint likhwani hai. Baat 9 December 2019 ki hai, sir. Main Arjun Nagar mein apne kaam se gaya tha. Ek aadmi, uska naam Rafiq @ Babu bata rahe hain, usne mujhe lootne ki koshish ki. Meri jeb se paise nikaal kar bhaagne laga tha. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai thi woh, sir! Main toh bohot darr gaya tha. Achha hua ki wahan public thi. Logon ne dekha toh use bhaagte hue pakad liya aur bohot maara bhi. Fir police wale, woh ASI Shiv Kumar sahab aur Sohan Lal ji bhi aa gaye the, unhone usko pakad ke le liya. Meri bas yahi request hai ki usko sakht se sakht saza mile, sir. Aise logon ko chhodna nahi chahiye.

Sir, mera naam Pankaj hai. Meri Atta Chakki ki dukaan hai Karawal Nagar mein, wo jo Prem Nagar, Gali No. 2 wali, shop number 276. Sir, pichli 25 July ko, raat ke kareeb 8:30 baje, kuch log meri dukaan mein ghus aaye. Bina permission ke, zabardasti! Unhone pehle toh mujhe bahut daraya, dhamkaya, aisa lag raha tha jaise mujhe maarne hi aaye hain. Sir, poora plan banakar aaye the chot pahunchane ka. Aur fir, meri dukaan se Rs. 1,235/- rupaye loot kar bhaag gaye. Meri saari din ki kamaai thi woh! Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, bahut darr gaya tha. Please un badmaashon ko pakdo aur mujhe insaaf dilao.

Sir, main Archana hoon. Dekho na Sir, mere saath bohot bura hua hai. Pichli 7 April ko, raat ke kareeb 8:30 baje, main Zakhira mein Rakhi Mandi ke paas, Pyaz Gate, Railway Line ke bagal se jaa rahi thi. Tabhi Md. Mukhtar Chiddi naam ke ek aadmi ne mera Infinix mobile phone chheen liya. Sir, uske haath mein chaku tha! Usne mujhe chaku dikha kar itna dara diya ki main kuch kar hi nahi paayi. Mera pura mobile zabardasti le gaya. Sir, please meri madad karo. Mujhe bohot dar lag raha hai aur mera phone bhi chala gaya. Us aadmi ko pakdo aur mera phone wapas dilwa do.

Sir, main abhi-abhi apne manager ke paas se aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai, sir. Main bas thoda aage badha hi tha, ki kisi ne peeche se itna zor se maara ki main gir gaya aur behosh ho gaya. Meri jeb mein cash bhi rakha tha, sir. Jab mujhe hosh aaya, toh main chillane laga. Maine dekha ki do log tezi se wahan se bhaag rahe the. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aaya kya ho gaya. Pehle main apne manager sahab ke paas gaya, unko saari baat batayi. Ab aapke paas aaya hoon report likhwane. Meri madad kijiye, sir, aise din-dahaade koi kaise hamla kar sakta hai?

Sir, dekhiye na mere saath kya ho gaya! Main 23 September 2011 ko apni motorcycle, jiska number DL-5S-AF-1991 hai, leke Bhajanpura ke A-Block se nikal raha tha. Ekdum se ek aadmi ne haath hila ke mujhe roka. Maine socha koi emergency hogi, toh main ruk gaya. Par Sir, jaise hi main ruka, Anup @ Zulfi aur uska ek saathi ne bina wajah mere saath dhakka-mukki shuru kar di. Mujhe bahut pareshaan kiya, Sir, bilkul jabardasti. Meri koi galti nahi thi. Police station mein aaye hain, aap hi insaaf dilao mujhe.

Sir, main Naveen Kumar. Mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Wo Azam naam ka aadmi aur uska ek sathi, ek ladka tha, unhone mere se lootpaat ki hai. Mere do mobile phone le gaye, ek POCO F1 grey colour ka aur ek JIO keypad wala. Aur mere 35,000 rupaye bhi zabardasti cheen liye. Unhone chaku dikhaya tha, saab! Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi. Poori tarah se dara diya tha mujhe. Ab unke khilaf karwai honi chahiye, saab. Mera samaan aur paise wapas dilwa dijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Woh log raat ko mere ghar ghus aaye the, sab kuch loot liya aur mujhe darr ke maare jaan nikal gayi thi. Ab court mein bhi sun rahe hain ki jab tak un logo ki pehchan (identity) nahi hogi, tab tak case aage nahi badhega, aur unko saza nahi milegi. Yeh kya baat hui? Main darti hun ki kahin galat bande ko pakad ke asli mujrim chhoot na jaaye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir! Jin logon ne yeh sab kiya hai, unhe sahi se pehchana jaaye aur pakda jaaye. Meri toh neendein ud gayi hain, mera samaan bhi gaya aur darr bhi baitha hua hai. Kripya karke unki identity confirm karke saza dilwao.

Sir, main Pardeep Kumar Vishwakarma, Phool Chand ka beta hoon. Meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi, subah-subah loot gaya main! Aaj 19.01.2021 ko, subah ke 6 bajkar 10 minute pe, Mubarak Chowk bus stand pe, main Sindhu Border ki taraf jaa raha tha, tabhi kuch logon ne mujhse zabardasti 7,000 rupaye aur mere do phone chheen liye. Ek MI Note-8 Pro tha aur doosra Samsung ka phone tha. Sir, yeh meri poori mehnat ki kamai thi aur mere zaroori phone the. Meri madad kijiye, un choron ko pakdiye! Mera bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai.

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main Satish Kumar. Woh din mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai, 19 May 2015 ki raat thi, kareeb 10:15 baj rahe the. Main G.T. Karnal Road pe, SGT Nagar ke main T-point pe khada tha. Achanak kuch log aaye, unke saath woh Salim bhi tha jise abhi tak pakda nahi gaya. Un sab ne milkar mujhe pakda aur gaadi mein daal liya, Sir. Mera abduction kiya unhone! Unka irada tha mujhe kahin chhupakar galat tareeke se band kar dein. Main toh bilkul toot gaya tha. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi. Main bahut darr gaya tha, Sir. Please, meri madad kijiye. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Dinesh Kumar, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Yeh 23 July 2010 ki raat 9 baje ke aas-paas ki baat hai. Mujhe Bareilly jaana tha, Anand Vihar se Dhaula Kuan pahuncha. Wahan Dhaula Kuan par, main ek auto-rickshaw mein baitha. Sir, usmein driver ke alawa na, pehle se hi do aur log baithe the. Mujhe kya pata tha ki yeh log chor-uchakke hain? Unhone mujhe ghera, mera phone, paise, sab cheen liya. Sir, main toh akela tha, bahut dar gaya tha. Meri madad kijiye, please!

Sir, main Rajeev Kumar hoon. Meri ek tax collection company mein cashier ki job hai, Tikri Border pe cash collect karta hoon. Sir, 05.01.2012 ki subah ki baat hai, kareeb 7 baje. Mujhe kya pata tha ki mere saath kya hone wala hai. Main aur mera co-employee Ramender, hum first floor pe apne office mein pichle din ka collected tax count kar rahe the. Kitna saara paisa table pe pada tha. Darwaza andar se band tha. Tabhi bahar se ekdum se knock hua. Maine socha koi hoga, toh darwaza khol diya. Sir, jaise hi maine darwaza khola, teen ladke andar ghus aaye. Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi, Sir. Unhone...

Sir, main toh Sushruta Trauma Center mein admit hoon. Meri हालत bahut kharab hai, dekhiye na mera haal. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai. Yeh sab mere saath 9 May 2016 ki raat ko hua tha, lagbhag 2:15 baje. Main toh apne ghar mein aaram se so raha tha, kya pata tha ki mere saath aisa kuch ho jayega. Kuch log aaye aur unhone mujhe maara-peeta, pata nahi kyun aur kis wajah se. Meri aankh khuli toh woh log bas mujhe maare jaa rahe the, main kuch kar hi nahi paaya. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aaya ki kya ho raha hai. Bahut dard ho raha hai Sir. Main chahta hoon ki un logon ko pakda jaaye jinhone mere saath yeh kiya hai.

Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Wo Danish aur uske saathiyon ne mere saath itna galat kiya hai. FIR No. 218/2016 jo meri complaint hai na, usmein maine sab bataya tha. Unhone mujhe hathiyar dikha ke loot liya, jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di. Aur Sir, unhone toh farziwaada bhi kiya hai, Section 471 IPC ka case banta hai. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh court mein keh raha hai usne kuch kiya hi nahi, sab jhooth hai! Matlab, itna sab kuch kiya aur ab mukar raha hai? Unpar Section 397 aur Arms Act bhi laga hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh aise kaise bach sakte hain?

Sir, main Indal Kumar, aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Ye baat hai 7 August 2011 ki, raat ke lagbhag 10:30 baje honge. Main Yamuna Vihar bus stand ke paas, Main Wazirabad Road se jaa raha tha, tabhi achanak kuch logon ne mujhe gher liya. Sir, unhone mujhe zabardasti roka, daraaya dhamkaaya. Meri Ken Xinda company ka phone cheen liya aur meri jeb mein jo ₹1000 cash the (do 500-500 ke note), woh bhi zabardasti nikaal liye. Main bahut ghabra gaya tha. Shukr hai, police ne mauke par hi unko pakad liya jab woh bhaagne ki koshish kar rahe the. Sir, ye meri mehnat ki kamai thi aur mera phone bhi. Kripya meri madad kijiye aur un badmaashon ko saza dilwaiye.

Sir, main Ashok Kumar Rathore. Aaj 6 May 2013 ki raat 8:08 baje ke aas-paas ki baat hai. Main New Rohtak Road par, Gali No.4 mein, wine shop ke paas khada tha. Yeh Rahul naam ka ladka, isne mere saath bahut badtameezi ki aur gaaliyan deni shuru kar di. Sir, yeh pehli baar nahi hai, hamesha mujhe pareshaan karta rehta hai. Aaj toh hadd ho gayi. Maine police ko call kiya tha, aur jab ASI Dalbir sir aur Constable Raja Rao yahan aaye, tab tak maine is Rahul ko pakad rakha tha. HC Jai Lal sir bhi maujood the. Sir, mujhe ispe sakht se sakht karwai chahiye, isne meri izzat uchhali hai. Main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main Rajkumar, Kotwali area ka rehne wala hoon. Mujhe na, kal raat jab main ghar jaa raha tha, do-teen logon ne raste mein rok liya. Meri bike se utara, dhakka diya aur mera pura wallet chheen liya. Usme mere Rs. 5000 cash the, aur sare documents bhi. Mera phone bhi le gaye. Main bahut darr gaya tha, unhone mujhe mara bhi. Meri chain bhi kheench ke le gaye woh log. Ab aap hi batao, main kya karoon? Mujhe mera samaan wapas chahiye aur un logon ko pakdo, Sir. Bahut mushkil se kamai karta hoon main, sab chala gaya ek pal mein. Meri madad karo, Sir.

Sir, main Vijay Singh. Meri suniye please. Ye baat hai 16 August 2013 ki raat 11:10 baje ke aas-paas ki. Main Karkarduma DDA Flats ke main gate ke paas tha, Kiran Vihar ke bilkul nazdeek, Delhi mein. Wahan kuch log aaye aur mujhe zabardasti pakad liya, gadi mein daal diya. Unhone mujhe kahin chhupakar band karne ki niyat se abduct kiya tha. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha tha, sir, meri jaan nikal rahi thi. Unhone mere saath loot-paat bhi ki. Mera sone ka kada aur mere do mobile phone bhi chheen liye. Main toh bilkul toot gaya tha. Meri sari mehnat ki kamai chali gayi. Please, sir, un logon ko pakadiye aur mera samaan wapas dilwaiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kya zyadati hui thi. Woh log the na, unhone mujhpar hamla kiya, mera saara samaan loot liya. Main toh bilkul hil gaya tha us din. Aur sir, unhone mujhe us dande se bhi maara tha, jo police ko baad mein unke paas se mila. Sochiyena, kitna dard hua hoga! Mera sab kuch chala gaya tha aur unhone mujhe injure bhi kiya. Meri complaint par police ne investigation ki, aur ab court mein unke khilaaf chargesheet bhi file ho chuki hai. Bas, ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Un gunahgaron ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Sangam Lal Mishra, Allahabad se aaya hoon. Meri truck UP-70-AT-6635 hai, main uska driver aur owner hoon. Aaj 11.1.2011 ko hi main Allahabad se Delhi pahuncha tha, bahut saaman leke. Socha tha yahan load unload karke vapas jaunga. Raat ho gayi thi, main truck ek jagah park karke thoda aaram kar raha tha... Aur sir, tabhi kuch log aaye! Unhone mujhe pakda, maar-peet ki aur mere paas jo cash tha, meri poori mehnat ki kamai, aur truck ke important papers, sab cheen ke bhaag gaye. Meri to kamar toot gayi hai sir. Itni door se aaya, aur yahan mera sab kuch loot liya! Please, meri help kijiye, sir. Kaise chalega ab mera kaam?

Sir, main Rahul Baid. Mujhe aapko 28 April 2008 ki ek bahut darawani ghatna ke baare mein batana hai. Us din kuch gunde zabardasti mere ghar mein ghus aaye the, sir. Unhone humein bandhak bana liya aur maar-peet ki dhamki di. Poora ghar ulat-pulat kar diya aur jo bhi keemti saaman tha, cash tha, jewelery thi, sab loot kar le gaye. Humara parivaar us din se bahut darr mein hai, sir. Raat ko neend nahi aati. Yeh log bahut khatarnak the. Maine Keshav Puram police station mein FIR darj karayi thi, jiska number 215/08 hai. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki un sabhi logon ko, jinhone mere parivaar ki jaan aur maal dono ko khatre mein daala, kadi se kadi saza mile. Hum justice chahte hain, sir.

Sir, main Manjeet Singh, s/o Late Sh. Dharam Pal Anand. Mujhe apni complain darj karani hai. Sir, mere ghar mein jo hua na, woh bahut galat tha. Meri family ke saath bahut bura hua. Sir, woh 4 July 2012 ki baat hai, mere ghar mein lootmaar ho gayi thi, sir. Sab kuch loot ke le gaye badmash. Us din toh mera dimaag hi ghoom gaya tha, itna bada sadma laga tha. Humne jaise hi police ko phone kiya na, toh SI Anil Tushir sir aur Mahender Constable ji, woh turant mere ghar aaye the. Unhone mujhse poori ghatna poochi, kya-kya hua tha, kaise hua sab. Maine unhe ek-ek cheez detail mein batai, sir, ki kaise daka pada aur kya-kya chori hua mera. Uske baad hi SI sir ne meri poori complaint likhi thi, woh rukka banaya tha. Bas sir, ab aap hi kuch kijiye, mera bahut bada nuksaan hua hai.

Sir, main Padmini Jewellers ka malik hoon. Aaj shaam ki baat hai, 1 February 2011 ko, lagbhag 7:44 baje. Meri dukaan, jo Krishna Nagar mein Raghunath Mandir ke paas hai, shop number A-7/21, wahan yeh hadsa hua. Char ladke the, ek motorcycle pe aaye. Unhone mujhe deshi pistol dikhai, sir! Aur fir, meri dukaan loot li. Bahut darr gaya tha main. Meri saari jewellery, jo meri zindagi bhar ki kamai thi, sab le gaye. Kripya karke meri madad kijiye, sir. Bahut nuksaan ho gaya hai mera. Please un choron ko pakdiye.

Sahab, main kya bataun aapko? Aaj bhi woh din yaad aata hai toh meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Woh log, ek-do nahi, pure 23 log! Mere ghar mein ghus aaye the, sab kuch loot liya, aur mere saath woh ghinona kaam kiya. Meri izzat loot li, meri zindagi barbaad kar di. Jhabua ke Sessions Judge ne 28 April, 2001 ko un sabko guilty mana tha, Section 376, 450, 395 jaise sangin aaropon mein. Unhe saza bhi sunai thi.
