Mujhe laga tha ab toh justice mil gaya, ab thoda chain se jeeyungi. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log us judgement ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai, sahab? Kya woh phir se bahar aa jayenge? Mujhe bahut darr lagta hai. Meri madad kijiye, please!

Sir, main Karimnagar se aaya hoon. Meri to kismat hi phoot gayi. Kal raat, kuch logon ne mere ghar pe daka daala hai. Poore 5-6 log the, sab hathiyar liye hue the. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko bahut daraya. Sab kuch loot ke le gaye, cash, sona, jo bhi tha, sab. Humne to socha tha jaan bach jaaye bas. Sir, yeh log koi chhote-mote chor nahi hain, pura gang hai इनका. Ek nahi, kai jagah pe aisa kiya hai inhone, main sun raha hoon. Police ne pakda tha inhe, par abhi bhi darr lagta hai. Sir, please, un sab ko pakdo aur saza dilao. Humare saath bahut galat hua hai. Meri puri zindagi ki kamai chali gayi.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki wo jo 10 badmaash hain na, A-1 se A-10, jinke khilaaf Chotutuppal thane mein 2009 mein case darj hua tha. Poora dakaaiti ka plan bana rakha tha unhone, Section 400 IPC ke तहत. Police ne bahut mehnat ki, poori jaanch-padtaal ke baad unke khilaaf report bhi submit ki thi. Ramannapet ke Magistrate sahab ne bhi us case ko dekha, 2015 mein, aur ab woh mamla Sessions Court mein jaane wala tha. Par ab sun rahi hoon ki woh log phir se koi criminal petition daal rahe hain! Sir, itne saalon se hum insaaf ka intezaar kar rahe hain, aur ye log har baar kuch naya kar dete hain. Please dekhiye na, humein kab relief milega?

Sahab, meri baat suno please! Main Mendai ke ghar se aaya hoon, Banni Purwa gaon se. Humara sab kuch barbaad ho gaya! Pichli 10 ya 11 September ki raat thi, subah hone se bas do-teen ghadi pehle, pura andhera tha... Woh daku log... bahut saare the! Humare ghar Banni Purwa, jo Banni gaon ka hi purwa hai, Kotwali thana, Kheri zila mein, ghus gaye. Unhone sab loot liya, Sir! Jo bhi tha, sona-chandi, paise... sab le gaye. Aur sabse bada gunaah... unhone dacoity karte hue... mere ek parivaar ke sadasya ka qatl kar diya, Sir! Meri *[rishtedar ka naam/relation]* ko maar dala! Humein sirf insaaf chahiye, Sir. Un darindo ko pakdo please. Humein darr lag raha hai. Aap hi kuch karo!

Sir, meri suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon! Woh jo Mohd. Irfan hai na, Ghaziabad wala, usne aur uske 6 saathiyon ne milkar mere saath dacoity ki thi, sir. Us din 3 November 2009 ko, Vasant Kunj area mein, unhone mujhe loot liya tha. Mere saare zaroori samaan, jo bhi tha mere paas, sab cheen liya tha. Bohut darra diya tha mujhe unhone, hathiyar bhi dikhaye the. Main toh soch bhi nahi sakta tha ki kabhi wapis milega. Shukar hai Vasant Kunj police ka, unhone us Irfan aur uski poori gang ko pakad liya. Unke paas se woh hathiyar, bandookein, aur mera loota hua samaan bhi mila hai, sir. Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki un sab ko kadi se kadi saza mile, taaki aage kisi aur ke saath aisa na ho. Bahut mushkil waqt tha woh mere liye.

Sahab, meri baat suniye. Main bahut mushkil mein hoon. Mere gharwale ko unhone pakad liya hai, bilkul bina kisi wajah ke! Pehle toh 26.09.2025 ko ek 'detention order' nikala tha, Number MAG/L&O/04/2025-26, kisi officer ne. Uske baad, 03.10.2025 ko ek aur 'Government Sanction' aaya, HD 497 SST 2025, sarkari taraf se. Aur ab toh 11.11.2025 ko us 'detention' ko aur badha diya hai! Mera aadmi kab se andar hai, aur humein samajh nahi aa raha ki kyun. Yeh sab galat hai, sahab. Hamari family toot rahi hai. Mujhe unhe wapas chahiye. Please, is 'detention' ko khatam karwaiye. Main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main Nannuru Venkata Swamy, Nellore District ke Gudur Rural Mandal ke Thurupu Vendodu Arundhatheeyawada gaon se hoon. Meri ek choti si kirana dukan hai gaon mein. Main kal, 7 August 2007 ko, raat 11 baje tak apni dukan khol ke rakha tha. Phir dukan ki safety ke liye, maine apne pitaji, Varadaiah ji, ko bola ki woh dukan mein hi so jaayen. Aaj subah, 8 August 2007 ko, jab main aaya toh dekha ki meri dukan ke bahar bahut saare log ikatthe ho rakhe the. Sir, dukan ka lock toota hua tha aur andar saara samaan bikhra pada tha. Lagta hai meri dukan mein chori ho gayi hai. Jo bhi cash tha aur kuch valuable items the, woh sab gayab hain. Sir, meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Kitne saalon se mera case chal raha hai. Bangalore Rural District ke Fast Track Court mein judgment bhi aa gaya tha. Hamein laga tha ki ab jaake justice mila hai. Woh tareekh thi 21.09 ki, jab judge sahab ne unko saza sunai thi. Par ab yeh kya? Woh accused number 2, 3 aur 8, aur woh accused number 7 wala, sabne milke fir se appeal kar di hai. Ek hi judgment ke khilaaf do-do appeals! Meri toh samajh nahi aa raha hai yeh sab. Itni mushkil se court mein ladai ki, ab fir se yeh sab shuru ho gaya. Sir, please dekhiye na, mujhe to bus insaaf chahiye. Yeh log dobara bach na jaayein. Meri zindagi pehle hi barbaad ho chuki hai, aur kitna tang karenge yeh log.

Sir, suniye toh meri baat, bohut pareshan hoon main. Woh jo humara puraana dacaiti ka case tha na, Goalpara Sessions Court mein, jismein 51 logon pe Section 400 IPC laga tha? Yaad hai, humne kitni takleef uthai thi us waqt. Abhi pata chala hai ki woh jo case tha, usmein se 34 dacoits toh chhoot gaye hain! Sirf 16 ko saza mili hai. Yeh kya insaaf hua, sir? Itne saal tak hum adalat ke chakkar kaat rahe the, iss umeed mein ki sabko saza milegi. Aur ab itne saare log aise hi riha ho gaye? Meri toh himmat hi toot gayi hai. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki aage appeal chal rahi hai, par mujhe toh bas un sabko pakadna hai jo bach gaye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir, un sabhi dacoits se!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kab se mere case ka wait kar raha hoon. Mera ek order tha 22 February 2021 ka, Amritsar ke Judge saab ne diya tha. Usmein kuch galti thi, toh uski corrected copy mere lawyer ne daali hai, as Annexure P-2A. Yeh sab high court ke order par ho raha hai, unka kehna tha 31 March 2021 ka. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki meri application finally manzoor ho gayi hai. Aur jo meri main sunwai thi, woh bhi aaj hi ho rahi hai, aaj hi isko board pe le liya hai. Matlab, itna time laga diya bas ye sab set karne mein! Sir, main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon. Mera case number CRM-14238-2021 hai. Please, aap kuch kariye, main aur kitna intezaar karun?

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya/aayi hoon. Humari zindagi haram ho gayi hai. Yeh jo Bishen Singh ka giroh hai na, isne poore ilaake mein atank macha rakha hai. Sir, kareeb das-gyarah log hain uske saath, sabke sab khunkhar dakait hain. Inki toh aadat hi ban gayi hai logon ko lootne ki, ghus ke gharon mein, raaste mein. Mere ghar bhi ye log aa chuke hain, sab kuch loot ke le gaye! Sunne mein aaya hai ki sirf yahan nahi, aas-paas ke kayi zilon mein inhone aise hi loot-paat machayi hai. Sir, hum sab bahut dare hue hain, bachche bhi darr se so nahi paate. Please, in sabko pakdiye, inko saza dilwaiye. Humein insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main aapko apni baat batane aayi hoon. Meri zindagi tabah ho gayi thi jab kuch logon ne mere ghar daka dala tha aur... aur unhone mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Mujhe gang-rape ka shikaar hona pada tha, Sir. Itna dukh hai ki main bata nahi sakti. Badi mushkil se, mainne himmat karke police mein complaint ki thi. Phir court mein case chala, woh bhi kitne saalon tak. Judge sahab ne un sabko S.T. Case No. 103/163 of 2000 mein Section 395 aur 376(g) IPC ke तहत दोषी thahraya tha. Unhe 10 saal ki rigorous imprisonment aur 5,000 rupaye jurmana bhi mila tha. Ek pal laga tha ki chalo ab insaaf mil gaya, thoda sukoon milega. Par ab pata chala hai ki unhone upar appeal kar di hai. Kya humein kabhi poora insaaf nahi milega? Kya woh log phir bahar aa jayenge? Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko bahut darr lagta hai, Sir. Hum bas chahte hain ki unhe unke kiye ki saza mile aur humein chain se jeene diya jaye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri suniye na Sir! Woh jo Case Crime No. 06 of 2024 hai na, Brijmanganj police station ka, Maharajganj district mein, usmein jin pe Gangster Act Section 3(1) laga hai, woh log bail maang rahe hain. Agar unko bail mil gayi na Sir, toh meri aur mere parivaar ki zindagi dobara mushkil ho jaayegi. Un logon ne pehle bhi kitna pareshan kiya hai. Hum garib log hain, kahan jaayenge? Mujhe aur mere bachchon ko unse bahut khatra hai. Woh phir se gundagardi shuru kar denge. Meri aap se hath jod kar vinti hai, unko bail mat hone dena Sir. Hamari raksha kijiye!

Sir, meri baat suno na please. Main yahan isliye aayi hoon ki mujhe sunne mein aaya hai ki us mujrim ki saza kam karne ki baat chal rahi hai. Jiske wajah se meri poori family barbaad ho gayi, usko ab sympathy mil rahi hai? Kehte hain uske parivaar ko nuksaan hoga, ya fir legal complications hain. Toh kya Sir, humara nuksaan kam hai? Jo takleef usne humein di hai, jo dard humne saha hai, uska kya? Uske parivaar ka sochte hain, toh mere parivaar ka socho. Meri zindagi tabah kar di hai usne! Koi sympathy nahi honi chahiye uske liye. Jo galti ki hai, uski poori saza milni chahiye. Yeh sab bahane hain, Sir. Mujhe sirf insaaf chahiye, poora insaaf!

Sir, main K ka rishtedaar hoon. Yeh mere K ke berahmi se hue murder ka mamla hai. Woh kitni mehnat se apni chai ki dukaan chalaata tha. Raat ke kareeb 11:30 baje, jab woh ek customer ke liye chai bana raha tha, tabhi woh do log, un attackers ne, meri dukaan mein ghus kar K ko maar diya. Ye cold-blooded murder tha, Sir. Sessions court, East Tanjore ne toh unko faansi ki saza suna di thi, IPC section 302 ke तहत. Madras High Court ne bhi uss saza ko confirm kar diya tha. Ab pata chala hai ki woh Supreme Court mein appeal kar rahe hain, special leave petition daal ke. Humein itni mushkil se insaaf mila tha, ab phir se unko bachne ka mauka mil raha hai? Yeh toh zulm hai, Sir. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin unhe chhod na dein.

Sir, main Jaikam Khan. Kal raat ka mamla hai, 16 August ki baat. Main Surya Transport mein driver hoon, truck number GJ 12Y 7689 chalata hoon. Main Khanna Market, Tis Hazari mein shop number 64 se saara maal load karke nikla tha. Mera helper Saifi Mohd. bhi mere saath tha. Hum jaise hi Roshan Aa ke paas pahunche, sir, kuch log achanak se aa gaye. Unhone humein roka, dhamkaya aur hamara poora truck ka maal loot liya! Bahut dar gaya tha main, sir. Meri toh saari mehnat ki kamayi thi woh, sab chala gaya. Main abhi Sarai Rohilla PS mein aaya hoon, please meri FIR darj karo aur un criminals ko pakdo, sir. Mera bahut bada nuksan ho gaya hai.

Sir, main Sanjay Gupta, s/o Mohan Lal, JA-7A, Ashok Vihar, Phase-I se aaya hoon. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye, sir. 17 June 2012 ko, mere ghar E-1/9, Model Town-II mein dakaaiti hui thi. Main ghar par hi tha, sir, aur un badmaashon ne zabardasti ghus kar saara saamaan loot liya. Mera pura ghar ulat-pulat kar diya tha, sab kuch bikhra hua tha. Meri aankhon ke saamne mera sab kuch chori ho gaya, sir. Main bahut darr gaya tha. Unhone mujhe dhamkaya bhi. Mera bahut nuksaan hua hai. Please, un logon ko dhoondhiye aur mera saamaan wapas dilwaiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Vinod Kumar Yadav, Mahesh Mehta ji ke Karni Wala Farm House godown mein chowkidar hoon. Meri jaan mushkil se bachi hai sir! Baat 17 November 2011 ki hai. Us din main apni duty pe tha, driver Santosh Kumar aur Sardarmal bhi the. Raat ko main godown check kar raha tha, toh dekha ki entry gate ke paas waale room mein do anjaan aadmi so rahe the. Sir, woh hamare aadmi nahi the, bahar ke the! Jaise hi maine unhe jagaya, woh mujhe dekh kar ghabra gaye aur bhaagne ki koshish karne lage. Pata nahi kya chori karne aaye the ya kya nuksaan karne wale the. Meri to himmat toot gayi thi sir. Godown mein aise log ghus aaye. Please unhe pakdo aur sakht karwai karo.

Sir, main toh ek gareeb insaan hoon. Yahan sunte hain ki aapka pura system 4 crore judgments aur laws se bhara hai, sab kuch integrated hai. Bolte hain ki yeh lawyers, researchers, students aur institutions ke liye bana hai, bade-bade judges jaise Dipak Misra J. aur Ashok Bhushan J. bhi involved hain. Par Sir, meri toh koi sunta hi nahi! Itna sab kuch hone ke baad bhi, mera chhota sa case, meri takleef, uski koi value nahi? Kya yeh sab sirf bade logon ke liye hai? Hum jaison ka kya hoga, Sir?

Sir, woh badmaash log, unhone hum 8 logon ko rassi se baandh kar utha liya. Hamein Ganga kinare Maheva gaon tak le gaye. Wahan se do boat mein bitha kar purab disha mein le jaa rahe the. Do ladke the Maheva gaon ke, woh boats chala rahe the, unke naam mujhe nahi pata, Sir. Thodi dur boat chali thi purab ki taraf hi, phir humein zabardasti boat se utaar diya. Main toh bas rone lagi, Sir. Itna darr gayi thi main. Mere pati, Kallu, woh bhi itne ghabra gaye ki apni jaan bachane ke liye Ganga nadi mein kood gaye. Pata nahi ab woh kahan hain, Sir! Meri madad karo!

Sir, main aapko apni problem batane aaya hoon. Baat 2006 ki hai, Mathura ke Kotwali area mein, mere saath bahut bura hua tha. Un logon ne, Ram Babu, uski biwi Sunita, aur woh Sunil aur Gulab Singh, inhone milkar mere ghar pe daka dala tha. Mera sab kuch loot liya tha sir, sara samaan, jo bhi tha, sab le gaye. Aur toh aur, inke paas jaali note bhi mile the baad mein. Mujhe pata hai ki court mein case chala tha, Sessions Trial No. 592 of 2007, aur 2014 mein judgement bhi aaya tha. Ab yeh log appeal mein gaye hain. Sir, itne saal ho gaye hain, main bas itna chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile. Meri poori zindagi ki kamai thi woh, unhone ek jhatke mein barbaad kar di. Kripya meri madad kijiye sir.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon, meri zindagi ka sabse bura din tha woh, June 2000 mein jab mere ghar pe daka pada tha. Un badmashon ne humein bahut daraya, ghar ka saara samaan loot liya, aur mere bachchon ko bhi chot pahunchai. Kitne mushkil se police ne unhe pakda tha, aur court ne 9 June 2000 ko unhe doshi thehraya tha, Section 395 IPC ke तहत. Gangeshwar naam ka ek aadmi toh Section 397 IPC mein bhi convict hua tha. Phir 12 June ko unhe jail ki saza mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log appeal kar rahe hain! Sir, itni saza ke baad bhi, woh bahar aana chahte hain? Meri family bahut darr rahi hai, hamari jaan ko khatra hai. Please, unhe bahar mat aane dena, hum bahut pareshan hain.

Sir, main Mrs. X bol rahi hoon. Yaad hai na, woh mere saath jo loot hui thi? Kitni mushkil se woh mera samaan wapas mila tha, police ne recovery panchnama bhi banaya tha. Mujhe laga ab toh justice milega. Par ab court mein pata chala ki woh panchnama prove hi nahi ho paaya. Jo panch log wahan the, unhone bhi support nahi kiya prosecution case ko. Kehte hain unhone dekha hi nahi ki mera samaan un choron se mila. Sir, mera kya kasoor hai isme? Pehle mera samaan chori hua, phir mushkil se mila, aur ab gawah bhi mukar gaye? Meri to saari ummeed toot rahi hai. Kya mujhe kabhi insaaf nahi milega? Please kuch karo.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Humne itni umeed se woh writ petition daali thi, socha tha court se thoda relief milega. Par nahi, Sir! Meri petition toh seedha dismiss kar di. Ab bol rahe hain ki anticipatory bail ke liye apply karo. Pehle hi itni tension hai, Sir, upar se ab yeh naya paperwork aur daud-bhaag. Mujhe toh lagta hai yeh log jaan-boojhkar mujhe tang kar rahe hain. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, Sir, aur apni family ke liye protection. Par har jagah dhakke kha raha hoon. Bahut zyaada galat ho raha hai mere saath, Sir. Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Shabana Begum hoon. Mera bhai hai, Mohd. Mukram, log usko Pappu ya Akram bhi bulate hain. Sir, usko bina kisi wajah ke pakad liya gaya hai, pata nahi kahan le gaye hain. Humara poora ghar tabah ho gaya hai uske bina. Meri maa ka bhi ro ro ke bura haal hai, unhone bhi complaint ki hai, kyunki baat toh ek hi hai na, hamara beta/bhai kahan hai? Sir, woh bilkul seedha saadha ladka hai, pata nahi kyu usko aise utha liya. Humne court mein bhi petition daali hai par abhi tak kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Please, Sir, kuch kariye. Humari madad kijiye, humein insaaf chahiye. Bas itna pata chal jaaye ki woh theek hai aur kahan hai. Hum bohot mushkil mein hain, Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Kal raat mere ghar mein daka pada hai, sab kuch loot liya! Meri 16 sone ki chadhi hui bronze ki choodiyan chura le gaye, ek bicha necklace, ek jodi sone ke earrings, teen jodi chandi ki payal aur do bronze ki choodiyan bhi. Jo Rs. 400 cash tha, woh bhi nahi chhoda. Aur mere bhai Haripada Pal ke kamre se toh ek pital ka lota, ek kansa ka bartan aur chaar jodi sone ke earrings bhi utha le gaye. Sir, yeh sab ho raha tha na, toh humne himmat karke ek chor ko pakad bhi liya hai, usko roke rakha hai. Meri madad kijiye, Sir, please!

Sir, woh jo hamare saath dakaaiti hui thi na, bahut purana mamla hai, 1987 ka. Arrah court mein, Bhojpur zila mein meri case chali thi. Uss waqt 8th Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne un sab choron ko pakda tha, jinhone humein loot liya tha. Haan, Section 395 aur 412 IPC ke तहत, unko doshi paya gaya tha. Sabko dus saal ki kadi saza mili thi, rigorous imprisonment. Humne socha tha ki ab toh insaaf mil gaya, par ab suna hai unki appeals chal rahi hain. Pata nahi yeh sab kab khatam hoga, itne saalon se lad rahe hain, ab toh bas poora insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai mera case, Crime No. 113/2017, Chinor thane ka? Gwalior mein jo hua tha. Jisne meri sari savings loot li thi, aur mujhe itna maara tha ki main bed-ridden ho gaya tha. Section 394 IPC aur woh MPDVPK Act ke sections lage the us par. Suna hai woh ab bail maang raha hai. Sir, woh 7 June 2018 ko pakda gaya tha, itne time baad use kaise bail mil sakti hai? Usne meri jaan nikaal di thi, sir. Main abhi tak us sadme se bahar nahi aaya hoon. Agar woh bahar aa gaya na, toh meri aur mere parivaar ki jaan ko khatra hai. Meri aap se haath jod kar guzaarish hai, use bail mat dena, please.

Sir, main Dr. S.P. Sarkar, Sagolmang PHC ka Medical Officer, aapke paas apni purani dukh bhari kahani leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi us din! 9 November 1967 ki shaam thi, mere official quarter mein puja chal rahi thi, aur tabhi paanch log ghus aaye. Unhone loot-paat ki, dacaiti ki, sab kuch cheen liya mera! Jaise-taise jaan bachi meri. Sir, uske baad case chala. Lekin pata nahi kaisa insaaf hua, 6 November 1969 ko Judge P.N. Roy ne un paanchon ko bari kar diya! Bari kar diya, sir! Jo mere ghar mein ghuse, mujhe loota, unhe saaf chhod diya? Mujhe toh laga insaaf mila hi nahi. Main aaj bhi us baat se dukhi hoon. Meri aapse request hai, please is matter ko phir se dekhiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye un gunehgaron ke khilaaf.

Sir, main wohi gareeb aadmi hoon jiske saath woh Section 395 IPC waali dacoity hui thi. Un choron ne mujhe aur mere parivaar ko kitna daraya tha, meri saari mehnat ki kamai loot li thi. Police ne un sab ko pakda bhi tha. Par sir, Jeypore ke judge N. Nayak sahab ne 5 July, 1993 ko un sab ko ba-izzat bari kar diya tha. Main to toot gaya tha us din. Meri saari umeed khatam ho gayi thi ki mujhe kabhi insaaf milega. Meri aankhon ke saamne mere dushman chhoot gaye. Ab pata chala hai ki Sarkar phir se unke khilaaf appeal kar rahi hai. Sir, ab mujhe phir se thodi umeed bandhi hai. Meri bas yahi guzaarish hai, un dakuon ko ab ki baar saza zaroor milni chahiye. Unko chhodna mat, sir!

Sir, main ek aam nagrik hoon, aur jo yeh case sun raha hoon na, mera toh khoon khaul utha hai. Yeh log hamare desh ke khilaaf hi jung chhedne ki koshish kar rahe the! Socho, hamare hi desh mein rehkar hamare Bharat ko 'Islamize' karne ke sapne dekh rahe the. Yeh toh seedha-seedha desh-droh hai, sir! Kitna bada apradh hai yeh, hamare samaaj ke liye, hamare desh ke liye. Aise log agar khule ghoomte rahe toh hum jaise aam logon ka kya hoga? Mujhe toh sunkar hi darr lagta hai. Inko toh death penalty se bhi kam saza nahi milni chahiye. Koi mitigating circumstances nahi dekhne chahiye inke liye. Meri toh bas yahi request hai ki inko sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye, taaki koi aur kabhi hamare desh ke baare mein aisa sochne ki himmat na kare. Hum sab ki suraksha aapke haath mein hai, sir. Please, insaaf dilaiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, yeh log toh hamare desh ke dushman nikle! Court ne bilkul sahi kiya, inko maut ki saza mili hai. Sir, yeh log India ke khilaf jung chhed rahe the, sochiye! Poore desh ko Islamize karne ke sapne dekh rahe the, yeh sun kar toh meri rooh kaanp jaati hai. Hamare liye, hamare samaaj ke liye, kitna bada khatra the yeh sab. Inke paas resources the, aur bhi conspirators the inke saath. Aise logon ko toh koi maaf nahi karna chahiye. Meri family, mere bachche, hum sab darte hain aise logon se. Court ne theek hi kiya hai, bilkul sahi faisla hai yeh.

Sir, main bas aapko batana chahti hoon uss din ka. Woh 16 December 2012 ki shaam thi, Dilli mein kitni thand thi, aapko pata hi hoga. Main 23 saal ki ek simple si para-medical student thi, apne sapne the mere bhi. Main toh bas apne dost ke saath PVR Select City Walk Mall, Saket gayi thi, ek film dekhne. Humein kya pata tha, sir, ki woh thandi raat, jo dheere-dheere aa rahi thi, meri zindagi barbad kar degi. Ek pal mein sab kuch khatam ho jaayega. Sir, woh ghanta, woh raat, usne meri poori duniya hila di. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Main toh bas ek film dekhne nikli thi...

Sir, main K.S. Gabriel, Church ka Priest hoon. Bahut pareshaan hoon, sir. Mujhe ek threatening letter mila hai post se. Usmein saaf saaf likha hai ki hum Christian missionaries ko threaten kiya ja raha hai. Ye Vishwa Hindu Parishad ke naam se aaya hai. Soch kar hi darr lag raha hai, sir. Hamari security ka kya hoga? Ye log aise khuleaam dhamki de rahe hain. Main toh woh letter aap logon ko de bhi chuka hoon, jab police wale aaye the aur P.W-1 aur P.W-4 bhi wahan the. Ab bas aap se yahi request hai ki please kuch kijiye, investigate kijiye is matter ko. Humko safety chahiye, sir.

Sahab, main badi mushkil se aapke paas aaya hoon. Mere ghar pe toh jaise qayamat toot gayi hai. Woh 5 May 2006 ki raat... Delhi Police Special Cell ne mere bhai Ayub aur uske saathiyon ko maar dala. Bolte hain encounter tha, par sahab, ye sab jhooth hai! Ye fake encounter tha. Mere paanch apne... Ayub, Sanjay, Shehzad, Aslam... unhe goli maar di gayi. Ek toh andhere ka fayda utha kar nikal gaya, baaki sab ko maar diya. Police kehti hai woh bade अपराधी the, 70 se zyada mamlon mein shamil the — murder, lootpat, rape... Maana ki unhone kuch galati ki hogi, par aise seedhe goli maar dena, bina kisi trial ke? Ye toh insaaf nahi hai, sahab! Mujhe bas mere apno ke liye insaaf chahiye. Meri madad karo, please.

Sir, mujhe suno na please! Kal raat mere saath Abids mein bahut bura hua hai. Main office se ghar aa raha tha, tabhi kuch log aaye. Chehre pe kapda bandha hua tha unka. Unhone mujhe gher liya, sir, aur ek ne toh seedhe mujh par bandook taan di! Main itna darr gaya, kya bataun. Unhone mujhe dhamkaya aur mere paas jo kuch bhi tha, mera phone, wallet, saare paise, sab cheen ke le gaye. Main unko rok bhi nahi paya. Unhone mujhe thoda dhakka bhi diya. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Sir, aise log bandook leke ghoom rahe hain, yeh toh galat hai na? Meri sab mehnat ki kamai thi woh. Please, meri madad karo, unko pakdo sir. Mera sab kuch chala gaya.

Sir, main Abids se aaya hoon. Mere saath bohot galat hua tha, sir. Woh 2003 ki baat hai, mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai woh manzar. Kuch log the, paanch-chhe honge, unhone mujhe raste mein hi gher liya tha. Unke paas hathiyar bhi the, sir! Knife tha, shayad gun bhi dikhi thi. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai, jo paise the, mera mobile, sab kuch cheen liya tha unhone. Main cheekhta raha, darta raha, par koi sunne wala nahi tha. Meri jaan nikal gayi thi. Sir, please un logon ko dhundho aur mujhe insaaf dilao. Maine tabhi Ex.P1 wali complain bhi ki thi. Meri madad karo, sir!

Sir, main aapke paas bahut dukhi hoke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi thi jab Sohaniya aur uske 6-7 saathi, jismein woh Nahar bhi tha, unhone hamare ghar pe daka daala tha Pratapgarh mein. Sir, woh log sirf chor nahi the, unhone mere aadmi ko maar daala tha, Section 396 IPC ke under. Kitni mushkil se judge saab ne unko pakadwaya aur Sohaniya ko toh phaansi ki saza bhi sunai thi Special Sessions Case No. 50/2001 mein. Ab sun raha hoon ki woh sab phir se appeal kar rahe hain (D.B. Criminal Appeal No. 651/2005). Sir, itne saal ho gaye, kya hamara insaaf aise hi ruka rahega? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki woh log chhoot jayenge. Please, Sir, kuch kariye, hamare liye insaaf mat rukne dijiye.

Sir, main aapko Shiv Singh ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Uska poora naam Shiv Singh hai, woh Harsingh Gurjar ka beta hai, aur Tuleka Nangla, Roopbas police station ke area mein, Bharatpur district ka rehne wala hai. Sir, usne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pehle bhi uske khilaaf case chala tha, Court mein bhi baat hui thi (S.B. Criminal Revision Petition No. 926/2005), lekin ab tak mujhe insaaf nahi mila. Hum garib log hain, sir, humara koi sunta nahi. Meri aap se hath jodkar request hai, please uske khilaaf sakht action lo. Uski wajah se main bahut pareshan hoon. Ab aur nahi seh sakta main.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi umeed lekar aayi hoon. Mujhe yakeen nahi ho raha, court ne un sabko baizzat bari kar diya hai! Woh log jinhone meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi, jinhone mere saath daka dala, mera sab kuch loot liya, aur... aur woh ghinona kaam kiya, unhe sections 395, 376G, 412 IPC mein acquittal mil gaya? Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Humne 2005 mein Bawana Police Station mein FIR No. 97 karwai thi. Itne saal intezaar kiya, socha insaaf milega, par ab yeh sunne ko mila hai ki woh sab chhoot gaye. Meri toh saari himmat toot gayi hai. Aap please kuch kijiye, Sir. Yeh appeal jo State ne file ki hai, usme humein justice milna chahiye. Gareeb ko aise hi chhod denge kya? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, dekhiye na, hum kitne pareshan hain. Kitni mushkil se toh Nashik court mein hum jeete the, 24 April 2013 ko decision aaya tha. Sessions Court ne unko (accused 1-4) saza sunai thi. Par ab kya? Woh log phir se appeal kar rahe hain. Woh 4 log, jinne humari zindagi barbad ki, woh abhi bhi chain se nahi baith rahe. Meri family bahut darr rahi hai. Kya humein kabhi insaaf nahi milega? Itne saalon se case chal raha hai, aur ab jab thodi raahat mili thi, toh yeh log phir se appeal lekar aa gaye. Kaisa insaaf hai yeh? Police, kuch toh karo Sir. Hum kab tak aise dhakke khate rahenge? Humara wo 2013 ka judgment, usko challenge kar rahe hain. Mujhe darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Humne Nashik court mein kitni mushkil se case jeeta tha. Judge Sahab ne 24 April 2013 ko jo judgment diya tha na, uske baad toh mujhe laga meri life mein ab finally kuch theek hoga. Mujhe justice mila tha. Par ab kya sunne mein aa raha hai, wohi 4 log, accused number 1 se 4 tak, woh sab appeals file kar rahe hain! Sir, yeh toh fir se wahi trauma hai, meri toh jaan nikal rahi hai soch kar ki kahin yeh log phir se bach na jaayen. Meri saari mehnat, mera paisa, woh sab kya waste ho jaayega? Itne saal lag gaye, please sir, aap kuch karo, mujhe nyay chahiye. Inko dobara meri zindagi barbaad karne ka mauka mat do.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh Ravi, jiske khilaaf humne 1995 mein Hosur police station mein FIR karwai thi (Crime No. 892/95), yaad hai aapko? Kitni mushkil se usko sazaa mili thi, 2004 mein. Woh Assistant Sessions Judge sahab ne faisla sunaya tha, S.C. No. 29 of 2000. Maine socha tha chalo ab insaaf mil gaya. Par nahi! Ab pata chala hai woh phir se appeal kar raha hai (Crl.A.No.265 of 2006). Sir, 11 saal ho gaye hain is ladai ko. Meri toh poori zindagi isi chakkar mein nikal gayi hai. Ab phir se, woh gunda Ravi bahar aa jayega toh kya hoga mera? Meri family ka kya hoga? Please, kuch kariye sir. Hamari taraf se, State ki taraf se, koi dhilaai na ho is appeal mein. Dharmapuri Crime Branch CID wale theek se case ladein. Bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, aur usko sazaa.

Sir, main Praloy Ghosh, Udgir se hoon. Kal shaam mere saath ek bahut bura haadsa hua hai, sir. Main toh itna darr gaya tha ki himmat hi nahi ho rahi thi yahan aane ki. Par aaj subah, jo Patil ke bete hain na, Somnathpur wale, unhone Avinash Raichurkar ji ko bataya. Avinash ji, jo apne yahan ke Sarafa Association ke President hain, woh khud mere ghar aaye. Unhone mujhe bahut himmat di, sir. Bola ki 'Praloy, aise chup nahi baithte, police ko sab batana chahiye.' Unhone mujhe moral support diya, tab jaake mujhe himmat mili yahan aane ki. Meri suniye, sir, please. Jo bhi hua hai, uski report likhni hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Chandrapur se hoon. Meri suniye please. Woh Chakrapani, Ashok, Wasudeo aur Babu alias Prabhakar, in logon ne mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Inhone toh mere ghar mein ghuskar loot-paat ki thi, aur mujhe maara-peeta bhi tha! Pura parivaar darr gaya tha. Court ne unko pakda aur 18-3-1997 ko saza bhi sunayi thi, 7 saal ki kaid aur 5000 fine. Humne socha chalo insaaf mila. Lekin ab yeh log, Rajababu aur Malles ke saath, dobara appeal kar rahe hain. Sir, agar yeh chhoot gaye toh meri zindagi mushkil ho jaayegi. Meri family safe nahi hai. Mujhe dar lag raha hai ki ye phir se humein pareshaan karenge. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to duniya hi ujad gayi. Pune mein jo hua, woh kisi dushman ke saath bhi na ho. Woh log, pura gang tha Sir, dacoits ka! Mere ghar mein ghus aaye, ghar toda, aur jo kuch bhi keemti tha, sab loot ke le gaye. Maine to socha tha meri jaan hi chali jayegi. Sir, ek dacoity nahi, teen-teen dacoity ki hai unhone, ek ke baad ek, alag-alag ilakon mein. Hum log kitne darr gaye hain, ab kaise rahenge? Humein insaaf chahiye Sir. Woh log gunda-gardi kar rahe hain, planning karke sab kuch kar rahe hain. Please, unhe pakdo aur saza dilwao. Meri sari mehnat ki kamai chali gayi.

Sir, main Nagaur se aaya hoon, mera naam Ramu Prasad hai. Meri baat suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh jo aadmi hai na, usne mere saath bahut badi cheating ki hai, pura 420 ka case hai uspar aur mera paisa bhi hadap liya, 406 IPC. Uss par case chal raha hai Criminal Original Case No.236/2013. Hamare Nagaur ke Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate sahab ne toh uske khilaaf ek standing warrant bhi issue kiya tha, 27 June 2024 ko. Socha chalo ab toh insaaf milega, woh pakda jaayega. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh warrant hatwane ki koshish kar raha hai, CrPC ke Section 482 mein petition daal ke. Sir, agar woh warrant cancel ho gaya toh woh toh khule ghumega! Meri saari kamai dub gayi hai uske chakkar mein. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki woh phir se bach niklega. Please meri madad kijiye, usko aise bhagne mat dijiye. Mujhe mera insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Aaj bhi mujhe woh 1980 ka din yaad hai, jab un 8 dakuon ne humare ghar pe dhaava bola tha. Humne kitni mushkil se woh din dekhe, kitne saalon tak intezaar kiya. Jaake 1982 mein unko saza mili thi, 5 saal ki rigorous imprisonment. Mujhe laga chalo ab thoda sukoon milega. Par nahi! Ab itne saalon baad, woh 6 log fir se appeal daal ke aa gaye hain. Sir, ye kaisa insaaf hai? Section 395 IPC mein convict hone ke baad bhi, itne saalon baad bhi humko shanti nahi? Woh log dobara khule ghoomenge kya? Meri toh neendein ud gayi hain. Mujhe dar lag raha hai. Hum garib log kahan tak ladenge, Sir? Aap kuch karo, Sir. Humari suno.

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh jo aadmi tha na, jisne meri life barbaad ki thi, usey toh court ne saza sunayi thi 2 June 2016 ko. Judgment aaya tha uske khilaaf. Humne socha chalo ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab yeh kya sun raha hoon main? Woh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Aaj 13 December 2017 ko phir se case chal raha hai. Yeh kya mazak hai? Jab ek baar judge sahab ne faisla de diya, toh baar baar kyun yeh sab? Hum gareeb log kahan jayenge? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh phir se na chhoot jaaye. Meri toh neend udd gayi hai. Please Sir, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Kamala, firse aapke paas aayi hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai lagta hai. Pata nahi kab ye ladai khatam hogi. Pichle 02.06.201X ko ek judgement aaya tha, tab woh gunehgar convicted ho gaya tha. Mujhe laga tha chalo, ab thoda sukoon milega, insaaf mil gaya. Par ab pata chala hai ki usne toh appeal daal di hai! 13.12.2017 ko uski sunwai hai. Ab phir se court ke chakkar kaato, phir se daro, phir se wahi sab yaad karo. Itne saal ho gaye hain, mera toh ghar barbaad ho gaya hai is case mein. Sir, kahi woh chhoot na jaaye, meri toh jaan nikal jaayegi. Aap hi kuch karo sir, mera support toh koi nahi hai.

Sir, aapko yaad hai na mera woh case? Kitne saal ho gaye, ab jaake mujhe thodi saans mili hai. Un Mehboob, Shahadut Hussain, Mohd. Abdul Qayum aur Shamshad ne milke mere ghar pe daka dala tha! Meri saari mehnat ki kamai, sab kuch loot liya tha. Main toh bilkul toot gaya tha. Meri family kitni darr gayi thi us din, woh din main kabhi nahi bhool sakta. Ab finally, 25 August 2014 ko court ne un sabko Section 395 aur 120B IPC ke under convict kiya hai. Aur Sir, Shahadut, Abdul Qayum aur Shamshad, in logon ne toh chori ka maal bhi apne paas rakha tha, inko Section 412 IPC mein bhi saza mili hai. Ab jaake mujhe thoda insaaf mila hai, Sir. Yeh log jail jayenge, tabhi meri rooh ko shanti milegi.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us raat. Salepur mein mera ghar hai, 29 June 1974 ki raat ko, 10:30-11 baje ke beech, kuch gundon ne mere ghar pe daka dala. Sab kuch loot liya, mujhe aur mere parivaar ko bahut daraya. Kitni mushkil se maine woh paisa kamaya tha, sab chala gaya! Police ne toh pakad liya tha unko, woh Salepur P.S. Case No. 67/1974 mein. Mujhe laga ab insaaf milega. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein bail ke liye application de rahe hain. Section 395/412 IPC ke तहत unpar case hai, aur abhi tak toh bail reject hui hai. Sir, agar woh bahar aa gaye toh humara kya hoga? Woh phir se hume nuksan pahuncha sakte hain. Kripya karke unhe bail na mile, humein suraksha chahiye. Meri suno sir, humein dar lag raha hai.

Sir, main Harpal Singh, woh Harpreet aur Daljinder ke baare mein baat karne aaya hoon. Inka bail pehle bhi do baar reject ho chuka hai, sir. Court ne 2014 mein unki applications withdraw karwa di thi, 22 April aur 4 August ko. Yeh log bahar aaye toh meri aur mere parivaar ki zindagi mushkil ho jaayegi. Pehle bhi inhone bahut pareshaan kiya hai. Agar yeh log phir se bahar aa gaye toh humein jeena mushkil ho jaayega. Main bahut darr gaya hoon. Meri aapse vinti hai, inko bahar mat aane dena. Hum gareeb log hain, sir, kahaan jaayenge?

Sahab, meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi! Wo chori mein mera kitna nuksaan hua hai, aapko pata hai. Ab jaake pata chala hai charge sheet mein ki ye Abdul Salam @ Mulla jisko pakda hai na, usne saara plan pehle se banaya tha. Socho! Pehle se saazish ki thi mere saath aur doosre logon ke saath milkar. Usne to ek godown bhi kiraye pe liya tha sirf is chori ke liye! Aur mera saara taambe ka kabaad wahin le gaye the. Sahab, ye to pura organized crime hai! In sabko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Aur please, mera wo taambe ka kabaad wapas dilwa dijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sahab.

Sir, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Main toh abhi tak darr ke maare kaanp raha hoon. Woh 6 log the, pura gang tha. Unhone mere ghar mein ghus kar sab kuch loot liya. Jo bhi keemti cheez thi, paisa, sona, sab kuch le gaye. Mujhe bandhak bana liya tha aur itna buri tarah maara ki ghambeer chot aayi hai. Abhi bhi dard ho raha hai. Unke paas hathiyar bhi the, talwar, chaku types, aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki de rahe the. Pure ghar mein tod-fod kar di, sab kuch bikher diya. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, un sab criminals ko pakdiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon. Meri zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Maine kitni mushkil se, kitne dhakke kha ke Gautam Buddha Nagar ke Chief Judicial Magistrate sir se 18.11.2020 ko ek summoning order nikarwaya tha, un logon ke khilaf. Socha tha, chalo ab toh court ne unko bulaya hai, insaaf milega. Par, woh log toh ab Section 482 CrPC laga kar high court chale gaye hain! Kehte hain, yeh order hi galat hai, isko cancel karwao. Sir, gareeb aadmi kahan tak lade? Jab court ne finally meri suni thi, ab woh log usko bhi challenge kar rahe hain. Mera toh dimaag kharab ho raha hai. Please sir, meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh log bachne nahi chahiye.

Sir, main toh ek seedha-saadha insaan hoon. Bade mushkil se himmat karke maine woh FIR file ki thi, woh C.R. No. ______ wali. Aur ab pata chala hai ki woh accused no.2, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, woh Section 482 CrPC laga kar meri FIR ko quash karwana chahta hai! Ye kya tareeka hai, sir? Matlab hum jaise gareeb logon ko justice milne hi nahi denge kya? Pehle toh usne galti ki, ab woh court mein jaake meri complaint hi khatam karwana chahta hai. Meri saari mehnat, mera poora bharosa toot jayega agar aisa hua. Please sir, kuch kijiye! Meri FIR cancel nahi honi chahiye, mujhe nyay chahiye!

Sahab, main badi mushkil mein hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi. Ek party ne meri saari mehnat ki kamai le li, aur ab jab main complaint karne ja raha hoon, toh bolte hain ki 'sab law ke hisaab se hua hai'. Kehte hain unke paas bade-bade papers hain, saare kanoon unke saath hain. Jaise yeh '4 crore judgments aur laws' sirf un jaise logon ke liye hi bane hain, hum jaise gareeb aadmi ke liye toh kuch hai hi nahi. Mujhe toh kuch samajh nahi aa raha, bas yehi pata hai ki mujhe chuna laga diya gaya hai. Meri suniye, sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe nyay chahiye, warna main mar jaunga.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri court mein sunwai hui thi. Judge sahab ne khud bola tha ki mujhe do hafte ka interim order milega taaki main anticipatory bail file kar sakun. Maine chain ki saans li thi, socha tha chalo ab thoda time mil gaya. Lekin sir, jab 6 April 2017 ka final judgment aur order aaya na, toh usmein woh do hafte ka extension likha hi nahi tha! Yeh toh unki galti hai, courtroom mein bola kuch aur, aur order mein aaya kuch aur. Meri kya galti hai ismein? Ab mujhe darr lag raha hai, koi bhi mujhe pakad sakta hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karun. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, main galat tareeke se fas gaya hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, Ram Ram! Main bohot pareshan hoon, aap meri madad kijiye. Mera ek bahut purana mamla hai, 1992 ka. Howrah court mein chal raha hai tab se. Teen logon ne meri cheez, meri property, galat tareeke se hadap li thi. Is liye toh main court gaya tha. Tab court ne bhi mana tha ki haan, inhone galat kiya hai, aur unke khilaaf karyawahi shuru ki thi. Lekin ab itne saal ho gaye hain, 30 saal se zyada! Aur woh log ab phir se koshish kar rahe hain ki yeh case hi khatam ho jaaye. Matlab, mujhe insaaf milega hi nahi? Meri saari umar chali gayi intzaar mein. Sir, aap se request hai, meri sunwai karwaiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Jis aadmi par maine aankh band karke bharosa kiya tha, usne mera hi bharosa toda hai. Mere paise hadap liye, aur mere saare hisaab-kitab mein gadbad kar di. Sochiye sir, kitna bada dhokha hai yeh! Pehle toh Poona Cantonment ke Magistrate sahab ne usko saza di thi – 6 mahine ki jail aur 200 rupaye jurmana bhi. Mujhe laga chalo, der se hi sahi, insaaf mila. Par ab pata chala hai ki use chhod diya gaya hai! Yeh sunkar to meri rooh kaanp gayi. Mera sara paisa doob gaya, mera chain chala gaya. Sir, main yahi chahta hoon ki sarkar ne jo aage appeal ki hai, usmein mujhe dobara insaaf mile. Aise dhokebaaz ko saza milni hi chahiye, woh khuleaam kaise ghoom sakta hai?

Sir, main Rajesh/Rani hoon. Meri suniye, please. Yeh Mehul Chinubhai Choksi ne mera sab kuch loot liya hai, aur kitne saalon se main dhakke kha raha hoon/rahi hoon. Har baar court mein jaao toh bas bade-bade 'Constitution' aur 'kanoon' ki baatein hoti rehti hain. Mujhe kya pata Sir, yeh 'substantial question of law' kya hota hai? Meri to life barbaad ho gayi hai. Yeh log bolte hain 4 crore judgments hain, itne laws hain... par mere liye to koi justice nahi hai. Bas mere case ko ghuma-phira ke lamba karte ja rahe hain. Woh bolte hain judgment circulate hoga, par mujhe mera haq kab milega? Sir, please, meri suniye aur mujhe mera paisa/property wapas dilwa dijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, bahut dikkat ho gayi hai. Maine toh badi umeed se woh complaint file ki thi Metropolitan Magistrate court mein, Ahmedabad mein. Mera case number hai 600 of 2011, ab tak chal raha hai. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh accused log, jo teen hain (accused number 1 se 3), woh phir se court mein chale gaye hain. Keh rahe hain ki unka case hi band kar do, cancel kar do proceedings. Matlab, jo unhone mere saath kiya uska koi hisaab hi nahi? Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Itne saalon se main lad raha hoon, aur ab woh chahte hain ki woh aise hi bach jayen? Please, sir, unko aise kaise chhod sakte hain?

Sir, main aapke paas Santrampur Police Station se apni ek complaint lekar aaya tha 2011 mein. CR No. I-10 of 2011 tha woh. Uske baad, mera case number 881 of 2013 Lunawada court mein chal raha hai. Sir, kitne saal ho gaye hain, main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh original accused, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, woh court mein application de raha hai ki mera yeh case hi band karwa de! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri toh puri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur woh ab proceedings quash karwana chahta hai? Usne Section 4 ke तहत jo galti ki thi, uski saza milni chahiye. Itni mushkil se mera case yahan tak pahuncha hai. Please, isko rukne mat dijiye. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main wohi gareeb aadmi hoon jisne pehle FIR darj karwai thi un logon ke khilaaf. Ab mujhe court se notice mila hai, par main ja nahi paya. Aapko pata hai, mera dimaag theek se kaam nahi kar raha, aur na hi mere paas itne paise hain ki wahan jaakar advocate rakhu. Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aaya ki kya likha tha us notice mein. Aur ab sun raha hoon ki woh log (accused) meri FIR hi quash karwana chahte hain! Meri complaint hi band karwana chahte hain. Sir, agar meri FIR hi khatam ho gayi toh phir main kahan jaunga? Woh log toh mujhe aur zyada satayenge. Please meri madad karo, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi police mein, jisko unhone theek se dekha hi nahi. Jab wahan kuch nahi hua, toh main Majistrate Sahab ke paas gaya tha. Maine ek application di thi, Section 156(3) ke तहत, taaki meri baat suni jaa sake aur poori investigation ho sake. Par Sir, 5 April 2006 ko jo order aaya hai na, usne toh meri application hi dismiss kar di. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai! Na police sun rahi thi, aur ab court ne bhi meri investigation ka order nahi diya. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kahan jaaun. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, meri application dismiss ho gayi hai, par meri problem toh waise ki waise hi hai.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut dil dukhi karke aaya hoon. Pata nahi kitne saalon se main insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Woh jo aadmi hai, usne meri saari umar ki kamaai, jo maine uske bharose pe rakhi thi, woh hadap li. Criminal breach of trust aur criminal misappropriation kiya hai usne mere saath, Sections 406 aur 403 IPC lagte hain uspar. Sadar ke SDM sahib ne uske khilaaf charges bhi frame kiye the, pata nahi kab ki baat hai. Aur ab Sir, ab woh Sessions Judge ke paas jaa kar keh raha hai ki uske upar se saare charges hata diye jaayen! Meri toh neend udd gayi hai yeh sunke. Agar woh charges quash ho gaye, toh mera kya hoga? Meri toh saari zindagi ki mehnat chali jayegi. Please Sir, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye, usko aise chhoddna mat.

Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon, aapke paas madad maangne aaya hoon. Maine Jetpur City Police Station mein ek FIR darj karwai thi, CR No. I-107/2011. Un logon ne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai, mera saara paisa hadap liya hai, aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log us FIR ko quash karwane ke liye court mein application de rahe hain, Section 482 ke तहत. Sir, meri suniye, yeh sab jhooth hai! Meri complaint sachchi hai. Unhone mil-jul kar mujhe poori tarah se barbaad kar diya hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Kripya meri FIR ko quash mat hone dijiye, unpar kaarwai honi chahiye. Main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Kitni mushkil se maine woh FIR darj karwai thi, aapko yaad hoga. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki jin logon ne mere saath galat kiya tha, woh court mein phir se kuch paperwork kar rahe hain. Woh chahte hain ki mera woh case hi khatam ho jaaye! Matlab, woh log saaf bach nikalenge? Ye kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri toh saari mehnat waste ho jaayegi. Maine toh socha tha ab insaaf milega, lekin woh log phir se court mein jaakar case ko hatwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Aap hi batao, ek aam aadmi kya kare? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kahin meri sunwai hi na ho. Please, Sir, aap kuch kijiye, meri madad kijiye. Unhe saza milni chahiye, woh aise kaise bach sakte hain?

Sir, main aapke paas bahut pareshan hokar aaya hoon. Maine jin logon ke khilaaf complaint ki thi, woh aaropi log ab court mein chale gaye hain. Unhone wahan ek application lagayi hai, pata hai kis liye? Meri complaint ko hi 'quash' karwane ke liye! Matlab, mera poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain woh. Agar aisa ho gaya toh meri toh poori mehnat barbaad ho jayegi, aur mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Unhone kitna galat kiya tha mere saath, aur ab woh aise bach ke nikal jayenge? Mujhe darr lag raha hai Sir. Please aap meri madad kijiye. Unko aise mera case khatam nahi karne dena chahiye. Aap hi kuch kijiye, nahi toh meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi.

Sir, main Jamnadas Ramchand Soni hoon. Meri ek purani complaint hai Harij ke court mein, 1972 ki. Kya bataun sir, main aur woh jo accused number 1, 3, 4 aur 5 hain na, hum log partners the ek business mein. Humara kaam tha crude oil, petrol, diesel bechne ka. Aur accused number 2, jo 1 number wale ka beta hai, woh humari firm mein employee tha. Magar sir, 24 September 1971 ke aas-paas hi humara yeh business band ho gaya tha. Uske baad se in logon ne jo dhokha-dhadi ki hai, mere paise mare hain, uska hisab ab tak nahi mila. Sir, bahut pareshaan hoon main, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Rita Devi hoon. Meri woh 1996 wali case hai na, CR 268/1996, jo SDJM Sreerampore Court mein chal rahi hai. Uss case mein maine apne pati, unke bhai aur apne sasur ke khilaf complaint ki thi, unhone mujhe kitna sataya tha! Itne saal ho gaye, main insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Ab pata chala hai ki woh log, mere pati aur baaki sab, ek naya application daal rahe hain ki mera puraana case hi band karwa dein! Sir, meri itni saalon ki ladai, mera itna dard, kya sab bekar ho jayega? Maine kitni himmat se woh complaint ki thi. Please sir, aisa mat hone dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, mera case band mat hone dijiye.

Sir, mujhe bahut pareshani ho rahi hai. Maine ek FIR karwai thi 20.11.2019 ko, uska number tha 814. Usmein maine bataya tha ki kaise us aadmi ne mere saath badi dhokadhadi ki thi, mera bharosa todkar mera sara paisa hadap liya. Woh to poori planning ke saath mere saath cheating kar raha tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein jaake meri us FIR ko hi khatam karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, sir? Maine toh insaaf ke liye complaint ki thi. Usne jo mere saath kiya, uski saza toh milni chahiye na? Aap please dekhiye, woh bach ke nikal na jaaye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, dekho na kya ho raha hai! Woh jo badmaash hai na, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, uske khilaaf toh Court ne charges bhi frame kar diye the. Magistrate Sahab ne bola tha ki haan, is par case banta hai. Meri toh thodi himmat bandhi thi ki ab insaaf milega. Par ab woh High Court chala gaya hai, bol raha hai ki uske upar se saare charges hi hata do! Kehta hai usne kuch kiya hi nahi. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi nainsaafi hai, Sahab! Agar uske charges hat gaye toh woh toh aur himmat pakad lega. Main kya karun? Meri madad kijiye, please. Uske charges nahi hatne chahiye, usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai. Woh B.N. Gupta aur unke logon ne, mera poora paisa kha liya, mera bharosa toda (Section 406, 420 IPC). Saazish karke (120B IPC) inhone mujhe barbaad kar diya. Kitne saal pehle, 23 March 2013 ko, court ne bhi maana tha ki inhone galat kiya hai aur unko bulawa bheja tha. Ab pata chala hai ki woh ussi order ko challenge kar rahe hain, bolte hain ki galat hua hai. Sir, yeh to seedha-seedha nyay se bachne ki koshish hai. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, unko koi choot na mile. Mujhe bas mera nyay chahiye, itne saal se main isi din ka intezaar kar raha hoon.

Sahab, main kya bataun aapko, meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai! Woh Ramlal aur uske saathi, unhone milkar mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Maine un par bharosa kiya tha, mera mehnat ka paisa unko diya tha ek business ke liye, par unhone to sab hadap liya! Dhokha, vishwasghaat aur milkar saazish ki hai un sabne mere saath. Pata nahi kitne saal ho gaye, 2013 ki baat hai jab court ne bhi maana tha ki unhone galat kiya hai aur unko bulawa bheja tha. Abhi tak mujhe mera paisa nahi mila, aur woh log aish kar rahe hain. Sir, mujhe justice chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, sahab, please!

Sahab, meri ek complaint thi na, Crime No. 29/2013 wali? Woh maine darj karayi thi us aadmi (A3) ke khilaaf. Ab woh FIR CB CID Chennai mein transfer ho gayi hai, aur mujhe pata chala hai ki woh gunehgar, woh accused, use radd karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Uska bada wakiil court mein keh raha hai ki meri complaint toh law ke hisaab se sahi hi nahi hai. Yeh kya baat hui? Maine sach-sach bataya tha sab kuch, aur ab yeh log meri hi baat ko jhootha saabit karna chahte hain, meri FIR ko khatam karna chahte hain. Police station pe aake main itni mushkil se complaint karti hoon, aur ab yeh log upar se usko hi galat bata rahe hain. Sir, please dekhiye na, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Meri FIR ko radd mat hone dijiye.

Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, Crime No. 29 of 2013, jo maine darj karayi thi us A3 ke khilaaf. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein gaya hai, Section 482 ke तहत, meri FIR ko cancel karwane ke liye. Uska lawyer bol raha hai ki meri complaint galat hai, maintainable nahi hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, sir? Maine itni himmat karke FIR karayi thi, aur ab woh chahta hai ki sab khatam ho jaye? Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar meri FIR quash ho gayi toh. Maine jo bhi kaha hai, sach kaha hai. Meri complaint ko aise hi kaise galat thehra sakte hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap kuch kijiye, please!

Sir, main Santosh. Meri shaadi 07.12.1996 ko Gyan Chand se hui thi. Shaadi ke baad se hi inhone meri zindagi nark bana di hai, sir. Har din mujhe mentally aur physically torture kiya jaata tha. Meri sasural mein mujhe bahut pareshan kiya gaya. Sir, mere maike waalon ne jo dahej ka saaman diya tha na, bade armaan se, woh sab inhone apne paas rakh liya. Meri jewellery, mere kapde, ghar ka saaman – sab kuch inhone kabza kar liya hai. Yeh sab mera tha, inhone mera bharosa toda hai. Mera saaman mujhe wapas nahi mil raha, aur yeh khud use kar rahe hain. Inhone mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, sir. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Sunita Devi hoon. Meri suno, meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai in logon ne. Mere pati Virender Singh, mere jeth Subhash aur meri jethani Kamla Devi, sab milkar mujhe roz roz tang karte hain. Meri nanad Ramawati aur uske pati Rajbir Singh bhi unka saath dete hain. Ye sab ke sab mujhse kehte hain ki main apne maayke se aur dahej lekar aaun. Sir, kitna dahej laati main? Ab to mera stridhan bhi hadap liya hai inhone, jo shaadi mein mila tha. Mere gehne, mere paise, sab kuch cheen liya hai. Main bahut pareshaan hoon, bahut dukhi hoon. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye. In sab ke khilaaf action lo please.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri ek dukaan hai, main ghode ka daana aur oats bechta hoon. Yeh jo appellant company hai na, inke Executive Director sahib khud aate the, bolte the 'Humare ghode hain, unke liye daana chahiye.' Maine bhi bharosa kiya, kitne time se unko regularly maal supply kar raha tha. Par ab dekho, unhone mere poore Nau Lakh Gyarah Hazaar Char Sau Chauntis rupaye (Rs. 9,11,434/-) rok liye hain. Itni badi rakam hai meri! Meri saari mehnat ka paisa hai yeh. Kitne mahine ho gaye, bas tareekh pe tareekh de rahe hain, par paisa nahi de rahe. Meri dukan chalani hai, ghar chalana hai, mujhe mera paisa dilwa dijiye Sir. Main to lut gaya hoon inki wajah se.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh neend haram ho gayi hai un logon ki wajah se. Badi mushkil se maine EOW mein woh FIR no. 193/2019 darj karwai thi. Unhone mere saath itna bada fraud kiya hai, sab paisa loot liya mera (Sections 420, 406), jaali documents banaye (Sections 465, 468, 471), aur ye sab unhone milkar conspiracy ki thi (Section 120B). Abhi pata chala hai ki woh log court chale gaye hain, bolte hain meri woh FIR hi galat hai, use quash karwa do. Sir, agar meri FIR hi khatam ho gayi, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Mera toh poora future daav par laga hai. Aap se request hai, meri madad kijiye, meri FIR ko cancel mat hone dijiye.

Sahab, meri baat suniye. Woh jo aadmi hai na, usne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Usne mera trust toda hai aur mujhe cheat kiya hai. Mera saara paisa, meri cheezein le gaya woh. Main toh ekdum barbaad ho gaya hoon. Maine uske khilaaf Jamnagar ke Chief Judicial Magistrate court mein complaint file kar di hai. Pata hai, mera case number 8185 of 2018 mein register bhi ho gaya hai. Judge sahab ne mera bayan bhi record kiya hai, oath lekar. Ab bas mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Meri sunwai toh ho gayi hai court mein, ab aage kya hoga?

Sir, main kya bataun? Mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Yeh kanoon-wanoon ki baatein, itne saare purane faisle, '4 crore judgments' bolte hain, pata nahi kya-kya hai. Yeh toh sab bade-bade wakiilon aur padhe-likhe logon ke liye bana hai, jo kanoon ki kitaabein padhte rehte hain. Hum jaise aam aadmi ko kaun poochta hai? Court ne jo 'majority' ke hisaab se फैसला de diya, wahi sach maan liya jaata hai. Meri toh bas yahi fariyaad hai ki humein insaaf mile. Pehle bhi aise 'Chandra Deo Singh' jaise case ka hawala dekar, mera मामला bhi dabaya ja raha hai. Mujhe lagta hai ki meri sunwai theek se nahi ho rahi. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe sahi insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Yaad hai na, maine un logon ke khilaaf FIR karwai thi? Wohi jinhone mere saath bahut galat kiya tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein anticipatory bail ke liye application daal rahe hain. Poore 6 log hain Sir! Yeh kya ho raha hai? Abhi tak unko pakda nahi gaya, aur woh pehle hi apni giraftari se bachne ke liye jugad laga rahe hain. Agar unko bail mil gayi toh humara kya hoga? Hum toh darr ke mare mar jayenge. Humko kaise insaaf milega Sir? Aap please unko jaldi pakdo, warna woh toh humesha ke liye bach jayenge. Meri madad kijiye Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh jo accused hain na, woh number 3 aur 5, jinhone mere saath itna galat kiya tha, ab woh phir se court mein naya locha kar rahe hain. Unhone CrPC ke Section 482 ke andar ek petition daali hai, kehte hain humein toh bachao! Matlab, woh chahte hain ki yeh poora case hi khatam ho jaye. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai yeh sunke. Aur haan, jab court mein baat hui thi na, tab Gujarat Sarkar ki taraf se Manan Maheta sahab ne notice bhi accept kiya tha. Sir, yeh log badi adalat mein jaakar apni power use kar rahe hain. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Woh aise kaise bach sakte hain? Meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Maine badi mushkil se woh FIR darj karwai thi, jo mere saath galat hua tha uske khilaaf. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai, woh 6 log jinhone mujhe itna pareshan kiya, woh court mein anticipatory bail ke liye ghoom rahe hain. Matlab, unko darr lag raha hai ki meri complaint ke baad police unhe pakad legi. Toh woh Cr.P.C. ke Section 438 ke तहत pehle se hi zamaanat lene ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sir, yeh toh saraasar nainsafi hai! Unhone galti ki hai, aur ab woh jail jaane se bachna chahte hain. Agar unko aise hi bail mil gayi, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh saari mehnat barbaad ho jayegi. Please sir, kuch kijiye, unhe pakda jaana chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Maine ek FIR karwai thi na, us case mein abhi tak un logon ko pakda nahi gaya hai. Abhi sunne mein aaya hai ki woh 6 log jo hain na, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha, woh anticipatory bail ke liye court mein application laga rahe hain, taaki unko arrest na kiya jaa sake. Sir, agar unko anticipatory bail mil gayi toh woh toh khule ghumenge aur mujhe aur pareshan karenge! Meri aapse request hai, sir, please unko jaldi se arrest karwaiye. Wo log Cr.P.C. ke Section 438 ka use karke bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri complaint par action lijiye, sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Maine itni mushkil se woh FIR darj karayi thi, socha ab toh insaaf milega. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh 6 ke 6 log, jinke khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh anticipatory bail ke liye application de rahe hain. Matlab, woh arrest hone se bachna chahte hain! Yeh toh seedha-seedha dhoka hai na sir? Agar unko bail mil gayi, toh woh phir se mujhe pareshan karenge, meri jaan ko bhi khatra hai. Mujhe unse bahut darr lagta hai. Meri suno na sir, please unhe bail mat milne dena. Unko pakdo, tabhi mujhe thoda chain milega. Main bahut dukhi aur pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Maine jo FIR karwai thi na, woh [FIR number] waali, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh jo cheh log hain jinke khilaaf maine complaint di thi, woh sab anticipatory bail ke liye apply kar rahe hain. Matlab, police unko pakde usse pehle hi woh log 'advance bail' le lenge. Sir, agar unhe aise hi bail mil gayi toh woh toh seedhe ghoomte rahenge, aur humein aur pareshaan karenge. Meri jaan ko bhi khatra hai unse. Sir, please kuch kariye, unhe bail milni nahi chahiye. Hum jaise aam log kahan jayenge agar aisa chalta raha? Meri suno sir, please.

Sir, dekhiye na main kitni pareshan hoon. Mera case court mein chal raha hai, aur woh doosra party, Respondent No.2, woh aa hi nahi raha. Uske advocate Mr. Nigam Shukla ka demise ho gaya tha, unko notice bhi bheja gaya, fir bhi woh present nahi hua. Kya mazak hai Sir? Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Mere Articles 14, 19, 21 ke rights ka kya hua? Jab doosra party hi nahi aa raha toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Yeh Section 482 aur Article 226 sab kitabi baatein hain, asliyat mein mujhe bahut takleef ho rahi hai. Please kuch kijiye, mujhe justice chahiye.

Sir, main Ramu bol raha hoon. Meri patni ke saath jo hua tha, uski FIR karwai thi na maine? Ab ye log court mein phir naya drama kar rahe hain. Mere vakeel sahab, Mr. Chirag Patel, ne bataya ki unhone high court mein Section 482 ke under application daali hai. Kehte hain, 'rule' aur 'service of notice' waive kar diya hai. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai, Sir. Ye Mr. Manan Mehta bhi hain State ki taraf se. Kya mera case kamzor pad raha hai? Meri toh neendein udd gayi hain. Aap please dekho na, Sir. Ye log mera case khatam karwana chahte hain, aur main bas insaaf chahta hoon apni patni ke liye. Meri madad karo, Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri suniye, please. Un 6 logon ne mere saath jo kiya hai na, woh bahut galat hai. Humne FIR bhi karwa di thi, sab bata diya aapko. Par abhi tak unko pakda nahi gaya! Aur ab toh mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log, woh 6 ke 6, anticipatory bail ke liye apply kar rahe hain. Matlab, giraftari se bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain! Ye kya insaaf hai, Sir? Meri toh duniya ulat-pulat ho gayi hai, aur woh log abhi bhi aazaad ghoom rahe hain, kanoon se bachne ke tareeke dhoond rahe hain. Unhein toh jail mein hona chahiye! Meri aap se hath jod kar vinti hai, unhein jaldi se pakdo aur saza dilwao. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sir, please!

Sir, main aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Maine Ujjain ke Magistrate sahab ke paas ek complaint file ki thi. Un logon ne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya tha, mere paise hadap liye the, jali kagaz banaye aur saazish karke mujhe loota. Us par Magistrate sahab ne 13.04.2018 ko unhe bulane ka order bhi diya tha. Ab pata chala hai ki wo meri us complaint ko khatam karwana chahte hain, use quash karwana chahte hain. Main toh gareeb aadmi hoon, sir, mera toh sab kuch chala gaya. Meri bas yahi appeal hai ki meri complaint band na ho. Please kuch kijiye, sir! Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon jisne pichle mahine aapke yahan complain ki thi, yaad hai na? Meri woh jo FIR darj hui thi, usmein abhi tak kuch khaas hua nahi aur ab toh aur badi mushkil aa gayi hai. Abhi pata chala hai ki jin logon ke khilaaf maine FIR karwai thi, unhone High Court mein koi "petition" daal di hai. Kehte hain, yeh "Section 482 CrPC" ke tahat hai aur isse mera poora case hi band ho jayega. Sir, yeh sunke meri toh aankhon se neend udd gayi hai. Kitni himmat karke maine FIR karwai thi, aur ab aise sab khatam ho jayega? Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye.

Sahab, main kya bataun? Meri toh life barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Indrakant Jha, jisne mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya, mera paisa hatha liya (Section 384, 406, 120-B IPC), ab woh keh raha hai ki uspar koi case hi nahi banta! Hamare PS Kasim Republik, Ghaziabad ne uske khilaaf charge sheet di thi 21 December 2023 ko, aur court ne bhi usko 2 February 2024 ko summon kiya tha (Case Crime No. 455/2023). Ab woh upar ki court mein chala gaya hai, keh raha hai ki yeh charge sheet aur summoning order galat hai. Sir, usne mujhe bilkul barbaad kar diya hai, woh kaise bach sakta hai? Mujhe toh bas justice chahiye, Sahab, please help kijiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh life hi barbaad ho gayi hai iss ek FIR ki wajah se. Pata nahi, koi Engineer sahab hain Vidyut Vibhag se, unhone mere khilaaf Complaint kar di thi Rohtak Civil Lines police station mein. Saal 2011 ki baat hai, FIR No. 296 thi. Sections lagaye hain 406 aur 420 IPC ke, cheating aur bharose ka todna! Main toh seedha-saadha aadmi hoon, kahan se main cheating karunga? Sir, ab tak iske chakkar mein itna pareshaan ho chuka hoon. Har taareekh pe jaana, kachahri ke chakkar kaatna... Meri bas yahi guzaarish hai, please Sir, yeh jo FIR mere upar lagi hai na, aur uske baad jo bhi case chal raha hai, usko khatam karwa dijiye. Main toh bas shaanti se jeena chahta hoon. Bohot hogaya Sir, bohot ho gaya.

Sir, main Ramu. Mujhe bohot tension hai. Ek aadmi ne bola tha ki woh mujhe achhi job dila dega. Usne mujhse paise liye, bola tha application fees hai aur advance. Maine usko ₹50,000 diye the, apni poori savings thi woh. Ab woh phone nahi utha raha aur mere messages ka bhi reply nahi karta. Main uske ghar bhi gaya, par woh wahan bhi nahi milta. Meri family bohot pareshaan hai, humein samajh nahi aa raha kya karein. Aap hi batao, main kahan jaaun? Mujhe apne paise wapas chahiye aur usko saza milni chahiye. Isliye main yeh application lekar aaya hoon, jo bhi relief mil sakta hai, please dila do. Bahut bada dhoka hua hai mere saath.

Sir, meri suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Main woh 'petitioner' hoon jiska case abhi court mein chal raha hai. Mere vakil hain na, woh Aadit R. Sanjanwala saab, wohi meri taraf se lad rahe hain. Aur woh jo Dipan Desai hai (respondent No.2), usne aur yeh sarkari babuon ne (jo State ke hain) meri zindagi mein bawaal macha rakha hai. Maine court mein ek petition daali hai sir, bahut saari 'reliefs' maangi hain. Kya karun, unhone meri zameen pe kabza kar liya hai, bahut tang kar rahe hain. Pehle toh police ne meri suni hi nahi, tabhi toh itna bada kadam uthana pada court jaane ka. Ab aap hi batao, mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri madad kijiye sir, bahut lachari mein hoon main.

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Mera ek case chal raha hai, Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. 19007 of 2014. Usmein pehle mujhe thodi raahat mili thi, ek 'interim order' tha. Ab jab court ne main matter ka faisla kiya, to pata nahi mere saath kya ho gaya, mera woh interim order aage nahi badhaya. Jabki, isi se jude dusre case mein, unka interim order do hafte ke liye continue kar diya gaya. Mere saath aisa discrimination kyun, sir? Main bahut mushkil mein hoon. Meri bas itni si request hai ki mera bhi woh interim order aaj se do hafte ke liye continue karwa do, jaise unka kiya hai. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri suniye please. Woh jo mera Criminal Case No. 839 of 2016 chal raha hai na, jismein un logon ne mere saath galat kiya tha... ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh log High Court mein application dekar us case ko band karwana chahte hain. Pata nahi kaun sa Section 482 CrPC laga kar, apni power ka use karke mera case khatam karwana chahte hain. Saab, itni mushkil se toh yeh case shuru hua hai, agar ab yeh bhi band ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Unko saza kaise milegi? Aap hi bataiye main kya karoon? Please, meri madad kijiye. Meri sunwai toh hone dijiye, yeh case band mat hone dijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri suno toh sahi, us badmash ne mere saath kitna galat kiya hai. Abhi pata chala hai ki woh court mein anticipatory bail ke liye apply kar raha hai, matlab arrest hone se pehle hi chhootne ki koshish kar raha hai! Agar usko bail mil gayi toh woh toh aur sar pe chadh jaayega. Usne mere saare paise hadap liye aur ab dhamkiyan bhi de raha hai. Uska lawyer, Mr. Parab ya Mr. Mundargi, pata nahi kaun, bol rahe hain ki usko bail mil jaayegi. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai, Sir. Aap kuch karo, please. Us aadmi ko pakdo, usse mere paise wapas dilwao. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sir. Warna main kahan jaungi?

Sir, main Rahul hoon, Dilip Takalkar bol raha hoon. Pata nahi kya zamaana aa gaya hai! Maine toh kitni mushkil se un dhokebaaz logon ke khilaaf complaint file ki thi (31.08.2021 ko), jinhone mere saath bahut badi cheating (Section 420) aur bharosa todne (Section 406) ka kaam kiya tha. Indore ki court ne bhi meri baat suni thi, Daroga ji, aur unko bulane ka order bhi diya tha (20.10.2022 ko). Ab suna hai woh log Section 482 CrPC laga ke meri poori complaint hi khatam karwana chahte hain! Yeh toh sarasar nainsafi hai, Sir. Hum garibon ko insaaf bhi nahi milne denge kya? Kitna paisa aur time lagaya hai maine iss case mein. Kripya meri madad kijiye, unko aise meri complaint quash nahi karne dena chahiye.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aayi hoon. Meri shadi Om Saran Gupta ke bete, Siddharth Gupta @ Lohia se hui thi. Shaadi ke baad se hi inhone meri zindagi jhand kar rakhi hai. Mere sasur Om Saran, pati Siddharth, aur devar Ashish Gupta – yeh sab milkar mujhe dahej ke liye roz tang karte hain, gaaliyan dete hain, maar-peet karte hain. Mera maike se aaya hua saara samaan bhi inhone hadap liya hai, wapas nahi de rahe. Pichle saal 22.01.2015 ko maine inke khilaaf FIR karwai thi (number 073/2015), Sections 498A aur 406 ke tehat, inke zulm aur dhokebaazi ke liye. Ab toh Sir, yeh log us FIR ko bhi cancel karwana chahte hain, taaki inko koi saza na mile. Mujhe sirf insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai un logon ne. Pichle saal, Case No. 13001 of 2018, 'State Vs. Brijpal Singh & Others' wala case chal raha hai, Etah court mein. Kitni mushkil se toh yeh case shuru hua tha, maine kitni bhaag-daud ki thi. Ab pata chala hai ki Brijpal Singh aur uske saathi is proceedings ko challenge kar rahe hain. Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate, Court No. 18 mein yeh hearing chal rahi hai. Unhone Sri Jagdev Singh aur Sri Sheetla Prasad Singh jaise bade-bade vakeel khade kar diye hain. Sir, gareeb aadmi hoon, meri toh koi sunta hi nahi. Agar yeh case ruk gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Kripya karke aap meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main Rajesh. Mujhe aapki madad chahiye. Woh log, Anil aur Sunil, jinhone mere saare paise kha liye, mujhe dhokha diya, ab pata chala hai ki woh court mein anticipatory bail le rahe hain. Bade-bade vakeel khade kiye hain unhone! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh suno, main itna pareshan hoon, mera ghar bikne ki naubat aa gayi hai. Agar unko aise hi bail mil gayi, toh woh toh aur logon ko bhi lootenge, aur mujhe bhi threaten karenge. Mujhe meri mehnat ka paisa wapas chahiye, aur unko saza milni chahiye. Please, unko aise kaise chhod sakte hain? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... mera toh poora vishwaas tod diya usne. 2010 mein jab usne mere saath dhokha kiya, meri saari saving le gaya, tab bade sahab (Executive Engineer) ne meri madad ki thi. Humne FIR karwai thi, City Bhiwani mein, 408 aur 420 IPC ke तहत. Kitne saal ho gaye, 2010 se aaj tak, main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh aadmi, jisne humein itna nuksaan pahunchaya, woh ab apni FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai Sir? Meri saari ummeed toh us FIR par tiki thi. Agar woh bhi khatam ho gayi, toh main kahan jaunga? Main garib aadmi hoon, mujhe mera insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko pata hai, mujh par ek jhootha case bana diya hai. Yeh FIR No. 11, jo 16.12.2011 ki hai, Narwana Sadar Police Station, Jind mein register hui thi. Executive Engineer साहब ne, jo Vidyut Prasaran Nigam Limited se hain, pata nahi kyun mere khilaaf complaint kar di. Unhone mujh par Section 406 aur 420 ke charges lagaye hain – dhokhadhadi aur vishwasghaat ka. Main toh poora beqasoor hoon, sir! Maine kabhi aisa kuch kiya hi nahi. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai is chakkar mein. Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aata, yeh sab kyun ho raha hai mere saath. Meri aapse yahi request hai, please yeh galat FIR aur uske baad ki saari proceedings ko khatam karwa dijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Mujh par Mujesar police station mein 10.12.2015 ko ek FIR number 573 register ki gayi hai. Yeh DHBVN waalon ne karwayi hai, Section 406 aur 409 IPC ke तहत. Sir, main ek aam aadmi hoon, main koi criminal nahi hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki unhone mujh par 'criminal breach of trust' ka ilzaam kaise laga diya. Main poori tarah se innocent hoon, sir. Yeh FIR totally galat hai, farzi hai. Meri family tension mein hai, main har roz court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. Please, sir, meri madad kijiye. Iss FIR ko quash karwane mein meri help karein. Main bas insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main complaint karne aaya hoon. Meri department ke saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai, sir! Yeh log bade fraud hain! Inhone humara paisa khaya hai, sir. Poori planning ke saath (120-B) inhone saare documents mein hera-pheri ki hai, sab kuch jaali banaya hai. Yeh seedhi-seedhi cheating (420) hai aur criminal breach of trust (406) bhi. Mujhe nahi pata tha ki yeh log itne ghatiya hain. Meri complaint par hi toh yeh FIR No. 82, jo 01.02.2011 ko Civil Lines, Karnal mein darj hui thi, woh hui thi. Ab yeh log chahte hain ki woh FIR aur uske baad jo charges (08.09.2011 aur 10.03.2012) lage hain, sab khatam ho jaye. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, sir? Maine itni mushkil se yeh case banwaya tha. Mujhe justice chahiye, sir. Inko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi complaint leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai uss Ramu ne. Maine uss pe itna bharosa kiya tha, apna sab kuchh de diya. Usne bola tha ki mera paisa double kar dega, ek bade business mein lagayega. Main Gareeb aadmi hoon, Sir, meri saari jama पूंजी thi woh. Maine usko trust karke apni life savings de di. Pehle thode paise wapas bhi diye, toh mujhe laga sab theek hai. Par ab woh gayab ho gaya hai, phone bhi nahi utha raha. Yeh toh saaf-saaf dhokha hai, cheating hai, aur mera bharosa toda hai usne. Model Town, Panipat mein rehta tha woh. Meri aapse haath jod ke request hai, Sir, please uske khilaaf FIR darj karo. Mere paise wapas dilwa do, please! Usne mujhe poora loot liya hai.

Sir, main bohot pareshan hoon. Kitne saalon se meri ek FIR chal rahi hai Karnal Civil Lines police station mein, uska number 901 hai aur yeh 2011 ki baat hai! Meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is wajah se. Vidyut Prasaran Nigam ke ek Executive Engineer ne mere khilaaf jhoothi complaint ki thi. Kehte hain maine Section 406 aur 420 ke तहत cheating aur vishwasghaat kiya hai. Sahab, main kasam khata hoon, maine kuch galat nahi kiya. Mujhe samajh nahi aata meri galti kya hai. Main aapse hath jod kar vinti karta hoon, please is FIR ko aur iske baad ki saari proceedings ko cancel karwa dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main bohot mushkil mein aaya hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, FIR No. 332/2022, Kotwali PS mein maine darj karayi thi kuch mahine pehle. Maine socha tha ab justice milega, par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh dusre paksh wale log, jinke khilaf maine complaint ki thi, unhone court mein koi application daali hai. Meri FIR ko hi quash karwana chahte hain, Sir! Matlab meri complaint ko khatam karwana chahte hain. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Maine itni himmat karke FIR darj karayi thi, ab agar woh hi khatam ho gayi toh mera kya hoga? Meri toh sunwayi hi nahi hogi. Mujhe abhi abhi pata chala ki court ka order reserved ho gaya tha aur ab pronounced bhi ho gaya hai. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha Sir, mera case strong tha, woh log phir se haavi ho jayenge. Please, aap meri help kijiye, meri FIR ko quash hone se rokiye. Main bohot pareshan hoon.

Sahab, main bahut dukhi man se aapke paas aaya hoon. Meri zindagi ki saari kamai aur mehnat ek FIR par tiki hai, jiska number 10 hai. Yeh Narwana Sadar Police Station, District Jind mein 28.01.2011 ko darj hui thi. Un logon ne mere saath 406 aur 420 IPC ke तहत badi cheating aur dhokhadadi ki thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein jaakar meri yeh FIR quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sahab, itne saalon se main insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon, aur ab woh mera case hi khatam karwana chahte hain? Agar yeh FIR quash ho gayi, toh mera kya hoga? Meri to duniya hi ujaad jayegi. Please, mujhe insaaf dilaiye, meri madad kijiye!

Sir, Ram Ram! Main Civil Lines, Gurgaon se aaya hoon. Mujhe bahut badi problem ho gayi hai. Ek aadmi hai, usne meri poori zindagi kharab kar di hai. Usne mujhse kaha tha ki mera ek kaam karwa dega, sarkari department mein, aur uske liye usne mujhse 5 lakh rupaye liye. Maine us par poora bharosa kiya tha, apne saare savings usko de diye. Ab na toh woh kaam hua hai aur na hi woh mere paise wapas kar raha hai. Jab main uske paas jata hoon toh naye-naye bahane banata hai, aur ab toh dhamkiyan bhi dene laga hai. Yeh toh seedha-seedha dhokha hai, sir! Meri poori mehnat ki kamai thi woh. Kripya meri madad kijiye, us par strict action lijiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, sir.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh life hi kharab ho gayi hai is case ki wajah se. Ek FIR file kar di hai mere khilaaf, Police Station Camp Palwal mein, aur woh bhi DHBVN walon ne. Executive Engineer ne pata nahi kya complaint kar di hai, Section 406 IPC laga diya hai mujh par. Yeh 2014 ki baat hai, FIR No. 377 hai, 30.07.2014 ki. Sir, maine toh kuch galat kiya hi nahi hai, yeh toh seedha seedha mujhe phasaya jaa raha hai. Meri toh izzat kharab ho rahi hai society mein, court kachahari ke chakkar kaat kaat ke thak gaya hoon. Please sir, meri help kijiye, yeh FIR aur jo bhi proceedings chal rahi hain, sab band karwa dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek FIR hai na, woh 332/2022 Kotwali thane mein, un haramkhoron ke khilaaf. Unhone meri zameen hadapne ki koshish ki thi, aur jab maine roka toh dhamkiyan di, mujhe maarne ki bhi koshish ki. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein application de rahe hain meri FIR ko cancel karwane ke liye. Mera case, jispar maine itna bharosa kiya tha, usko aise hi band kar denge kya? Maine toh socha tha mujhe insaaf milega. Court se abhi 2025 mein order aane wala hai, pata nahi kya hoga. Mujhe dar lag raha hai, Sir. Meri madad kijiye, please. Woh log bahar ghoom rahe hain, aur main yahan darr darr ke jee rahi hoon. Meri suniye, Sir.

Sir, main na Executive Engineer hoon, Vidyut Prasaran Nigam Limited se. Humare department ke saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai. Kisi ne humare saath cheating ki hai, Section 406 aur 420 IPC ke under. Unpar bharosa kiya tha humne, lekin unhone saara paisa aur kaam ka gaddbad kar diya. Yeh kitne saalon se chal raha hai, sir. Humne 26.11.2014 ko Dadri City Police Station mein ek FIR bhi karwayi thi, jiska number 436 hai. Ab woh log us FIR ko khatam karwana chahte hain. Agar aisa ho gaya na, toh humara toh bahut nuksaan ho jayega. Yeh public ka paisa hai, sir. Unhe toh saza milni hi chahiye. Meri aapse yahi request hai.

Sir, main Executive Engineer hoon, Vidyut Prasaran Nigam Limi se. Hum bahut pareshaan hain, sir. Hamare department ke saath bahut bada dhoka hua hai. In logon ne jaan-boojhkar hamare bharose ko toda hai, sir, aur hamari company ko bade level par cheat kiya hai. Jo bhi humne inko trust kiya tha, sab galat nikla. Inhone Section 406 aur 420 IPC ke तहत fraud kiya hai, hamare funds aur kaam mein gadbad ki hai. Isliye humne 20.12.2011 ko Thanesar City Police Station mein inke khilaaf FIR No. 647 darj karwai thi. Ab yeh log us FIR ko quash karwana chahte hain, jo bilkul galat hai. Meri aapse request hai, sir, ki hamein justice mile aur inko unke kiye ki saza mile. Pura department pareshaan hai, sir, is situation se.

Sir ji, main bahut pareshaan hoon, sach bata raha hoon, meri to neend ud gayi hai. Pata nahi ye log kya kar rahe hain. Woh saamne waale hain na, unhone meri zameen par kabza kar liya hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, main court ke chakkar laga raha hoon. Abhi suna hai ki mere hi case mein teen-teen alag applications chal rahi hain, aur woh sab ek saath suni ja rahi hain, ek hi judgment aayega. Ye sab kya ho raha hai Sir? Ek taraf woh log mujhe tang kar rahe hain, aur doosri taraf court mein bhi itne saare naye-naye paperwork aur sunwaiyan. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Bas, meri aapse request hai ki meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Bahut ho gaya ab, main aur nahi seh sakta.

Sir, main Anjar-Kutch se hoon. Mera ek bahut purana case hai, Criminal Case No. 584 of 2012. Kitne saal ho gaye, main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon. Sir, 08.02.2016 ko Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate Sahab ne ek order pass kiya tha. Jo samne wale logon ne discharge ke liye application di thi na, Exh.17 wali, woh reject ho gayi thi. Humein laga tha chalo ab unko discharge nahi milega, mera case aage badhega. Par ab pata chala hai Sir, woh log ussi order ko challenge kar rahe hain, keh rahe hain unhe discharge milna chahiye. Ye kya ho raha hai Sir? Ek taraf umeed bandhti hai, aur dusri taraf ye log naya panga khada kar dete hain. Main bohot pareshan hoon, Sir. Mujhe bas mera insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main Surat se Aadarsh Rakumar Choradiya, saree ka business karta hoon. Meri aapse ek bahut zaroori complaint hai. Yeh Gumansing Parmar naam ke aadmi ne mere saath bahut bada dhoka kiya hai. Baat 2014 ki hai, yeh ek broker banke mere paas aaya tha. Bada achha ban ke dikhaya, aur mere se Rs. 50,000 ka maal cash mein khareed liya. Pehle toh sab theek laga, par baad mein pata chala ki yeh toh pura cheating ka mamla hai, sir. Usne mera vishwas toda hai, mera paisa maar liya hai. Meri poori mehnat ki kamai thi, usne fraud kiya hai. Meri aapse request hai, ispe sakht se sakht action lijiye. Salabatpura Police Station mein iski FIR bhi hai, CR No.I-127 of 2018. Please meri madad karo!

Sir, main aapko apni mushkil batane aaya hoon. Mujhe poora dhokha diya gaya hai! Maine un logon par itna bharosa kiya tha, meri saari mehnat ki kamai, apni savings unko de di thi.
