Unhone bade-bade vaade kiye the ki double kar denge, business mein laga denge. Par sir, woh sab jhooth nikla. Mera paisa le liya aur ab koi jawab nahi de rahe. Kagdapith Police Station area mein hi yeh sab hua tha, sir. Woh sab milkar, ek-doosre ke saath milkar, mujhe loot rahe the. Ye toh seedha-seedha cheating aur gaban hai! Main toh barbaad ho gaya hoon, sir. Mera future unhone khatam kar diya. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Un logon ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye aur mera paisa wapas milna chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai! Humare saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai, Sir. Maine Sarthana Police Station mein 28 June 2018 ko ek FIR karayi thi, jiska number hai I-C.R. No.219 of 2018. Sections 406 aur 420 ke तहत un chaar logon ne, jinmein Accused No.1, 3 aur 4 the, humara sab kuch loot liya. Mera saara bharosa tod diya unhone, meri mehnat ki kamayi ko fraud se haathiya liya. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log is FIR ko hi quash karwana chahte hain, Sir! Yeh toh seedha-seedha humare saath aur na-insaafi hogi. Meri aapse request hai, mujhe justice chahiye. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye.

Sahab, meri baat suniye, main toh marr gaya! Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mera ek case chal raha tha court mein, un logon ke khilaaf jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha. Humne badi mushkil se complaint ki thi, socha tha ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin abhi pichle mahine, 26 tareekh ko, court se ek naya order aaya hai. Judge sahab ne woh jo pehle ka order tha na, jiske wajah se unpe action ho raha tha, usko hi 'cancel' kar diya hai. Matlab, un logon ko chhoot mil gayi! Unka toh faayda ho gaya aur main yahan akela reh gaya. Sir, main gareeb aadmi, mujhe toh kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Meri galti kya thi? Aap hi bataiye, ab main kahan jaaun? Meri madad kijiye Sahab, please!

Sir, main Rajesh Naik bol raha hoon. Meri suniye, main bohot pareshaan hoon. Pata nahi main kahan jaaun, kisko bataun. Pichhle 2015 se meri zindagi jhand ho gayi hai, sir. North Goa ke Special Judge ne ek judgment pass kiya tha 29 aur 30 October 2015 ko. Uske baad se main bas bhatak raha hoon. Woh judgment mere khilaaf tha, sir, aur woh galat tha. Maine kitne dhakke khaaye hain, ab toh meri appeal bhi chal rahi hai. Par mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha. Main ek aam aadmi hoon, sir. Yeh system bohot powerful hai, main kahan tak ladunga? Mujhe darr lagta hai, sir, meri family hai. Please, meri madad kijiye. Main bas insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Mera jo case hai na, wo 2013 se latka hua hai, Sir! Kitne saal ho gaye, aap khud sochiye. Aaj court mein mera vakil, woh Mr. Mangukiya, woh bhi nahi aaye. Aur court ne bola ki itna time ho gaya, ab case ko aage badhaao. Mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha kya karoon. Aur Sir, jinke khilaf maine 2007 mein Satellite Police Station, Ahmedabad mein, CR No. 1-576 wali FIR darj karayi thi, wo ab usko cancel karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Kya meri itni purani complaint hi khatam ho jayegi? Itne saalon se main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, aur ab yeh sab! Meri toh puri ummeed toot rahi hai, Sir. Meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Rajesh Naik hoon. Meri suniye please. North Goa ke Special Judge ne 29 aur 30 October 2015 ko ek faisla sunaya tha, us special case mein. Sir, us judgment aur order se main bahut dukhi hoon, bahut pareshaan hoon. Mere saath bahut na-insaafi hui hai. Meri zindagi uss din se barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Yeh jo teen appeals maine file kiye hain, woh isi galat order ke khilaaf hain. Mujhe lagta hai ki mere saath dhokha hua hai, aur main bas insaaf chahta hoon. Aap meri madad kijiye, meri sunvaai honi chahiye. Main gareeb aadmi hoon, kahan jaun?

Sir, main Rajesh Naik bol raha hoon. Meri suno please, bohot pareshaan hoon main. Wo Special Judge, North Goa ka jo faisla aaya tha na, 29 October 2015 aur 30 October 2015 ko, usne meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pata nahi kya judgement aur order pass kar diya, main itna dukhi hoon sir, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Maine teen-teen appeals file ki hain, baar-baar court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, phir bhi justice nahi mil raha. Mujhse toh ab aur bardaasht nahi hota. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Yeh mera Special Case hai, par koi sun nahi raha.

Daroga ji, main toh poori tarah loot gaya hoon! Aaj bhi woh din yaad aata hai jab usne mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai, mera bharosa, sab tod diya usne. Maine toh us par itna vishwas kiya tha, par woh toh nikla dhokebaaz. Saare paise leke lapata ho gaya. Vijapur Police Station mein 6 February 2016 ko maine uske khilaaf complaint darj karayi thi, FIR number 13/2016. Ye Sections 406 aur 420 ka case hai, Sir. Mujhe bas itna chahiye ki usko uske kiye ki saza mile. Aise logon ko chhodna nahi chahiye. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Navrat mein partner tha, aur usne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Mera saara paisa maar liya, mera trust tod diya. Woh mujhe dhamki bhi deta rehta hai, sir. Aapko pata hai, Patna ke Sessions Judge साहब ne bhi abhi ek order mein kaha hai ki usne bilkul galat kiya hai. Uske khilaaf Sections 406, 420 aur 506 IPC ke तहत case banta hai. Pehle ACJM IV, Patna ne bhi 28.09.2020 ko notice liya tha, aur ab Judge साहब ne bhi us order ko uphold kiya hai. Yeh Shri Krishna Puri P.S.Case No.137 of 2018 ka mamla hai, sir. Meri suniye, mujhe nyay dilwaiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, meri shaadi Subhash se hui thi, Hindu reeti-riwaz se. Woh jo respondent number 2 aur 3 hain na, unke hi bete hain Subhash. Maine toh socha tha sir ki shaadi matlab bharosa hota hai, ek doosre ko jhelna aur samajhna hota hai. Log kehte hain shaadi trust, tolerance aur mutual understanding ka rishta hai. Par sir, hamari toh bilkul banti hi nahi thi. Hamare beech itne differences the, kya bataun! Individual incompatibilities, soch mein farak, adjustment toh bilkul nahi ho pa raha tha. Psychological aur bohot saare issues the. Meri toh puri zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

सर, मैं जगwani Projects (P) Ltd. से आया हूँ। मेरी कंपनी Iron Ores Fines supply karti hai. कुछ टाइम पहले ना, Ankit Metal & Power Ltd. के जो directors हैं, वो Ankit Metal वाले, हमारे पास आए थे। बड़ी-बड़ी बातें कीं, बोला कि उनको Iron Ores Fines चाहिए, वो भी regularly, और payment भी टाइम पे देंगे। Poora pakka assurance दिया था, सर! उनकी बातों पे हमने आँख मूँद के भरोसा किया। इसी भरोसे पे, मेरी कंपनी ने unko baar-baar maal supply किया है, जितना उन्होंने माँगा। Lekin ab toh unhone poora dhokha de diya hai, सर। ना time pe payment kiya, ना बात सुन रहे हैं। Meri company ka bahut nuksaan ho raha hai. Aap hi batao hum kya karein?

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mujhe pehle ek notice mila tha, toh maine turant ICICI Bank walon ko refer kar diya tha yeh matter. Meri taraf se, unhone saamne wale party ke vakeel ko poora detailed reply bhi de diya tha, sab clear kar diya tha. Mujhe laga ab toh sab settle ho gaya. Lekin sir, 2017 ki shuruat mein unexpectedly, mujhe 19th Metropolitan Magistrate Court se summon aa gaya! Aur woh bhi as an accused person! Sir, jab bank ne poora jawab de diya tha, toh mujhe kyu court bulaya ja raha hai? Main toh bas apna kaam kar raha tha. Meri neend ud gayi hai sir, please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi Keshod Police Station mein, woh 2019 waali, C.R.No.I-142. Bade mushkil se maine woh FIR register karwai thi, kyunki mere saath sach mein bahut galat hua tha. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh accused No.3, jiske khilaaf maine complain ki thi, woh court mein jaake meri FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai. Sir, agar meri FIR hi hat jaayegi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Woh log bade connections waale hain, paisa fenk rahe hain. Hum jaise aam aadmi ki kaun sunega? Mujhe dar lag raha hai ki mera case kamzor ho jaayega. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye. Meri complaint ko rehne dijiye, mujhe nyay chahiye. Bas itna hi kehna hai.

Sir, main is FIR ka complainant/informant hoon. Aapko pata hai na, usne mere डेढ़ करोड़ रुपये (Rs. 1,50,00,000/-) roke hue hain. Woh accused, usne apni anticipatory bail ke time court mein paisa jama kiya tha. Uski bail ka matter toh 28 March 2024 ko hi khatam ho gaya tha, order bhi aa gaya tha. Ab jab bail ka faisla ho gaya hai, toh phir mera paisa release kyun nahi kar rahe? Sir, yeh meri mehnat ki kamai hai, kitne saalon ki savings hai. Mujhe ab woh ₹1.5 crore aur uska poora byaaj chahiye. Main itna pareshaan hoon, aap please meri madad kijiye aur mujhe mera paisa wapas dilaiye. Meri suno na, Sir, bahut tang aa gaya hoon.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyuki mere saath itna bada dhoka kiya hai inhone. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai loot li. Woh jo FIR darj hui thi na, Hariparvat police station mein, 9 September 2014 ko (case crime no. 862/2014), usmein dhokhadhadi, jaalsaazi aur saazish ke sections (420, 467, 468, 471, 120B IPC) lagaye the. Itne saal ho gaye, par ab tak mujhe pura insaaf nahi mila. Court mein case chal raha hai, interim orders bhi aaye hain, par meri mushkilein khatam nahi ho rahi hain. Sir, mera toh jeena haram ho gaya hai. Please meri madad kijiye, main bahut takleef mein hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Jin logon ne meri zindagi barbaad ki thi, jinpe maine Crime No. 54 of 2005 file kiya tha, unko High Court ne clean chit de di hai. Madras High Court ka order hai ye, Sir, 20 March, 2006 ka. Meri toh rooh kaanp rahi hai. Itni mushkil se maine woh case banaya tha, sab proof ikatthe kiye the, aur Section 482 Cr.P.C. ka bahana banake unki petition allow kar di. Mere saare criminal proceedings jo chal rahe the, woh sab unhone quash kar diye. Matlab, itne saal ki ladai, sab paani mein chali gayi. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, Sir. Ab main kahan jaun? Mujhe toh lagta hai, garibon ke liye justice hai hi nahi.

Sahab, main bahut tang aa gaya hoon. Mera ek case hai na, Suit No. 1480/2002, woh 2002 se chal raha hai. Pata hai, ek Judge sahab ne 13 January 2006 ko ek faisla sunaya tha, par usmein mujhe insaaf nahi mila. Toh maine RFA (OS) No. 25/2006 ke naam se appeal daali thi. Ab sun raha hoon ki meri appeal ko do aur bade-bade companies ke cases ke saath jod diya hai. Woh Dart Industries aur Mattel Inc. jaise naam hain. Kehte hain sab mein 'common issues' hain, kanoon ki 'interpretation' ka mamla hai. Meri samajh nahi aa raha ki yeh sab kab tak chalega. 2002 se court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, sahab. Meri suno, mujhe bas jaldi se insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Meri toh poori zindagi ki kamai chali gayi. Maine unke bade bade ads dekhe the akhbaron mein, Gurgaon ke Sector 74 mein 'Aquarius' naam ka project. Bohot achha dikhaya tha ki government se saari approvals hain, HSIIDC se bhi aur Town Planning se bhi. Unhone bola tha ki built-up space milega lease pe. Maine unki company, M/s Vigneshwara Developwell Pvt. Ltd., mein paisa lagaya tha, sir. Socha tha ki mera future secure ho jayega. Meri mehnat ki kamai thi, sir. Ab na toh mera project complete ho raha hai, aur na hi mujhe mera paisa wapas mil raha hai. Bas tareekh pe tareekh mil rahi hai. Mujhe dhokha diya gaya hai, sir. Kripya meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir ji, main aapke paas badi mushkil mein aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Mohd. Azam Khan aur unke saathi, jinhone mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya hai, ab woh court mein yeh poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain. Hamare Rampur ke Ganj police station mein jo F.I.R. (Case Crime No. 04/2019) hui thi, uski charge-sheet bhi file ho gayi thi 2019 mein. Court ne uspar notice bhi liya tha aur hamein bulaya bhi tha. Ab sun raha hoon ki woh puri proceedings hi cancel karwane ke liye application lagayi hai. Matlab, jo unhone mere saath cheating ki (Section 420), mere documents mein farziwada kiya (Sections 467, 468, 471), us sab se bachna chahte hain! Sir ji, agar yeh case hi khatam ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh puri ummeed hi inhi proceedings par thi. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai! Jinhone mujhse paise liye the, unhone payment toh band kar hi diya hai. Upar se, jo unki apni properties security mein rakhi hui thi mere paas, woh bhi unhone chhodwa li hain. Ek taraf toh paisa nahi de rahe, aur doosri taraf apni saari zameen-jaydad, sab bechna shuru kar diya hai. Mujhe toh lagta hai woh sab kuch bech ke bhaag jayenge. Aur ab toh woh yeh bhi keh rahe hain ki agar poora payment ho bhi gaya na, tab bhi case khatam karne ki koi baat hi nahi hui thi. Yeh toh seedhi-seedhi loot hai, Sir! Meri madad kijiye, mujhe apna paisa wapas chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, woh Hathras Gate police station mein mera Case Crime No. 261 of 2014? Jo dhokhadhadi (section 420 IPC) aur vishwasghaat (section 406 IPC) ka mamla tha. Woh charge-sheet bhi file ho gayi thi 12.11.2014 ko. Ab woh jo accused hai na, woh court mein Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga kar meri poori case ko khatam karwana chahta hai! Meri to saari ummeed isi case pe tiki hai, sir. Usne mujhe poora barbaad kar diya hai, aur ab woh chahta hai ki court uski charge-sheet quash kar de. Main kya karun, sir? Meri to neend ud gayi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Yeh case khatam nahi hona chahiye. Please kuch kijiye, sir. Bahut mushkil se to itna aage badha tha mamla.

Sir, main kitni pareshan hoon, aap soch bhi nahi sakte! Mera jo case chal raha hai na, usme court ne ek order pass kiya tha 16 January 2023 ko. Uss order ki copy meri application ke saath lagi hai. Ab mujhe pata chala ki meri application mein galati se uski date '16 January 2022' likh di hai, jabki sahi date 16 January 2023 hai. Ek saal ka farak hai, sir! Meri zindagi daav par lagi hai. Is chhoti si galti ki wajah se mera pura case barbaad ho jayega. Pata nahi ye log jaan-boojh kar kar rahe hain ya inki laparwahi hai. Main itne saal se fight kar rahi hoon, aur ab aisi galti? Meri to neend ud gayi hai, sir. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye, please.

Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Meri FIR, jo maine 23 June 2010 ko Radaur Police Station, Yamunanagar mein file ki thi, usko ab woh log cancel karwana chahte hain! Woh FIR number 77 thi, sir. Unpar IPC ki dharaein 420, 465, 467, 468 aur 471 lagi thi – matlab dhokhadadi, farziwada aur jaali documents banane ka case tha. Ab judge sahab ke paas application lagayi hai ki meri woh FIR aur uske baad ki saari karwahi ko hi khatam kar dein. Mera toh insaaf hi cheen rahe hain woh log! Itne saalon se lad raha hoon, aur ab yeh sab rukwana chahte hain. Kya hoga mera? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab ho gayi hai Himanshu Khatri ki wajah se. Main Phill Alaph, USA se hoon. Wahan San Francisco mein meri ek company hai, Vsolay, Inc. Hum software banate hain, bechte hain. 2006 mein Himanshu se mulaqat hui thi. Bade-bade sapne dikhaye usne, bade promises kiye, ki yeh kar dega, woh kar dega. Mujhe kya pata tha ki woh itna bada dhokebaaz niklega! Mera sab kuch usne barbaad kar diya. Uski wajah se meri company ko itna nuksan hua hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Maine 14.11.2018 ko FIR bhi karwai thi, par abhi tak koi solution nahi mila. Sir, main aapke paas aas lekar aaya hoon.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki meri jo court mein sunwai thi na, usmein sab records dekhe gaye. Mere vakil sahab ne bhi sab kuch detail mein bataya. Par Sir, woh jo opposite party number 2 hai na, jisne mujhe itna pareshaan kiya hai, usko khud notice mila tha, poora pata tha usko. Lekin Sir, woh aaya hi nahi sunwai mein! Na usne koi objection file kiya, na koi jawab diya. Matlab, uski taraf se koi aaya hi nahi case ko rokne ke liye. Toh ab Sir, iska kya matlab hai? Main toh itna pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf kab milega? Woh aadmi itna laaparwah hai, court ka bhi khayal nahi. Ab toh aap hi kuch karo Sir!

Daroga ji, main aur mere pitaji bahut pareshaan hain. Ek bahut purana mamla hai, 2002 se chal raha hai, jismein hamare khilaaf ek sarkari order aa gaya tha. Humein lagta hai woh faisla galat tha, isliye humne uske khilaaf appeal ki hai. Par har baar woh log naye-naye arguments laate hain, aur humari baat theek se suni nahi ja rahi. Hum thak gaye hain is chakkar mein. Yeh sab jaan-boojhkar kiya ja raha hai taaki hum haar maan lein. Sir, humein bas insaaf chahiye. Mere aur mere pitaji ke future ka sawal hai yeh. Please, aap kuch kijiye, hum bahut takleef mein hain.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh log, jinpe maine itna bharosa kiya tha, unhone mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Mera sab kuch cheen liya hai. Maine Raopura Police Station mein pehle hi ek FIR darj karai thi, jo 8 April 2016 ko C.R. No. I-106 thi, Vadodara City mein. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log us FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain! Ye toh bilkul galat hai, Sir. Unhone mere paise kha liye hain, property ke naam pe forgery ki hai, cheating ki hai. Indian Penal Code ki Sections 406, 420, 465, 467, 468, 471, 114 sab lagti hain unpe. Aap please kuch karo, Sir. Meri sunwai karo. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai, agar woh log aise hi bach gaye toh.

Sir, main Ashok Kumar, MHTC Ltd. ka manager hoon. Mere saath dhokha hua tha, usne teen post-dated cheques diye the jo bounce ho gaye. Is case mein, 12 August 2010 ko, Ld. MM ne order diya tha ki uss dhokebaaz ko discharge nahi milega, uspar charges frame honge. Mujhe laga tha ab toh justice milega, par woh apni bail aur revision petition lagate lagate case ko itna lamba kheench raha hai! Kitne saal ho gaye, Sir. Main toh thak gaya hoon court ke chakkar kaat-kaat kar. Bas ab isko saza milni chahiye. Meri file mein kya ho raha hai, please pata karke batayein.

Sir, main Ashok Kumar, MHTC Ltd. ka Manager hoon. Mujhe ek bahut zaroori complaint darj karani hai, humari company ke saath bahut bada fraud hua hai. Ek party ne humein teen post-dated cheques diye the, bade amount ke the woh. Humne socha tha ki payment mil jayegi, par jab woh cheques bank mein lagaye toh saare ke saare bounce ho gaye. Kitna nuksaan hua hai humara, sir! Company ka itna paisa phans gaya hai. Un logon ne jaan bujh kar humein dhokha diya hai. Main chahta hoon ki aap unke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lein. Please meri madad kijiye, sir. Humari company ka bhala ho jayega agar aap unpar karwai karte hain.

Saab, main yahan Mantri Developers walon ke khilaf shikayat karne aaya hoon. Yeh log bade-bade builders hain, poore desh mein projects banate hain, aisa dikhate hain. Lekin sir, inhone toh humein barbad kar diya! Meri poori zindagi ki kamai laga di thi inke project mein. Aur ab yeh log... pata nahi kya kar rahe hain. Meri tarah aur bhi kayi log hain, mere jaise middle-class log, jinko inhone aise hi phansaya hai. Hum sab bahut pareshan hain. Sir, please humari madad kijiye. Yeh log toh bade log hain, hum gareebon ki kaun sunega agar aap nahi sunenge? Bahut umeed se aaya hoon, sir.

Sir, main Mantri Developers Pvt. Ltd. ke khilaaf complaint karne aaya hoon. Ye log bade-bade builder bante hain, kehte hain poore desh mein inke kitne saare projects hain, par inhone toh humein jhoothe vaade karke fansa liya! Meri saari umar ki kamai, aur mere jaise kai aur families ki bhi, in logon ne loot li hai. Humne inpar poora bharosa kiya tha, sapne dekhe the, par inhone toh sab mitti mein mila diya. Ab hum kahan jayenge, Sir? Bahut pareshaan hain hum sab. Please, hamari madad kijiye. In dhokebaazon ko saza milni chahiye aur hamara paisa wapas dilwaiye.

Sir, main aapko apni mushkil batane aaya hoon. Meri ek zameen ka mamla hai, uske liye maine poora payment kar diya tha. Ji haan, saare paise maine de diye the us zameen ke. Ramanbhai Punabhai ne hi paise liye the mujhse, woh Power of Attorney holder the original owners ki taraf se. Unhone hi saara sale consideration accept kiya tha aur mujhe baकायदा receipts bhi di thi. Ab pata nahi kya ho raha hai, meri zameen par ab koi aur apna haq bata raha hai, jabki maine toh sab kuch legal tareeke se kiya tha. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai lagi hai usme, Daroga ji. Aap hi batao, main kahan jaaun ab? Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sahab, meri suno toh sahi! Main kitne time se pareshan hoon. Pehle toh police ne meri complaint nahi li, koi sunwai nahi hui. Fir main court gaya, Magistrate sahab ke paas, ki police ko bolo meri FIR likhen, investigation karein. Maine ek application di thi, 20 July 2021 ko. Par sahab, 4 September 2021 ko unhone meri application reject kar di! Bolte hain meri baat mein dum nahi. Meri poori zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai aur koi sunne ko taiyar nahi. Ab main upar ki court mein gaya hoon, dobara appeal ki hai, ki woh Magistrate sahab ka faisla palten. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, bas itni si meri guzarish hai. Police ko toh bolo kam se kam meri investigation karein. Main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir ji, main Sukhbir Singh, Late Sh. Chunni Lal ka beta hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir! Abba ji ke jaane ke baad se mere apne hi rishtedaar, jo mere co-legal heirs hain, unhone mujhe jeena haram kar diya hai. Zameen-jaydaad ke mamle mein itne saalon se pareshaan kar rahe hain. Pehle jo complainant the, woh toh 3 April 2017 ko guzar gaye. Lekin ab unka beta, Respondent No. 2, woh phir se wahi complaint aage badha raha hai. Kitna aur pareshaan karenge, sir? Main toh tang aa gaya hoon. Meri madad kijiye, sir, in sab se mujhe bachao!

Sir, main wohi gareeb aadmi hoon jiske Arvinder Singh aur do aur logon ke khilaaf complaint thi. Meri toh life barbad ho gayi hai sir, kitni mushkil se maine woh FIR file karwai thi. Aur ab suna hai ki woh log High Court chale gaye hain, Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga ke, bol rahe hain ki hamara case hi galat hai. Yeh 2023 ka naya mamla hai, sir. Unke liye Vrindavan Mishra naam ke bade wajeel saheb aaye the, aur meri taraf se D.S. Chauhan ji ke wajeel Abhimanyu Singh ji ne baat rakhi hai. Sir, main bas itna chahta hoon ki mera case khatam na ho, mujhe insaaf mile. Woh log bas mamla dabana chahte hain, main bahut darr gaya hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh Shri B.L. Khatri sahab hain na, jo Maghahatu-buru Iron Ore Project ke General Manager the, NMDC sarkari company ke. Unhone meri zameen le li thi us project ke liye, Bihar mein hi. Mujhse waada kiya tha ki mujhe naukri denge ya poora muawza denge. Lekin sahab, woh to bas ghoomte hi rehte the. Kabhi Ranchi ja rahe hain, kabhi Secunderabad. Main unke peeche kitna bhaaga, par woh kabhi mile hi nahi. Yeh 1976-78 ki baat hai, bahut saal ho gaye hain. Aaj tak mujhe na naukri mili na ek paisa. Woh itne bade afsar the, unhone meri suni hi nahi. Maine socha, yeh sarkari kaam hai, sahi hoga, par unhone toh meri poori zindagi hi loot li. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab. Please meri madad kijiye.

Daroga ji, main ek bahut purana mamla lekar aaya hoon. Mera ye case hai na, Raj Deo Singh aur uske chaar aur logon ke khilaaf, ye 1986 ka hai Sir! Sochiye, kitne saal ho gaye insaaf ka intezaar karte-karte. Ghazipur ke Sessions Judge ne tab ek judgment diya tha, par humari taraf se, sarkar ne uske khilaaf appeal ki hai ab jaake. Court mein vakeel sahab the meri taraf se, aur unke bhi bade vakeel the. Sab records bhi dekhe gaye hain. Ab toh bas yahi umeed hai ki is baar sahi insaaf milega. Kitni takleefein uthai hain humne is mamle mein. Meri suno na Sir, ab toh kuch karo.

Sahab, meri suno na! Kitni mushkil se toh humein insaaf mila tha. Woh Chitradurga court mein, SC No.12/2010, 11 April 2014 ko judge sahab ne finally un sabhi kasoorwaron ko saza sunayi thi. Main socha tha chalo ab chain se jiyenge, itne saal se jo pareshaan the. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh sab, accused No.1 aur woh baaki 2, 3, 4 number wale, sab high court mein appeal kar rahe hain! Meri toh rooh kaanp rahi hai. Itni mehnat, itna paisa laga tha. Ab phir se sab naya shuru ho jayega kya? Kahan se launga main itni himmat, Sahab? Aap kuch karo, please! Mujhe toh lagta hai woh phir se bach jayenge. Meri madad karo!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Kitni mushkil se SC No.12/2010 mein un apradhiyon ko saza mili thi. Chitradurga ke Additional District aur Sessions Judge sahab ne 11 April 2014 ko unhe convicted kiya tha, aur socha tha chalo ab insaaf mil gaya. Par, ab kya? Woh accused number 1 aur baaki 2 se 4 tak sabne appeal daal di hai! Unhe lagta hai unke saath galat hua hai, jabki meri poori zindagi barbaad kar di un logon ne. Ab phir se court ke chakkar kaato! Kya humein kabhi poora insaaf milega ya yeh log aise hi bachte rahenge?

Daroga ji, main toh bahut dukhi hoon, sir. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Bhopal ke Ratibad police station mein, maine 2021 mein ek FIR karwai thi, woh dhokhebaaz ke khilaaf. March ki tareekh thi, I think 23rd March 2021, uska number 0123/2021 tha. Usne mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya hai, Section 420 ka case banta hai uspar. Mere saare paise le gaya aur mera kaam nahi kiya. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh apni charge sheet aur yeh FIR hi cancel karwana chahta hai. Aise kaise hoga, sir? Agar uski FIR hi hat gayi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Main toh bahut pareshan hoon, meri toh aapse hi ummeed hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kyu, Amahiya Police Station ne mere khilaaf yeh Crime No. 40/2022 register kar diya hai. Mujh par Section 420 aur 34 IPC ke तहत case lagaya gaya hai. Yeh FIR 31 January 2022 ko hui thi, aur yeh sab Seema Agrawal ki jhoothi complaint ki wajah se ho raha hai. Woh keh rahi hain ki 2 September 2020 ko unke husband Chhatt mein arrest hue the, par isme meri kya galti hai? Maine toh kuch kiya hi nahi. Main toh seedha-saadha insaan hoon, kabhi kisi ko dhokha nahi diya. Meri izzat mitti mein mil rahi hai, sir. Gharwale bhi tension mein hain. Kripya karke aap meri madad kijiye, is jhoothe case ko khatam karwaiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, is case ke chakkar mein! Mera ek case chal raha tha, jiska finally decision aa gaya hai. Judge sahab, Hon'ble Mr. Justice Rakesh Kainthla ji ne 29 December 2023 ko apna faisla sunaya hai. Is decision ko unhone 16 November 2023 ko reserve kiya tha. Mere lawyer Mr. Peeyush Verma the, unhone mera case lada. Aur saamne wale ke taraf se Mr. Romesh Verma aur Mr. Hitesh Thakur the. Sir, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki ab kya hoga. Main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Bahut mushkil se guzar rahi hai meri zindagi.

Sir, meri madad karo, please! Mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai. Woh log, jinse mera case chal raha hai, unhone ab phir se ek petition file kar di hai. Pata hai, woh Indore ke Judicial Magistrate sahab ne jo 06.02.2025 ko UNCR No.68743/2019 mein mere favour mein ek order pass kiya tha, ab woh usko quash karwana chahte hain! Haan, woh Section 528 BNSS (jo pehle 482 Cr.P.C. tha) ke under chale gaye hain. Saab, itni mushkil se toh woh order mila tha, socha tha ab toh thodi rahat milegi. Agar woh order cancel ho gaya toh meri saari ummedein toot jaayengi. Main toh barbaad ho jaunga. Meri request hai, kuch karo, mujhe insaaf dilwao, please!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mera case chal raha hai na, woh jo zameen ke jhagde wala hai. Aaj mujhe ek kagaz mila, usme likha tha ki 'Mr. Hardik Mehta, APP, waives service of Rule on behalf of the State,' aur 'Mr. Rituraj Meena, advocate, bhi waives service of Rule'. Yeh kya hai, Sir? Mujhe kuch samajh hi nahi aa raha. Kya mera case aage badhega ya aise hi sab rules aur service mein uljha ke rakh denge? Main to ek aam aadmi hoon, mujhe aise bade-bade lawyers ki bhasha kahaan samajh aati hai. Main to bas apni takleef batane aaya tha, par yahaan sab 'Rule' 'waive' kar rahe hain. Meri madad karo, Sir, please. Mujhe bas itna bata do ki mere saath kya ho raha hai aur mera kya hoga.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, isliye aapke paas aaya hoon. Pata nahi kya karun. Meri choti si zameen ka mamla hai, aur log us par kabza kar rahe hain. Main toh ek seedha-saadha aadmi hoon, sir. Jab court jaata hoon, toh wahan bade-bade vakil aisi baatein karte hain, 'judgments,' 'sections,' 'laws'… mujhe kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Maine suna hai ki apne desh mein 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments hain aur itne saare kanoon hain. Phir bhi, sir, mujhe lagta hai ki hum jaise aam logon ke liye toh insaaf milna kitna mushkil hai. Yeh sab toh bas bade-bade logon, lawyers, aur padhe-likhe logon ke liye hai. Meri madad kijiye, sir. Meri toh poori zindagi is mamle mein ulajh gayi hai. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki main apni zameen kho doonga.

Sir, meri baat toh suniye. Kya system banaya hai yeh? Log kehte hain, 4 crore se bhi zyada judgments aur kanoon hain isme. Par hum jaise aam logon ke liye yeh kya fayde ka? Yeh sab toh bade-bade lawyers, researchers, aur students ke liye hi design kiya hai. Humari toh koi sunta hi nahi. Sir, mujhe to bas insaaf chahiye, lekin itne saare rules aur regulations mein meri choti si baat kahan gum na ho jaye. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, sir. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main Ramu Lal hoon. Meri suniye Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Hamare padosi Mohan ne meri life hell kar di hai. Roz subah-shaam mujhe gaali deta hai, dhamki deta hai ki mera ghar chhod do. Meri zameen par bhi kabza karne ki koshish karta hai. Maine usko kitni baar samjhaya, par woh sunta hi nahi. Kal raat toh usne mere bachhon ko bhi daraya. Mujhe aur meri family ko bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Hum theek se so bhi nahi pa rahe. Pura din ek tension mein rehte hain. Meri wife toh beemar ho gayi hai uski wajah se. Sir, please kuch kijiye. Hum gareeb log hain, kahan jayenge? Mujhe security chahiye aur uske khilaf action chahiye. Mere documents bhi hain zameen ke, sab dikhaunga. Please help kijiye.

Sir, main Shriram Vinyl & Chemical Industries Ltd. se baat kar raha hoon, hum D.C.M. Shriram Consolidated Ltd., Bombay ki fully subsidiary company hain. Bahut mushkil mein hain hum. Humne pehle bhi ek criminal complaint file ki thi, Ahmedabad ke Chief Metropolitan Magistrate, Court No. 15 mein. Humare attorney, Shri O.P. Gupta ji ne woh complaint lodge ki thi. Woh complaint humne Bisil Plast Ltd. ke khilaaf, aur unki company ke directors aur ek officer ke against ki thi. Sir, ab tak koi sunwai nahi hui hai, humein bahut loss ho raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye, humein insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, kitne din se pareshan hoon. Jo mere saath galat hua tha na, uski complaint lekar main kitne offices ke chakkar kaat chuka hoon. Lagta tha meri koi sunega hi nahi. Par abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki humare Judicial Magistrate sahab ne, jo No.IV wale hain, unhone finally mere mamle ko seriously le liya hai! Unhone meri baat suni hai aur ab yeh ek proper court case ban gaya hai. Iska number bhi mil gaya hai, C.C. No.113/2023. Sir, itne mahino baad, thodi si ummeed jagi hai. Ab jab court ne khud dhyan diya hai, toh aap bhi please isme meri madad karo. Main bas ab jaldi se insaaf chahta hoon.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki mujhe pata chala hai ki woh Randeep Singh, jisne mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya hai, woh ab bail maang raha hai. Meri FIR number 252/2023 hai, jo maine 30 March 2023 ko darj karayi thi. Usne Section 420 aur 406 ke तहत mere saare paise hadap liye. Mera pura parivaar uski wajah se pareshan hai. Ab agar woh bahar aa gaya, toh pata nahi kya karega! Humari jaan ko khatra ho sakta hai, ya woh saare saboot mita dega. Meri aapse haath jodkar request hai, use bail mat dijiye. Woh bahar aaya toh main aur mera parivar kabhi shanti se nahi reh payenge. Please, meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kitna pareshaan hoon, aapko kya bataun. Mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai. Unhone mere paise kha liye, mere zaroori kaagaz bhi jaali bana diye. Aur upar se mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Meri FIR Tundala police station mein darj hai, Crime No. 573 of 2021, Firozabad mein. Pata hai sir, yeh Atul, Amit aur Y, jin logon ne mere saath yeh sab kiya, inhone C.J.M. Firozabad ki court mein arzi lagayi thi ki unhe case se nikaal diya jaye. Par shukra hai Bhagwan ka, 2 March 2024 ko court ne unki discharge ki application kharij kar di. Mera Case No. 1161 of 2023, 'State vs. Ram Gopal and others' naam se chal raha hai. Ab toh aap hi meri madad karo, sir. Unhe saza milni chahiye. Please, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, dekhiye na, humare saath kya ho raha hai! Kitne saalon se hum woh MPID case mein dhakke kha rahe the, jahan accused number 1 aur accused number 2 ne humara sara paisa dooba diya tha. Badi mushkil se, itne intezaar ke baad, finally 24 May ko Aurangabad ke Judge Sahab ne unko saza sunayi thi. Hum thoda chain ki saans le paaye the ki chalo ab toh justice mila. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh dono, apni saza suspend karwane ke liye applications daal rahe hain, woh Section 389 Cr.P.C. laga kar! Matlab, jail se bahar aana chahte hain! Yeh kya mazak hai Sir? Ek toh humari mehnat ki kamai loot li, upar se jab saza mili hai toh usse bhi bachna chahte hain. Aap please kuch kijiye, inko aise bahar mat aane dijiye, humari zindagi phir se barbaad ho jayegi!

Sir, main kya bataun, humari to zindagi barbaad ho gayi. Humare saare paise woh #1 aur #2 accused ne MPID case mein dooba diye the. Pata hai, pichle mahine 24 May ko Aurangabad court ne unhe saza sunayi thi? Humein laga tha chalo, ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin abhi sunne mein aaya hai ki woh apni saza rukwane ke liye phir se court gaye hain! Matlab, humare paise doob gaye aur ab unko jail bhi nahi jaana? Sir, yeh kya mazak hai? Itni mushkil se jo saza mili thi, woh bhi cancel ho jayegi kya? Humein insaaf chahiye, sir. Hum bahut pareshan hain, please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko yeh batane aaya hoon. Humari itni mushkil se toh Aurangabad ke District Judge-4 aur Additional Sessions Judge ne 24 May 2024 ko Special Case (MPID) mein un accused logon ko saza sunayi thi. Hum socha tha ki ab finally humein insaaf mil gaya. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh accused number 1 aur 2, dono ne phir se application daali hai, Cr.P.C. ke Section 389 ke tehat. Woh chahte hain ki unki saza suspend kar di jaye. Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Agar unki saza ruk gayi, toh humari family ka kya hoga? Itni mehnat se jo justice mila tha, woh bhi chhin jayega kya? Please, kuch kijiye sir, inko aise kaise chhod sakte hain?

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon ki meri complaint suniye. Pichle mahine hi, 24 May ko Aurangabad mein judge sahab ne do logon ko saza sunayi thi. Wahi log jinhone mere jaise kitne logon ka paisa doobaya tha, meri poori zindagi ki kamai le gaye the! Special Case (MPID) No. 07 tha woh. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki wohi dono, accused no. 1 aur accused no. 2, phir se application laga rahe hain. Woh apni saza rukwana chahte hain, jail jaane se bachna chahte hain! Sahab, badi mushkil se toh humein thodi rahat mili thi ki unhe saza mili. Agar woh aise hi bahar aa jayenge toh humara kya hoga? Mere jaise logon ko insaaf kaise milega? Please, kuch kariye.

Daroga ji, main ek bahut pareshan aadmi hoon. Aapko yaad hai woh MPID wala case? Special Case No. 07 of 2017, jismein hamare saare paise doob gaye the. Kitni mushkil se court ne hamari suni. Aurangabad ke Judge sahab ne 24 May ko un logon ko saza sunayi thi, Accused No. 1 aur 2 ko. Hum socha tha ab insaaf mila. Par ab pata chala hai woh log phir se application daal rahe hain. Criminal Application No. 2151, 2483, 2160... pata nahi kya-kya numbers hain. Section 389 Cr.P.C. laga ke apni saza rukwana chahte hain! Yeh kya mazak hai Sir? Hamara kya hoga? Hamari toh saari umar ki kamai chali gayi. Woh log saza se bach jayenge toh hum kahan jayenge? Please kuch kariye Sir, insaaf milte-milte chhoot na jaaye.

Sir, dekhiye na, main kitna pareshan hoon. Bade mushkil se toh humein insaaf mila tha. Woh jo accused number 1 aur accused number 2 hain na, jinhone hum sab ko loota tha, fraud kiya tha. Aurangabad ke apne District Judge-4 aur Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 24 May 2024 ko, Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein unko saza sunai thi. Kitne khush the hum! Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log phir se court mein application daal rahe hain. Section 389 Cr.P.C. lagake bol rahe hain ki unki saza suspend kar do! Matlab unhe chhod denge kya? Yeh toh bilkul galat hai sir! Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh humara kya hoga? Humein unse abhi bhi jaan ka khatra hai. Meri saari mehnat ki kamai le gaye aur ab saza bhi nahi bhugtenge? Please sir, kuch kijiye, humein bachaiye!

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri to kismat hi kharab hai. Abhi-abhi toh thoda sukoon mila tha, jab Aurangabad ke Judge sahab ne un dono original accused, woh number 1 aur number 2 waalon ko saza sunayi thi 24 May ko, Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein. Meri poori savings doob gayi thi unki wajah se. Humne itna wait kiya justice ke liye. Aur ab sunn raha hoon ki woh log phir se court mein Section 389 Cr.P.C. laga kar apni sentence suspend karwana chahte hain! Yeh kya ho raha hai, Sir? Meri toh neend ud gayi hai. Agar unki saza suspend ho gayi toh hum jaise garibon ka kya hoga? Please, Sir, kuch kijiye. Meri request hai ki unki sentence suspend na ho. Humko justice chahiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Abhi toh thoda sukoon mila tha ki court ne un logon ko saza sunayi thi, 24 May ko, Aurangabad mein... District Judge sahib ne. Woh criminal No.1 aur No.2, jinhone humari zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Aur ab, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh dono phir se application file kar rahe hain! Kehte hain apni saza suspend karwana chahte hain, matlab jail se bahar aana chahte hain! Yeh Cr.P.C. ka Section 389 laga rahe hain, sir. Sir, aise kaise ho sakta hai? Itni mushkil se toh justice mila tha. Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh humari jaan ko phir khatra hoga. Humari family ko phir pareshaan karenge. Please, unko bahar mat aane dijiye, sir. Humari madad kijiye, bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main ek aam aadmi hoon, aur mera poora paisa doob gaya tha us MPID scam mein. Kitni mushkil se humne Aurangabad court mein ladai ladi thi! Pichle mahine, 24 May ko, humein thoda insaaf mila tha jab judge saab ne un dhokebaazon (accused number 1 aur 2) ko saza sunai thi. Hamein laga chalo ab toh sab theek hoga. Par ab sun raha hoon ki woh log phir se koi application (Criminal Application no. 2151, 2483, 2160) daal rahe hain! Bol rahe hain Section 389 Cr.P.C. laga ke apni saza rukwana chahte hain. Yeh kya tareeka hai, Sir? Itni mehnat ke baad insaaf mila, aur ab yeh log phir se saza suspend karwana chahte hain? Hamare jaise gareeb log aur kitna dukhi honge? Meri aapse request hai, please kuch kijiye. Hum bohot pareshan hain!

Sir, main woh MPID case ka victim hoon, yaad hai na? Mujhe abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki woh jo accused hain, accused number 1 aur accused number 2, unhone phir se application lagayi hai court mein. Woh apni saza suspend karwana chahte hain! Matlab, jo saza unhe Aurangabad ke Judge Sahab ne 24 May 2024 ko sunayi thi, Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein, usko abhi rokne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Section 389 Cr.P.C. ka hawala de rahe hain. Kitni himmat hai! Itni mushkil se toh insaaf mila tha, aur ab yeh log phir se apni saza taalna chahte hain. Sir, please kuch kijiye, humein bahut darr lag raha hai. Humari mehnat ki kamai le gaye, aur ab saza bhi nahi bhugtna chahte.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoke aapke paas aaya hoon. Mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki woh accused number 1 aur 2, jinko Aurangabad ke Judge sahab ne 24 May 2024 ko hamare MPID case number 07 mein saza sunayi thi, unhone fir se court mein application daal di hai. Woh CrPC ke Section 389 ke under apni saza suspend karwana chahte hain. Sir, kitni mushkil se toh humein insaaf mila tha, ab yeh log fir se bahar aana chahte hain? Hamara paisa toh dooba hi tha, ab yeh justice bhi rukwa denge? Hum garib logon ka kya hoga? Meri toh saari savings chali gayi thi unki wajah se. Please, kuch karo Sir, kahin woh log fir se bach na jaayen. Hamein bahut darr lag raha hai.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri saari ummeedien ab aap par hain. Bohot lamba struggle kiya humne, finally 24 May ko Aurangabad mein jo Special Case (MPID) No. 07 tha, usme judge साहब ne un original accused No.1 aur No.2 ko saza sunai thi. Thodi rahat mili thi. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh log phir se Criminal Application Nos. 2151, 2483 aur 2160 of 2024 daal kar apni saza suspend karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain, Section 389 Cr.P.C. ke tehat. Agar unki saza suspend ho gayi toh humara kya hoga? Itne saalon ki ladai aur insaaf sab bekar ho jayega. Hum gareeb log hain, kahan jayenge? Please sir, kuchh kariye, hum bahut darre hue hain.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Hum gareeb log hain, badi mushkil se yeh din dekha tha ki humein insaaf mila hai. Pura Aurangabad ka case tha, woh MPID wala, Special Case No. 07. District Judge saab ne 24 May ko unko saza sunayi thi. Meri toh aankhon mein aansu aa gaye the ki chalo ab toh chain se soenge. Lekin Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Woh dono, accused no.1 aur accused no.2, unhone phir se appeal daal di hai. Criminal Application No. 2151, 2483, aur 2160... pata nahi kya-kya numbers hain. Kehte hain, 'Section 389 Cr.P.C.' laga ke apni saza rukwana chahte hain! Meri mehnat ki kamai leke bhaage the, aur ab saza bhi nahi bhugtenge? Saab, humara kya hoga? Aap please kuch kijiye, humein lagta hai hamara insaaf phir se chhin jayega.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Pata chala hai ki woh log, jo humein loot kar gaye the, unhone phir se application lagayi hai. Accused number 1 aur 2, jinko Aurangabad ke District Judge saahab ne 24 May 2024 ko saza sunayi thi MPID case mein, ab woh apni saza suspend karwana chahte hain, Cr.P.C. ke Section 389 ke under. Matlab, jo unko jail hui thi, woh usko rukwana chahte hain. Sir, hum garib log hain, humara sara paisa dooba diya unhone. Bade mushkil se unko saza mili thi, ab woh usko bhi cancel karwana chahte hain. Agar aisa ho gaya toh humara kya hoga? Humara toh faith hi uth jayega system se. Please sir, kuch kariye. Woh bahar aa gaye toh humein aur pareshaan karenge. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai ye sunkar.

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Humara paisa dooba tha na woh MPID case mein, jisme judge sahab ne 24 May 2024 ko Aurangabad mein saza sunayi thi. Badi mushkil se toh insaaf mila tha humein. Ab pata chala hai ki wohi accused, woh jo main accused No. 1 aur No. 2 hain na, unhone phir se court mein application daal di hai. Woh chahte hain ki unki saza suspend ho jaaye, matlab woh jail se bahar aa sakein! Section 389 Cr.P.C. ka hawala de rahe hain. Sir, kitni mushkil se toh yeh judgment aaya tha. Humari saari savings thi woh. Agar ab yeh log bahar aa gaye toh humara kya hoga? Please sir, kuch kijiye. Inhe bahar mat aane dijiye. Humein insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main ek complaint leke aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh jo chor the na, jinhone hum sab gareebon ka paisa doobaya tha, woh Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein, jinko 24 May 2024 ko Aurangabad ke Judge sahab ne saza sunayi thi, ab woh phir se court chale gaye hain. Unhone do applications lagayi hain, Criminal Application No. 2151 aur 2483 (accused no.2), aur ek aur hai Criminal Application No. 2160 (accused no.1). Sir, woh keh rahe hain ki unki saza ko 'suspend' kar do! Matlab, abhi tak unko thodi si rahat mili thi, ab woh bhi chheen lenge? Humne kitna struggle kiya hai is case ke liye. Meri saari savings chali gayi us scheme mein. Sir, please kuch kijiye, yeh Section 389 Cr.P.C. ka galat istemal kar rahe hain. Meri request hai ki unki bail application reject ho.

Sir, main kya bataun? Hamari zindagi barbaad kar di in logon ne. Abhi-abhi toh thodi rahat mili thi ki court ne inko saza di hai. Aurangabad ke District Judge-4 aur Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 24 May, 2024 ko Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein inko saza di thi. Accused No.1 aur Accused No.2, dono ne milkar hamara paisa dubaaya tha. Aur ab, Sir, yeh log Cr.P.C. ke Section 389 ke तहत application daal rahe hain ki inki saza rok di jaaye! Yeh kya mazak hai? Itni mushkil se toh nyay mila tha, ab yeh phir se bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Please, Sir, kuch kijiye. Hum gareeb log hain, kahan jaayenge?

Sir, main kya kahun, meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai! Woh jo accused number 1 aur accused number 2 hain na, jinko Aurangabad ke District Judge-4 aur Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 24 May 2024 ko Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein saza sunai thi, ab woh phir se court mein application laga rahe hain. Woh chahte hain ki unki saza ruk jaaye, suspend ho jaaye! Sir, Cr.P.C. Section 389 ke naam par, woh apne kiye ki saza se bachna chahte hain. Humne itni mushkil se insaaf paaya tha, aur ab yeh log phir se humein pareshan kar rahe hain. Kya humein kabhi shanti nahi milegi? Sir, please kuch kijiye. Unko jo saza mili hai, woh puri honi chahiye. Hum gareeb log hain, humara koi nahi sunta kya?

Sir, main kya bataun aapko! Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Kitni mushkil se toh Aurangabad court mein Special Case (MPID) No. 07 mein humne woh case jeeta tha. 24 May 2024 ko District Judge saab ne finally un accused number 1 aur 2 ko saza sunayi thi. Meri saari life ki savings unhone dooba di thi. Mujhe laga ab thoda insaaf mila hai. Par ab pata chala hai, woh dono, yani accused no. 1 aur 2, Criminal Application daal kar apni saza suspend karwana chahte hain, Cr.P.C. Section 389 ke under. Matlab, jo unhe saza mili hai, use rukwana chahte hain, bahar aana chahte hain! Agar woh bahar aa gaye toh humara kya hoga? Meri toh neendein udd gayi hain. Sir, please, aap kuch kijiye, hum garibon ki madad kijiye. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki woh phir se humein pareshaan karenge.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Mere saath bahut galat hua hai, Sir. Maine ek FIR file ki thi, aapko yaad hoga, RC0502022A0016 number ki, jo 22 December 2022 ko maine darj karwai thi. Un logon ne milkar mujhe itna bada dhoka diya hai, Sir. Mera sab kuch chheen liya, IPC 420 aur 120B ke tahat poora cheating aur saazish ka case bana tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein chale gaye hain aur meri FIR ko hi radd karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Agar meri FIR hi khatam ho gayi, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho jayegi, Sir. Aap hi bataiye, main kya karun? Meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main kya bataun, yeh Khalid Masood mujhe chain se jeene nahin de raha. Pehle toh court ne usko summon kiya tha, 9 February 2018 ko. Mujhe laga ab toh insaaf milega. Par woh badmash us order ke khilaaf bade Judge ke paas chala gaya, revision file kar diya. Shukar hai Bhagwan ka, 24 September 2018 ko us Judge Sahab ne bhi uski appeal dismiss kar di. Meri toh himmat badhi thi. Lekin ab suna hai, Sir, woh fir se Section 482 CrPC laga ke, us Judge ke order ko bhi hatwane ki koshish kar raha hai. Yeh kya ho raha hai, Sir? Hum garib logon ko kab tak bhatkaayenge? Meri suno na, Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, Calendar Case No. 5 of 2015, Attur, Salem ke court mein, Judicial Magistrate No. I ke paas. Sir, ye case meri zindagi ka sawal hai. Lekin jinke khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh log bade powerful hain, unka influence bahut hai. Pehle ke Municipal Commissioner aur ek Government Pleader hain woh. Ab woh log petition daal rahe hain ki mera case hi khatam karwa dein, usko 'quash' karwa dein! Matlab, mujhe insaaf milega hi nahi? Meri sunwai tak nahi hone denge? Sir, agar aise bade log apni taaqat se case hi band karwa denge, toh hum jaise garib logon ko insaaf kaise milega? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Meri madad kijiye, please, mujhe nyay chahiye!

Sir, main aaj aapke paas ek bahut badi mushkil mein aaya hoon. Meri ek mamla chal raha hai court mein, aur main toh seedha-saadha insaan hoon, mujhe in kanooni baaton ka zyada pata nahi chalta. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki court bol raha hai ki mujhe 8 September 2020 ko ek notice bheja gaya tha. Par Sir, kasam se, mujhe toh koi notice mila hi nahi! Mere ghar na koi daakiya aaya, na koi chitthi pahuchi. Ab woh log keh rahe hain ki unhe koi acknowledgement nahi mila, aur isliye court ne maan liya hai ki notice mujhe mil gaya tha. Yeh toh galat baat hai na Sir? Jab mujhe pata hi nahi chala toh main kaise jawaab deta? Meri toh sunwai hi nahi hui. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye, main kya karoon ab?

Sir, namaste! Meri baat suniye, main toh poora pareshan ho gaya hoon. Maine Comex Infratech Pvt. Ltd. ke director aur unke saathi ke khilaaf court mein complaint ki thi. Unhone mere saath bohot bada dhoka kiya hai, Section 420 IPC ke तहत. JMFC Nagda court ne bhi meri baat suni thi aur 23 September 2015 ko meri complaint register kar li thi. Par ab Sir, woh log court mein appeal kar rahe hain ki meri complaint hi galat hai! Yeh toh hadd ho gayi. Pehle mere saath cheating ki, mera paisa kha gaye aur ab jab court ne action liya toh usko hi challenge kar rahe hain. Main ek aam aadmi hoon, Sir, main kahan jaunga? Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh log chahte hain ki unka case hi na chale. Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main Brahm Kumar Agarwal, bahut pareshan hoke aapke paas aaya hoon. Maine ek Complaint Case file kiya tha, number 1339 of 2019. Bade mushkil se maine woh case banaya tha, poora sach bataya tha. Aur ab yeh Kamal Singh aur Ramesh Chandra hain na, yeh log court mein Section 482 Cr.P.C. laga kar mere us case ko hi khatam karwana chahte hain! Mera matlab hai, jo maine insaaf ke liye fight shuru ki hai, yeh log use beech mein hi rukwana chahte hain. Agar mera case hi quash ho gaya toh meri saari mehnat barbaad ho jayegi. Kya mujhe insaaf milega hi nahi, Sir? Meri madad kijiye, in logon ko rokiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi yeh log kya kar rahe hain. Mera ek case tha, bahut purana, 2014 se chal raha hai. Us waqt Allahabad ke ek Judge sahab ne ek order diya tha, usmein woh jo gunehgar hain, unko court mein bulaya tha. Ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh log, jinko court ne bulaya tha, woh us order ke khilaaf appeal kar rahe hain. Yeh toh seedha-seedha justice ko rokne ki koshish hai! Itne saal se main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, aur yeh log ab nayi-nayi koshishen kar rahe hain. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh accused ko court mein bulaya gaya tha, ab woh kaise appeal kar sakte hain? Meri suniye sir.

Sir, Ram Ram! Main badi mushkil mein hoon. Aapko pata hai, woh Charkhi Dadri mein ek case chal raha tha mera, usmein jo woh aadmi tha na, usko 23.08.2010 ko court ne discharge kar diya tha, chhod diya tha usko. Meri toh neend ud gayi us din se! Maine socha, chalo, upar wali court mein jaunga, insaaf ki umeed thi. Main Bhiwani gaya, wahan Additional Sessions Judge sahab ke paas, 09.12.2011 ko meri appeal suni gayi. Par Sir, unhone bhi meri revision petition dismiss kar di! Matlab, meri baat hi nahi suni gayi theek se. Woh jo galat insaan tha, woh bach gaya aur main yahan rota phir raha hoon. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai, Sir. Kya gareeb ko kabhi insaaf nahi milta? Main toh bas yahi soch raha hoon, ab main kahan jaaun?

Sir, main Ramachandraiah bol raha hoon. Meri suniye na, yeh R. Devadoss hai na, isne mere saath bahut galat kiya hai. Hum dono M/s. Shri Ram Enterprises mein partners the, real estate ka business karte the. Maine ispe bahut bharosa kiya tha. Lekin sir, isne mere bharose ka galat fayda uthaya hai. Jab humari partnership 1 April 2000 ko dissolve ho gayi, uske baad bhi yeh akela proprietor ban gaya aur mere hisse ka paisa kha gaya. Mujhe dhoka diya hai isne, mera property ka jo hissa tha woh bhi nahi diya. Isne cheating ki hai aur mera paisa hadap liya hai, sir. Isliye maine iske khilaaf police mein complaint ki thi (Cr. No. 391 of 2010). Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki yeh apni FIR quash karwana chahta hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh zindagi jhand ho gayi hai! Mere saath itna galat hua hai, main kaise jiyun ab? Un logon ne, mere sasural walon ne, pehle toh shaadi mein bhar-bhar ke dahej manga, woh bhi diya. Aur ab shaadi ke baad bhi chain nahi hai. Mujhe maarte hain, peette hain, har baat pe gaali dete hain. Meri saari jewellery, saare papers, sab kuch apne paas rakh liya hai, na wapas karte hain na kuch batate hain. Mujhe dhokha diya hai, sir, mera vishwas toda hai. Aur ab toh khule aam dhamki dete hain ki jaan se maar denge. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, sir. Mujhe lagta hai woh log mera Case Crime No. 0053 of 2022 wala mamla band karwana chahte hain. Please, sir, aisa mat hone dijiye. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai! Ek case chal raha tha mera, Harish Chandra Gururani ke khilaaf. Bade mushkil se pehle toh Magistrate saab ne meri baat suni thi. Puraani baat hai, 2016 mein, 2 August ko unhone woh samjhne waala, bulane waala order pass kiya tha (Criminal Case No. 616 of 2016). Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf milega. Phir, 2017 mein, 27 March ko Sessions Judge saab ne bhi ek aur order diya (Criminal Revision No. 93 of 2016). Sab kuch theek chal raha tha. Par ab yeh Harish Chandra Gururani phir se kuch kar raha hai, keh raha hai ki woh saare orders cancel ho jayein. Sir, aise kaise ho sakta hai? Jab court ne khud meri baat suni thi, faisle diye the, ab woh sab palat jayenge toh main kahan jaunga? Yeh toh seedha-saadha mere saath dhokha hai. Mujhe bas mera insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sir, main bahot pareshan hoon, isliye aapke paas aaya hoon. Meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai, sir. Mere khilaaf ek FIR register hui hai, uska number hai 0185 aur date hai 26.12. Pata nahi kisne aur kyun mujhe ismein galat tareeke se phansaya hai. Mujhe har waqt yehi darr laga rehta hai ki police mujhe kab arrest kar legi. Main toh koi criminal nahi hoon, sir, seedha-saadha insaan hoon. Humne toh court mein bhi application di hai, CRM-M-37683-2024 aur 27648-2024, taki mujhe thodi rahat mil sake. Par abhi tak kuch final nahi hua hai. Aap se request hai, meri suniye aur meri madad kijiye, sir. Main bahot darr gaya hoon.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aayi hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, WPCR113-2022. Aapko pata hai, pichle mahine ki 23 September 2024 ko iski sunwai thi court mein. Mera vakil, Mr. Rohit Bras Desa, unhone toh meri taraf se sab baat rakhi, par woh saamne wala, jo 'respondent' hai, woh khud wahan maujood tha. Sir, usko dekh kar main aur darr gayi. Court mein sab hua, par uske baad bhi woh log mujhe chain se jeene nahi de rahe. Meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Main bahut pareshan hoon, please kuch kariye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Hulimavu Police Station mein jo mera case chal raha hai na, Crime No. 485/2024, usme jin 6 logon ne mere saath dhokhadadi ki hai, farzi documents banaye hain, aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi, woh ab court mein petition daal ke case ko hi band karwana chahte hain. Socho Sir, itne serious charges lage hain unpe – 420, 465, 467, 468, 471, 506 IPC ke तहत – aur woh kehte hain ki proceedings quash kar do? Yeh sab unhone milkar kiya tha, Section 34 bhi laga hai. Main garib aadmi hoon, Sir. Agar woh aise hi chhoot gaye toh mera kya hoga? Meri to zindagi barbad ho jayegi. Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye, unko aise chhootne mat dijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Phillaur Police Station mein ek request ke liye aaya hoon. Meri hi ek FIR thi, jo maine darj karwai thi 15 November 2023 ko, uska number 298 tha. Woh jo cheating aur saazish (420 aur 120-B) ka case tha. Ab Sir, humara unke saath compromise ho gaya hai. Humne aapas mein settle kar liya hai yeh mamla. 31 May 2024 ko humne ek settlement agreement bhi sign kiya hai. Toh ab main chahta hoon ki meri woh FIR aur uske baad ki jitni bhi proceedings hain, sab khatam kar di jayein. Main ab is case ko aur aage nahi badhana chahta, bas isse band karwana hai.

Sir, main Hulimavu P.S. aaya hoon apni fariyaad leke. Meri toh zindagi hi ujaad di hai un 6 logon ne! Un sabne milkar mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Pehle toh mere saare paise hadap liye, jhoothe kagaz banaye aur unhe asli bata kar use bhi kiya. Sir, woh forged documents se unhone mujhe puri tarah se phansa diya. Aur jab maine unka saamna karne ki koshish ki, toh un sabne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, sir. Mera Crime No. 485/2024 ka case chal raha hai unke khilaaf, aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log use khatam karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri madad karo, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, un dhokebaaz aur dhamki dene walon se.

Sir, mera ek bahut puraana case hai, Case Crime No. 850 of 2017. Bade mushkil se police ne un Kastoori Singh aur baaki logon ke khilaaf charge sheet daali thi, woh 20.1.2018 waali, number 1 of 2018. Mujhe laga ab toh insaaf mil jayega. Magistrate sahab ne bhi unhe court mein bulaya tha, 14.10.2019 ko, woh Criminal Case No. 2418 of 2019 mein. Sab sahi chal raha tha. Par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log High Court chale gaye hain, woh meri charge sheet aur woh Magistrate ka order quash karwane ke liye. Matlab, woh chahte hain ki unhe koi saza hi na mile. Sir, yeh toh seedhe seedhe garib ko dabana hai. Itni takleef jheli hai maine. Aap hi bataiye, main kya karun? Meri madad kijiye, Sir. Inhe rokna hoga, nahi toh mera pura case hi bigad jayega.

Sir, main kya karoon? Woh accused number one, jisne mere saath itna kuch kiya, woh phir se court mein naya daanv khel raha hai! Amalapuram ke Magistrate sahab ne jo order paas kiya tha C.C. No. 686 of 1956 mein, woh usko badalwana chahta hai. Pehle toh Magistrate sahab ne kaha tha ki Section 188 IPC ka jo offense hai (ki usne court ka order nahi maana), usko drop kar do. Aur ab woh chahta hai ki mere baki ke cases, jaise usne mere ghar mein ghuspet ki (Section 447), mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki di (Section 506), mere saath maar-peet ki (Section 323), aur meri cheezein churai (Section 379 IPC), sirf unhi par sunwai chale. Sir, yeh toh seedhi-seedhi gunda-gardi hai! Kya usko sab maaf kar denge?

Sir, main Kushaiguda, Kapra village ka rehene wala hoon. Meri ek choti si kapde ki dukaan hai, bilkul Kushaiguda Bus Stop ke paas. Sir, baat ye hai ki Mr. Kasula Nandam ji ki ek zameen hai Kapra village ke Sy.No. 170 mein, kareeb 6.32 guntas. Unke paas toh 1979 se hi uska occupancy rights certificate hai. Sir, unhone na, mujhe us zameen ka G appoint kiya tha. Matlab, unhone mujhe us zameen ki zimmedari di thi, uska dekhbhaal karne ko bola tha. Ab pata nahi kya ho raha hai, mujhe dar lag raha hai ki meri poori zindagi ki kamai, mera hak cheena jaa raha hai. Aap meri madad kijiye, sir, please.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh jaan nikli jaa rahi hai. Woh aurat, jiske khilaaf maine Vattiyoorkkavu police station mein case file kiya tha, Crime No. 875/2017, woh ab mera hi FIR cancel karwana chahti hai! Usne meri zameen par zabardasti ghuspaith ki (Section 447), mera bahut nuksaan bhi kiya (Section 427), aur police ke orders bhi nahi maane (Section 188). Ab woh court mein application daal kar bol rahi hai ki mera FIR hi galat hai, usko quash kar do. Kya aisa ho sakta hai, sir? Maine itni mushkil se sab bataya tha, report likhwai thi, aur ab woh Section 482 laga kar sab khatam kar degi? Meri toh suniye, sir! Mera to case hi khatam ho jayega. Maine toh sach bola tha. Please kuch kijiye, sir.

Sir ji, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Maine pehle ek complaint di thi, yaad hai? Woh Bangalore mein, meri private complaint PCR No. 7527 of 2021 thi. Uske baad hi toh Crime No. 361 of 2021 register hua tha, mera case bana tha. Ab pata chala hai ki kuch log us FIR ko challenge kar rahe hain court mein. Woh chahte hain ki mera case hi band ho jaaye ya uski jaanch aage na badhe. Sir, main toh ek aam aadmi hoon. Maine badi mushkil se complaint di thi, socha tha ab insaaf milega. Ab agar woh log mera case hi khatam karwa denge toh main kahan jaunga? Meri suno, sir. Please kuch karo. Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai ki mera case dab jayega. Meri madad karo, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Suresh Kumar hoon. Meri baat suniye, sir! Wohi log, jinhone meri zindagi barbad ki thi, ab phir se appeal daal rahe hain. D.B. Criminal Appeal No. 80/1992 ki baat kar raha hoon. Kitne saal ho gaye, sir, main insaaf ke liye taras raha hoon. Pehle to court ne unko saza di thi, par ab yeh 'accused persons' phir se uper ki adalat mein case le gaye hain. Meri to neend ud gayi hai! Mujhe laga tha ab sab khatam ho gaya, par yeh log chain se jeene hi nahi denge. Kya hoga agar unki appeal manzoor ho gayi? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir, bahut darr. Kya woh phir se bahar aa jayenge aur humein pareshaan karenge? Meri madad karo, sir, please. Mujhe insaaf chahiye aur in logon ko apni saza poori karni chahiye. Yeh sab dramebaazi band honi chahiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon. Meri zameen par kuch gundon ne saare ped kaat diye hain, be-reham tareeke se! Meri aankhon ke saamne mera jangal barbaad kar diya. Kitni mehnat se lagaye the woh ped. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki isme toh Indian Forests Act laga hi nahi hai. Ye kaise ho sakta hai Sir? Unhone sirf trespass nahi kiya, poora jangal ujaad diya! Kam se kam Section 441 aur 447 IPC ke तहत toh FIR hui hai, lekin unpe sakht action hona chahiye. Unhone meri property mein ghuskar yeh sab kiya hai. Sir, please meri suniye aur unko kadi saza dilwaiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mera toh dimag ghoom gaya hai yeh sab dekh ke. Court mein itne bade-bade wukil aa gaye hain mere chote se case ke liye. Ek toh woh Aley Hasan Khan, unke liye Manish Tiwary jaise senior wukil hain, saath mein Manu, Wasim, Zubair aur hain. Phir Azam Khan ke liye alag Imranullah, Azhar Khan ke liye T.A. Khan, aur woh Barquat Ali Thekedar ke liye Brijesh Pandey. Sir, itne saare lawyers, aur main akela gareeb aadmi. Woh log pata nahi kya-kya bade-bade kanoon aur purane faislon ki baat karte hain, mujhe toh kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Sir, bas insaaf chahiye. Main kaise ladunga in sab se? Meri suno na, Sir. Bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main Seema Devi bol rahi hoon. Woh mera jo case tha na, jismein un badmashon ne mere saath itna galat kiya tha... unhone phir se appeal kar di hai court mein. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya, woh log andar hain. Lekin nahi! Yeh log phir se bahar aane ki koshish kar rahe hain, sir. Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur ab yeh court-court ka chakkar phir shuru ho gaya. Bohot darr lag raha hai mujhe. Agar woh log bahar aa gaye toh meri aur mere bachchon ki jaan ko khatra hai. Main gareeb aurat kahan jaungi? Aap hi batao, humein insaaf kab milega? Please, sir, aap kuch karo. Meri madad karo.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai mere saath. Maine ek complaint darj karwayi thi, Crime No. 44/2023, us accused No.1 ke khilaaf jisne meri property par zabardasti ghuspet ki thi, trespass kiya tha. IPC ki Section 447 aur 34 ke तहत us par case bana tha. Ab woh accused banda court mein mere hi case ko challenge kar raha hai! Keh raha hai ki maine jhoothi complaint ki hai. Sir, mera case Bengaluru ke VII Additional Chief Metropolitan Magistrate sahab ke paas chal raha hai. Maine toh sach bataya tha, usne galat kiya tha. Ab woh mujhse insaaf bhi chheen raha hai. Meri madad kijiye, sir, woh humein bahut tang kar raha hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Amethi ke Mohanganj police station mein mere khilaaf ek FIR hui thi, number 0247 of 2021. Usmein, investigating officer ne mere upar galat chargesheet laga di hai, uska number hai 354 of 2021 aur date hai 16.12.2021. Yeh log bol rahe hain ki maine public property ko nuksaan pahunchaya hai, Prevention of Damage to Public Property Act ke Section 2/3 ke तहत. Sir, main kasam kha ke kehta hoon, maine aisa kuch nahi kiya! Mujhe jhootha fasaya jaa raha hai. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jaayegi is chargesheet se. Please sir, yeh meri chargesheet cancel karwa dijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Aap hi meri aakhri umeed hain.

Sir, main Pramod Kumar Agarwal bol raha hoon. Meri suno please. Yeh Criminal Application No.1467 of 2018 ki baat hai. 4 May 2016 ko, main wahan nahi tha na, meri absence ka fayda uthaya gaya. Yeh HPCL ke Ashish Kumar Sharma (Area Sales Manager), Mukesh Prasad (Deputy Manager) aur unka contractor Manoj Paul, aur haan, unke saath kuch police waale bhi the... unhone milkar mere saath galat kiya. Meri bina maujoodgi ke mera nuksaan kiya gaya. Mujhe nahi pata exactly kya kiya, par unhone meri property ya mere rights ke saath zaroor chhedkhani ki hai. Saahab, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye in sab logon se. Yeh sab mile hue hain aur mujhe tang kar rahe hain.

Sir, main Pramod Kumar Agarwal hoon. Meri ek urgent complaint hai. Yeh 4 May 2016 ki baat hai, jab main wahan maujood nahi tha. Meri गैर-मौजूदगी mein, HPCL ke Ashish Kumar Sharma (Area Sales Manager), Mukesh Prasad (Deputy Manager) aur unka contractor Manoj Paul, yeh sab log, aur to aur, kuch police wale bhi the inke saath! Sir, inhone mere saath bahut badi dhokhadhadi ki hai, ya zabardasti kuch kiya hai. Pata nahi kya saazish thi inki, par mera bahut nuksaan hua hai aur main tab se bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, woh log bol rahe hain ki yeh toh bas property ka mamla hai, civil dispute hai. Par sir, woh log meri zameen mein zabardasti ghus gaye, trespass kiya! Meri family ko dhamkaya, intimidate kiya. Yeh koi civil mamla nahi hai, yeh toh seedha crime hai. Woh log bol rahe hain ki main unko arm-twist kar raha hoon kyunki main pehle cases haar gaya. Aisa bilkul nahi hai sir! Main bas apni property ka hak maang raha hoon. Meri mehnat ki kamai hai woh. Aur haan, complain der se ki, kyunki woh log itne powerful hain, mujhe aur meri family ko darr lag raha tha. Unhone dhamkaya tha ki agar police ke paas gaye toh aur bura karenge. Mujhe laga shayad shanti se baat ban jaye, par unhone hadd hi kar di. Iss liye ab majboor hoke aaya hoon. Please meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main Prempura gaon se aaya hoon. Bahut pareshan hoon, kya bataun aapko. Yeh mamla hamare Hanuman Sagar kuwa aur uski Guwarwala zameen ka hai, jo mere purkhon ki hai. Pata nahi kitne saalon se Bhoora, Goma ka beta, aur Mangu, dono ne meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Woh din mujhe aaj bhi yaad hai, 11 January 1971, dopahar ka samay tha. Woh dono, bina kisi baat ke, hamari zameen par ghus aaye the, zabardasti kabza karne. Pehle bhi judge sahab ne unko saza di thi, lekin ab yeh phir appeal kar rahe hain. Mujhe darr lagta hai, sir, meri family ko kuch ho na jaaye. Meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye, inn logon se mujhe chhutkara dilao.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga, mera Case Crime No. 470 of 2022 tha, jo Ravi Kiran aur uske saathiyon ke khilaaf tha. Humne badi himmat se FIR karwai thi. Ab pata chala hai ki woh log court mein phir se naye documents (supplementary affidavit) file kar rahe hain. Unki koshish hai ki jo hamari charge-sheet bani thi 31.05.2023 ko, aur court ne jo unko bulane ka order (summoning order) diya hai 23.09.2024 ko, sab kuch cancel ho jaaye. Woh poora Case No. 6222 of 2024 hi rukwana chahte hain, Sir! Agar aisa ho gaya toh meri saari mehnat, mera insaaf, sab bekar ho jaayega. Please, Sir, aap kuch kijiye, mujhe dar lag raha hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri to zindagi hi mushkil ho gayi hai. Ye case, jiska judgment 12.06.2013 ko Goalpara ke Additional Sessions Judge ne diya tha, ab phir se khul gaya hai. Mujhe laga tha ki finally mujhe insaaf mil gaya hai, wo matter khatam ho gaya tha. Lekin ab phir se koi us purane judgment ko challenge kar raha hai. Main itne saal se shanti se reh rahi thi, aur ab phir se wohi purani takleef, wohi court-kacheri. Meri family bahut pareshan hai. Kya hamari problem kabhi solve nahi hogi? Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai, sir.

Sir, main aapke paas apni complaint lekar aaya hoon. Dekho na, humare upar hi ulta case bana diya hai! Meri complaint toh Crime No. 260/95 mein darj hui thi, lekin ab yeh log (accused party) bol rahe hain ki humne unko maara hai. Unki complaint pe Crime No. 261/1995 bana diya gaya hai, aur sabse badi baat, police ne usmein sahi rules (Order 588A P.S.O) follow hi nahi kiye. Head Constable saab hospital gaye, unhone woh dusri party ke aadmi (A2) ka statement record kiya aur ussi pe seedha FIR (Ex.P.17) kaat di, Sections 147, 148, 324, 323 laga diye! Sir, yeh toh galat hai na? Hum pe hi vaar hua, aur ab hum par hi case? Inspector saab ne dono cases ek saath investigate kiye, par lagta hai hamari baat theek se suni hi nahi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, yeh log humein phansa rahe hain!

Sahab, suniye na please! Mera ek case Crime No. 115/2023 hai, aapko yaad hai? Woh jo 6 log the, jo mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus aaye the aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di thi. Sir, mujhe abhi pata chala hai ki woh log court mein jaakar is case ki registration ko hi challenge kar rahe hain! Yeh kya mazak hai? Meri toh jaan atki hui hai unke darr se, aur woh kehte hain case galat hai? Maine jo complaint ki thi, woh sach hai, ek-ek baat sach hai. Hum pehle hi itne dare hue hain, aur ab woh aise karenge toh humara kya hoga? Aap please kuch kijiye, Sir. Unpar strict action lo, warna humara jeena mushkil ho jayega. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sahab, main Amritlal Debnath, Hari Narayan Debnath ka beta, Chailengta, Longtherai Valley se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sahab! Parson 6 badmash log meri zameen mein zabardasti ghus aaye. Unhone meri boundary ke pillars aur jo kaante wali taar (barbed fencing) lagi thi, sab ukhaad phenka. Meri saari property damage kar di, mera lakh rupaye ka nuksaan kar diya hai. Meri mehnat ki kamayi thi woh, sab barbaad kar di un logo ne. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sahab! Kripya karke meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Molakram aur uske aadmiyon ne... sir, meri zameen par kabza karne ki koshish ki thi aur public property bhi todi thi unhone, mere saamne! Kitna nuksaan kiya tha. Police ne tab Crime No. 87 of 2018 mein Section 447 IPC aur Public Property Act ke तहत un par case darj kiya tha aur 8 June 2018 ko charge-sheet bhi laga di thi. Ab, sir, mujhe pata chala hai ki woh Molakram aur uska sathi, yeh sab proceedings cancel karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain! Fatehpur ki ACJM Court mein chal raha hai yeh case, Number 1437 of 2025. Agar yeh sab cancel ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh puri mehnat barbaad ho jayegi. Kripya karke aap meri madad kijiye, sir. Unko aage badhne se rokiye, mujhe justice chahiye!

Sir, main Shahabad se aaya hoon, mera naam Ramesh Kumar hai. Aapko yaad hai, maine 2019 mein ek FIR darj karwai thi yahan, Case Crime No. 0024 of 2024. Woh kuch log the na, jo meri zameen par ghus gaye the zabardasti? Unhone poora nuksaan kiya tha, Section 447 IPC aur public property ko bhi damage kiya tha. Maine socha tha ab insaaf milega. Par abhi pata chala hai ki woh log court chale gaye hain, meri uss FIR ko challenge karne ke liye! Keh rahe hain meri FIR galat hai! Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha dhokha hai. Maine khud dekha tha unhe, meri aankhon ke saamne hua sab. Aap please kuch karo, meri FIR ko sahi sabit karo. Mujhe un logon se insaaf chahiye jo meri zameen par ghuse the. Meri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar unhe saza nahi mili toh.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai. Kitni mushkil se toh police ne Pramesh alias Tunni ke khilaaf chargesheet file ki thi, 09.07.2024 ko. Aur Azamgarh ke CJM sahab ne bhi usko court mein bulaya tha, 17.02.2025 ko, mere case number 6436/2025 mein. Mujhe laga tha ab jaake insaaf milega. Lekin ab pata chala hai ki woh Tunni aur uske bade log application daal rahe hain ki yeh saari chargesheet aur woh court ka bulawa, sab cancel ho jaaye. Sir, agar yeh sab quash ho gaya toh mera kya hoga? Meri toh saari mehnat, saare saboot, sab barbaad ho jayenge. Yeh log mere saath galat kar rahe hain. Please aap meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas apni ek bahut badi pareshani leke aaya hoon. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai, pata nahi kya hoga. Maine ek FIR karwai thi, number 0370... usmein Ramendra Gupta ke khilaaf. Police ne investigation karke chargesheet bhi file kar di thi, woh bhi 14.07.2023 ko. Aur Court se usko summon bhi aa gaye the, 05.08.2023 ko Lucknow ke CJM saab ne bulaya tha usko. Par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki Ramendra Gupta ne *upar* court mein appeal daali hai, uska lawyer Purnendu Chakravarty hai. Woh chahta hai ki meri woh FIR, chargesheet aur jo court ka order hai, sab cancel ho jaye. Sir, agar aisa ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh puri mehnat barbaad ho jayegi. Kahan jaaun main ab? Yeh toh seedha-seedha mere saath dhokha hoga. Meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main Chhagan Raghav hoon. Bahut pareshaan hoon, meri suniye. Maine toh apni complaint ki thi Bharwad Pola Ghugha aur uske do saathiyon ke khilaaf. Unhone meri zameen par zabardasti ghuspet ki thi, mera nuksaan kiya tha, tod-phod ki thi (mischief aur criminal trespass, Sir!). Maine pehle gaon ki Nyaya Panchayat mein report ki thi, socha wahan insaaf milega. Par ab toh pata nahi kya ho raha hai. Vallabhipur Umrala ke Magistrate Sahab ne kuch order paas kiya, aur ab Bhavnagar ke Sessions Judge Sahab keh rahe hain ki Nyaya Panchayat ka jurisdiction hi nahi tha. Matlab, mera case kya, kahan jayega? Pehle toh bolte hain panchayat mein jao, ab wahi case ulta kar rahe hain. Sir, mujhe mera insaaf chahiye. Woh log mera nuksaan karke ghoom rahe hain, aur mera case hi ghumaya ja raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, jismein un logon ne public property ko nuksan pahunchaya aur meri zameen par bhi galat kabza kiya tha. Yeh mamla Kannauj P.S. ka hai. Case Crime No. 102/2022 se hi yeh Criminal Case No. 2739/2024 bana hai. Ab Sir, woh log court mein application dekar meri chargesheet (No. 452/2022, 17.08.2022 wali) aur jo court ne abhi notice liya hai (19.03.2024 ka order), sab kuch quash karwana chahte hain. Matlab, woh poori criminal proceedings hi band karwana chahte hain! Agar aisa ho gaya, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega, Sir? Main toh loot jaunga! Yeh case Chief Judicial Magistrate sahab ki court mein pending hai. Meri madad kijiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapko yeh batane aaya hoon ki Nagal PS mein jo meri complaint thi, Case Crime No. 73/2024, uspar Bijendra aur uske aadmiyon ke khilaaf FIR hui thi. Unhone hamari public property ko bahut nuksaan pahunchaya tha aur zabardasti ghus gaye the. Police ne toh 19 June 2024 ko charge-sheet bhi file kar di thi, aur court ne bhi 5 October 2024 ko notice diya tha. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh log apni saari proceedings, jo Criminal Case No. 2174/2024 Saharanpur court mein chal raha hai, use radd karwana chahte hain! Sir, yeh toh sarasar galat hai. Itni mushkil se toh justice ki taraf ek kadam badhaya tha, ab woh log bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri aapse guzarish hai ki unhe aise bachne na diya jaye. Please, kuch kijiye!

Sir, main Basti ke Rudhauli gaon se aaya hoon. Pramod Chaudhary aur uske kuch logon ne meri zameen par zabardasti kabza kar liya tha, aur bahut nuksaan bhi pahunchaya tha. Humne badi mushkil se Police station Rudhauli mein complaint ki thi, Case Crime No. 169 of 2024. Police ne unpar Section 447 IPC aur Public Property ko nuksaan pahunchane ke charges bhi lagaye the. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki Pramod Chaudhary court mein application dekar yeh pura case hi band karwana chahte hain, woh chargesheet aur sab kuch. Sir, agar yeh case hi khatam ho gaya toh humein garibon ko insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh puri ummeed toot jayegi. Aap please kuch kijiye, yeh case band nahi hona chahiye.

Sir, main Rajpati. Meri suniye na, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Pata nahi kaisa chakkar chal raha hai, mere khilaaf yeh log ek poora case chala rahe hain. Pehle 14.07.2022 ki ek charge-sheet aayi, phir ek aur order 20.12.2024 ko ACJM 6, Prayagraj se. Meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aa raha kya ho raha hai. Yeh bol rahe hain ki maine public property ko nuksaan pahunchaya hai (sections 3/5 Prevention of Damage to Public Property Act) aur Section 447 IPC ke tehat trespass kiya hai. Sir, main kasam se be-gunaah hoon! Yeh Case No. 1473 of 2024 (State vs. Rajpati) aur Case Crime No. 116 of 2022, Saraimamrez P.S., District-Prayagraj ka hai. Meri zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai, sir. Please, yeh saari karwahi rukwa do. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, woh Jagdev aur uske saathiyon ne hamari public property ko bahut nuksan pahunchaya hai. Galt tareeke se ghus gaye the (trespass kiya tha), sab tod-phod kar di. P.S. Uldan, District Jhansi mein humne unke khilaaf FIR karayi thi, uska Case Crime No. 105 of 2023 hai. Poori chargesheet bhi file ho gayi thi 30.07.2023 ko, aur Mauranipur court mein Case No. 4915 of 2023 chal raha hai. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh log apni proceedings ko quash karwana chahte hain, Section 482 Cr.P.C. mein application di hai. Yeh toh sarasar galat hai! Itni mushkil se case bana hai, agar yeh quash ho gaya toh humein insaaf kaise milega? Meri aapse request hai sir, please kuch kijiye, unko aise chhodna nahi chahiye. Humko nyay chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Maine pehle ek report darj karayi thi, jiske basis pe C.C.No.230 of 2021 case bana tha. Woh case Srikalahasti ke Additional Junior Civil Judge ke paas chal raha hai. Ab woh accused, jiske khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh petition daal raha hai ke mera charge sheet hi quash ho jaye! Matlab, woh chahta hai ki mera pura case hi khatam ho jaye. Sir, main ek public servant hoon. Meri complaint sahi thi, isliye toh case bana tha. Agar yeh quash ho gaya toh mujhe justice kaise milega? Yeh toh galat hoga na. Meri suniye sir, please. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh case chalna chahiye, woh aise khatam nahi ho sakta.

Sir, main Colonelganj se aaya hoon, Prayagraj. Aapko yaad hai, maine pichle mahine, 22.3.2024 ko ek FIR darj karayi thi, Case Crime No. 0119 of 2024. Meri zameen par kuch logon ne zabardasti kabza kar liya tha, ghuspaith ki thi, isliye maine 447 IPC ke तहत complaint ki thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein meri FIR quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri complaint ko galat bata rahe hain, case band karwana chahte hain! Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha injustice hai. Meri itni mushkil se FIR hui hai, aur ab woh use bhi band karwana chahte hain? Mujhe darr lag raha hai, Sir. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Meri FIR valid hai, please ispe action lijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint Khutar thane mein darj hui thi, Case Crime No. 156 of 2018. Manvendra Singh ne meri jagah pe zabardasti ghusa tha aur nuksan bhi pahunchaya tha. Isi liye uske khilaaf Section 441, 447 IPC aur Prevention of Damage to Public Property Act ke tehat case bana tha. Ab 2018 se ab tak, itne saal ho gaye, main Shajahanpur se insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Ab mujhe khabar mili hai ki woh log meri chargesheet aur jo court ke orders aaye hain, un sabko quash karwana chahte hain. Matlab, mera pura case hi band karwana chahte hain! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Kya gareeb ko insaaf nahi milega? Meri sunwai theek se hui hi nahi abhi tak. Please meri madad kijiye, mera case band nahi hona chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, huzoor.

Sir, main Shantha, KEB se retired employee hoon. Meri poori zindagi ki kamai thi woh zameen, jo KEB ne mujhe Geddalahalli mein site number 154 mein allot ki thi. Pata nahi kaise, kuch 7 log hain, unhone meri property hadapne ki koshish ki hai. Sir, unhone mere saath dhokhadhadi ki, meri zameen par zabardasti ghus gaye. Mujhe bohot dhamkaya bhi hai, jaan se marne ki dhamki di. Sanjay Nagara police station ne unke khilaaf charge sheet toh file kar di hai (cheating, trespass aur intimidation ke sections mein), par mujhe abhi bhi bohot darr lagta hai. Meri to neend ud gayi hai. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut dukhi hoke aaya hoon. Mujhe toh vishwas hi nahi ho raha ki yeh kya ho gaya.
