Jin logon ne mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya tha, meri zameen par zabardasti ghuse the (Section 419 aur 447 IPC ke तहत), court ne unhe baizzat bari kar diya hai! Matlab, woh dono accused number 1 aur 2 ab free hain, azaad ghumenge? Aur unke jo bail bonds the, woh bhi cancel ho gaye. Hadd toh tab ho gayi jab unhe unke jama kiye hue Rs. 10,000 bhi wapas mil rahe hain. Mera kya hoga, sir? Mera jo nuksaan hua, jo pareshani jheli, uska koi mol nahi? Yeh toh seedha-seedha anyay hai mere saath. Aap hi bataiye, main ab kahan jaun, kya karun?

Sir, main Shankar Lal, Gadaipur gaon se aaya hoon. Mujhe complaint karni hai. Kal raat, matlab 28 April 1998 ko, kareeb paune aath baje (07:45 pm), mere plot, khasra no. 533/1 mein kuch log zabardasti ghus aaye. Woh sab ek jhund bana kar aaye the, sir, bade gunde lag rahe the! Unka maksad sirf danga karna aur meri zameen par kabza karna tha. Mere ghar mein ghusne ki koshish bhi ki. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Meri property ab unsafe lag rahi hai. Kripya karke un gundon ke khilaf action lijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon, sir, samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon.

Sir, main Rajender Verma baat kar raha hoon. Meri baat suniye, sir, main bahut zyaada pareshaan hoon. Pata nahi yeh mere saath kya ho gaya hai. Yeh pichhle saal ki baat hai, 15 January 2020 ko, main airport gaya tha apni flight pakadne. Meri flight 6E-861 thi aur PNR number SQB83B tha. Maine saare apne travel details dikhakar terminal building mein entry li thi, bilkul rules ke hisaab se. Lekin sir, pata nahi kyun, ek staff member thi Komal Mukhi naam ki, usne mujhe beech mein hi rok liya. Boli mera boarding pass galat hai! Arre, main toh seedha-saadha aadmi hoon, maine toh sab kuch theek hi dikhaya tha. Unhone mujhe sabke saamne itna sharminda kiya. Meri kya galti thi, sir? Meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Woh jo Khasra No. 587, 588, 589 ke malik hain na, un logon ne meri zameen par kabza kar liya hai, Sir. Meri matlab, woh Gram Sabha ki zameen hai, Khasra No. 264, jahan ek talab bhi hai. Unke plot ke dakshin taraf se, kareeb 12 feet andar ghus gaye hain woh log, unlawfully. Yeh bilkul galat hai, Sir. Hum gareeb log kahan jayenge? Hamare paas toh bas yahi sahara hai. Kripya karke unke khilaf karwai kijiye aur meri zameen wapas dilwaiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main aapke paas complain karne aaya hoon. Meri apni zameen hai, gaon mein. Pawan naam ka ek aadmi hai, woh meri property mein zabardasti ghus gaya hai. Bilkul illegally enter kiya hai usne. Maine kitni baar mana kiya, par woh sunta hi nahi. Mujhe bahut pareshaani ho rahi hai uski wajah se. Woh meri zameen par kabza karne ki koshish kar raha hai, aur mujhe dar lag raha hai ki mera sab kuch chala jayega. Aap please uske khilaaf action lijiye, Sir. Yeh Section 447 ka case hai, mujhe pata hai yeh trespass hai. Meri madad kijiye, main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri baat suno na. Mere saath jo ghatna hui thi, woh 26 July 2006 ki hai. Kitne saal ho gaye, socho! Main tab se insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon. Maine police station mein complaint ki thi aur mera case 1 June 2007 ko institute hua tha. Yeh uska serial number hai, 2034774/2016. Sir, itna time ho gaya, ab tak mujhe justice nahi mila. Main complainant hoon, aur ab bahut thak gaya hoon. Please kuch kijiye, meri madad karo.

Sir, main toh bas apni complaint leke aaya hoon. Meri toh jaan nikli ja rahi hai iss case mein. Yahan court mein log bolte hain ki police ko hi sab kuch prove karna padega. Matlab, woh accused toh bas chupchaap khada rahega, usko kuch prove nahi karna? Aur agar uski taraf se kuch kami bhi hai na, tab bhi usse hamara faayda nahi hoga, hamari police ko hi poora case strong karna padega. Saara proof ka burden toh prosecution pe hi hai, accused pe toh aata hi nahi. Yeh kya system hai, Sir? Maine toh saaf saaf dekha hai sab kuch, phir bhi mujhe lag raha hai ki main hi galat hoon. Aap hi batao, mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Mujhe toh bas justice chahiye, Sir. Please help karo.

Sir, main Hari Ram, bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek zameen hai, plot number 7, Khasra number 18/3, Qutub Vihar, Phase II, Goyla Dairy mein. Sir, maine us par apni plinth banayi thi, poori mehnat se. Lekin 7 March 2010 ko, woh do log, pata nahi kya chahte hain, meri zameen par zabardasti kabza karne aa gaye. Unhone meri banayi hui plinth ke upar boundary wall khadi kar di! Aur toh aur, Sir, ek kamra bhi bana diya mere plot par. Meri property meri aankhon ke saamne cheeni ja rahi hai. Please, Sir, meri madad kijiye. Ye log meri zameen hadap rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, Daroga ji, main Bajitpur Thakran gaon se aaya hoon. Meri suniye, sir! Woh kuch log hain na, unhone humare gaon ki Gram Sabha ki zameen par kabza kar liya hai. Aise hi, apni marzi se illegal construction khadi kar di hai wahan! Yeh toh seedha seedha zameen hadapna hua na, sir? Humari zameen hai woh, sab gaon walon ki. Ab yeh log wahan ghar bana kar baith gaye hain. Humari taraf se toh pehle bhi complain hui thi, court mein bhi case chal raha hai, unko bulaya bhi gaya tha. Magar woh toh bolte hain unhone kuch galat kiya hi nahi! Sir, yeh toh seedha seedha 'criminal trespass' hai, Section 447 IPC ke tehat aata hai. Humara hakk hai, humein insaaf chahiye. Woh log humari zameen par qabza karke baithe hain, humara nuksaan kar rahe hain. Aap kuch kariye, sir!

Sir, main Satbari gaon se aaya hoon. Mujhe aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batani hai, sir. Aaj se kaafi saal pehle, 12 February 2004 ko, hamare gaon mein, Khasra No. 464 par jo Gaon Sabha ki zameen hai, us par ek aadmi ne zabardasti ek mandir bana diya hai! Sir, yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Woh zameen toh hum sab gaon walon ki hai, public land hai. Koi aise aakar kaise kabza kar sakta hai? Hum sab bahut pareshan hain. Kitne logon ne mana kiya, par usne kisi ki nahi suni. Meri aapse haath jodkar request hai, please is par action lo. Hamari zameen wapas dilwao, sir. Gareeb logon ki suno.

Sir, main Ram Rattan, yahan apni complaint lekar aaya hoon. Mohd. Zahid Saifi s/o Sh. Abdul Wa ne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Yeh baat 2014 ki hai, 23 December se pehle hi usne mere saath fraud kiya tha. Usne meri sari mehnat ki kamai, lakhon rupaye hadap liye. Main toh bilkul toot gaya hoon, Sir. Ek saal tak main uske peeche bhagta raha ki woh mere paise lauta de, par usne meri ek na suni. Phir majboor hokar, maine 23 December 2015 ko court mein case file kiya tha. Sir, main ek gareeb aadmi hoon, woh paise meri zindagi bhar ki kamaai the. Meri family ka future daav par laga hai. Aap se request hai, kripya is mamle mein meri madad karein aur mujhe insaaf dilwaayein. Us Zahid Saifi ko pakda jaye aur mere paise wapas dilwaayein, Sir.

Sir, main aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batane aaya hoon. Yeh 24 January 2016 ki subah 7:30 baje ki baat hai. Hamari jo Gram Sabha ki zameen hai na, Khasra No. 52/16/1 aur 25/2, Sonia Farms ke paas, Silver Oak Lane ke kareeb, Fatehpur Beri mein... wahan Deshpal naam ka ek aadmi, ya uske kuch log, ek peele rang ki JCB machine leke aa gaye the. Pata hai kya kar rahe the? Woh zameen ko level kar rahe the, jaise ki us par zabardasti kabza karna chahte hon. Sir, yeh Gram Sabha ki zameen hai, hum sab gaon walon ki hai. Koi aise kaise aake illegal kabza kar sakta hai? Mujhe bahut gussa aur chinta ho rahi hai. Meri request hai, please unke khilaf strict action lijiye aur hamari zameen ko bachaiye.

Sir, suno toh meri baat! Main kya karoon, bahut pareshan hoon. Meri zameen hai Asola Gaon, Mehrauli mein, woh Khasra No. 1318 wali. Fatehpur Beri PS ke jurisdiction mein aati hai. Abhi pata nahi kab, kis waqt, par Kiran Singh naam ka ek aadmi meri property mein zabardasti ghus gaya. Meri ijazat ke bina, usne meri zameen par kadam rakha, sir! Yeh toh seedha-seedha meri property par kabza karne ki koshish hai. Mujhe nahi pata kya karna hai, bahut darr lag raha hai. Aap please uske khilaaf action lo. Meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko wahi puraana case batane aaya hoon. Woh jo meri zameen par zabardasti ghus gaye the na, unka case chal raha hai. Aapko pata hai, unko notice bhi mil gaya hai. Court ne bataya ki IPC 447 ke तहत unko saare papers aur notice sab de diye gaye the 26.10.2012 ko. Itne saal ho gaye, aur woh shakhs ab bhi keh raha hai ki usne kuch galat kiya hi nahi! Bolta hai ki woh toh trial chahta hai. Meri kya galti hai isme? Main toh bas apna haq maang raha hoon. Sir, woh log meri zameen chhodne ko taiyaar hi nahi hain, aur upar se court mein bhi jhooth bol rahe hain. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Wo Sharma ji hain na, local neta, unhone mera jeena mushkil kar diya hai. Meri dukaan band karwa di hai, bolte hain jagah unki hai, jabki papers mere paas hain. Main garib aadmi hoon, meri rozi-roti chheen li hai unhone. Sir, main bhi ek insaan hoon, mujhe bhi izzat se jeene ka haq hai. Constitution mein likha hai na, sabko life aur liberty ka adhikar hai? Meri liberty kahan hai? Main darr darr ke jeeta hoon. Raat ko neend nahi aati. Meri family bhi pareshan hai. Wo meri dignity ke saath khel rahe hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir. Meri madad kijiye, nahi toh meri jaan ko bhi khatra hai. Main apne hak ke liye ladna chahta hoon. Please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut serious complain leke aaya hoon. Kal mere saath jo hua na, woh soch ke bhi darr lag raha hai. Kuch logon ne mujhe gherao kar liya tha. Mere office ke bahar hi, jaise hi main nikla, ekdum se. Mujhe bahar jaane hi nahi de rahe the. Lagbhag ek ghante tak main andar hi phansa raha. Yeh koi simple 'gherao' nahi tha, Sir. Aajkal log iska ek naya matlab nikal rahe hain – seedha-seedha dhamkana aur rokna. Meri saari freedom chheen li thi unhone, mujhe laga meri jaan ko khatra hai. Please, Sir, inpe action lijiye. Aise logon ko rokna bahut zaroori hai, varna koi kaam nahi kar payega.

Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon, meri suno na please. Pata nahi kahan kahan thokarein kha raha hoon. Mujhe Constable ki naukri milne wali thi, Sir, poori umeed thi. Lekin 20 August 2001 ko Dy. Commissioner of Police ne mera candidature hi cancel kar diya. Meri to zindagi hi ulti ho gayi, Sir. Main Central Administrative Tribunal gaya tha ki meri baat suni jaaye, ki woh decision galat hai. Par unhone bhi meri application 6 January 2003 ko dismiss kar di. Ab aap hi batao, main kya karun? Ek galti nahi thi meri, phir bhi saalon se pareshan hoon. Ab main court gaya hoon ki woh Tribunal ka order hi khatam ho jaaye. Meri naukri ka masla hai, Sir, please help kijiye.

Sir, main Baranagar se aaya hoon, Bidhan Park, 34 number se. Meri ek choti si school hai yahan. Main kirayedaar hoon aur meri zameen maalkin, jo OP2 hain, unhone mujhe bahut pareshan kar rakha hai. Humara ek proper agreement hua tha 15th January 2007 ko, maine poora ground floor school chalane ke liye liya tha. Har mahine Rs. 4,500 kiraya deta hoon time pe. Teen saal ka agreement tha, 2010 tak. Ab woh mujhe itna tang kar rahi hain ki school chalana mushkil ho gaya hai. Bacchon ka future daav par hai. Sir, meri koi sun nahi raha, main kya karoon? Kripya meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main ek bahut pareshaan insaan hoon. Mera ek case hai court mein, pata nahi kab se chal raha hai. Hum jaise aam aadmi ka kya, jab yeh saare rules aur judgments sirf bade-bade lawyers aur researchers ke liye hote hain? Sir, 1 September 2011 ko mere case ki sunwai hui thi. Meri petition thi, aur us din sunke judge saahab ne bola tha ki faisla 'reserve' kar liya hai. Matlab, mujhe laga ab toh jaldi hi judgment mil jaayegi. Lekin, woh judgment aane se pehle hi, pata nahi kahan se aur Civil Misc. Writ Petitions beech mein aa gaye. Ab tak mujhe koi faisla nahi mila hai! Itne saal ho gaye hain Sir, main kab tak intezaar karoon? Meri toh umar nikalti jaa rahi hai. Mujhe bas mera nyay chahiye, Sir.

Sir, meri toh jaan nikal gayi sunke. Abhi-abhi pata chala hai ki woh paanch log — Ishwar Singh, Kalyansingh, Prabhu, Arjun aur Mewa Ram — jinko Merta ke Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 1971 mein galat kaam ke liye convict kiya tha aur saza bhi sunai thi, ab woh appeal kar rahe hain! Humne socha tha finally insaaf mil gaya. Un logon ne mere saath jo kiya tha, uski toh yaad bhi ab tak darrati hai. Kitne mushkil se woh judgment aaya tha. Ab phir se yeh sunke toh mera dimaag kharab ho gaya hai. Kya woh phir se bach jayenge? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, sir. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai. Kripya aap kuch kijiye, sir. Hum gareeb logon ko kya insaaf aise hi adhoora milta rahega?

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri suniye na. Woh jo hamare saamne waale log the na, jin par humne case kiya tha, woh sab ke sab bari ho gaye! Judge sahab ne unhe chhod diya, 31 March 2012 ko. Sochiye, hum par itna bada zulm hua aur unhe acquittal mil gaya. Ab badi mushkil se, itne din baad (86 din late ho gaya tha, par woh maaf ho gaya hai), maine appeal file karne ki permission maangi hai under Section 378 (4) Cr.P.C. Par Sir, sabse badi baat toh yeh hai ki ulti unhone hum par hi FIR kar di hai! Hum toh complainant the, hum hi पीड़ित hain, aur hum par hi FIR? Yeh kya insaaf hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bahut pareshan hoon main.

Sir, main Katijhuri gaon se aaya hoon, Baisinga thana, Mayurbhanj district se. Meri suniye Sir, mera apna sautela bhai hai, ek hi baap ke bete hain hum. Humare ghar bhi paas paas hain. Bahut saalon pehle hi humari purkhon ki zameen ka batwara ho gaya tha, sab alag alag apne hisse mein rehte the. Par Sir, ab woh mujhe chain se jeene nahi de raha. 6 July 1982 ki subah, kareeb 7 baje, main apne hisse ki zameen par kaam kar raha tha, tabhi woh aaya aur bina baat ke jhagda karne laga, gaaliyan di, aur bola yeh jagah uski hai. Usne meri fasal ko nuksan pahunchaya aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon, bahut pareshan hoon usse. Please meri help kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, meri ek bahut puraani shikayat hai. Maine 18-10-1958 ko Thoubal ke DM saheb ke paas ek complaint di thi. Woh kya hai na, teen log aur do doosre unke saath, total paanch log, meri zameen pe zabardasti ghus aaye the. Poori gundagardi ki thi, ikkathe hoke aaye the bina wajah. Aur mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Sections 143, 147, 447, 506 IPC ke under maine complaint ki thi. Ab suna hai ki woh log SDM Thoubal ke paas case number 107/1958 ko khatam karwane ki application de rahe hain. Main toh bas insaaf chahta hoon, sahib. Meri suno please.

Sir, main Pathankot se aaya hoon, Division No. 2 police station ka maamla hai. Ye FIR No. 44 hai, 17.05.2008 ki. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai, meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai! Woh log, jinhone mere saath itna galat kiya hai, meri jagah pe kabza kiya, mera samaan chori kiya, mere mandir ko apavitra kiya hai. Unhone jaan bujhkar meri jaati ka apmaan kiya hai, mujhe gaaliyan di hain. Meri property tod di, aur dange bhi kiye hain. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Woh log abhi tak khule ghoom rahe hain. Meri suniye sir, unko pakdo aur saza do. Ye Scheduled Caste aur Scheduled Tribe ka mamla hai, unhone mujhe bahut pareshan kiya hai. Meri madad karo sir, please.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Pehle toh woh Crime No. 638/2019 wala mamla hua tha, jiske liye maine complaint ki thi. Uske baad badi mushkil se C.C. No. 51315/2021 mein court mein case shuru hua tha, mujhe laga ab toh insaaf milega. Lekin Sir, ab woh log, jo accused hain, unhone phir se naya panga khada kar diya hai. Woh CRL.P No. 40 of 2024 aur aise aur petitions daal ke mere case ki sunwai ko rokhne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Woh chahte hain ki yeh saara mamla hi khatam ho jaaye. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai. Mujhe lagta hai woh log mujhe aur mere parivaar ko tang kar rahe hain. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Yeh kya ho raha hai mere saath? Main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint hai. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai, woh saamne wale log, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha, ab phir se court mein naya panga kar rahe hain. Mera woh purana mamla tha na, jo Crime No. 638/2019 mein register hua tha, aur ab jiska case number C.C. No. 51315/2021 chal raha hai, usko woh log challenge kar rahe hain. Sir, matlab itne saal ho gaye hain, main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, aur ab yeh log chahte hain ki yeh case hi band ho jaaye! Mujhe darr lag raha hai, sir, kahin meri sunwayi na ho. Meri toh poori zindagi kharab ho gayi hai unki wajah se. Please kuch kijiye, sir. Mujhe lagta hai woh log case ko rokne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Aap meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut zyaada dukhi aur pareshan hoon. Meri complaint thi na, woh Crime No. 638/2019 wali, jiska C.C. No. 51315/2021 court mein chal raha hai. Ab kuch log hain, jinko yeh 'petitioners' bol rahe hain, woh mere case ko hi challenge kar rahe hain. Meri sunwai ko rokne ki koshish kar rahe hain, proceedings ko question kar rahe hain. Matlab, itni mushkil se main court tak pahunchi, aur ab yeh log beech mein aa gaye! Mujhe lagta hai yeh sab jaan boojhkar ho raha hai, taaki mujhe insaaf na mile. Mera haal bahut bura hai, sir. Please, aap kuch kariye, yeh log mere case mein interference band karein. Mujhe bas apna nyay chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Madurai court mein ek case tha, C.A.No.9 of 2014, usmein finally ek judgment aaya tha mere haq mein, ya at least humein laga tha ki ab insaaf milega. Lekin sir, woh log, jinke khilaf case chal raha tha, woh dono accused, unhone phir se appeal kar di hai. Matlab, ek ne Crl.RC(MD)No.330 of 2019 file kiya hai aur doosre ne Crl.RC(MD)No.641 of 2019. Kitna pareshan karenge mujhe? Pehle trial court mein saath mein unka case chala tha, aur ab yeh naya natak. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai kya karun. Yeh log kab tak mujhe aise ghoomenge court mein? Meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai inki wajah se. Sir, please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe toh laga tha mera jo case 2014 se Madurai court mein chal raha tha, woh finally khatam ho gaya. Woh jo do accused the, jin par pehle ek saath trial hua tha, unhone abhi phir se appeal kar di hai. Ek ne toh Crl.RC(MD)No.330 of 2019 daal di hai aur dusre ne Crl.RC(MD)No.641 of 2019. Sir, ab yeh kya phir se shuru ho gaya? Itne saal ho gaye, main sochti hoon kab mujhe insaaf milega aur yeh log har baar kuch naya kar dete hain. Meri toh himmat toot rahi hai. Please, sir, aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sahab, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Dekhiye na, Lekhpal Ramsaran ne mere upar FIR karwa di hai. Main toh bas apna chhota sa ghar bana raha tha, woh bhi meri apni zameen pe, Gata No. 260/0013 hect. Pehle se hi main idhar rehta hoon, aur ab yeh Lekhpal sahib bol rahe hain ki maine kuch galat kiya hai. Yeh sab jhooth hai, sahab! Main ek seedha-saadha aadmi hoon. Mere paas koi itne paise nahi hain ki main court-kachheri ke chakkar kaatun. Ab toh yeh prosecution ka case chal raha hai. Meri toh neend ud gayi hai, sahab. Kahan jaaun main? Aap hi bataiye, apna ghar banana kya gunaah hai? Please, meri help kijiye, sahib. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, main aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batane aaya hoon. Meri ek FIR hai, Case Crime No. 0345/2021, jo 10.11.2021 ko register hui thi. Us din jo hamare saath hua, woh main bhool nahi sakta. Poore 12 log the, Sir, जिन्होंने hamari zindagi mushkil kar di thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki unme se kuch log, woh 'applicants' ban kar court mein guss gaye hain. Pata nahi kya chahte hain, shayad yeh log case ko weak karna chahte hain. Sahab, badi mushkil se complaint ki thi. Agar aise hi log case mein interference karenge toh humein insaaf kaise milega? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki mera case bigad jayega. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir. Un logon ko rokna hoga!

Sir ji, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Mera mamla hai meri zameen ka, yeh Gata No. 338, jo Village Galibaha, Pargana-Barausa mein hai. Woh meri purani zameen hai, mere baap-dada ki nishani hai, Sir! Ek aadmi ne us par kabza kar liya hai. Yeh baat 05.11.2014 ki hai, tab se usne meri zameen par apna illegal kabza jama rakha hai. Humne FIR bhi karwayi thi, Case Crime No. 501 of 2014 ke naam se, par ab tak kuch nahi hua. Kitne saal ho gaye, main bas chakkar hi kaat raha hoon. Meri sari mehnat us zameen mein lagi hai. Aap hi kuch kariye, Daroga ji, mujhe meri zameen wapas dilwa dijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... meri zameen ka mamla hai. Woh dekho, Gata No. 463/0.09, us par na, woh log kabza kar rahe hain. 23 February 2021 ki baat hai, us din se hi yeh log meri zameen pe kabza jamana shuru kar diye hain. Humne toh FIR bhi karwai thi, Case Crime No. 0043 of 2021 ke naam se. Kitni baar police station ke chakkar lagaye hain, lekin koi sunwai nahi ho rahi. Meri toh poori zindagi ki kamai hai woh zameen, sir. Aap hi bataiye, main kahan jaun? Woh log bilkul nanga naach kar rahe hain, meri zameen pe building bana rahe hain. Please sir, kuchh kariye, meri madad kijiye. Meri toh neendein udd gayi hain is tension mein. Bahut pareshan hun main.

Sir, main kitni baar aa chuka hoon. Mera zameen ka mamla hai, woh 2014 se chala aa raha hai. Yaad hai aapko, woh FIR jo Case Crime No. 364/2014 mein darj hui thi? Haan, usi ki baat kar raha hoon. 12 April 2014 ko us aadmi ne meri banjar zameen par zabardasti kabza kar liya tha. Maine tab bhi complain ki thi, case bhi bana, prosecution bhi chal raha hai. Par ab woh phir se court mein case ko rokne ki koshish kar raha hai, interference kar raha hai. Yeh kya tareeka hai? Gareeb aadmi ki zameen hai, aur woh uspar kabza karke upar se case bhi nahi chalne de raha. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bas meri zameen wapas dilwa dijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai court mein, Case Crime No.293 of 2017. Yeh 10.11.2017 ki baat hai jab mere saath bahut galat hua tha. Total 14 log the jinhone mujhe tang kiya. Humne FIR karwai thi. Ab unme se ek, jiska naam S hai, woh court mein apni taraf se kuch bol raha hai ki mere case ko disturb kiya jaa raha hai. Sir, hum gareeb log hain, hum bas insaaf chahte hain. Woh chahte hain ki yeh case band ho jaaye ya kamzor pad jaaye. Lekin aisa nahi hona chahiye. Meri sunwai chal rahi hai, mere wakeel bhi hain. Meri bas itni guzarish hai ki unko yeh case kharab karne se rokiye. Mujhe dar lag raha hai ki mujhe insaaf nahi milega. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Ramu Kaka bol raha hoon. Meri suniye, main kitna pareshaan hoon. Yeh jo Case Crime No. 333 of 2016 hai na, meri complaint par hi toh darj hui thi. 4 October 2016 ko maine bataya tha ki us aadmi ne sarkari zameen par kabza kar liya hai, galat tarike se. Woh jahan se humari gali nikalne ki jagah thi, usne wahan encroachment kar diya hai. Itne saal ho gaye, ab tak kuch hua hi nahi hai! Woh toh court mein case ko ghumane ki koshish kar raha hai, aur hum yahan pareshan ho rahe hain. Please, saab, kuch kijiye. Kab tak aise chalega? Hamare liye toh insaaf mil hi nahi raha. Mujhe bas mera hak aur rasta wapas chahiye.

Sahab, main Gonda se aaya hoon, Karnailganj thane ka mamla hai. Meri to life hi kharab ho gayi hai, sir. Mere khilaf ek jhootha case bana diya hai, Case Crime No. 33/2023. Kehte hain maine Section 188 IPC aur sarkari property ko damage kiya hai, Prevention of Damages Act ke under. Maine kuch nahi toda, kuch galat nahi kiya! Mujhse baar-baar court bula rahe hain, summons pe summons aa rahe hain. Ab to charge sheet bhi laga di hai. Main kahan se itna sab handle karu, sir? Ek aam aadmi hoon, din-bhar ki kamai karta hoon, roj-roj court ke chakkar kaise lagaunga? Mujhe fasaya ja raha hai, sahab. Aap hi kuch kariye, meri madad kijiye is jhoothe case se bachne ke liye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Woh Kanpur Dehat wala ghar, Harbans Mohal ka, woh toh mera hai! Meri maa ka ghar tha. Par yeh Smt. Anita Mishra aur unke log na, zabardasti ghus gaye (Section 448 IPC). Sir, inhone toh mera saara bharosa toda hai, meri cheezein hadap li hain (Section 406 IPC). Kitne saal ho gaye, 2003 se mera criminal case chal raha hai inke khilaaf. Aur ab sunne mein aaya hai, yeh log court mein case band karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Woh bolte hain ghar unki maa ka tha, par sach toh yeh hai ki ek toh Sadhu ban gaya aur peeche se inhone meri property pe kabza kar liya. Garib ko insaaf nahi milega kya, Sir? Please, meri madad kijiye, nahi toh yeh log mera case dabwa denge.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh neend udd gayi hai. Mansoor Husain, jisne mere ghar mein ghuskar humari zindagi haram kar di thi, usko neeche wali court ne Section 451 IPC mein saza di thi. Mujhe laga tha chalo ab insaaf mil gaya. Par ab sun raha hoon ki upar wali adalat keh rahi hai ki uski saza galat thi, ki usko galat tareeke se convict kiya gaya hai! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sahab? Mere saamne sab hua tha! Agar woh chhoot gaya toh meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ka kya hoga? Hum toh darr ke mare ji nahi payenge. Please, kuch toh kijiye, Sahab. Hamein bachaiye is insaaf ki ladai mein.

Sir, main ek bahut pareshan aadmi hoon. Woh Sofior Rahman aur Mukaddes Ali, unhone mere ghar mein ghuspaith ki thi! Meri aankhon ke saamne mere ghar mein ghuse the, Section 448 IPC ka seedha mamla tha. Lekin lower court ne unhe baizzat bari kar diya, Sir! Yeh kya insaaf hai? Judge साहब ne mera saboot theek se dekha hi nahi, meri sunwai nahi hui. Mujhe lagta hai court ne galti ki hai, unhone evidence ko sahi perspective mein samjha hi nahi. Ab aap hi batao, main kahan jaaun? Mujhe unko saza dilwani hai. Meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir, please help kijiye!

Sir, meri baat suniye. Bahut pareshaan hoon main. Wo jo aadmi hai na, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, uski chargesheet bhi file ho gayi hai. Ab court mein decide ho raha hai ki us par charges frame honge ya woh discharge ho jaayega. Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Maine itni mushkil se saboot diye hain, police ne bhi investigation ki hai. Ab uske vakeel kanoon ke ulte-seedhe points utha rahe hain, use bachane ke liye. Agar usko aise hi chhod diya toh mujhe justice kaise milega? Jo saboot police ne ikatthe kiye hain, unko dekhiye. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... mera toh jeena haram kar diya hai in logon ne. Yeh jo Pathmera, Sanchore ki Gopal Goverdhan Goushal chalate hain na, inke office bearers, trustees, sab mile hue hain. Sir, 8 January ko raat mein, yeh log mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Mujhe zabardasti band kar diya, aur dhamki di jaan se maarne ki. Mera saara samaan utha ke le gaye, chori kar li sir. Yeh sab ek saazish ke तहत hua hai. Meri suniye Sir, meri madad kijiye. Reodar police station mein maine FIR number 3/2024 file karwai thi, Sirohi district mein. Ab ye log us FIR ko hi khatam karwana chahte hain. Please, mujhe insaaf dilaiye, Sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Yeh bahut saal pehle ki baat hai, kareeb 1878 ke aas-pass. Main Gorakhpur mein ek chhota sa chungi muharrir tha, apni imandari se kaam karta tha. Meri koi galti nahi thi, Sir, phir bhi mujhe bina wajah uthakar havalat mein daal diya gaya. Aur ilzaam kya lagaya? Kehte hain maine ghotala (embezzlement) kiya hai! Sochiye, main gareeb aadmi aur mujhpe itna bada ilzaam! Court ne mujhe do baar toh begunah maan liya, acquit kar diya. Par yeh sarkar hai na, yeh toh phir bhi baar-baar appeal kar rahi hai, mere peeche padi hai. Meri toh zindagi tabah ho gayi hai is sab mein, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, bas.

Sir, main aapke paas yeh batane aayi hoon. Mujhe yaad hai 2015 mein Madurai mein mere saath kya hua tha. Uss gandi aadmi ne mere ghar mein ghuskar (Section 448) meri izzat loot li thi (Section 376). Woh din meri zindagi ka sabse bura din tha. Badi mushkil se, police aur court ki madad se, Special S.C. No.94 of 2015 mein, 2017 mein uss aadmi ko saza mili thi. Mujhe laga tha ab insaaf mil gaya. Lekin Sir, ab pata chala hai ki woh toh uss judgment aur conviction ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai (Crl. A(MD) No.116 of 2017). Kya meri takleef kabhi khatam nahi hogi? Kya usse phir se chhoot mil jaayegi? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye, main bas justice chahti hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Meri jo complaint thi na, C.C.No.1884 of 2022, jo Madurai ke Additional Mahila Court mein chal rahi hai, uske khilaaf ab woh accused log court gaye hain. Woh chahte hain ki yeh saara criminal proceeding hi quash ho jaaye, matlab khatam ho jaaye. Sir, un par jo ilzaam lage hain, woh sab final report mein clearly mention hai. Itni mushkil se toh yeh case shuru hua hai, aur ab woh log chahte hain ki unhe koi saza na mile. Mujhe toh insaaf chahiye, sir. Unhone jo kiya hai, uski saza toh unhe milni chahiye na? Agar yeh case hi band ho gaya toh main kya karunga? Meri sunwai kaun karega? Please, sir, aap kuch kijiye, meri madad kijiye taaki unhe unke kiye ki saza mile aur woh case quash na ho.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon, mera ek case chal raha hai na, woh 2010 ka hai. Un logon ne mere ghar mein ghus ke badtameezi ki thi, gaaliyan di thi aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Tabhi FIR hui thi, sections 448, 504, 506 IPC ke तहत. Ab aap socho, itne saal ho gaye, 2017 mein charge sheet bhi lag gayi thi aur 2019 mein court ne cognizance bhi le liya tha. Aur ab woh saamne wale party wale, jinhone mere saath itna galat kiya, woh court mein application daal rahe hain ki mera poora case hi khatam kar do, quash kar do! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri toh sunwai hi nahi hui abhi tak theek se. Main itni problem mein hoon. Sir, please dekho, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Mera case cancel nahi hona chahiye. Unko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Main kitni pareshan hoon, kya bataun. Maine pichle saal, 2023 mein ek FIR karwai thi, woh 527 number wali. Usi FIR ke baad toh woh court case shuru hua tha, C.C. No.1415, jo Kukatpally ke XII Metropolitan Magistrate ke paas chal raha hai. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log, jinke khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh toh petition daal rahe hain Section 528 BNSS ke under. Woh chahte hain ki yeh saara case hi cancel ho jaaye, quash ho jaaye! Matlab, meri complaint ka kya hoga? Meri itni mehnat, itna dard sab bekar ho jayega? Sir, please, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Agar yeh case hi khatam ho gaya toh mujhe kaise milega nyay?

Sir, main Banchu Lingam hoon. Meri ek badi problem hai. Yeh A1 naam ka aadmi hai na, iske saath mera paison ka bahut puraana dispute chal raha tha. Bade transactions the mere uske saath. 2 November 2014 ko isne promise kiya tha ki mere saare paise lauta dega, jo iske paas the. Par usne kuch nahin kiya! Upar se, usne mere ghar mein ghuskar mujhe bahut pareshan kiya, bina meri permission ke. Mujhe dhamkiyan bhi di, jaan se maarne ki baatein ki. Sir, main bahut darr gaya hoon. Iski harkaton se tang aakar main Magistrate sahab ke paas gaya tha complain karne. Meri complain pe case bhi register hua hai, C.C.No.605 of 2016, Nizamabad court mein. Usne Section 448 aur 506 IPC ke तहत mujhpe zulm kiya hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Aapko pata hai, meri ek case thi High Court mein, woh 2010 ki baat hai, puraani file hai. Police ke khilaaf hi daali thi maine, bahut tang kiya tha unhone mujhe tab. Tab mere haq mein ek order bhi aaya tha, thodi rahat mili thi. Lekin ab mujhe pata chala hai ki usi order ko 'set aside' karne ke liye kisi ne appeal kar di hai. Aur aaj uska faisla aane wala hai, matlab 'judgment' aayega aaj. Sir, mera woh order cancel ho gaya toh meri toh zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Itne saal baad phir se wohi takleef. Kya hoga mera? Aap please kuch kijiye, meri madad kijiye! Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kahan jaun.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri to neend ud gayi hai. Woh Hazi Mukhtar Ahmad, Ghulam Mohiuddin aur Jami Mohiuddin hain na, jinhone mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya, meri zameen par kabza kar liya, woh log ab court mein anticipatory bail maang rahe hain. Socho Sir, Case Crime No. 18 of 2021 mein unpar 420, 447, 448 IPC jaise bade sections lage hain, aur phir bhi woh chahte hain ki unhe jail na jana pade! Ab to sunwai bhi online ho rahi hai COVID ki wajah se, mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya hoga. Dar lag raha hai Sir, agar unhe bail mil gayi toh mera kya hoga? Meri to zindagi barbad ho jayegi. Please, aap kuch kijiye, unhe bail na mile, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Mera case hai na, Crime No. 43 of 2022, woh log ab usko quash karwana chahte hain. Aapko pata hai, 1 February 2020 ko raat 8 baje, woh log jo petitioners 4 se 7 hain, unhone mere ghar ka darwaza tod diya tha. Aur yeh sab petitioners 1 se 3 ke kehne par hua tha. Badi mushkil se toh FIR darj hui thi, sir. Ab woh apni power use karke is case ko band karwana chahte hain. Yeh toh seedha-seedha anyay hai. Meri property mein ghuskar tod-phod ki, aur ab kehte hain ki case hi galat hai? Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mera case band nahi hona chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Mohinder Yadav, Daurala gaon se bol raha hoon. Meri aapse haath jodkar vinti hai, meri madad kijiye. Ye Bajrang aur uska saathi Sarvesh bahut pareshaan kar rahe hain. 19 July 2019 ko subah 8:40 se 9:40 ke beech, inhone mere Khasra number 40 wale plot mein ghuskar saara nuksaan kar diya. Meri zameen ka taala toda, gate bhi ukhad diya aur andar se mere gobar ke kande, lakdi aur jo thoda-bahut building ka saaman pada tha, sab chura kar le gaye. Meri saari mehnat barbaad kar di Sir. Main garib aadmi hoon, please in par sakht action lo.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri suniye, main Akashdeep Malik ki property mein 1997 se reh raha hoon, pura 3 floor ka kirayedar hoon. Itne saalon se kiraya de raha hoon, kabhi koi dikkat nahi hui. Ab suddenly woh mujhe tang kar raha hai. Court mein case bhi chala tha, jahan MM-07 Shahdara wale judge sahab ne hi judgment reserve kiya tha aur phir transfer hone ke baad bhi unhone hi High Court ke order se faisla sunaya. Ab us judgment ke baad Akashdeep Malik mujhe ghar khali karne ko bol raha hai. Sir, meri puri zindagi yahi beeti hai, ye mera ghar hai. Main kahan jaunga, mera parivaar kahan jayega? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Please meri help kijiye.

Sir, main Sunita hoon, Tuglakabad Extension se, RZ 483/13A. Meri baat suniye, main kitni pareshaan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi na, 4 June 1997 ki. Us din aapke Vedvir Singh ji aur Rajvir Singh ji mere ghar aaye the. Agle din, 5 June ko, Vedvir Singh saheb ne meri dobara statement li thi. Maine usmein poori baat batayi thi ki kaise maine 1994 mein ek bana-banaya ghar khareeda tha, ek plot pe. Bahut mushkil se paise jodke liya tha wo ghar. Ab usmein bahut dikkat ho rahi hai, pata nahi kya hoga mera. Meri madad karo Sir, please.

Sahab, main Narender Pratap Gupta hoon, Devi Bhawan Basti se. Meri suno toh sahi, mera ghar barbaad kar diya in logon ne! 10 June 2005 ko aur phir 13 June 2005 ko bhi, mere ghar, House No. 6 mein, Halima, Isha, Parvez, Dilshad, Jamila aur Afra, ye sab milkar zabardasti ghus aaye. Meri bina permission ke (house trespass)! Mera saara ghar ka samaan, jo maine mehnat se banaya tha, sab chura ke le gaye. Aur upar se mujhe itni gandi dhamki de gaye ki meri jaan ko khatra hai. Main bahut darr gaya hoon, sahab. Meri family bhi safe nahi hai. Please un sab ke khilaf action lo aur meri madad karo.

Sir, main Pinki Sharma hoon, Gali Paharwali, Dharampura se. Meri suniye please, bohot pareshaan hoon main. Woh log, pata nahi kaun log the, us din 20 April ko, shaam 5 baje, mere ghar mein zabardasti ghus aaye! Mera ghar number 2252 hai, Gali Paharwali, Dharampura, aur woh seedhe mere doosre floor pe aa gaye. Main akeli thi aur itna darr gayi thi. Unhone mere saath dhakkam-mukki ki, badtameezi ki aur mujhe bohot daraaya. Yeh kya tareeka hai? Koi aise kisi ke ghar mein ghus sakta hai kya? Meri izzat, mera chain sab cheen liya unhone. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, please unke khilaaf sakht action lijiye.

Sir, main Som Prakash Tripathi bol raha hoon. Meri aap se complaint hai Mahesh Goyal ke khilaf. Kya bataun sir, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Baat hai 31 May 2008 ki. Pata nahi kis samay, woh mere ghar mein ghus aaya, jabki uski koi permission nahi thi. Mera ghar hai 5/107, Gajju Katra, Farsh Bazar, Shahdara, Delhi. Yeh meri apni property hai, mera apna ghar hai. Woh zabardasti ghusa andar, bina kisi wajah ke. Hum sab family wale andar the, humein itna darr lag gaya. Aap hi bataiye sir, aise koi kisi ke ghar mein kaise ghus sakta hai? Iske khilaf sakht se sakht action lijiye, sir. Ye Farsh Bazar police station ki jurisdiction ka hi मामला है।

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Rajouri Garden PS mein meri ek FIR hai, 2018 ki, number 235. Sahil Sethi aur uske bande hain na, inhone meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Meri apni property hai, usmein yeh log zabardasti ghus aaye the. Mujhe raaste mein roka, dhamkiyan di, jaan se maarne ki. Meri kitni cheezein tod phod di, pura nuksaan kar diya. IPC ki dharaein 448, 341, 506, 427, 34 lagayi hain inpar. Abhi tak case chal raha hai court mein. Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye, kab tak aise chalega?

Sahab, main Dinesh Gupta. Meri ek chhoti si dukaan hai Friends Colony, Gali No. 8 mein, shop number 431. Hum wahan chai bechte hain. Ye dukaan maine Amit se kiraye par li thi. Parso ki baat hai, 27 June 2011 ko shaam ke kareeb 6:30 baje, mera beta Deepak dukaan par baitha tha. Main usi gali mein apni doosri dukaan par tha. Tabhi woh Amit, jisse maine dukaan rent par li thi, apne teen aur gundo ke saath aa gaya. Usne seedha Deepak se dukaan ki chabi maangi aur bola ki turant dukaan khaali karo. Mere masoom bete ke saath unhone khoob behas ki, jhagda kiya. Sahab, yeh toh bilkul zabardasti hai! Aise kaise koi meri dukaan chheen sakta hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab!

Sir, main aapke paas badi mushkil se aaya hoon. Mujh gareeb ko yeh log bahut tang kar rahe hain. Court mein bhi mujhe phansa rahe hain. Woh log kuch papers dikha rahe hain — ek GPA, ek possession letter, aur ek akhbar ka notice. Bol rahe hain maine cross-examination mein maana hai yeh sab. Par Sir, sach bata raha hoon, unhone mujhe ghumake-phirake jawab dilwaye honge. Sabse badi baat toh yeh hai ki, Sir, woh jo akhbar (Veer Arjun) mein notice hai na B.N. Sarkar ka, uski date dekho – 30 February 1995! Sir, February mein kabhi 30 din hote hain kya? Yeh saaf-saaf jhooth hai, farzi document hai! Meri suniye Sir, yeh log meri property par galat tareeke se kabza karna chahte hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, bahut pareshan hoon main.

Sir, main yahan aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Meri suno sir, woh Shanti, Yad Ram ki biwi, usne meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Pehle toh uska pati Yad Ram bhi bohot tang karta tha, ab woh toh guzar gaya hai bechara. Par yeh Shanti, isne toh hadd hi kar di hai! Jhuggi number 2017, Shastri Mohalla Patparganj, Delhi mein rehti hai woh. Sir, usne mere saath bohot galat kiya hai, mujhe bahut pareshaan kar rahi hai. Meri jagah par kabza kar liya hai. Main usse bohot tang aa gaya hoon. Aap please meri madad karo, mujhe insaaf dilwao. Bohot preshan hu mai usse.

Sahab, main kya bataun, woh din jab Nasim Bano aur Harbir Singh ne meri zindagi kharab kar di thi. Mere ghar mein illegally ghus gaye the, zabardasti, bilkul meri marzi ke khilaaf. Section 448 aur 34 IPC ka mamla hai, Sir. Mujhe yaad hai woh tareekh, 10 April 2002 ko Krishna Nagar police station mein maine complaint di thi, DD No. 26A. Kitni pareshani hui thi mujhe uss samay! Darr lagta tha. In logon ne mujhe bahut tang kiya hai. Ab jaake kahin is case ka faisla ho raha hai. Maine toh bas insaaf chaaha tha, Sir. Meri toh koi galti nahi thi. Aap dekho na, aise kaise koi kisi ke ghar mein ghus sakta hai?

Sir, main Ramnath Singh, ek 70 saal ka buzurg aadmi hoon. Main ek retired sarkari mulazim hoon, poori zindagi imandari se kaam kiya hai. Ab is umar mein, meri apni biwi, betiyan aur damaad ne mera jeena mushkil kar diya hai. Meri biwi, aur meri do betiyan, aur unka pati (damaad), ye sab milkar mujhe bahut harass kar rahe hain. Sir, ye log mera naam badnaam kar rahe hain, society mein meri reputation kharab kar di hai. Log tarah-tarah ki baatein karte hain. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki mera apna parivaar mere saath aisa kyon kar raha hai. Maine kya bigada hai inka? Meri izzat mitti mein mila di hai inhone. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mujhe insaaf nahi mil raha hai. Maine yeh appeal file ki thi, pata hai na? Woh jo 1st February, 2007 ko Andhra Pradesh High Court ke Single Judge ne judgment diya tha, uske khilaaf. Meri appeal to High Court ne suni, thodi bohot maani bhi, lekin sir, asal baat to ye hai ki woh jo Section 452 aur Section 34 IPC ke tahat case tha, usmein accused ko bari kar diya hai. Matlab, woh log mere ghar mein zabardasti ghuse the, aur ab aise hi chhoot gaye? Yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha hai. Meri to poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, aur woh sab aise hi ghoom rahe hain. Kuch to karo sir, please.

Sir, main Kamla Sen Gupta hoon. Meri ek property hai, A-5, Chitranjan Park, New Delhi mein. Sir, Dr. Ved Vrat ne na, meri us property pe galat tareeke se kabza karne ki koshish ki thi, jhoote kagaz bhi banaye the usne. Police ne tabhi uske khilaaf case darj kiya tha, ghar mein ghusne (448) aur jaali documents banane ke mamle mein. Humne socha tha ki insaaf milega. Lekin sir, us waqt, 2 February 1983 ko, Additional Sessions Judge saab ne Dr. Ved Vrat ko discharge kar diya, chhod diya! Mera toh dil toot gaya tha. Woh aaj bhi khule ghoom raha hai aur meri property ka masla abhi tak suljha nahi hai. Sir, main bas insaaf chahti hoon, please meri madad kijiye, yeh bohot badi be-insaafi hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun? Meri suno na! Woh Mansur Husain, jisne mere ghar mein ghuspet ki thi, illegally enter kiya tha. Uske khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, case bhi chala tha. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki court mein koi baat chal rahi hai, ki usko galat tareeke se convict kar diya hai ya usne actually koi offence kiya hi nahi hai Section 451 ke under. Yeh kya baat hui sir? Mera ghar, meri privacy, sab toh usne kharab kar diya tha! Usne trespass kiya tha mere ghar mein, seedha-seedha. Section 448 ya 451 jo bhi ho, woh toh mere ghar mein ghusa tha na? Ab agar usko chhod denge toh hum jaise logon ka kya hoga? Please sir, aap kuch karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh galat tha aur usko saza milni chahiye. Meri family darr gayi thi us din.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere upar ek galat criminal case chal raha hai, aur main chahta hoon ki use rok diya jaaye. Sach mein, yeh sab badle ki bhavna se kiya gaya hai, sir. Kisi ne apni personal dushmani nikalne ke liye mujhe fasaya hai, uska maksad sirf mujhe pareshan karna hai. Yeh poori tarah se galat aur illegal hai, kanoon ke khilaaf hai. Meri to bas itni request hai ki yeh jo proceedings mere against chal rahi hain, inhein khatam kar diya jaaye. Yeh case Netaji Nagar Police Station se juda hua hai. Please meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, suniye na meri baat, main bahut pareshan hoon! Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Kuch logon ne mere ghar mein ghus kar tod-phod ki thi aur mera saaman chura liya tha. Maine 9 May 2015 ko complaint file ki thi aur tab se Nampally court mein unke khilaf case (C.C.No.1223 of 2016) chal raha hai. Ab woh log, Cr.P.C. ke Section 482 ka use karke, yeh pura case hi band karwana chahte hain! Yeh kaise ho sakta hai, Sir? Meri cheezein churai hain, ghar mein ghuse hain, nuksaan kiya hai, aur ab woh bachna chahte hain? Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri ek bahut badi mushkil hai. Karkardooma Court mein kuchh logon ne mere khilaaf ek jhoothi complaint kar rakhi hai, uska number hai 741/2011. Unhone mujh par Dhokhadhadi (IPC 420), jaali kagaz banana (468, 471), mera paisa hadapna (406), mujhe galat tareeke se rokna (341), mere ghar mein ghusna (448), aur toh aur chori (379) jaise bade-bade ilzaam lagaye hain. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is jhoothe case ki wajah se. Din-raat tension mein rehta hoon. Main bas yahi chahta hoon ki yeh jo jhootha case mere upar kiya gaya hai, isko band kiya jaaye. Meri madad kijiye Sir, main bilkul be-kasoor hoon. Kaise chalega mera ghar-baar is tareh ke ilzaam lagne par? Please, meri suniye aur meri complaint ko khatam karwaiye.

Sir, main aapko apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Kitni mushkil se maine woh din dekha jab mujrim ko saza mili thi! Mera Sessions Case No. 159 of 2015 Bajali, Pathsala ke Special Judge court mein chal raha tha. Woh 7 January 2016 ka din tha jab usne conviction sunaya. Mere wakeel Mr. Ujjwal Kumar Das ne bahut fight kiya, aur samne Mr. Bahadur Ramchiary the accused ke counsel. Sarkar ki taraf se Ms. Shamima Jahan thi. Sir, saalon lage mujhe ye insaaf paane mein, har date par jaana, apni takleef phir se sunana... Us mujrim ko toh saza mil gayi, par mere zakhm abhi bhi taaze hain. Pata nahi kab tak ye dar bana rahega. Bas yahi batana tha ki kya kya jhela hai maine.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Netaji Nagar Police station mein jo mere upar criminal case chal raha hai, woh bilkul galat hai. Yeh log mujhse personal dushmani nikal rahe hain, Sir, sirf badla lene ke liye. Unhone jaan boojh kar, galat iraade se mujhe is case mein ghasit liya hai. Meri koi galti nahi hai, yeh sab ek saazish hai meri izzat kharab karne ki. Yeh proceedings, jo abhi chal rahi hain, inko turant rokna chahiye. Meri aap se hath jod kar request hai ki please is galat case ko khatam karwa dijiye. Main sachcha hoon aur mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Banjara Hills ka resident hoon. Kal raat ki baat hai, Prasad Veera Potluri aur uske saath kuch aur log zabardasti mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Unhone poore ghar mein tod-phod macha di, mera bahut nuksaan hua hai. Meri family aur mujhe gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, beizzati ki aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Hum sab bahut darr gaye hain, sir. Lag raha tha jaise pura mohalla hi unhone sar pe utha liya ho. Meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ko khatra hai. Please unke khilaf strict action lijiye, sir. Hum gareeb log hain, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Banjara Hills area se hoon. Pichle kuch din pehle, Mr. Prasad Veera Potluri, jo Accused No.1 hai, apne kuch logon ke saath mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Zabardasti darwaza tod ke andar aaye, Sir. Mera poora ghar ka samaan tod phod diya, itna nuksaan kiya hai ki kya bataun! Aur Sir, mujhe aur mere parivaar ko itni gandi gaaliyan di, behad insult kiya. Upar se jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di. Bohot darr gaya hoon main, Sir. Aap please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye unse. Unhone meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hu. Yeh Prasad Veera Potluri, jiske khilaaf Banjara Hills PS mein Crime No. 391/2020 file hua tha, usne aur uske logon ne mere ghar mein ghus kar poori tod-fod ki thi. Mujhe kitni gaaliyan di, kitna insult kiya, aur jaan se maarne tak ki dhamki di thi, Sir! Mera toh poora parivaar darr gaya tha us din. Aur ab sunne mein aa raha hai ki woh apni Criminal Petition No. 2745/2020 daal kar apna case hi hatwana chahta hai? Matlab, usne jo itna sab kiya, uski koi saza nahi hogi? Yeh toh sarasar nainsafi hai! Humare saath aisa nahi hona chahiye. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Mujhe aur mere parivaar ko usse khatra hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Meri ek complaint thi, C.C No.1/2020 number ki, usme jo accused tha na, usko toh Magistrate sahab ne bina sune hi reha kar diya, Section 245(1) Cr.P.C bolke. Meri toh kuch suni hi nahi gayi. Jab maine iske khilaaf Sessions Court mein appeal ki, toh wahan se bhi wohi order aa gaya, ki sahi hai unka decision. Socho, Saheb, kitna bada dhokha hai mere saath! Pehle toh mujhe seedha court mein hi jaana pada tha complaint karne ke liye, police station se madad nahi mili thi. Ab jab court se bhi insaaf nahi mila, toh main ab High Court gaya hoon, Article 227 ke under. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, Sir. Mera kya hoga?

Sahab, main bas yahi kehne aayi hoon... meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi jab us gande aadmi ne mere saath woh sab kiya tha. Badi mushkil se court ne usko saza dilwai thi. Yaad hai na, 2016 mein, Berhampore ke Fast Track Court mein? Judge sahab ne usko Section 354 IPC ke under convict kiya tha. Do saal ki kathor kaid aur jurmana bhi lagaya tha. Meri case Sessions Serial No. 95 of 2009 thi. Us time laga tha ki chalo, insaaf mila. Ab suna hai ki usne phir se appeal kar di hai. Sahab, please dekhiye, usko uski saza milni hi chahiye. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai ki kahin woh bach na jaaye.

Sir, main Santa Bahadur Sarki ke khilaaf complaint darj karwane aaya hoon. Usne meri do masoom bachiyon ki zindagi barbaad kar di hai! Woh Santa, hamaare ghar mein zabardasti ghus aaya tha, sir. Raat ke waali, jab sab so rahe the, usne meri chhoti bachiyon ke saath bahut gandi aur daravni harkat ki. Meri betiyaan, woh abhi bhi us din ko bhool nahi paati, darr ke maare kaanpti rehti hain. Unka future toh andhere mein chala gaya hai, sir. Mujhe bas apni bachiyon ke liye insaaf chahiye. Usko is ghinone jurm ki sakht se sakht saza milni chahiye, sir. Please, jaldi se action lijiye.

Sir, main bas aapko batane aayi hoon... finally, woh Nazmul Islam aur Rahul Amin, un dono ko saza mil gayi hai! Jo mere saath hua tha, woh raat jab woh mere ghar mein zabardasti ghuse (Section 457) aur mujhe uthane ki koshish ki thi shaadi ke liye (Section 366, 511 attempt)... main aaj bhi kaanp jaati hoon. Unhone poora plan banake kiya tha yeh sab (Section 34). Meri police complaint, aap logon ki mehnat, aur court ne sab dekha. Aaj judgment aaya hai, Sir! Un dono ko guilty maana gaya hai. Court ne unko Section 457, 366, 511, 34 IPC ke under convict kar diya hai. Mujhe relief mila hai, Sir! Meri sunwai hui, mujhe justice mila. Thank you so much!

Sir, main aapko ek bahut serious baat batane aayi hoon. Yaad hai woh case, jab uss badmash ne mere ghar mein ghuske mujhe maara tha? (IPC 448 aur 323 ka case tha.) Usmein toh 2011 mein court ne usko saza di thi, S.C.No.237/2010 mein. Mujhe laga tha chalo ab jaake thoda sukoon mila hai, insaaf mila hai. Par Sir, ab woh appeal kar raha hai! Sunne mein aaya hai ki woh apni saza khatam karwana chahta hai, chahta hai ki uski conviction aur sentence cancel ho jaaye. Matlab, itni mushkil se toh mujhe justice mila tha, aur ab woh fir se azaad ghoomna chahta hai? Meri toh jaan hi nikal jaati hai yeh soch kar. Main darr rahi hoon Sir, agar woh chhoot gaya toh? Please Sir, kuch kariye. Aise kaise koi itna sab hone ke baad bhi bach sakta hai?

Sir, main kya bataun? Woh aadmi mere ghar mein ghusa tha, mujhe pura yakeen hai. Ab unka advocate keh raha hai ki usne koi 'offence' karne ke liye trespass nahi kiya. Matlab, woh aise hi ghus gaya tha kya mere ghar mein? Meri family ko darr lag gaya tha, sir! Jab woh bina permission mere ghar mein aaya, toh ye trespass nahi toh aur kya hai? Ab bol rahe hain ki Section 448 IPC uspar lag hi nahi sakta kyunki uske paas koi 'bad intention' ka proof nahi hai. Kya matlab hai iska? Koi mere ghar mein ghuse aur main chup rahoon? Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir, mere ghar ki security ka sawaal hai yeh.

Sir, main apni problem lekar aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh log meri sari zameen hadap gaye, documents fake banakar. Main kab se court ke chakkar laga raha hoon, mere advocate Rajesh Kumar Singh ji bhi koshish kar rahe hain, par kuch ho hi nahi raha. Pata nahi kya chal raha hai, har tareekh pe bas nayi tareekh mil jaati hai. Pichle mahine 20.09.2021 ko bhi hearing thi, hum toh ummeed lagaye baithe the, par phir se kuch nahi hua. Meri toh sari saving chali gayi, ab ghar kaise chalega? Un logon ne toh meri family ko bhi dhamkaya hai. Mujhe dar lagta hai sir. Police ke paas aaya hoon, ab aap hi meri akhri ummeed ho. Please kuch action lo, warna main toh mar jaunga is tension mein.

Sir, suniye meri baat! Mera toh ghar barbaad ho gaya hai. Wo Ramlal (accused) jabardasti mere ghar mein ghusa tha, Section 448 IPC ke tehat usne trespass kiya. Usne mere bhai ko itni buri tarah mara ki wo hospital mein tha, aur phir uski jaan hi le li, Sir! Section 302 IPC aur 326 IPC lagne ke baad bhi, yeh kya insaaf hai? Mujhe sunne mein aaya hai ki usko sirf 6 mahine ki saza mili hai, woh bhi sirf ghar mein ghusne ke liye! Mere bhai ka khoon hua hai, Sir! Murder kiya hai usne! Aise kaise ho sakta hai? Mujhe meri family ke liye justice chahiye. Meri baat suniye, mujhe nyay chahiye!

Sir, main bas itna kehna chahti hoon ki meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Jis aadmi ne mere ghar mein ghuskar (Section 448 IPC) meri izzat loot li thi (Section 376 IPC) aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di thi (Section 506 IPC)... uska case chal raha hai. Morigaon ke Sessions Court ne usko 2005 mein hi दोषी mana tha, usko saza bhi mili thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh upar appeal kar raha hai. Main bahut darr gayi hoon, sir. Itni mushkil se maine woh sab saha hai, courts ke chakkar kaate hain. Mujhe lagta hai ki kya ab phir se mujhe woh sab dohraana padega? Mujhe darr lagta hai ki kahin woh aadmi chhoot na jaaye aur phir se meri zindagi mein aa jaaye. Sir, please, mujhe insaaf chahiye, woh apni saza se bachna nahi chahiye. Meri suno, sir.

Sir, please meri complaint likho. Main aur meri saas (Annamma) ne un logon se kitni minnatein ki, haath jode the ki mere pati ko mat maaro. Woh pehle se hi beemar the, heart patient the, humein pata tha ki chot lagegi toh woh seh nahi payenge. Par un zalimon ne hamari ek na suni, bilkul dhyaan nahi diya. Unhone mere pati ko itna maara ki woh wahin zameen par gir gaye. Hum unhe jaldi se hospital le gaye, par woh bach nahi paaye, shock aur injuries ki wajah se 12 August 2001 ko subah 9 baje unhone dum tod diya. Sir, un logon ne mere pati ko maara hai, unhe saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main bahut takleef mein hoon. Meri case court mein sunwai ke liye aayi, par pata chala ki mere wakeelon ne, jin teen ke naam diye the, unhone vakalatnama file hi nahi kiya. Mera case aise hi latka hua hai. Aur to aur, ek wakiil, Mr. Tamilvanan, toh yeh tak keh rahe hain ki unhe koi instructions nahi mile aur sabse hairani ki baat, woh toh mujhe (revision petitioner) mara hua samajh rahe hain! Main zinda hoon, aapke saamne khada hoon, aur mere apne wakiil mujhe mara hua bata rahe hain kagazon mein. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai? Meri madad karo, sir. Mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai.

Sir, main aapko batane aaya hoon ki mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Pura 30 October 2020 ki raat ko, kareeb 8:26 baje, woh log... haan, woh D. Manivannan aur uske saath do-teen aur anjaan log, seedhe mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Ghar mein meri family thi, bachche the. Unhone itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, sir, ki main aapko bata bhi nahi sakta. Poora mahalla sun raha tha. Meri izzat ka sawaal hai, sir. Humare ghar ki shanti bhang kar di. Mujhe itna darr lag raha hai abhi bhi. Unhone jaan boojh kar meri bezzati ki hai. Sir, please meri suniye aur unke khilaaf strict action lijiye. Aise logon ko chhodna nahi chahiye. Meri madad kijiye, sir!

Sir, main Rajesh Kumar hoon. Meri baat suniye, sir! Pata hai kya hua? 30 October 2020 ki raat, kareeb 8:26 baje, mere ghar pe kuch log aa gaye, sir. Ek toh woh Sharma ji ka beta Ramesh tha, aur ek D. Manivannan, aur do-teen aur the, jinhe main theek se pehchaan bhi nahi paaya. Sir, unhone mere ghar mein ghuske itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, itna bura bhala kaha ki main aapko bata nahi sakta! Mere ghar mein biwi-bacche the, sab dar gaye. Meri izzat ka sawaal hai, sir. Aise kaise koi mere ghar mein aake badtameezi kar sakta hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap please in logon pe sakht action lo, meri madad karo!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. 30 October 2020 ki shaam thi, kareeb 8:26 baje honge. Woh Manivannan aur uske saath do-teen aur log, un sab mein se woh jo main aadmi tha, woh seedha mere ghar ke saamne aa gaye. Pura mohalla sun raha tha, Sir, itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di hain unhone. Meri beizzati ki, family ko bhi dhamkaya. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai Sir, ki ye log phir se kuch na kar dein. Meri izzat ka sawaal hai. Please, un sab pe karwai karo, Sir. Ye log aise gunda-gardee nahi kar sakte.

Sir, meri baat suno na, bahut pareshan hoon main. Yeh kya chal raha hai? Mera woh purana mamla, jiske liye Hari Nagar Police Station mein maine 27 January 2010 ko FIR No. 21/2010 darj karwai thi. Woh log jo mere ghar mein ghuskar (Section 448) mujhe dhamki de rahe the (Section 506), sab milkar kiya tha unhone (Section 34). Police ne toh tabhi investigation complete karke report bhi submit kar di thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki September 2016 mein kisi ne court mein appeal ki hai ki yeh poora case hi band karwa diya jaaye. Sir, itne saalon se main insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, aur ab woh log chahte hain ki yeh case hi khatam ho jaaye? Aisa kaise chalega? Meri madad karo, sir!

Sir, dekhiye na, aaj subah Manathavady ke Taluk Supply Office mein kya ho gaya mere saath. Main apni duty kar raha tha, kareeb 11 baje, 27 August 2002 ko. Kuch log aaye, protest karne ke naam par. Unhone Assistant Supply Officer ko, aur hum sab staff ko, kaam hi nahi karne diya. Pura obstruction create kar diya. Jab hum log thoda bahar nikle, toh un logon ne office ko bahar se lock kar diya, Sir! Sochiye, hum andar phanse hue the! Bahut darr lag raha tha. Aadhe ghante tak slogans lagate rahe aur hum kuch kar bhi nahi paaye. Phir woh chale gaye. Mera pura din ka kaam ruk gaya. Yeh toh public property ko band karna hua na, Sir? Humari safety ka bhi sawal hai. Kaisa protest hai yeh?

Daroga Ji, main bahut pareshan hoon. Kitne saal ho gaye hain iss baat ko, 2007 February ka mamla hai. Maine toh socha tha mujhe finally insaaf milega. Maine khud High Court mein appeal ki thi, uss faisle ke khilaaf jo pehle ek Judge ne sunaya tha. Woh log mere ghar mein ghus gaye the, Section 452 aur 34 IPC ke तहत unhone mere saath galat kiya tha. High Court ne meri appeal thodi bahut toh maani, par end mein un sabhi accused ko bari kar diya! Yaani, unhone itna bada jurm kiya aur unko aise hi chhod diya gaya? Mera toh dil toot gaya hai, Daroga Ji. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai mere liye?

Sir, main complain karne aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hai, 30 October 2020 ko raat 8:26 baje, ek aadmi, uska naam D. Manivannan aur kuch unknown log mere ghar par aaye the? Unhone mere saamne aur mere gharwalo ke saamne itni gandi gaaliyan di thi, ki main kya bataun. Meri poori izzat mitti mein mila di thi. Humne tabhi report karwai thi, wohi Crime No. 1163 of 2020. Aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log is case ko 'illegal' bolkar khatam karwana chahte hain? Sir, yeh toh galat hai na! Maine gaali sun kar complaint ki hai. Aise kaise woh log bach jayenge? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki mere saath kal raat, matlab 30 October 2020 ko, bohot galat hua hai. Raat ke kareeb 8:26 baje honge, jab main apne ghar pe tha, tab ek aadmi, jiska naam D. Manivannan hai, aur uske saath do-teen aur anjaan log mere ghar ke andar ghus aaye. Sir, unhone mujhe itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, main sun bhi nahi sakta tha. Meri poori family darr gayi hai. Aise kaise koi mere ghar mein aake badtameezi kar sakta hai? Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Un logon par action hona chahiye.

Sir, main Biren Handique. Meri ek complaint hai. Mera ek puraana case tha, 2008 ka, GR Case No. 665/2008. Us time pe mere ghar mein ghuskar logon ne meri bahut beizzati ki thi. Sir, Sections 448 aur 497 IPC ke under case bana tha. Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate, Dhemaji ne 04.12.2008 ko judgment bhi diya tha. Ab pata nahi kyun, woh judgment phir se challenge ho raha hai. Kya matlab hai iska? Main itne saalon se court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon. Ek baar decision ho gaya toh ho gaya na! Ab yeh Criminal Revision Petition kya hai? Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye. Woh log phir se sab ulta-pulta kar rahe hain. Meri aur mere parivaar ki shaanti khatam ho gayi hai, Sir.

Sir, main Manjunath hoon, Sumangali Sevashrama Road se aaya hoon. Meri complaint hai, sir. Mera plot number 13 aur 14 hai, ussi ko lekar hamara dispute chal raha hai. Kal shaam ko woh dono log, jinke saath mera jhagda hai, directly mere ghar mein ghus aaye. Main akela tha, Sir. Unhone mujhe bina wajah bahut buri tarah se maara-peeta. Ek ne toh hathiyar se bhi attack kiya, jis se mujhe chot lagi hai. Upar se, unhone mujhe gandi-gandi gaaliyan bhi di aur jaan se maarne ki khuli dhamki dekar gaye hain. Main bahut dar gaya hoon, Sir, meri life ko danger hai. Unhone trespass kiya, maara-peeta, insult kiya aur dhamkaya. Meri help kijiye, Sir, please unke khilaaf sakht action lo.

Sir, main Janakamma, Yellamma Mandir ke paas, Kuvempunagara mein rehti hoon. Meri suniye na, mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Pichle saal, 12 March 2020 ko, raat ke kareeb 10 baje, woh shaitan mere ghar mein ghus aaya. Bina permission ke! Mere ghar mein! Usne mujhe itni gandi-gandi gaaliyan di, sir, main bata bhi nahi sakti. Aur phir usne mujhe haathon se maara bhi. Mujhe bahut dard hua. Main bahut darr gayi thi. Meri izzat par hamla kiya hai usne. Woh mujhe dhamki bhi de raha tha, sir. Mujhe usse bahut khatra hai. Please, usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, Daroga ji, main kitna pareshan hoon, meri suno na. Woh jo aadmi tha, jisne mere ghar mein zabardasti ghusa tha (wohi, jispe maine 448 IPC mein case kiya tha), aaj pata chala court ne usko baari kar diya! Bol rahe hain 'acquitted' ho gaya. Matlab usko chhod diya gaya Cr.P.C. Section 255(1) ke तहत. Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri aankhon ke saamne usne mere ghar ki beizzati ki thi, aur ab woh aise hi chhoot gaya? Uski jo bail bond thi, woh bhi cancel ho gayi hai, matlab ab woh aazad ghoom raha hai. Mera kya hoga? Mujhe toh insaaf mila hi nahi. Woh phir se takleef dega mujhe. Sir, please, kuch toh kijiye, main bahut darr gaya hoon.

Sir, main aaj aapke paas apni fariyaad leke aayi hoon. Meri zindagi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Woh Rohit Diesh, jo pehle mere ghar Padmini-Enclave mein mujhe computer sikhata tha 2002-2003 mein, usne mujhe jhoot bolke bulaya. Usne kaha 7 August 2003 ko, dopahar ke 3 baje, ek zaroori kaam hai, isliye mujhe Pine Drive Farm House chalna padega. Maine uspar bharosa kiya. Jab hum wahan pahunche, toh wahan pehle se ek guard aur woh Devender maujood the. Sir, wahan mere saath jo hua, main bata nahi sakti. Un sabne milke mere saath bahut bura kiya. Mujhe phasaya gaya hai, sir. Meri izzat ka sawal hai. Police hi ab meri aakhri umeed hai. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main na, woh CC No. 1577/2021 wali complaint ka original complainant hoon. Riyasat Ali ne na, mere ghar mein ghuskar zabardasti ki thi, mujhe dhamkiyan di thi. IPC 447, 448, 454, 506 ke तहत usne galti ki thi. Maine jab complaint ki, toh court ne usko trial ke liye bulaya tha, 27.10.2023 ko order bhi ho gaya tha. Mujhe laga ab insaaf milega, woh trial face karega. Par ab sunne mein aaya hai ki Riyasat Ali ne phir se ek 'Criminal Revision Petition' daali hai, woh us order ko palatwana chahta hai! Matlab, woh trial face hi nahi karna chahta. Meri poori mehnat waste ho jaayegi kya? Sir, please dekhiye na, woh banda phir se bachne ki koshish kar raha hai. Main bohot pareshan hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main Manoj hoon. Meri baat suniye, mujhe us raat ka din aur time aaj bhi yaad hai, 23 November 2012, raat ke kareeb 10:30 baje the. Wo Mahavir Singh, Tejram aur unke saath ek chhota ladka, sab milkar, pura plan banakar mere ghar mein ghus aaye the. Unhone pehle se hi chot pahunchane ki taiyaari kar rakhi thi. Unhone mujhe aur meri patni ko zabardasti roke rakha, hilne tak nahi de rahe the. Aur phir humein buri tarah maara, sir! Hamein simple chotein aayi hain. Yeh log bahut gunde hain, inko saza milni chahiye. Police ne bhi investigation ke baad inke khilaaf case file kiya hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna galat hua hai. Ye 2004 ki baat hai, New Ashok Nagar PS mein meri FIR bhi darj hai, number 26/2004. Woh Ramesh Chand aur Satish Kumar, un logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi! Mere ghar mein ghus aaye zabardasti, bina pooche. Mujhe itna maara, itni chot pahunchai, aap soch bhi nahi sakte. Upar se jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di, mera saara samaan bhi chura ke le gaye. Sir, mujhe abhi tak insaaf nahi mila hai. Main tab se pareshaan hoon. Please, meri suno aur mujhe nyay dilao.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut dukhi hokar aaya hoon. Meri ek zameen thi, plot number H-37, Ratia Marg, Gali no. 17, Sangam Vihar mein. Khasra no. 1487 mein thi woh. Maine bade mehnat se woh plot February 1994 mein Narender Kumar ji se khareeda tha. Meri poori zindagi ki jama-punji thi woh, sir. Par in logon ne, kuch badmaashon ne milkar, mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Inhone jaali kaagaz banaye hain, meri zameen hadap li hai aur us par kabza kar liya hai. Yeh sab saazish karke kiya gaya hai. Mujhse meri zameen cheen li hai, sir. Meri aapse haath jodkar vinti hai ki mujhe insaaf dilaiye. In logon par sakht se sakht kaarwai honi chahiye, sir, in dhokhebaazon par!

Sir, main Rajesh Jain hoon, Wazirpur se. Meri Bittoo wali shop hai na, B-68/4? Usse Saraswati Vihar ke SDM sahab ne seal karwa diya hai! Bina wajah, bina poori jaanch ke, mera business band karwa diya. Ab toh suna hai mere khilaaf PS Ashok Vihar se charge-sheet bhi forward ho gayi hai, woh bhi Section 188, 448 IPC, aur pata nahi kya-kya Water Act, Environment Act laga diye hain. Sahab, yeh toh seedhi-seedhi zyadati hai. Main koi criminal thodi hoon jo itne bade-bade sections lagayenge? Meri rozi-roti ka sawal hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sahab, main aapko ek complain karne aaya hoon. Kal raat, 16.08.2006 ko, kareeb 12:45 baje, mere H. No. waale ghar mein chori ho gayi. Koi anjaan log ghar mein ghus aaye jab hum sab so rahe the. Meri wife ke sab gehne aur jo thode paise jama kiye the, sab le gaye. Hamare ghar mein sab upar-neeche kar diya. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, aur ab toh ghar mein rehne se bhi ghabrahat ho rahi hai. Meri saari life ki savings thi woh. Please Sahab, meri madad kijiye, un choron ko pakdiye aur mera samaan wapas dilwaiye. Bahut mushkil se kamaaya tha maine. Aap action nahi lenge toh hum jaise garib log kahaan jayenge?

Sir, main Rajesh/Ranjana (कोई भी नाम ले लो) hoon. Woh jo Gulfam, Firoz Khan, Mohsin Khan aur Mohd. Jamshed hain na, in logon ne meri zindagi barbaad kar di thi. Pata hai na aapko? Kitni mushkil se toh insaaf mila tha! Court ne unko galat thehraya tha, saza sunai thi. Judge Anjani Maha ji ne 28 November 2016 ko judgment diya tha aur 19 December 2016 ko unki saza tay hui thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki yeh log appeal kar rahe hain, sir! MATLAB, yeh log chahte hain ki inko koi saza na mile? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai yeh sunke. Itni mushkil se mili insaaf ab phir se khatre mein hai. Inko chhodna mat, sir! Meri madad karo, please.

Daroga ji, main Ramphal. Main UP ka rehne wala hoon, aur Lal Bagh, Azadpur mein tailor ka kaam karta hoon. Sir, main yahan apne pitaji ke saath, ek chote se kamre mein kiraye par rehta hoon, H No. 472-F, Gali Kum... Meri suno ji, mujhe bahut pareshan kiya ja raha hai. Aaj 6.8.1993 hai, aur maine socha aaj hi aa kar aapko sab bata doon. Bahut mushkil mein hoon, main ek gareeb aadmi hoon. Meri baat sun lo, aur meri madad karo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Kahan jaaun main, aap hi batao?

Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon. Meri dukan ke taale tode gaye the. In logon ne meri saari mehnat ki kamai lootne ki koshish ki. Maine aur mere kuch saathiyon ne himmat karke in choron ko, jo taale tod rahe the, range haathon pakda tha. Fir humne hi police ko bula kar in sabko aapke hawale kiya tha. Jab pehchan ki baat aayi, toh maine Dinesh Kumar ko bilkul sahi pehchana hai. Wahi tha, main usko kabhi nahi bhool sakta! Ab yeh log mujhe dara-dhamka rahe hain, kehte hain compromise kar lo. Par main kabhi inki baaton mein nahi aaya. Maine kisi se koi deal nahi ki hai. Aap hi bataiye Sir, meri chori hui hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Kripya kar ke action lijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Aaj main apne office gaya tha, toh wahan Ravinder Pal @ Bittoo aur unki biwi Harmeet Kaur aa gaye. Unhone seedha bola, "phir aa gaye tum don, jaan pyari nahi hai tume". Jab maine unke is badtameezi pe object kiya, toh Harmeet Kaur ne bina soche samjhe mujhe ek thappad maar diya mere chehre pe! Mujhe bahut dard hua, Sir. Aur upar se bolti hai ki yeh property, jahan mera office hai, ab uske naam ho gayi hai. Aur dhamki di ki agar dobara yahan aaye toh achha nahi hoga. Sir, mujhe unse apni jaan ka khatra lag raha hai. Kripya meri madad kijiye, main kya karoon? Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, isliye yahan aaya hoon. Mujhe Gurcharan Singh aur Khushvinder Singh ke khilaaf report likhwani hai. Yeh dono Surinder Singh ke bete hain aur 15, Jangpura Road, Bhogal, New Delhi mein rehte hain. Pichle kuch dino se inhone meri naak mein dum kar rakha hai. Meri zameen par galat tareeke se kabza karne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Jab main inko rokta hoon toh gaali galoch karte hain aur jaan se maarne ki dhamkiyan dete hain. Mere parivar ko bhi darate hain. Sir, main ek aam aadmi hoon, inki gunda-gardi se bahut darr gaya hoon. Meri koi sun nahi raha. Aap hi hain jo meri madad kar sakte hain. Please inke khilaaf sakht action lijiye.

Sir, main kitni himmat karke yahan tak aayi hoon. Mere saath jo hua, wo main kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, Sir. Aur ab court keh rahi hai ki Section 376 ke तहत koi 'prima facie case' banta hi nahi hai? Ye kya mazak hai mere saath? Kya unko meri chot, mera dard nahi dikhta? Wo bol rahe hain ki accused par case chalana 'miscarriage of justice' hoga, uspar 'unnecessary litigation' ho raha hai. Toh main kya karoon, Sir? Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di usne, kya meri takleef 'unnecessary' nahi hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Meri suniye, please.

Sir, main aapke paas badi umeed se aaya hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, bahut purana hai, 2009 ka. Woh Pinki madam ki court thi na, Designated Court MCOCA ki, unhone ek order diya tha. Maine toh bas itna maanga tha ki mere upar se jo galat charges lagaye hain, MCOCA ke Section 3(2) aur 3(4) ke, woh hata diye jaayen. Maine application bhi di thi uske liye, Section 321 Cr.P.C. ke तहत. Par sir, unhone meri suni hi nahi! Meri application reject kar di. Main toh begunah hoon, yeh sab jhoot hai. Woh order galat hai, mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap hi kuch kijiye.

Sahab, main badi mushkil mein aapke paas aaya hoon. Kuch log hain, jinhone meri zindagi tabah kar di hai. Pehle toh inhone mujhe meethi-meethi baaton mein phansaya, mera trust jeeta aur mere saare paise hadap liye. Main toh unpe bharosa kar baitha tha, mujhe kya pata tha ki yeh sab milkar mere saath itna bada dhokha karenge. Jab maine apne paise wapas maange, toh inhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamkiyan deni shuru kar di. Pura gang hai inka, sir! Jidhar dekho udhar nuisance create kar rakhi hai, aur inki harkaton se meri family ko bhi khatra ho gaya hai. Sir, main bohot darr gaya hoon, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main Rajesh Sharma hoon. Meri suniye na, main kitna pareshan hun! Woh log, woh saare 7 ke 7 badmash, unhone milkar meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai. Pehle toh bade-bade sapne dikhaye, mera saara paisa le liya, bolte the 'investment hai, double ho jayega'. Yeh toh seedha-seedha mere saath dhokha hua hai, Sir! Aur jab maine apna paisa wapas manga, toh unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di hai, ghar pe aake badtamizi ki, poora mohalla dekh raha tha. 'Zubaan kholi toh theek nahi hoga,' aisa bolke gaye hain. Sir, mujhe un sab se bahut darr lag raha hai. Woh milkar mujhe dara rahe hain. Meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Un sabhi logon par sakht se sakht action lijiye, Sir!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Maine Noonmati PS mein ek FIR karwai thi, jiske basis par PRC No. 2574/2022 chal raha hai. Meri toh saari ummed isi case par hai, sir. Par ab mujhe pata chala hai ki court mein 1 March 2023 ko ek hearing hui thi, jahan woh opposite party, jinke khilaaf maine case kiya hai, unhone Section 482 Cr.P.C. ke तहत petition daal di hai. Unke vakil Mr. B.K. Mahajan ne request ki hai ki mera poora case hi quash kar diya jaye! Sir, agar mera case hi khatam ho jayega toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Itni mehnat se maine sab documents ikatthe kiye, gawah dhoonde... aur ab woh log sab kuch dismiss karwana chahte hain. Please, sir, meri madad kijiye. Mera case quash nahi hona chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai lagta hai. Wo saamne waale party ne jo case kiya hai na mujhpe, usme pehle toh unhone hi 144 din ki der kar di thi apni petition file karne mein. Itna late kiya unhone! Aur abhi-abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki court ne unki woh 'condonation of delay' wali application accept kar li hai. Matlab, unki itni badi galti ko maaf kar diya gaya hai! Yeh toh bilkul nainsaafi hai, Sir. Main itne din se already pareshaan hoon is case ki wajah se, aur ab jab unhone khud der ki, toh unko clean chit mil gayi? Mujhe toh lagta hai mere saath hi unfair ho raha hai. Hum jaise gareeb log toh bas tareekh pe tareekh bhugat te rehte hain, aur ameer log jab chahein der karein, unki maafi mil jaati hai. Aap hi batao, ab main kya karun?

Sir, main Rajkumar bol raha hoon. Meri complaint suniye, please. Bohot pareshan hoon main, in Kavita Gupta aur Sunita Gupta se. Yeh jo late Virender Kumar ki wife aur beti hain na, inhone meri zindagi mushkil kar rakhi hai. Pehle toh maine ek complaint case file kiya tha inke khilaaf. Pata hai sir, ussi ke baad PS Mehrauli mein meri FIR number 1585/2016 register hui thi. Police ne poori investigation ki, aur fir 09.11.2017 ko charge-sheet bhi file kar di thi. Incident toh 22.09.2016 ko subah kareeb 10.40 baje, H. No. 578 ke saamne hua tha, wohi hamari gali mein. Ab toh bas insaaf chahiye, sir!

Sahab, meri ek suno toh sahi! Mera naam Bimla Devi hai. Aaj 2 June 2005 ko, dopahar ke theek 2 baje, Farsh Bazar area mein meri jo dukaan hai na, shop No. 307, Pal Market, Jain Saree Gali, Teliwara, wahan do gunde zabardasti ghus aaye. Unhone mujhe itna maara, itna peeta ki kya bataun. Meri dukaan ki jo left side wali mukhya deewar thi na, jo support wali thi, usko toh hathode maar maar ke poora tod diya. Aur mere saath jo ek aadmi the, unko bhi buri tarah se peeta. Sir, meri dukaan ka nuksan kar diya, mujhe bhi maara. In gundo ko pakdo aur mujhe insaaf dilwao, please!

Sir, suniye na meri takleef! Yeh kitne saal purani baat hai, 2002 ki. Meri toh zindagi hi mushkil ho gayi hai is chakkar mein. Ek Metropolitan Magistrate thi, Kamini Lau madam, unhone ek order diya tha tabhi. Ussi ko lekar hum court mein challenge kar rahe hain ab. Sir, Investigative Officer ne khud apni report mein saaf-saaf likha tha ki koi saboot nahi mila, koi extortion ka case banta hi nahi, koi crime hua hi nahi. Unhone bola tha case band kar do. Par pata nahi kyu, woh Magistrate Sahiba ne meri baat suni nahi, police ki report maani nahi, aur galat tareeke se mera case band nahi kiya. Ab tak chal raha hai yeh mamla! Main toh pareshan ho gaya hoon, Sir. Jab police khud bol rahi hai ki kuch galat nahi hua, toh court kyu nahi maan rahi? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon kyunki meri bahut badi problem ho gayi hai. Moinabad police station mein Crime No. 48 of 2018 file hua tha, mere saath dhokhadhadi hui thi. Woh accused number 2 aur 3, aur unka ek aur saathi, inhone milkar mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya hai. Meri poori investment le li, jaali documents bana diye, aur mujhe fraud kiya. Sir, ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein petition daal rahe hain, yeh kehkar ki unke khilaaf jo investigation chal rahi hai, use rok diya jaaye! Aur case bhi khatam karwana chahte hain. Yeh toh galat hai na, Sir? Maine itne mushkil se case karwaya hai, aur ab woh bachne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Please, meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Unko aise bhagne mat dijiye!

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, please meri baat suniye. Karkardooma Courts mein mera case chal raha hai, SC No. 85/2018. Wahan pe Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne 27 August 2018 ko ek order diya tha. Us order mein jo charges frame kiye gaye na, sir, woh bilkul galat the. Ya toh woh banda saaf bach gaya, ya mere upar hi ulta-seedha laga diya. Main us order se bilkul khush nahi hoon. Humne toh ab uske khilaaf revision petition bhi daal di hai upar ki court mein, lekin meri sunwai nahi ho rahi hai. Main itna pareshaan ho gaya hoon, har jagah thokar kha raha hoon. Police ne bhi pehle dhang se enquiry nahi ki. Ab aap hi batao main kya karun? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Please meri madad karo.

Sir, main Anuradha Goyal hoon. Meri ek purani complaint hai na, FIR No. 153/2010, jo Nand Nagri thane mein Pawan Goyal ke naam se darj hai. Sir, usmein jo sections lagaye hain na, 324, 379, 366... woh poori baat nahi hai. Woh log sirf chori karke nahi gaye the! Unhone mere ghar mein zabardasti ghuspat ki hai (452 IPC), poori dakaiti daali hai (392 IPC), aur mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai (506 IPC). Yeh sirf mamooli chot aur chori ka case nahi hai, Sir. Meri aapse haath jodkar request hai, kripya yeh saare serious sections bhi FIR mein daaliye. Humko insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main Joseph Palanivel Jeyapaul hoon. Meri suniye na, main kitne time se pareshaan hoon. Yeh jo mere khilaaf ek report bani hai na, 2014 ki, ACMM court se, Patiala House mein, extradition ke baare mein... Sir, woh bilkul galat hai! Main toh bas yahi chahta hoon ki us report ko hata diya jaaye, cancel kar do usko. Aur mujhe reha kar do, main begunah hoon. Main high court tak gaya hoon iske liye, Article 226 aur 227 ke तहत. Meri life kharab ho rahi hai is sab mein. Please meri madad karo, Sir. Mujhe is jhanjhat se nikalna hai.

Sir, woh jo mera case chal raha hai na, usme Judge sahab ne ab charges frame kar diye hain. Un badmashon par SC/ST Act aur mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki dene ka section (506(ii) IPC) lag gaya hai. Par sir, woh log abhi bhi bol rahe hain ki unhone kuch kiya hi nahi, sab jhooth hai! Humne toh court mein 11 gawah pesh kiye hain, aur 9 proofs bhi dikhaye hain, saare sachche saboot. Jab un badmashon se court mein puchha gaya, toh woh sab deny kar gaye. Ulta, khud apne liye gawah ban kar apni hi safai de rahe hain. Aap hi batao sir, itne saboot hone ke baad bhi woh log kaise mana kar sakte hain? Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha, insaaf kab milega mujhe?

Sir, main hoon. Mere papa toh ----y---- hain, jo -------------------------------z2--------------------------- mandir mein pujari hain. Main bas jagran aur chowki mein gaana gaake apna guzara karti hoon, sir. Saal 2005 mein na, ek ladka mila mujhe. Usne apna naam Sonu bataya, aur kaha ki woh Hindu hai. Mujhse dosti ka haath badhaya usne. Maine toh shuru mein mana kar diya tha, sir. Par mujhe kya pata tha ki yeh Sonu nahi, iska asli naam toh Saleem Khan hai! Usne mere saath itna bada dhoka kiya hai, sir. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi!

Sahab, main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri ek complaint thi, maine court mein file ki thi un logon ke khilaaf jinhone mere saath dhoka kiya, cheating ki aur mere documents ke saath bhi gadbad ki thi. Unhone mujhe dhamkiyan bhi di thi. Maine IPC ki sections 406, 420, 467, 468, 469, 471 aur 506 ke तहत case banwaya tha. Par, Sir, Ld. Metropolitan Magistrate Sahab ne 18.12.2009 ko meri complaint dismiss kar di. Kehte hain ki "koi offence banta hi nahi hai" aur "accused ko summon karne ka koi ground nahi hai". Sir, main itna bada fraud jhel raha hoon, aur court kehti hai koi galti hui hi nahi? Ye mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Pehle meri mausi-bua aayi thi court mein, unhone kitni mushkil se gawaahi di thi. Unhone sab sach bataya tha, par judge sahab ne unki baat pe zyada gor hi nahi kiya, jaise unki koi value hi na ho. Mera toh dil hi toot gaya tha. Ab mere age ke liye ek naye gawah ko bulaya hai, woh kehte hain bahut important hai. Woh Surajpur ke Sarnapara gaon ke sarkari school ke master hain.
