Unhone bataya ki DSP sahab school aaye the aur unhone pura admission register maanga. Master ji ne woh 192 pannon ka register unko de diya. Pata nahi ab isse kya nikalega. Meri toh bas itni si guzarish hai, meri baat ko sahi se suno aur mujhe insaaf dilwao.

Sir, Daroga ji, please meri baat suniye. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere saath bahut bada dhokha hua hai, cheating hui hai. Un logon ne, Sir, paison ke chakkar mein, meri jo asli jaati hai na, woh chhupa kar kisi aur jaati ka bata diya mujhe. Meri identity badal di poori. Woh log bas paise banana chahte the, aur is chakkar mein meri poori zindagi kharab kar di. Mujhe jaise kisi aur ka roop de diya gaya ho, kisi aur ki tarah present kiya gaya. Yeh Section 416 ka offence hai na, wohi hua hai mere saath. Meri to izzat mitti mein mila di. Aap please un logon ke khilaaf action lijiye, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko. Mera case, jo itne time se latka hua hai, ab phir se Magistrate sahab ke paas bhej diya hai, aisa suna hai. Yeh 'remitted back' kya hota hai, Sir? Matlab phir se niche wali court mein jaao, phir se tareekh pe tareekh? Itne saare judgments aur laws hain, par meri sunwai kab hogi? Hum gareeb log hain, kitni baar court ke chakkar kaatenge? Har baar bolte hain 'appropriate orders' pass honge, 'guidelines' follow hongi... par humein toh bas insaaf chahiye! Meri poori zindagi isi mein nikal jaayegi kya? Sir, please kuch karo, mera bahut nuksaan ho raha hai. Is baar toh bol rahe hain 'strict compliance' hoga, par mujhe toh bas jaldi se justice chahiye. Meri madad karo!

Sir, dekho na, meri toh kismat hi phoot gayi hai. Saalon se case lad raha hoon aur abhi bhi justice nahi mila. Ye log bolte hain ki desh mein 4 crore judgments aur laws hain, itna bada system hai, par mere liye kya? Abhi-abhi pata chala ki mera mamla phir se Magistrate sahab ke paas wapas bhej diya hai. Kehte hain, naye orders do, aur kuchh guidelines ko dhyan mein rakho. MATLAB, main aur kitne chakkar kaatunga? Phir se tareekh pe tareekh? Meri toh saari ummeed hi khatam ho rahi hai. Ye sab rules aur strict compliance, sir, mere liye toh bas aur paperwork aur der hi badha rahe hain. Mujhe toh bas apna insaaf chahiye, kuch samajh nahi aa raha ki ye log karna kya chahte hain! Meri suno koi!

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon. Aapko yaad hoga pichle saal 2023 mein maine ek complaint di thi K.R. Puram Police Station mein. Mujhe ek bande ne buri tarah se dhamkaya tha, meri jaan ko khatra tha. Uske baad hi aap logon ne woh Crime No. 116/2023 register kiya tha, Section 506 IPC ke तहत. Main tab thoda relieved hua tha ki chalo ab toh action hoga. Par ab toh pata chala hai ki wohi banda jisne mujhe dhamkaya tha, woh court mein chala gaya hai, keh raha hai ki yeh case hi galat register hua hai! Sir, yeh kya ho raha hai? Meri toh phat rahi hai. Agar meri complaint cancel ho gayi toh? Woh mujhe fir se dhamkayega, mujhe toh bilkul safety nahi feel ho rahi. Meri madad kijiye, sir, meri complaint ko support kijiye. Maine sach bola tha, mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Maine itni mushkil se woh FIR darj karwai thi, ab pata chala hai ki woh opposite party wale, jinke khilaaf maine complaint ki thi, woh toh seedhe court chale gaye hain! Unhone ek application daali hai ki jo police investigation chal rahi hai na, usko rok diya jaye. Aur jo mera case aage badh raha hai, woh bhi rukwa de. Sir, agar investigation hi ruk gayi, toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Pehle hi kitni takleefein uthai hain maine. Meri aapse haath jod ke request hai, please unko investigation rokne mat dijiye. Meri madad kijiye, nahi toh mera toh sab khatam ho jayega.

Sir, yeh baat 7 June 2001 ki raat ki hai, kareeb 10:40 baje. Hum sab bahut pareshan the, ek serious problem ho gayi thi humare saath. Hum toh bas help ka wait kar rahe the, sir. Tabhi Chandraprakash ji (P.W.7) ne badi himmat dikhai. Unhone police ko toh inform kiya hi, saath hi woh turant Premchand ji (P.W.4) ke ghar bhi bhaage bhaage pahunche, jahan hum sab maujood the. Unhone aate hi bataya ki police ko call kar diya hai. Humari jaan mein jaan aayi. Socha, chalo, ab toh kuch hoga. Aur haan, ussi waqt, E-1 Mylapore Police Station ke Sub-Inspector Mani ji (P.W.1) bhi apne police rounds pe the. Toh police toh active thi hi. Sir, please, jo kuch bhi hua hai, uski proper investigation honi chahiye. Meri bas yahi request hai, ki humein insaaf mil jaye.

Sir, main toh pehle hi itna darr gayi thi, himmat nahi ho rahi thi complain karne ki. Us din jo mere saath hua, woh main hi jaanti hoon. Paanch din lag gaye mujhe himmat jutane mein, tab jaake maine FIR karayi. Ab ye log keh rahe hain ki meri baat reliable nahi hai, meri gawah pe hi sawaal utha rahe hain! Bol rahe hain koi aur saboot nahi hai. Main akeli thi us waqt, aur kaun hota mere saath? Ab case mein bhi kuch uljhanein bata kar mujhe aur pareshaan kar rahe hain. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, main sach bol rahi hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main ek Professor hoon. Meri bas itni si galti thi ki maine apne ek Assistant Professor ko sirf itna kaha ki woh apni classes theek se lein aur students ko properly padhayein. Kya galat kiya maine ismein? Maine toh bas unhe unki responsibility yaad dilayi. Par iske badle mein, sahab, mujhe itni bhari keemat chukani padi hai, jo main explain bhi nahi kar sakta. Meri toh puri life disturb ho gayi hai. Mujhe mental torture diya ja raha hai, meri reputation kharab kar di gayi hai. Main bahut pareshan hoon, raat ko neend nahi aati. Please, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sahab.

Sir, suniye meri baat, main bahut pareshan hoon. Wo Tarun Jindal hai na, usne pehle mujhe bahut gaali di thi, jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Tab maine 2017 mein uske khilaaf FIR karwai thi, Section 504 aur 506 IPC ke तहत. Moradabad court mein case chal raha tha. Abhi pichle saal 25 October ko, Magistrate sahab ne mere haq mein ek order diya tha, par Tarun Jindal ne phir se naya panga khada kar diya hai. Wo us order ke khilaaf appeal kar raha hai, mujhko aur pareshan kar raha hai. Sir, main gareeb aadmi hoon, baar-baar court kachehri ke chakkar kaat-kaat ke thak gaya hoon. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Us aadmi ne meri zindagi haram kar di hai.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske saath Moinabad police station mein Crime No. 48/2018 ka case chal raha hai. Aapko yaad hoga, maine FIR karayi thi. Woh log, accused number 2 aur 3, aur unka ek aur saathi... inhone milkar mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai. Meri poori zindagi ki kamayi loot li hai, sir. Pehle bharosa dilaya, fir saare paise le kar ghapla kar diya. Lagta hai inhone jaali kaagzat bhi banaye hain. Yeh saare milkar ek gang ki tarah kaam karte hain. Meri toh bas itni hi guzaarish hai, ki aap meri madad karein. Woh log ab case ko radd karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Maine toh sach bataya tha police ko, please mujhe insaaf dilwaiye, sir. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath bahut ghalat hua hai. Woh log meri zameen par zabardasti ghus aaye, bina kisi ijazat ke. Jaise kisi ka ghar todte hain na, bilkul waise hi. Aur phir, mera saara zaroori samaan bhi utha kar le gaye, Sir. Jab maine unhe roka, toh mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki di. Bahut hi badtameezi se baat ki, bilkul gundo ki tarah. Aur Sir, yeh ek aadmi ka kaam nahi tha, poora group tha unka, sab milkar plan banakar aaye the. Ab sun raha hoon ki woh court mein apni case hatwane ki koshish kar rahe hain, bol rahe hain unpar koi case banta hi nahi. Aise kaise hoga? Meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, maine 22 August 2019 ko ek complaint file ki thi (CR Case No. 251/2019). Un logon ne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya tha, meri cheezein rakh li aur wapas nahi ki. Upar se, mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi, aur ek akela nahi tha, kai log the usme. Humne jab case kiya, toh Magistrate sahib ne bhi meri baat suni thi, sab documents dekhe the aur kaha tha ki haan, crime hua hai, case aage chalega. Ab pata chala hai ki woh log uper court mein jaakar, mere hi case ko band karwana chahte hain, use khatm karna chahte hain. Sir, agar mera case hi band ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri to puri life barbaad ho jayegi. Krupya meri madad kijiye, mere case ko band hone se rokiye.

Sir, main toh bahut pareshan hoon. Aapko yaad hai, maine pichle saal 24 September ko University Police Station, Gwalior mein Prahlad Tiwari, Ankit Tiwari aur Smt. Anita Tiwari ke khilaaf ek FIR darj karwai thi, jiska Crime No. 378/2023 hai? Abhi pata chala hai ki woh log court mein chale gaye hain. Woh log Section 528 BNSS (ya CrPC 482) ka sahara lekar meri woh FIR quash karwana chahte hain, Sir! Matlab, unhone jo mere saath galat kiya, uski saza bhi nahi milegi? Agar meri FIR hi khatam ho gayi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Meri toh puri ummeed toot jayegi, Sir. Please, aap kuch kariye. Meri madad kijiye taaki meri FIR quash na ho paaye aur unko unke kiye ki saza mile.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon, bilkul samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon. Kitni mushkil se maine un logon ke khilaaf case kiya tha, tab jaake *court* ne unko *summon* kiya tha, bulaya tha. Ek *order* bhi aaya tha ki woh log *court* mein aayenge. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log *Section 482 CrPC* laga kar us *summoning order* ko *cancel* karwana chahte hain! Yeh kya mazak hai, sir? Meri sunwai kab hogi? Hum gareeb log hain, itne saal se chakkar kaat rahe hain. Pehle toh *order* aaya, ab usko bhi *quash* karwane mein lage hain. Meri family bahut darr rahi hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh aise kaise bach sakte hain?

Sir, main wohi lady hoon jinhone Barrackpore Women's Police Station mein FIR file ki thi. Woh July 16, 2022 ka Case No. 39 of 2022. Maine apne husband aur unke gharwalon ke khilaaf complaint ki thi, Sections 498A, 406, 506 IPC ke under. Unhone mujhe bahut torture kiya, dahej ke liye maara-peeta, mera saara stridhan bhi rakh liya aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein meri is proceedings ko quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Sahab, yeh toh galat hai na? Main itni mushkil se himmat karke complain ki, aur ab woh log mera case hi band karwana chahte hain. Please, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye, meri sunwai toh hone dijiye.

Sir, main aapko meri case (C.C. No.938 of 2020) ke baare mein batane aaya hoon. Pata nahi kitne saal ho gaye, 2020 se case chal raha hai, aur mujhe abhi tak insaaf nahi mila. Woh jo accused hain na, A2 aur A3, woh har baar koi na koi naya daav khelte rehte hain. Abhi pichle mahine, July aur August mein, unhone Madurai ke Magistrate sahab ke paas petition daali thi ki unhe case se discharge kar diya jaaye. Matlab, woh chahte the ki unhe chhod diya jaaye, case hi band ho jaaye! Lekin acchi baat yeh hui ki Magistrate sahab ne unki petitions reject kar di thi. Mujhe thodi umeed bandhi thi ki ab toh case aage badhega, finally kuch hoga. Par ab sunne mein aaya hai ki un logo ne upar ki adalat mein (revision case) appeal kar di hai. Yeh kya mazak hai Sir? Kya humesha aise hi chalta rahega? Woh log baar-baar aise petitions daal ke case ko latkaate rahenge? Meri toh jaan nikal gayi hai is sab mein. Please Sir, kuch kijiye, main bas justice chahta hoon. Unhe discharge nahi milna chahiye, unko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main kya karoon, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Woh jo saamne wala accused hai na, jiske khilaaf maine complain ki thi, ab wohi Court mein case ko challenge kar raha hai. Mera toh yeh 2021 ka case hai, jo uski 2019 ki harkaton se shuru hua tha. Sir, usne mere Chennai wale ghar ke saare papers apne paas rakh liye the. Aur phir, usne mere ghar mein ghuskar, apne do-teen doston ke saath milkar mujhe dhamki di, daraaya. Mera kitna saara samaan lekar gaya, kuch bhi wapas nahi kiya. Teen mahine baad, jab mujhe laga ki ab toh kuch karna padega, tab maine badi mushkil se private complaint file ki thi. Socha tha insaaf milega, par ab toh ulta wohi mere pe pressure daal raha hai. Sir, please aap hi kuch kijiye, main bahut pareshaan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas meri behen ke mamle mein phir se aayi hoon. Meri behen ne jo suicide kiya tha, uski wajah Sheetal aur uske saathi hain. Usne ek suicide note bhi chhoda tha jismein un sabka naam likha tha, jo humne spot se recover kiya tha. Pauri Garhwal ki Sessions Court ne 2021 mein un sab pe Section 306 (suicide ke liye uksane), 386 (paisa vasoolne) aur 506 (dhamki dene) jaise serious charges lagaye the. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh log us judgement ko challenge kar rahe hain. Woh chahte hain ki unpe se charges hata diye jaayen! Sir, yeh toh seedha-seedha insaaf se khilwad hai. Meri behen ki aatma ko shanti kaise milegi agar woh log aise hi bach nikalenge? Please, kuch kijiye. Inko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main Meena Gill bol rahi hoon. Pata nahi kya mushibat aa gayi hai meri zindagi mein. Pichhle saal (February 2018) mujhe court se ek bulawa (summoning order) aaya tha. Main toh hairan reh gayi, maine kuch kiya hi nahi. Mujhe laga ye galat hai, toh maine uske khilaaf appeal ki thi, ke meri sunwai ho. Tis Hazari court mein Additional Sessions Judge sahab ne meri appeal suni thi, par afsos! Abhi pichhle mahine (March 2019) unhone bhi meri petition reject kar di. Meri toh neendein ud gayi hain, sir. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kahan jaun. Mere saath anyay ho raha hai. Please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri baat suniye, please. Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai, Sir. Woh Sheetal hai na, usne mere apne ko itna pareshaan kiya, itni dhamkiyaan di, usse paisa chhina ki woh toot gaya. Usne majboor hokar apni jaan de di, Sir! Humein toh laga tha ab insaaf milega. Usne ek suicide note bhi chhoda tha na, Sir, jismein saaf-saaf Sheetal ka naam tha, ki uski wajah se usne aisa kadam uthaya. Usi note ke base par Pauri Court ne Sheetal par cases lagaye the—306, 386, 506 IPC ke charges. Ab suna hai woh un charges ko bhi challenge kar raha hai? Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Ek taraf mera apna chala gaya, aur woh ab bhi bachna chahta hai? Sir, please, humein insaaf dilwaiye. Woh qatil hai, Sir!

Sir, main Zumrud bol rahi hoon. Meri aur mere poore parivaar ki zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai. Yeh jo 25 January 2017 ka Special Judge saab ka order hai na, usne humein bohut pareshaan kar rakha hai. Pehle Naved vs Rehana case (CR No. 09/2016) mein humein bulaaya gaya tha, aur Special Judge saab ne us summoning ko hataaya nahi, ulta usko sahi thehraya. Ab humein phir se ghasita jaa raha hai, sir! Mere pati Naved, Mubin, Zakra, Mohd. Naeem aur main, hum sab chahte hain ki yeh order cancel ho jaye. Humne toh court mein arzi di hai, bas isi ummeed mein ki humein insaaf mile aur yeh musibat khatam ho. Sir, please kuch kijiye, humein is jhoothe case se bachaiye!

Sir, main Lakshmi hoon. Meri ek badi problem hai. Aapko yaad hoga, maine kuch time pehle complaint ki thi un teen ladkon ke khilaaf jo mera peecha karte the, mujhe baar-baar pareshan karte the, aur to aur, mujhe phone pe aur saamne se bhi dhamkiyan dete the. Meri toh izzat hi daav par laga di thi unhone. Police ne unke khilaaf case bhi file kiya tha, woh jo Nampally Court mein chal raha hai, C.C. No.9195/2021. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log court mein ek application lagakar mera poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain, Sir! Kya aisa ho sakta hai? Meri toh neend udd gayi hai. Agar unka case khatam ho gaya toh woh aur himmat pakad lenge aur mujhe phir se tang karenge. Maine unke khilaaf IPC ki dhara 354D, 506 aur 509 ke tehat complaint ki thi. Please, Sir, kuch kijiye. Mujhe darr lag raha hai aur main insaaf chahti hoon.

Sir, main wohi ladki hoon jiske saath us pehle accused ne kitna galat kiya tha. Usne mere saath dhokha kiya (Section 417), meri izzat loot li (Section 376), aur mujhe itna dhamkaya (Section 506(ii)) ki main darr gayi thi. Upar se meri jaati ko leke bhi usne taane maare the, sir, SC/ST Act ke tehat. Bahut mushkil se Ramanathapuram court ne 17 February 2017 ko, woh Spl.S.C.No.108 of 2011 case mein, usko gunehgar thehraya tha. Mujhe laga tha ab toh mujhe insaaf mil gaya. Lekin ab sun rahi hoon ki woh gunehgar phir se appeal kar raha hai! Sir, please, mujhe darr lag raha hai. Kya mera insaaf phir se khatre mein hai? Woh phir bahar aa jayega toh meri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Aap kuch karo na, sir.

Sahab, main aapke paas bade dukhi man se aaya hoon. Meri toh poori zindagi daav par lag gayi hai. Court mein meri peshi thi, aur jo Magistrate sahab ne order diya, woh na, sahi tareeke se record hi nahi hua. Mujhe toh baad mein pata chala ki bade sahab ko khud apne haathon se ya type karke final faisla likhna hota hai, ya jo important baatein hain. Par mere case mein toh aisa nahi hua. Lagta hai kisi aur ne hi likh diya aur usmein gadbad ho gayi. Issi wajah se jo faisla aaya hai, woh mere khilaaf hai, aur bilkul galat hai. Meri sunwai theek se nahi hui, aur ab main kaha jaaun? Sir, please meri madad kijiye, yeh toh seedhe seedhe niyam ki ulaanghan hai aur mera bahut bada nuksaan ho gaya hai.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Maine itni mushkil se woh Crime No. 306/2024 wali FIR karwayi thi. Socha tha ab insaaf milega, mera case C.C.No. 34011/2024 Bengaluru court mein chal raha tha... pata nahi kya ho gaya. Kal hi pata chala ki mera poora case hi quash ho gaya hai! Matlab meri complaint, meri saari mehnat, mera insaaf... sab khatam? Woh galti karne wala aadmi ab aise hi ghoom raha hai? Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha kya karun. Aap hi bataiye Sir, ab main kahan jaaun? Meri toh koi sunwai hi nahi ho rahi. Mujhe lag raha hai jaise meri toh koi value hi nahi hai. Please Sir, kuch toh kijiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas madad maangne aayi hoon. Meri choti beti ke saath us aadmi ne jo kiya, uske baad toh humari neend ud gayi hai. Usne meri bacchi ki zindagi barbaad kar di, sir. Humne aapke Turbhe police station mein complaint ki thi na, wohi wala case, Crime Register No. 172 ka. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh ghatiya aadmi bail maang raha hai! Sir, please aisa mat hone dena. Agar woh bahar aa gaya toh humara kya hoga? Meri beti toh abhi bhi darr-darr ke rehti hai. Please, use bail mat do. Usko saza milni chahiye, woh bahar nahi aana chahiye. Humare liye insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main Kamala bol rahi hoon. Meri kahani suniye, Sir. Pehle meri shaadi Babu Lal se hui thi, hum Dehradun mein rehte the. Mere do bachche hain, ek beti aur mera beta Deepak. Deepak ke paida hone ke baad, mere pati Babu Lal ghar chhod kar chale gaye, aur phir kabhi wapas nahi aaye, Sir. Maine kitna intezaar kiya unka! Jab wo nahi laute, toh main apne bachchon ko lekar ek doosre kiraye ke ghar mein rehne lagi Dehradun mein hi. Wahin meri mulakat Appellant se hui. Humne phir shaadi kar li, Sir. Uske baad, main aur mere dono bachche, meri beti aur mera beta, unke bade se villa mein unke saath rehne lage the. Sab theek lag raha tha, par ab jo ho raha hai na, Sir...

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mera ek bahut purana case tha. Gandhi Nagar police station mein meri FIR no. 76/14 thi, jiske baad Sessions Court mein case no. 70/14 chala tha. Woh aadmi, usne mere saath bahut ganda kaam kiya tha, Sir! Sections 376 aur 506 IPC laga tha uspar, aur kyunki main tab chhoti thi, toh POCSO Act ka Section 6 bhi tha. Kitne saal lage mujhe insaaf milne mein. Yaad hai mujhe, 2017 mein, pehle 13 September ko use doshi thehraya gaya, aur phir 18 September ko use saza mili thi. Mujhe laga tha ki ab sab theek ho jayega, meri zindagi normal ho jayegi.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri to poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai us gandi aadmi ki wajah se. Usne jo mere saath kiya, Section 354 aur 509 IPC ke तहत, uski saza sunkar mera dil baith gaya. Court ne bola ki usko Section 354 ke liye sirf ek saal ki simple imprisonment aur paanch hazaar ka fine dena hai. Aur Section 509 ke liye chhe mahine ki jail aur paanch hazaar fine. Sir, kya yahi insaaf hai? Meri izzat ka kya? Agar woh fine nahi dega toh bas do mahine extra jail? Ye to mazak hai mere saath! Aisi chhoti saza se toh aur himmat badhegi aise logon ki. Mujhe lagta hai mujhe insaaf mila hi nahi.

Sahab, main kya bataun? Mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Wo aadmi, Ramu, roj mujhe aate-jaate ghoorta tha, gande comments karta tha. Main kitni baar ignore kiya, socha chhod do. Lekin ek din usne hadd hi kar di. Raaste mein achanak mera haath pakad liya, gandi baatein bolne laga. Main chillayi toh usne mujhe dhakka de diya. Meri izzat par baat aa gayi hai, sahab! Log kya kahenge? Main bahut darr gayi hoon aur shame feel kar rahi hoon. Mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye. Aise logon ko toh seedha jail honi chahiye, taaki aur kisi ladki ke saath aisa na ho. Please, meri help kijiye.

Daroga ji, main Kempanna hoon. Main aapke paas apni ek complaint leke aaya hoon. Maine do plot khareede the, site number 748 aur 749. Yeh plots maine apne do beton ke naam par khareede the, Vyalikaval House Building Co-operative Society se. Bade paise lagaye the maine ismein, apni poori zindagi ki kamai laga di thi. Par ab pata chal raha hai ki koi aur un plots par kabza karne ki koshish kar raha hai, ya koi aur apna haq bata raha hai. Meri to neend ud gayi hai, Daroga ji. Woh meri aur mere beton ki mehnat ki kamai hai. Aap please is mamle ko dekhiye aur meri madad kijiye. Mujhe nyay chahiye!

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki mere pati aur meri beti ke saath bahut galat hua hai. Woh log... woh gunde the, unhone mere pati ko itni buri tarah maara hai ki unko *grievous hurt* aayi hai, sir. Doctor ne kaha hai ki haddi toot gayi hai, bahut serious hai yeh. Meri chhoti beti ko bhi nahi chhoda unhone, usko bhi itna dard diya, usko dhakke maare, usko chot lagayi. Abhi tak usko bukhar hai aur body pain ho raha hai. Please sir, un logon par action lo. Unhone mere gharwalon ko jaan-boojh kar chot pahunchai hai, Section 325 aur 323 IPC ke तहत. Humein insaaf chahiye, sir. Bahut dard mein hain hum log.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon, meri suno please. Woh Bhupender Singh, jo Bachan Singh ka beta hai aur RZ-93, Vishnu Garden, Gali no.6, Delhi mein rehta hai, usne aur uske saathi Pavinder Singh ne, jo Pritpal Singh ka beta hai aur S-3/46 Old Mahavir Nagar, Gali no.2, Tilak Nagar, Delhi mein rehta hai, meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata nahi kya chahte hain mujhse. Roj-roj ghar pe aakar dhamki dete hain, kabhi gali dete hain. Kal toh unhone mujhe sar-e-aam maara bhi. Mujhe bahut dar lag raha hai, Sir. Meri koi sunta nahi. Please, meri madad karo aur in dono pe sakht action lo. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir!

Sir, main Bijender hoon. Meri suniye please, main bahut pareshan hoon. Baat 23 February 2014 ki hai. Dhirpal @ Kanna @ Dheela, Vikas @ Vikas Lagarpuria aur Paramjeet, yeh teeno milkar mere ghar/office mein ghus aaye. Mera ghar RZ-2, Nehru Garden Colony, Main Gurgaon Road, Najafgarh mein hai, Reliance Fresh ke paas. Sir, bina meri ijazat ke woh log andar aa gaye. Aur phir unhone mujhe bahut dhamkaya, bole ki "tujhe chot pahunchaenge, nuksan karenge." Main toh itna darr gaya tha Sir, meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Ab bhi main bahut ghabraya hua hoon. Please Sir, in logon ke khilaaf action lijiye.

Sir, jab woh incident hua tha na, meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Main bahut darr gayi thi. Phir maine aapki police ko bulaya, aur sab kuch bataya unhe. Maine ek-ek jagah dikhai jahan woh sab hua tha. Unhone mere kehne par ek site plan banaya, jaise maine unhe exactly sab kuch bataya tha. Us site plan par maine sign bhi kiya tha, apna signature, 'A' point par. Maine toh sab kuch sach-sach bata diya hai, aur sign bhi kar diya hai. Ab aap hi batao sir, mujhe toh bas insaaf chahiye. Un logon ko saza milni chahiye jinhone mere saath aisa kiya. Mujhe aapse bahut umeed hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Yeh court mein kya chal raha hai? Jin logon ne mujhpe itna zulm kiya hai, jinke khilaaf saare saboot hain, saare incriminating circumstances toh seedha unhi ki taraf dikha rahe hain! Phir bhi unhe mauka mil raha hai apni kahani sunane ka, khud ko explain karne ka. Unki statement record ki ja rahi hai, Sir! Yeh toh seedha-seedha justice delay karna hua na? Unke khilaaf itne saaf-saaf evidence hain, phir bhi unhe itni chhoot kyun mil rahi hai? Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha. Sir, please kuch kijiye, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye. Main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sir, main Chandni Khan hoon. Meri baat suniye, Sahab. Mujhe Kalwa, uski biwi Savitri aur unke bete Ravi Kumar ne milkar bohot maara hai. Yeh ghatna 11 January 2016 ko sham ke kareeb 5 baje hui thi. Mehrauli ke Daya Ram Apartment, T-35 mein. Un teeno ne ek saath, poori planning ke saath, mujhe aur mere pati ko buri tarah se peeta. Sir, unhone humein dhamkiyan bhi di hain. Hum bohot darre hue hain. Meri aapse request hai, please unke khilaaf sakt karwai karein aur mujhe insaaf dilaiye. Main bohot pareshan hoon, Sahab.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, yeh 15 February 2021 ki baat hai. Dopahar ke 3:30 baje ke kareeb, main apne flat ke saamne, Flat no. 362, Pocket-6, Phase 1, Sunrise Apartment, Nasirpur, New Delhi mein khadi thi. Maine dekha ki woh aadmi, yeh accused, meri chori-chori photo kheench raha tha aur meri video bana raha tha. Jab maine usse roka, usko object kiya ki yeh kya kar rahe ho, toh usne mujhe bahut gandi-gandi gaaliyan deni shuru kar di. Meri beizzati karne ki poori koshish ki, aur upar se dhamki bhi di ki meri video sabko dikhayega, sab mein circulate kar dega. Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, meri izzat ka sawaal hai. Please uske khilaaf strict action lijiye.

Sir, main us case ki victim hoon jismein mere saath galat hua tha. Aapko yaad hoga, pichle saal 07.07.2021 ko police ne us guilty ko pakda tha. Meri complaint ke baad use arrest kiya gaya, uski talashi bhi li gayi thi. Police ne mere aur uske phone records bhi nikalwaye the, sab proofs collect kiye. Phir uske khilaf charge-sheet bani aur court mein file hui. Ab toh sunne mein aaya hai ki us accused ne khud maan liya hai ki jo FIR maine karayi thi, woh sahi hai. Matlab usne apna gunaah khud accept kar liya hai! Sir, jab woh khud maan raha hai toh usko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Mujhe bas jaldi se insaaf mile.

Sir, main aapko bata raha hoon, Virender Kumar Sharma ne meri dukan se mera saara samaan chura liya, jo mere document Mark PA mein likha hai. Usne bade beimaani se mera samaan nikala. Aur jab maine usko roka, toh usne mujhe jaan se marne ki dhamki di. Sir, mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai. Usne chori karne ke baad, woh saara chori ka samaan bhi gayab kar diya, taaki woh pakda na jaay. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Meri dukan ka nuksaan ho gaya aur meri jaan ko bhi khatra hai.

Sir, main Rama, Naresh Kumar ke khilaaf complaint lekar aayi hoon. Usne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Woh 12 January 2015 ko raat 8 baje, mere ghar ke paas, Ambedkar Colony mein, mujhe gandi-gandi gaaliyan dene laga. Sabke saamne meri beizzati ki, aur meri izzat ko taar-taar karne ki koshish ki. Usne mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi! Main us din se bahut dari hui hoon, sir. Police ne uske khilaaf Sections 506 aur 509 IPC ke तहत charge-sheet toh file ki hai, par mujhe ab bhi usse bahut darr lagta hai. Meri bas itni guzaarish hai, mujhe insaaf mile aur woh dobara aisi himmat na kare.

Sahab, main Surat Singh Negi bol raha hoon. Yeh Jagat Singh Negi ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Pata nahi kaunsa Cr.Revision No. 112 of 2022 mere upar laga rakha hai, Shimla High Court mein. Main toh seedha-saadha insaan hoon, mujhe in sab court-kacheri ke chakkar mein nahi padna. Meri family bahut pareshan hai, har tareekh pe jaana padta hai. Abhi pichle mahine 28 May ko bhi sunwai thi, aur ab toh 24 June ko decision aane wala hai. Meri neend udd gayi hai. Sahab, please kuch kijiye. Main bas shanti chahta hoon, aur is Jagat Singh se chutkara. Bohut mental torture ho raha hai mujhe.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon ki main abhi Covid se recover hui hoon, aur waise bhi meri tabiyat theek nahi rehti, kai medical issues chal rahe hain. Us din, jab usne mujh par awaaz uthai, toh maine bas itna hi bola ki please mujh par chillao mat, meri tabiyat theek nahi hai. Par uske baad, mera haath kaanpne laga, aur mujhe itna paseena aane laga, lag raha tha jaise main gir jaungi. Main wahan se turant nikal aayi, yeh kehkar ki main written mein jawab dungi. Sir, yeh sab hone ke baad, maine usi din aapke paas complaint file ki thi. Usi complaint ke basis pe, Bowenpalli Police Station, Hyderabad mein 5 February 2022 ko FIR bhi register hui thi.

Sir, main apni fariyaad leke aaya/aayi hoon. Meri suniye please. Ye bade-bade judgments, ye 4 crore laws, sab kuch toh hai hamare system mein, phir bhi gareeb ko insaaf nahi mil raha! Mera case Hon'ble Justice Rakesh Kainthla sahab ke paas hai. Wohi decide karenge. Mere liye Sudhir Thakur ji, Senior Advocate, hain, unke saath Somesh Sharma ji bhi hain. Aur State ke liye Ajit Sharma ji hain. Itne bade-bade vakeel, itne bade Judge, sab hain, par meri baat, mera dard kaun samjhega? Sir, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, ye system itna complicated lag raha hai, mera dil ghabra raha hai.

Sir, main apni takleef batane aaya hoon. Mujhse aur saha nahi ja raha. Mujhe insaaf nahi mila, Sir! Pichle saal, 27 April 2010 ko, Ghumarwin ke Bilaspur Court no. 2 ke Magistrate saab ne, jiske khilaaf mera case tha, usko ba इज्ज़त bari kar diya! Meri toh zindgai kharab ho gayi hai uski wajah se, aur usko Court ne aise hi chhod diya? Yeh kaise ho sakta hai? Meri saari umeed toot gayi hai. Sir, main us judgment ke khilaaf challenge karna chahta hoon. Meri aapse request hai, please aap meri madad kijiye. Mujhe justice chahiye, Sir. Usko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, suniye na meri baat. Bahut din se intezaar kar rahi thi. Mujhe pata chala hai ki woh jo aaropi hai na, usko court se bulaava (summons) mil gaya tha. Aur achhi baat hai ki woh finally judge ke saamne haazir bhi ho gaya hai. Ab main sun rahi hoon ki usko saare police papers, jo bhi kanoon ke hisaab se dene hote hain, woh bhi check karke de diye gaye hain. Pata nahi kya-kya formalities hoti rehti hain. Meri bas itni request hai, Sir, ki ab jab woh saamne aaya hai aur saari cheezein ho gayi hain, toh please ab jaldi se action lo. Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, aur kuchh nahi.

Sir, main Waidhan PS ke Crime No. 896/2021 ki complainant hoon. Yaad hai, jab un logon ne mujhe Section 294 aur 504 IPC mein gaali galauj aur badtameezi ki thi? Uska charge sheet bhi file ho gaya tha. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein gaye hain aur Section 528 Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 ka hawala dekar, us charge sheet ko 'quash' karwana chahte hain! Matlab, mera poora case hi khatam karwana chahte hain, Daroga ji! Maine itni mushkil se himmat karke complaint ki thi, ab agar unka case hi band ho gaya toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai ki woh phir se mujhe pareshan karenge. Meri request hai, please is charge sheet ko quash hone se rokiye, nahi toh meri zindagi mushkil ho jaayegi. Main bahut dukhi hoon.

Sahab, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri madad kijiye. Woh jo accused hai na, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha aur jispar Thiruvananthapuram court mein CC No. 280/10 case chal raha hai, woh ab us case ko band karwane ki koshish kar rahi hai. Haan, woh aurat, woh chahti hai ki uske khilaaf chal rahi proceedings ko Section 482 laga ke khatam kar diya jaaye. Kya matlab hai iska, Sahab? Main itne saalon se insaaf ka intezaar kar rahi hoon, aur ab woh bas ek petition file karke sab nullify kar degi? Meri puri zindagi barbaad ho jayegi agar aisa hua toh. Meri suno Sahab, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh aise hi bach ke nahi nikal sakti. Please, aap kuch kijiye. Meri case ko mat khatam hone dijiye.

Sir, main Manjeet Singh hoon, Himachal Pradesh se aaya hoon. Meri suno toh sahi, sir, main bahut dukhi aur pareshan hoon. Pata nahi meri kismat mein kya likha hai. Maine State of Himachal Pradesh ke khilaaf complaint ki hai. Unhone mere saath bahut galat kiya hai, sir. Meri toh zindagi hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Kitne time se main department ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, koi sunta hi nahi meri baat. Mere documents, mera pending kaam, sab atka hua hai. Mujhe lagta hai mere saath bahut bada annyaay ho raha hai. Main sirf insaaf chahta hoon, sir. Meri taraf se, please, aap kuch karo. Main bahut umeed leke aaya hoon aapke paas.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mera toh pura vishwas hi toot gaya hai. Yaad hai aapko, woh mera Crime No. 126 of 2024 wala case? Jismein mujhe laga tha finally insaaf milega. Bengaluru ke court mein chal raha tha, Special Case No. 943 of 2024... Aaj pata chala, woh quash ho gaya! Mera case hi khatam kar diya! Itni mehnat ki, itne chakkar kaate, har tareekh pe pahuncha... aur ab kehte hain case hi nahi raha? Yeh kaisi baat hui? Meri kya galti thi? Mujhe toh laga tha bade bade laws aur judgments se mujhe help milegi, par ab toh lag raha hai sab mere khilaaf hai. Ab main kahan jaun, sir? Mujhe bas apna hak chahiye, mera case dobara shuru karwaiye. Bahut dukhi hoon main.

Sir, main aapko batana chahti hoon, mera jo case hai na, woh ghar ka mamla hai. Bahut pareshan hoon main, sir. Apne hi logon ne itna tang kar rakha hai ki kya bataun. Maine court mein criminal application daala hua hai. Meri advocate, Ms. Kalyani Mangave, mere liye lad rahi hain. Doosri taraf se woh Aarti Pandey ji hain, unke vakeel. Aur State ki taraf se Mr. Sukanta Karmakar hain. Abhi 17 January 2026 ko bulaya hai sabko, court mein settlement ki baat karne ke liye. family matter hai na, toh socha shayad sulah ho jaaye. Par sir, pata nahi kya hoga. Tension ho rahi hai. Agli sunwai 22 ko bhi hai. Main toh bas insaaf chahti hoon, aur kuch nahi.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Bongaon Court mein mera jo case chal raha hai, C-26 of 2007 (500/504 IPC ka), jismein us aadmi ne meri beizzati ki thi, ab wahi us case ko band karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Pata chala hai usne ek application di hai, bol raha hai mera case quash ho jaaye. Sir, 2007 se main insaaf ke liye lad raha hoon! Meri to insult hui hai, mere samman ko thess pahunchi hai. 13.2.2014 ko bhi uski appeal reject hui thi, aur ab phir se wahi chaal chal raha hai. Mujhe mera insaaf chahiye, sir. Us aadmi ko saza milni chahiye. Mera case band na ho, please dekhiye na sir, mujhe nyay mile.

Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, meri baat suno please. Ek to mera case kab se chal raha hai, aur koi meri sunta hi nahi. Pehle DMRC ne ek order nikal diya tha 20 October 2021 ko, woh bhi Tribunal ke kehne par. Mujhe laga Tribunal insaaf dega, toh maine us order ko challenge kiya tha wahi Tribunal mein. Socha ab sab theek ho jayega. Lekin, kya bataun Sir, ulta ho gaya. Ussi Tribunal ne ab phir se ek naya order thop diya hai mere upar, 21 April 2022 ko. Yeh toh mere saath bahut galat ho raha hai! Pehle ek order, phir use challenge karo, phir naya order. Sir, meri toh zindagi kharab ho gayi hai iss kanooni chakkar mein. Mujhe nahi pata kya karu, aap hi madad karo meri.

Sir, main Baburam hoon, Bhognipur se aaya hoon. Bahut pareshaan hoon, meri suniye. Woh Dhirendra aur uske kuch logon ne meri life hell kar di hai. Meri cheezein chura li hain, samaan utha kar le gaye. Jab maine unhe roka, toh gaali-galoch ki, sabke saamne meri beizzati ki. Aur toh aur, mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di hai, kehte hain agar maine kuch bola toh achha nahi hoga. Sir, mujhe darr lag raha hai, meri family bhi scared hai. Please, un par action lo, Bhognipur Police Station hai, Kanpur Dehat mein. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri baat suniye! Maine 2019 mein ek complaint case file kiya tha, Complaint Case No.9/2019. Kitne saal ho gaye, main dhakke kha rahi hoon. Phir jaakar, Raibarelly ke judge sahab ne 13 April 2021 ko ek order nikala tha. Usmein unhone us dusre party ko bulaya tha, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha. Mujhe laga ab insaaf milega, Sir. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh log Section 482 CrPC lagakar woh order cancel karwana chahte hain! Yeh kya mazak hai, Sir? Meri sunwai roki ja rahi hai. Itni mushkil se toh mujhe ek umeed mili thi. Kripya meri madad kijiye, Sir. Main toh bas apna haq chahti hoon.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aaya hoon. Woh Jaswinder Singh, jiske khilaaf humne FIR darj karayi thi (FIR No. 47, 23 December waali), woh ab anticipatory bail maang raha hai court se. Section 438 Cr.P.C. ke तहत. Sir, aap sochiye, usne mere saath itna galat kiya hai. Agar use abhi se bail mil gayi, toh woh toh saboot mita dega, ya mujhe aur mere parivaar ko dhamkaega. Hum toh pehle hi darr ke saaye mein jee rahe hain. Main chahta hoon ki use bail na mile, use pakda jaaye. Please Sir, meri madad kijiye. Meri family ki security ka sawaal hai.

Sir, meri baat suniye. Main kya bataun aapko... yeh jo court ka chakkar hai na, meri to jaan nikal di hai. Kehte hain yahan 4 crore judgements hain, itne laws hain, par meri sunta kaun hai? Ek aam aadmi kaise samjhega yeh sab? Justice Ranjan Sharma sahab, unhone bhi meri taraf dhyan hi nahi diya, sab paperwork mein uljhe hain. Aur woh jo bade lawyer sahab hain, Mr. N.S. Chandel, unhone pata nahi kya case set up kiya hai, mujhe to kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Sir, meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai is sab mein. Koi meri madad hi nahi karta. Yeh sab bade logon ka khel hai, gareebon ke liye yahan koi insaaf nahi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Bahut pareshaan hoon main.

Sir, main aapke paas bahut umeed se aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho rahi hai. Ek saal se court ke chakkar kaat raha hoon, ab tak koi insaaf nahi mila. Hamara ek case chal raha hai Honorable Justice Ranjan Sharma sahab ki adalat mein. Mere vakeel hain Rajesh Mandhotra ji, unhone hi mera poora case set kiya hai, saare papers banaye hain. Pata nahi kya hoga mera, sir. Har tareekh pe jaata hoon, sirf agle tareekh mil jaati hai. Meri family bahut pareshan hai. Mujhe lagta hai meri sunwai theek se nahi ho rahi. Sir, please meri madad kijiye. Main bahut gareeb aadmi hoon, ab aur kitna paisa kharch karu?

Sir, main aapke paas apni jaan ki hifazat maangne aaya hoon. Woh aadmi, usne mujhe seedhi-seedhi dhamki di hai ki meri jaan le lega. Ab woh court mein bol raha hai ki uska koi 'intention' nahi tha meri jaan ko khatra pahunchane ka, bolta hai ki 'yeh toh bas mere threats the'. Par Sir, jab usne mujhe ghoor ke bola, 'Tujhe dekh loonga, zinda nahi chhodunga', meri toh saansein ruk gayi thi! Mujhe sach mein lagta hai ki woh kuch bhi kar dega. Meri raat ki neend udd gayi hai, din mein chain nahi aata. Yeh sirf dhamki nahi thi, uski aankhon mein maine sach mein iraada dekha hai, Sir. Aap please meri madad karo, meri jaan ko khatra hai. Uske khilaaf sakht action lo.

Sir, woh log! Unhone mujhe seedhi dhamki di hai ki agar maine unki baat nahi maani na, toh woh mere pair tod denge. Socho, sir! Main toh itna darr gaya ki seedha apne ghar bhaag gaya. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi us din. Baad mein, thodi himmat juta kar main DCB police station, Rajkot aaya. Meri complaint wahan darj ho gayi hai, CR No. I-4 of 2015 ke naam se, Indian Penal Code ki sections 387, 506(2), 504, aur 114 ke तहत. Sir, meri madad karo, main bahut tension mein hoon. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sahab, meri baat suniye, main bahut pareshan hoon. Malda se aaya hoon main. Ek criminal case chal raha hai mera court mein, us aadmi ke khilaaf jisne mujhe itna sataya hai. Usne mujhe badnaam kiya, jhoote ilzaam lagaye, jaan se marne ki dhamki bhi di thi, Sir! Maine poori himmat karke uske khilaaf Section 200 CrPC ke तहत complaint ki thi, Malda Magistrate Court mein. Ab pata chala hai woh toh high court chala gaya hai, bol raha hai mera poora case hi khatam kar do. Matlab, usne itne bade crimes kiye - Sections 182, 211, 499, 500, 503, 504 IPC ke under - aur ab woh chahta hai ki usko koi saza na mile? Yeh toh zulm hai, Sir! Meri sunwai ho rahi thi, aur ab woh case hi quash karwana chahta hai. Main kya karoon? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir. Please meri madad kijiye!

Sir, main Malda Bar Association ka Secretary hoon. 2020 se, jab se main chuna gaya hoon, tab se imandaari se apni duties nibha raha hoon. Poori bar community jaanti hai mujhe. Par abhi pichle mahine ki 28 September ko, kisi ne English Bazar Police Station mein Inspector sahab ko mere khilaaf ek written complaint di hai. Sir, yeh toh galat hai na! Mere aur baaki saare executive members ke khilaaf aise baseless allegations lagaye ja rahe hain. Hum apna kaam kar rahe hain aur log humari badnaami kar rahe hain. Meri reputation kharab ho rahi hai. Aap kripya karke is mamle ko dekhiye aur meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut dukhi hoon, bahut pareshan hoon. Mera ek case chal raha tha Patna mein, woh Criminal Revision No. 253/2024. Pehle Magistrate Sahab ne jo order diya tha na 6 March ko, usko ab Judge Sahab ne bhi confirm kar diya hai. Meri toh suni hi nahi gayi, Sir. Mere vakeel Sanjeev Ranjan ji ne bataya ki doosri party ko bhi notice bheja gaya tha, woh aaye bhi the apne vakeel ke saath. Sab rules ke hisaab se hua, par phir bhi mere saath yeh nainsafi ho gayi. Mujhe lagta hai mujhe insaaf nahi mila. Ab main kahan jaun, Sir? Main toh haar gaya.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri to kismat hi kharab hai. Aaj court mein sunwai thi, aur wahan par bade bade vakil sahab, Mr. B.S. Chauhan aur Mr. Ram Kumar, us guilty insaan ke liye argue kar rahe the. Aur us taraf se sarkari vakil, Ms. Ayushi Negi bhi thi. Sab bas kanoon ki baatein kar rahe the, jaise humari takleef kuch hai hi nahi. Vo log bas Section 438 Cr.P.C. ki baat kar rahe the, pata nahi kya hota hai isme, par mujhe lagta hai woh usko agrim jamanat dilana chahte hain! Jisne mere saath itna galat kiya, usko aise hi chhod denge kya? Sir, please, yeh galat hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, usko bail nahi milni chahiye.

Sir, main Bibipet Gram Panchayat mein kaam karta hoon. Aaj mere saath bahut galat hua hai. Woh respondent 4 aur 5 hain na, unhone mujhe bahut pareshaan kiya. Pehle toh gandi gandi gaaliyan di, upar se meri jaati ke naam par bhi bahut bura bhala kaha. Sir, unhone toh hadd kar di! Mujhe Gram Panchayat office mein hi band kar diya. Darwaza lock karke mujhe kareeb saade teen ghante tak andar band rakha. Yeh sab poora illegal hai, sir. Mere saath bahut anyay hua hai. Main bahut darta hoon. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshaan hoon. Meri bahu, Akanksha Katiyar, ne hum par ek jhootha case karwa diya hai. Pata nahi kya chahti hai woh, meri poori izzat kharab kar di hai. Usne 30 May 2022 ko Shivrajpur Police Station, Kanpur Nagar mein humare khilaaf ek FIR karwayi hai, uska Case Crime No. 0091 of 2022 hai. Usmein usne mujh par, mere bete (apne pati) par aur humare baki rishtedaron par sections 498A, 504, 506 IPC aur Dowry Act ke jhoothe ilzaam lagaye hain. Sir, yeh sab jhooth hai! Humne kabhi dahej nahi manga. Uske apne rishtedar bhi uske saath mile hue hain. Hum is jhoothe mamle se bahut dukhi hain, kripya karke humari madad kijiye aur humein insaaf dilwaiye.

Sir, main aapko wahi purana case batane aaya hoon. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai, maine toh socha tha finally justice mila. Woh jo gunda tha na, jisne mujhe pehle duty pe thappad maara tha, gaali galauj ki thi – uske khilaaf humne itni mushkil se case jeeta tha. Bokaro court mein, 2005 ka case tha. Judge sahab ne usko convict bhi kiya tha Section 353 aur 504 ke andar. Lekin ab, pata chala hai ki 2017 mein, upar ki adalat ne uski sazaa halki kar di hai. Simple imprisonment bola hai. Sir, itne saal ki ladai ke baad bhi, kya yahi nyay milta hai? Humne jo itna dukhi huye, woh sab bekar gaya kya? Please, kuch toh karo Sir, aise toh koi bhi kisi public servant ko pareshaan karega!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai. Jis case (CC.No.8026/2024) mein maine apne pati aur sasural walon ke khilaaf complaint ki thi, dahej ke liye tang karne, maar-peet karne aur dhamki dene ke liye – Sections 323, 498A, 504, 506 IPC aur Dowry Act ke तहत, ab woh Accused No.4 toh usi proceedings ko court mein challenge karne chala gaya hai! Sochiye Sir, itna kuch sehne ke baad bhi woh ab bachne ki koshish kar raha hai. Meri toh saari ummeed isi case par tiki hai. Agar woh nikal gaya, toh meri zindagi toh puri barbaad ho jayegi. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, please kuch kijiye!

Sir, woh log na, abhi court chale gaye hain. Kehte hain, 'yeh jo humne FIR karayi hai, yeh to galat hai'. Unmein se ek, woh accused number 5, seedha court pahunch gaya hai. Par sir, aap hi bataiye, unhone mere saath kya kuch nahi kiya! Mere pati aur uske gharwalon ne mujhe kitna maara-peeta, gaaliyan di, har chhoti baat pe meri beizzati ki. Aur dahej ke liye toh meri jaan hi nikaal di thi. Hamesha paise aur sona maangte the. Jab maine unki complaint ki, toh dhamkiyan bhi dete hain. Un par toh Sections 498A, 323, 504, 506 IPC aur Dowry Act ke 3, 4, 6 lagte hain. Yeh sab sach hai, sir. Woh kaise bol sakte hain ki humara case hi galat hai? Mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri kya haalat hai. Pehle maine us aadmi ke khilaaf FIR karwai thi, kyunki usne mera paisa hajam kar liya tha, upar se gaaliyan di aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi. Police ne investigation toh ki, par phir pata nahi kya final report de di thi. Mera toh dil hi toot gaya tha. Par maine himmat nahi haari, sir. Main dobara court gaya, apni baat rakhi. Meri us appeal ko court ne 'complaint case' maan liya. Aur ab, meri statements (jo Section 200 aur 202 Cr.P.C. ke under record hui hain) sunne ke baad, court ne us kameene ko summon kiya hai. Ab use Section 406 (dhokha), 504 (gaali galauj), aur 506 (dhamki) IPC ke tehat trial face karna padega. Bas ab mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Aap bas isko theek se dekhiye.

Sir, main apni pareshani batane aaya hoon. Mujhe yaad hai, maine Dalanwala Police Station, Dehradun mein ek FIR darj karwai thi, number 0166 of 2018. Us aadmi ne meri reputation barbaad kar di thi, online galat cheezein daali thi, badnami ki thi meri. Woh 469, 504 IPC aur IT Act Section 66 ka case tha, aapko toh pata hi hoga. Abhi mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein jaakar meri us FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Sir, aap logon ne toh 8 August 2018 ko uske khilaaf charge sheet bhi file kar di thi, matlab aapko saboot mil gaye the na? Phir bhi woh aise kar raha hai, toh mujhe bohot darr lag raha hai. Meri request hai, please dekhiye ki mujhe insaaf mile. Meri madad kijiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun, do saal ho gaye hain is ghatna ko. C.C.No.57/2023 ka case chal raha hai. Main toh bas apna sarkari kaam kar raha tha, aur usne mujhe raste mein rok kar gaali galauj ki, dhakka-mukki ki, meri beizzati ki. IPC ki dhara 341, 353 aur 504 ke तहत uspar case darj hua hai. Charge sheet bhi file ho chuki hai, lekin main aaj tak akela pad gaya hoon. Do saal ho gaye, aur meri taraf se koi wakil bhi nahi hai. Mujhe laga tha police ne case bana diya hai toh ab insaaf milega, par yahan toh main hi pareshan ho raha hoon. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh aadmi mujhe tang kar raha hai aur mujhe lagta hai case ko lamba kheench raha hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Aapko yaad hai, Nandyal II Town Police Station mein meri ek complaint thi, Crime No. 316 of 2015? Woh jo aadmi ne mujhe dhamkaya, online meri badnami ki, meri izzat uchhali thi! Maine uske khilaaf FIR karwayi thi. Uss waqt bhi, police ne... (pause) khair. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh court mein case khatam karwane ki koshish kar raha hai! Usne mere saath Sections 503, 504, 499, 166 IPC aur IT Act ke Sections 66 aur 67 ke तहत jo kiya, woh sab galat tha. Kya usko aise hi chhod denge? Itni takleef di hai usne mujhe. Meri suno Sir, yeh case band nahi hona chahiye. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, please meri madad karo.

Sir, main Santosh Kumar, J.C. Nagara Police Station mein constable hoon. Meri duty lagi thi 8 May 2020 ko, raat 8:15 baje ke aas-paas. Sir, Section 144 laga hua tha, aur main Muddamma Garden, II Cross ke paas logon ko Corona virus ke baare mein samjha raha tha. Unki bhalai ke liye, ki mask pehno, door raho. Lekin wahan kuch log the, jo meri baat sunne ko taiyaar hi nahi the. Ulta, unhone mujhe rokne ki koshish ki, mera raasta roka. Jab main unhe samjha raha tha, toh unhone mujhse badtameezi ki, dhakka-mukki ki. Aur toh aur, galiyan deni shuru kar di. Sir, mujhe jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di! Bolte hain agar phir dikha toh theek nahi hoga. Ye log khud toh niyam nahi maan rahe the aur upar se mujhe, jo apni duty kar raha tha, usko itna pareshan kiya. Meri toh izzat ki dhajjiyan uda di, Sir. Please in sab ke khilaaf kadi se kadi kaarwai karo.

Sahab, main Sudesh Kumari bol rahi hoon. Bahut pareshaan hoon sir. Yeh baat hai 17 August 2004 ki, shaam ke kareeb 7 baje. Main apne clients, Rihana aur uske bete Sonu ke saath baithi thi. Tabhi hamara padosi, Rakesh, aaya. Usne mujhe upar chalne ko kaha, bola ki uska kirayedaar bahut badtameezi kar raha hai. Maine socha theek hai, toh apni mummy ko uske saath bhej diya. Par thodi der baad Rakesh niche aaya, kuch badbadate hue bahar chala gaya. Main samajh nahi paayi kya hua. Aur phir, woh dobara aaya aur bola ki 'tumhe mere saath chalna padega...' Sir, mujhe darr lag raha hai, pata nahi woh kya chahta hai ya uske mann mein kya hai.

Sir, main Ravinder Prasad Jain hoon. Bahut pareshan hoon, Sir. Meri do complaints thi, bahut pehle maine file ki thi Cr.P.C. section 200 ke तहत. Lekin, Sir, 08.04.13 ko meri wo complaints bina sune hi dismiss kar di gayi. Meri sari umeed toot gayi thi, Sir, ki mujhe kabhi insaaf milega ya nahi. Main itna dukhi hua tha! Fir bhi, main himmat karke aage badha. Ab main wohi purane mamle lekar, dobara se revision petition daale hain, jinke numbers hain Cr. No. 57342/16 aur Cr No. 57343/16. Bas itni si guzarish hai, meri un pehle wali complaints ko ek baar phir se dekha jaye, meri baat suni jaye. Sir, bahut takleef mein hoon, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main wohi hoon jiske saath Sangeeta Jain ne sab kiya tha. Usne toh meri jaan lene ki koshish ki thi (woh section 307 waala case), aur kitni gandi gaaliyan di thi, bezzat kiya tha (woh 504 IPC waala). Nehtore police station mein report likhwai thi maine, Bijnor ki baat hai. Bade mushkil se usko saza mili thi, Bijnor court ne 7 saal ki jail di thi usko. Ab suna hai woh appeal kar rahi hai, sir! Upar court mein. Meri zindagi khatre mein hai, sir. Agar woh bahar aa gayi toh mujhe dobara pareshan karegi, ya jaan se maar degi. Please, meri madad karo, usko bahar mat aane dena. Itni mushkil se insaaf mila hai.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera jo case chal raha hai na, woh Criminal Appeal No. 273 of 2006, uske saath ek aur arzi lagi hai, Criminal Misc. Application No. 1712 of 2006. Pata hai Sir, woh log apni saza rukwane ki baat kar rahe hain, conviction suspend karwane ki. Meri toh samajh hi nahi aa raha yeh kya ho raha hai. Pichli baar sunwai mein jab us application pe bahas chal rahi thi, toh pata chala ki woh chhoti si arzi hi utna time legi jitna mere poore case ki final sunwai mein lagta hai! Mera insaaf kab hoga, Sir? Woh log bas tareekh pe tareekh le rahe hain, aur mera waqt barbaad ho raha hai. Mujhe bas mera insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Sona Devi, aur mere pati Ram Charit ne court mein sab sach-sach bataya tha. Hum hi toh gawah the, Sir! Woh Ram Lakhan aur uski maa Shakuntala ne toh apne bachav mein kuch bola hi nahi, bas kehte rahe ki unko galat phansaya gaya hai dushmani ki wajah se. Par yeh sab jhooth tha, Sir! Unhone mere ghar mein ghus ke mujhe aur mere pati ko maara, humein gaali di aur humari jaati ko lekar apmaan bhi kiya tha. Bahut takleef di hai unhone. Shukra hai, 15 November 2000 ko court ne unko doshi thehraya, Section 323, 452, 504 IPC aur SC/ST Act ke तहत unhein saza mili hai. Ab bas unko unke kiye ki puri saza mil jaye, yahi meri guzaarish hai.

Sir, woh log the na, 2, 3 aur 4 number wale, unhone pehle mere aadmi ko bohot ghoonson se maara. Usse pakad ke jakad liya tightly, bilkul hilne nahi diya usko. Aur tabhi woh 1 number wala, usne chaaku nikaal ke seedha uski chhaati mein ghop diya, Sir! Meri aankhon ke saamne hua yeh sab. Hum turant hospital leke gaye, par doctors ne bola ki woh ab nahi rahe, mar gaye mere aadmi. Woh log keh rahe the ki mere aadmi ka unki behen se kuch chakkar tha, isliye unhone sabaq sikhaya. Kya yeh insaaf hai? Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai, Sir. Mujhe un darindon ke khilaaf insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main aapke paas apni ek purani complaint ke regarding aaya hoon. Meri toh kismat hi kharab hai, Sir. Maine December 2017 mein Gomati, Udaipur mein jo Magistrate Court hai, wahan ek case file kiya tha. Un logon ne mujhe gaali di thi, jaan se maarne ki dhamki di thi, aur samaj mein jhagda karwane ki poori koshish ki thi, jhoothi baatein phaila rahe the. IPC ki dharaein 153(a), 153(b), 504, 505, 506 ke तहत un par action hona chahiye tha. Lekin Sir, Magistrate saheb ne meri complaint ko sunne se hi mana kar diya, usse dismiss kar diya. Mera case, CR(CC)21 of 2017, reject ho gaya. Mujhe insaaf nahi mila Sir. Meri toh koi sunwai hi nahi hui. Kya garib logon ko aise hi dhakke khane padenge? Mujhe ab kya karna chahiye, Sir? Woh log abhi bhi azaad ghoom rahe hain.

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh poori zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai is chakkar mein. Woh jo original complainant hai na, Respondent No. 3, usko court ne notice bhi bheja hai, par woh aata hi nahi hai. Pata nahi kya chahta hai woh, bas humein tang kar raha hai. Pehle High Court se 2019 mein Nagpur mein ek judgment aaya tha, Criminal Application No. 33/2012 mein, woh bhi mere khilaaf tha. Ab yeh appeal chal rahi hai aur woh saamne hi nahi aa raha. Itne saalon se bas tareekh pe tareekh, main bahut pareshan ho chuka hoon. Meri family bhi suffer kar rahi hai. Mujhe bas isse chutkara chahiye, sir. Usko kaho ya toh saamne aaye ya phir yeh case hi khatam kare.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Mere saath toh bahut zyadati hui hai. Meri ek petition thi High Court of Karnataka mein, woh Badrinarayana Jaganathan vs. State of Karnataka wala mera case tha. Socha tha, chalo ab High Court mein toh insaaf milega. Kitni ummeed thi mujhe! Par pata nahi kyu, judge sahab ne meri ek na suni. Mera poora case hi dismiss kar diya. 31st July, 2019 ko woh order aaya hai, Sir. Woh Criminal Petition No. 3961 of 2015, mera itna important matter tha! Ab main kahan jaun, kya karu? Meri toh saari ummeedein toot gayi hain. Lagta hai garib aadmi ke liye koi insaaf hai hi nahi. Please, Sir, kuch toh help kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batane aayi hoon. Mera ek case chal raha hai, Serampore PS ka (Case No. 53/2023), jo maine 8 February 2023 ko file kiya tha. Un logon ne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya hai, fraud kiya hai, mere paise hadap liye hain. Sab milkar unhone saazish ki thi. Ab woh log court mein application deke mera poora case khatam karwana chahte hain, Sir! Kehte hain ki proceedings quash kar do. Yeh kya baat hui? Maine itni mushkil se case kiya hai aur woh aise hi bach jayenge? Woh 26 May 2015 ki koi baat kar rahe hain, Seema ka naam le rahe hain, pata nahi kya-kya jhooth bol rahe hain. Sir, please dekhiye, mera case khatam nahi hona chahiye. Unhone jo kiya hai, uski saza milni chahiye. Meri sunwai honi chahiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Maine Serampore P.S. mein jo complaint di thi na 8 February 2023 ko (Case No. 53/2023), usmein us Seema ne mere saath bahut bada dhokha kiya tha. Usne 26 May 2015 ko saare farzi kagaz banaye, mere paise hadap liye, aur yeh sab badi planning se kiya tha, sir. Ab jab mera case (G.R. Case No. 304 of 2023) Serampore ke ACJM saab ke paas chal raha hai, toh woh log court mein application de rahe hain ki poora case hi khatam kar do! Matlab, maine jo complaint ki, jo itni mehnat ki, woh sab bekar? Meri sunwai hi nahi hogi kya? Sir, please meri madad kijiye, mujhe insaaf chahiye. Woh log case band karwana chahte hain!

Sir, main kya bataun, meri toh life hi barbaad ho gayi hai. Seema aur uske logon ne 26.05.2015 ko mere saath itna bada dhokha kiya, saare paise hadap liye, documents tak mein hera-pheri ki. Kitne saalon tak main chup raha, phir himmat karke is saal 08.02.2023 ko Serampore PS mein complaint ki thi (Case No. 53/2023). Ab pata chala hai ki woh log court mein application daal rahe hain ki mera poora case hi band karwa dein (G.R. Case No. 304/2023). Sir, yeh cheating hai, forgery hai, trust toda hai – Section 420, 467, 468, 409, 120B, 34 ke cases hain. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir! Meri mehnat ki kamayi barbaad ho jayegi agar ye case band ho gaya. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main toh Serampore PS mein pehle hi complaint de chuka hoon, pichle saal 8 February ko. Woh Case No. 53/2023 hai. Us *dhokebaaz* ne mere saath bahut badi cheating ki hai, mere saare paise hadap liye. Farzi papers banaye, criminal breach of trust kiya, aur pura conspiracy karke mujhe loota. IPC ki dharaein 420, 467, 468, 409, 120B, 34 sab lagi hain us par. Yeh case Serampore Magistrate Court mein chal raha hai. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh *shatir insaan* apni proceedings quash karwane ki koshish kar raha hai. Sir, agar woh aise bach gaya toh mera kya hoga? Meri poori zindagi ki kamai chali gayi. Please, mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Usko aise bhaagne mat dijiye, Sir!

Sir, main Falavda se aayi hoon. Meri beti ke saath jo 2016 mein Asif @ Pasha ne galat kiya tha, woh toh sabko pata hai. Usne meri beti ko chhuan, uske kapde khinchne ki koshish ki, maara-peeta aur humein jaati ke naam par gaaliyan bhi di thi. Kitni mushkil se humne yeh POCSO aur SC/ST Act ke तहत case ladha. Ab jaake Meerut court ne (22/23 August ko) usko saza sunayi thi. Par, sir, woh toh phir se appeal kar raha hai! Hum toh ab bhi darte hain usse. Woh baar baar humein pareshaan karega. Aap se request hai, please kuch kijiye, humein insaaf dilwaiye aur usko dobara se chhutne mat dijiye. Meri aur mere parivaar ki safety ka sawaal hai.

Sir, main Maduri Devi Rawat hoon. Kal raat mere ghar mein kuch log gusse the, poora gang tha woh! Mere saare gehne, cash, jo bhi bacha ke rakha tha, sab loot ke le gaye. Poora ghar ulat-pulat kar diya. Aur Sir, mujhe meri jaati par bhi taane maare. 'Tumhari aukaat kya hai', 'tum jaise log aise hi maare jaate hain' - aise gandi baatein bol rahe the. Main bahut darr gayi thi, Sir. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Ab kaise jiyenge? Mera toh sab kuch barbaad ho gaya. Meri aap se request hai, un gundo ko jald se jald pakdo aur mujhe insaaf dilao. Bahut mushkil se kamaaya tha sab kuch.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mera case hai CWPIL No.9 of 2020, pata nahi kitne time se latka hua hai. Pehle 28 March ko judgment reserve hua, fir 26 April ko pronounce hua, par meri sunwai ka kya hua? Mujhe ab tak insaaf nahi mila. Upar se, ye State wale ek aur application le aaye hain, CMP No.12451 of 2023. Hum jaise aam logon ko aise hi ghumate rehte hain kya? Kehte hain 4 crore judgments hain, itne laws hain, par mere jaise gareeb ka koi sunne wala nahi. Sir, bas apna haq chahta hoon main. Mujhe justice chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas isliye aayi hoon kyunki main bahut pareshan hoon. Maine Mahila Police Station, Junagadh mein ek FIR darj karwai thi, jiska C.R. No. 11203040210021 of 2021 hai. Usmein maine apne pati aur sasural walon ke khilaaf complaint ki thi. Unhone mujhe dahej ke liye tang kiya (498A), maara-peeta (323), gaaliyan di (504), mera saaman hatha liya (406) aur dhokha bhi diya (420). Aur sab milkar mujhe pareshan karte the (114). Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh log High Court mein gaye hain, meri complaint ko khatam karwane ke liye, sab proceedings rukwane ke liye. Meri itni mushkil se darj ki hui complaint ko kaise koi band karwa sakta hai? Mujhe insaaf chahiye, sir. Meri madad kijiye, taaki meri complaint par action ho aur unko saza mile.

Sir, dekhiye na, woh saamne waale kitne himmat waale hain! Maine kitni mushkil se apni FIR darj karwai thi, jiska number CR No. _______. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf milega. Par ab woh log, court mein ek application lagake, bol rahe hain ki meri FIR ko hi khatam karwa denge. Woh chahte hain ki mera poora case hi band ho jaaye, Sir! Yeh kya baat hui? Meri complaint sachchi hai, main jo bol rahi hoon woh sach hai. Agar meri FIR hi cancel ho gayi toh mujhe insaaf kaise milega? Main bahut ghabra rahi hoon, Sir. Mujhe pata chala hai ki woh Section 482 CrPC ke तहत meri FIR quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri madad karo, Sir, please!

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki meri life mein kya ho raha hai. Maine Botad Police Station mein ek FIR file ki thi, CR No. 11190002220710 of 2022, 01.04.2022 ko. Un logo ne mujhe gandi gaaliyan di thi, jaan se marne ki dhamki di thi (Sections 504, 506(2) aur 114 IPC ke तहत). Aur ab, woh log court mein application daal rahe hain meri FIR ko quash karwane ke liye! Matlab, unhone jo kiya, uska koi asar hi nahi hoga? Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye! Meri FIR ko kaise quash kar sakte hain? Kya gareeb aadmi ko koi justice nahi milega yahan? Maine itni mushkil se complain ki thi, aur ab yeh sab ho raha hai. Please, meri help kijiye, sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Hum toh poori tarah barbaad ho gaye hain. Woh 13 log the, pura gang tha unka. Hamaare upar hamla kiya tha, sir! Mere bhai ko unhone maar diya tha, seedha qatl! Aur humein bhi kitni chotein aayi hain, sabko khoon-kharaba hua. Gali-galoch alag se ki, itni beizzati ki humari. Yeh case Mehsana mein chal raha tha, Session Court mein. 22 February, 1996 ko bhi ek order aaya tha, par humein toh lagta hai insaaf mila hi nahi. Woh sab log abhi bhi ghoom rahe hain. Hum toh bas itna chahte hain ki un sabko kadi se kadi saza mile. Sir, humne kya bigada tha unka? Please, humari madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun? Meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi hai. Itne saal se main bas insaaf ka intezaar kar raha tha. Malwan Police Station mein Laxmi aur uske do saathi ke khilaaf maine complain ki thi. Unhone mujhe jaan se maarne ki koshish ki thi, gaaliyan di thi aur dhamkiyan bhi di thi, Sir. Sections 307, 504, 506 IPC ke तहत, Case Crime No. 229 of 2010 ka mamla tha. Pura case Fatehpur Sessions Court mein chal raha tha, Trial No. 122 of 2012. Abhi haal hi mein, 11.09.2025 ko, judge sahib ne un sabko bari kar diya hai! Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, itna bada jurm kiya aur unko chhod diya? Mera kya hoga, Sir? Ab main kahan jaun? Aap please meri madad kijiye, humein higher court mein appeal karni hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir!

Sir, main aapko apni mushkil batane aaya hoon. Maine ek case file kiya tha, aur 18.09.2024 ko court ne mere favour mein ek order pass kiya tha. Mujhe interim relief mili thi, socha ab thoda sukoon milega. Par sir, woh saamne wala, respondent No.2, unhone haar nahi maani. Meri relief ke khilaaf woh seedhe Hon'ble Supreme Court chale gaye aur wahan SLP daal di hai. Ab Supreme Court se naya order aane wala hai. Aap hi bataiye, jab ek baar mujhe court se relief mil gayi, toh yeh log kyun peecha nahi chhod rahe? Sir, iss mamle ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon. Please, meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko ek bahut zaroori baat batane aaya hoon. Mera ek court case chal raha tha, woh Criminal Misc. Application No.18499 of 2019. Usmein jo pehla number ka aadmi tha na, jis se mera case chal raha tha, woh toh mar gaya! Haan, Sir, unka death certificate bhi aa gaya hai aur court ne use record par le liya hai. Ab unke advocate keh rahe hain ki woh application aage nahi badhayenge us mare hue aadmi ke liye. Toh Sir, mera kya hoga? Main itne saalon se insaaf ka intezaar kar raha hoon, aur ab wohi nahi raha. Toh mera case khatam ho gaya kya? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, main kya karoon ab. Meri to poori zindagi is case mein ulajh gayi hai.

Sir, main Arpita Tarmali hoon. Meri complaint hai mere pati Bhavesh Singh aur uske gharwalon ke khilaaf. Maine George Town Police Station mein pehle bhi report karwai thi (Case Crime No. 78 of 2015), jismein dahej, maar-peet, gaali-galauj aur dhamkiyon ke cases (Sections 498-A, 323, 504, 506, Dowry Act) darj hue the. Court mein bhi case chal raha hai (Complaint Case No. 510 of 2017). Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki yeh log mere poore case ko quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai in logon ne, aur ab yeh saboot mitana chahte hain! Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, aise bade logon ke saamne hum garibon ki sunwai kaun karega? Meri madad kijiye, sir, yeh log mera case band karwa denge.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon. Kitni mushkil se toh Kanpur Nagar court ne un logon ko summon kiya tha, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha. 16 January ko order aaya tha ki unhe trial face karna padega. Mujhe laga ab finally insaaf milega. Par ab suna hai ki woh log, woh 'applicants' jinko court ne bulaya hai, woh us order ko challenge kar rahe hain! Unhe bura lag raha hai ki unhe bulaya gaya hai! Kya matlab hai iska? Sir, woh fir se bhagne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Maine itna suffer kiya hai, aur ab jab court ne action liya hai, toh woh usko bhi rokna chahte hain. Meri aapse request hai sir, please kuch kijiye. Unhe trial face karna hi hoga. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki woh apni power use karke bach na jaayen. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, woh Bhavdipbhai... unhone mujhe pehle toh paanch hazaar rupaye cash mein diye the. Par, baaki ke jo mere ek lakh pichhattar hazaar bante the na, uske liye unhone ICICI Bank ka cheque de diya. Maine socha theek hai, par jab woh cheque bank mein jama karaya, toh woh clear hi nahi hua! Bank se pata chala ki 'payment is stopped by the drawer', matlab unhone khud hi payment rukwa di. Mera poora paisa doob gaya, sir. Main kitna dhoonda unko, par woh mil hi nahi rahe the. Phir badi mushkil se pata chala ki woh toh Hyderabad chale gaye hain. Ab jaakar unka Bhavnagar ka address mila hai. Sir, please meri madad kijiye, main bahut pareshan hoon.

Sahab, main Jethalal Rabadia, aapko batane aaya hoon ki humare Devraj bhai ki zameen Manji Rabadia ne dhokhe se apne naam karwa li hai. Usne Devraj bhai ke farzi signature kiye, nakli dastavej banaye. Yeh kitna bada fraud hai, Sahab! Humne toh pehle bhi complaint ki thi. Pichle saal, 19 February 2019 ko, Devraj bhai ke power of attorney ne application di thi ki Gram Panchayat se entry cancel karwa do. Phir 7 November 2019 ko order bhi aaya tha Talati-cum-Mantri ko, Rampur wale, ki Panchayats Act ke hisaab se action lo. Lekin Sahab, aaj 20 May 2020 ho gayi hai, aur Talati-cum-Mantri ne abhi tak kuch nahi kiya. Koi sunwai nahi ho rahi. Hum garib logon ki zameen aise hi loot li jayegi kya? Kripya karke aap kuch kijiye Sahab, hum bahut pareshan hain. Humari help karo!

Sir, main kya bataun aapko, meri toh samajh mein hi nahi aa raha ki kya karun. Maine toh bas apni complaint di thi, socha tha mujhe insaaf milega. Par ab toh ulta ho raha hai. Woh log, jinhone mere saath galat kiya tha, woh High Court chale gaye hain, Sir. Section 482 CrPC laga kar meri hi FIR ko quash karwane ki koshish kar rahe hain. Aur pata hai Sir, court ne bhi bol diya ki yeh application toh jaldi se suni jayegi aur admission stage par hi final decision de denge. Mujhe toh ab bohot darr lag raha hai ki kahin mera hi case band na ho jaaye. Itne saare kanoon aur judgments hain, par mera kya hoga? Meri toh saari ummeed aap logon par hi hai, Sir. Please kuch kijiye, mujhe justice dilwaiye, Sir.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko... mujhe to vishwas hi nahi ho raha hai! Wo jo Accused No. 1 hai na, jisne mere saath itna bada galat kiya tha, uske khilaaf saare proceedings hi Court ne quash kar diye! Haan sir, usne order ki copy bhi dikha di hai. Mera poora case hi khatam ho gaya. Sochiye sir, kitni ummeed thi mujhe, kitni ladai ladi maine, aur ab ye sab bekar ho gaya? Wo aadmi aise hi bach jayega kya? Meri to jaan nikal gayi sunkar. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf milega, par ye kya ho gaya mere saath? Sir, please, aap kuch kijiye. Ye toh seedha-seedha anyay hai mere saath!

Sir, main aapke paas ek bahut zaroori baat batane aaya hoon. Woh jo chaar log the na, jinhone mujhe gaaliyan di thi, meri beizzati ki thi aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi (Sections 504 aur 506 IPC ka case), unka case chal raha hai CC.No.1517/2021. Ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh log Court mein jaake bol rahe hain ki unke khilaaf jo proceedings hain, unhe khatam kar diya jaaye. Sir, yeh toh galat hai na! Unhone mujhe kitna pareshan kiya, meri neend haram kar di thi. Aur ab woh chahte hain ki unhe aise hi chhod diya jaaye? Main toh phir se darr gaya hoon. Agar woh log aise hi bach gaye toh meri kya izzat reh jaayegi? Mujhe insaaf chahiye sir. Please, unhe aise jaane mat do. Meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki Pandesara Police Station mein maine ek FIR karwai thi (C.R.No.I-106 of 2019). Un logon ne mere ghar mein ghuskar chori ki, tod-phod ki, mujhe bandh kar diya, maarpit ki, gaali galauj ki, aur jaan se maarne ki dhamki bhi di thi. Ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh gunehgaar, woh log jinhone mere saath itna zulm kiya, woh court mein petition daal rahe hain taaki ye case hi khatam ho jaaye. Matlab, woh log chahte hain ki FIR quash ho jaaye aur unhe koi saza na mile? Sir, yeh toh bahut galat hai. Kya mujhe insaaf nahi milega? Itne serious sections the unpar – 452, 457, 380, 342, 427, 323, 504, 506(2) aur 114 IPC ke tahat. Meri aap se guzaarish hai, please is FIR ko quash hone se rokiye. Main bahut darr gaya hoon.

Sir, mere bete ko ek rash driver ne takkar maar di thi. Mera bachcha spot pe hi khatam ho gaya, sir. Poora ghar bikhar gaya hai. Aur ab main sun raha hoon ki log keh rahe hain ki usko shayad koi halki saza dekar chhod denge ya probation pe bhej denge. Sir, road pe itne haadse hote hain, aur aise logon ko agar bas maafi mil gayi toh kya fayda? Usne jaan li hai mere bete ki! Usko proper punishment milni chahiye. Section 304-A hi kyun na ho, usko aise chhoot nahi milni chahiye jisse woh doosre logon ki zindagi se khele. Meri family ki taraf se, mujhe bas insaaf chahiye, sir. Woh jail jana chahiye, koi probation nahi.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mere accident ka case chal raha hai, aur jo pehle Tribunal ne compensation diya tha, woh toh na ke barabar tha. Fir mera case Kerala High Court tak gaya. 12 April 2007 ko unka judgement aaya, unhone compensation thoda badhaya toh hai, but sir, unhone meri galti bhi 50% dikha di. Yeh toh bohot galat hai! Accident poora unki galti se hua tha, unki carelessness thi. Mujhe poora insaaf chahiye, sir. Main toh bekar mein dukhi hua hoon aur mujhe abhi bhi lagta hai ki mujhe pura hak nahi mila.

Sir, meri baat suniye na please. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Meri toh zindagi hi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Mujhe Hospet ke Addl. Sessions Judge ne galat tareeke se convict kar diya tha aur saza bhi suna di. Maine iske khilaaf appeal ki thi, High Court mein, lekin Karnataka High Court, Dharwad waalon ne bhi 21.06.2011 ko, Criminal Revision Petition No. 2284 of 2009 mein, wahi purana faisla hi barkaraar rakha hai. Meri toh koi sunta hi nahi, Sir. Ab sirf Supreme Court hi ek ummeed hai, isliye maine wahaan Article 136 ke tehat appeal file ki hai. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, bas insaaf!

Saab, main bohot pareshaan hoon, dil toot gaya hai mera. Mera ek purana criminal case tha Theog mein, 2001 ka. Usmein Theog ke chote judge sahab ne 8 June 2006 ko mere khilaaf hi faisla suna diya tha. Main us faisle se khush nahi tha, toh main Shimla ki badi adalat mein appeal karne gaya tha. Wahan ke bade judge sahab ne bhi, 1 June 2010 ko, wahi Theog wala faisla confirm kar diya, meri appeal reject kar di. Ab maine phir se kanoon ke hisaab se upar ki adalat mein yeh case challenge kiya hai. Saab, kitne saalon se main insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Mujhe bas mera haq chahiye, kuch toh karo.

Sir, main aapke paas bohot umeed leke aaya hoon. Meri toh zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Woh bade log, jinhone mera sab kuch cheen liya, unki taraf se toh bade bade advocates hain, jaise Mr. Satyen Vaidya aur Mr. Vivek Sharma. Aur Court mein bhi Justice Ajay Mohan Goel sahab hain. Main ek aam aadmi, in sab se kaise ladunga? Meri family bohot pareshaan hai, sir. Raaton ki neend ud gayi hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, par lagta hai jaise yeh pura system hi unke saath hai. Main kahan jaaun? Mera toh koi sahara nahi hai, na koi bada lawyer. Aap hi meri aakhri umeed hain. Please, meri suniye, mere haal pe reham kijiye aur mujhe insaaf dilwaiye. Bahut dukhi hoon main, sir, bohot dukhi. Please kuch kijiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mere saath kitna bada dhokha hua hai. Har jagah bas yahi sunne ko milta hai ki 'accident kaise hua, theek se pata nahi chal raha'. Lekin sir, mere case mein toh aisa bilkul nahi hai! Mere paas do-do gawah hain, woh PW4 aur PW5, jinhone sab kuch aankhon dekha bataya hai. Ek-ek baat clearly aur comprehensively batayi hai ki kaise yeh haadsa hua tha. Opposite party ke vakeel ne unhein kitna bhi cross-examine kiya, par unki sachchai ko woh tod nahi paaye. Unki gawaahi ekdum pakki hai, sir. Ab aap yeh nahi keh sakte ki case clear nahi hai. Jab sab itna obvious hai, toh mujhe justice kyun nahi mil raha? Meri suno, sir, please.

Sir, main ek bahut pareshaan aadmi hoon. Main ek private school mein bus driver tha. Meri naukri chheen li hai inhone. Hua ye ki main 2007 mein, 15 se 26 February tak, kuch din duty pe nahi aa paya tha bina chutti liye. Jaise hi main 27 February ko wapas gaya, unhone mujhe andar hi nahi jaane diya, seedha nikal diya naukri se! Main tab se pareshaan hoon, sir. Labour Court ne bhi 2011 mein mere haq mein faisla sunaya tha ki mujhe wapas naukri pe rakho aur meri saari salary do. Lekin ab yeh school wale us faisle ko bhi challenge kar rahe hain. Meri to zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai, sir. Kripya meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main kya bataun aapko? Us din meri koi galti nahi thi, main toh bas apni taraf se theek se jaa raha tha. Lekin us aadmi ne mujhe takkar maar di. Aur ab woh court mein ulta bol raha hai ki main galat side se aa raha tha, aur uski scooter potholes se bachne ke liye meri taraf aa gayi. Sir, yeh bilkul jhooth hai! Wahan road pe ek bhi gaddha nahi tha. Mere jo gawah hain, PW-5 aur PW-6, unhone bhi saaf saaf dekha hai aur bataya hai ki road ekdum theek thi. Woh bas apni galti chhupane ke liye jhooth bol raha hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir, usko saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main apni baat batane aaya hoon. Aapko shayad yaad hoga, Shailendra Yadav ne mujh par jaanleva hamla kiya tha, aur meri jaati ki wajah se bhi usne mujhe bahut pareshan kiya tha. Main toh bas kisi tarah bach gaya. Humari taraf se jab case chala, toh Bhopal ke Special Judge Sahab ne 09.07.2018 ko uske khilaaf charges frame kiye the – Section 307 IPC aur POA Act ke तहत. Humein thodi rahat mili thi ki chalo ab insaaf milega. Par ab pata chala hai ki woh Shailendra Yadav, us order ke khilaaf appeal daal kar, Section 14-A POA Act mein, apne upar se yeh bade charges hatwana chahta hai. Sahab, yeh toh seedha humein aur dabane ki koshish hai. Meri aapse request hai, please humari madad kijiye. Woh agar aise chhoot gaya toh humein aur zyada nuksan pahunchayega. Humein insaaf chahiye, sahab!

Sir, meri suniye. Meri zindagi toh Motor Accident ke baad se hi ulat-pulat ho gayi hai. Erode ke court ne 2012 mein kuch compensation dilwaya tha, lekin saab, woh bahut kam tha. Mera itna nuksaan hua tha, ghar ka guzaara mushkil ho gaya. Iss liye, maine fir se appeal file ki (C.M.A.No. 2457 of 2012) ki shayad thode aur paise mil jayein. Ab pata chala hai ki woh United India Insurance Company wale bhi appeal kar rahe hain (C.M.A.No.3140 of 201)! Unhe toh aur paise kam karne hain. Meri toh samajh nahi aa raha Sir, main kya karoon? Ek taraf main zyada paise maang raha hoon, doosri taraf woh company wale aur kam karna chahte hain. Gareeb aadmi ko kab tak aise dhakke khane padenge? Mujhe mera haq kab milega?

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera toh sab kuch khatam ho gaya hai. Woh Kandaghat court mein mera case chal raha tha na, 2008 se. Us aadmi ne meri family ke saath itna bada haadsa kiya tha. Gaadi itni tezi se chala raha tha ki logon ko chot lagi, ek jaan bhi chali gayi, aur usne toh saboot bhi chhupane ki koshish ki. Sochiyye Sir! Aur phir, 2010 mein, uss judge ne usko bari kar diya! Bari, Sir! Itne bade-bade jurm kiye the usne, phir bhi chhod diya! Mujhe toh laga ab insaaf kabhi nahi milega. Meri family ki haalat bahut kharab hai. Par ab suna hai ki is faisle ke khilaaf appeal file hui hai. Sir, please, meri madad kijiye. Mujhe uss gunahgar se insaaf chahiye. Woh toh free ghoom raha hai, aur hum yahan ro rahe hain.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karoon. Pehle ek judge sahab ne bina kisi baat ke mujhe convict kar diya tha, date thi 06.08.2008. Aur fir saza bhi suna di 12.08.2008 ko. Main toh begunah hoon! Maine socha appeal karunga toh insaaf milega. Maine Sessions Judge ke paas appeal ki thi, meri Criminal Appeal No.30/2008 thi, date 25.03.2009 ko, lekin wahan bhi meri suni nahi gayi. Unhone bhi wohi pehle waala judgment uphold kar diya. Ab sahab, main kahan jaaun? Sab taraf se mujhe hi galat thehraya ja raha hai. Mujhe galat saza mili hai, please meri madad karo.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun. Woh aadmi, jisne mere saath itna galat kiya tha, usko court ne pehle hi doshi thehra diya tha, 1999 mein. Chief Judicial Magistrate sahab ne usko saza sunayi thi, Criminal Case No. 187/97 mein. Uske baad usne appeal ki Sessions Court mein, Jalore mein. Par wahan bhi uski appeal reject ho gayi thi, 2001 mein. Sessions Judge sahab ne bhi uski appeal dismiss kar di aur meri jeet, mera insaaf confirm kiya tha. Ab woh phir se kuch naya kar raha hai, Sir. Pata nahi kya kar raha hai, magar woh abhi bhi saza se bachne ki koshish kar raha hai. Itne saalon se main bhatak raha hoon. Mujhe lagta hai insaaf mil gaya tha, par woh phir se takleef de raha hai. Please, meri madad karo. Woh jo doshi hai, usko ab toh saza milni chahiye.

Sir, main Pradeep Kumar hoon. Meri ek complaint hai. 04 November 2005 ki baat hai, subah ke 11:15 baje honge. Main apni scooter pe Main Rohtak Road se Jawalapuri Camp No.4 ki taraf jaa raha tha. Sab kuch theek tha, tabhi achanak ek gaadi waale ne itni laparwahi aur tez raftari se chalaya ki... meri aankhon ke saamne pura haadsa ho gaya. Uski galti ki wajah se ek bechaare ki jaan chali gayi. Woh Bhagwat Prasad tha, sir. Maine sab apni aankhon se dekha hai. Usne bilkul bhi road rules follow nahi kiye. Meri zindagi mein aisa kuch maine pehle kabhi nahi dekha. Mujhe uske khilaaf strict action chahiye, sir. Usne meri aankhon ke saamne ek jaan le li! Us laparwah driver ko saza milni chahiye. Please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, dekhiye na mere saath kya ho gaya! Meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi us din. Yeh baat hai 8 August 2010 ki, subah ke 8:30 baje the. Main Saidullajab mein, MB Road par, woh Tyre Shop ke saamne se jaa raha tha. Achanak se ek gaadi, jiska number DL-1PC-0548 tha, itni tez aur laparwahi se aayi ki meri toh saansein hi ruk gayi. Us driver ne bilkul meri jaan khatre mein daal di thi, itna rash drive kar raha tha. Saket PS ke area mein, uski wajah se meri safety risk mein aa gayi thi. Sir, aise logon ko toh pakadna chahiye, please us driver ke khilaaf action lijiye!

Saab ji, main Mohan Chand hoon. Meri ek complaint hai. Hua ye ki 7 April 2001 ki raat thi, kareeb 9:40 baje. Main aur mera dost Ram Pal, hum dono bus pakad rahe the. Woh bus thi na, DL-1PA-1203 number ki. Jaise hi hum usme chadne lage, pata nahi driver ne kaise gadi chalayi. Itni tezi aur laparwahi se chalayi ki... Ram Pal... woh toh gir gaya, Saab. Uske baad toh woh utha hi nahi. Rajiv Kumar tha woh driver. Meri aankhon ke saamne mera dost chala gaya. Saab, please usko saza milni chahiye. Meri FIR likho, Paschim Vihar police station mein.

Sir, main Sardar Maan Singh, yahan complain karne aaya hoon. Baat 21.12.2009 ki hai. Main aur mera dost Ranjeet Singh, hum dono apne scooter par ghar ja rahe the. Sab theek chal raha tha. Par phir ekdum se… ek haadsa ho gaya Sir. Mere dost Ranjeet ki, jo mera jigri yaar tha, uski jaan chali gayi us accident mein. Woh bechara ab nahi raha. Us din ki baat soch ke aaj bhi mera dil dukhta hai. Us aadmi ki galti thi jisne rash driving ki, uski laparwahi ki wajah se mera dost aaj zinda nahi hai. Mujhe bas mere dost ke liye insaaf chahiye, Sir. Jo zimmedar hai, usko saza milni chahiye. Meri FIR No. 64/09 PS Paschim Vihar mein darj hui thi.
