Sir, main aapko batana chahta hoon ki 30 November 2001 ki shaam thi, kareeb sava saat baje honge. Main apni TSR (HR-10PA-0301) lekar jaa raha tha Mata Mansa Devi Marg, Narela ke paas. Tabhi woh Sukhvir Singh, apni half body truck (HR-46A-3089) itni tez raftaar mein, aur woh bhi wrong side se lekar aa raha tha. Usne meri auto mein aisi takkar maari, Sir, ki meri toh jaan nikal gayi thi. Bilkul laprahi aur gusse se chala raha tha. Mujhe bahut gehri chot lagi hai, meri tabiyat aaj tak puri tarah theek nahi hui. Woh Sukhvir Singh driver ne meri zindagi mushkil kar di hai. Aisi harkat karne wale ko saza milni chahiye. Meri aapse vinti hai, Sir, uske khilaaf kadi kaarwai karo aur mujhe insaaf dilao.

Sir, main Manoj Kumar, Amar Singh ka beta, 16/904, H Block, Hardhyan Singh Road, Bapa Nagar, Karol Bagh se aaya hoon. Mujhe ek complaint likhwani hai, saahab. Meri naya phone chori ho gaya hai. Aaj subah main Karol Bagh market gaya tha kuch kaam se, aur pata nahi kab, meri jeb se kisi ne phone nikal liya. Abhi do mahine pehle hi liya tha woh Samsung ka phone, bahut mehnat ki kamai thi meri. Usmein mere saare zaroori numbers the, family ki photos thi, aur banking apps bhi the. Main bahut ghabra gaya hoon aur samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon. Kripya meri report likh lijiye aur kuch madad kijiye, saahab. Bahut meherbani hogi aapki.

Sir, main Banti ka bhai hoon. Mera bhai ab duniya mein nahi raha. Us truck waale Baldev Singh ne use maar daala, Sir. 8 December 2009 ki raat thi, kareeb 11:30 baje, MG Road ke paas, Fatehpur Beri thane ke area mein. Wo Baldev Singh apna truck (HR-69-0441) itni tezi aur laparwahi se chala raha tha. Usne mere bhai Banti ko, jo uska helper tha, usko gaadi se kuchal diya. Meri aankhon ke saamne mera bhai chala gaya, uski kya galti thi, Sir? Usne jaan bujh kar mere bhai ki jaan li hai. Mujhe insaaf chahiye. Please us Baldev Singh ko कड़ी se कड़ी saza dilwao.

Sir, meri baat suno please. Humari zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai. Mera Gopi Nath, mera sab kuch, ab nahi raha. Us kambakht bus (DL1PA0500) ke driver Rajender Kumar ne mera sab kuch cheen liya. 29 May 1998 ka din tha, jab yeh haadsa hua. Hamare HC Narender Pal saab ne toh us driver ko pakad liya tha, ussi din. Thank God! Lekin sir, mujhe darr lag raha hai. Kahin woh choot na jaaye. Mera Gopi Nath, woh toh vapas nahi aa sakta. Par usko insaaf toh milna chahiye na? Us Rajender Kumar ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Meri family, mere bachche... kaise jiyenge uske bina? Please, aap kuch kijiye sir. Humein nyay chahiye.

Sir, main Ashok Kumar hoon. Mujhe ek bahut zaroori complaint karni hai. Aaj, PS Moti Nagar area mein, mere saath ek bahut bura haadsa ho gaya hai. Main sadak par jaa raha tha, tabhi ek blue line bus, jiska number DL-1P-5992 aur route number 228 hai, uske driver ne mujhe takkar maar di. Uska naam Vijay Kumar hai, Sir. Woh itni tezi aur laaparwahi se bus chala raha tha ki usne mujhe kuchal diya. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, Sir, poori body mein dard ho raha hai. Yeh log aise hi logon ki jaan se khilwad karte hain. Kripya karke is Vijay Kumar ke khilaf sakht se sakht action lijiye, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye!

Sir, main bas yeh batane aaya hoon ki itne saalon baad finally humein thodi shanti mili hai. Meri family ke saath jo hua tha, woh FIR No. 165/98, Janak Puri police station ka case, jisme Bidhi Singh accused tha. Uski laaparwahi se mera apna, humse hamesha ke liye chhoot gaya tha, sir. Section 279 aur 304A IPC ke तहत case chala tha us par. Humne kitna suffer kiya hai, woh aap jaante hain. Saalon tak court ke chakkar kaate, bas insaaf ki ek umeed liye. Ab jaakar, Shri R. K. Tripathi saahab ki court ne, 22 July 2009 ko, Bidhi Singh ko guilty maana hai. Aur 4 August 2009 ko usko teen mahine ki saadhaaran jail ki saza mili hai. Main jaanta hoon, yeh kam hai uske gunah ke liye, par kam se kam, usko guilty toh maana gaya. Meri family ko itne samay baad thoda toh insaaf mila hai.

Sir, main Sunil Kumar... aap meri baat suniye, please. Aaj, matlab 5 May 2008 ko, subah kareeb 9 baje the. Main aur mera bada bhai, Manoj Kumar, hum dono Multan Nagar bus stand jaa rahe the, Azadpur ki bus pakadne. Jaise hi hum Rohtak Road Chowk, Multan Nagar pahunche na, Sir... ek dum se ek tez gaadi aayi aur mere bhai ko takkar maar di. Meri aankhon ke saamne hua sab! Mera bhai gir gaya, use bohot chot lagi... woh... woh ab nahi raha, Sir. Us driver ki galti thi, bilkul laparwah tha woh! Mere bhai ki kya galti thi? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, usne mere bhai ko maar diya... please, kuch kijiye.

Sir, main isliye aaya hoon yahan. Woh jo mera accident case tha na, Vasant Kunj North police station mein FIR hui thi meri, number 104/2018. Woh gaadi wala itni tezi se chala raha tha ki mujhe chot lag gayi thi, Sections 279 aur 337 IPC ke तहत. Ab pata chala hai ki woh court mein petition daal ke mera poora case hi band karwana chahte hain. Chargesheet bhi nahi file hone denge bol rahe hain! Sir, humne thoda bahut settlement kiya tha, kyunki hum gareeb log hain, kahan court ke chakkar kaatenge. Socha thoda compromise ho jaye toh theek hai. Par iska matlab ye thodi na ki mera poora case hi khatam ho jayega? Meri toh galti nahi thi na! Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir. Woh log apni galati chhupa kar bachna chahte hain. Meri suniye please.

Sir, main Naveen Kumar, aaj aapke paas ek bahut dukhi dil se aaya hoon. Yeh baat 10 July 2018 ki hai, dopahar ke lagbhag 2:30 baje ka time tha. Main aur mera dost Tanishq, hum dono school se Alipur apne ghar laut rahe the. Tanishq apni scooty (DL8S-CH-4926) chala raha tha aur main uske peeche baitha tha. Hum jaise hi Holambi se GT Karnal Road ke T-point par pahunche, Tanishq ne ek laaparwah gaadi ko apni taraf aate dekha aur usne apni scooty rok di. Lekin Sahab, woh gaadi itni speed mein thi ki usne humein buri tarah takkar maar di. Meri aankhon ke saamne Tanishq... woh wahin par... uski jaan chali gayi. Aur main bhi buri tarah zakhmi ho gaya hoon. Sir, mujhe insaaf chahiye, Tanishq ki maut ka badla aur mere zakhmon ka hisab. Please help me, Sir.

Sir, main aapko ye complaint karne aaya hoon. Meri toh duniya hi ujaad di usne! Yaad hai mujhe, 20 October 2014 ki subah, theek 8:30 baje Amrit Vihar Bus Stand pe, apne Swaroop Nagar PS area mein hi, ek car ne mere Suraj ko takkar maar di thi. Wo driver itna tezi aur laparwahi se chala raha tha, usko kisi ki jaan ki parwah hi nahi thi. DL-8SBK-9909 number ki gaadi thi woh. Usne mere Suraj ko aise maara ki meri aankhon ke saamne uski jaan chali gayi. Sir, mera sab kuch chhin gaya hai, main tab se bas insaaf ke liye bhatak raha hoon. Us gunehgar ko kadi se kadi saza milni chahiye. Please, Sir, mujhe justice dilwao.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya karun, kahan jaaun. Woh jo haadsa hua tha na, usmein meri gaadi ka pura nuksan ho gaya aur mujhe bhi chot lagi hai. Ab case court mein chal raha hai aur meri samajh mein kuch nahi aa raha. Driver-owner ki taraf se toh Advocate Prakash Kumar sahab hain. Aur insurance company ke liye Advocate S.K. Tyagi sahab hain. Upar se ek aur insurance company hai, uske liye Advocate Sujit Jaiswal sahab hain. Sab bade-bade lawyers hain, apni taraf se case kheenche ja rahe hain. Meri sunta hi koi nahi. Main toh ek aam aadmi hoon, kahan se itne paise laaun, kahan se itni

Sir, main Rajesh Kumar ki family se hoon. Mera pati/bhai Rajesh... uske saath bahut bura hua hai. Meri life tabah ho gayi hai. Woh bechara... 6-7 April 2015 ki raat ko, kareeb 12:23 baje, apni cycle pe jaa raha tha. Sirf 32 saal ka tha woh, Late Shri Makhan ka beta. Humara ghar chalta tha usse. Ab hum kaise jiyenge? Woh akela kamane wala tha. Ek road accident mein uski jaan chali gayi, Sir! Humare paas kuch nahi bacha. Please, Sir, humari help karo. Motor Vehicle Act ke under humein compensation dilwao. Humari sunwai karo, Sir. Hum bahut pareshan hain.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera toh dil toot gaya hai. Jisne mujhe itni buri tarah chot pahunchayi thi, woh aaj chhoot gaya hai. Meri FIR No. 15/2008, PS Chhawla mein darj hui thi, woh case jismein uspar IPC ki dhara 279 aur 338 lagi thi. Yaad hai woh 27 October 2008 ka din, shaam 4 baje, BSF Camp, Chhawla ke Gate No. 4 ke saamne mera accident hua tha. Usne mujhe itna dard diya, aur ab court ne usey 'benefit of doubt' dekar riha kar diya hai. Meri chot ka kya? Mera insaaf kahan gaya? Itne saal maine intezaar kiya, aur ab yeh? Mujhe toh samajh hi nahi aa raha, Sahab. Yeh kaisa insaaf hai?

Sir, main Suresh Kumar hoon, log mujhe Suresh Kashyap bhi kehte hain. Bade dukh se aapke paas aaya hoon, meri suniye please. Ye baat hai 6 April 2012 ki, raat ke kareeb 11 baje. Main apni Activa scooter (jiska number UP-14BF-7151 tha) par apne ghar, Ghaziabad ki taraf jaa raha tha. Tabhi raste mein mera ek bhayanak accident ho gaya, Sir. Mujhe itni chot lagi hai ki abhi tak theek se chal nahi pa raha. Meri family bahut pareshan hai. Aap se vinti hai, Motor Vehicle Act ke hisaab se, mujhe is haadse ka poora muawza milna chahiye. Mera bahut nuksaan hua hai, meri madad kijiye, Sir. Mera sab kuch ulajh gaya hai is accident ki wajah se.

Sir, woh jo Prem Kumar hai na, us truck driver ne meri zindagi tabah kar di hai! Pura case chal raha hai, lekin main toh pareshan hoon abhi tak. 12 January 2008 ki raat thi, kareeb 8:50 baje, main Keshav Puram mein Mother Dairy booth ke paas se apne scooter pe ja raha tha. Aur woh DL1GB2642 number ka truck itni tezi aur laaparwahi se chala raha tha ki usne seedha mere scooter ko takkar maar di. Meri kya galti thi, Sir? Us ek galti ki wajah se mujhe itni gehri chot lagi, mera toh haath bhi toot gaya tha. Ab tak dard hota hai. Mujhe us Prem Kumar se insaaf chahiye, Sir. Kab tak aise chalega? Please, usko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main aapko 10 June 1999 ke us haadse ke baare mein batana chahta hoon. Model Town mein, us din, Anil Kumar ne apni laparwahi se meri zindagi mushkil kar di thi. Ek jhagda hua, ya keh lo uski galti se main itna buri tarah zakhmi ho gaya. Mujhe bahut chot lagi thi, Sir, abhi tak dard hota hai. Police ko khabar mili thi, aur SI Sudhir Kumar apni team ke saath aaye the. Meri taraf se hi complaint gayi thi, aur FIR No. 300/99 bani thi us par. Section 279, 337, 338 IPC ke tehat. Sir, main bas itna chahta hoon ki mujhe insaaf mile. Usne jo kiya, uski saza milni chahiye. Meri family bahut pareshan hui hai uski wajah se.

Sir ji, dekhiye na, ye 5 September 2004 ki baat hai, dopahar ke theek 3:15 baje. Main Narela Alipur Road par, Joginder Nursery ke bilkul saamne, Holambi Kalan More par khada tha. Achanak se Hari Om naam ka ek driver, tempo DL-1LB-4811 lekar itni tezi aur laaparwahi se aaya ki meri toh jaan hi nikal gayi thi. Usne meri jaan aur personal safety ko khatre mein daal diya, Sir. Uski wajah se mujhe bahut buri chot lagi, abhi tak dard hota hai. Meri zindagi mushkil ho gayi hai us din ke baad. Uspe Section 279, 337, 338 IPC ke तहत case chal raha hai. Main bas itna chahta hoon ki usko uski galti ki poori saza mile, Sir. Aise logon ko chhodna nahi chahiye.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun... meri toh duniya hi ujad gayi. Woh 30 April 2005 ki baat hai. Mere pita ji, woh Rohtak Road se jaa rahe the, Super Bazar, Paschim Vihar ke bilkul saamne. Ek tempo wala, uska number tha DL-1LE-1476, itni tezi aur laaparwahi se chala raha tha ki kya bataun! Usne bilkul dhyan nahi diya aur mere pita ji ko seedha takkar maar di. Sir, woh itna buri tarah se laga ki mere pita ji wahin... wahin... unhone dum tod diya. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi unhe aise dekh kar. Woh driver ne hamari poori zindagi barbaad kar di. Usne insaani jaan ki koi parwah nahi ki. Mujhe us tempo driver ke khilaaf kadi se kadi kaarwai chahiye. Please, humein insaaf dilwaiye!

Sir, main Rajesh Kumar, Kanhaiya Nagar ka rehne wala hoon. Sir, aaj main aapko 19 February 2006 ki ek bahut buri ghatna ke baare mein batane aaya hoon, jo mere saath hui thi. Dopahar ke kareeb 3 baje, main Road No. 37 par, Kanhaiya Nagar Metro Station ke paas Red Light Point par khada tha. Wahan ek bike wala, jiska number DL 8SAD 2753 tha, itni tez aur laparwahi se aa raha tha, Sir! Woh poora daaru ke nashe mein tha. Meri toh jaan nikal gayi jab usne meri bike ko zor se takkar maar di. Main girte-girte bacha, Sir, meri jaan ko kitna khatra ho gaya tha. Meri bike ka bhi nuksaan ho gaya hai. Please, us aadmi ke khilaaf kuch action lo, Sir. Aise log road par kisi ki bhi jaan le sakte hain.

Sir, raat ko mere saath bahut bura hua hai. Meri baat suniye please. Ye 24 June 2003 ki subah 2 baje ki baat hai, main Laxmi Nagar mein Vikas Marg par Hathishaala ke saamne khada tha. Tabhi ek RTV wala, gaadi number DL1VA 3418, jiska naam Abhayjeet @ Anuj hai, woh itni rash aur negligent tarike se chala raha tha. Sir, usne hum do logon ko takkar maar di! Main aur mera ek dost, dono zakhmi ho gaye. Meri toh kamar mein bahut dard hai, chalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Woh apni gaadi leke humein kuchalta hua chala gaya. Sir, usne toh humari jaan le li hoti! Please uske khilaaf sakht action lo, humein insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main Raisuddin hoon. Mere saath bahut bura accident ho gaya hai. Aaj main apne scooter, jiska number DL8SM7545 hai, us par Zakhira Flyover Chowk ke paas Red Light se jaa raha tha. Ek bus, DL1P7563 number ki, usne mujhe badi zor se takkar maar di. Bus wale ki galti thi, Sir. Woh bahut fast driving kar raha tha. Mera scooter aur bus dono takkar ke baad wahin pade the. Mujhe bahut chot lagi hai, mere pair mein, haath mein. Logon ne mujhe turant Maharaja Agrasen Hospital, Punjabi Bagh pahunchaya. Abhi bhi mera ilaaj chal raha hai, mera medical bhi hua hai wahan. Main Inayat ka beta hoon. Please, us bus driver ke khilaaf sakht se sakht action lo, Sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, meri suniye. Woh Paramjeet Singh, jise aap logon ne 20 April ko pakda tha, woh ab bail maang raha hai! Sir, usne mere bhai ko maar diya tha (Section 302), aur mujhe bhi maarne ki koshish ki thi (Section 307). Usne hamari cheezein bhi todi (Section 427) aur saboot bhi mitane ki koshish ki thi (Section 201). Uske khilaaf Nalagarh Police Station mein FIR No. 86/2024 darj hai, Solan district mein. Woh toh 20 April se jail mein hai, aur ab sunne mein aaya hai ki woh court mein regular bail ke liye gaya hai (Section 483 ke under). Agar woh bahar aa gaya na, toh humara jeena mushkil ho jayega. Main aur mera parivaar bahut darre huye hain. Kripya uski bail rokne mein madad kijiye, Sir. Humein insaaf chahiye, woh bahar nahi aana chahiye.

Sir, main yahan isliye aaya hoon ki meri sunwai ho. Pata nahi kya chal raha hai mere case mein. Badi mushkil se toh 2006 mein Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate sahib ne uss gunehgar ko saza di thi, Bilaspur mein. Mujhe laga tha ab toh insaaf mil gaya. Phir usne appeal kar di, aur 2008 mein, Ghumarwin ke Sessions Judge sahib ne bhi meri hi baat suni aur uss saza ko barkaraar rakha. Meri itni mehnat, itne saal ki ladai... aur ab pata chala hai ki woh log phir se ek Criminal Revision Petition daal rahe hain! Yeh kya mazak hai sir? Jo judgment mere haq mein aaya tha, usko phir se challenge kar rahe hain. Meri zindagi barbaad kar di hai un logon ne aur ab bhi chain nahi lene de rahe. Kripya meri madad kijiye, sir.

Sir, main yahan apni fariyaad leke aaya hoon. Meri zindagi barbaad ho gayi hai sir. Saal 2003 mein, 25 August ko, shaam ke kareeb 4 baje, mera accident hua tha. Usme mujhe bohot chot lagi thi. Maine socha insaaf milega, toh Motor Vehicles Act ke Section 166 ke तहत ek claim petition file kiya tha Hisar ke Tribunal mein. Pura 4 saal ho gaye ghoomte-ghoomte, aur abhi pichle saal 13 January 2007 ko unhone meri petition dismiss kar di! Mera claim hi reject kar diya. Sir, itne saal se main bas court ke chakkar laga raha hoon, aur ab yeh sunne ko mil raha hai? Meri koi galti nahi thi, phir bhi mujhe justice nahi mil raha. Kahan jaaun main ab? Meri madad kijiye, sir. Mujhe insaaf chahiye.

Sir, main aapke paas ek complain leke aaya hoon. Mera ek accident hua tha, usmein meri koi galti nahi thi. Jab compensation ke liye case chala, toh Gangtok ki MACT court ne mera case galat section mein daal diya, Sir. Maine toh Section 166 ke tehat claim kiya tha, jismein pura haq milta hai, lekin unhone pata nahi kyun Section 163A laga diya. Usmein toh kam paisa milta hai aur mere case ko halka kar diya. ₹5,00,000 diye zaroor hain, par agar galat section laga ke mila hai toh mujhe lagta hai ki mere saath insaaf nahi hua. Meri toh poori life disturb ho gayi hai, Sir. Mujhe mere haq ka pura insaaf chahiye. Kya aise hi mamla nipta denge? Meri madad karo, Sir.

Sir, main complain karne aaya hoon! Meri toh duniya ujad gayi hai, aur ab woh log compromise ki baat kar rahe hain? Meri family ke ek member ki jaan chali gayi us haadse mein! Woh Badsar mein 21 July 2023 ko hua tha, FIR No. 104, Sections 279, 337, 304A mein darj hui thi us driver ke khilaaf, Police Station Badsar, District Hamirpur mein. Mere apne ko kho diya maine uski laaparwahi ki wajah se, aur ab woh case quash karwana chahta hai? Amicable settlement? Kaisa settlement? Meri zindagi ka nuksaan kaun bharega? Mujhe insaaf chahiye Sir, koi compromise nahi. Meri suno, please, us FIR ko quash mat hone dena. Usko saza milni chahiye!

Sir, main wohi Ramu hoon, jiska pichle saal 24 August 2020 ko Jawali mein woh bada accident hua tha. Yaad hai aapko? Woh tez raftaar gaadi waale ne meri kya haalat kar di thi! Meri gaadi toot gayi thi aur mujhe bahut buri chot lagi thi. Maine aapke police station mein FIR karayi thi (FIR No. 129/2020), sections 279, 337, 338 IPC ke tahat. Meri chot abhi tak theek se bhari nahi hai, aur ab mujhe pata chala hai ki woh log apni FIR quash karwane ke liye court chale gaye hain! Matlab, woh case hi khatam karwana chahte hain. Yeh toh sarasar ghalat hai, Sir! Meri takleef ka kya? Meri family ne kitna suffer kiya hai. Unhe saza milni chahiye, woh aise bach nahi sakte. Mujhe insaaf chahiye, Sir, please meri madad kijiye.

Sir, main bahut pareshan hoon. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai mere case mein. Bodh Raj naam ka woh aadmi, jisne mere saath galat kiya tha, usko pehle Judicial Magistrate Court ne 15.11.2022 ko convict kiya tha, saza bhi mili thi 24.11.2022 ko. Humey laga chalo ab insaaf mil gaya. Par woh toh upar Additional Sessions Judge, Shimla wale Court mein appeal kar diya. Wahan bhi 07.06.2023 ko uski appeal reject ho gayi, Court ne hamare favour mein decision diya, uski conviction confirm ho gayi. Humey thodi tasalli mili. Ab pata chala hai ki woh phir se us judgment ko challenge kar raha hai, yeh Section 397 Cr.P.C. ka petition daal diya hai. Sir, yeh kab tak chalega? Main aur mera parivaar bahut thak chuke hain. Mujhe kab milega pura insaaf? Har baar woh naya appeal daal deta hai. Kuch toh kijiye Sir.

Sir, woh 19 November 2005 ki baat hai. Raat ke saade aath baje ka waqt tha, tabhi woh haadsa hua. Humne toh turant apne zakhmi ko Maski Vijay Nursing Home mein bharti karaya. Phir humne jaise-taise police ko khabar di. Kashi Vishwanath sahab, jo tab PSI the, woh turant hospital aaye. Unhone meri saari baat suni, mera statement record kiya, sir, woh Ex.P.1 mein hai. Uske baad woh police station jaakar case register kiye. Agle din, 20 November ko, woh accident spot par bhi gaye the. Sir, wahan mere saamne hi dead body ka panchanama banaya gaya. Meri toh duniya hi ujaad gayi, sir. Kya bataun aapko?

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, mera toh jeena mushkil ho gaya hai. Jab charge-sheet file hui, Kalaburagi ke judge saab ne finally case ko dekha toh thodi umeed bandhi thi. Accused ko pakda bhi gaya tha. Par sir, usko bail mil gayi! Woh khule ghoom raha hai. Court mein uss par saare ilzaam lagaye gaye, judge saab ne ek-ek baat padh ke sunayi, par woh kameena bola ki usne kuch nahi kiya aur bola ki case chalao. Humari taraf se, sir, 11 gawah pesh kiye gaye, 18 saboot bhi diye. Humne toh sab kuch clear kar diya hai. Ab toh uss accused se bhi sawaal poochhe gaye hain. Main bas insaaf chahti hoon, sir. Yeh sab dekh kar mera dil baitha jaa raha hai.

Sir, main aapko kya bataun, meri kya haalat hui hai. Jab maine FIR karayi thi na, toh police walon ne bohot achche se jaanch ki, poori investigation. Phir jaldi hi charge sheet bhi laga di thi. Uske baad, us gunehgar ko court mein bulaya gaya, usne apni safai di. Lekin Sir, usne apna gunaah maana hi nahi! Woh toh bolta hai, maine kuch kiya hi nahi. Phir kya tha, poora trial chala. Humari taraf se 7 gawahon ne apni gawahi di, aur saare proofs, jo documents the, woh bhi dikhaye court mein. Judge sahab ne sab proofs ko theek mana hai, accept kar liya. Ab humari taraf se saari baat ho chuki hai, ab us accused ki baari hai bolne ki.

Aaj shaam kareeb 8 baje, main Shiv Nagar ke Ramesh Tea Stall par khada tha. Mera Rahul se ek chhoti si baat par jhagda ho gaya. Dekhte hi dekhte, Rahul ne apne 3-4 dosto, jinke naam Amit aur Vicky hain, unhe bula liya. Un sab ne milkar mujhe gher liya aur bina kisi wajah ke maarpeet shuru kar di. Rahul ne mera collar pakda, Amit ne mujhe ghunsa maara aur Vicky ne mere pairon par lathi se waar kiya. Un sab ka iraada mujhe buri tarah se peetna tha. Mere chehre par chot lagi hai aur kapde bhi phat gaye hain. Mujhse bachkar bhaagne ka mauka bhi nahi mila. Please in sab ke khilaf sakht karwayi karein.

Kal raat kareeb 10:30 baje, main ABC Park ke paas wali andheri gali se jaa raha tha. Achanak se teen anjaan ladko ne meri raah rok li. Unme se ek ne mere gale par chaku rakh diya aur doosre ne mera wallet aur mobile phone chheenna shuru kar diya. Teesra unhe cover kar raha tha aur mujhe dhamka raha tha ki agar awaaz nikali toh jaan se maar denge. Sab ne milkar mujhe daraaya aur meri saari cheezein chheen li. Wo teeno ek hi maksad se aaye the. Un sab ki tasveerein toh nahi hain, par main unhe pehchan sakta hoon agar samne aaye. Mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai, kripya meri madad karein.

Mai ek college student hu. Aaj shaam 6 baje ke kareeb, main Durga Mandir ke paas market se guzar rahi thi. Wahan Rohan, Deepak aur do aur ladke khade the. Un sab ne mujhe dekhte hi gande comments pass karna shuru kar diya aur mere peeche aane lage. Jab maine protest kiya, toh Rohan ne mera haath pakadne ki koshish ki aur Deepak ne mere baalon ko kheench liya. Sab milkar mujhe harass kar rahe the aur public mein sharminda kar rahe the. Main bahut darr gayi thi aur kisi tarah wahan se nikal paayi. Un sab ka intention mujhe pareshan karna aur badtameezi karna tha. Please un sab ke khilaf action lo.

Meri Commercial Road par ek mobile shop hai. Aaj subah jab main apni dukaan kholne aaya, toh dekha ki dukaan ka shutter aur kaanch tode hue the. Andar samaan bhi bikhera hua tha aur kuch display models bhi gayab the. Raat kareeb 2 baje ke aas-paas, mere padosi ne kuch awaazein suni thi. Mujhe shak hai ki Pappu, Golu aur unke 2-3 saathi, jinke saath meri purani dushmani hai, unhone milkar yeh kaam kiya hai. Unhone jaan boojhkar meri dukaan ko nuksaan pahunchaya hai taaki main unse darr kar dukaan band kar doon. Un sab ka maksad meri properties ko damage karna tha. Please jaanch karein.

Mai ek chhote business ka owner hu. Pichle kuch dino se Bittu Bhai aur unke do teen gunde, jinke naam Kaliya aur Raju hain, mujhe pareshan kar rahe hain. Aaj dopahar 2 baje, wo sab mere office mein ghus aaye. Unhone mujhse 'protection money' maangi aur kaha ki agar nahi di toh mere office mein tod-phod kar denge. Bittu Bhai ne mujhe collar se pakda aur Kaliya ne mujhe dhamki di. Un sab ka pura irada mujhse jabardasti paise nikalwana tha. Mai bahut tense hu aur darr raha hu. Meri jaan ko bhi khatra hai. Please unke khilaf complaint darj karein.

Aaj dopahar 4:30 baje ke kareeb, main apni car se NH-8 ke flyover exit se nikal raha tha. Ek aur car ne mujhe galat tareeke se cut kiya aur meri car ko halka sa scratch lag gaya. Jab maine unhe roka, toh us car se 3-4 log utre. Unhone aate hi mujh par hamla kar diya. Ek ne mujhe collar se pakda, doosre ne mere chehre par ghunsa maara aur teesre ne mujhe zameen par girakar kick kiya. Un sab ne milkar mujhe bahut peeta. Un sab ka intention mujhe maarna aur dukh pahunchana tha. Wo sab ek doosre ko support kar rahe the. Meri car mein bhi thoda damage hua hai. Kripya inke khilaf karwayi karein.

Mai apni general store chalaata hu. Aaj subah kareeb 11 baje, do auratein meri dukaan mein aayi. Unhone aate hi mujhse bahut saare alag-alag samaan ke baare mein poochhna shuru kar diya, jaise ki mera dhyaan bhatak jaaye. Ek aurat ne mujhe lagaatar busy rakha, jabki doosri aurat chupchap ek side mein gayi aur wahan se kuch expensive chocolates aur chips ke packets utha kar apne bag mein daal liye. Un dono ka maksad clearly mujhe divert karke chori karna tha. Jab maine baad mein CCTV footage dekhi, toh unki saari harkat record ho gayi. Yeh ek organised chori thi. Kripya inke khilaf action lein.

Humara Sonepat gaon mein ek khet hai jo humari ancestral property hai. Aaj subah 10 baje, Suresh, Rajesh aur unke 4-5 aur aadmi, ek tractor aur lathiyon ke saath wahan aa gaye. Unhone aate hi humari boundary wall todna shuru kar diya aur kehne lage ki yeh zameen ab unki hai. Jab maine aur mere bhai ne unhe rokne ki koshish ki, toh Suresh ne mujhe lathi dikha kar dhamki di aur Rajesh ne mere bhai ko dhakka de diya. Un sab ka iraada humari zameen par kabza karna aur humein darana tha. Wo sab milkar yeh illegal kaam kar rahe the. Please unhe rokein aur humari madad karein.

Pichli raat kareeb 9 baje, main apne bhai ke saath local mela ground gaya tha. Wahan kuch ladke, jo sharaab piye hue the, bahut shor sharaba kar rahe the aur logon ko pareshan kar rahe the. Jab mere bhai ne unhe shant rehne ko kaha, toh unhone achanak se mere bhai par hamla kar diya. Paanch-chhah ladke the, unme se ek ne mere bhai ka gala pakda, doosre ne uske pet mein punch kiya aur baaki sab ne use zameen par girakar maarna shuru kar diya. Un sab ka intention mere bhai ko chot pahunchana aur public disturbance create karna tha. Mera bhai abhi hospital mein hai. Kripya un sab ke khilaf sakht karwayi karein.

Aaj dopahar 3 baje ke kareeb, main Railway Station ke paas ATM se paise nikal kar bahar aaya. Wahan mujhe do aadmi mile, ek mota aur ek patla. Mote wale ne mujhe ek 'lucky draw' ticket dikhayi aur kaha ki mujhe 50,000 ka prize mila hai. Patle wale ne kaha ki wo meri madad karega prize claim karne mein, but uske liye processing fee deni hogi. Un dono ne milkar mujhe baaton mein uljhaya aur kaha ki mere ATM card se ₹5000 nikal kar dene honge verification ke liye, jo refund ho jayenge. Maine unhe paise diye aur wo dono paise lekar gayab ho gaye. Unka maksad milkar mujhe dhokha dena tha. Please in dhokebaazon ko pakdein.

Aaj subah kareeb 10 baje, main apni kheti dekhne gaya tha. Wahan maine dekha ki Rakesh, Sharmaji aur unke do-teen aadmi mere plot par nishaan laga rahe hain. Jab maine unse poocha, toh Rakesh ne gusse mein kaha ki yeh zameen ab unki hai. Pichle hafte, maine unhe ek chai ki dukaan par suna tha, woh log keh rahe the ki kaise mere purane papers ko fake banakar meri zameen hadap lenge. Unhone planning ki hai mere purvajon ki zameen illegally apne naam karne ki. Mujhe unse apni jaan ka bhi khatra hai, aur meri zameen ka bhi. Kripya is matter ko investigate karein aur mujhse insaaf dilayein.

Mujhe aapko ek bade financial fraud ke baare mein batana hai. Pichle 6 mahine se, Mr. Gupta aur unki company 'Future Investments' ne mujhe aur kai logon ko high returns ka lalach dekar hazaron-lakhon rupay invest karwaye hain. Kal raat, kareeb 9:30 baje, main unke office ke paas se guzar raha tha toh maine Mr. Gupta aur do aur logon ko andar baat karte suna. Woh keh rahe the ki 'ab sab paise ikatthe ho gaye hain, agle mahine company band kar denge aur gayab ho jayenge'. Unki awaaz se saaf lag raha tha ki yeh sab ek sochi samjhi saazish hai. Main apna savings aur logon ka paisa bachaana chahta hoon. Kripya unke khilaf turant action lein.

Mai apni shop band karke ghar jaa raha tha, kareeb raat ke 11 baje, tabhi maine apni gali ke nukkad par Kalia, Munna aur Chotu ko ek purani factory ke paas khade dekha. Unki baatein sunkar mere hosh udd gaye. Woh log discuss kar rahe the ki kaise Agrawal Jewellers mein robbery karni hai. Kalia bol raha tha 'agale Somwar raat ko 2 baje, jab guards change hote hain, tab best time hai'. Unhone raste aur escape plan bhi discuss kiya. Mujhe darr hai ki woh sach mein robbery kar denge. Main unki is saazish ko rokna chahta hoon. Kripya turant karyawahi karein.

Meri aap se request hai ki aap mere business partner Rahul aur uske do gundon ke khilaf complaint darj karein. Pichle kuch dino se Rahul mujhse mera business share hadapne ki koshish kar raha hai. Teen din pehle, sham 7 baje, maine usse aur do anjaan logon ko hamare godown ke piche baat karte dekha. Rahul keh raha tha, 'Agar woh nahi mana, toh uske bachon ko utha lenge'. Unhone planning ki hai ki kaise mujhse paise nikalein aur mera business chheen lein. Unki baaton se saaf lag raha tha ki woh mujhe aur mere parivaar ko nuksaan pahunchane ki saazish kar rahe hain. Main bohot darr gaya hoon.

Main ek warehouse mein supervisor hoon. Pichle hafte, maine apne senior Mr. Singh ko do anjaan logon ke saath raat 11 baje office mein chori-chupe baat karte dekha. Unki baaton se laga ki woh log warehouse ko illegal cheezon ki smuggling ke liye use karne ki planning kar rahe hain. Maine Mr. Singh ko kehte suna, 'Iss consignment ko raat mein nikalna hoga, koi shaq nahi hona chahiye'. Unki baatein poori tarah se suspicious thi aur lag raha tha ki woh koi badi saazish kar rahe hain. Mujhe darr hai ki agar yeh plan successful ho gaya toh main bhi musibat mein pad jaunga. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein.

Main Priya, aapko ek serious matter report karna chahti hoon. Meri friend Priya ne mujhe bataya ki usne hamare coaching centre ke owner, Agarwal Sir, ko do aur teachers ke saath baat karte suna. Woh log agle mahine hone wale government exam ke papers leak karne ki planning kar rahe the. Pichle mangalwar, sham 6 baje, coaching ke cabin mein Priya ne suna ki Agarwal Sir keh rahe the 'humne deal final kar li hai, papers Sunday tak mil jayenge, phir unhe high rates par bechna hai'. Mujhe yakeen hai ki yeh ek bahut badi criminal conspiracy hai jo students ke future ke saath khilwad karegi. Kripya is par turant action lein.

Main ek software engineer hoon. Mere ex-colleague Sameer ne do din pehle, dopahar 2 baje, mujhe coffee shop mein milkar ek offer diya. Usne bola ki woh aur uski team meri current company ke client database ko hack karne ki planning kar rahe hain aur usne mujhe bhi isme shaamil hone ko kaha. Maine mana kar diya toh usne dhamki di. Usne pura plan bataya ki kaise woh log system mein ghusenge aur confidential data churayenge. Usne kaha ki uske paas aur bhi log hain jo is saazish mein shaamil hain. Mujhe darr hai ki woh meri company ko bahut bada nuksaan pahuncha sakte hain. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein.

Kal shaam, kareeb 7:30 baje, main apni colony ke bahar chai ki tapri par khada tha. Wahan maine Billa aur Jaggu ko do aur logon ke saath baatein karte suna. Woh log ek bade businessman Mr. Sharma ke chote bete ko kidnap karne ki planning kar rahe the. Billa keh raha tha, 'Bachche ko school bus se uthayenge aur uske baad ransom call karenge'. Unhone escape route aur paise ki bhi baat ki. Mujhe lagta hai ki yeh ek bahut badi aur khatarnak saazish hai. Agar police ne action nahi liya toh ek masoom ki jaan khatre mein pad sakti hai. Kripya unke khilaf sakht karyawahi karein.

Main apne college ka student representative hoon. Mujhe mere dost Rajesh ne bataya hai ki do din pehle, sham 5 baje, usne aur uske group ne ek meeting ki thi. Woh log hamare college ke Annual Fest mein gadbad karne aur property ko nuksaan pahunchane ki planning kar rahe hain. Rajesh ne bataya ki unhone decide kiya hai ki kaise stage todna hai aur sound system kharab karna hai. Unka maksad sirf dange karna aur mahaul kharab karna hai. Yeh sab ek sochi samjhi saazish hai hamare fest ko barbaad karne ki. Kripya is par dhyaan dein aur koi karyawahi karein taaki humara fest peacefully ho sake.

Main aapko ek badi political conspiracy ke baare mein batana chahta hoon. Aaj subah, kareeb 11 baje, main apne ghar ke paas se guzar raha tha toh maine Sharmaji, Vermaji aur local candidate Mr. Tyagi ko ek band kamre mein baat karte suna. Woh log aane wale elections mein vote rigging ki planning kar rahe the. Sharmaji keh raha tha, 'Hum fake voter IDs banayenge aur booth par apne aadmi bithayenge'. Mr. Tyagi bhi unki baat se sehmat the aur keh rahe the ki 'kitne paise lagenge officials ko bribe karne mein'. Yeh log loktantra ke saath khilwad kar rahe hain. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein aur unke khilaf sakht action lein.

Main Rajesh Kumar s/o Shri Premchand, resident of C-20, Vaishali Nagar, Jaipur, aaj yeh complaint darj karwane aaya hoon. Pichle hafte, Tuesday sham kareeb 7 baje, main apne dost Amit ke saath Civil Lines ke ek cafe mein baitha tha. Wahan maine Rahul Sharma aur uske do saathi, jinka naam Amit aur Priya hai, ko baatein karte suna. Woh log ek fake online job consultancy scheme plan kar rahe the jahan woh logo se registration fees aur processing charges ke naam par paisa lootne wale the. Unhone discuss kiya ki kaise woh website banayenge aur fake offer letters denge. Mujhe darr hai ki woh kayi logo ko thag lenge. Meri aapse request hai ki is mamle ki jaanch ki jaaye aur doshiyon ke khilaaf kadi karwahi ki jaaye.

Main Meena Devi w/o Late Shri Ramu Prasad, niwasi Gali No. 5, Mohalla Shivpur, Varanasi, aaj yeh FIR darj karwana chahti hoon. Humari ancestral zameen ka ek tukda hai jisko lekar pichle kuch mahino se Sharma ji (padosi) aur Verma ji (ek property dealer) ki niyat kharab hai. Pichle Sunday subah kareeb 10:30 baje, maine apne ghar ki khidki se dekha ki woh dono humare plot ke paas ek chai ki dukaan par khade kuch documents dekh rahe the aur dheere-dheere baat kar rahe the. Maine suna ki woh log jaali kagaz banwa kar meri zameen ko illegally apne naam karwane ki saazish kar rahe hain. Main bahut pareshan hoon. Kripya is mamle mein turant karwahi karein.

Main Deepak Singh s/o Shri Karan Singh, resident of H.No. 12, Shakti Nagar, Delhi, yeh report likhwana chahta hoon. Kal raat kareeb 11 baje main apni bike park kar raha tha, tab maine ek sunsaan gali mein char logon ko baat karte dekha. Woh log bade hi shaatir tareeke se ATM skimming device install karne ki planning kar rahe the. Maine unhein Sunita Vihar aur Lajpat Nagar ke ATMs ke baare mein baat karte suna. Unke paas kuch chote electronic devices bhi the. Woh aam logon ke bank account se paise churane ki saazish kar rahe hain. Mujhe unka irada theek nahi laga. Meri aap se guzaarish hai ki jaldi se jaldi is mamle ki jaanch karein aur unhe pakdein.

Main Rohan Verma s/o Shri Alok Verma, resident of Flat No. 301, Ganga Apartments, Patna, complaint karne aaya hoon. Main ek sarkari exam ki taiyari kar raha hoon. Pichle Friday sham 6 baje, main apne dost ke saath 'Success Point' coaching institute ke bahar khada tha. Andar se maine coaching ke owner Mr. Gupta ko kisi sarkari afsar se phone par baat karte suna. Woh log upcoming Constable Bharti exam ka paper leak karne ki planning kar rahe the. Maine suna 'paper kal shaam tak mil jayega' aur 'rate final ho gaya hai'. Yeh sunkar main hairan reh gaya. Hazaron mehnat karne wale students ka future barbaad ho jayega. Meri aapse prarthana hai ki is saazish ko rokein aur doshiyon ko saza dein.

Main Sanjay Gupta s/o Shri Ramesh Gupta, resident of Shop No. 7, Main Market, Ghaziabad, aaj aapki sharan mein aaya hoon. Pichle do din se kuch local gunde, Bittu aur Sonu, meri dukaan ke paas chakkar laga rahe hain. Kal shaam kareeb 8:30 baje, maine unhe apne saath teesre aadmi, jiska naam Rinku hai, ke saath meri dukaan ke saamne wali gali mein baatein karte suna. Woh log meri dukaan se hafta vasoolne ki planning kar rahe the aur agar maine paisa nahi diya toh meri family ko nuksan pahunchane ki dhamki dene ki baat kar rahe the. Main bahut darr gaya hoon. Meri family ki suraksha khatre mein hai. Kripya unke khilaaf sakht karwahi karein.

Main Aarti Sharma d/o Shri Satish Sharma, resident of 15-B, Green Park, Bhopal, yeh report darj karwa rahi hoon. Main ek choti si tailoring unit chalati hoon. Pichle mahine, mere cousin Rajesh aur uske dost Deepak ne mujhe ek proposal diya tha ki hum branded kapdo ki copy banakar bechein. Pehle toh mujhe laga yeh theek hai, par phir mujhe pata chala ki woh sirf kapde nahi, electronic items aur ghadiyan bhi counterfeit karne ki planning kar rahe the ek gupt godown mein. Unhone mujhe bataya ki woh kaise duplicate labels banayenge. Mujhe laga yeh illegal hai aur brand owners ka nuksaan hoga. Main is saazish ka hissa nahi banna chahti. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein.

Main Suraj Kumar s/o Shri Brijesh Kumar, resident of House No. 10, Ram Nagar, Lucknow, yeh complaint darj karwana chahta hoon. Kal raat kareeb 9:45 baje main apne ghar ke bahar khada tha tab maine teen aadmiyon, jisme se ek Kale Bhai ke naam se jaana jata hai, ko ek sunsaan jagah par khade dekha. Woh log apni gaadi chori karne ki planning kar rahe the. Maine suna ki woh 'Saket Nagar' se kuch specific models ki cars uthane wale the aur unhein ek gaon ke mechanic ke paas dismantle karne ki baat kar rahe the. Mujhe laga yeh ek bada vehicle theft ring ho sakta hai. Meri aapse vinti hai ki is gang ko pakda jaye.

Main Preeti Malik d/o Shri Anand Malik, resident of Flat 402, Shivam Enclave, Gurgaon, complaint darj karwane aayi hoon. Main ek private bank mein kaam karti hoon. Pichle hafte, mere office ke ek pehle employee Ritesh aur uska dost Sanjeev, jo abhi bhi bank mein kaam karta hai, mujhe ek scheme mein shamil hone ke liye keh rahe the. Unhone mujhe bataya ki woh kaise logon ke identity documents churakar ya farzi banakar fake bank accounts kholenge. Unka irada tha ki in accounts ka istemal online fraud aur money laundering ke liye kiya jayega. Main bahut ghabra gayi. Meri aapse request hai ki is saazish ko rokein aur in logon ke khilaaf kadi karwahi karein.

Main Vivek Tiwari s/o Shri Satish Tiwari, resident of C-12, University Road, Delhi, yeh report likhwana chahta hoon. Main Delhi University ka student hoon. Pichle do din se main Vicky aur Sunny, jo humare college ke bahar aksar dikhte hain, ko college ke paas wale park mein kuch anjaan logon se milte dekh raha hoon. Kal shaam kareeb 5:30 baje, maine unhe ek jhund mein baatein karte suna. Woh log bade paimane par drugs (charas aur ganja) college area mein distribute karne ki planning kar rahe the. Unhone delivery points aur amounts ke baare mein baat ki. Mujhe darr hai ki isse college ke kayi students ki zindagi barbaad ho jayegi. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein aur doshiyon ko pakdein.

Main Anil Sharma s/o Shri Gopal Sharma, resident of Shop No. 3, New Market, Ludhiana, aaj aapki help ke liye aaya hoon. Meri apni hardware ki dukaan hai. Pichle mahine se mera competitor Suresh aur uske do saathi meri dukaan ko nuksan pahunchane ki saazish kar rahe hain. Mere employee ne pichle Thursday raat kareeb 10 baje Suresh ko do anjaan aadmiyon ke saath meri dukaan ke paas baat karte dekha. Usne suna ki woh meri dukaan par electrical short circuit karwake ya fir uske shutters todkar mera business kharab karne ki planning kar rahe the. Main isse bahut pareshan hoon aur mera business khatre mein hai. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein aur doshiyon ke khilaaf karwahi karein.

Main, Rajesh Kumar, S/o Shri Om Prakash, resident of House No. 123, Sector 7, Palwal, Haryana, aapko yeh complaint darj karana chahta hoon. Pichle kuch dino se mujhe shak hai ki mere padosi Ramesh aur Suresh milkar meri purani ancestral zameen par illegal kabza karne ki saazish kar rahe hain. Kal raat, kareeb 10:30 PM par, main apne ghar ki chat par tha tab maine unhe apni deewar ke paas khade hokar dheere-dheere baat karte hue suna. Wo keh rahe the ki kaise mere Mumbai jaane ke baad wo papers banwa kar us zameen ko apne naam karwa lenge. Main bahut ghabra gaya hoon. Kripya is mamle ki jaanch karein aur meri zameen ko surakshit rakhein.

Main, Neha Sharma, D/o Shri Prakash Sharma, resident of Flat No. 401, Sapphire Apartments, Gurugram, yeh complaint likh rahi hoon. Pichle do mahine se Amit aur Pooja naam ke do log, jo khud ko 'Global Investment Solutions' ka bata rahe hain, mujhe ek high-return investment scheme mein paisa lagane ke liye force kar rahe hain. Unhone mujhe kai baar coffee shop (DLF Cyber Hub) mein bulaya hai aur bade-bade sapne dikhaye hain. Kal, 3 PM par, Amit ne phone par kaha ki agar maine aaj paisa nahi lagaya toh offer chala jayega. Mujhe ab pakka lag raha hai ki yeh koi conspiracy hai mujhe financially cheat karne ki. Unke documents bhi fake lag rahe hain. Kripya is dhokhadhadi ki jaanch karein.

Main, Sameer Gupta, S/o Shri Alok Gupta, owner of 'Tech Innovate Solutions', resident of Vasant Kunj, Delhi, yeh FIR darj karana chahta hoon. Mujhe pakka vishwas hai ki mere do ex-employees, Rohan aur Meera, mere business ko barbaad karne ki saazish kar rahe hain. Pichle hafte, maine dekha ki Rohan aur Meera, jo ab mere competitor Mr. Gupta ki company mein hain, mere naye product launch ki confidential details discuss kar rahe the ek restaurant (Connaught Place, 8 PM). Mere kuch clients bhi bina kisi reason ke mujhe chhod kar chale gaye hain. Mujhe lagta hai wo sab milkar meri company ko nuksaan pahunchana chahte hain. Kripya karke is mamle ki gehri jaanch karein.

Main, Pooja Singh, D/o Shri Ram Singh, resident of C-5, Ganesh Nagar, Delhi, aapko apni jaan ke khatre ke baare mein batana chahti hoon. Main aksar apne ilake mein chal rahi illegal activities ke khilaaf awaz uthati hoon. Pichle hafte, maine Bittu aur uske do saathi (jinhe main naam se nahi jaanti, par chehre se pehchan sakti hoon) ko mere ghar ke paas, gali ke mod par (shaam 7 PM ke kareeb), mujhe nuksan pahuchane ki planning karte hue suna. Unhone kaha ki 'ise sabak sikhana padega'. Mujhe lagta hai wo meri jaan ko khatra hai aur wo mujhe physical harm pahuchane ki conspiracy kar rahe hain. Kripya turant action lein.

Main, Ravi Kumar, S/o Shri Krishan Kumar, resident of A-10, Raj Nagar, Noida, yeh complaint kar raha hoon. Mera beta ek bade entrance exam ki taiyari kar raha hai. Pichle kuch dino se mujhe shak hai ki Mr. Aggarwal, jo 'Success Coaching Centre' ke owner hain, aur kuch unknown log milkar exam paper leak karne ki conspiracy kar rahe hain. Kal raat, kareeb 11 PM par, maine Aggarwal sir ke coaching centre ke bahar kuch logo ko suspicious tarike se documents exchange karte dekha. Mere bete ke ek dost ne bhi bataya ki andar 'setting' ki baat chal rahi hai. Mujhe lagta hai yeh mere bete aur hazaron students ke future ke saath dhokha hai. Kripya jaanch karein.

Main, Suman Devi, W/o Shri Anand Prakash, resident of House No. 22, Shastri Market, Indore, yeh complaint darj karana chahti hoon. Aaj subah, kareeb 9 AM par, main apne ghar ke bahar baithe akhbaar padh rahi thi. Tab maine dekha ki do anjaan log (ek lambe kad ka, doosra chhota aur mota) hamari market ki sabse badi 'Maharaja Jewellers' shop ke samne khade hokar uski reiki kar rahe the. Maine unhe dheere se 'Aaj raat 2 baje, sab ready rakhna' aur 'koi problem nahi aani chahiye' jaise baatein karte suna. Mujhe pakka lag raha hai ki wo shop mein chori ki saazish kar rahe hain. Meri shop bhi paas hi hai, main darr gayi hoon. Kripya turant karwayi karein.

Main, Anil Singh, S/o Shri Gopal Singh, resident of Ward No. 5, Kanpur, ek samaj sevak hoon. Main aapko batana chahta hoon ki agle mahine hone wale local elections se pehle, mere political rivals Vijay aur Sanjay ek gehri saazish kar rahe hain meri reputation ko kharab karne ki. Pichle Sunday, kareeb 6 PM par, ek community meeting mein (Ganga Hall), unhone mere khilaaf jhooti afwah failane ka plan banaya. Ek vishwasniya srot ne mujhe bataya ki wo logon ko bhadka rahe hain aur illegal tareeke se elections ko influence karna chahte hain. Mujhe darr hai ki meri aur mere parivaar ki image kharab ho jayegi. Kripya is matter ko investigate karein.

Main, Rohan Mehta, S/o Shri Rajesh Mehta, resident of Block C, Green Valley Society, Pune, yeh complaint darj kar raha hoon. Pichle kuch dino se Malik Builders ke log aur kuch local goons hamari society ke paas wale public park (subah 11 baje ke kareeb) mein aakar ghumte hain. Aaj subah, maine unhe pakka irada karte hue suna ki wo us park ki zameen par illegal construction shuru karenge. Unhone kaha ki 'sab setting ho gayi hai, bas kaam shuru karna hai'. Ye sab milkar sarkari zameen par kabza karne ki saazish kar rahe hain. Humari society ke liye yeh bahut badi problem hai. Kripya is par dhyan dein.

Main, Vikas Sharma, S/o Shri Vijay Sharma, owner of 'Sharma Kirana Store', resident of Old Market Road, Jaipur, yeh complaint likh raha hoon. Pichle hafte, do anjaan log (jinhe main Rakesh aur Pappu ke naam se jaanta hoon kyuki dusre shopkeepers unka naam le rahe the) ne hamari market ke kuch dukandaron se zabardasti paise vasoolne ki koshish ki. Aaj shaam, 7:30 PM par, maine unhe apni shop ke bahar khade hokar kisi teesre bande se baat karte hue suna, jismein wo meri shop ko target karne ki planning kar rahe the. Wo bol rahe the 'ab Sharma ji ki bari hai'. Mujhe lagta hai yeh ek organised extortion racket ki conspiracy hai. Main bahut darr gaya hoon.

Main, Divya Singh, D/o Shri Surendra Singh, resident of House No. 15, Kailashpuri, Agra, yeh complaint darj karana chahti hoon. Pichle ek mahine se main notice kar rahi hoon ki Ravi aur Deepak naam ke do ladke, jo mere ghar ke paas wale cyber cafe ke owner hain (Adarsh Cyber Cafe, shaam 5 PM ke baad), kuch suspicious activities mein involved hain. Maine kai baar dekha hai ki bahut saare log wahan aate hain aur jaldi-jaldi documents banwate hain. Aaj maine unhe mobile par baat karte hue suna ki wo 'fake IDs aur passports' banate hain aur 'client ko jaldi deliver karna hai'. Mujhe lagta hai yeh identity fraud aur illegal activities ki gehri conspiracy hai. Kripya jaanch karein.

Aaj subah kareeb 11:30 baje, main apni factory se ghar ja raha tha jab M.G. Road par ek huge crowd ne mujhe rok liya. Ye log kareeb 30-40 the, sab ek political party ke flags pakde hue the. Unhone road block kar diya tha aur zor-zor se anti-government slogans laga rahe the. Jab maine unse rasta dene ko kaha, toh unhone meri bike par laatein maari aur mujhe dhakke diye. Ek ladke ne mera phone cheen-ne ki koshish bhi ki. Main bohot darr gaya aur wahan se bhaag gaya. Meri bike damage ho gayi hai aur mujhe chot bhi lagi hai. Please in logon par action lo, sir. Ye unlawful assembly thi.

Sir, mera naam Priya Sharma hai aur main apni elderly mother ke saath Subhash Nagar mein rehti hoon. Kal shaam 7:00 baje ke aas-paas, hamare ghar ke saamne wali khali plot par 15-20 log jama ho gaye. Ye sab local goons the, jinka leader Vicky Dada hai. Unhone wahan tents lagane ki koshish ki aur illegal construction start kar rahe the. Jab maine unhe rokte hue awaaz di, toh unhone mujhe gandi gaaliyan di aur dhamki di ki agar main police ko call karungi toh wo mere ghar mein ghus jayenge. Hum bohot terrified hain, sir. Please jaldi aakar inko yahan se hatwao.

Main Ram Lal, apni grocery shop chalaata hoon Old Market mein. Pichle ek ghante se, kareeb 25-30 students ka ek group meri dukaan ke saamne protest kar raha hai. Ye log college ke exam results se unhappy hain. Unhone meri dukaan ka entrance block kar diya hai, jisse customers andar nahi aa pa rahe hain. Unhone meri dukaan ke board par bhi paint fek diya hai aur glass todne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Main unhe hatne ko bol raha hoon, but wo sun hi nahi rahe. Meri daily income par asar pad raha hai aur mujhe bohot loss ho raha hai. Please come immediately, sir.

Aaj dopahar 2:00 baje, main apni car mein Noida se Delhi aa raha tha jab DND flyway par ek huge mob ne traffic ko completely block kar diya. Ye log farmers the, jo apni demands ke liye protest kar rahe the. Kareeb 50-60 log the, jinhone tractors aur ropes se poora rasta band kar diya tha. Main 2 ghante se stuck hoon aur emergency mein ja raha hoon. Jab maine unse rasta clear karne ko kaha, toh unhone meri car par danda patka aur aage badhne nahi diya. Meri car ka windshield crack ho gaya hai. Mujhe bohot urgent kaam hai, please help me out, sir.

Sir, mera naam Aman Singh hai. Main ek bank employee hoon. Kal raat kareeb 9:45 baje, jab main apne office se nikal raha tha, toh maine dekha ki Hamare building ke bahar 10-12 log jama the. Ye log local gangsters the jo 'hafta' mangne aaye the building ke security guard se. Unhone security guard ko gher liya aur use marne ki dhamki de rahe the. Jab security guard ne unki baat nahi mani, toh unhone uspar hamla kar diya aur uske haath se paison ka bag cheen liya. Main bohot darr gaya aur chupchap wahan se nikal gaya. Ye log roz aate hain. Please unpar action lo, sir.

Main Sunita Devi, Krishna Colony ki resident hoon. Kal shaam 6:00 baje ke aas-paas, hamari colony mein ek mandir ke bahar 20-25 log jama ho gaye. Ye log do alag-alag groups ke the, jinke beech kisi baat par jhagda ho gaya tha. Unhone ek doosre par patthar fekna shuru kar diya aur galiyan de rahe the. Meri choti beti ghar ke bahar khel rahi thi, main use turant andar khinch li. Unki wajah se poori colony mein darr ka mahol hai. Hum safe feel nahi kar rahe hain. Please police bhej kar in logon ko yahan se hatao, sir, before something bad happens.

Mera naam Ravi Kumar hai aur main Construction Company mein supervisor hoon. Aaj subah 9:00 baje, hamare construction site (Sector 4, Phase 2) par kareeb 15-20 log bina permission ke ghus aaye. Ye log local residents the jo hamare project ka virodh kar rahe the. Unhone hamare workers ko kaam karne se roka aur machines ko damage karne ki koshish ki. Unka leader, Rajesh, keh raha tha ki hum yahan construction nahi kar sakte. Jab maine unhe rokne ki koshish ki, toh unhone mujhse badtameezi ki aur gussa ho gaye. Hamara kaam band ho gaya hai, sir. Please help us.

Sir, main Mohit Jain, Darya Ganj mein rehta hoon. Aaj raat kareeb 8:30 baje, main apne ghar ki taraf ja raha tha jab maine dekha ki ek narrow gali mein 10-15 log ek bike chor ko gher kar maarte hue nazar aa rahe the. Unhone us ladke ko zameen par gira rakha tha aur sab usko mukkon aur laaton se maar rahe the. Ladka madad ke liye chilla raha tha. Main bohot ghabra gaya aur directly police station aa gaya. Mujhe laga agar main beech mein jata toh mujhe bhi maar dete. Ye mob justice tha, sir. Please us ladke ki jaan bachao aur action lo.

Main Rajesh Mehta, apna mobile accessories ka store chalaata hoon Lajpat Nagar market mein. Aaj subah 10:45 baje, 8-10 log meri dukaan ke saamne jama ho gaye. Ye log ek local gang ke members the jo pichle hafte se 'hafta' (protection money) demand kar rahe hain. Aaj unhone dhamki di ki agar maine paise nahi diye toh wo meri dukaan tod denge. Unhone meri dukaan ka board neeche gira diya aur customers ko andar aane se rok rahe the. Main bohot darr gaya hoon aur meri dukaan mein koi kaam nahi ho raha hai. Mujhe turant help chahiye, sir.

Sir, mera naam Anita Devi hai. Main Dwarka Sector 7 mein rehti hoon. Aaj shaam 5:00 baje ke aas-paas, hamari society ke main gate par 20-25 log jama ho gaye. Ye log bahar ke the, jo society ke maintenance staff ke khilaf protest kar rahe the. Unhone gate block kar diya, jisse koi andar ya bahar nahi aa-ja pa raha tha. Jab maine unse request ki ki wo rasta clear karein, toh unhone mujhe gandi-gandi baatein sunayi aur dhakke diye. Mere husband hospital mein hain aur mujhe wahan jaana hai. Please in logon ko yahan se hatao, sir. Ye sab unlawful hai.
